chapters.title: Chapter 1190: Archery Competition
chapters.body:
Chapter 1190: Archery Competition

“Sir Pomro, go!”

“Defeat the ugly half-elf!”

“This lowly guy actually covets Altani’s beauty! He even dares to challenge you!”

“Let him lose his life!”

“…”

Almost all voices were cheering for the half-elf’s opponent: The elf named Pomro.

Chen Rui walked up to the grandstand Zola at the top. Ms. Fairy Dragon smiled when she noticed his arrival. She took the initiative to hold his hand. This action made many male elves who were attracted by Zola’s beauty looked sad.

Chen Rui learned from Zola that his half-elf new servant disappeared after entering the Silver Moon Celestial Capital. When he reappeared, he unexpectedly became the protagonist of a big event.

The course of the incident was just like the plots in many novels. The hero and heroine were a couple in love. They were forced to separate because of the strong opposition from the heroine’s family. The heroine was forced to marry a man she didn’t like. Alas, the hero appeared in time during her wedding. Most of the segments in the novel had happy endings as they were easier to accept than tragedies, but the reality was cruel. After the half-elf found his lover Altani, he was discovered by Pomro who quietly followed Altani before he even managed to say a few words. Pomro was Altani’s engagement partner. Seeing that the prospective fiancée ‘did not repent’ and was still with the lowly and ugly half-elf, he was furious, wishing to let him suffer a painful death.

Pomro didn’t do anything directly, but he gathered the elf guards who maintained order and a large number of elves who participated in the New Moon Festival. For a while, the half-elf who ‘defiled’ and sneaked into the New Moon Festival became everyone’s public enemy.

This was exactly where Pomro was brilliant. The identity of this rival was so special that the half-elf would be killed by the angry elves without doing it himself. Even if Altani desperately protected him, it was useless.

Just when Pomro thought he did it, an unexpected thing happened. A seemingly inconspicuous ‘supporting actor’ reversed the whole situation. It was a ‘little elf girl’ next to Altani.

Pomro knew this little girl whom Altani met at the archery field. The little girl’s archery skills were extremely poor, almost a shame to the elf tribe, and she was ridiculed by everyone. Nonetheless, Altani just kindly comforted and taught the little girl some archery skills. The little girl seemed to like Altani very much, and she had been sticking around her. She even refused to leave when Altani met Taylos.

However, it was such a frail ‘girl’ who burst out with a terrifying breath that made all the elf guards tremble. No one dared to take a step forward. It became a stalemate for a while.

This incident alarmed Altani’s father, Elf Elder Cheropan while Pomro’s father, another elder, Farle, also came. Altani naturally didn’t want her new friend Lalaria to be hurt by his father, let alone implicate Lalaria. However. Altani knew that this was her and Taylos’ last chance. If she missed it, she would marry that nasty Pomro, and Taylos would probably be killed.

Therefore, Altani was determined to threaten her angry father with her life. Swearing to the Moonlight Goddess, she proposed a betting agreement, pitting Taylos and Pomro against each other with archery, and the bet was herself.

Archery competition was the most common and favorite competition of the elves. Pomro was the top archer of the magic archer legion. His archery was almost invincible among those with the same level of strength. Even if it was only for the face of the top archer, he would not reject this betting agreement.

Hence, the archery competition between the 2 rivals started, which attracted a large number of elves to watch the battle. Except for Altani, almost every elf was cheering for Pomro.

Like the riding arena, the archery arena was a large open-air field similar to a track and field. It was surrounded by grandstands for spectators. A special enchantment was placed inside. The strength of the contestants was limited to the same level.

The rules of the official archery competition were from easy to difficult, increasing level by level.

The first thing they experienced was the primary match. The rule was very simple, 10 arrows to determine the outcome. Shoot 10 arrows within 5 seconds, and the one who hit more targets and was more accurate would be the winner.

This was not the practice target that Lalaria used to shoot and play. Not only was the target extremely small, but the distance was at least twice as far away. The most difficult thing was that these were not fixed targets, but moving targets.

All the targets that appeared were moving irregularly. Some flew from bottom to top, some swayed from side to side, and some were gliding in arcs like birds.

Pomro and Taylos walked onto the field with bows and arrows in hand. Pomro was worthy of being the number one shooter of the magic archer legion. As soon as he entered the field, the original anger and jealousy in his eyes disappeared, focusing on the moving targets in the distance. He was highly concentrated.

The same was true for Taylos. When the hourglass of the competition was flipped, the 2 did not make a move first, but they quietly looked at the targets. 1 second, 2 seconds, and at the third second, the 2 shot at the same time.

The elves with ordinary strength could hardly see the movements of the 2 of them clearly. They could only see the falling target in the distance. 5 seconds passed quickly, and all 10 arrows in both their quivers were shot.

The results would come out soon,

Pomro: 20 targets!

Taylors: 20 targets!

The elves burst into a commotion. The half-elf’s score is actually on par with the top scorer Pomro!

What is the concept of 20 targets?

That is to say, within 3 seconds, each of their arrows shot down 2 targets!

Some might be killing 2 birds with 1 stone, and some might be caused by impact, but no matter what it was, it required keen observation, precise calculation and extraordinary archery.

In the first 2 seconds, both of them were preparing, not only to adjust their own state, but also to sense the targets. Although the trajectory of the target changed, in general, there was a special frequency or rhythm. It was precisely because of this rhythm that the 2 could achieve such incredible results.

It didn’t surprise the elves that Pomro had such archery skills, but the half-elf, who had only half or less elf blood, was able to do this, which was really beyond the expectations of many elves.

Pomro’s face sank as he sneered coldly, “Don’t get complacent too early. Even if this match is a tie, you won’t be lucky in the next intermediate match.”

Taylos didn’t pay attention to Pomro. He just looked at Altani who looked concerned outside the arena. When the 2 gazed at each other, it was worth a thousand words.

Pomro’s face looked even more unsightly after seeing this. According to the rules, the first match was tied, and the second intermediate match was about to take place. The rule of the intermediate match was to deal with demonic beasts of the same strength level that were virtualized by the enchantment.

This kind of demonic beast had an almost completely realistic fighting consciousness, and it was definitely not a target that was standing still. It would launch ferocious attacks, which meant that when shooting arrows, they must dodge attacks that were comparable to their own strength. The difficulty was several times higher than the previous standing shooting.

The time for this competition was 5 minutes, and there were also 10 arrows. Whoever kills the demonic beasts with the fewest arrows within 5 minutes would be the winner.

In other words, killing demonic beasts in 4 minutes or killing demonic beasts in 3 minutes would be the same if the former took 3 arrows. If the latter used 4 arrows, then the former wins. Of course, if killing 0 demon beasts or be defeated by demonic beasts within 5 minutes, the match would be judged as a loss.

The demonic beasts were randomly determined by draw lots. Pomro drew the fire snake, which was huge but relatively slow-moving. Taylos was less lucky. He drew the wind leopard, which had the talent of speed.

After drawing lots, both parties enter the field. The enchantment started to automatically generate enemies. The timer would start to count when the generation ended.

Similar to the primary match, facing fierce demonic beasts of the same level of strength, neither Pomro nor Taylors rushed to shoot, but they avoided the attack while observing the enemy.

Chen Rui, who was watching the battle, nodded secretly. If the last game was about hand speed and accuracy, then this match was about patience and the ability to grasp the timing.

Apparently, this wasn’t the first time Pomro had faced the fire snake as he knew the attacking habits of this demonic beast well. After figuring out some tempo of the fire snake, he quickly dodged the fire snake’s continuous burst of flames. Then, the moment the fire snake’s flame power stopped, he shot the arrow.

This arrow carried the whistling lightning, piercing horizontally into the pupil of the fire snake and rushing out from the other pupil. The fire snake howled and rolled around in pain before it finally gradually exhausted and disappeared from the field.

The whole process took 3 minutes, and 1 arrow did the trick. The surrounding elveselves all exclaimed. In contrast, Taylos on the other side looked tight. For elveselves, the wind leopard with super high agility was the nemesis. The difficulty of frontal combat was much higher than that of the fire snake.

Pomro already achieved the best results by killing the fire snake with 1 arrow. Unless Taylos also defeated the wind leopard with 1 arrow, the suspense could be saved until the next game. Otherwise, he would definitely lose. However, under the frantic and high-speed melee attack of the wind leopard, Taylos already had many scars on his body. He was unable to launch a counterattack at all. The contestants in the enchantment were protected and would not really die, but a certain proportion of the damage would be reflected on the body and spirit after leaving the field.

Time passed by second by second. The 5 minutes were almost up.

After missing a pounce, the wind leopard glowed with a faint green light. After being buffed by its talent, its speed soared again. It made an incredible turn in the air and bit Taylos. Even though Altani knew that he would not really die, this scene still made her cover her mouth in terror.

The wind leopard missed again. It turned out that ‘Taylos’ was actually a phantom. At the same time, a red light flashed into the wind leopard’s open mouth. The wind leopard fell straight from the air as if struck by lightning and disappeared.

Taylos gasped slightly, and the blood-red magic patterns on his face gradually disappeared. Chen Rui saw that the half-elf should have used the power of the magic patterns to create a phantom and finally killed the formidable enemy with 1 arrow at the critical moment.

At this time, the 5 minutes had just ended. Even though Taylos long ago ended the battle, according to the rules, this match was still a draw. 2 draws in 2 matches!

The elves were smart people. They already understood that the half-elf’s archery skills were not inferior to Pomro’s. Many elves had shown jealous expressions. Although the first 2 matches were tied, Taylos’ consumption was significantly higher than that of Pomro’s, and the enchantment feedback also caused some damage to him. In this way, the next match would inevitably be affected.

Chen Rui held Zola’s hand and watched the contest between Taylos and Pomro from a distance, but he didn’t help. As he himself said, he wanted to see with his own eyes the result of the half-elf’s confidence and courage.

Despite the atmosphere was against the half-elf, the duel was fair so far.

The third match was a superior match. Unlike the first 2 matches, there would definitely be no draw in this competition, because the rule this time was: Archery battle!

chapters.title: Chapter 1191: Duel
chapters.body:
Chapter 1191: Duel

“Brother!” When Chen Rui looked back, Alice and Michelle came over. Alice was even holding White Wind. The elves around retreated one after another as they looked at the strange ‘elf’ girl who could control White Wind with some surprise.

“Brother!” Michelle came to Chen Rui excitedly and said, “Alice and I won first place in the riding competition! Look, this is our prize!”

With the strength of White Wind, it was reasonable to win the first place. Chen Rui laughed and gave Michelle and Alice a thumbs up, “You’re so amazing!”

Alice and Michelle high-fived triumphantly. Chen Rui looked at the flattering unicorn and threw out an aura fruit. White Wind made a high difficultly jump on the not-so-large grandstand ladder, catching and chewing the aura fruit happily.

Then Chen Rui introduced Michelle to Zola. Zola clearly felt that the elf girl had a pure brother-sister relationship with Chen Rui. Since she was a ‘sister-in-law’ instead of a ‘sister’, the attitude of the ‘aunt’ naturally became very affectionate.

At this time, there were more and more people in the archery field. Many elves had heard the news about the archery duel between the magic archer legion’s top shooter and the half-elf. To everyone’s surprise, there was no winner in the first 2 matches!

At the same time, the triangle relationship between the half-elf, Altani, and Pomro was also unearthed and spread rapidly. Almost everyone present knew the oath Altani swore in the face of the Moonlight Goddess.

Chen Rui saw the figure of Elf Empress Liv appearing in the VIP seat. Beside Empress Liv, he also accidentally found a familiar woman who was not an elf – The current Blue Glory Empire Empress, Landbis.

The Blue Glory Empire and the Silver Moon Celestial Capital were allies, so Landbis must have been specially invited to the New Moon Festival as a guest this time.

The gaze of Empress Liv was quite sharp. She had discovered the existence of Chen Rui, and she had also seen her little daughter talking excitedly with Chen Rui. Her eyes flickered slightly. Since the grandstand was full of elves, Landbis didn’t notice anything unusual. She just had a low voice conversation with the elf Princess Royal Philly, a former alumnus of Starlight College.

At this time, the final match finally began. Archery battle adopted the system of best 2 out of 3 with 20 minutes per round. They had to kill each other by archery. Auxiliary potions or weapons other than bows and arrows were not allowed. The rest were not limited.

If no one ‘died’ within 10 minutes, it would be a tie. If all 3 rounds were tied, then 1 more round would be played. If the tie continued, an additional round would happen again.

Pomro and Taylos walked into the final battlefield. When they first entered, neither of them could move. They would recover only after the enchantment environment was generated. Both of them were secretly gathering strength while quickly observing the generated environment.

This was a forest environment with various traps and dangers hidden in it. From time to time, various visualized demonic beasts would appear and attack. Even if the 2 sides stood still and did not make a move, they would also ‘die’.

The moment the environment was fully generated and the restraints were loosened, Pomro and Taylos moved at the same time. Due to the rules before, their strength was limited to a certain extent. Now without the rule restrictions, their miraculous shooting skills were fully unleashed.

Unlike the first 2 rounds where they planned and moved, both of them launched shot each other without thinking. The action was as fast as lightning.

Pomro’s rate of shooting was pretty amazing. Shooting 3 arrows at once was ordinary on the surface; some people could shoot 10 arrows at the same time, but this kind of attack was too divergent. It was okay to attack a large number of enemies indiscriminately, but it had limited effect on a single enemy, especially for opponents with the same archery skills.

Pomro held 3 arrows between his 4 fingers, and he shot out one after another with the bowstring. Although the arrows were shot ‘in sequence’, the speed was very fast as if almost leaving the string at the same time. Each arrow carried a different strength and trajectory. 1 second after shooting, another 3 arrows were loaded again. Countless whistles came out like hundreds of homing missiles that flew precisely toward Taylos.

Taylos didn’t shoot too many arrows at a time. He shot 1 arrow at a time, but his shooting speed was still higher than Pomro’s. Besides, his attacks were more refined and effective. The 2 sides were evenly matched.

The audience could only see the 2 of them dodging in the forest while moving and making fierce counterattacks at the same time. The countless whistles became the main tone of the battlefield. All kinds of difficult shooting skills were breathtaking. These were not show-off performances, but killing skills that really considered the situation.

Chen Rui nodded secretly. In terms of archery alone, the elf tribe is indeed invincible.

After several rounds of stormy attacks, the frequency of shooting arrows from both sides began to slow down, not because of their strength, but because they had a certain understanding of each other’s characteristics. That form of attack at the beginning was no longer effective because it would consume physical strength in vain. Therefore, they slow down the rhythm and be more cautious when firing arrows at the same time.

If it was a frenzied strafing before, then it was a burst shot now. Although the intensity was not as intense as the strafing, it was more dangerous.

The elves watching the battle were all experts, knowing that it would be a tough tug-of-war. The competition was not only archery, but also tactics, will, physical strength, will and other abilities. Whoever could grasp the momentary opportunity would be the final winner.

The swift figure moved and flickered in the forest. From time to time, one could see the lingering light of arrows. Time passed minute by minute. It seemed that the time limit of 20 minutes was approaching. At this moment, the jungle environment began to fade.

A figure was half-kneeling on the ground with a few arrows stuck in his body. The man was Taylos. Pomro was opposite him. He was shot in his throat by 1 arrow.

Taylos won!

Altani wept with joy while the elves were in a daze as they couldn’t believe their eyes— The top shooter of the magic archer legion is defeated! By the arrow of a half-elf!

Chen Rui could clearly see that Taylos had always been at a disadvantage, but the half-elf was very smart, deliberately using his injuries to paralyze the opponent. He fought while moving to put up the illusion that he was trying to delay time. Pomro who thought he had an absolute advantage naturally refused to give up this great situation, so he pursued fiercely. In the rush for success, Taylos seized the opportunity to kill him with an arrow.

Turned one’s own disadvantages into victory and made a comeback in one fell swoop. This was no coincidence but true tactical literacy. Pomro could be said to have lost justly.

The enchantment in the jungle disappeared completely. Both Taylos and Pomro were teleported out. Pomro clutched his throat with a look of lingering fear. If it was not in the enchantment but in another place just now, he would have died in the hands of the lowly half-elf!

Pomro’s father, the elf elder Farle looked at his son who was walking back with a livid face. A pure elf loses to a half-elf in archery. What’s more, it’s on such an important occasion. It is simply an intolerable shame!

This is no longer an ordinary archery competition, nor is it a betting agreement for women, but a battle that concerns the reputation of the entire Magic Archer Legion, the entire Sisley Family, and even the entire elf tribe!

Even Empress Liv and the Blue Glory Empire’s ruler are watching this duel. No matter what, Pomro can’t lose again!

Farle walked up to Pomro, who was still in disbelief, and slapped his son hard. Pomro was startled, and 5 red marks appeared on his handsome face. Even his bow fell to the ground. The furious Farle stepped on the bow and broke it. He cursed, “It’s only the first round. Wake up! You’re going to tarnish the reputation of the Sisley Family!”

Pomro was almost dumbfounded by the slap. Seeing his father’s eyes that were about to spew fire, he immediately shivered and woke up.

Farle looked at the broken bow on the ground, then he took out a bow and stuffed it in Pomro’s hand, “If you lose again, don’t come back to see me!”

Pomro looked at the bow in his hand with a hint of surprise, then he nodded vigorously.

Chen Rui’s eyes narrowed on the grandstand. Zola said softly, “That bow…”

Chen Rui nodded, shook her hand, and gestured Zola to watch.

At the VIP seat, Empress Liv also saw the bow that Farle gave to Pomro, and she frowned slightly. She wanted to say something, but she didn’t speak in the end.

The second round started soon. Although Taylos suffered a certain amount of consumption and injuries in the previous competition, Pomro suffered a certain degree of feedback from the fatal injury just now, so the 2 returned to the same starting line.

The enchantment in the second round was a hilly environment. There were far fewer shelters than the jungle environment, which made it more difficult for both sides to dodge. For these top-level archers, breaking arrows with arrows would become the most important defensive strategy. That was to replace defense with offense.

This would also be a wonderful battle that was far more intense than the previous round.

However, after the duel started, it showed a one-sided situation. The arrows of the half-elf could not intercept the arrows shot by Pomro at all, because the arrows shot by Pomro were far better than the first round in terms of power and speed. In the event of a collision, Pomro’s arrow would usually shatter Taylos’ and continue flying.

“That’s…” The little elf princess next to Chen Rui looked at the bow in Pomro’s hand and finally understood, “Despicable!”

“Michelle?” Alice asked curiously.

“The bow used by Pomro is called the Mystic Moon Bow. It was a quasi-artifact used by Elf King Span. It is 1 of the 3 elf bows. It is amazingly powerful. After His Highness Span quelled the elf tribe crisis, in recognition of the heroism of Sisley Family Sir Tanis, he gave the Mystic Moon Bow to Sir Tanis. After Sir Tanis died of illness, the bow was passed on to Elder Farle, the son of Sir Tanis. Unexpectedly, Elder Farle actually gave Pomro the Mysterious Moon Bow in order to let him win!”

Michelle’s words let Chen Rui understand the origin of the bow, which was actually a treasure used by the Old Father-in-law Elf King. At this time, the outcome of this match was evident; Taylos lost without any suspense.

The elves immediately cheered, but some elves discovered the mystery and were not as happy as the others. Even though this was just a loophole in the rules, no matter what, the battle of top archery skills had changed.

After the enchantment disappeared, the half-elf glanced at Pomro with grief and contempt in his eyes. As an opponent, he knew better than anyone what Pomro relied on to win.

Pomro turned his head a little guiltily, pretending that he didn’t see that gaze. He just held up the Mystic Moon Bow to accept the cheers from the elves.

When the half-elf walked back to Altani with a gloomy face, he unexpectedly discovered that there was another figure beside Altani. It was the ‘master’ who helped him enter the Silver Moon Celestial Capital, probably another Sir Elf King!

The half-elf was very grateful toward Chen Rui. He was about to bow when Chen Rui’s voice already sounded in his mind.

“Very angry?” This sentence made the half-elf bow his head.

Chen Rui glanced at the VIP seats and said calmly, “This is not a fair world in the first place.”

“I understand.” Taylos looked up without any hesitation or timidity in his eyes, “It’s just a fight to the death.”

“That’s right. Blaming others is useless. All we can do is persevere and go against the current. Maybe there is a glimmer of life, maybe we can catch the lifeline of destiny…” Chen Rui paused, “Since you already have this mental preparation, then accept this arrow and shoot it with the greatest courage and determination.”

Taylos suddenly felt an arrow in his hand. It looked plain, except that the fletching was made of golden feathers.

When he looked at Chen Rui again, he had already disappeared. Judging from the unknown expression of Altani and the nearby elves, that person seemed to be a phantom that did not exist; only the arrow in his hand was a real existence.

chapters.title: Chapter 1192: Result
chapters.body:
Chapter 1192: Result

What Chen Rui said to Taylos was through the [Analytical Eyes]. Taylos’ reply was more like talking to himself. Almost no one noticed the extra arrow in Taylos’ hand, let alone noticed the strange ‘elf’ who had appeared before.

There was only a 5-minute break in the middle. The third round that would decide the outcome would begin soon. Taylos looked at the tearful Altani, then at the golden feathered arrow in his hand. Without any hesitation in his mind, he stepped into the field.

This time the enchantment battle environment was plains, which were more aggressive than hills. Pomro was overjoyed. With the Mystic Moon Bow, he could unleash the full power of the quasi-artifact without any scruples, so this battle was already a sure win for him.

Farle on the grandstand sat down confidently. Although the means were not honorable, for the reputation of the Sisley Family and the entire elf tribe, victory was the most important thing.

As soon as the environment was generated and the duel started, Pomro had already locked Taylos with 3 arrows. Taylos moved faster than he did. The bowstring sounded and an arrow was released.

Pomro knew that Taylor’s single-arrow shooting speed was slightly higher than his own, so he was not surprised. 1 of the 3 arrows in his hand shot out immediately, targeting this arrow. In the previous round, Pomro also easily smashed the half-elf’s arrows.

Strangely, the speed of the arrow shot by the half-elf was surprisingly slow as if it was swinging slowly into the air. Without any suspense, Pomro’s arrow hit the arrow, and it was instantly shattered.

However, it was Pomro’s arrow that shattered.

“What?!” Farle and Pomro exclaimed simultaneously. They thought there was something wrong with their eyes.

The arrow shot by the quasi-artifact Mystic Moon Bow is actually shattered?

The arrow shot by the half-elf flew toward Pomro at the same speed as before. Without thinking, Pomro fired 2 arrows in succession.

Shatter, shatter.

Just like last time.

3 arrows reappeared in Pomro’s hand as he refused to believe it. All of a sudden, countless arrows flew toward the slow arrow with all kinds of light, and there were crackling sounds.

Then, as usual.

All attacks were shattered.

The arrow kept flying slowly, and the golden feathered arrow emitted a faint light as if mocking the opponent’s incompetence.

How can this be?! Pomro’s vest was soaked in a cold sweat as he watched the scene in front of him in disbelief.

Before Pomro realized it, the golden feathered arrow was already approaching him with a calm but irresistible power. Like the power of nature, plain and vast. Pomro couldn’t think of avoiding it at all. It was unavoidable!

Pomro subconsciously swung the Mystic Moon Bow to block the arrow. The arrow hit the Mystic Moon Bow and stagnated immediately. The entire enchantment trembled, then a crack appeared on the Mystic Moon Bow. The crack spread in the blink of an eye. With a ‘ bang ’, it fell apart.

The quasi-artifact Mystic Moon Bow was shattered by an arrow!

At this moment, almost everyone was stunned.

This scene was too shocking. Even after Pomro’s body was pierced by the arrow and disappeared into particles, it didn’t cause much commotion.

After killing Pomro easily, the arrow slowly nailed to the ground, and a large number of cracks began to appear on the ground covered with enchantments. A huge deep pit appeared in a fan-shaped area ahead. The ground in the enchantment was turned into dust.

Such terrifying power!

The power of this arrow completely shocked the audience. Even the half-elf who shot this arrow was no exception— What kind of arrow is this?!

Fortunately, the enchantment only partially collapsed. After the duel scene disappeared, Pomro recovered his body, but he was trembling involuntarily. His face was completely pale. The immense fear caused by the arrow that annihilated everything just now had been deeply rooted in his soul.

“Damn!” Pomro’s father, Farle, yelled; he was the quickest to respond, “This is cheating! This is the blasphemy of the New Moon Festival! This is not a battle of archery at all! Execute this despicable half-elf!”

As soon as this sentence came out, many elves shouted, “Execute the half-elf!”

In fact, most of these elves were well aware of the mystery of the battle just now, but due to the pride of the elf tribe, or vanity, or other feelings, some kind of distortion appeared in the minds of these elves. Therefore, they shouted in response to Farle’s call.

A considerable number of elves also chose to remain silent, but as the calls continued, more and more voices joined in.

On the contrary, the half-elf Taylos seemed to have calmed down. He was just staring at Altani silently. There was nothing else in his eyes, including life and death.

“What a surprise.”

An indifferent voice sounded. This voice was not loud, but it carried an indescribable power that echoed in everyone’s soul, suppressing all the voices present.

On the grandstand, a strange ‘elf’ walked down slowly, followed by several elves and a white unicorn.

Some elves immediately recognized that the white unicorn was the fiercest White Wind in the Jade Forest Sea. Among the few people walking down behind, Little Princess Michelle seemed to be one of them.

Empress Liv had already stood up and was about to speak. Seeing this scene, she was silent for a moment before sitting down again.

Meanwhile, a person beside Empress Liv was already staring closely at the ‘elf’ who was walking in front, with an unconcealable shock on her face.

The look and voice of this elf—no, he’s not an elf!

It’s him!

“Your Majesty Landbis?” The concerned voice of Princess Philly sounded from the side.

The Blue Glory Empress took a deep breath, quickly dispelled the complicated emotions in her mirror-like pupils, and shook her head to express that she was fine.

“The surprise I’m talking about is not the outcome of the duel, but the person who decides the result of the outcome, including you, you… all of you.” With that said, Chen Rui walked slowly to the half-elf’s side. Taylos immediately bowed to him.

“Who are you?!” Farle immediately jumped up, pointing at Chen Rui, “You must be helping the half-elf cheat!”

“I gave Taylos that arrow. It’s cheating indeed.” Chen Rui’s words caused many elves to whisper, but he remained calm. “However, many people present are clear that since the second round, this duel has lost its fairness. The collision of the purest and most exciting archery skills has turned into an ugly battle of utilitarianism. Even more disappointing is that those people who knew the truth just now and wanted to execute the half-elf for some funny reason. What you did is a real blasphemy to the sanctity of the New Moon Festival.”

“Nonsense! You’re the one to blasphemy! You’re with the half-elf!” Farle was furious, “Guards, take him down!”

A sigh sounded. Everyone heard it.

The sigh came from another direction, where a figure appeared in the field. He was silently watching the shattered Mystic Moon Bow on the ground.

“You…” Farle looked at this familiar male elf in surprise. He was suddenly startled, and he quickly bowed, “Your Highness Span!”

“It’s His Highness Span from 20,000 years ago!”

“The Elf King!”

“…”

The elves’ exclamations were sounded around.

Span shook his head and glanced at Farle, “The Mystic Moon Bow is dead.”

Farle lowered his head and said, “Your Highness, it was me who didn’t take good care of the Mystic Moon Bow, causing it to be destroyed by the half-elf with the evil weapon. Please punish me, Your Highness.”

“I said it’s ‘dead’.” Span sighed again, “The Mystic Moon Bow is 1 of the 3 elf bows, which symbolizes bravery and justice. I gave it to your father, Tanis, back then because he was more worthy of this bow than me. However, the moment you give it to Pomro for cheating, its spirit is no longer there. Even if you win the battle in the end, its spirit is gone.”

If someone else said so, Farle will definitely refute or quibble, but the one who said this was the owner of the Mystic Moon Bow, the old master of his father, Tanis, and the legendary Hero King Span of the elf tribe. Farle was speechless.

“The death of the Mystic Moon Bow makes me feel sad, but what is even more sad is the shout just now.” Span looked around at the surrounding grandstands. Wherever his vision went, many elves lowered their heads and did not dare to look at each other. “For superficial things, you do not hesitate to abandon dignity, pride, conscience, and justice! Many compatriots and I have personally experienced the catastrophe 20,000 years ago. In that catastrophe, the Silver Moon Celestial Capital’s Tree of Nature is almost completely destroyed in the hands of the fallen elves. How similar your performance just now is to the fallen ones who were tempted by darkness and evil back then! Have you ever thought that when you think you get the desired result, in reality, more and more precious things are slowly leaving you!”

When Span said this, almost all the elves showed shameful expressions. At this time, Empress Liv’s voice sounded, “His Highness Span is right. We should learn to face ourselves and learn to reflect on ourselves, instead of blindly being complacent and arrogant. I hope this matter can be remembered in everyone’s mind. In my mind, becoming an end is also a new beginning. Only by maintaining self-examination and self-improvement at all times can the elf tribe continue to prosper in this world instead of falling or dying.”

As expected of an empress, this summary is timely enough. Chen Rui nodded secretly and applauded. For a moment, the elves all applauded, Empress Liv nodded slightly to Chen Rui. Taylos, who thought he would be dead himself, never dreamed of such a turning point. He gave another deep salute to Chen Rui gratefully.

The half-elf walked up to Altani and shook his lover’s hand. Unexpectedly, there was an extra flat-chested loli in front of Altani, showing murderous intent, “Get your claws away! Altani is my woman! Anyone who dares to snatch her will be killed!”

The half-elf was dumbfounded, and Altani was also dumbfounded. Only then did she realize that there seemed to be something wrong with this ‘elf girl’. Welcoming a dangerous person?

Chen Rui looked at the grinning lesbian hooligan speechlessly. He was about to speak when he looked at the sky with a frown. The original blue sky was suddenly covered with silver clouds, and the clouds cast countless dazzling light beams. The entire sky of the Silver Moon Celestial Capital trembled, then the enchantment was easily pierced by the light beams.

chapters.title: Chapter 1193: Shocked
chapters.body:
Chapter 1193: Shocked

All looked above the Silver Moon Celestial Capital. Every elf knew that the seemingly transparent sky was actually covered with a very solid enchantment. This was the center of the Silver Moon Celestial Capital with the strongest enchantment. Even a powerful super powerhouse could not easily break through the enchantment. However, the silver light beam actually came down without any effort.

For a while, the atmosphere became tense.

Before the Demi-God powerhouses like Span, Kilanya, and Dursa could make a move, the light beam had already landed on the ground. 3 figures appeared.

2 men and 1 woman.

In front was a burly man with blond hair and a white robe. He had a dignified appearance.

There was a man and a woman standing side by side behind. They were also wearing white robe. Their facial features were slightly blurred. The man’s eyes were indifferent, and the woman’s eyes were closed.

These 3 people gave an unfathomable feeling to the elves, especially the man and woman behind, exuding an intangible coercion that was indescribable. By just taking a glance, there was an urge to kneel down and look up.

“Camael!” Kilanya blurted out.

The elves were taken aback. It turns out to be the strongest peak stage of the Demi-God, the Holy Light Mountain’s 8-winged angel Camael!

The burly man at the front nodded slightly, “Ms. Kilanya.”

Kilanya glanced at a man and a woman in the back, vaguely guessing something. She was getting increasingly shocked, but she said in a calm tone, “Sir Camael, the Holy Light Mountain and the Silver Moon Celestial Capital have always been friendly and supportive of each other. Now is the most sacred New Moon Festival of the elf tribe. Don’t you think it’s too impolite for the 3 of you to rush directly into the enchantment like this?”

“Please forgive my impoliteness.” Camael apologized verbally, but there was no apology in his tone. “I would like to introduce you all that these 2 are the 2 archangels of the Holy Light Mountain, Madam Gabriel and Sir Raphael!”

This introduction shocked the whole city. 2 of the most prominent and powerful peak stage of the Pseudo-God in the human world and the Holy Light Mountain’s 3 archangels, came!

Such peak stage powerhouses could no longer win by relying on numbers. If the opponent came with hostility, perhaps all elves would not be spared.

“The New Moon Festival of the elf tribe?” Raphael glanced around with a calm face. His gaze swept past Lalaria, then stayed on Alice for a while, “A guest with such a strong dark breath is actually invited? These 2 people, 1 is a black dragon, and the other… should be a demon! Could it be that the elf tribe has taken refuge in the Demon Realm?”

As soon as this remark came out, everyone was in an uproar. Their eyes were all focused on Lalaria and Alice.

When Altani heard that the ‘elf girl’ next to her was actually a black dragon, she was taken aback and wanted to stay away from Lalaria, but the half-elf shook his head at her to signal her to calm down.

Michelle was also taken aback as she stared blankly at her new good friend, Alice.

“That arrow…” Raphael’s attention was suddenly attracted by the arrow on the ground that crushed the Mysterious Moon Bow and tore apart the enchantment. It was as if he saw something incredible. He was slightly moved, “The arrow feather part! Could it be…”

“Michael’s feather.” Gabriel, whose eyes were still closed, had already said it.

The elves were shocked again. The arrow that Farle called the ‘evil weapon’ was actually made of the first of the 3 archangels, Michael’s feather!

No wonder it has such power!

“Is it so shocking that it’s Michael’s feather? It just plays some auxiliary role.” The arrow reached a person’s hand in the blink of an eye. The voice was teasing without awe, “Raphael, if it were your feather, I wouldn’t even look at them!”

The elves, who had already been almost numb from shock, were stunned again. How dare someone speaks like that to the Archangel Raphael!

This person is obviously the blasphemy that Elder Farle wants to take down.

Raphael was startled. I actually failed to notice the existence of this person before!

Even I noticed the faint touch of dark breath from the little girl behind that person! It’s not that I didn’t sense him, but a manifestation of a special power. Nonetheless, what surprised Raphael the most was the appearance of this ‘elf’!

“It’s you!” Raphael finally couldn’t keep his composure. He would never forget this face!

In the Holy Child Ceremony, this man fooled everyone including me, and he finally escaped with the demon woman from my hands.

A few years later, this same person came to the Holy Light Mountain again. In that 10-minute battle, I almost died at his hands!

This person is not just ‘Arthur’, but also ‘him’!

Gabriel was also slightly moved, “You’re actually here!”

Faced with such a rude provocation, the 2 archangels did not make a move. Their tone and attitude were unlike the high-sounding and domineering ones before, but a reciprocal tone, which meant that the ‘elf’ had the same strength level as them!

Peak stage of the Pseudo-God!

Apart from the mysterious and unpredictable legendary prophet, when did the elf tribe have such a peerless powerhouse?

Farle’s facial expression suddenly became extremely pale. I had just declared that I wanted to defeat a peak stage of the Pseudo-God!

“I’m just… a guest invited to the New Moon Festival.” Chen Rui grinned, and his appearance changed rapidly from an ‘elf’ to the original ‘Arthur’. At the same time, Lalaria and Alice disappeared and were kept in the Star Conferring Platform.

After all, the opponents were Gabriel and Raphael. Even Lalaria couldn’t withstand the aftermath of the fight, let alone Alice.

It turns out that this person is not an elf! The elves looked at each other.

The feather of that feathered arrow was indeed Michael’s feather. It was obtained by chance during the battle between Michael and Python when he first met Michael.

In addition to Michael’s feather, this arrow was made of various rare materials including the branches of the Tree of Nature. At that time, Chen Rui wanted to make an artifact, but it didn’t achieve the desired effect. The quality of this arrow was far superior to that of ordinary quasi-artifacts, and it had a special ‘territory-breaking’ attribute.

This arrow had a special piercing attribute against all kingdoms or territories. If the half-elf was not weak, the previous arrow could completely crush the enchantment of the competition. Then Pomro would be literally dead.

“ Hmph ! Does an invited guest need to pretend to be an elf?” Raphael sneered, “But I’m not interested in knowing the purpose of your sneaking in here. It’s time to settle our accounts.”

Chen Rui’s simple sentence misled Raphael’s judgment of the elf tribe. He had a smile on his face, “How do you want to settle this account? Just a friendly reminder. If fighting only you alone, it is definitely not enough.”

Raphael glanced back at Gabriel, “Gabriel, it’s a critical time, let’s take him down together!”

This sentence made the elves all shocked. The dignified and supreme Angel Raphael actually publicly proposed to join forces with Gabriel to deal with this mysterious powerhouse!

The most shocked were Empress Liv, Landbis and Kilanya. In her impression, although Chen Rui had the strength of Pseudo-God, he could barely escape from Raphael’s hands. However, Raphael’s attitude now showed that Chen Rui’s strength was already on par with him or even greater!

He is actually at the peak stage of Pseudo-God… Empress Liv secretly smiled bitterly . If only he is really an elf, such a powerhouse plus Legendary Prophet Alucier, even if the elf tribe has no extra ambitions, at least we can truly enjoy a peaceful life under the protection. Certainly, the 3 archangels are still afraid of Alucier, without the legendary prophet, the elves would have been wiped out long ago.

Landbis looked at Chen Rui, who was talking and laughing at the 2 peak stage Pseudo-Gods, and she slowly lowered her gaze, seemingly in deep thought.

Before Gabriel answered Raphael’s proposal, the female ‘elf’ behind Chen Rui suddenly took a step forward. The elves didn’t feel anything, but Raphael and Gabriel felt a burst of force. Camael, who was not the target, couldn’t bear the force and flew out backward. When he landed, he lost his balance and fell down. His body trembled involuntarily.

“Peak stage of the Pseudo-God!” Raphael blurted out with a slightly changed complexion.

“Not Python?” Gabriel’s eyes were closed, but her senses were keen.

The minds of these 2 archangels were shocked at the same time: Beside ‘him’ and Python, there is another peak stage of the Pseudo-God!

Judging from this kind of strength alone, he can already fight fight head-on with the Holy Light Mountain!

“Let me handle it.” When Chen Rui’s voice sounded. A purple starlight shone behind Ms. Fairy Dragon. The majesty and temperament exuded by that magnificent and elegant armor made the elves who love beautiful things fascinated by it while also becoming more and more awe.

“ En .” Zola nodded obediently as she shook Chen Rui’s hand and stepped back. She secretly charged her power, ready to help her lover and protect the elf tribe including her father at any time.

“You actually don’t want a helper. Are you planning to have a solo fight with us?” Raphael saw Chen Rui’s plan. 12 white wings appeared behind him with the [Armor of Faith] covering his whole body, “Although I asked for this, I’ll still give you 4 words. You are overestimating yourself!”

Chen Rui didn’t quarrel with Raphael. He just walked step by step. Psychological tactics were important, but what really mattered was absolute strength. Every time he took a step, the starlight behind him shone brighter.

What Raphael didn’t expect was that starlight not only locked on him, but it also locked on Gabriel firmly. Is he really going to fight us 2 alone?

Wait a minute, this move…

At this time, the vast galaxy behind Chen Rui had clearly appeared in everyone’s vision. In the galaxy, there were 20 constellations that were particularly eye-catching, exuding a particularly bright brilliance.

This scene could be said to be fresh in Raphael’s memory, and his facial expression suddenly changed— ‘He’ actually activated this most terrifying ultimate move immediately! The momentum of this move is obviously stronger than last time in the ancient arena. With such power, even I have the near-immortal [Body of Light Recovery], I won’t be able to withstand it!

Raphael’s horror ensued. Those constellations began to overlap slowly. The momentum of the opponent, whom he thought had reached the limit, took another big leap. This kind of terrifying momentum… Even if Michael fully activated [Glorious Light Forgiveness], he was still far behind.

This person is too dangerous! In just a short time, his strength has risen to such a level!

chapters.title: Chapter 1194: Old Friend
chapters.body:
Chapter 1194: Old Friend

The entire area of the Silver Moon Celestial Capital was trembling. The surrounding intangible enchantment had already shown substantial cracks. The elves felt the irresistible power, and they were all terrified. Is this the power of the most peak stage powerhouse? How terrifying!

Even a Demi-God like Kilanya could only stand still, unable to do anything.

Gabriel and Raphael had been involuntarily moving backward under this force. A long silver stick appeared in Raphael’s hand. He tried his best to release his might and momentum, but he was still unable to stop the pushback. He became more and more shocked. ‘His’ momentum actually suppresses the 2 peak stage of the Pseudo-God in one fell swoop !

Kilanya, Dursa and others who saw the situation clearly were also shocked. It turned out that Chen Rui wasn’t boasting when asking for a 1vs2, but he really possesses such strength!

“Wait a minute.” Gabriel’s closed eyes slowly opened, and her retreating body stopped suddenly. The approaching starlight quickly disintegrated. This was the special might of Saint Fighting Heart, [Destroying All Laws].

However, after the starlight disintegrated, it condensed again, showing no sign of weakening at all.

Gabriel did not activate [Armor of Faith] or weapons, and she said solemnly, “I admit that your power growth rate has exceeded our expectations, but I don’t want to fight meaninglessly. This time I came to the Silver Moon Celestial Capital not to trouble the elf tribe or you ‘old friend’, but to visit another ‘old friend’. If you insist on fighting, then I have nothing to fear.”

“Old friend?” Chen Rui glanced at Gabriel, remained silent for a moment, and finally slowly restrained the power of [All Star Gods View]. An implicit smile appeared on his face, “What a coincidence? I also came here to meet an ‘old friend’.”

“Are you also here to visit that old friend?” Gabriel narrowed her eyes slightly. “Your memory…”

Chen Rui shook his head and said, “My memory has never been a problem, but whether there is a problem with ‘that person’ you mentioned, I don’t know.”

Gabriel frowned, “What do you mean?”

Chen Rui shook his head, “I can answer you with certainty, from the very beginning, you and many others have identified the wrong person.”

“ Hmph ! Stop deceiving yourself.” Gabriel raised her slender eyebrows, “I don’t have time to entangle with you in this kind of thing.”

Chen Rui didn’t bother to explain anymore, so he changed the subject, “What is the purpose of you breaking into the Silver Moon Celestial Capital like this?”

“Why do you think we should answer you?” Raphael interjected with a sneer, “Why didn’t you say the purpose of your coming to see the elf prophet?”

“Unfortunately.” Chen Rui spread his hands. “That sir prophet has sealed off the Psychedelic Forest. He will not see any outsiders.”

Gabriel’s silver and red eyes flashed, “In addition to deceiving ourselves, people sometimes can’t help themselves, don’t they?”

“It seems so.” Chen Rui shrugged, “We shall wait and see.”

“Want to use us to break through Alucier’s seal power?” Raphael sneered disdainfully, “This is not like you.”

“As I said, I’m me, and that person is that person. However, since we are going to visit this old friend, why not go together?” Chen Rui was actually worried about the Ice Fungus. If Gabriel and Raphael force their way into the forest and affect the Ice Fungus, all previous efforts would be wasted.

The sudden arrival of Raphael and Gabriel was indeed unexpected. Although Lalaria’s dragons transformation technique was magical, it surely couldn’t deceive the eye of the peak stage of the Pseudo-God. Raphael, who had a keen sense of dark element power. Even Alice, who had obtained the disguise of Zola’s power, had been noticed. But Zola’s power was no small matter. Raphael’s sense of Alice was actually quite weak. That ‘demon’ status was more of a guesswork.

This time, the 2 peak stage of the Pseudo-Gods directly broke into the Silver Moon Celestial Capital probably because the elf tribe refused to see any outsiders during the New Moon Festival. But their coming together also showed how much the Holy Church attached importance to the legendary prophet. Back then, the 3 archangels wanted to destroy the Tree of Nature infected by the Abyss, but they were intimidated by Alucier and gave up. It could be seen from this that Alucier’s strength should be comparable to that of the 3 archangels or maybe even surpass the 3 of them.

“Go together? You alone, with us?” Raphael glanced at Zola. To be honest, with the strength that ‘he’ showed just now, plus this mysterious woman, even if Gabriel and I have some kind of combined secret technique, I’m afraid we are still not their opponent.

“Isn’t 1 person enough?” Chen Rui smiled, showing strong confidence.

Raphael snorted while Gabriel thought for a moment. Then, she closed her eyes again, obviously agreeing to the proposal.

Chen Rui turned around to Empress Liv, “Beautiful elf Majesty Empress, I’m sorry to come uninvited at this time. Now, these 2 ‘old friends’ and I want to visit the elf tribe’s legendary prophet, I wonder if Your Majesty will allow it?”

With Chen Rui’s strength, these remarks were just giving face to Empress Liv and the elf tribe. At the same time, he deliberately disregarded his relationship with the elf tribe in front of the 2 archangels. After all, Alice was seen through and it involved the demons. Once it was publicized that the Silver Moon Celestial Capital colluded with the Demon Realm, then the elf tribe would become the public enemy of the human world.

Empress Liv understood his intent and grace, so she bowed her head slightly, “Of course, it is the honor of the elf tribe for sirs to come to the Silver Moon Celestial Capital. However, Sir Alucier has indeed closed the Psychedelic Forest. If sirs want to see the prophet, you can only go on your own.”

Chen Rui nodded without saying much. He glanced at Gabriel and Raphael lightly before walking toward the direction of the Psychedelic Forest. His footsteps were very ordinary and the speed was not fast, but others couldn’t see the walking rhythm clearly. Instead, they had a strange feeling that Chen Rui was not moving, but the surrounding environment was retreating automatically.

“Space?” Raphael’s pupils contracted slightly.

“It does feel a little like that, and it is more mysterious compared to Michael’s space might. However, it should be far from the level of might…” Gabriel’s sense was quite clear. This was indeed Chen Rui’s new comprehension through the Tower of Glory. It contained a little power of space mysteries, which was more like a rudiment.

“ Hmph , shallow show off.” Raphael said with disdain, but he became more and more vigilant in his mind. The strength of this enemy grew too fast. If this continues, it won’t take long before I cannot match him at all, so I must try to get rid of him quickly.

Gabriel didn’t speak anymore and walked forward. Raphael naturally walked beside her. Camael stayed where he was.

The purpose of Raphael and Gabriel bringing Camael to the Silver Moon Celestial Capital was self-evident: To deter the elf tribe.

After the Tree of Nature mutation battle, the elf tribe no longer had the powerhouse of the peak stage Demi-God. The strongest was Kilanya at the intermediate stage of the Demi-God. As long as the 2 archangels contained Alucier, the strength of the Camael at the peak stage of the Demi-God was enough to suppress all elf super powerhouses.

However, before seeing Alucier, an enemy who could rival the 2 archangels suddenly appeared, and there was also a mysterious woman who was at the peak stage of the Pseudo-God present. Camael, who was supposed to be invincible, completely became an extra.

Camael could clearly sense that he was always locked by an intangible coercion, constantly suppressing his soul, so he felt like he was sitting on pins and needles. The source was that mysterious woman.

He could neither go nor stay now. The 8-winged angel, known as the strongest Demi-God, broke out in cold sweat after a while,

In fact, Camael didn’t know that this peak stage of the Pseudo-God powerhouse that made him shudder was actually the projected woman at the ‘intermediate stage of the Demi-God’ who was easily defeated by his Spear of Judgement in the Holy Child Ceremony.

Ms. Fairy Dragon did hold a grudge, but she was now at the peak stage of the Pseudo-God. Bullying a small character like Camael had no meaning. Of course, she wouldn’t make it too easy for Camael either.

After Empress Liv and Landbis left the arena, the elves followed suit and dispersed one after another. The arrival and confrontation of several peak stage powerhouses made the previous affairs of the half-elf pale in comparison. Besides, many elves already know that the half-elf was the subordinate of the super powerhouse that competed against the 2 archangels, so they put away any ill intention.

Now Taylors and Altani were standing behind Zola. Although many elves showed unfriendly gazes, none of them dared to say anything more.

In any case, with so many things happening, the New Moon Festival would still be held as usual, but the relaxed and cheerful atmosphere before was gone. Every elf felt a heavy sense of oppression in their mind.

Michelle seemed a little depressed, not because of the psychological oppression of those powerhouses, nor because of the deep thought caused by the archery competition, but because of Alice.

Although she hadn’t known Alice for a long time, she could be described as ‘an old friend at first sight’. This partner of similar age and personality was no less important to the little elf princess than ‘Richard’ and Blanche.

I didn’t expect that Alice is actually… a demon?

According to legend, the ruthless and dark Demon Realm will fight the human world every 500 years. Alice is from that terrifying world?

So… what about the newly recognized ‘brother’?

“Michelle?”

A familiar voice sounded, surprising the little elf princess, “Alice!”

No doubt, it was Alice who appeared behind.

Michelle quickly looked around, and she pulled Alice to the back of a tree, “You’d better go back to Sister Zola.”

“Don’t worry, my brother and sister are both very powerful. Especially since they have shown their strength just now, no one dares to harm me.” Alice shook her head, “Besides, I’m now a projection. My real body is kept in a special world by my brother. Even if this projection dissipates, nothing will happen, but there is a time limit.”

“That’s good.” Michelle breathed a sigh of relief.

Alice found that Michelle was not particularly resistant, so she asked tentatively, “Don’t you blame me? Michelle.”

“Blame you?”

“I didn’t tell you my identity before.” Alice lowered her head, “I’m the princess of the Demon Realm’s Fallen Angel Empire, Alice. Lucifer.”

“So you’re the princess of the Demon Realm… Actually, I didn’t tell the truth too. Empress Liv is my mommy, and I’m the little princess of the elf tribe.” Michelle said nervously, “Can we… still be friends? “

“We are not ordinary friends; we are partners.” When Alice saw the gaze that the expectant gaze of the little elf princess, her spirits suddenly perked up.

“ En ! Partner!” Michelle jumped up happily and held Alice’s hand tightly.

“Actually, I’m also a little princess, but my sister later became an empress, so I became the first princess of the empire. Now I’m also a lord…”

“ Wow , lord! Can you tell me what’s so cool about the Demon Realm?”

“Sure……”

The 2 lolis quickly regained their previous vigor and chattered again.

TL: Did Alucier foresee the archangels too?

chapters.title: Chapter 1195: Bizarre Script
chapters.body:
Chapter 1195: Bizarre Script

Chen Rui, Gabriel, and Raphael walked all the way to the periphery of the Psychedelic Forest.

Same as last time, the Psychedelic Forest was a ring-shaped forest. There was a stone slab outlet at the entrance, leading directly to the faintly visible hut in the forest.

When Chen Rui came to the Psychedelic Forest last time, he was holding the green leaf badge presented by Finoia. Except for the ‘test’ that Alucier instructed Kilanya to transform into the Abyss witch, he did not encounter any obstacles or abnormalities.

Chen Rui stopped. His current strength was no longer comparable to that of the past. Although it was the same scene as before, even without activating the [Pole Star Transformation], he could still sense the special breath emanating faintly from the Psychedelic Forest. This breath gave him a dangerous feeling.

This kind of feeling was not there when I was holding the green leaf badge before. No wonder even the 3 archangels are afraid of Alucier. It seems that it will not be easy to act as an uninvited guest this time.

Raphael behind him also stopped, “Why? Dare not go in?”

Of course Chen Rui wouldn’t fall for this provocation method. He turned around and smiled, “A little bit indeed.”

Raphael said contemptuously, “Are you ever afraid of death?”

“Of course. Only those who are afraid of death will understand the preciousness of life; if you ignore even death, then life and everything else are not enough in your eyes. Is there any meaning to living like this?”

Raphael couldn’t find any words to refute for a moment. He just walked forward with a sneer as if he was mocking someone’s fear with his actions.

Just when Raphael took a few steps, the scene of the secluded forest in front of him had changed. The ring-shaped forest slowly twisted and turned grayish and blurred. The originally hidden breath burst out suddenly, and the deterrence increased by more than 10 times! If the previous crisis was still subtle, then it was obvious now. For a moment, Chen Rui’s hair stood on end; even his thinking was almost frozen.

Chen Rui’s pupils contracted slightly. This extremely threatening feeling was the same when he was facing 6 Main Elemental Messengers — Is it due to Alucier’s own power or the power of the entire Psychedelic Forest?

“Just pretentious Illusion.” Raphael narrowed his eyes and continued to walk forward. Gabriel closed her eyes and followed behind Raphael. Although the 2 of them looked very indifferent on the surface, there was a special tacit understanding in their steps as if they were connected from beginning to end. They could respond to various emergencies at any time.

After all, Alucier was not an ordinary person. Although it was heard that the life force of this legendary prophet was close to exhaustion, as long as he was not dead, he must not be underestimated.

“Aren’t you afraid of death?” Gabriel felt that Chen Rui had followed from behind.

“I’m really afraid of death, but compared with death, there is something more important.” Chen Rui said lightly, “If I lose them, I would rather choose to face death directly.”

“Your choice…” Gabriel paused, then she suddenly turned around. Her silver-red pupils that had been charging power had already opened. Chen Rui’s first reaction was to immediately activate the [Pole Star Transformation], but there was no murderous intent in the pupils, but another strange feeling. A trace of indescribable feeling… sorrow?

Gabriel stared into his eyes, wanting to say something. In the end, she closed her eyes, turned around and followed Raphael.

Chen Rui was somewhat puzzled by Gabriel’s attitude, but Gabriel obviously regarded him as another person. Just as he was about to explain this, he suddenly found that the data of Gabriel and Raphael in the [Analytical Eyes] had disappeared!

With their speed and distance, they should be right ahead. How did they suddenly disappear?

Chen Rui sensed that the breath around him was becoming more terrifying. His soul began to tremble slightly. He might collapse at any time, so he activated [Purple Pole Star Transformation] without thinking.

After the [Pole Star Transformation] was activated, the pressure no doubt weakened a lot, but the warning sign in his mind became stronger and stronger.

Chen Rui suddenly found something extra in his hand. When he looked down, he saw a mobile phone.

I seem to have seen this mobile phone somewhere. From the appearance, it is not the magic mobile phone that I made in this world, and there is no brand logo; just a camera.

Chen Rui suddenly remembered something, and his facial expression suddenly changed.

This phone is actually the one I picked up before the crossover!

It is because of this mobile phone that my soul came to this strange world and my life has undergone earth-shaking changes!

Why did this phone suddenly appear?

Chen Rui’s breathing became a little heavy while he was thinking quickly. Then, he finally pressed the power switch.

There was no ‘confirm’ prompt as expected, and there was no square box saying ‘Welcome to the Super System’. It was just a familiar startup ringtone.

Chen Rui’s eyes widened suddenly because he found that the star armor covering his arm disappeared out of nowhere. Not only the arm, but the entire set of star armor disappeared, and he was wearing a sweatshirt, which seemed to be a familiar brand on Earth.

Illusion?

Why is there no corresponding prompt from the Super System? With a thought, Chen Rui found that he couldn’t even sense the Super System. His power of Pseudo-God level had also been lost. He was just an ordinary person.

Is it because of this damn mobile phone? Or is it because of some kind of illusion that completely traps my consciousness?

“Chen Rui!” A familiar voice sounded with a bit of sternness.

Chen Rui took a closer look and found that it was Tiffany. Wait a minute, what kind of expression is that?

Hate?

No way, my Tiffany… Especially when alone, isn’t she either cute or shy, right?

Also, the clothes she’s wearing are actually some kind of… school uniform?

“Tiffany?”

“Call me Student Tiffany or the Discipline Department President of the Student Union!” Tiffany looked at him coldly, “Don’t forget we are in the school!”

“The Discipline Department… President?” Chen Rui’s eyes widened.

“That pretentious dumb look is disgusting.” Tiffany’s expression was particularly disgusted, “I just want to tell you that although I’m forced to make a marriage contract with you because of the family, you will definitely not succeed. I will never marry a scumbag like you! Just wait and see!”

Scumbag? Family? What kind of bizarre development is this? C hen Rui was stunned for a moment, only to realize that he was in front of a building with people constantly passing by. Judging from the structure, it should be… an academic building?

While Chen Rui was in a daze, Tiffany had already left.

“Interesting.” Chen Rui took a deep breath and regained his composure. What kind of world is this? Tiffany’s identity actually became the Discipline Department President?

This is clearly the illusion created by Alucier!

Obviously, the person who created this illusion is extremely powerful. At least in terms of soul, he had already surpassed Chen Rui, trapping his spirit completely. He was unable to produce other consciousness, just like a cage of thoughts, so he couldn’t enter the Super System or activated ability.

From this point, it could be seen that Alucier’s strength was at least spiritually far beyond imagination, but even the so-called ‘prophet’ wouldn’t know his biggest secret.

The mobile phone of the Super System, including these characters that appeared later, should be automatically generated by illusion according to some kind of reflection in his mind.

In any case, Chen Rui was still trapped in this illusion. However, no matter how brilliant this illusion was, it was not invincible. Chen Rui had experienced the [Refined Mind] of the Super System and defeated the ‘inner demon’ like Shura, so he was no stranger to this kind of battle of the mind. As long as he found a flaw, he could break the shackles and truly restore his consciousness. Before that, he must maintain a firm willpower and not be confused by illusion.

“Let’s see if there are more interesting things in this illusion. It’s like a crossover novel.” Chen Rui simply let go of the burden in his mind as he walked forward leisurely.

“Chen Rui! Why are you still here? Brothers are all waiting for you.” There was another familiar voice. When Chen Rui looked back, there was another beautiful girl dressed as a schoolgirl with long silver hair and narrow pupils: One was silver and one was red.

“Gabriel?” Chen Rui was shocked even though he was mentally prepared.

“Why don’t you call me Tezaneer anymore?” Gabriel blushed, Chen Rui couldn’t believe that shy and charming appearance. Is she still Gabriel? It should be Kia or Isabella who changed into Gabriel’s appearance!

“Let’s go, brother and the others are waiting on the basketball court. You are the only one missing.” Gabriel took Chen Rui’s arm and hurried downstairs.

As Chen Rui expected, this was a scene of a university campus, except that most of the faces passing by were foreigners.

A lot of spectators gathered around the outdoor basketball court. Chen Rui saw the 2 most familiar faces on the field at first glance, Paglio and Roman!

These 2 guys were actually playing basketball. In this illusion of mind reflection, the more he was familiar with the person, the easier it was to find a loophole to break the illusion, so Chen Rui was not panicked. Besides, it’s another kind of experience to play basketball together with these 2 according to the ‘script’.

Chen Rui stepped forward immediately, “You 2…”

“It’s too late to beg for mercy now.” Paglio looked at him with a sneer.

Chen Rui was taken aback: This attitude seems to be a bit wrong…

As Roman jumped from outside the three-point line, the basketball drew a beautiful arc, and went into the net. After landing, he gave Chen Rui a contemptuous look, “If you admit defeat, then there is no need for a match today. From now on, stay away from Athena.”

“Athena?” Chen Rui was taken aback. It’s too ridiculous.

Another tall man walked up the court, took a pass from Paglio, and hit a deft half-hook just outside the three-second area.

“Moore?” Even though he knew it was an illusion, when Chen Rui saw this face, his mind was still agitated.

“Do I look like I’m friends with you?” Moore shot him a blank look with contempt in his gaze.

“Chen Rui, come and warm up. It will start soon!” A voice sounded from behind. Chen Rui looked at the other half of the field. Someone was waving to him. It was Michael!

And Raphael on the side!

Chen Rui looked at Gabriel who was walking beside him. He pointed to Michael and Raphael with an annoyed face, “They are your… brothers?”

“Michael is my brother, and Raphael is my brother’s classmate. What happened to you today?” Gabriel touched Chen Rui’s forehead with concern, “Fortunately, no fever. Let’s go!”

“Damn!” Chen Rui clenched his fists. Damn Alucier, what kind of bizarre script is this!
