chapters.title: Chapter 1196: School Days: Scumbag Chen
chapters.body:
Chapter 1196: School Days: Scumbag Chen

Although intimidated by this bizarre script, Chen Rui still maintained a considerable degree of calmness in his mind.

This world gave Chen Rui a very realistic feeling. The amount of spirit power displayed by Alucier was obviously superior to him, so he couldn’t forcibly escape from the illusion.

However, there is no perfect existence in this world. This illusion world is the same. It is the mental framework of the entire illusion that really works. As for these acquaintances, they are just illusions reflected from the mental framework. The missions and events are definitely different if another person enters this place. But no matter how it changes, the basic ‘framework’ that constructs this world will not change. As long as I find the node, I can break the framework and completely shatter these illusions.

The best way is to integrate into this illusion and find the node.

“Don’t be distracted!” Raphael yelled, and he stepped forward in time to block Paglio who just passed through Chen Rui with the ball.

Due to Raphael’s backup, Roman, whom he was marking, was left unmarked. Paglio immediately passed the ball to Roman, and Roman jumped up without thinking. Moore who was marking Michael rushed over to block. However, Roman didn’t shoot after jumping. He passed the ball to Moore under the basket.

There were no defenders in front of Moore, and he slammed the ball into the basket easily. The students watching the game immediately applauded.

“Are you all right?” Michael patted Chen Rui on the shoulder, “Why are you a little absent-minded? That woman is a trivial matter. Some of these guys actually dare to take the initiative to pick things up. We must let them know how powerful we, brothers, are. Stay focus and don’t lose to these guys.”

Brothers? Okay. Chen Rui resisted the strange feeling in his mind and nodded.

Although Chen Rui was a half otaku in his previous life, he had always been a basketball lover, but his skill was very ordinary. He liked to watch the NBA with a few of his friends, then they commended on the game together. They bragged and trash talked as if those superstars were rookies, and they would play thousand times better.

In this illusion, there was no peak stage of the Pseudo-God, but the perception and movement ability of this body were quite outstanding among ordinary people. If his basketball skill in the previous life on Earth was 50%, his current skill might be between 80% and 90%.

The score became 1-0. Roman started to serve again. Paglio caught the ball and broke through Chen Rui easily again. Just when the poison dragon decisively jumped up to shoot, a hand appeared above and slammed the basketball off his hand out of the bound. It was Chen Rui.

Chen Rui grinned, “ Hey , want to get through me? A blockshot for you.”

The chance to take on the poison dragon in basketball is one of a kind. Since I still can’t find the flaw of this illusion, let’s just enjoy it.

Paglio snorted as he ran over to re-serve. Although the blockshot was done beautifully, the applause was sparse. It was in stark contrast to the previous score by Paglio’s side.

Chen Rui looked at the direction of the applause, and there was a lot of sweat on his forehead. Except for Tezaneer Chick, there were also a few familiar faces such as Satan, Python, Abaddon, Sariel and Satan. They were even whistling.

All right. Anyway, even Tiffany can be an enemy and Michael can be a best friend in this distorted world. What else is unacceptable? Good thing that the Python chick is still on my side.

The game continued. Despite Paglio’s hard work and the support of most of the audience, the Chen Rui trio’s skill was superior. They finally won the game with a score of 10-6.

“The 3 strongest members of the sports department are nothing more than that. I shouldn’t go all out. At least, we can play a little longer.” Raphael took a sip of his drink and looked at the 3 people opposite him contemptuously. His ability to draw hatred was not inferior to that of another world.

With livid faces, Paglio pulled Roman who was about to come up to beat him up. He gave Chen Rui a fierce look, “You won. I admit defeat. I won’t care about anything between you and Athena from now on!”

Thinking of Tiffany’s attitude toward him before, Chen Rui felt a strange feeling in his mind. Just as he was about to speak, Paglio and the rest had already turned and left. The surrounding audience also left.

“Let’s go to ‘Happy Hour’ to celebrate at night.” Satan walked over with Python and others, and he high-fived Chen Rui and the others one by one. “I knew you would win, so I booked a night show long ago.”

Chen Rui looked at Satan who almost had ‘tall, rich and handsome’ written on his face, and he wanted to say, “Local tyrant, let’s be friends.” But the most important thing for him now was to figure out some key points. In this world, It seemed that familiar good friends had become unfamiliar enemies, and the originally unfamiliar enemies had become good friends who were still unfamiliar. This confusing ‘setting’ would undoubtedly make it more difficult to find the node.

“Okay.” Michael glanced at Chen Rui and Raphael, “Everyone goes back and takes a shower. Get some sleep, then gather at the old place.”

“Wait a minute, Chen Rui. Didn’t you agree to accompany me to the library?” Gabriel voiced up.

Chen Rui just didn’t know where to go back, so he agreed immediately.

Michael frowned, pulled Chen Rui aside, and lowered his voice, “We are all brothers who grew up together. I know you have many women, and you are engaged to that woman from the Mammon Family. I’ll just say this. Unless you can marry Tezaneer, otherwise you must not date her!”

“I understand.” Chen Rui looked at Michael’s anti-thief expression as he nodded with an awkward smile.

Raphael looked at Gabriel, who only had Chen Rui in his eyes, and his eyes were a bit dejected; Python, who had been silent all this time, looked at Chen Rui’s arm held by Gabriel, and she seemed even more dejected.

After being separated from Michael, Satan and others, Gabriel happily walked toward the library with Chen Rui on her arm. Chen Rui found that when the students along the way saw him, they would stay far away as if seeing and avoiding a plague.

“Tezaneer.” Chen Rui thought for a while, “What kind of person am I?”

“I don’t care what other people think of you. Anyway, since I was a child, I felt that…” Before Gabriel finished speaking, her face was already flushed, and she lowered her head.

Chen Rui was speechless for a while. Clearly, Gabriel had misunderstood him. Nonetheless, from the first half of the sentence, he could faintly sense some problems.

Soon, they came to the library which was huge. There were also many people.

Gabriel pulled Chen Rui to pick the books together, flipping through them while taking notes in the small notebook. After a while, Chen Rui’s hands were already full of a thick stack of books.

Tezaneer Chick said embarrassingly, “I want to borrow these few books. It’s too heavy to hold them like this. You wait for me in the reading room first. I still need to find some materials. I’ll come to you when I’m done.”

Chen Rui nodded. He carried a large stack of books and walked toward the reading room. Tezaneer Chick chose not ordinary books, ‘A Brief Introduction to Philosophy’, ‘History of Theology’, and ‘”On Immortality’. She is indeed an archangel. Although she is in a different world, she still chooses such corresponding topics. Chen Rui was mocking in his mind when he suddenly saw a familiar female figure in front. He blurted out, “Shea!”

When the figure turned around, No doubt it was his Princess Royal Highness, still the elder sister type with iceberg temperament. However, Chen Rui was taken aback by the strong hatred and murderous intent revealed in those purple eyes.

Shea walked over quickly and said furiously, “Where is my sister?”

“Alice?” Chen Rui asked tentatively.

“Say it! What did you do to Alice?!”

“I don’t know.” The anger made Chen Rui take a few steps back.

Shea clenched her fists furiously, “Come at me if you want!”

“Loud noise is prohibited in the library.” An indifferent female voice sounded behind her. It turned out to be Mother-in-law Fairy Dragon Meria with a librarian’s sign on her chest.

“Teacher Meria.” Shea regained some composure.

“This is the library. Don’t disturb other people.” Meria looked at Shea with a gentle gaze. “Go out if you want to solve things and call the police if necessary.”

“I’m sorry. I understand.” Shea nodded and glared at Chen Rui before going out.

“Aunt Meria” Chen Rui called out, but Meria didn’t even look at him. She walked away as if he was transparent.

After being ignored, Chen Rui came to a table and sat down. The nearby students got up and left one after another. 1 of them didn’t react, but she was dragged away by her companions, and hurriedly followed. Chen Rui could only respond with an awkward smile.

Some murmurs could be faintly heard in the distance.

“Have you heard? Chen Rui seems to be engaged to Tiffany from the Student Union.”

“Senior Tiffany from the Discipline Department? No way!”

“It was the Mammon Family’s decision. Although Senior Tiffany firmly opposed it, she still failed. Hmph! Who told that guy’s father is the patriarch of the Roland Family and 1 of the school’s most influential directors!”

“It’s really beauty and the beast.”

“Let’s not say it’s senior, that guy relied on his family’s power and financial resources to harm many girls.”

“I know that 2 girls in the Art Department were cheated on by him, then he abandoned them after getting bored. 1 girl almost committed suicide.”

“It is said that he also coerced a female teacher and took nude photos. The daughter of the female teacher is already in kindergarten.”

“The one just now was Senior Shea from the Department of Economics and Management. She has been helping those students who have been bullied by him. Shea’s younger sister is only in junior high school. She suddenly disappeared yesterday. It is likely done by the scum.”

“Also, he recently took a liking to Athena, a girl from a poor family in the Physical Education Department. He gave her a lot of expensive gifts, but she is unmoved. As a result, seeing that he couldn’t gain her liking, he asked someone to smash Athena’s father’s stall”

“It’s Uncle George who sells pastries, right? No wonder that guy is called ‘Scumbag Chen’.”

“Paglio, Moore, and Roman from the Physical Education Department specially found Scumbag Chen for this matter and played a basketball game. If Scumbag Chen loses, he can no longer pursue Athena.”

“You don’t know yet? On the basketball court just now, Senior Paglio and the others have already lost.”

“Damn, then Athena…”

“Keep your voice down, Scumbag Chen is looking this way. Hurry up!”

Chen Rui’s forehead was already in cold sweat. Leaving aside those familiar names, abandoning girls in the Art Department after playing with them, coercing a married female teacher, kidnapping the loli, and even beating up the father just to force girl to submit. This is no longer as simple as ‘School Days’, I am a total scumbag!

Damn, where are the damn node? If I stay any longer in this world, even a good person like me will go insane.

chapters.title: Chapter 1197: Principal
chapters.body:
Chapter 1197: Principal

Chen Rui inevitably felt a little depressed knowing the fact that he was a scumbag.

Gabriel had already returned to the reading room with a book in her hand. Chen Rui saw that her eyes were a little red, and he asked in surprise, “What’s wrong? Tezaneer, did someone bully you?”

Gabriel shook her head as she raised the book in his hand, “Just by reading this paragraph, I feel a little sad.”

Gabriel in this world is indeed a gentle and charming girl, and she seems quite sentimental now. Chen Rui looked at the title of the book,”‘Isaiah’”? What kind of fiction is this?”

“Fiction? This is the 23rd book of the Bible…” But Gabriel was used to the ignorance of a certain scum, and she didn’t despise him, “This is the paragraph… I don’t know why when I saw this, I can’t help being sad.”

Crying while reading the Bible? A s expected of a theology enthusiast . Chen Rui was actually not interested in this kind of book, but it was not good to turn down Tezaneer Chick. He went closer to read. It was the following paragraph.

Bright star, son of the morning, why have you fallen from heaven?

Why are you, you conquered the nations, chopped down to the ground?

You once said in your heart: I want to ascend to heaven; I want to exalt my throne above the stars of god; I want to sit on the mount of the assembly, in the extreme north. I want to ascend above the high clouds; I want to be equal with the Most High. But you will go down to hell, to the very depths of the pit…

Fall? For a moment, Chen Rui felt a feeling that he couldn’t explain. This passage seemed to describe a person, but, for some reason, that person’s name is vague in this book. I seem to know this person in my mind, but I can’t remember the name.

“Chen Rui?” When Gabriel saw Chen Rui in a daze, she reached out and shook him.

“It’s okay,” Chen Rui didn’t think much about it and smiled, “You want to borrow these books to read, right?”

“ En , I’ll go to Teacher Meria to register to borrow books now.” Gabriel thought of something, “You’d better not go. Teacher Meria is a good friend of Teacher Catherine, so she definitely doesn’t want to see you…”

“Catherine? Is she a teacher?” The name of the Dark Shadow Empire’s Royal Majesty Empress lifted Chen Rui’s spirit.

“Didn’t you…” Gabriel saw Chen Rui’s expression, and her facial expression became even weirder, “Okay, let’s not talk about this. You go outside and wait for me.”

Chen Rui walked out of the library curiously. When he was at the door, the stupid mobile phone sounded. When he saw the name displayed in the directory, Chen Rui was taken aback and clicked the answer icon.

“Son, you’ve been making a lot of trouble in school recently. You should stop before things get serious.” This was clearly the voice of Lex the Great, the current school director.

“ Oh .” Chen Rui replied absent-mindedly. Fortunately, Lex could be regarded as a father in a certain sense; there was no whole new father.

“At the school, I’ve settled the matter with Catherine for you. She will be transferred to another school. As for those nude photos, you can decide for yourself. Although this woman has no background, she is quite smart. Try not to provoke her. “

Chen Rui’s mind was racing with thoughts. No wonder Gabriel has such a weird expression, ‘I’ coerced Catherine to take the nude photos!

So her ‘kindergarten daughter’ is Darling Duoduo?

Damn!

“Let’s not talk about that,” Lex’s voice revealed a trace of excitement, “You performed quite well at the engagement banquet that day. As for Tiffany’s personal wishes and the relationship between you, it is not a problem as long as this marriage is maintained. After announcing our marriage with the Mammon Family, our influence has further expanded. The family’s stock has increased by 10%. I have contacted some small directors of the school in the past few days, and the progress is good. As long as I get their equity, I will replace Alucier as the chairman and principal!”

Chen Rui was still half-listening before, but when he heard the last sentence, his eyes suddenly widened.

Alucier, the chairman and principal of the school!

Alucier himself is actually in this illusion! Is he a fictional character like everyone else? Or…

“I’m going to get on the plane right away, and I’ll be back in about a week. During this time, you have to be careful. As long as you don’t cause major trouble, the rest will be fine. If you have any troubles, contact Old Kovax immediately.” After Lex said this, he hung up the phone.

Chen Rui took a deep breath and made a decision. The damn setting and the plot can be put aside first. I must meet the ‘Principal’ Alucier!

Where is the principal’s office? The teaching building? Chen Rui waited for Gabriel to come out and ask, then he suddenly a few familiar faces appeared in front of him.

Isabella, Strena, and Adeline. These three are wearing police uniforms?

Speaking of which, Yini is really charming in this police uniform, charming and heroic, Strena is also heroic, but a little more aloof and arrogant while Adeline shows the freshness of the girl next door. However, 3 of them had no friendly facial expression toward ‘Scumbag Chen’.

“Are you Chen Rui?” Isabella walked straight over and showed her ID, “I’m Isabella, a first-grade detective from the Investigation Division. I now suspect that you are related to a missing person case. Please go back to the police station to assist with our investigation now. You have the right to remain silent, and anything you say can and may be used against you in court. You also have the right to consult with a lawyer. If you cannot afford a lawyer, one will be appointed for you free of charge by the government.”

Chen Rui saw Shea in the distance at a glance, and he had already understood it. Princess Royal Highness really called the police.

Madam Aunt’s eyes were exceptionally cold. Although Chen Rui wanted to ‘get closer’, he didn’t have time to go to the police station right now. Gabriel happened to come out with books in her hands, so Chen Rui hurried up to take over the stack of books.

Gabriel was taken aback when he saw Isabella, “Officer Isabella?”

“Ms. Gabriel.” Isabella seemed to know Gabriel, “Sorry, I’m on business.”

Gabriel pulled Chen Rui aside and whispered, “Are you in trouble again? Call Old Kovax, he will help you settle this matter.”

Chen Rui suddenly came to his senses when he thought of what his father, Lex, said before. He quickly dialed the number of Old Kovax in the phone book. After Old Kovax asked about the situation, he said that he would arrive immediately and told him not to talk.

This ‘immediately’ no doubt was fast enough. In just a few minutes, a limousine appeared in everyone’s vision. Old Kovax got out of the car with a few people. Just a few professional terms made Isabella’s facial expression look displeased, and she finally left angrily.

Old Kovax watched the detectives leave and said, “Young master, Ms. Gabriel, it is fine now.”

As expected of the prime minister of the Dragon Bright Empire Government Administration Council… Chen Rui murmured in his mind as he said, “Thank you.”

“Why is the young master suddenly so polite?” Old Kovax was a little surprised.

“Chen Rui.” Gabriel hesitantly said, “The girl, did you really kidn…”

“Of course not!” Chen Rui shook his head decisively.

Gabriel had a happy smile on her face, “Take me back to the dormitory first.”

Chen Rui nodded. After sending Gabriel into the girls’ dormitory building, Old Kovax stepped forward and asked in a low voice, “Young master, that Alice is still locked in the secret room of the villa…”

“ Ah ?” Chen Rui broke into a cold sweat. Unexpectedly, ‘I’ did it!

“Young master, don’t worry. Our people are professional. The little girl has been in a coma and doesn’t know where she is or who did it. If young master goes back tonight, do you…”

Chen Rui quickly said, “Let her go… By the way, it’s best not to remind her of the kidnapping… Uh , how should I put it?”

“Understood.” Although Old Kovax felt strange, he still obeyed Chen Rui’s order faithfully.

“I just received a call from my father, so I must restrain myself during this time.”

Chen Rui’s explanation made Old Kovax nod in relief, “Don’t worry, young master. I know what to do.”

“Okay, take me to the principal first. I have something to do.”

Old Kovax didn’t ask what it was. When he waved, the luxury car that was following behind drove up. The driver was actually the spearman Lucio who was supposed to be lurking in the Blue Glory Empire, but Chen Rui was already numb to ‘acquaintances’. The campus was huge. The car drove for about half an hour before they arrived at the principal’s office building.

The principal’s office building was a relatively plain and simple 3-story building. Chen Rui walked into the building after getting off the car. Looking at the floor plan below, the principal’s office was on the third floor.

Walking up to the third floor, Chen Rui saw an assistant principal working in front of the computer in the reception room outside the principal’s office. She was not the imagined Kilanya, but…

“Zola.” Of course, Chen Rui couldn’t ignore Ms. Fairy Dragon. Even though he could guess that she was definitely from the hostile ‘camp’.

Ms. Fairy Dragon’s outfit was quite stunning. A dark purple suit and skirt with a white shirt, and a pair of glasses. She was a beautiful teacher exuding intelligence and beauty. However, behind the glasses was the expected indifference and contempt like ‘Teacher Meria’.

“Scum.” Zola was not polite at all. She uttered a word directly.

“Zola, what you saw is actually… Well, I don’t want to explain anything.” Chen Rui shrugged. Anyway, he will soon meet that cheating setter.

“Scum.”

“ Um , Ms. Zola, I’m here to see the principal, please…”

“Scum.”

Chen Rui was speechless. It seemed that this word had replaced Ms. Fairy Dragon’s common spoken word ‘what’ in another world.

A voice came inside the office, “Zola, let him in.”

Zola snorted, dropped another sentence of ‘scum’, and didn’t look at Chen Rui again.

Chen Rui shook his head secretly as he walked into the principal’s office in front.

In the principal’s office, Chen Rui finally met Alucier.

Alucier didn’t have the original half-elf half-monster appearance, but he was a standard handsome guy. Of course, he didn’t have the characteristics of an elf. He looked just like an ordinary human.

In this illusion, it seemed that all the races were humanized. Even Gabriel’s pupils were just Heterochromia iridum.

Alucier was sitting on the sofa, and there were 2 cups on the tea table long ago as if he expected Chen Rui to come.

Alucier reached out his hand to signal Chen Rui to sit opposite. His first sentence surprised Chen Rui, “Do you want to find the ‘node’ of this world?”

TL: What does Alucier want?

chapters.title: Chapter 1198: Choose 1 From 3
chapters.body:
Chapter 1198: Choose 1 From 3

Alucier’s words stunned Chen Rui for 10 seconds, then he regained his composure after a while. He narrowed his eyes, “Sir Alucier, no, I should call ‘Principal’ Alucier. It’s really unexpected…”

The Alucier actually in front of him was not a fictional character, but a real ‘original’ with original consciousness!

If this world was compared to an inverse illusion, then only Chen Rui and Alucier in front of him were considered normal.

This should be Alucier’s own consciousness. Is he the ‘node’?

“First, I want to tell you that this world is a little different from what you think.” Alucier smiled slightly, looking elegant and extraordinary.

“Of course, it’s different.” Chen Rui sneered, “You create this inverse illusion just to use some kind of emotion to disturb my perception and judgment. I admit that it is indeed a bit effective, but you should understand that this effect is not sustainable.”

Alucier shook his head slowly, “Let’s not talk about anything else. You have mistaken 1 most critical point. This is not an illusion, but a real existence.”

“Real world? Are you kidding me?!” Chen Rui sat down, “My current body should still be in the Psychedelic Forest. I admit that your spirit power and mystic art are beyond my imagination, but this illusion will not confuse me for too long.”

“You have looked in the mirror before, right?” Alucier said to himself, “The mirror is parallel to you. When you look in the mirror, the people in the mirror are also looking at you. If you change the reference object, for the mirror, you are the mirror reflection. The same is true in this world. Many things are reversed from your cognition, but not completely reversed. In addition to ‘reflection’, there is also ‘refraction’. You can understand it as a…”

“A parallel world that is the opposite of the original world?” Chen Rui sneered, “Are you telling me that for this ‘real’ world, I’m the illusion?! I don’t have time to study this paradoxical argument with you.”

“Since you understand this place as a mirror reflection-like real world, you must first figure out your own position. You are not your real self nor a complete illusion; somewhere between reality and illusion.” Alucier said calmly.

“So in this world, what kind of existence is the original ‘me’? The man in the mirror?” Chen Rui still sneered, “The setting of this scum is really weird. If it’s just to disrupt my mind, you have underestimated me too much. Tell me what your purpose is!”

“People have a dark side in their minds. Perhaps he is your dark part.” Alucier took a sip of coffee, “As for my purpose, it is the word I just said – ‘Existence’. That’s all.”

“Existence?” Chen Rui asked back calmly, but he was thinking quickly in his mind.

“As I said, this world has reflections and refractions, and it is not strictly an ‘inverse’ world. These are not the key. The key is your existence. You’re now the ‘existence’ between the reality and illusion. That is to say, among the 2 parallel worlds, your current choice will be related to your future existence— Maybe you can leave this world and return to the reality in your mind; maybe you will completely deviate from the original world and truly integrate into this world.”

“Choice?” Chen Rui didn’t hide his doubts this time.

“There is no Pseudo-God or Demi-God here. You can’t use any power outside the rules. If you want to leave, you must follow the rules of the world. That’s right, what you are looking for, the so-called ‘node’, I can tell you now. You have 3 choices. If you choose the right one, you will leave here and get what you want; if you choose the wrong one, your shadow will truly overlap with this world.”

Chen Rui finally understood it. This was a topic of choosing 1 from 3 choices. If he chose the right one, he would get rid of the illusion. If he choose the wrong one, he would be trapped here forever.

Alucier held up 3 fingers, “Only 1 of the 3 ‘nodes’ is effective. In fact, it is 3 people. Destroy the correct node, and you can break out of the illusion. However, you only have 1 chance, so think carefully.”

Chen Rui remained calm, “How do I know if this is a trap? Maybe all 3 are wrong. No matter which one I choose, I will fail.”

“Whether it’s a trap or not, you can judge for yourself.” Alucier smiled slightly, “I don’t need to lie to you. This is a gamble. Even I don’t know whether I will win or lose in the end. Whether you succeed or not, this will be your last time to see me.”

My last time! These 3 words surprised Chen Rui again whereas Alucier remained calm, “I know you have many questions. Not only in this world, but also in that world. If you can really leave here, maybe you will get some answers. However, this kind of answer is not necessarily absolute, real or illusory. It is up to you to find and judge by yourself.”

While Chen Rui was thinking, he heard that Alucier had named the 3 ‘nodes’ people. He couldn’t help showing a surprised expression.

For a while, Chen Rui fell into silence. He could hardly remember how he left the principal’s office.

Seeing Chen Rui coming down from the principal’s office building, Old Kovax quickly asked Lucio to open the car door.

Chen Rui got in the car and returned to the villa somewhere outside the school.

Whether it was the appearance or the interior of this villa, it was luxurious. In addition, there were many young and beautiful maids.

“You’re medusa…” Chen Rui was stunned when he saw the appearance of 1 of the maids.

“I’m Lanliza, not a medusa.” The maid showed shyness, “Does young master want me to take a bath with you?”

Lanliza, the leader of the medusa tribe who surrendered to the Dark Moon in the White Feather Estate. Chen Rui numbly shook his head, “No need.”

Disappointment flashed across Lanliza’s eyes, “Young master, take a shower first. The hot water is already set.”

Chen Rui nodded. He walked into the extravagant large bathroom. Then, he immersed himself in the steaming small pool and fell into deep thoughts.

Regardless of whether the mirror world Alucier mentioned was real or not, one thing was certain. Chen Rui was now trapped here, unable to activate his strength or summon the Super System. To break out of the illusion, he could only use the existing rules to destroy the rules.

Nodes!

In the principal’s office, the 3 ‘key people’ that Alucier called were Chen Rui, Alucier and Athena.

Chen Rui had guessed in advance that Alucier might be the node. Meanwhile, Chen Rui himself was the nodes was not beyond expectations; the only surprise was Athena.

Alucier’s explanation was that she was the main reason that lured Chen Rui to this ‘parallel world’, and she was also the key that linked a series of recent ‘campus’ events, so Athena’s role in this world was also a node.

Chen Rui had an intuition that Alucier was not lying.

1 of these 3 key figures must be real.

Killing Alucier, Athena, or myself is the way to leave this world, but this is a single choice instead of multiple choices. There is a 1/3 chance of success, but there is also a 2/3 chance of failure.

The key is to see how I judge.

This kind of thinking continued until dinner time. Although the dinner was very sumptuous, Chen Rui did not have the appetite.

At this moment the phone sounded; it was from Satan.

“Chen Rui, we are all in Happy Hour. Why haven’t you come yet?”

Only then did Chen Rui remember that after the basketball game, Satan seemed to have booked a night session to celebrate. Just as he was about to find an excuse to turn it down, he heard Satan say again, “It just so happens that we saw the girl you dumped from the art department is being entangled by 2 guys. By the way, what is the girl’s name? Kia?”

“Kia!” Chen Rui’s eyelids twitched. She is the girl from the art department whom I got tired of playing with? If the little succubus knew about it, it wouldn’t be strange if she circumcised me!

“Help her immediately! I’ll come over!”

Satan said disapprovingly, “Didn’t you dump that chick? I remember that chick was unwilling to let go back then… If you are not planning to get her back, we want to watch the fun.”

Chen Rui gritted his teeth, and he finally uttered the most scumbag words, “Forget about getting her back, but no one can pick up the things that I throw away!”

Satan laughed loudly over there. He no doubt agreed, “I like what you said. Okay, I’ll take care of this matter. Come here quickly!”

Chen Rui wiped the cold sweat from his brow, and he quickly ordered Lucio to prepare the car.

Soon, the car arrived at ‘Happy Hour’, which was a large high scale nightclub. When Chen Rui arrived, Satan had settled Kia’s troubles and was renting a luxurious KTV suite with Michael and others to drink wine.

Seeing Chen Rui coming, Satan laughed, “You’re late. The punishment is drink.”

Chen Rui caught sight of Kia who was sitting in the corner with her head bowed silently. He took the wine from Python and drank it all in one gulp. Everyone quickly greeted each other.

Chen Rui casually asked Python, “What trouble is she having?”

“ Hmph !” Python ignored him.

Satan smiled nonchalantly, “ Hehe , you still value sex over friends. Why don’t you ask her yourself?”

Kia still bowed her head in silence. Gabriel whispered to Chen Rui, “The ones who trouble her are the 2 gangsters who often lend usury at school, Lalaria and Olypheus. I have heard before that Kia borrowed a lot of money to help with her mother’s medical treatment. Now, she works as a part-time wine waiter here. She was found by the 2 guys to collect debts.”

Lalaria and Olypheus are loan sharks now? Well, this setting barely fits part of the archetype. However, Kia…

Chen Rui thought for a while, and he sat beside Kia. Kia trembled slightly, but she did not move.

The little succubus in this world didn’t have horns, wings, or tails, but she generally had the same appearance. Her look of bowing her head in silence was very charming.

“Cheer for today’s victory!” Satan took the lead in raising the wine cup. Everyone except Kia clinked their glasses.

In the middle of the celebration, Chen Rui made an excuse and pulled Kia out. Kia didn’t resist until she got into his car. She still just kept her head down.

The car drove slowly. Lucio was obviously very sensible. He was not driving fast.

“Kia.” Chen Rui felt a sense of familiarity and strangeness. Perhaps even more strange was himself. Seeing Kia who had never spoken, he sighed, “How much do you owe them?”

Knowing what he meant, Kia raised her head. Her eyes were red, and there was a hint of sarcasm in her gaze, “What else do you want from me?”

Staring into Kia’s eyes, Chen Rui was suddenly in a trace as if he saw the little succubus who risked her life to sneak into the Dark Moon for her mother, and he sighed, “Nothing.”

“Could it be that the sun is rising from the west? Will you also realize your conscience?” Although Kia was a little surprised, she still had a mocking expression.

Chen Rui was silent for a moment, then he suddenly thought of something. He smiled, “Am I not a scum? I don’t have a conscience! But anyway, you have nothing to lose, so what are you worrying about?”

“Aren’t you a scum?” Kia pointed out the window, “Don’t tell me it wasn’t you who sent someone to smash up her father’s stall, and it wasn’t you who instructed people to injure her father?”

Chen Rui looked out the window, and he saw a familiar figure dragging a cart with a stall, walking forward with some difficulty.

It’s her!

Athena…

Chen Rui silently called the most important name in his mind.

The car passed the figure quickly, and Chen Rui didn’t look back.

“Should I get out of the car?” Kia sneered, “So as not to delay your ‘big thing’.”

Chen Rui shook his head, “My most important thing right now is to send you home safely.”

Kia frowned, “Aren’t we going to your villa? What do you want to do?”

“I’m thinking if I leave this world…”

“You can die in peace. Many people will be happy.” Before he could finish speaking, Kia continued.

“This vicious mouth is a bit like someone.”

“Is it Helen?” Kia’s eyes turned redder, “She’s much stronger than me and not as stupid as me…”

It turns out that another girl from the art department is Helen… Chen Rui suddenly understood. I bought a watch last year. Who cares if this is the world in the mirror or just an illusion, the next time I see Alucier, I must give him a solid punch!

“I was still thinking about 1 important thing, but now I have figured it out. First, I have to go back and sort out the glorious deeds of the scum… Thank you, Kia.”

Kia couldn’t understand Chen Rui’s words, but when she heard the word ‘thank you’, she couldn’t help but scoff.

Then both of them were silent. After a while, the car passed through the potholes and came to a simple hut.

Kia opened the car door and got out of the car. Suddenly, the sound of ‘scumbag’ came from behind, but it was gentle like never before.

“Kia, everything will be fine.”

Kia paused. She didn’t back as she continued walking forward.

“Let’s go back to the villa, Lucio.” Chen Rui watched Kia walk into the hut. Then, he looked up at the bright moon in the sky as if the moon had turned purple. He smiled and said something to himself, “It will be fine.”

TL: Did he choose to make everything right for what the ‘scum’ did?

chapters.title: Chapter 1199: I’M Actually A Good Person
chapters.body:
Chapter 1199: I’M Actually A Good Person

3 days later, in the afternoon.

The campus was still bustling. For many students, it was a relatively peaceful day, because a certain scumbag was absent from class again.

As soon as it was time for school to end, Tiffany, lead of the Discipline Inspection Department of the student union, was about to go to the student union office when she saw Python walking from the opposite side.

Python was also from a remarkable family, but Tiffany knew that she and Chen Rui were in the ‘same group’, so she had a bad impression of Python. The relationship was only a nod at best.

This time, Python was not silent as usual. Instead, she handed a USB flash drive and a document to her, “He asked me to hand them to you.”

Tiffany frowned as she took a look at the stamped and hand printed document. Even she, who was always calm, couldn’t help being stunned.

Python didn’t say much, and she turned away.

Tiffany hurried into the student union office. She turned on the computer and inserted the USB flash drive. There was only 1 video file in it.

There was a sentence at the beginning, “I, Chen Rui. Roland, officially cancels the engagement with Tiffany. Mammon…”

Tiffany stayed where she was mixed with surprise and joy. She was actually speechless for a moment.

In another place, Kia also showed a surprised expression. She had a letter and a bank card in her hand.

In the hospital, George. Wales, who was inexplicably transferred to the intensive care unit, was also surprised, especially after being told that someone had paid for all the treatment in advance.

A similar scene was happening in many places at the same time.

A certain kindergarten.

Chen Rui was talking on his mobile phone, “Okay, thank you, Python. Other things are not important. The key is to go on the path you believe in. I will bear all the consequences myself.”

There was another question on the phone, which made Chen Rui slightly taken aback. He replied, “I’m sorry, I just don’t want to… regret it more.”

There was silence on the phone for a long time before she hung up.

Chen Rui took a deep breath, and he turned his eyes back to the little girl in front of him, “Duoduo, do you like this kind of pig head biscuits?”

“Mommy said that I can’t eat things from strangers.” The little girl’s cute voice said so, but her round eyes were fixed on those biscuits. Although this baby was in a different world, she was still so cute.

“Duoduo, we are already friends, so we are not strangers anymore.” Chen Rui stroked his ‘daughter’ on the head, and looked at the vigilant kindergarten teachers – There were also 2 familiar faces. One was Veronica while the other was actually the Dragon Valley Sissy Karru.

Chen Rui grinned at Karru, “Don’t be nervous. I’m actually a good person.”

Karru, “…”

Chen Rui smiled at Veronica again, and he said softly to Duoduo, “Eat the biscuits later. I’ll wait for mommy with you here, okay?”

When Veronica and the others heard that he was waiting for Catherine together, they, who seemed to be facing a great enemy, finally breathed a sigh of relief.

Soon, a beautiful figure appeared in the vision.

No doubt it is the Dark Shadow Empire’s Royal Majesty Empress. Uh, no, it is ‘my beautiful teacher’.

“Mommy!” Duoduo exclaimed happily. Chen Rui picked up Duoduo and greeted her.

Catherine’s pupils shrank suddenly when she saw Chen Rui, “Why are you here?!”

“Let’s go out and talk.” Chen Rui carried Duoduo and walked outside the kindergarten.

Catherine clenched her fists and followed behind him.

The ‘family of three’ walked for a while, and Chen Rui finally stopped in a deserted place.

“You should buy a car. Walking from kindergarten to home isn’t a short distance. What’s more, you have Duoduo with you.”

“Stop talking nonsense! What on earth do you want to do?!”

“Don’t worry. I mean no harm.”

“Is this still called ‘no harm’? You’re more shameless than I think! Didn’t you say that we will never see each other again? Now you are actually threatening me with Duoduo!” Catherine gritted her teeth, “Let my daughter go or I will immediately call the police!”

“It should be ‘our’ daughter.” Chen Rui did not show a panic expression. Instead, he showed a calmness that was strange to Catherine, “I have found out a lot these days. Duoduo is indeed my daughter. Considering the time, it seems that ‘I’ am indeed a scum.”

Catherine suddenly thought of a possibility, and her facial expression became paler, “No matter what, I will never give up on Duoduo!”

“You misunderstood.” Chen Rui put Duoduo down, and he stuffed the box of pig head children’s biscuits into his daughter’s arms.

Catherine immediately strode forward and held Duoduo in her arms. She saw a big envelope handed over by him, “What is this?”

“Take a look yourself.”

Catherine looked suspiciously at Chen Rui, who looked as usual, before she finally put down the Duoduo. She opened the envelope and took out a transparent document bag. The top one was a check, of which the amount was so large that even Catherine couldn’t help being startled. Nonetheless, she soon showed a disdainful expression, “Your offer is much more generous than that of your director father who wants to settle the matter, but I didn’t accept it last time. Do you think I will change my original intention this time?”

Chen Rui shook his head, “The money is not for you, but for Duoduo. The things for you are below.”

Catherine opened the file bag and flipped through the documents with an intense shocked expression on her face, “Are… are you crazy?”

“I’m not crazy. I’m just doing what I should do.” Chen Rui watched Catherine quietly as if he was watching the Dark Shadow Empire’s empress who said ‘worth it’ in the battlefield, “You take good care of these things. You can use them when the time comes.”

Catherine was still in shock. She lifted the documents, “Do you know what it means once these things are made public? Not only you but the entire Roland Family…”

“Of course I know. You’re a smart person, so I’ll give it to you.”

Catherine looked at Chen Rui’s clear gaze as if meeting this man whom she hated so much for the first time. Then, she slowly shook her head, “No, you are not him. Who are you?”

“As expected of you, Catherine. You are the first person to ask this question,” Chen Rui looked around with a hint of regret flashing across his eyes, “Unfortunately, even if this point is discovered, there is still no way to get rid of this world, No doubt, it is not an ordinary illusion. Is it a ‘world’ that reflects the mind? Or is it really a real mirror world as the damn prophet said? It seems that I can only choose 1 of the nodes…”

Even if Catherine was very intelligent, she didn’t understand, “I don’t understand what you mean?”

Chen Rui smiled and said, “There is always darkness and light in people’s minds. I’m either another person in the mirror or just a phantom that is about to disappear. If one day I disappear, the other side of the mirror… which is that evil guy is back here again. Then you can hold your destiny in your own hands. Not just your own destiny. I know you have the courage and the wisdom.”

With that said, Chen Rui walked up to Catherine, squatted down, and kissed Duoduo. Then, he stood up, walked straight forward, and waved to Catherine with his back facing her.

“No matter what kind of existence I am or what kind of existence you are, it’s nice to see you and Duoduo again.. Take care…”

Watching that figure go away, a strange emotion surged in Catherine’s mind. Even she couldn’t believe that this kind of emotion would actually breed on the person she hated the most.

“Mommy, is he daddy?”

“Me also… don’t know. Let’s go home, baby.”

Half an hour later.

Chen Rui’s car stopped at the gate of the villa.

“Don’t worry, Kovax, I have a measure of these things. Now I’m going to do the most important thing first. When it’s over, I’ll immediately call my father to explain it myself. Now I’m turning off the phone, so don’t bother me.” Chen Rui decisively turned off the phone and got out of the car.

After entering the villa, Lanliza greeted her immediately, “Young master, you are back.”

“Are both guests here?”

“Yes, they are. They are all in the study on the second floor.”

“After I enter the study, I will turn on the highest level of anti-theft security. From now on, no one is allowed to approach the study under any circumstances.” Chen Rui gave Lanliza an order and walked toward the second floor.

In the study on the second floor, there were 2 people: A man and a woman.

When the man saw Chen Rui walking in, he smiled, while the woman looked extremely vigilant.

“Alucier, Athena.” Chen Rui shrugged and said, “Sorry for keeping you 2 waiting.”

These 2 people were actually the 2 key figures in this world, plus Chen Rui himself, the 3 ‘nodes’ were all together.

Before, when Athena was ‘invited’ to come here, she had already prepared for the worst, but she was surprised when she saw that the school’s most prestigious principal, Alucier, was also there, so she was confused about Chen Rui’s purpose.

This ‘scumbag’ actually calls the principal by his name directly as soon as he comes back. No doubt he is extremely arrogant. Athena couldn’t help but clenched the little dagger hidden in her sleeve for self-defense.

“I didn’t feel it was ‘a long time’. On the contrary, I was very surprised by your speed. You made a decision so quickly? It seems that it’s time to choose.” Alucier’s casual attitude surprised Athena even more. She couldn’t understand the meaning of those words.

“Sooner or later, it will come anyway. It’s better to end it sooner.” Chen Rui walked forward slowly, “Before this, I had something I wanted to do for a long time…”

Before he finished speaking, Alucier was punched hard in the face in Athena’s exclamation. He lost his footing immediately and fell down on the sofa.

“Principal!” Athena stood in front of Alucier furiously— This bastard is actually so lawless. He beat Alucier, this respected principal, in front of me!

It took Alucier a long time to recover. He slowly sat up on the sofa. Then, under Chen Rui’s stunned gaze, he spat out a miniature sports mouthguard from his mouth, took out a healing spray from the bag he brought to spray the wound, and wiped the wound with a medical cotton.

That relaxed posture seemed to have anticipated this punch.

Shit! Damn prophet!

Chen Rui clenched his fists a little bit, feeling the urge to punch again.

TL: What’s his choice?

chapters.title: Chapter 1200: Choice
chapters.body:
Chapter 1200: Choice

Chen Rui really wanted to beat up a certain prophet again, but when he looked at the glaring Athena, he held it back and said with a sneer, “To be honest, when Zola got the Silver Queen, I should have given you this punch. If I could get out of here, I’d blow your head off with a punch in the Psychedelic Forest. But, I remember you said, win or lose, this is the last time we’ll see each other, so I don’t want to leave any regrets.”

Athena at the side was puzzled. Zola… Is it Teacher Zola, the principal’s assistant? Also, what do the words ‘Silver Queen’ and the ‘Psychedelic Forest’ mean?

“This punch is not light.” Alucier touched his swollen face in pain, but he shook his head, “It’s a pity that it can’t kill people. By the way, Athena, the little dagger in your sleeve is useless…”

Athena trembled slightly. The little dagger I hid is actually seen through by the principal, and he even exposed it in front of that scumbag!

After Alucier applied the medicine, he returned to his original elegance and calmness, “Sit down first, Athena. I’m fine. Actually, if you really want to kill someone, this is more effective.”

With that said, Alucier took out another box from his bag, put it on the table, and opened it. Athena couldn’t help being shocked when she saw that it was a revolver. What happened to the principal?

Possessing a gun illegally?

No, not just illegal possession of guns, but those words, what exactly do they mean? Kill someone?

Alucier pushed the box in Chen Rui’s direction, “Now, it’s time for you to choose.”

“Principal!” Athena couldn’t help but yell, “What on earth are you doing?”

“As you have seen and heard just now, I’m letting him choose.” Alucier raised his head. His eyes seemed to pass through the building and looked into the deep sky, “This gamble has reached the most critical moment.”

Athena still couldn’t understand, “Gamble?”

Chen Rui picked up the revolver and looked at it. There was only one bullet in it.

“You only have 1 chance to choose.” Alucier smiled lightly, “I know that you have done a lot of things. You want to change yourself in this world, and you want to make up for the state of mind that may be missing, but you still can’t avoid choice. That’s life.”

“There are choices where once you choose, you can’t go back. No doubt it is life.” Chen Rui smiled, looked at Alucier, and then at Athena. “This gun… can destroy this damn world?”

“At least it can destroy the world in your mind or in my mind.” Alucier sighed, “The result of destruction may be for creation, but it is for destruction after all. Your choice will determine this world, and it will also determine another world. You must think it through.”

Chen Rui paced slowly in the room, and the atmosphere became tense for a moment.

After a long time, Chen Rui stopped walking, and he looked at Athena, “Actually, the most likely node is neither you nor me, but her.”

Alucier nodded and said, “She and the ‘Son of Destruction’ are the biggest factor that attracts you to this world. At the same time, she is also the ‘protagonist’ throughout the recent events in this world, but why can’t it be me?”

Alucier’s words made Chen Rui’s eyes sparkle, “Yes, you’re the mastermind behind everything! From the first time I saw you… No, from getting your green leaf badge, I, Zola, and many others have been I fell into your trap. In this world, you are the only ‘conscious person’. Or in other words, you are also the only main thread that connects the 2 worlds. No wonder you said that this is the last time I will see you. Yes, I should have killed you.”

With that said, Chen Rui raised his gun and aimed at Alucier.

“Stop!” Athena stood up, “How dare you kill the principal!”

Chen Rui narrowed his eyes, and his finger was slowly pulling the trigger.

Alucier remained calm, “Why are you still hesitating? Kill me and everything will be free.”

Chen Rui’s eyelids twitched, and he took a deep breath, “Wait a minute, I seem to have missed someone.”

Alucier smiled like an old fox, “Yourself.”

Chen Rui slowly put down his gun and walked to Athena, “‘I’ am the biggest scourge, the scum who has done countless evil things. This may be the dark side of my mind, and it is also similar to my inner demon. As long as I don’t exist in this world, I will return to the other world .”

Hearing this, Athena already understood. It turns out that this ‘scumbag’ is choosing to kill me, Alucier, or himself. From the attitude of Principal Alucier, it seems that this terrible choice was given to him by the principal. Why?

“No, you still don’t fully understand.” Alucier shook his head, “I must first remind you that if you make a wrong choice, you will forever deviate from the original world; and in this world, you have committed suicide and died. Therefore, you will be completely annihilated! “

Chen Rui was shocked. Alucier is right. I am already dead in this world after committing suicide. If the node isn’t me, it would be equal to the disappearance of ‘me’ in both worlds.

For a moment, Chen Rui’s forehead was dripping with cold sweat.

“Killing yourself is actually the most unwise choice. As far as this world is concerned, suicide will completely annihilate and completely cut off your life. Let’s say you failed and stayed in this world. I’m the principal and the biggest director of the school. Behind me is the ‘elf consortium’. Even if you kill me, you can’t bear the consequences. The rest of your life is equal to being over. Only killing Athena is the safest way. She is just a girl with no background. With the influence of your father Lex, it is not difficult to suppress this matter, so… killing her is the safest.”

Athena was startled, the normally respected principal suddenly became like a devil in her eyes.

“Whether your choice is right or wrong, killing Athena will have the best result. Moreover, you have analyzed it before. She is the most likely node.” Alucier’s words made Athena fall into an ice cellar. Is this the principal’s true face?

At this moment, Athena felt that Chen Rui’s eyes had turned to her.

Different from what she imagined, there was no lust nor murderous intent in that kind of gaze, only incredible tenderness.

Then, under Athena’s surprised gaze, Chen Rui slowly turned the revolver to him.

“It’s astonishing. I have already said that, but you still choose yourself. Moreover, I can see that you are serious.” Alucier shook his head.

This sudden change made Athena barely able to react. She suddenly remembered that from the very beginning till now, Chen Rui had been pointing the revolver at Alucier and himself, but never at her.

Why?

Although she found it unbelievable, her intuition told her that there was something wrong with this person! Although his appearance and identity are exactly the same, it doesn’t seem to be the scum from what I initially remember!

Pretending?

Twin?

“Alucier, this is not about beheading the inner demon, but a choice to face your mind. Even if there is an inner demon, it is still me. If I kill you or Athena for myself, I will be just like the original ‘him’. If you deliberately set such a trap by utilizing this point, then, congratulations, you win.”

“The video recorded by the camera here will be automatically posted on the Internet. Athena will not be blamed for anything.”

“Your analysis is actually full of loopholes. It’s not entirely the reason why you chose to kill yourself.” Alucier sighed, “I can tell you, this is the most stupid way. It is also a dead end. You should also understand. But Why?”

“My world and your world can collapse.” While Chen Rui answered Alucier, he kept looking into Athena’s eyes, “I just want to use these hands to protect her world and more people, wherever, whatever it takes.”

Not pretending! It’s not acting either! Athena’s mind trembled suddenly, and something indescribable suddenly filled her chest. For some reason, her heart suddenly began to ache.

“Athena,” Chen Rui’s gaze became softer, “Maybe this is just your reflection in the mirror, maybe this is the last time I see this face, but I…”

Chen Rui paused and did not continue. Those words were engraved in his mind and soul, just like before.

But, I still love you, not like, but love.

Mountain Xilang, that figure covered in flame, that affectionate and unregretful gaze, seemed to appear in front of her eyes again. They slowly merged with that face.

The tears welling up unconsciously blurred the vision.

Is it reincarnation?

Without further hesitation, he pulled the trigger with his finger.

Gunshot sounded.

In the campus.

Tiffany in front of the computer repeatedly looked at the video that had been uploaded to a big website. She hesitated for a moment before she finally clicked publish.

In the campus bank outside the student union office, Kia came to an ATM machine. After entering the password, she looked at the balance displayed on the bank card. She couldn’t believe it. She squeezed the letter paper tightly with slightly trembling hands, and the last sentence on the slightly deformed letter paper was still ‘everything will be fine’.

On the street behind Kia, Alice was bouncing around with her hands behind her back, smiling and talking with her sister. Shea revealed a rare softness in her usual indifferent gaze when she saw the jovial sister.

On the opposite court, Gabriel greeted the sweaty Michael, Raphael, Satan and others with a smile as she handed over towels and mineral water bottles.

Python was still standing silently in the distance, looking at her mobile phone. There was a line of words that says, “Whether you love me or not, my love is there, neither increasing nor decreasing”. This message—was either sent to herself, or to that person, or left in the draft box of the phone forever.

At the gate of the campus, Olypheus and Lalaria walked forward dejectedly. Beside them were the heroic sisters Isabella and Strena, smiling at each other from time to time.

Farther away from the school, Catherine took her daughter’s little hand and walked home step by step. Duoduo held a bag of pig head biscuits in her little hand while Catherine’s beautiful eyes showed confusion, loss, and hope.

There was a line of advertising on the sign of the roadside bookstore: Disappointment is acceptable because it is limited, but hope cannot be lost because it is infinite.

TL: 😭 a sad end. Is Alucier giving him a vaccine that Chen Rui will have to choose ‘him’ or Athena in the future?

chapters.title: Chapter 1201: Existence
chapters.body:
Chapter 1201: Existence

As the wind blew, the clouds in the sky were constantly changing in various forms.

Things in the world were like white clouds, changing unpredictably.

In the library of the villa.

There was still a faint green mist from the muzzle.

There was a bullet hole in the wall.

There was a bloodstain on Chen Rui’s scalp, and a few strands of hair were scattered, but that was all.

Chen Rui looked at Athena in surprise. Athena’s hand was holding his hand that was holding the gun high. It was this sudden movement that caused the shot to miss just now.

Alucier also seemed to be stunned. No one would have expected such a result.

A shot that decided fate was equal to being wasted; the only bullet.

Originally, there was still a 1/3 chance of success, but now it was tantamount to completely losing hope of success.

Chen Rui’s mind went blank, and it took him a long time to react. When he let go, the revolver fell to the ground.

“Why?” Chen Rui smiled dejectedly and looked at Athena.

Tears slowly rolled down Athena’s eyes, “I don’t know who you are and what happened. But life is so precious, why do you have to die? Why can’t you live strong?”

Chen Rui sighed, “Even for a scum like me, you don’t want me to die?”

“Although I don’t know what happened to you, my eyes and my mind tell me that you are not a scumbag. I don’t want anyone to die, including you.”

Brave, kind and even a little impulsive, she is still the same Athena. Chen Rui was slightly shocked as he stared at Athena. He slowly took the hand she had raised and placed it on his chest.

Athena trembled slightly, but she did not resist.

“It turns out that I was wrong. You have the character and persistence unique to life. You’re a real existence. No, not only you, Kia, Catherine… everyone is.” As Chen Rui said, his heart involuntarily produced a certain resonance or it should be called comprehension. He slowly closed his eyes.

Alucier didn’t interrupt Chen Rui. There was an unknown smile on his mouth.

“It’s a warm feeling, a real warmth, a real Athena. I understand, Alucier. You didn’t lie to me. This is a real world, the world refracts my mind. Maybe… everyone’s mind has such a mirror world. In this sense, it is a truly parallel existence.”

“What do you want to say?” Alucier’s voice sounded without the indifference before, it was a little ethereal.

Chen Rui slowly opened his eyes as he let go of Athena’s hand. His gaze gradually became firm, “Now is the time for me to choose.”

Alucier stared at Chen Rui, “Are you sure?”

“The 3 nodes are all real, but they are all fake. No matter which one I choose, I will perish.” Chen Rui’s gaze had no confusion; only thorough enlightenment, the thorough enlightenment after experiencing life and death.

“Actually, you already said the real node when we first met.”

Alucier burst into laughter.

“Existence.” Unlike before, when Chen Rui said this word now, it carried an inexplicable power. The whole room seemed to tremble.

Chen Rui looked at Athena deeply, “What is in my mind is the real existence. Thank you for your existence, Athena.”

Athena looked at those clear eyes that were shining with tears in surprise. It felt so strange, yet so familiar. She even had an illusion… as if a long time ago, this man was her lover that she swore to live forever with.

“The true meaning of life is not death or creation, nor destruction or creation, but existence.” Chen Rui’s body emitted a faint brilliance. Every time he spoke a word, the surrounding space began to blur.

“Chen Rui…” Athena was surprised to find that in her vision, what was blurry was not the surrounding world, but Chen Rui, whose body began to fade as if he was some kind of illusion that was about to cease to exist in the world.

Not only Chen Rui, but also Alucier.

“What is this? A power of connection? Could it be… That’s the reason, I finally understand!” While comprehending it, Chen Rui also comprehended another mystery of the mirror world. He couldn’t help showing rage, “The so-called ‘nodes’ are actually connected to the reality of another world. If I choose anyone to die, then relative to this world, the ‘mirror image’ of the other world will also die!”

“Yes, if you killed Athena or yourself just now, she and you in another world will also die. This also includes me.” Alucier’s voice and figure became more and more ethereal, “Do you regret not shooting me now?”

“You don’t even hesitate to risk your own life. How terrifying!” Chen Rui said coldly, “I’m not sure what your purpose is, but what I can be sure of is that I won in the end.”

“Yes, you won.” Alucier shook his head, and he suddenly said something that surprised Chen Rui, “I won too.”

After speaking, under Athena’s surprised gaze, the ‘principal’ completely disappeared into thin air.

“I should go too, Athena.” Chen Rui’s body had become almost completely transparent.

“Where are you going?!” Athena couldn’t help asking. There was no hatred in her mind, only confusion. In the confusion, there were indescribable emotions. She didn’t know why this happened, but she knew very well that this would be the last time she saw this person. This man who was willing to destroy his own world to protect hers.

Or not for her, but another ‘her’ whom she couldn’t understand.

“Athena, if there is no other world to worry about, I really want to stay here and start everything with you again. But now I’m going back because there is another you and our child. Take care…”

Athena saw the disappearing hand slowly brushing across her face. Even though it passed through her face and finally disappeared without a trace, the gentle feeling was still clear.

Tears came out involuntarily.

The surrounding space changed and distorted rapidly. In the end, Chen Rui’s blurry vision became clear again.

Finally, the distorted scene gradually returned to normal.

After recovering his vision, Chen Rui already felt that in the galaxy of the Super System, there was an incomparably powerful breath of life. It was almost 10 times stronger than before!

Is it caused by the comprehension just now?

But he didn’t have time to comprehend the new power, because an even more shocking scene appeared in front of him.

In front of him, there was a huge male body floating.

Corpse!

Rather than saying it as a corpse, it is more like a dead solar system.

More than one ‘corpse’! There are more ahead!

Chen Rui couldn’t help being horrified. Here is actually… the most mysterious Chaos Realm?

With Chen Rui’s current strength, even in the face of an existence like Main Elemental Messenger, he could remain calm, but he could not remain calm in front of these corpses that had lost their vitality.

How did I come back to this place after returning from that world?

Wait a minute, something’s wrong. Although they are indeed these corpses, they don’t have the feeling of real vastness at the beginning. They are more like… illusions?

Have I just escaped from a mirror world and fallen into another similar ‘world’?

Since I’m able to enter the Super System now, without any data or alarms, it shows that this is not the kind of mirror world that is almost unsolvable, but an ordinary illusion that is not dangerous.

While Chen Rui was thinking, he suddenly sensed a change in the surrounding space. As faint cracks appearing, the eyes of the nearest corpse slowly opened!

Not only this one, but the others also opened their eyes one after another.

Even though he already knew that these were just illusions, this scene still shocked Chen Rui. After all, these were the most terrifying existences.

The moment they opened their eyes, the whole scene was tremble. Chen Rui felt a chill running down his spine. If he really faced this ‘corpse’, this gaze alone would cause his soul to be destructively damaged.

How powerful this is!

The ‘corpses’ not only opened their eyes, but they also stood up one after another, but the posture of standing up was a bit weird.

After standing up, the ‘corpses’ opened their mouth and roared. The sound alone deepened the cracks in the space countless times, and a vacuum similar to that caused by [Dimension Destruction] appeared, but the power was multiple times stronger.

Although the power was extremely astonishing, Chen Rui faintly felt that something was wrong. At this time, the faces of the corpses showed frightened and even desperate expressions as if they were feeling something terrible.

This kind of almost invincible existence is actually afraid? What are they afraid of?

There was something coming from all directions toward the space above the head, and the speed was quite fast. With Chen Rui’s eyesight, he could only vaguely see a shape. Those things were somewhat familiar!

Several light streams gather together to form a special object, then they quickly disappeared in a blur. At the same time, a huge outline resembling an eye opened in the void.

The ‘eyes’ changed from gradually blurred to clear. They did not have pupils, just a simple shape, with endless emptiness inside. When Chen Rui just glanced at it, he felt his whole soul shaking involuntarily as if his soul e was about to get out of his body. His spirit and body faintly showed signs of collapse in an instant, which greatly startled him.

Chen Rui had a strong sense of suppression that was about to suffocate him— This is just a pure illusion. If I really face this ‘eyes’, I will be completely annihilated before I even have time to conceive a thought.

Cracks appeared faintly on the huge body with dim light. As the cracks became clearer, the bodies also became clearer. He could see the light of stars emerging from inside. These starlights seemed to be quickly sucked by something.

It’s the ‘eyes’!

What those huge bodies fear is these ‘eyes’ with indescribable strength?

Strangely, the bodies of these giants seem to be recovering quickly? The cracks on their bodies have disappeared. Even their expressions…

The suppression in Chen Rui’s mind became more and more intense. Then, he suddenly came to his senses. This is actually what happened!

chapters.title: Chapter 1202: ‘Him’
chapters.body:
Chapter 1202: ‘Him’

Chen Rui suddenly realized – It turns out that the order of the illusion should be reversed!

It’s like watching a movie backward from the end!

Then the correct course of events should be: The ‘eye’ opened in the space, the power of the ‘giants’ was devoured, their bodies were split open, and then something that caused the power of the ‘eye’ to be torn apart and scattered. Subsequently, the giants were also drained and turned into ‘corpses’!

No wonder the ‘corpses’ stood up so awkwardly before!

With this understanding, Chen Rui made a correct judgment in the next scene.

In the void, the huge ‘eyes’ slowly opened, making the ‘giants’ feel extremely frightened.

The certain overall ‘object’ that summoned the ‘eyes’ reappeared.

That body broke apart, but it did not completely disappear. It gathered into this ‘object’, which was the same as the previous scattered. It seems to be… 7 rays of light!

—— In other words, it was the object formed by the annihilation of this body, which summoned the ‘eye’ that was enough to destroy that kind of ‘huge existences’. In other words, this body summoned the ‘eyes’ at the cost of death.

That body… The image before the split began to appear in his vision.

Compared with those ‘huge existences’, this body was relatively small, but it was this small and even neglected figure that had caused unimaginable results.

It was a tall and thin man with 12 wings on his back. The wings were half white and half black. He looked up at those unattainable existences in the sky.

The facial features and body were blurred, but the persistence in the gaze could be sensed even if it could not be seen clearly.

After this image was paused for a while, the image of the space became blurred. Finally, he gradually returned to a familiar place, the hut.

Alucier’s cabin in the Psychedelic Forest.

Chen Rui’s mind was like a stormy sea. He knew very well that just now was just a ‘video’ of condensed spirit power, and it was not complete. However, this incomplete image had revealed a shocking secret, at least a corner of the secret.

Twilight of the Gods!

What happened before?

What level of existence is the ‘eyes’?

The person who summoned the eyes is…

When Chen Rui was thinking about it, he suddenly senses a hint of danger. A pair of eyes looked at him in front of him— The eyes of the man in that ‘video’!

This is not an illusion! But real… Sensing the extreme danger, Chen Rui’s vigilant suddenly rose. He looked at these eyes vigilantly, but perhaps because of some kind of space force, the [Analytical Eyes] did not have a special prompt.

There was no special coercion in these eyes, but they were full of the hint of seeing through as if nothing could be concealed. Deep emotions were hidden in it: Indifference, sadness, affection… There was even a touch of boredom. All kinds of contradictory emotions merged into an incredible whole. With just one glance, he couldn’t help but be attracted.

With such a peculiar gaze, Chen Rui was sure that it was the first time he met his eyes, but he felt a sense of déjà vu as if he had seen it somewhere before.

Right! Chen Rui was slightly shocked. He finally remembered.

Elemental world! Tree of Nature!

The man who caused the annihilation of Elemental Goddess Rafferty!

It is actually him!

The man’s facial features and body also gradually became clear. His eyes just stared at Chen Rui quietly for a long time before he said 2 words.

“I lost.”

Chen Rui tried his best to calm down, yet another shock was unstoppable, because he thought of the last 2 sentences Alucier said before he disappeared.

Yes, you won.

I won too.

The former sentence ‘you won’ was addressed to Chen Rui, and the latter sentence ‘I won’ referred to Alucier himself.

Originally, Chen Rui didn’t understand what Alucier meant, but the sentence ‘I lost’ from the man in front of him seemed to make the whole incident coherent and clear…

At this moment, Chen Rui seemed to understand something.

When choosing 1 of the 3 key figures in the mirror world, Alucier also said another thing: This gamble had reached the most critical moment.

That’s right, the gamble!

“My time is running out.” The man’s voice sounded again, revealing a deep charm, “I can answer 1 question for each of you; only 1.”

Each of you? Chen Rui suddenly felt something, and he saw a graceful figure appearing in the forest beside him.

She looked heroic wearing silver tight armor, which perfectly complemented her graceful figure. She was holding a spiral purple sword in her hand.

Gabriel.

Judging from the messy hair and the cracks on the armor, it was not easy for Gabriel to come here whereas Raphael’s figure could not be seen. It seemed that Raphael was still trapped in the illusion array of the Psychedelic Forest.

Gabriel didn’t close her eyes as usual, but she just stared blankly at the man standing in the air with a hint of unknown flowing in her gaze.

At this time, the door of the hut in front opened. It was not Alucier, but Kilanya who came out.

Chen Rui once heard Meria say that Kilanya was not only Alucier’s direct apprentice, but also his daughter, so she should be exempt from the illusion array here. It was not surprising that she appeared directly in the hut from the previous archery field.

Kilanya looked at the sky in surprise. It took her a long time for her to understand that this should be a remarkable existence. She had heard what the man said before, so she summoned up her courage and asked, “Sir, can I also ask a question?”

“Of course, Alucier’s daughter.” The man seemed to have known Kilanya’s identity for a long time.

“Sir, may I know where my father went?”

“He will never appear in front of your eyes again. Specifically, he went to a place where he wanted to end some kind of ‘beginning’. Unfortunately, the result is likely to end himself.” The man sighed, “As a guide who serves fate, he actually intends to reverse fate; it is really intriguing. This is the path he chose.”

The man’s answer was esoteric and difficult to understand, but Chen Rui already understood that Alucier was not dead. Instead, he chose to leave.

However, Chen Rui once heard from Finoia that Alucier was subject to some kind of special restriction and could not leave the Psychedelic Forest. So, now the legendary prophet has left the forest and the Silver Moon Celestial Capital of the elf tribe. What does this mean?

Before Chen Rui returned, especially when he realized that the choices in the mirror world would directly kill the real people in this world, he was full of anger and killing intent toward Alucier, because this had directly threatened the lives of Athena and the child whom he wanted to protect with all his might.

However, now, Chen Rui’s hatred gradually faded. Things were not as simple as he originally thought. As such, he became more and more confused about what kind of role Alucier played.

Nonetheless, Kilanya understood a little more, and she lowered her head sadly.

“Tezaneer.” The man’s eyes turned to Gabriel. The name made Gabriel tremble slightly, and she walked over slowly.

Looking up at the man in the air, the inexplicable emotion in Gabriel’s silver and red pupils grew stronger as she just stared into the man’s eyes.

After a long time, Gabriel asked, “Why did you choose that?”

The man’s eyes softened and he sighed.

This question released some things that had been suppressed in Gabriel’s mind, and the calmness on her face was long gone; only the excitement that was almost out of control, “The dawn star of the Gods, the son of the morning, the proudest archangel, why did you choose to fall? My former comrade-in-arms and partner, I… why did you choose to leave me?”

Although Gabriel asked 3 questions in succession, it was actually equal to 1.

Choice.

Chen Rui remembered that when he entered the Psychedelic Forest, he once told Gabriel that if he lost these things, he would rather choose to face death. When Gabriel heard the word ‘choose’, her emotions fluctuated strangely. There seemed to be deep sadness in her gaze.

It was because she regarded Chen Rui as ‘him’. In her mind, ‘choice’ was the biggest knot.

Chen Rui suddenly thought of a passage in the ‘Book of Isaiah’ that made Gabriel cry in the mirror world, “O bright star, son of the morning, why did you fall from the sky? You, the conqueror of the nations, fell to the ground…”

This passage actually overlapped surprisingly with Gabriel’s current question.

This seem to describe someone’s downfall?

That passage seemed to overlap with Gabriel’s ‘fall’ today. Chen Rui’s memory suddenly became clearer than ever before, including that vague name.

The star of the dawn in the Bible, the most powerful and highest-ranking angel in the legend, and the most famous fallen one, often appeared in the theology and legends of his previous world.

Even Chen Rui, who was not very familiar with Western theological culture, was familiar with it.

Some people confused him with Satan, but in many classics, the 2 were actually separate.

Especially in this world.

Is that the man’s name?

By the way, I remember that when Sariel misunderstood Chen Rui as someone and begged for mercy before being devoured by Python, he once uttered a word in horror, “Lu…”

That’s right!

It should be ‘him’.

Meanwhile, the man looked deeply into Gabriel’s eyes as he spoke up, “Tezaneer, you never let go of this matter. You didn’t have the courage to question me back then, and now finally… then, let me answer you formally — My former comrades-in-arms and partner, the woman who watched me silently… I’m sorry, because that was my choice.”

This answer was tantamount to no answer, but Gabriel seemed to have got an answer as a tear slowly fell from the corner of her eye.

“Sorry, Tezaneer, I can’t answer any more questions for you.” The man moved his eyes away from Gabriel and landed on Chen Rui, “Now… it’s your turn, incredible Soul Existence!”
