chapters.title: Chapter 1203: Choice
chapters.body:
Chapter 1203: Choice

The title of ‘incredible Soul Existence’ made Chen Rui feel secretly awe-inspiring.

As for ‘question’, there were simply too many in his mind.

The ‘video’ just now could raise many shocking and mysterious questions: The reason why the giant beings fight, the 7 split of light streams, the ‘eyes’ in the sky…

However, he could only ask 1 now.

What should I ask?

Chen Rui thought quickly, and he finally asked the question.

“Sir Lucifer… why do you exist in me?”

The rest of the secrets could be discovered. This question that was closely related to Chen Rui was the most important thing, and it was also what he had always been afraid of.

This question actually implied several layers of meaning: Are you Lucifer? Do you exist in my body? Why do you exist? What do you want?

The man obviously understood what Chen Rui meant, and he said implicitly, “I should be the one who askes why do you exist in my body?”

Chen Rui narrowed his eyes, “What do you mean? If you want to brush off my question or dare not tell the truth, I can give up the question and will find the answer myself.”

This tone was quite impolite. Even Gabriel couldn’t help but raise her brows, but the man didn’t think it was annoying. He remained indifferent, “The ‘body’ I’m talking about is not your human body, but the Seven Badges of the Beginning and End!”

Seven Badges of the Beginning and End! This strange name immediately made Chen Rui react… The 7 artifacts?

The man spoke up, “The Seven Badges of the Beginning and End is what you know as the 7 artifacts. They are related to a taboo power that overrides everything. I believe you have seen it in the previous illusion. At the same time. They also hide another secret that is closely related to me. Each badge contains my soul fragments! Therefore, the 7 artifacts will continue to select the most suitable recognition for bloodliners. These recognized ones will also give back part of the power of the bloodline to the 7 badges when they activate them. If this goes on like this, one day, I will be able to awaken and replenish the soul fragments after accumulating enough power, so as to obtain a real awakening. It is a pity that things are unpredictable. I met you. After you got the Earth Badge, it should have been rejected… However, as I said, you have an ‘incredible’ soul power, which directly awakens that part of the soul fragment! What makes me even more in disbelief is that my soul fragment is actually being suppressed by you. You can even use a special fusion method to forcibly control the Earth Badge! At that time, your strength was unbelievably low, not to mention the kingdom, you don’t even have the comprehension of territory!”

As soon as this sentence was blurted out, Gabriel was the most surprised. An ant who didn’t even comprehend the territory power, was able to suppress the soul fragments of ‘him’ and forcibly use the 7 artifacts! What is this concept?

As one of the ‘insiders’ back then, Gabriel was very clear – The Seven Badges of the Beginning and End are the most special existences. Except for ‘him’, even God cannot directly use it!

Chen Rui also finally understood that the ‘recognition’ of the 7 artifacts had this kind of secret in it! As for the ‘unbelievable’ method the other party mentioned, he was well aware of it: [Deep Analysis] of the Super System!

The question is: Does Lucifer know about the Super System?

The man’s voice continued, “There is one thing you may not have thought of, that is, the more you merge the fragments of the Seven Badges of the Beginning and End, the more complete my soul will be. When you gathered the 7 badges, my soul was finally awakened with the help of the Tree of Nature, but unfortunately, due to the serious shortage of absorbed bloodline power, this kind of awakening was actually forcibly exhausting my power. It was dangerous, and I might be devoured by you at any time. Until… I met Rafferty in the elemental world.”

“Rafferty!” Gabriel was taken aback.

“Her soul fragments… have been completely annihilated. With the help of the Tree of Nature, I converted part of her Godhood power, avoided the danger of soul annihilation, and bought a little more time.”

“You actually killed Rafferty and took part of her Godhood?” Gabriel’s facial expression paled.

“It’s my choice, Tezaneer. It’s also her choice.” There was a hint of sadness in the man’s eyes, “Her resurrection wasn’t conscious; it was just passive and spontaneous… Most importantly, this world doesn’t need God.”

“Destruction and creation origin are combined into a unit, so you are the most suitable body.” The man’s gaze returned to Chen Rui, “Perhaps in destiny, we have some inexplicable connection long ago. For example, descendant. More precisely, daughter.”

The last word was another huge shock to Chen Rui. He suddenly thought of Duoduo’s ‘Heart of Divine Blessing’ and Python’s misunderstanding of Duoduo. It turned out that the little phoenix’s God’s descendant bloodline inheritance is actually derived from…

“Daughter?” Gabriel couldn’t help asking.

Just as Chen Rui was about to speak, the man continued, “It’s a pity that my soul power is too weak. Even if I possess your body, my strength will be greatly reduced. I can’t recover in a short time. Therefore, Alucier and I had a bet. In the end, I lost to you and also to Alucier. I still haven’t been able to understand what kind of existence you are, but you have already comprehended the existence of yourself. Therefore, the meaning of my existence can also be changed.”

So far, many mysteries in Chen Rui’s mind have finally been solved – It turns out that the experience in the mirror world is a bet of possession of my body. If I can’t comprehend the meaning of life, I will be imprisoned in the mirror world forever. Lucifer’s soul will possess my body!

It should be Alucier and Lucifer who co-activated the mirror world!

So, when Alucier gave me the ‘wood’ card, it was not only to save the Tree of Nature, but also for Lucifer’s reborn?

But why is there still a bet in the mirror world?

At this point, the man’s figure slowly faded. He looked at Kilanya, “Daughter of Alucier, doesn’t your father have something to give to him?”

Thinking of her father’s original instructions, Kilanya woke up. She quickly took out a small box and handed it to Chen Rui, “This is the last thing my father left you.”

It won’t be that revolver right? Chen Rui took the box. After opening it, his facial expression changed slightly: It’s this thing!

A tiled magic card. ‘Fate Showdown’

This again?

Chen Rui suddenly felt that the pattern on the back of the card was somewhat familiar as if it was the object that summoned the ‘eyes’ to kill the huge existence.

He slowly turned over the cards – The highest main card of the Chaos Faction, King of Darkness!

“This is the bet you have won. Remember, you only have one chance to use the Supreme Key. Moreover, you must not only have the awareness of self-destruction, but you must also have the courage to bear the destruction of all things…” The man’s voice gradually weakened.

The Supreme Key? Chen Rui was taken aback for a moment. The man’s shadow became thinner and thinner. The cards glowed faintly as if they were absorbing the remaining soul of the man.

At the same time, the 7 artifacts floated out of thin air and combined into a strange object, which was the thing that summoned the ‘eyes’. It was the Supreme Key that Lucifer said. The pattern on the back of ‘King of Darkness’ flashed while the mysterious ‘key’ of the 7 artifacts combination gradually disappeared and was kept in the card.

“Wait a minute, Lucifer!” Gabriel realized something. She called out the man’s name loudly for the first time, “I still have a lot to say…”

“If there is another world, you, me, Rafferty, and more people will meet again…” After Lucifer finished the last sentence, his figure had completely dissipated. The light on the ‘King of Darkness’ card also disappeared.

The moment the light disappeared, whether it was a psychological effect or not, Chen Rui felt his mind relaxed. It seemed that the power that had been suppressing him had disappeared.

Gabriel looked at the ‘King of Darkness’ in Chen Rui’s hand in despair as if all the strength in his body had been drained. On the other hand, Kilanya had several items in her hand, “This is ice fungus and also the rainbow calla lilies you mentioned to Her Majesty Liv.”

The appearance of the ice fungus was somewhat similar to Ganoderma lucidum. It was crystal clear and exuded a faint chill; the rainbow calla lilies were snow-white in color. They looked like a horseshoe and had 6-color leaves, hence the name.

A faint colored mist appeared in Chen Rui’s hand as ice fungus and rainbow calla lilies were kept in the galaxy garden. Compared with uncovering those shocking secrets, this was the biggest gain. All the materials needed for Athena were finally gathered!

Chen Rui turned his head and glanced at the bewildered Gabriel, sighed, and put the ‘King of Darkness’ back into the box, and kept it in the storage warehouse.

Gabriel came to her senses suddenly. Her gaze that was watching Chen Rui exuded a terrifying aura. She raised the purple sharp spiral sword and drew a frightening sharp qi in the air, “Leave that thing behind!”

Chen Rui took a step forward and protected Kilanya behind him. At this moment, the space on the side fluctuated, and Raphael appeared.

“Gabriel, I have found the holy flame stone here, and even the light stream vine! With these and the potion made of the Snow Dallet Flower, not only Michael, but also the severe injury caused by the Creation Vessel’s recoil on both of us can recover soon!” Raphael’s voice was full of surprise. After he said these few words, he suddenly saw the situation on the field. He flickered and immediately appeared beside Gabriel. He was holding a silver long stick in his hand. His momentum locked on Chen Rui immediately.

From Raphael’s words, Chen Rui understood the reason why they ‘visited’ the Silver Moon Celestial Capital. As Python expected, when the elemental world changed, the 3 archangels took the risk of using the Creation Vessel to activate the power of the Book of Creation, stabilizing the light element that went berserk on the White Cliff, but they also received a lot of recoil. Some of the materials for recovery should only be available at Alucier’s place, so they came here in person.

“It turns out that both of you are injured, then you are no longer my opponent.” As Chen Rui said lightly, the starlight on his body was shining. The doubled life force and the disappearance of a certain suppression in his mind made the breath in the starlight even stronger than before. It was several times stronger. This was even without activating the fusion of [All Star Gods View]!

It seemed that the ‘existence’ comprehension in the mirror world was not as simple as to escape from the illusion.

Feeling the terrifying power of breathing, Gabriel and Raphael’s facial expressions changed at the same time. This enemy is too terrifying. Every time we see him, his strength rises by a chunk. His current state is much stronger than when he was in the archery arena not long ago!

“Gabriel, if you must fight, I will not show mercy! But, I just want to say one thing. This is ‘his’ choice.”

The word ‘choice’ seemed to hit Gabriel’s soft spot. Her body shook, and the Holy Song Sword in her hand dropped powerlessly. Under Raphael’s puzzled gaze, Gabriel let out a long sigh, turned around, and left. Raphael looked at Chen Rui suspiciously, and he followed her in the end. The figures of the 2 gradually faded away.

TL: What would Python do if she knows that Chen Rui isn’t ‘him’?

chapters.title: Chapter 1204: Go Home
chapters.body:
Chapter 1204: Go Home

After Gabriel and Raphael left, Chen Rui bid farewell to Kilanya and also left the Psychedelic Forest.

When he returned to the archery arena and saw the familiar Zola and Alice, he vaguely coincided with the image in the mirror world he experienced not long ago. Although the few days in the mirror world were actually only a few hours in this world, Chen Rui felt like it was a lifetime away.

The battle in the mirror world. Yes, it was indeed a war.

The battle with self, the battle with choice, the life and death battle set up by Lucifer and Alucier… This was more dangerous than any battle I experienced before.

When Chen Rui chose to protect Athena and ended himself as the node, he won against himself and surpassed life and death, but this meant he lost to Lucifer. However, at the critical moment, Athena of the mirror world chose to protect Chen Rui, making Chen Rui truly comprehend the meaning of life and win the bet.

This experience could be described as twists and turns as well as a narrow escape.

After successfully escaping from the mirror world, Chen Rui saw part of the truth about Twilight of the Gods. Back then, Lucifer did not hesitate to destroy himself, activated the Seven Bades of the Beginning and End (the 7 artifacts), and unleashed some kind of most terrifying taboo power. As a result, the Gods fell. Lucifer’s soul was almost annihilated, so he could only reside in the 7 artifacts, use the bloodline power recognized by the 7 artifacts to accumulate his soul, and look forward to being reborn.

The emergence of Chen Rui and the Super System made Lucifer exhaust his soul and reborn ahead of time without obtaining enough souls. In the end, Chen Rui won the final victory in this life-and-death bet. Lucifer himself and the 7 artifacts combined to form the Supreme Key which was in turn absorbed by the ‘King of Darkness’ magic card. The mystery of ‘him’ finally came to an end.

At the same time, Chen Rui also learned that the little phoenix hatched by him was a bloodline descendant of Lucifer. That was why after she was reborn, she had the Heart of Divine Blessing that many powerhouses couldn’t have in their lifetimes when she grew to a certain extent.

From the perspective of the soul and the bloodline of God, the little phoenix was indeed Lucifer’s daughter. However, as Chen Rui vowed to Duoduo after killing Sariel, no matter what she was, no matter what happened in the future, she would always be his most beloved daughter.

Lucifer’s silence also left much suspense. Such as Alucier’s behavior was a mystery. Alucier used the Tree of Nature to help Lucifer be resurrected before, but he later chose to help Chen Rui in the life and death bet. Now, he even left the Psychedelic Forest for some strange reason. It was indeed puzzling.

But these things could be considered in the future. The most urgent thing was to return to the Demon Realm and hand over the materials needed by Athena to Python.

“Those 3 guys from the Holy Light Mountain are gone?”

“ En , they just left.” Seeing Chen Rui’s absent-minded look, Zola asked, “What’s wrong?”

“It’s nothing.” Chen Rui looked at Ms. Fairy Dragon, and he suddenly smiled, “I was thinking, I should give you a set of clothes. A small dark purple suit skirt with a white shirt. Also, I will also give you pair of gold-rimmed glasses, Miss Assistant Principal.”

“What?” Ms. Fairy Dragon asked blankly as she really didn’t understand the meaning of the words. But it must be happy for her man to give her a set of clothes.

“What about me?” Alice, who had already returned to Zola’s side, pricked up her ears when she heard that he was gifting something.

“ Uh … Let me ask a question first. If I kidnap you…”

“Kidnapping…” Alice covered her mouth in surprise, “Are you going to imprison me in a secret room, humiliate me or something? I’m so scared…”

Chen Rui’s forehead broke into a cold sweat. I should have locked you up for a little longer in the other world.

“You seem to be looking forward to it?” Ms. Fairy Dragon exposed the mind of a certain loli princess.

Princess Loli’s posture changed to holding her face, “Teacher Zola, hehe … Sister Zola, I will be shy.”

“What are secret room imprisonment and humiliate?” Michelle pulled Alice and asked curiously.

“ Hmph hmph , it’s a secret.”

“Aren’t good friends supposed to share secrets?”

“ En … alright! Let me look for it first. It should be this book…”

“What a weird book cover. Can I touch it?”

Seeing that Alice was about to open the bad book, Chen Rui quickly snatched it. It disappeared in the storage warehouse in the blink of an eye. Alice looked at him angrily. Chen Rui shook his head and changed the subject, “Okay, I’ve got everything that is needed. We should go back.”

As soon as these words came out, Alice’s bulging bun face suddenly flattened. Michelle bit her lip and asked softly, “Are you going back to the Demon Realm?”

“Yes.” Chen Rui stroked the green curly hair of the little elf princess, “If there is a chance, I will bring Alice to visit you and White Wind again in Celestial Capital. I promise.”

“I will miss you.” Michelle’s voice choked up as she hugged Chen Rui’s waist tightly, then she hugged Alice. Alice’s eyes were also red as she hugged Michelle tightly.

Alice looked up at Chen Rui, “Brother, shall we take Michelle back to the Demon Realm?”

Chen Rui shook his head, “Not yet, because she is the princess of the elf tribe, and her mother and sister are here. If she follows us back to the Demon Realm, it will implicate the elf tribe.”

Alice also knew that her idea was unrealistic, so she lowered her head in frustration.

“I mean ‘not yet’.” Chen Rui’s eyes became a little far-reaching as he looked in a distant direction. “One day in the future, Michelle can come to the Demon Realm to play or live in the Demon Realm without much worry. Alice, you can also bask in the sun freely, without unnecessary hatred or war… Maybe there is still a long time before this day, but there will be such a day, believe me.”

“ En .” The 2 lolis nodded at the same time.

On the other side, Zola also lowered her voice to bid farewell to the Elf King Father, and she emphasized the blacklist of her mother, Meria. Span could only smile awkwardly.

In the direction where Chen Rui’s gaze swept past, Landbis next to the Elf Princess Royal Philly was chatting absently while looking at the situation there. She knew very well that they were like 2 intersecting lines. Although there was an intersection, now they were further and further away from each other.

She and him were already people from 2 worlds.

Since she made a choice back then, she had finalized this fact.

Regardless of whether the choice was right or wrong, the 2 would continue on. This was life. A journey of constant choice.

Soon, Chen Rui and the other 5 left the Jade Forest Sea smoothly.

The half-elf Taylos and the elf girl Altani were also among them. Although the half-elf won the archery competition, his relationship with Altani was definitely not recognized by the elf tribe. Not only could he not get his wish if he stayed in the Jade Forest Sea, but his life was in danger.

The half-elf long ago made a serious oath. In addition, Chen Rui helped him in gaining victory. He also showed such a powerful strength that the half-elf successfully took away his beloved with the deterrence of the super powerhouse, which further strengthened Taylos’ determination to follow him.

Chen Rui did not refuse Taylor’s allegiance. He wanted to keep the half-elf couple in Storm Island, but Taylos offered to follow him to the Demon Realm. Chen Rui thought about it and agreed to it.

After keeping everyone in the Tower of Glory, Chen Rui opened the [Star Gate] and immediately returned to the Dark Moon residence.

To Chen Rui’s surprise, there were several more guests in the house.

The Old Dragon Emperor Father-in-law Auglas, the long-time-no-see Elder Miss Black Dragon Julia and Blue Dragon Daniel, who was strictly monitored by his wife. Both of them had advanced to the Kingdom level. Meanwhile, Auglas had reached the intermediate stage of the Pseudo-God.

Julia was a distant relative of Auglas, Blue Dragon Daniel and Paglio were old acquaintances for thousands of years. He also had a disgraceful history of having a crush on Zola thousands of years ago and being shamed by Ms. Fairy Dragon. Both of them lived in the Dark Moon for a while and forged friendships with Chen Rui and the others.

Later, the 2 returned to Dragon Island for closed-door training and broke through to the Kingdom level. They wanted to come to the Dark Moon to show off, but the consecutive ‘bad news’ scared the 2 of them immediately – Paglio reached the strength of Demi-God! Zola is at the peak stage of the Demi-God! Chen Rui is a Pseudo-God!

Actually, this was the evening news. The Old Dragon Emperor Father-in-law would probably jump up after learning the truth.

Julia and Daniel came to the Dark Moon with the Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor this time to meet up with friends they hadn’t seen for many years. Also, they wanted to dig out the secrets of these guys’ rapid progress.

“Aunt Julia, this is for you. Remember to save half for Grandpa Auglas.” Darling Duoduo’s charm was unstoppable. Even Julia, who had always been cool, was reluctant to let go of the little girl.

Grandpa Auglas, who got half of the pancake deliberately left for him, was very moved. This little girl is ultimately the one who knows how to care for people. If it was Lalaria, there would be nothing left. However, this is also the result of my own education…

Suddenly, Duoduo’s big eyes opened as she sensed Chen Rui’s return. She broke free from Julia’s embrace and flew toward the [Star Gate], “Daddy!”

Chen Rui hugged her precious daughter tightly as he kissed her again and again. Thank God, she was no longer the girl who was wary of daddy in the kindergarten.

Auglas looked enviously at Chen Rui who was being hugged by Duoduo. Unfortunately, when his daughter Lalaria saw him, she just gave a weird ‘ Oh Hohoho ’ laugh a few times, then she whispered something to Olypheus. Dragon Emperor paid attention, and he vaguely heard the sentence, “If the old guy forces us to marry, we will definitely ignore him.” He couldn’t help rolling his eyes.

“Chen Rui.”

The voices of Kia and Isabella sounded at the same time. Chen Rui hugged Duoduo while he kissed each of the faces of the ‘art girl’ and ‘policewoman’. His eyes turned to Athena who was supporting her body behind, then he put down Duoduo and came to this mother-to-be, “I’m back.”

“It’s good that you are back.” Athena didn’t know that she had walked between life and death because of the mirror world. She also didn’t know that she in another world saved everything in the end. She just felt the ardor and affection in the gaze clearly. All of a sudden, she seemed to return to the year when she first met this man, and there were bursts of sweetness in her heart.

“ Yo , a certain guy is finally willing to come back after spending all his time womanizing in the human world.”

“Who is the little beauty in the back? It should be the elf of the human world. Could it be the girl that leader hooked up with?”

Hearing the voices of these 2 awful friends who were envious, Chen Rui suddenly turned around and said, “2 bastards, how about playing a game of basketball?”

Basketball? Seeing the two guys who couldn’t understand look at each other, Chen Rui showed a knowing smile on his face.

…

Attachment: Highlights of this season:

At the Dragon Island’s press conference, the intern reporter Roman asked Chen Rui, “Excuse me, Mr. Chen Rui, I heard that you went to the Dragon Valley in the human world, which is the biggest enemy of the Demon Realm’s Dragon Island. You also have close contacts with the Dragon Valley, is there such a thing?”

Seeing the hostile gazes of the Dragon Island’s dragons, especially the Old Dragon Emperor Father-in-law, everyone thought that this rookie asked a deadly question.

However, Chen Rui answered positively, “I did go to the Dragon Valley!”

Everyone was in an uproar.

Chen Rui immediately added, “But I went to harm the Dragon Valley because I brought Lalaria!”

Chen Rui’s wit touched everyone present, and the applause lasted for a long time.

chapters.title: Chapter 1205: Fusion Of The [Pole Star Transformation]
chapters.body:
Chapter 1205: Fusion Of The [Pole Star Transformation]

“‘He’ just said this?” Python looked away from the magic card indifferently. She did not ask Chen Rui to hand the magic card to her, but fell into silence.

Chen Rui did not hide it from Python. He told about his experience in the Psychedelic Forest. Of course, he mentioned the mirror world briefly. He only said that he was unknowingly guided by the legendary prophet and had a life-and-death bet with Lucifer. In the end, he won by luck. Then, the defeated Lucifer and the Supreme Key merged with Alucier’s ‘King of Darkness’ magic card.

Although Python seemed indifferent, Chen Rui could still feel the gloom. After breaking out of the mirror world, Chen Rui had a better understanding of the mysteries of that strange world. The mirror world was actually a mixed world of his, Lucifer, and Alucier’s inner consciousness. It was not only the reflection of his own soul, but also the soul refraction from the second and third person.

The main characters formed by Chen Rui’s spiritual reflection in the mirror world were Athena, Kia, Zola, and so on, while Lucifer’s were Satan, Python, Michael, Gabriel, Raphael, and others. If the characters were like the ‘flesh and blood‘ of the world, Then the ’skeleton‘ of the whole world consisted of the intersection and contradictory relationship between characters that was constructed by Alucier.

Among them, Chen Rui and Lucifer combined into 1 person, becoming the link connecting the roles of the 2 worlds and also the protagonist of the entire world.

In that world, Gabriel and Python’s feelings for ‘Chen Rui’, which was also to Lucifer, should be a considerable part of the real refraction.

Judging from Gabriel’s words and actions at the Psychedelic Forest, Lucifer, Satan, Michael, Python and others were in the same faction at the beginning. Just like the relationship in the mirror world. Especially in the sentence ‘Why did you fall’ that Gabriel questioned, the title used was ‘the dawn star of the Gods, the son of the morning, the most proud archangel’, then Lucifer should be the most powerful archangel back then!

Satan, Python, Abaddon and others were probably all angels. Later, due to some accident, they chose to ‘fall’ and joined the opposing faction, hence becoming enemies with Michael, Gabriel and others.

Gabriel was very shocked by Lucifer’s ‘fall’. Perhaps one could say that she could not believe this reality. Because of courage or timing, she was still unable to confront Lucifer directly. She did not ask that question until today.

Compared with Gabriel, Python, who had always been silent and not good at expressing herself, chose to follow silently and ‘fall’ together.

If you fall into darkness, I will accompany you forever.

When she decided that Chen Rui was ‘him’, this proud woman who once wanted to perish together chose to follow him wholeheartedly. She spared no effort to assist and fought with her life.

From this point of view, Chen Rui believed that Python, who had always been poor at expressing, had deeper feelings for Lucifer than Gabriel.

It was a pity that Chen Rui was still Chen Rui, not the ‘he’ in her mind. In fact, after the real ‘he’ appeared, the name of Python was never mentioned from the beginning to the end.

“ Uh … In the end, ‘he’ should have exhausted his strength and couldn’t last longer, so he just said to Gabriel that if there is another world, he, Gabriel, Rafferty… and you, and more people will meet again. “Chen Rui obviously lied, there was no Python in Lucifer’s original words.

This was a white lie.

Chen Rui didn’t know what the relationship between Lucifer and Python was. Maybe there were more unknown stories or maybe it was just wishful thinking from the beginning to the end. He just couldn’t bear to see Python like this. At least, in his mind, Python was a partner who fought side by side and also a friend.

Python’s eyes flickered, and she took a deep look at Chen Rui. The piercing gaze made him feel a little guilty as if she had seen through everything. Python stared at Chen Rui for a moment before she finally sighed. She hid all the bitterness as well as gloom in indifference, “I will stay here and help Athena until the child is born. Then, I want to leave for a while.”

“Thank you.” Chen Rui knew that any words of consolation were unnecessary, “If you want to cancel the contract, I can…”

“No need.” Python slowly shook her head, turned and left.

In the following time, Python seemed more reticent, but she still kept her promise. She stayed in the Dark Moon and used the collected materials to teach Athena the secret technique of merging with the Destruction Vessel. Python comprehended this secret technique over countless years when she was hiding in the Destruction Vessel. She was able to utilize the silver box to convert and contain the destructive power.

The Destruction Vessel no doubt was worthy of being the treasure that contained the Book of Destruction. After training this secret technique, Athena’s power soared to the peak stage of the Kingdom level again because of her pregnancy, but the situation of power out of control had been significantly reduced.

Auglas came to the Dark Moon because when he was in a coma during the [Moon Kingdom] battle last time, he got a trace of soul power of the Pseudo-God peak stage of Sariel given by Python. After returning to Dragon Island, Auglas devoted himself to training. Upon digesting this trace of power, he not only healed his injuries, but he also touched the threshold of advancing to the intermediate stage of the Pseudo-God. Now he came to the Dark Moon just to ask Python for advice.

But after coming here, Auglas’ confidence was hit again. Zola’s strength unexpectedly soared to the peak stage of the Pseaudo-God, and Chen Rui had surpassed the ordinary peak stage of the Pseudo-God!

The strength of Auglas’ 2 daughters, Lalaria and Olypheus, made him smile. It was just that in terms of the most painful marriage, 1 of the 2 girls was an ignorant miser while the other was a strange person who only loved women. The dragon emperor father could only hide in the corner and draw circles when kept getting ignored on the marriage matter.

The benefits of staying in the Dark Moon were quite obvious. The special training ground of the time law alone was an irresistible ‘benefit’. Elder Miss Black Dragon and the blue dragon with a strict and controlling wife still courteously apologize for interrupting in the beginning. Later, they simply pretended that they did not say these words and shamelessly refused to leave.

As friends, Chen Rui certainly wouldn’t mind this. He didn’t force Julia and Daniel to be linkers. The half-elf young couple Taylos and Altani expressed their true determination to Chen Rui, so they were offered a master-servant contract and received a 1-star enhancement.

When Taylos and Altani first came to the Demon Realm, they seemed a little uneasy, but the scene of the Demon Realm was completely different from what they had imagined. Except for their appearance, the demons were not much different from human world races. Even the dark elf, who had been repeatedly belittled in the elf tribe literature, was not as vicious as imagined. On the contrary, they did not have the overbearing arrogance of the human world’s elves and seemed easier to get along with. This made the half-elf, who was once despised because of his bloodline, had a strong sense of belonging.

What surprised the 2 even more was the prosperity of the Demon Realm. The prosperity of this Dark Moon Estate was not inferior to the 2 Holy Empires’ capitals. They heard that the 3 empires of the Demon Realm had formed an association, so the future development would be even more rapid. However, none of this was as shocking as when they learned that the ‘master’ was the only prince consort of the 3 empresses. With this big backer, Taylos and Altani could live in the Demon Realm with peace of mind.

In the blink of an eye, several months passed.

In the past few months, Chen Rui never left the Dark Moon. He stayed by Athena’s side all the time. In the mirror world, he comprehended the true meaning of life, which enhanced the life force of the entire galaxy in the Super System by more than 10 times. This enhancement had brought about an unexpected change. That was the [Pole Star Transformation] fusion with himself.

Before that, the transformation of the [Pole Star Transformation] was not limited by time and usage count limit, but now, the [Pole Star Transformation] had been fully integrated into life. In other words, he could exert the power of the Pseudo-God peak stage without deliberately transforming.

After equipping the star armor, his power would get a further buff. This kind of buff was not like the ability to cross the big realm before, but it was equivalent to the improvement of the small realm. That was to say, after equipping star armor, he could at least reach Main Elemental Messengers’ SSSS level. This was without activating the fusion of [All Star Gods View], but the fusion hadn’t been completed yet. Even so, Chen Rui was confident that he could conquer the joint forces of the 5 Main Elemental Messengers.

Conquer, not compete.

In fact, Chen Rui was still a little disappointed. Because he thought after he advanced to the Pseudo-God, he could rise above the God Level after the transformation. However, this change should still be within the scope of the [Pole Star Transformation]. It was just the fusion between the normal state and the transformation state. Just like the ‘Dragon Ball’ comics in the past where Sun Wukong and his son maintained super saiyan mode in a non-angry normal state.

This also meant that the [Pole Star Transformation] had approached the real bottleneck, which was the highest level of the 6-star enhancement. As long as he could break through to the 7-star evolution, he could truly surpass all Pseudo-Gods and step into a higher and perhaps the ultimate level!

The 7 artifacts had been turned into the Supreme Key and ‘sealed’ in the ‘King of Darkness’, so many of the useful skills before could no longer be used. However, these were just foreign objects after all. After they were truly abandoned, his state of mind would be more accessible.

Chen Rui suddenly felt a shudder when he thought of the ‘eyes’ that annihilated everything in the void.

He had vaguely guessed what it was.

“Why are you so preoccupied?” Catherine’s voice sounded beside her.

These days, Athena was about to give birth. Because of its overwhelming strength, the destruction power was very difficult to suppress when giving birth. Ordinary midwives doctors couldn’t bear it at all, and they would be annihilated before they got close. Only Catherine had childbearing experience, so Catherine especially rushed over from the Dark Shadow Empire to be ready to deliver Athena personally. Not only Catherine, Shea, and Tiffany also came to the Dark Moon.

“I was thinking, what would a Pseudo-God Royal Majesty Empress look like if she put on a teacher’s outfit and took a few… Hehe , photos?” Chen Rui turned back and smiled, holding Her Majesty Empress’ hand.

Under the guidance of Python and Zola, not long ago, Catherine’s strength successfully advanced to Pseudo-God. This was naturally due to the blessing of Duoduo. Meanwhile, Master Paglio, who had always wanted to break through to the peak stage of the Demi-God to catch up with Catherine, gave up completely.

“What crooked thoughts are you thinking?” Catherine smiled sweetly, looking coquettish, “From your obscene gaze, it can be seen that that kind of ‘photos’ is definitely not a decent thing.”

“I’m obscene?” Chen Rui pointed at his face, “How can a positive character like me with thick brows and big eyes betray a revolution?”

“Although I don’t understand what you say, I agree with Catherine’s point of view.” Shea walked over, saw someone’s obscene gaze, and directly refused without waiting for him to speak, “I will not satisfy any of your bad ideas of fun. Don’t even think about it.”

Chen Rui grinned. When he was about to speak, Tiffany hurried over, “Catherine, hurry up. Athena seems to be giving birth soon!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1206: Birth And Unusual Change
chapters.body:
Chapter 1206: Birth And Unusual Change

The sky above the courtyard was covered with overcast clouds with faint strands of lightning arcs.

From time to time, the ground vibrated with random frequencies. There were also various traces of destruction.

A protective formation was placed long ago nearby to prevent the power from spreading and hurting innocent people. From the outside, there was nothing unusual about this area.

Everyone was waiting outside the house. Their expressions were mostly anxious and expectant. The most anxious one was of course Chen Rui, who walked back and forth countless times, dripping with sweat.

It had been half an hour, but Catherine, Isabella, Zola, and Python still hadn’t come out; only Athena’s suppressed moans of pain were heard.

When Athena was at the late-pregnancy stage, her strength had soared to the early stage of the Demi-God, and the burst of destruction power was extremely powerful, so only these few people could go in without life danger.

“Giving birth to a baby is so painful?” Alice held Shea’s hand tightly with a nervous expression.

Shea shook her head, “I don’t know either. I just know that this moment alone is enough to show that all mothers are the greatest.”

In fact, not only Shea, but all the ladies present were inexperienced. Catherine, the only mommy, was helping Athena deliver the baby in the house.

The lightning in the sky became more and more intense as if it was attracted by something. Then, it struck toward the house simultaneously. This lightning seemed to contain incomparable destructive power as large cracks appeared.

There was a flash of light in Chen Rui’s eyes, and he had already appeared above the house. His body exuded a strange pulling force, absorbing all those lightning bolts into his body like a magnet.

Lightning kept flashing. Chen Rui’s clothes fluttered violently, but his whole body was unshakable. Although it seemed that the lightning was easily dispelled, he was secretly surprised. The power of this lightning was extraordinary, and it was getting stronger and stronger. If it were a Demi-God like Paglio, he might not be able to withstand it!

At this moment, a baby’s cry suddenly came from the room, and the intense lightning suddenly stopped and quickly began to dim. The dark clouds gradually dissipated, revealing the 2 moons.

Chen Rui saw that in the house below, Isabella came out with a small body wrapped in a quilt. As his eyes flashed, he immediately landed on the ground.

Everyone surrounded him, but Chen Rui rushed straight into the gate without looking at the child.

“Athena!” When Chen Rui came into the room, Zola was using water element magic to clean up the blood mist in the room and the air while Catherine helped Athena wipe the sweat. Python withdrew the light covering Athena.

Athena closed her eyes tightly. Her facial expression and lips were extremely pale while her body trembled involuntarily, but her life force was still clear. This made Chen Rui finally feel relieved. He walked to the side of the bed and squatted down to hold Athena’s hand.

Athena slowly opened her eyes, “Is it a boy or a girl?”

Chen Rui was stunned, “I haven’t seen it yet.”

Catherine smiled slightly, “This guy rushed in immediately, probably without even looking at the child.”

Athena was moved in her mind, yet she also felt that he didn’t care about the child, so she tried her best to glare at Chen Rui. On the other hand, Catherine said what she was most concerned about, “It is a very healthy boy. I can feel the pure and powerful life force in him.”

“Boy.” Athena’s eyes lit up.

“Not only is his life strong, but also strength.” Zola was very envious of Athena, who was a mommy. She spoke up while cleaning, “This child’s strength is at the Demon Emperor. Although many of our dragons are born at this level, this child has the talent of destruction origin. Therefore, it is easy to step into the super-level. Even without Duoduo’s God’s descendants power, his future achievements are also limitless.”

“Strength is second. As long as he can grow up healthy, safe, and happy.” Athena’s pale face showed a smile full of maternal brilliance.

Ms. Fairy Dragon blinked her eyes, “Athena, do you remember our naming lottery contest last time? If it’s a girl, her nickname is ‘Tangtang’, and if it’s a boy…”

“ En , the child’s nickname will be ‘Doudou’ from now on.” Athena looked at Zola with a smile, “I will tell him that this is the name given by his aunty Zola, and… I believe he will be full of happiness in this life.”

“ En .” Ms. Fairy Dragon replied happily. She secretly thought that when she had a child in the future, she would let Athena choose the nickname.

“Athena has expended too much physical strength and energy, so now she urgently needs to rest. You all go out first.” Python, who had been silent all this time, said, “I will use kingdom power to help her recuperate for a while.”

“Thank you.” Chen Rui said sincerely. If it weren’t for Python, Athena or the child would probably be in danger. Now that the mother and child were safe, the gratitude in his mind could not be summed up in simple words.

Python nodded without saying anything. She came to Athena and sat down. With the light flashing, Athena’s body gradually relaxed, the trauma she suffered was also recovering rapidly, and she slowly fell into a deep sleep.

When Chen Rui, Catherine, and Zola walked out of the room, they saw that there was a large circle of people around Isabella. They were all noisy and focused on the little guy whose nickname should be ‘Doudou’.

The little guy didn’t open his eyes nor did he cry. He just closed his eyes as if he had fallen asleep after the previous cry. He seemed particularly quiet.

Alice’s eyes lit up, “ Wow , Athena’s baby is so cute.”

“ En .” Shea and Tiffany said it almost in unison.

“It’s a little boy. Duoduo, you have a younger brother now.” Kia held Duoduo and looked at Little Doudou enviously.

Duoduo, who was promoted to sister for the first time, asked with great interest, “Aunt Kia, can I give my brother a hug?”

“Not yet, Darling Duoduo,” laughed Delia next to her, “When he grows up, you can take him to stroll around every day…”

“Little guy, how about calling me godfather?” Paglio was also a little jealous. That cunning human actually had 2 children, and I didn’t have any children. I should enjoy being a godfather first.

Roman said with contempt on his face, “ Tsk , you alcoholic still want to be someone’s godfather? Don’t be a bad influence to the child in the future.”

“It’s better than some guy who is obsessed with widows and married women!” Paglio was furious, and he accidentally broke the news, “The day before yesterday, he took even brought me to see that widow named Linda!”

Roman felt that Delia’s sword-like gaze was about to pierce his spine. He secretly cursed the poison dragon, who was betraying his teammate, and immediately retorted. Isabella, who was holding the child, felt that the saliva of these 2 guys was about to spray them, and she said fiercely, ” You 2 bastards, get out of the way if you want to quarrel. Don’t disturb the child!”

“Sister, why doesn’t this kid look very pretty?” Olypheus asked curiously.

“Newborn babies are like this. They will become more and more pretty after a while.”

Lalaria looked regretful, “He’s so cute, but he’s not a girl. Otherwise, I would desperately take away the first kiss.”

“Little master, truly handsome…” The slime, who couldn’t squeeze in, shouted loudly outside.

“…”

Chen Rui managed to break through the encirclement, came to Isabella, and took the child. When he saw that small face, a feeling of bloodline connection emerged spontaneously. This was his child, the crystallization of love between him and Athena.

“Okay, give it to me quickly. Look at your clumsy hands.” Yini was dissatisfied. She rushed to carry the child back as if she was Little Doudou’s real mother.

“Daddy, I want a hug too.” Duoduo held out her hand.

Chen Rui laughed, deliberately ignoring what his daughter meant. He did not let Duoduo hug Doudou. Instead, he opened his arms and hugged the little girl. The little girl angrily grabbed daddy’s face and rubbed it again and again. When Catherine glared at her, she immediately sneaked into mommy’s arms and acted coquettishly.

Looking at his wife, children, and friends in front of him, Chen Rui felt extremely warm and satisfied. Having these, he had no regrets in his life.

The birth of Little Doudou brought celebration and joy to the whole yard. Just when everyone was laughing, the sky suddenly lit up.

The light of the 2 moons hanging high suddenly increased 10 times, exuding amazing heat. It actually felt like the human world’s ‘sun’.

Under the irradiation of this kind of light, the originally most intense dark element breath weakened a lot.

In the space between the 2 moons, a special form of distortion appeared. The magnitude of this distortion became larger and larger. With a boom , it expanded. A cluster of light flashed and extended into a light beam that pierced the sky and the earth.

In an instant, the world was trembling under this light beam.

The momentum of this kind of occurrence was almost comparable to that of the elemental world last time. Everyone was dumbfounded. The birth of the son of destruction origin can cause such a huge scene?

Catherine looked at this familiar scene, and she suddenly thought of something. Her facial expression couldn’t help but change drastically. This is not caused by Little Doudou, but…

“It’s actually this!” Python appeared in the courtyard at some point, “This actually appears in advance… What does it mean?”

“What exactly is this?” Chen Rui clearly sensed the shock of the power of the entire Demon Realm, and he asked curiously.

“The door.” Catherine’s gaze was mixed with shock and doubt, “It was supposed to appear more than 100 years later, but now it’s ahead of schedule!”

The ‘door’ that will appear more than 100 years later? Chen Rui’s eyes suddenly widened, and he already knew what it was.

The ‘Door of the World’ that appeared every 500 years!

The last time it appeared was more than 300 years ago. As Catherine said, under normal circumstances, it should be more than 100 years before it was opened. Unexpectedly, it was open now…

This door would open the passage between the Demon Realm and the human world. At the same time, it meant a real war!

TL: As super powerhouse, they can’t intervene much in this war right?

chapters.title: Chapter 1207: Gather
chapters.body:
Chapter 1207: Gather

Python and Catherine were not the only ones who recognized the ‘door’. The lifespan of demons was much longer than that of humans. Even many civilians had experienced similar changes more than 300 years ago. As soon as the news came. The entire Demon Realm was in a commotion.

Now the Demon Realm’s 3 empires established the confederation. The demons were ushering in a rare time of peace and rapid development. Unexpectedly, the ‘door’ appeared ahead of schedule.

This meant that the war of 2 worlds, which occurred once every 500 years, would come earlier.

From the mouths of demon trainers who returned to the Demon Realm from the human world, the prosperity of the Demon Realm had already caught up with the human world. The demons had enjoyed the peaceful time of the past few years, but conquering the sun-drenched human world was the Demon Realm’s deep-rooted concepts for countless years. It contained countless generations of hatred. Facing the imminent war, the warlike blood in the bones of many demons boiled.

In the Dark Moon residence, the festive atmosphere of Little Doudou’s birth had disappeared. Everyone’s faces showed dignified expressions. Auglas’ body suddenly glowed faintly.

“A summoning contract?” Chen Rui had already judged the special attribute of that brilliance.

“Yes.” The Old Dragon Emperor Father-in-law nodded, “It was a contract signed more than 300 years ago.”

Catherine reacted the fastest and asked in surprise, “Your Majesty Auglas, was it… the war between the 2 worlds last time?”

“Yes.” Auglas nodded. “The target of signing this contract is not only the Demon Realm, but also the races of the human world. The strength of the contractor is…”

“Super-level?” Chen Rui had already guessed, “The content is that the super-level powerhouses must not interfere with the war? Or is there a so-called… ‘balance’?”

Balance was maintained for countless years due to the results of the war.

There was no real winner, not even the previous Lord of Midnight Sun victory. He almost went straight into the human world and destroy the empires. In the end, he also ended up dying halfway.

Therefore, the truth of this never-ending war was that there was no ultimate victory or defeat.

The only theme song was the annihilation of life.

The purpose of this annihilation was to sacrifice.

Chen Rui looked at the power of summoning contract on Auglas and said, “Let’s go and have a look together.”

“I’m going too!” Paglio, Roman and the others shouted out.

Isabella thought for a while and said, “I’ll stay. Athena, Duoduo, and Doudou are all here. They need to be taken care of and protected.”

“I’ll stay too.” Shea looked at Alice who was about to move. This discouraged Princess Loli, who wanted to go and watch the excitement. Olypheus, Krobelus, Kia and others also stayed behind.

With Isabella staying here, Chen Rui was relieved a lot. He gave some instructions, kept everyone into the Tower of Glory, and flew away toward the light beam. Python was in silence for a moment before she followed behind.

Both were at the peak stage of the Pseudo-God. Whether flying or shifting, their speed was almost to the extreme. Python felt that Chen Rui’s indistinct breath in flight actually made her soul feel almost suffocating. This was still when he hadn’t exerted all his strength, so she couldn’t help being secretly surprised.

In a flash, the 2 soon left the range of the Dark Moon Estate. The light beam was in the northeast of the Dark Moon Estate. Based on the distance estimation, it shouldn’t be in the Fallen Angel Empire, but in the Bloody Empire!

The Blood Claw Estate on the east side of the Bloody Empire was originally an inconspicuous small estate.

As expected, the light beam descended on the Blood Claw Estate, east of the Bloody Empire.

This meant that this would be the main entry or exit to the battlefield.

The army of the Demon Realm would enter the human world through the ‘door’ from here, or the army of the human world would step into the Demon Realm from here.

The opening of the door was not completed immediately. Judging from previous records, it took about 10 days.

The door had a strong repel, which stopped ordinary people from approaching.

At that time, ordinary people didn’t know that some light streams passing by were not the energy of the light beam itself, but people who could enter the light beam.

When Chen Rui entered the area of the light beam, he felt a special force field, so he was immediately on full alert.

“Don’t resist. The function of this force field is to filter and repel people below the Kingdom Level.” Python’s voice sounded in his mind.

No doubt, this force field surrounded Chen Rui for a moment, then it disappeared after sensing his kingdom power.

Chen Rui nodded to Python, then he released everyone in the Tower of Glory. Among these people, Roman and Tiffany were the weakest, but they had also reached the peak stage of the Kingdom Level, so naturally they would not be repelled.

Looking at the light beam, the light of the contract on Auglas became more and more intense. He said, “Let’s go in, the light beam is just a space passage. Generally, there is no danger. The others are probably coming soon.”

Zola asked, “Do the others you speak of include all the super powerhouses in the Demon Realm?”

“I’ve participated several times. 300 years ago, representatives of major forces and many independent trainers came,” Auglas paused. “Moreover, it wasn’t just the Demon Realm’s forces that came.”

“Not only the Demon Realm?” Chen Rui narrowed his eyes, “It seems that we will meet old friends.”

“One has already come.” Python saw a light stream in the sky, then a person appeared before them.

When the person saw Chen Rui and Python, he frowned. He glanced at Tiffany and Zola for a while, and he finally set his gaze on Chen Rui.

“Indeed an old friend.” Chen Rui withdrew his gaze, “It’s been a while, Satan. It seems that you have gained a lot during this time.”

The person who came was Satan. Chen Rui could tell at a glance that Satan’s strength had also increased considerably. It seemed that he had made some kind of breakthrough in merging with the Destruction Vessel.

Tiffany bowed Satan from a distance, “Teacher.”

Satan had such a good vision. He could see at a glance that the relationship between Tiffany and Chen Rui was not simple. When he remembered that Chen Rui prevented him from carrying out the Dark Divinity Temple plan on the 3 empires, he sneered, “Tiffany, you seem to have found a bigger backer. Besides, the deal between us has been completed. I’m no longer your ‘teacher’.”

Tiffany’s expression remained unchanged as she said, “No matter what, you’re my teacher after all.”

Satan nodded, “Not bad, you have a bit of empress temperament, and your strength is almost reaching that of Demi-God. If you choose to return to my protection now, you will be the number one pope in Dark Divinity Temple in the future.”

Before Tiffany could speak, Chen Rui said flatly, “Impossible.”

Satan sneered, “ Hmph ! If it weren’t for the 10-year agreement, I would completely destroy your self-confidence right now.”

“Teacher, you are wrong. No matter if you win or lose, I will never promise you.” Tiffany said indifferently, “Because I’m his wife.”

Wife? Satan was startled. He suddenly thought of something, and his pupils shrank.

Chen Rui’s face was as calm as before. He was not afraid of anyone now. Even if all my secret identities are known to the world, what do I still fear?

“What an ‘Aguile’! Good scheming! Good means! Even I have to admit defeat!” Satan suddenly laughed, “With such an opponent, life will not be lonely!”

Chen Rui’s eyes could not help but show an appreciative expression. From the opponent’s point of view, although Satan was ruthless and scheming, his demeanor was the most admirable of all his enemies.

He and Satan might never be friends, but they could be rivals. It was not in vain to get acquainted.

Chen Rui raised his hand slowly, but he didn’t attack. Instead, 2 bottles of wine appeared in his hand. He threw a bottle to Satan.

Python frowned because she also had a bottle in her hand.

“There’s no need to explain my identity anymore.” Chen Rui raised the wine bottle and said with a pun, “To the ‘fallen’.”

A strange light flashed in Satan’s eyes. He also held up the wine bottle, “To the ‘fallen’.”

Python seemed to recall something from the past. Her hands trembled slightly, but she didn’t lift the bottle.

Satan raised his head, bottomed up the wine, and turned the wine bottle into dust, “It’s been a long time since I felt this way. In the battle between us, I will have no regrets in killing you or dying in your hands!”

After speaking, he turned into a light stream and disappeared into the light beam.

Chen Rui looked at the crowd and walked toward the light beam. Everyone followed closely behind.

After watching these figures enter the light beam, Python looked at the wine bottle in her hand, silently removed the wine cork, and drank it all in one gulp.

After entering the light beam, there was a long passage before they came to a space similar to a hall in the center. This space was extremely huge, enough to accommodate millions of people.

On the opposite side, they could see another passage of space, which was obviously leading to the human world.

At this time, there were already many people in the space, which were divided into 2 sides. The number of these people was more than Chen Rui imagined. This time the change was too sudden. Many trainers couldn’t come in time.

In terms of strength, it was like the pyramids. The kingdomized ones were the most, the Demi-Gods were less than 1/10 of the kingdomized ones, and the Pseudo-Gods were even rarer.

Although there were still many people who hadn’t arrived, basically, this time, almost all super powerhouses in the human world and the Demon Realm were gathered here.

Chen Rui and Satan were on the side of the Demon Realm; Raizen and others were also here. On the opposite side of the human world faction, there were several familiar faces, including the Dragon Emperor Pagris of the Dragon Valley, the elf tribe’s Kilanya, as well as the strongest 3 archangels. When Chen Rui and others appeared, they immediately looked at over.

“Michael.” Satan was the first to sneer, “Your progress in strength is really disappointing. 300 years of faith power have only allowed you to reach this level?”

Michael shifted his gaze from Chen Rui to Satan, and there was a faint lightning spark flashing between their eyes, “Do you want to try?”

Michael, who claimed to be ‘the person closest to God’, was also known as the strongest Pseudo-God in the human world while Satan was the strongest Pseudo-God in the Demon Realm. The feud between the 2 could be traced back to the era where both of them were angels. This meeting was naturally full of belligerence.

Gabriel said coldly with her eyes closed, “This is not a place to fight. Fight outside if you want to.”

This sentence stated her neutral stance. Neither Satan nor Michael further stirred up the situation, but they just sneered at the same time, which could be regarded as temporarily letting go of the matter.

With the most powerful restraint of both sides as an example, the previously hostile ‘light’ and ‘darkness’ did not have any major conflicts again. Nonetheless, Lalaria’s strange laughter made the Dragon Emperors on both sides feel a little nervous at the same time.

The next step was to wait. When all the people were almost here, it was time to step into the theme.

chapters.title: Chapter 1208: The Truth
chapters.body:
Chapter 1208: The Truth

Those who could step into the super-level were not impatient, and most of the people present had experienced such a scene. Although many of them were old enemies for many years, they all calmed down with a settling attitude.

There were also many ‘circles’ on both sides. The people on Chen Rui’s side were a small group, but Raizen didn’t come over. Satan was also proudly independent while Kilanya and Pagris were inconvenient to greet Chen Rui because of the factions.

In the eyes of most outsiders, except for the Dragon Emperor who was well known as the Demon Realm Dragon Emperor, the veiled Catherine and the newly ascended Bloody Empire Empress Tiffany, and Chen Rui was basically a new face. Occasionally, a few people recognized Lalaria, Paglio, and Roman as the contestants in the competition held in Bloody Empire. In terms of strength, they should all be rookies.

It was these rookies who actually laughed like no one else was there, and the powerful people around them frowned. If it wasn’t because of the big backer Auglas, they would have already reprimanded or used their strength to deter them.

Chen Rui naturally didn’t care about other people’s gazes. He talked to his own people as if nothing happened. Python was at the outermost edge of the small circle, maintaining an audience stance. Of course, no one would have imagined that this tall, silent-looking beauty was the mysterious powerhouse Python who had overwhelmed and snatched the silver box from Satan, Sariel and other peak stage of the Pseudo-Gods back then.

While waiting, people came one after another. Chen Rui saw a familiar figure again, the former Bloody Empire First General Gustav. His real name was Bridget. Samael, patriarch of the Samael Royal Family.

Bridget fought Raizen desperately in the Bloody Empire’s martial battle competition. Although it was exciting, he was defeated and died in the end. It was Catherine who rescued him with the recovery potion gifted by Chen Rui. She also promised to give the Samael Royal Family a living space, so Bridget ‘lent’ the Wrath King Armor to Catherine.

Catherine no doubt kept her word. Currently, half the Samael Royal Family lived in the Dark Shadow Empire. The other half remained at Town Essidor in the Bloody Empire.

The newly appointed Bloody Empire Empress Tiffany also adopted a relatively tolerant policy toward the Samael Royal Family. She and Catherine jointly recommended Bridget to become a member of the 3 empires’ confederation. Now that the 3 empires had formed an alliance, the Demon Realm was unprecedentedly united and peaceful. Even if there were any great ambitions, they could only be said to be born at the wrong time. Nevertheless, the Samael Royal Family finally had no survival crisis. They were able to multiply and develop relatively smoothly.

“Okay, all the people are almost there. Let’s start.” Michael spoke first. His indifferent voice echoed in everyone’s mind, and the surroundings suddenly became quiet, “Let me introduce myself first. Most of the people present know me. I’m the Holy Church archangel, Michael. Under normal circumstances, the human world I represent and the Demon Realm are sworn enemies. There must be a final battle between us, but not today.”

“Many people who have signed the contract before understand that now is not the time for us all to really fight, especially the ‘door’ which appears uncharacteristically early this time. This may mean that some things have become worse. So the war between the human world and the Demon Realm is imperative! Moreover, the intensity of the war and the number of deaths this time will far exceed those in the past!” Michael’s gaze showed a faint threat. Wherever he looked, the weak trainers only felt terrified and could hardly look directly at them.

Chen Rui couldn’t help frowning tightly when he heard these few words from Michael.

“In terms of rules, there are not many changes. Those who are above the super-level are prohibited from participating in the war, and they must do everything possible to promote the war behind the scenes. Only when one side reaches the final moment of survival can specific person take action to prevent a certain outcome. On this point, all Pseudo-Gods have already reached a consensus, including my old opponents in the Demon Realm. Don’t ask me the specific reason, most of you are not qualified to know. You just need to execute it. If there is no problem, everyone will sign this contract.”

After finishing speaking, a contract that had already been prepared appeared in front of Michael, exuding a faint golden light. The ‘old opponent’ Satan did not raise any objections for Michael’s words, acquiescing to it.

Most of the powerful people were ‘old people’ from 300 years ago or even longer, so they were also mentally prepared for this. When they were about to come forward to sign the contract, a voice suddenly sounded, “Wait a minute.”

Everyone looked at the person who said that. It was 1 of the loud guys in the Demon Realm faction. He was probably a rookie who had just advanced to the JKingdom Level, yet he dared to question the peak stage of the Pseudo-God Michael. Some people already had the gloated look.

“I want to know the reason.” Chen Rui looked directly at Michael. Obviously, the things Gabriel and Raphael took from the Psychedelic Forest had obvious effects. Michael no longer had any injuries. In fact, his strength had increased somewhat. It was possibly a benefit from the Creation Vessel.

Michael’s eyes flashed. He was about to speak when someone from the light faction sneered with disdain. This was a silver-haired man whose strength was actually at the peak stage of the Pseudo-God, but in Chen Rui’s eyes, this man’s strength was weaker than 3 archangels.

The silver-haired man glanced at Chen Rui contemptuously, “Didn’t you hear what Michael said just now? The Demon Realm is really getting worse from generation to generation. Satan, you are surrounded by such ignorant and fearless guys?”

As soon as he said these words, there was a burst of ridicule from the light faction. The facial expressions of many people in the Demon Realm were unsightly.

Satan obviously didn’t care about the silver-haired man. He showed a mocking expression and didn’t even bother to explain.

“Who is this person?” Chen Rui did not know the silver-haired man, so he asked Python.

“You don’t even know who I am?” The silver-haired man snorted, “But ants like you are not qualified to touch this level. Let Satan, Sariel or Abaddon talk to me.”

Python had already answered, “This man’s name is Raguel. He is a cowardly person who can only tell stories. He is not worth mentioning at all.”

Raguel was furious, “Who are you? How dare you derogate me! Don’t think that I don’t dare to kill ants like you in this critical moment!”

“Has your left eye grown?” Python showed a cold smile, “What a pity. You’re still so blind. Do you want me to dig it out for you again? This time, I will dig out your right eye too! “

Raguel was startled, then he showed a horrified expression, “You… you are Python!”

There was no shortage of veteran super powerhouses on the Demon Realm side. They were shocked when they heard the name Python. This was a mysterious powerhouse who was at the same level as Satan in the legend, but they didn’t expect her to be a woman!

Satan added, “It’s true that you are blind. I don’t want to waste my words on you, but let me tell you 1 thing. The Sariel and Abaddon you wanted to talk to have died at the hands of this person.”

As soon as this remark came out, it was not only Raguel, the 3 archangels were also shocked: After Sariel, Abaddon was also killed by him?

Chen Rui didn’t even look at Raguel, but he just fixed his eyes on Michael, “I want to know the answer.”

This time Raguel didn’t dare to say anything, but Michael sneered, “I don’t know if you are ‘him’, but it’s the same whether you know the answer or not.”

“Why?” Chen Rui directly asked the question that had troubled him for a long time. The peace of the Demon Realm was brought about by him with great difficulty. Of course, he was unwilling for it to be burned by the flames of war like this. Besides, he always wanted to resolve the hatred between the Demon Realm and the human world, especially after learning the truth about the manipulation of the war of the 2 worlds.

He wanted to fundamentally resolve the war between the 2 worlds. He did not want countless lives to be ruined continuously due to some unknown reason. These lives probably include ‘Arthur”s father, sister, as well as Chen Rui’s friends, relatives and so on.

“Because you don’t have the power to change it.”

Michael’s words made Chen Rui frown. He stretched out his fist slowly, and the purple starlight on his body flourished. The majestic momentum instantly filled the entire space. With Chen Rui as the center, an unstoppable and powerful force field spreaded out in all directions. Wherever they passed, the trainers were all repelled and sent flying.

Zola, Python and others received his mind call long ago, so they backed away earlier with Auglas.

Several peak stage of the Pseudo-Gods were also startled, because their bodies also moved backward involuntarily under the action of that huge force field.

Michael and the others were naturally unwilling to be suppressed like this, and [Armor of Faith] appeared on their bodies at the same time, but they still felt more and more strenuous. They couldn’t care about reserving their force at all.

The light of destruction loomed in Satan’s eyes, and a clock-like disc appeared behind him. There was a strange pointer on the disc.

Michael turned into a 12-winged giant phantasm. He held the Holy Cross Sword that shone like the sun in his hand.

Gabriel had opened her eyes. The space she was in had become a world intertwined with silver and red. Those spiral patterns combined with the Holy Song Sword in her hand.

Raphael held the long silver staff tightly in both hands as the space around him was glowing with light and heat. Many luminous holy creatures were flying around.

Raguel was holding a horn-shaped thing. The space under his feet had condensed into ice, and there were many images of angels with wings looming in the cold air around him.

As soon as they exerted their power, the purple starlight was suppressed by their join attack. However, the compressed starlight became brighter and brighter. In the blink of an eye, a galaxy appeared in everyone’s vision.

In the galaxy, the bright constellations gradually gathered toward Chen Rui in the center. Michael and others felt the pressure was increasing while their kingdoms also began to tremble and dim.

The super-level trainers who watched the battle were all shocked. With the strength of one person, he suppressed 5 peak stage of the Pseudo-Gods!

Raguel was the first to fall. The ice world was the first to collapse. He was sent flying back. His facial expression was completely pale, obviously suffering a big loss. The other four felt more and more strenuous.

“I didn’t expect that your strength had reached this point! But, even if you defeat everyone, it’s useless. You still can’t change the result!” This was Gabriel’s voice. Although her strength was not the strongest, her Saint Fighting Heart was the most special, so she was relatively relaxed, “Do you remember the clause other than the exchange in the contract signed with us when you and Python came to the White Cliff that day?”

Chen Rui couldn’t help restraining his strength, “Of course I remember!”

That clause was that when facing the most important public enemy in the future, Party B must unconditionally form a united front with Party A immediately.

“Then, it’s time for you to fulfill the contract.” Michael’s voice also sounded.

Chen Rui was startled, and he finally stopped his strength. He had understood the biggest truth, the purpose of the war of 2 worlds. ‘Sacrifice’!

TL: To seal the Abyss?
