chapters.title: Chapter 1209: Hope
chapters.body:
Chapter 1209: Hope

Abyss.

The biggest problem.

The war between the 2 worlds, that has been going on for years and took away countless life, is actually to seal the Abyss!

Originally, in Chen Rui’s guess, the location of the seal of the Abyss should be in the elemental world, but today the truth of the seal had finally been revealed. Then, what was sealed in the elemental world…

Chen Rui faintly understood something. A part of the fog covering more truth seemed to be cleared away.

It’s not entirely because Python or other people are trying to keep it secret. Judging from the situation when Moore first revealed the secret of the elemental world, some things are affected by some kind of intangible ‘rule’. Once it is spoken, one would annihilate like Moore back then.

“If you want to show your strength, your goal has already been achieved, but if you want to stop war or contract, no matter what your goal is, you are the enemy of the whole world and a sinner.” Raphael said with a sneer, “Your strength is indeed astonishing. In a 1vs1, none of us is your opponent, but don’t get too carried away. If we 3 archangels use the fusion kingdom secret technique to activate [Oracle Formation], we are absolutely sure to suppress you! “

[Oracle Formation]? Chen Rui frowned slightly. After showing such strength, Raphael actually still has such confidence?

“You won’t have a chance for that.” Python’s voice sounded. At the same time, the figures of Python and Zola appeared beside Chen Rui. Python’s breath locked on Gabriel and Zola’s breath locked on Raphael.

Chen Rui’s eyes flickered. It seems that this [Oracle Formation] is indeed powerful beyond imagination, otherwise Python would not have acted like this. The [Oracle Formation] should also have a flaw that is easy to be broken before it is successfully activated.

“This battle is meaningless.” Satan said, “Actually, you should know how much more important the lives sacrificed in the war of the 2 worlds are compared to the whole world. If your strength is only what you just showed, then I can tell you unceremoniously, just like us, your strength is not enough to change the result; let alone afford the consequences of failure.”

This sentence made Chen Rui silent. The Abyss was the biggest enemy. He joined forces with Satan to destroy the Despair Main Altar. If it wasn’t for Helen’s Siren’s Heart, his soul would have been completely destroyed by the power of Despair Lord Dillosro’s avatar. That was just Dillosro’s projection. According to Python, the Lord of Despair is only the weakest among the 3 rulers of the Abyss.

Although Chen Rui’s strength was far from what it was back then, even Satan and Michael were not his opponents, but from what Satan said just now, even Chen Rui’s current strength could not rival the 3 rulers.

What was more, under the command of the 3 rulers, there was an endless army of the Abyss!

“This is a painful choice, but a choice that has to be made.” Auglas spoke in the distance. Although he was only at the intermediate stage of the Pseudo-God, compared with those at the peak stage of the Pseudo-God, he knew better the character of this prospective son-in-law.

This man possessed incredible strength, and there were also things in his mind that should be superfluous to powerhouses. Perhaps it was because of this that he was able to achieve that incredible level, and because of this, Auglas was very relieved to keep his 2 daughters by his side.

Chen Rui clenched his fists. Satan and Auglas are right, even if I have the ability to forcibly stop the war of the 2 worlds, I can’t bear the consequences of failure. I can’t accept the fact that such innocent people die because of war, but I can only accept it.

Powerlessness.

A strong sense of powerlessness.

Chen Rui looked at the surrounding super powerhouses and sighed as the starlight all over his body dimmed. The moment the light disappeared, he also disappeared.

Zola frowned and followed him, along with Paglio and others. Lalaria thought about it before leaving too. Only Python remained there.

“Too many entanglements; too many scruples.” Michael looked indifferently at the direction where Chen Rui disappeared, “Ridiculously weak.”

“That’s right, he has all the power but lacks absolute dedication to strength.” Satan rarely agreed with Michael’s opinion.

“Maybe it’s another kind of attachment that we don’t understand.” Gabriel’s eyes closed again.

Python’s lips moved, but she didn’t say anything. Her figure gradually faded.

“Another person who is bound by something meaningless.” Raphael looked at the disappearing Python and sneered.

“She has never let go… But these are not important to me.” Satan said with a long smile, “It doesn’t matter if the whole world perishes, as long as I become a god, he, she, and you all are just a stepping stone for me.”

“Don’t get complacent too early.” Michael sneered coldly, “There will be a battle sooner or later between you and me, but this time the appearance of the ‘door’ may be strange, so we should finish the most important thing first.”

The golden contract appeared again. This time, no one raised any objections.

Chen Rui left the light beam, flew aimlessly for a while, landed on a mountain, and looked ahead silently.

There was a sudden fluctuation in his consciousness. The figure of Python appeared in the Galaxy Divinity Temple of the Super System, the soul avatar.

“The main plane is like a core, and the periphery is the eternal protective enchantment laid by God’s power. Any power that is not allowed is excluded from the enchantment.”

“However, due to the fall of the Gods, eternity no longer exists. The infinite becomes finite. We can only sacrifice life force to fill the enchantment for protection. Not only the power is greatly reduced, but continuous sacrifice is required.”

“The ‘door’ is a warning sign that the power of the enchantment is approaching exhaustion, so there must be a war.”

“But one day, the ‘door’ that loses eternity will collapse. This time, the early appearance of the door shows that the tension of the enchantment has exceeded the normal situation. Sacrifice is inevitable. War is the most suitable method. Otherwise, it can only be done by us, direct massacre.”

“You can’t change; you can only accept. Unless you can have the determination to destroy everything…”

“Or the power that overrides everything…”

After saying these few sentences, Python disappeared.

In these words, there was no farewell, but Chen Rui knew that this was a farewell.

She left.

Python fulfilled her promise. She helped Athena give birth to a child safely, and now she chose to leave.

Maybe we will see each other soon, maybe it will be a long time, or maybe never.

Just like a certain lyric, there is a kind of meeting, it is better not to meet.

Chen Rui looked at Python’s name in the ‘link’ for a long time, but he didn’t cancel it in the end.

Zola followed Chen Rui far away and didn’t bother him.

The others who came one after another were all stopped by the fairy dragon. She just nodded to Catherine. Although the fairy dragon really wanted to be by Chen Rui’s side, she knew very well that Catherine was the most suitable guide for him who was caught in conflict and pain.

Catherine flew to Chen Rui’s side, but she didn’t speak. She just stood side by side with him, watching his gaze.

“All this n front of me…” Chen Rui finally spoke half a sentence.

Catherine agreed with him, then she continued, “You don’t want to see these things turn into ashes of destruction, but you also can’t accept the cruelty of sending countless innocent lives to the altar yourself.”

“Myself… Yes.” Chen Rui looked at his hand, “I have the power to stop it, but I can’t stop it, it’s because of my own hands.”

“Before I ascended to the throne, my 2 elder brothers… were annihilated under the ambush I planned. No one survived.” Catherine also looked at her hands, “My only remaining younger brother was killed by me on the battlefield. I beheaded him with my own hands. The moment I killed him, what came to my mind was the scene when I held his hand and told him stories when I was a child. At that moment, I only felt an unprecedented weakness and wanted to throw away the sword in my hands. I burst into tears, but I did not shed tears. I raised the sword with blood and accepted the cheers of the soldiers as well as the surrender of the enemies.”

Chen Rui held Catherine’s hand as Catherine’s eyes were full of tears. Her tone was still calm, “For me, they are my last siblings, but for the Dark Shadow Empire, they are the source of turmoil. If I don’t kill them, I won’t pacify the empire, and more people’s siblings will die. I don’t even remember how many times I woke up crying in my dreams, curled up alone, and trembling in loneliness and pain. I even wanted to give up my own life. However, when faced with the throne that controls life and death as well as the joy and sorrow of the entire empire, I turned back to the ruthless empress. Many of them are actually innocent, but for the sake of the entire empire, I had no choice.”

“Catherine…” Chen Rui held Catherine’s hand a little tighter.

Catherine leaned lightly on his shoulder, “I have hoped and imagined more than once that my father was not poisoned by my eldest brother, and my brothers would not rebel because of fighting for the throne. I was still a princess who was loved by my father and elder brothers and admired by my younger brother. I can no longer hide my loneliness and fear with a mask. I can rely on a strong arm, hold his hand, and share each other’s pain and happiness…”

“I understand what you mean.” Chen Rui let go of his hand and gently embraced Catherine’s waist. Some of her hopes would never come true, but some had already been realized. Because this was hope.

“We can suffer because of reality, but we must not lose hope.” Tiffany also came to the side, “This is what you once said to me.”

Hope.

In order to protect all hope, burn everything and fight.

This was the oath in his mind.

Whether he was sad or decadent crying, this oath would not change.

Chen Rui nodded and held Tiffany’s hand. Ms. Fairy Dragon coughed deliberately from behind. Chen Rui and the 2 Royal Majesty Empress looked at each other and smiled as they turned around, opened their arms, and gave Zola a hug.

Chen Rui looked at the people in the distance, felt the warmth enveloping his heart, and felt confidence and determination again.

“Stronger power; power that overrides everything…” Chen Rui took a deep breath and raised his head as if there was a strange ‘eye’ looking at him in the air. (Note: Previously it was translated as a pair of eyes, but now reverting to ‘eye’.

chapters.title: Chapter 1210: Imminent War
chapters.body:
Chapter 1210: Imminent War

Compared with the turmoil in the Demon Realm, the appearance of ‘door’ caused chaos in the human world. The significant weakening of the light element alone caused panic among countless people.

At this time, the Holy Light Mountain issued an order to all empires and kingdoms to stop all civil wars immediately, form a coalition army as soon as possible, and prepare to fight the army of demons. If there was any disobedience, the Holy Light Mountain would launch supreme sanctions to annihilate the whole empire.

The Holy Light Mountain was just a religious institute previously. It would not interfere too much in the internal affairs and disputes of various empires. This kind of order was extremely rare, but it was not the first time.

More than 300 years ago, more than 800 years ago… Such orders were issued. There were some empires that had defied it in history, but, almost instantly, those countries had become a part of history.

Demons, in the relatively short-lived human’s understanding, had countless legends. In almost every legend, there were common keywords such as cruelty, viciousness, and bloodthirsty. People had the same feelings about this terrifying existence that came every 500 years: Fear, hatred, revenge…

The 2 Holy Empires complied with the Holy Light Mountain’s order first. Lex the Great was the fastest.

Each time, the location where the light beam appeared changed, but this time, it was actually within the Golden Brilliance Estate of the Dragon Bright Empire. The journey from the light beam to the Dragon Bright Capital Yerodisha only took 2 day2.

Once the army of demons invaded, not only the richest Golden Estate, but also Yerodisha might become a piece of scorched earth, so there was no room for negligence. Lex the Great immediately called mobilized the elites of the whole country to the Golden Estate, and he built a large number of fortifications to prepare for the upcoming war.

Empress Landbis of the Blue Glory Empire organized a well-equipped army in a short period of time, commanded by the first general Sandro. They were sent to the Dragon Bright Empire to help in the battle. The 2 empires responded so quickly that other empires also stopped their disputes in order to mobilize their army toward the Dragon Bright Empire.

The highest commander of the coalition army in the human world this time was naturally Lex the Great. Although the armies of various empires had their own commanders, they must obey Lex the Great’s dispatch and command when it came to the mobilization of the coalition army.

An exciting news came to the Human Coalition Army. The dragons, the elf tribe, and the hobbit tribe announced at the same time that they would send elite troops to join the battle as part of the human world to fight against the enemies of the Demon Realm together!

The elves were the strongest archers and magicians. If they were used properly, they would play a decisive role in the battlefield.

The dragons and the hobbits also dispatched their own armies. Needless to say, the dragons were powerful. Even the hobbits had extraordinary combat power that surpassed ordinary human soldiers.

The addition of reinforcements from the 3 major races made the combat power of the coalition army even stronger, making it a bit more certain to defeat the Demon Realm. For a while, the morale of the entire human world seemed high.

Silver Moon Celestial Capital.

“Your Majesty! Why did you send 2 princesses to the battlefield?” The person who asked the question was Elder Patricy of the elf tribe, the confidant of empress, and the magic teacher of Princess Michelle, “Especially Her Highness Michelle…”

It turned out that the commander of the elf tribe this time was actually Princess Royal Philly, and even little Princess Michelle became a member of the army.

Empress Liv shook her head and sighed, “There is a saying that the finest gem must be cut. Whether it’s Philly or Michelle, they will grow up sooner or later. Don’t worry, Elder Kilanya and Elder Finoia are secretly protecting them. Nothing will happen to them.”

Another confidant elder, Cheropan, also said, “Pardon me, in my opinion, Your Majesty’s decision was thoughtless. The elf tribe rarely participates in the war between the 2 worlds. No matter whether they win or lose, there will inevitably be casualties in the war. The birth rate of the tribe is already low, and the population is limited. If it encounters downsizing, it will be an irreparable loss. This time, we even send almost all the elites. I want to know the specific reason.”

“Yeah, now it’s just the beginning stage of war, and the outcome of the 2 sides is unclear. According to the past situation, our best attitude is to wait and see.”

“Both of you don’t need to say more, this was Sir Alucier’s order before he left.” Empress Liv’s words made the 2 confidant elders silent, “The last order.”

After a while, Cheropan asked, “Sir Alucier already knew that the ‘door’ would open?”

Empress Liv didn’t answer as she just looked into the distance quietly. In fact, Alucier said more than that, but Empress Liv didn’t say the rest.

The Demon Realm was also preparing for the battle intensely. Although the 3 major empresses knew the truth about the war of the 2 worlds, they also knew that this war was inevitable.

This was a catastrophe. Enough lives must die to end the catastrophe.

The ones being sacrificed were not the lives of demons, but the lives on the human world. No one was willing to sacrifice their own race, so this battle must be fought and could not be lost!

Initially, the commander of the Demon Realm was Catherine, but Catherine, including Shea and Tiffany, were already super-level powerhouses. According to the contract restrictions, super-level powerhouses were not allowed to participate in war. Even if the 3 major empresses did not sign that contract, as long as they appeared on the battlefield, they would also be besieged by the super powerhouses of the 2 worlds.

Even with Chen Rui present, he could suppress the 3 archangels and Satan, but this would lead to a higher level of war. Most importantly, the war of 2 worlds with a sacrificial nature was still unavoidable. It could be said that the gains outweighed the losses.

The door of the Demon Realm was in the Bloody Empire, but the 3 generals of the Bloody Empire were all re-promoted after Tiffany ascended the throne. Although their abilities were impressive, they were not capable enough to become the commander of the entire Demon Coalition Army.

At this time, Catherine, citing illness as an excuse, recommended a candidate, Gerant, the second general of the Fallen Angel Empire.

Gerant’s military talent was quite outstanding. Even George, the first general of the Fallen Angel Empire, was full of praise for him. Catherine also showed convincingly fairness and frankness as she recommended the general of the Fallen Angel Empire instead of her own Dark Shadow Empire.

No doubt, after several ‘friendly’ military exercises with several generals from various empires, Gerant’s ability had been recognized by all parties. He became the commander of the Demon Coalition Army as expected. Meanwhile, the upper echelons of the 3 empires also knew that in addition to Gerant, the commander on the public side, top sage Catherine would also be planning behind the scenes, becoming a veritable ‘double failsafe’.

10 days had passed, and the ‘door’ had been formally formed. The repulsive force had disappeared, so ordinary people could approach without hindrance.

The halls and stairs in the light beam disappeared and turned into pure doors, that was to say, as long as one entered the light beam, one could directly enter another world.

A door that separated life and death.

The coalition armies of the 2 worlds were still constantly gathering and mobilizing troops, making all kinds of preparations.

The war had not yet started, but the atmosphere had become more tense.

The streets of the Dark Moon City.

Chen Rui strolled, in stark contrast to the turbulent footsteps of the people around him. After the ‘door’ opened, the pace of life in every city involuntarily accelerated.

“Hurry up, I heard that Tana Supermarket is about to run out of stock!”

“Yesterday, 50 Fallen Angel Empire gold coupons can buy a bag of flour, and today it has risen to 70!”

“Why are you still using the Fallen Angel Empire gold coupons for? Just use crystal coins directly!”

“I know, but the bank has a daily maximum limit. Each person can only withdraw a certain amount at a time. Didn’t you see that long queue at the door of the bank? I can’t even squeeze in!”

“Stop talking, let’s be hurried!”

“…”

Even in the Demon Realm, not everyone liked war. For the majority of people who were enjoying the rare peace and were becoming more and more peace-loving, the opening of the ‘door’ was nothing more than a hanging sword of Damocles, which might fall down at any time and destroy life.

People had been buying all kinds of materials. The prices of food, clothing, daily necessities, magic supplies, weapons and other living things had doubled several times in an instant. Banknotes and bonds had begun to depreciate, and the bank’s crystal coin reserves were constantly running out. This was still under the continuous suppression and regulation of the alliance. If left unchecked, this kind of economic effect alone could cause chaos.

This was just the beginning before the war began.

Chen Rui’s footsteps stopped as he heard the conversation between a mother and daughter by the side of the road.

“Xilu, you’re a girl. Don’t fight with others. Look at your forehead, it’s bleeding.”

“They said that my brother would die in battle…”

“No, your brother will definitely come back, and he will become a military officer or even a general.”

“I just want to see my brother come back alive, mommy. Why do we have to fight? Isn’t our life great? Why do we want to occupy the human world?”

“I don’t know, humans and us have been mortal enemies for many years. Even if we don’t take the initiative to attack, they will come to invade our homeland. Your brother is the most heroic. He protects our world.”

“ En , we will definitely win! Brother will definitely come back!”

“…”

Why fight?

Isn’t our life great?

Brother protects our homeland.

These words weighed heavily in Chen Rui’s mind. Defending the homeland, resisting aggression, and occupying the sunny world… These are just whitewashed lies.

What is the truth?

As Chen Rui closed his eyes, everything around him seemed to be on fire. Buildings turned into ruins, words turned into wailing, corpses were strewn all over the ground, tranquility was torched by blood and fire, and countless living creatures turned into cold numbers, annihilated under the scythe of the Death.

What has life become?

Chen Rui slowly opened his eyes with tears streaming down his face.

Tears of compassion, not weakness.

Only those who respected life could truly enjoy life, comprehend life, and cherish life.

The unique life, perhaps, was the existence that truly transcended everything.

Chen Rui looked at the open hand and slowly clenched it as if holding hope.

His footsteps continued to move forward.

TL: Is this how Alucier fighting against the Destiny?

chapters.title: Chapter 1211: Tranquil Before War
chapters.body:
Chapter 1211: Tranquil Before War

The ‘door’ stood quietly between the 2 estates of the Demon Realm and the human world, like the calm before the storm.

The Demon Realm’s Blood Claw Estate.

The ground began to tremble slightly, shattering the original tranquility.

The Demon Coalition Army command, which had been closely watching the movement of the ‘door’, immediately saw this scene on the screen of magic television. At the same time, the report from the scout was also transmitted immediately.

“They launch an attack?” The Demon Coalition Army’s Commander Gerant showed a meaningful smile, “The enemy’s attitude is more proactive than ours, but this is also expected. Let’s take a look at the strength of the Human Coalition Army.”

The ‘door’ of the Blood Claw Estate was shining brightly, and a large number of heavy armor soldiers appeared.

In the history of the war of the 2 worlds, most of the Demon Realm took the lead in attacking humans, but there were also some humans who took the initiative to attack the Demon Realm. Burning the flames of war to the enemy’s estate was a tactic and a strategic need.

This group of heavy armor soldiers was the vanguard of the Human Coalition Army. Almost all the soldiers entered the fabled terrifying Demon Realm for the first time. As soon as they entered, they felt an awe-inspiring chill. There were actually 2 ‘suns’, but they were not very dazzling. The temperature emitted was much lower than that of the real ‘sun’. The nearby light elements were extremely thin while the dark elements were very active.

In fact, after the appearance of the ‘door’, the 2 worlds crossed, hence the light elements of the human world and the dark elements of the Demon Realm were greatly reduced. Otherwise, just adapting to the environment would make these well-trained soldiers suffer a lot.

The first reaction of the heavy armor soldiers when they came to this ‘foreign world’ was to defend. Under the command of General Commander Riley, they formed a semi-circular formation and erected large shields to fully guard against attacks from all directions.

The main role of this group of vanguard troops was to test the water. Everyone including General Riley himself was all ready to die. However, after defending for a long time, he did not encounter the storm-like attack he imagined. Not even a person was in sight.

It was like dancing with all your strength on the stage for a long time, only to find that the auditorium was empty.

This news was quickly sent back to the headquarters of the Human Coalition Army. Originally, they thought there would be a fierce encounter, but they did not expect this to happen. For a while, the generals of the Human Coalition Army headquarters were in a heated discussion.

“General Sandro, what do you think?” The supreme commander Lex the Great didn’t directly draw a conclusion, but he asked Sandro, the famous general of the Blue Glory Empire.

“Test.” Sandro frowned, “Same as our proactive test, this kind of ‘passive’ is also a test. It seems that demons are more cunning and patient than we imagined. I believe it will not take long until there is a tentative encounter.”

“What we need to do is to test further in order to determine and establish a base for the army as soon as possible. That will be the stepping stone for us to launch a real attack on the Demon Realm.” Princess Philly of the elf tribe also spoke. Princess Royal Highness was not a vase, but a graduate of the military department of Starlight College. At least in the field of military theory, she had good attainments.

“That’s right,” Lex the Great nodded, “Pass my order, the heavy armor team will advance slowly at every step. The follow-up troops of the former army will enter one after another. At the same time, the scout team and the magician surveying and mapping team will be dispatched to quickly find out the location and terrain conditions so as to establish accurate strategic sand table information.”

After receiving the order, the heavy armor infantry maintained a certain speed and advanced carefully. The troops behind came one after another. In addition to the infantry, there were also a small number of magician troops. The most elite scout team had already split up in action.

What these magicians were good at was not fighting, but detection magic. Dozens of detection items with wings flew out in all directions like birds. They recorded and labeled on the terrain map. This detection item was called ‘Robin’, which was produced by the elves of magician city. It was very practical in war.

Soon, the surrounding landform characteristics became complete due to the feedback of various information. The mini version of the strategic sand table was gradually expanded and improved.

Soon, the image of 1 magic eye suddenly shook and dimmed. It was obvious that the ‘Robin’ was destroyed by some kind of power. Then, many magic eyes went out one after another, which meant that the Robins were all attacked.

“All teams immediately report Robin’s loss and the estimated situation.” The leader of the magician surveying and mapping team, Torrea, was a middle-aged man. He didn’t panic and continued to give orders.

“Leader, 2/3 of robins has been lost. The location of the attack is about 10-15 kilometers away. It should be a long-range strike.”

“Leader, the scout team was also attacked and all of them were wiped out. The attack method was also long-range, most likely a magic gun. According to the range of our magic gun, the enemy’s ambush circle should be within 20 kilometers. Probably due to the wide range, the firepower is not very intensive.”

Commander Riley exchanged glances with Torrea, and he pondered, “The Demon Realm no doubt also has magic guns, and it has been popularized to the army. I don’t know how the Demon Realm’s magic gun is different from ours. Further deliberation is needed. Report the preliminary evaluation results first.”

Finally, after paying a huge cost, the scouts brought back news that a small town.

The town was empty without any residents, and all supplies were evacuated, making it a completely empty city.

The other troops behind also entered the Demon Realm one after another. Seeing that the sky was getting dark, the army did not enter the small town, but they chose to station in an open space for detection.

The Demon Coalition Army command quickly obtained this intel. General Crawford of the Dark Shadow Empire nodded, “Our enemies are also very patient. To eliminate this group of soldiers, we have to dispatch considerable forces.”

“There is something wrong with Terry Town at first glance. As long as they aren’t reckless, they will definitely not act rashly,” Gerant smiled slightly. “The enemy is still trying to use this group of soldiers to lure our main force. If my guess is right, this batch is just a bait that can be discarded at any time. The real elite troops are on stand-by outside the ‘door’ to swallow us. From this point of view, our opponent is bold and ruthless enough.”

Corriffin, 1 of the new 3 generals of the Bloody Empire, sneered, “Since they are willing, we will swallow them all. Fighting in the Demon Realm is purely asking for their own death. Even if they fight head-on, we are absolutely confident.”

“No.” Gerant shook his head, “This group of troops is their bait, but we can also use them as a bait. Even if we swallow the group of enemy elites ambushing behind the ‘door’, we would only eat a small amount of food. Our appetite should be bigger…”

Corriffin was taken aback, “Sir Commander means…”

“Let these human troops fall into the quagmire. Not only these, but also more troops, and then nibble away bit by bit. Use the smallest sacrifice in exchange for the greatest benefit.” Gerant’s eyes flashed, “Pass down the order now! Execute Plan No. 3!”

“Plan No. 3?” The generals were stunned, “Are we going to dispatch ‘that’ legion?”

Into the night.

Barrack of the Human Coalition Army.

“As recorded in the classics, the moons in the Demon Realm are actually purple.”

“Yeah, and it’s very cold. It is said that the concentration of dark elements here is comparable to that of light elements on our ground… The brothers standing guard outside have all issued coats.”

“Except for scouts during the day, we didn’t encounter any enemies. The demons will definitely not let us relax so much. Try to stay alert. This is our first night in the Demon Realm. Let’s hope it won’t be the last night.”

While speaking, a warning horn sounded suddenly from outside.

“What’s that?! Black cloud?”

“No! It’s dark element magic, [Dark Sky]!”

“Whole army, be on alert! Form a shield array!”

“Protect the magician.”

“…”

However, the [Dark Sky] spread, and nothing happened.

2 hours later, [Dark Sky] appeared again, and the barrack was restless again, but the result remained the same.

“It’s another feint. This is the enemy’s weary strategy!” General Riley had rich experience and immediately judged it, “However, this kind of strategy may change from fake to real at any time! Meanwhile, we can only accept harassment like this. If we just let our guard down for once, we may be attacked! Captain Torrea, can you dispel [Dark Sky]?”

Torrea shook his head, “This is the Demon Realm where the dark elements are most active, plus it’s night. We need double the effort to activate our light element magic. It’s hard to dispel [Dark Sky].”

“We still need to try even if it’s double the effort!” General Riley clenched his fists, “Once the demons’ scheme succeeds, we are all in danger of being wiped out!”

Torrea gritted his teeth and nodded.

General Riley’s worry was correct. Near the dawn, the exhausted magicians could no longer control the [Dark Sky]. In a false and real harassment, countless demons finally appeared in [Dark Sky].

Although the human soldiers were exhausted, thanks to the previous efforts of the magician, they finally got a short rest. The appearance of the enemy also gave the soldiers a way to vent their depressed minds. After a bloody battle and paying a considerable price, they repelled the demons’ attack.

Hearing the cheers of the soldiers, General Riley frowned. The attacks of these demon soldiers are extremely ferocious, and they are going all out. Some even blew themselves up with the help of some kind of item. Each of which resulted in doubled damage. However, the equipment of these demons is very ordinary. They are not as elite as the expected vanguard assault position, but they look like ordinary soldiers. What’s going on?

This victory was also beyond the expectations of the Human Coalition Army commanders. Our bait won against the enemy instead? The large army that was ready to go had a feeling of punching the air.

In any case, this war has just begun.

The Nightmare Wilderness.

A figure stood on the hillside. Half of his face was that of a handsome man, and the other half was that of a ferocious monster. The 2 faces were in sharp contrast. The only thing they had in common was their eyes, which seemed to see through everything, staring at the Nightmare Volcano in the distance.

The volcano seemed especially peaceful.

Much calmer than the previous ‘door’.

TL: Alucier? Why is he in this place? To summon the Abyss?

chapters.title: Chapter 1212: Shocked
chapters.body:
Chapter 1212: Shocked

In the Human Coalition Army headquarters, the coalition army commander, Lex the Great, frowned tightly. The facial expressions of the rest of the generals were not very pleasant too. Today was the fourth day that the Human Coalition Army entered the Demon Realm, but they hadn’t even encountered a real battle.

On the first day, the Human Coalition Army was harassed and attacked by demons at night. They heroically repelled the demons’ army and paid a corresponding price.

On the second day, the Human Coalition Army still did not encounter the main force of the demons head-on, but they accidentally entered the magic dark mine while marching. These magic dark mines were different from the human world. With the help of the cover of the dark element environment, the fluctuations were extremely small, so it was difficult to be detected. However, the power of the explosion was extremely amazing, causing heavy casualties to the front army. The army was forced to slow down. The magicians were in front to detect and clear the mines. However, at this moment, the fangs of the demon magic guns finally revealed themselves. The first batch of magicians fell under the long-range sniper almost without exception. The range and accuracy were simply outrageous. Even the heavy armor infantry protecting the magician did not see it coming. The speed of the second batch of magicians clearing the dark mine under heavy protection dropped significantly. In the evening, the Human Coalition Army was harassed again. They were vigilant all night. This time, the magicians already had experience in dealing with this kind of large-scale [Dark Sky]. However, after a night of harassment, there was no attack. The magicians consumed a lot of magic power and were exhausted.

On the third day, they still didn’t meet a single enemy. Even the civilian houses that they passed were all vacant, which was unexpected. The Human Coalition Army felt weird and aggrieved because they couldn’t even touch the enemy. At night, it was the same harassing night attack tactics, confusing fake and real. When the magicians were almost unable to disperse [Dark Sky], those desperate demons army finally reappeared in [Dark Sky]. The suicidal demon bombs cost the Human Coalition Army more than double again.

In the past 3 days, the demons had left the Human Coalition Army with the impression of being as cunning as a fox and being crazy and desperate, but they were always just sneak attacks and harassment. There was no real encounter.

Finally, an intel reached the Human Coalition Army headquarters.

“Urgent report from the front. We found the demon’s main army of about 100,000 people!”

“Finally appear?” Oswain, a general of the Human Coalition Army, shook his fist back. “These cunning demons!”

“Finally it’s our turn to fight back!”

“Your Majesty Lex, order an all-out attack and devour these 100,000 people!”

Lex the Great’s frown did not ease. He said in a deep voice, “There is something wrong in these demons.”

Sandro nodded, “I also have this feeling. According to previous wars, most demons invaded our land on their own initiative with powerful momentum and absolute power. It was a crushing attack posture all the way. Even if there were humans taking the initiative to attack the Demon Realm, what they encountered was a berserk fierce head-on attack. Had there ever been such a situation?”

“Could it be that something happened with the demons’ internally? And this time the gate of the 2 worlds appeared more than 100 years earlier. The demons couldn’t prepare in time, so they could only use this kind of trick to delay it?”

“No.” Princess Philly shook her head, “The news of the 3 empires of the Demon Realm forming an alliance has long been confirmed. More than one trainer who returned from the Demon Realm has confirmed this. Moreover, no matter how you look at it, the degree of stability of the alliance this time is far higher than that of ordinary covenants. I believe that the young general has heard of the mysterious person who married the 3 empresses, so I think the chance of the enemy’s internal strife is almost 0. We can’t place our hopes on it. On the contrary, it is even more necessary to beware of the enemy’s tricks.”

“Obviously, the demons used tactics and traps to weaken our combat power previously. Now they finally want to use true strength to kill our vanguard forces. This battle must not only be fought, but it must also be won.” Oswain’s conclusion was approved by many people.

“Our follow-up troops have kept their distance for effective reinforcements. If we are determined to fight, we can gather in the shortest time to form a large-scale formation. The combat power of our individual soldiers may be inferior to that of demons, but don’t forget, we have the biggest advantage of the formation magic array. This enables our army to form a powerful group, which can exert the strongest power in this kind of frontal large-scale war. This is something that demons do not have. Even if demons have the environmental advantage, we will not lose the slightest in a head-on battle.”

Sandro nodded slowly, “Anyway, since the enemy’s regular army has appeared, we can’t avoid fighting. In the past few days, the soldiers’ morale has been low due to the enemy’s harassment. At the same time, they have been holding their horses. Now it is an ideal opportunity to release stress and show our might.”

Lex considered for a moment before he finally made a decision to quickly gather the large forces in the Demon Realm and attack the main demons with all their strength.

Unexpectedly, not long after this order was issued, 2 urgent battle reports came one after another.

The first battle report – When the human army was gathering to prepare for the battle, the main force of the demons suddenly disappeared!

Everyone was stunned.

How could it suddenly disappear? It is 100,000 people!

Just when we were about to fight a tough battle with all our strength, the enemy retreated again? Are these still brave and brutal demons? Could it be that this army is made up of cowardly dark goblins?

The second battle report – A large number of undead appeared in the army! Many were popping out of the ground!

This battle report made people involuntarily think of the scene of pairs of rotten hands sticking out from the ground, which made people shudder.

“So that’s what they are planning!” Oswain suddenly realized, “That area must be a cemetery or a battlefield. The enemy deliberately led us there to consume our troop with the undead army! Then the hidden main force will seize the timing to launch a real attack! No doubt they are cunning demons!”

The rest of the generals understood one after another. Even Princess Philly couldn’t help but nod.

“Your Majesty Lex, I suggest sending the troops behind to reinforce immediately. At the same time, continue to increase troops to the ‘door’ to maintain the continuity of the troops. As long as our absolute strength is sufficient, this conspiracy cannot shake us at all!

Lex the Great glanced at Sandro. The number one general of the Blue Glory Empire seemed to be thinking about something, and he did not echo Oswain’s opinion like the others.

When Lex the Great’s eyes fell on the distribution of troops on the sand table, he was suddenly startled.

“No more reinforcement!” Sandro’s voice sounded.

“Not only can’t we increase troops, but we need to retreat immediately!” Lex the Great and Sandro looked at each other and reached a consensus, “The enemy is not consuming our troops, but luring us to send more troops! This is a trap! And it’s a trap with a big appetite!”

“Yes, the previous harassments and sneak attacks, including the current undead attack, are actually confusing us!” Sandro walked up to the sand table, “With our current formation, if we send more troops and go deeper, the battle formation will be further expanded. At that time, they only need to cut off a few vital parts and pinch attack us, then our entire army will be wiped out!”

“Did General Sandro overestimate the ability of demons?” Although Oswain felt that Sandro’s analysis was reasonable, he was inevitably dissatisfied as his own point of view was completely overturned.

“I just didn’t underestimate the enemy.” Sandro shook his head, “I have a hunch that demons are more powerful than we imagined.”

Lex the Great made a firm decision, “Order Riley to prepare for the retreat. At the same time let the army behind make the feint of reinforcements and prepare to connect with the front line and defend against the enemy. We have already stepped into the trap with 1 foot. The demons won’t let us take our foot back so easily.”

Sandro nodded, “Losses are inevitable, but it’s just the beginning of the war.”

For the entire chess game, this was indeed just a small mistake. It was still very early before the real victory or defeat, but for the ‘chess piece’, this kind of mistake was a destructive disaster that withdrew them from the chessboard.

The Demon Coalition Army headquarters received the news of the Human Coalition Army’s emergency retreat. Commander Gerant sighed, “It seems that the other party is more cautious than expected. My appetite is still too big. This time, I can’t dispatch those death row cannon fodder squad. Pass my order, the main force of each department will attack in an all-round way, so that all the humans who enter the Demon Realm will turn into corpses in the Blood Claw Estate!”

Nightmare Volcano.

The orcs engraved huge imprints on the ground one after another. The cloaked half-handsome man and half-monster was holding a long stick of dead wood as he walked unsteadily on each of the imprints.

Wherever he passed by, those imprints emitted a faint light, then they sank into the rock as if they had never existed before.

“Sir.” Beamon Orc King Fugger gave a deep bow to the man in the cloak, “The imprints that sir ordered has been completed.”

Fugger used to be the strongest Orc King in the Nightmare Wilderness. However, a few years ago, the orcs were suddenly wiped out by the Divinity Temple Knight regiment of the Holy Church and the joint army sent by various countries. No tribe was spared. If it wasn’t for someone tipping the news to cover him and lead some orcs to evacuate early, the bloodline of the orc tribe would have been cut off.

At that time, after the mysterious person who tipped off the news helped the orcs settle on an island, he left half of the badge and floated away. When this strange man came with the other half of the badge and said his name, only then Fugger knew that the person behind the scene who helped the orc tribe escape the disaster was actually…

Whether it was to repay the kindness or the terrifying strength shown by this person, Fugger could not refuse the request of this man. He led a group of elites to set foot on the land of the Nightmare Wilderness again. They also made all kinds of strange arrangements according to the requirements of the man in the cloak.

“ En. ” The man in the cloak looked around and nodded, “Thank you for the hard work.”

“It’s my duty, sir.” Fugger was usually rebellious and arrogant, but he was extremely humble in front of this person, “Does sir has any other orders?”

“You can go now…” The man in the cloak looked at the Nightmare Volcano in the distance and raised the dead wood staff in his hand. The 2 badges merged into one, then it turned into a green leaf and flew toward Fugger, ” Take this.”

Fugger held the leaf-shaped badge in his hand as his expression became uncertain, “Sir…”

“Say no more,” The man in the cloak waved his hand, “If you want the orc tribe bloodline to continue, this is the only hope. One last reminder. Your time is running out.”

Fugger didn’t dare to ask any more questions. He bowed and left Nightmare Volcano with his people.

“Time…” The man in the cloak didn’t look at the orcs who were leaving, but he just looked up at the sky. If someone was in front of him, he would have a strange feeling that this person who raised his head seemed to be ‘looking down’ at the sky as he let out a long sigh.

“Ou… our time is running out.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1213: The Real Tremor
chapters.body:
Chapter 1213: The Real Tremor

A blazing light flickered. This dazzling brilliance brought death and destruction. Even the heavy infantry wearing heavy armor and equipped with thick shields could not be spared. They were instantly vaporized. Only part of the metal wreckage were left on the ground.

The blazing light only flickered intermittently. It would take a while to shine again while those flaming boulders falling from the sky were bombarding one after another without stopping. When the boulders fell to the ground, they would explode. The soldiers near the center were thrown away by the air waves one after another. Even if the soldiers survived, their tendons and bones would be broken.

If the light of a magic crystal cannon was like lightning and the flaming boulders of the catapult was like thunder, then a ballista was like a hailstorm that was strong enough to pierce the steel shield. After the explosion, the highly poisonous broken blade shot around with more intensive lethality.

Lightning, thunder, and hail were mixed with countless arrows and bullets, quickly harvesting the Human Coalition Army’s life.

After the long-range attack, teams of heavy armor cavalry appeared on the horizon. Although this terrain was not a complete plain, the demon cavalries were not riding ordinary horses, but ferocious beasts like wolves or tigers. They were sprinting on this rough terrain like they were on a plain. Both calvaries and beasts were covered with sophisticated and sturdy armor. The uniform black armor and black scimitars gave a thrilling sense of sight. They trampled on the trembling ground like a black torrent rolling forward.

The magic guns or bows and arrows of the Human Coalition Army couldn’t pierce the iron armor on the cavalries and the beasts at all. Wherever the torrent passed, there were all trampled and flattened corpses.

General Riley, the front commander of the Human Coalition Army, was trying his best to command the defensive formation. There were many wounds on his body; the most obvious being a gunshot wound. This was even the result under the desperate protection of the elite guards. The demon snipers were too terrifying. They targeted many small team commanders in the coalition army, which made the scene even more out of control.

As an excellent commander, Riley had deduced the offensive and defensive scenes of fighting against the main force of demons in his mind more than once. However, when the army of demons really came, he realized that the real battle situation had already surpassed his deduction. Perhaps it should be said that the demons’ combat power far exceeded his expectations.

This was an unequal battle. The better strategy, more advanced and powerful weapons, and fiercer combat power determined the one-sided situation. Despite desperate resistance, the Human Coalition Army still couldn’t escape being slaughtered and crushed. What frightened Riley the most was that the demons showed an amazing team attack ability, which was actually not inferior to the magic array formation that humans relied on most!

Not only that, those huge familiar figures also appeared in the sky, flying and diving while throwing magic bombs. They were almost omnipotent. Someone had already called out the name of ‘assemble puppets’. This was a unit that only existed in magic games! It was not surprising that the Demon Realm had the same magic game. The dragons had already explained it at the beginning. What’s terrifying was that the demons actually created the killing weapon that was only in the illusory! And it was almost the same as the power in the game!

“Stay in formation! Hold on tight!” Riley yelled loudly for a while, feeling dizzy and unable to hold on. Not only his injuries, but the Human Coalition Army as a whole.

“ Bang! “

It is this damn sniper rifle again. The last elite guard beside him also fell down.

“ Bang! Bang! Bang!”

Riley raised his sword, wanting to continue to command, but found that he had lost the last of his strength. He felt the world was spinning around him as his body was getting lighter and lighter.

Human Coalition Army Command Center.

“What?! Riley was wiped out! So fast!” Lex the Great, who had always been calm, was astounded. The rest of the generals were all pale.

Although it was expected that Riley’s army would be severely hit, they never expected that they would be completely wiped out. Plus, it was in such a short period of time!

As expected by General Sandro, the power of demons was stronger than imagined! Much stronger!

“The central army is currently under siege, and General Haus is asking for reinforcements.” Oswain said hastily, “Should we increase our troops and support the central army as soon as possible?”

“No reinforcements!” Sandro said, “The demons will definitely go all out in this counterattack. If we send in more troops, it will only increase unnecessary casualties. The only way is to abandon the central army! The rear army immediately withdraws from the ‘door’! Avoid more casualties!”

With that said, Sandro clenched his fists tightly with a hint of agony in his eyes, because Haus was the general of the Blue Glory Empire. He was also a close friend who had been with him through life and death. Nonetheless, as a member of the command that controlled the entire coalition army, he could only make this decision.

“But……”

“No but.” Lex the Great stood up, “Under any circumstances, abandoning comrades-in-arms is a painful decision and a shame, but we have to do this. Otherwise, we will lose more comrades-in-arms! This time I will take full responsibility for my poor decision-making.”

“No, I’m also responsible.” Sandro sighed, “It can be said that everyone present is responsible. However, as I said before, this war is just a prelude.”

Everyone nodded. Lex the Great nodded when he saw that Sandro took the initiative to lead everyone to take responsibility. He immediately gave the order to retreat, then he changed his tone, “This battle taught us a painful lesson, but it was also not in vain. At least, the combat power of demons has been evaluated. This combat power is far beyond our imagination, but they are not invincible. In the history of humans, we have defeated enemies stronger than us more than once. Demons are just one of them. Besides, over the years, the demons have never won a real victory. We will wash away the shame today with the blood of the demons! I believe we won’t wait too long for this time!”

Lex the Great deserved to be 1 of the 2 holy rulers. He lifted everyone’s fighting spirit with just a few words.

Sandro agreed, “That’s right! The most urgent thing is to immediately mobilize the strongest troops to ambush around the door. At the same time, quickly fortify the defense zone of the Golden Estate. The demons will probably take advantage of the current momentum to advance while driving the defeated soldiers all the way. We can wait for their arrival and give them a great gift.”

Everyone agreed. Lex the Great sighed secretly. Originally, he chose to take the initiative to attack, mainly because he wanted to catch the opponent by surprise, but he might also have the intention of preventing the Golden Estate from becoming the main battlefield. Now that the demons were powerful, they could only retreat to the Golden Estate. Yerodisha would certainly not be able to escape the impact. Even if they finally defeated the demons, the entire Dragon Bright Empire would suffer heavy losses. It was hard to say whether the power of the former Holy Empire could be restored. Consequently, the Holy Church cult would definitely not let go of this opportunity to ‘help’. By then, there would probably be a bloodless but more difficult war at that time.

As expected, the vanguard force of the central army that entered the Demon Realm was wiped out. General Haus was killed, and the rear army also suffered a fierce attack. Fortunately, they retreated early, so a handful of the soldiers survived until they all evacuated from the Demon Realm. The survivors all had only one expression on their faces, fear.

However, after eliminating most of the rear army, the demons did not rush into the human world through the door while they were having the advantage. Instead, they retreated back in an orderly manner, leaving the Golden Estate’s urgently prepared ambush in vain.

People in various countries in the human world had learned that the coalition army vanguard forces had suffered a defeat, but the exact number of casualties was not very clear. Lex the Great also made a public speech, “Our opponent this time is not only unprecedentedly cruel and cunning, but they are also quite patient just like an experienced hunter. Therefore, we must work together and prepare for a new battle. This hunting game is just the beginning. Who is the hunter and who is the prey? It’s too early to say…”

In addition, there was unexpected news that a group of orcs troops had joined the Human Coalition Army. The orcs originally lived in the Nightmare Wilderness. A few years ago, the Holy Church organized a united army of various empires in the name of heresy and besieged the orcs, almost exterminating their tribe.

No one knew where these orcs came from, and they actually joined the Human Coalition Army, which they had a blood feud. If you were to explain that these crude orcs ‘understand righteousness’ or something, even the orcs themselves would not believe it.

However, now was an extraordinary period, and the orcs could be considered a part of the human world. This time, the Human Coalition Army was not only composed of human empires, but also elves, dragons, and hobbits. If they rashly attacked the orcs, these races other than the human race would definitely have worries. Princess Philly of the elf tribe took the lead in expressing her welcome to the orcs. The dragons and the hobbits naturally had no objections. Under this background, the orcs finally successfully joined the Human Coalition Army.

The commander and generals of the coalition army headquarters also expressed their welcome. Due to various considerations, Lex the Great and others did not ask the dragons, elves, and the hobbits to join the vanguard forces that entered the Demon Realm. Now these orcs were fierce and brave. They were most suitable for confronting demons head-on, which was simply the most needed cannon fodders. Why should they refuse?

The addition of orcs was just a small interlude. The focus of everyone’s attention was still on the door between the 2 worlds.

After the previous battle, the ‘door’ fell into a state of silence again, but both the Demon Realm and the human world were very clear that this silence was just a race against time to charge greater power. The next battle would be a real collision between the 2 sides. It was likely to completely shock the 2 worlds. This moment would definitely not be too long!

At this time, another place that had been ‘quiet’ for many years finally began to shake.

The ground of Nightmare Volcano trembled.

The entire landform was slowly undulating as if something was starting to expand.

At this time, those huge runes hidden on the ground began to appear, shining with green brilliance.

After the power of expansion was illuminated by the green light, it trembled slightly and gradually shrank again. However, it had not completely calmed down. Then, it began to expand again. 2 completely different forces of shrinking and expansion were constantly contending.

The man in the cloak stood with a clutch in his hand, watching all this quietly.

Everything in the vicinity trembled under this huge force. There were even cracks in the clouds in the sky, and there was a bleeding red between the cracks.

The tremor finally calmed down, but the gaze of the man in the cloak did not relax in the slightest. Just like that war, the tremor was only just beginning, the real tremor.

chapters.title: Chapter 1214: Nightmare
chapters.body:
Chapter 1214: Nightmare

Time passed day by day.

In the ‘door’ of the Golden Estate, where countless eyes were watching, the demon finally appeared.

However, there was only 1 person.

Facing the Human Coalition Army that was waiting in full force and the monstrous murderous aura, this person appeared calm and unhurried as if he didn’t care.

This composure had been maintained when the demon went all the way to the Human Coalition Army headquarters in the Golden Estate City.

“The messenger of the demons?” Lex the Great looked at the demon in front of him, which looked no different from ordinary humans. This should be the strongest race great demon among the demons apart from the royal family. They had a special demon transformation during battle.

“Greetings, Your Majesty Lex. I’m Francis. Vacheli, the deputy legion commander of the Red Dragon Legion that is under the first general of the Fallen Angel Empire, George. I hereby send you a challenge letter from the highest commander General Gerant of the Demon Coalition Army.” Francis’ tone was neither humble nor overbearing as he calmly faced the glaring eyes all around.

“General Gerant? So it is this commander who made me suffer in the previous battle in the Demon Realm.” Lex the Great ordered his subordinates to take the challenge letter from Francis’ hand. After he glanced at it, he was slightly surprised, “General Gerant wants a fair fight with me? In this Golden Estate?”

The demons must have learned the situation of the Human Coalition Army and the ‘door’ in the Golden Estate from the captured soldiers. It was not necessarily the betrayal of the captured soldiers. In this magical world, there were many means of reading memory, so it was no surprise that they could get these intels.

“Yes.” Francis’ eyes flashed as he looked around, “I don’t know if you all have the guts?”

“ Hmph! Such insolent provocation! Want to provoke us with this little trick?” Tristan, the famous general of the Dragon Bright Empire, had always had a fiery temper. He immediately shouted, “Your Majesty, demons are sinister and scheming. In the last battle, we suffered heavy casualties because of their trap – There is no need to waste our words with this demon. Killing him and throwing his head into the Demon Realm is the best answer!”

Tristan’s only younger brother was the commander of the rear army stationed in the Demon Realm. He unfortunately died in the previous battle of the Demon Realm. As such, Tristan hated the demons to their cores.

As soon as this word came out. Many people responded one after another, and the killing intent in the headquarters was surging. Although Francis’ strength had reached the peak stage of the Demon Emperor, it was impossible for him to escape from such a place full of powerhouses.

Lex the Great stared at the fearless Francis, and he suddenly smiled, “Admirable courage! This sentence is not only referring to you, but more to that General Gerant. I understand what he means. This fight is an overt scheme. In the face of absolute strength, scheme is nothing more than a trivial trick. Please go back and tell General Gerant that I will accept his challenge.”

When Tristan saw that Lex the Great let Francis go back unscathed, he couldn’t help being anxious, “Your Majesty…”

Lex the Great glanced at his old subordinate, “Tristan, I expect you to cut off the head of this demon general commanding the enemy army on the battlefield, but not this messenger.”

Tristan clenched the hilt around his waist with great momentum, “Yes!”

“I’m also looking forward to meeting General Tristan again in that fight to see who has the sharpest sword… I’ll leave now!” Francis gave a simple military salute to Lex the Great before he turned around and stride away.

After a moment of silence, Sandro, who had been silent all this time, said, “The challenge of the demons this time is unexpected. What is even more surprising is their self-confidence. They actually propose a battle on our battlefield. This kind of self-confidence is almost terrifying. We must have the confidence to win, but we must also be prepared for all kinds of tough battles and even bitter battles.”

Sandro didn’t say ‘prepare to fail’, because this battle was crucial. No matter what, he couldn’t lose, even if it cost his life.

“Yes, the previous setbacks are over. Don’t take it too seriously. This will be the real first battle, and it may also be the decisive battle.” Lex the Great narrowed his eyes slightly, “Both sides will dispatch the strongest force. In the Demon Realm, we did lose, and the demons have proved their strength. Now that they come to our territory, it is time for us to prove our strength! Behind us are countless eyes of relatives and people. No matter what, we must win this fight!”

The voice of Lex the Great spread far away, and all the soldiers who heard it excitedly raised their weapons and shouted in unison: Win! Win!

The voice got louder and louder. Even the messenger of the Demon Realm who was walking away could hear it. Francis showed the same confident smile: In this fight, the winner will belong to the Demon Realm!

…

Space.

Shattered.

The shattered space void flickered from time to time with lightning caused by terrifying energy impacts.

There were chaotic and huge force fields everywhere. The whole world was constantly twisting, shattering, and trembling.

The space was blurry, and countless nebula-like objects were crisscrossing at high speed. Every movement could trigger a huge power that almost destroyed the world.

The blurry center became clear again. Those nebulas that appeared at first glance were actually countless individual figures. The power they possessed was as vast and even great as small universes. However, under the light of the core object, the light of these great figures kept dimming. Many of them even scattered into soil and dust and were annihilated without a trace.

The core surrounded by the great figures was a blood-red existence. During the visual changes, a human figure could vaguely be seen, but only half of the body was left.

Even half of his body still displayed indescribable strength. In front of the frantically waving blood-red light, the shining nebulas turned into soil and dust. The approaching figures were torn apart and annihilated.

Even so, the nebula figures continued to move forward, shrinking the blood-red half body little by little.

The blood-red body suddenly roared. The terrifying sound turned the world upside down. Half of the body began to condense and change rapidly. Slowly, a huge pupil opened amidst the blood mist that was constantly restrained by the nebulas.

Blood-red pupil!

What was emitted from this pupil was not the power of destruction or creation, but a kind of breath that was both the first and the final knot, eternal and immortal.

The moment the pupil opened, a real crack appeared in the space. The crack was filled with shocking blood red. Wherever the blood red passed, the nebulas or the human figures were all turned into ashes!

Everything in vision shattered.

Chen Rui opened his eyes suddenly. What he saw was a familiar room. A thin morning sun was shining through the window.

“What happened?” Isabella’s concerned voice sounded beside him.

“It’s nothing. It seems like I had a nightmare.” Chen Rui’s tense body slowly relaxed, and his breathing relaxed a lot.

“Your head is full of sweat.” Zola on the other side wiped his forehead, “What nightmare?”

Just as Chen Rui was about to answer, he suddenly found that in the storage warehouse of the Super System, the original faint light on a card gradually went out.

‘King of Darkness’ magic card.

This card can even produce such a mental effect in the storage warehouse?

Is the nightmare just now a spiritual illusion?

Chen Rui shook his head. No, although I could only watch without moving, that feeling is more like witnessing a real existence.

The card seems to be revealing some shocking truth in the nightmare.

That blood-red pupil…

And the eye that I had seen in another place…

Chen Rui thought for a while, then he shook his head.

“Don’t worry. I’m fine.” Seeing the worried faces of Isabella and Zola, Chen Rui held their hands and kissed them.

“Sleep a little longer? Your mental state is not very good.”

The morning was usually a time of ‘vigorousness’. Normally, ‘sleeping a little longer’ was tantamount to a hint, which must be another fiery passionate session. However, Chen Rui was obviously restless today, even a little haggard. Ms. Fairy Dragon and Madam Aunt both noticed it, so they had no mood for hooking up and just wanted their man to really rest for a while.

“No, it’s still early. You guys sleep for a while. I’ll go get some air.”

Chen Rui got up and walked out of the house, looking at the calm sky as always. For some reason, these days, a feeling of depression was getting stronger and stronger.

It was not only Chen Rui who felt depressed, almost all the demons felt heavy in their hearts during this time.

The reason why the demons were depressed was that the upcoming decisive battle between the Demon Coalition Army and the Human Coalition Army was coming.

Nightmare Volcano.

The surrounding vibrations became more intense,

A large expanse of soil and rock arched high, then they were forcibly suppressed by the green lights emitted by the huge runes, but this suppression had become more and more ineffective. The amplitude and frequency of the ground’s undulations were also gradually accelerating.

The huge runes had been expanded to the limit. There were even cracks on the runes. The continuously suppressed expansion force was about to explode completely. The seemingly withered wooden crutch rested on the rock, easily crushing the hard rock as if it was a rotten dead branch.

The expanded ground nearby deflated quickly like a punctured balloon. At the same time, drops of blood fell on the ground along the whithered wooden crutch. They were quickly evaporated by the high temperature before they seeped into the ground.

The source of the blood was the hands holding the whithered wooden crutch tightly. One was a white hand, and the other… was a beast-like claw. Most of the dark green cloak he was wearing was stained black by dried blood. The exhausted rickety body trembled slightly, and the blood continued to overflow.

More than once.

If someone was around, he could feel that the life in the cloak was like a candle in the wind, which might go out at any time, but it survived again and again.

The ground soon began to shake again, and there was a roar from the cloak. His body burst out with green light to suppress the turbulent force.

The increasingly violent expansion and undulation caused large cracks to appear on the ground. The cracks on the huge runes deepened, and a bright red light stream appeared in the cracks like rushing blood.

This time, not only the huge runes, but there were also cracks on the withered wooden crutch.

All of a sudden, the scene seemed to be paused.

In the next second of pause, everything exploded.

The entire volcanic field and the entire Nightmare Wilderness trembled.

Nightmare Volcano erupted.
