chapters.title: Chapter 1215: The Day The World Changed
chapters.body:
Chapter 1215: The Day The World Changed

Good News! It has been about 5 years and the novel is finally coming to an end in about 60 chapters, so we are lowering the price of the highest tier and release all the chapters until the end! Feel free to check it out in our Patreon! We would like to express our gratitude to our patrons! Without them, the novel can’t come this far until the end! Also our readers just for reading and leaving comments! It has been fun translating this novel, the author really brings shock, joy, smiles, laughter, and tears to me. Although there are some critical mistakes made in terms of translation quality, chapters missing, and terms missing, hopefully we can minimize that and improve our quality in our existing and new novels. See you all in other novels perhaps🥰!

Golden Estate.

On the plain where the ‘door’ was located, all the troops of the Human Coalition Army were standing by.

The Golden Estate’s vast and flat plain was the most suitable for cavalry battles. However, this time, the Human Coalition Army was not forming an arrow formation that was most suitable for cavalry assaults, but a wild goose formation composed of several big phalanxes.

This was a battle formation that spread out horizontally. The formations of the left and right wings were arranged like the word ‘V’. The cavalries were placed on the 2 wings. This formation could not only exert the power of the 2-wing cavalries, but it could also effectively protect 2 wings and the rear that was relatively weak. However, this ‘weakness’ was only relative to the goose formation. After all, this was the home field of the Human Coalition Army, the Golden Estate. Not only were there various ordnances such as catapults and magic crystal cannons in the rear, but there were also more hidden reserve forces that were ready to be dispatched at any time; the ‘weakness’ had become a strength full of traps.

The number of troops participating in the battle this time was about 800,000. In terms of quantity, it was only a small part of the total strength of the Human Coalition Army, but it was already the most suitable combat force that this plain could accommodate. Furthermore, these 800,000 people were the most elite troops in the coalition army, and they were also equipped with the best weapons.

The 2 wings were composed of heavy cavalries. In the left wing, the knights and the horses were all equipped with sturdy armor. The knight’s armor also had light and tough cloth armor, which could further enhance the defense. In addition to the long sword, every cavalry was equipped with a 5-meter-long knight spear. The tip of this huge knight spear was a special armor-piercing blade, which could easily pierce through thick armor. The spear was not made of metal, but special hardwood. It was not to save cost, but because this kind of the knight spear was extremely powerful. These well-trained knights could easily pierce a thick wall with the powerful horsepower, but this also had a disadvantage. The knight gun could not be retracted after piercing the enemy. It would not only sprain or even fracture the knight’s wrist and arm, but it would also affect the follow-up charge of the follow-up troops. Therefore, the knight’s spear was a consumable weapon, but the damage caused by this consumable weapon was also the most terrifying weapon on this plain terrain. There was almost nothing that could stop the charge of a heavy cavalry head-on.

The core army of the heavy cavalries was the most elite Dragon Claw Knight Legion of the Dragon Bright Empire. The commander was Legion Commander Tristan. As the strongest front, Tristan showed a calmness that was completely different from his usual irascibility on the battlefield.

The heavy cavalries of the right wing were the bear cavalries of the hobbit family. The war bears raised were even more ferocious and mighty. Their momentum could easily destroy the fighting spirit of ordinary mounts. Bear cavalries were best at fighting in mountains, and it was far more powerful than ordinary cavalry on plains. In addition to the bear cavalries, the commander of the hobbit was the Young Mountain Hobbit King Ovge. In addition to the cavalries, there were also 2 major infantry legions, large shield warriors and giant ax warriors. The hobbits were brave and good at fighting, and they had a considerable talent for resisting magic. Together with the weapons and equipment of forging skills, they could be called 1 of the most powerful infantry on the entire battlefield.

The reason why it was ‘1 of’ was because there was another race, orcs, with the same terrifying or even superior combat ability.

It was well known that the orcs were warlike and powerful. At the beginning, the Orc Empire was a powerful existence that all human countries had to unite to fight against. However, after the internal strife, the orcs encountered a trough of prosperity and decline and gradually withdrew from the political arena. They retreated and lived in the Nightmare Wilderness, which was under harsh conditions. They were almost wiped out by the Holy Church a few years ago. This time, they unexpectedly volunteered to join the Human Coalition Army. Among these orcs, there were also the strongest Beamon warriors, who could transform into the Beamon Giant Beast that had the same power as the giant dragon.

The equipment of this group of orcs was different from the past. They were no longer equipped with ordinary wooden sticks or leather armor, but heavy metal flails, hammers and other heavy weapons. They wear silver chain armor, which could effectively reduce long-range damage. These equipment were allocated by Lex the Great, but this ‘benefit’ was not for nothing. In today’s battle, the orcs would be the first commandos to charge, so they might also be the first cannon fodders to die.

If this battle wasn’t too important, the orcs wouldn’t be able to obtain these equipment at all.

Compared with the big and rough ‘barbarians’ like the hobbit and orcs, the elf tribe looked elegant and beautiful, but no one dared to underestimate these handsome men and beauties. They were recognized as the most terrifying long-range attackers on the battlefield.

In addition to the excellent long-range shooting skills, the elves also had a powerful magician team and a very powerful sword guard legion.

The commander of the elf tribe was Princess Royal Philly. Even Little Princess Michelle participated in the war. If there was no accident, these were the only 2 daughters of Elf Empress Liv, and 1 of them would become the next elf empress. It was very likely that this war was an important assessment and training for the future empress, so this time the elf tribe changed its attitude of watching the battle in the past and sent a huge army with a total of 4 legions: Magic archer legion, magic spear legion, magician legion, sword guard legion.

The dragons, the old allies of the Dragon Bright Empire, also dispatched elite forces. In addition to the dragon knight legion of the Dragon Bright Empire, there were also a group of powerful dragons. At present, no one knew where these dragons were hiding for an ambush or they had transformed into human form and mixed among ordinary soldiers. This would be a hidden killing move.

Even without the ‘foreign aid’ of the 4 major races, the military power of the original human world was equally powerful. The highest commander Lex the Great was located at the bottom of the ‘V’, so he could command the changes of the 2 wings easily. There was also the strongest united griffon legion behind. Their strength was inferior to the dragon knight legion, but their number far exceeded the dragon knight legion. They would become the most important combat power in the air.

Not long ago, Lex the Great did a mobilization before the war. The provocative speech made everyone’s blood boil. The fighting spirit and morale were unprecedentedly high, just waiting for the war to begin.

While waiting, the enemy finally came.

The light of the ‘door’ flashed, and groups of figures appeared in the vision of the Human Coalition Army.

Cavalries.

All black cavalries.

The black demonic horses, black armor, and black knights formed a stark contrast with the cavalries on the opposite wings.

However, the armor of these black knights seemed to be relatively weak, and they didn’t have the knight spears for charging. They just carried bows on their backs and scimitars in their hands.

Lex the Great and many commanders were stunned. Not the heavy armor beast cavalries as per the intel, but… light cavalries?

In this kind of terrain where there isn’t much space for running and fighting, how can they send so many light cavalries?

In a head-to-head confrontation, light cavalries and heavy cavalries are not on the same level at all. Is there something wrong with the brains of the demons? Or is it that they don’t even understand the most basic intel of the Golden Estate?

As the left wing heavy cavalry commander of the Human Coalition Army, Tristan clearly saw that the commander on the black horse in the front was the demon messenger that day, Francis! Thinking of Lex the Great’s encouragement for him to cut off the opponent’s head with his own hands, Tristan couldn’t help but clenched the sword in his hand.

If the Human Coalition Army attacked now, they could easily crush these light cavalries, but Lex the Great did not order an attack. No one acted rashly, because everyone knew that this was just the tip of the iceberg of the demon army.

More and more black light cavalries entered the Golden Estate, forming a black arrow formation. It seemed that the demons really planned to use these light cavalries to charge in front.

Behind the light cavalries, the types of troops finally changed. The 2 wings of the arrow formation were huge square shields, which were 4 meters high and looked very heavy. At least 3 soldiers were required to operate them. Layers of giant shields affected the vision, so no one knew what was hidden behind them.

The next core formation was the infantry unit. The most conspicuous ones were the taurens wearing heavy armor and holding huge battle axes in their hands. The taurens were the best blacksmiths in the Demon Realm, and they were also extremely powerful soldiers. Their forging skills and combat power were not inferior to the hobbit on the human world.

The formation next to the taurens were medusas and black elves. There were very few medusas in the human world. Their names were often associated with words such as ‘petrify’, ‘snake demon’, and ‘devil’. This was the first time they had seen so many fully armed medusas. The bow skills of the medusas were astonishing. Even if they could not match the elves, they were far better than ordinary archers. The dark elves were called fallen elves. Their appearance had caused a strong killing intent of the elf warriors of the Silver Moon Celestial of Capital. What burned the elves’ fighting spirit even more was that these fallen elves held the same magic rifles as their own.

More and more phalanxes appeared. The overall arrow formation was still maintained. That was to say, the entire army of demons was a giant arrow, which meant: Attack! Attack! And attack!

The final row of huge figures caused a commotion in the Human Coalition Army.

These were huge human figures that were about 9 meters tall. Their whole body was made of dark golden metal. The eyes were shining with light blue light. Some people couldn’t help exclaiming, “Assemble puppets!”

The army in the magic game ‘Infinite Warrior OL’. The demons actually made this kind of war weapon! And there are at least 1,000 of them!

If this kind of big guy really has the power in the game, then it is almost equal to… 1,000 giant dragons!

The formations of the 2 sides had been set up. On the plain, a goose formation with 2 wings and an arrow were facing each other from a distance. This was the strongest confrontation that the 2 worlds were waiting.

Today might be a crucial day that would change the 2 worlds.

Compared with this great war, the simultaneous eruption of the Nightmare Volcano was just an ‘insignificant’ small event. However, almost no one knew that this was the existence that would really change the world.

The erupting crater was like a roaring demon, spewing out countless violent blood red. Puffs of thick smoke shot up into the sky, connecting with the red sky. The suffocating air was filled with the scorching heat of destruction as countless lava quickly flowed on the violently trembling ground.

In the red sky, a diamond-shaped pattern vaguely appeared like an eye about to open, looking down at the destruction spreading everywhere.

It also looked down at the figure in the cloak who barely stood up with the crutch.

The originally white hands of the figure in the cloak had become wrinkled. He was tremblingly holding the cracked dead wooden crutch. This wooden crutch, like his whole body, might break at any time.

The man in the cloak lowered his head, panted, and did not look up at the sky, but in his soul feeling, the diamond-shaped eye was gradually becoming clear from phantom to materialized. The eye slowly opened. This was a pupil burning with flames. The vision was full of absolute destruction and hatred.

In the sky, near the diamond shape, red lightning began to shine. The man in the cloak squinted his eyes and subconsciously looked at the scorching crater. In the center of the high-speed erupting lava, a flame was slowly rising. This flame was like a flower, slowly blooming layer by layer. In the center of the flame, the blood color became thicker and thicker as it condensed into a human figure.

The naked body of a woman.

At first glance, the bumpy figure looked very attractive, but upon closer inspection, it was chillingly terrifying.

The long red hair fluttered in the flames, the dark red skin was covered with cobweb-like patterns, the cracks in the patterns showed a burning golden color, the nails on her hands were very long, and the slightly curved arcs showed an incomparably sharp edge. On the outline of the delicate face was a pair of strange eyes. The eyes had been opened like the ‘eye’ in the man in the cloak’s mind.

TL: Why did the man in cloak want to summonthe Abyss?

chapters.title: Chapter 1216: Begin
chapters.body:
Chapter 1216: Begin

Good News! It has been about 5 years and the novel is finally coming to an end in about 60 chapters, so we are lowering the price of the highest tier and release all the chapters until the end! Feel free to check it out in our Patreon! We would like to express our gratitude to our patrons! Without them, the novel can’t come this far until the end! Also our readers just for reading and leaving comments! It has been fun translating this novel, the author really brings shock, joy, smiles, laughter, and tears to me. Although there are some critical mistakes made in terms of translation quality, chapters missing, and terms missing, hopefully we can minimize that and improve our quality in our existing and new novels. See you all in other novels perhaps🥰!

The girl in the flames had a blue pupil on the right eye. Although it was as deep as an abyss, it gave people a feeling of ‘emptiness’, while the pupil of the left eye was blood red with a surging breath.

In the eyes of the man in a cloak, the danger contained in this eye was tens of millions of times stronger than the eruption of the entire Nightmare Volcano!

The woman walked toward the man in the cloak step by step as if stepping on invisible stairs. With each step, the golden pattern on her body became lighter, and the cracks on the ground beside the man in the cloak became deeper. The hand holding the withered wood crutch became tighter due to the pressure of some force, and his blood kept dripping into those cracks and emitted a bloody light full of destructive breath as if it was under some kind of summon.

When she walked to the opposite side, her skin was already the same as that of ordinary people, looking crystal clear. The fluttering fiery red hair gradually returned to blue, and the burning flames in the left eye converged into the pupil. There was only faint bleeding, and the blue right pupil became more and more hollow.

She was wearing a golden-red armor, and the cloak on her back was fluttering in the flames. She had an enchanting beauty like a witch walking out of the abyss.

The whole body of the man in the cloak was trembling extremely violently, and blood marks appeared on his skin, but those eyes were still as calm as the night sky.

“You actually…” Compared with the scorching heat and suffocation around, the woman’s voice was like the cold wind from the ice prison, revealing the coldness that froze the soul, “Wake me up!”

As soon as this sentence came out, the man in a cloak smiled. This smile caused his bloody mouth to horrifyingly crack at the corner of his lips, but he still didn’t care. The laughter grew louder, revealing a dash of madness that was completely opposite to the usual wisdom.

Lava splashed, and lightning flashed. In the center of the bloody cloud in the sky, the diamond shape began to glow with a faint brilliance.

The sky over Dark Moon Estate was covered with dense clouds, and lightning flashed from time to time.

Chen Rui looked at the sky. For some reason, a sense of restlessness in his mind became stronger.

“ Waa waa waa …”

The cry of the child diverted his attention. It was Little Doudou.

During these days, Little Doudou was the core figure of the entire courtyard. Even the original Little Princess Duoduo’s priority had dropped by 1 level, ranking after Doudou.

But the sensible Darling Duoduo didn’t care about these things. Instead, she offered to take care of her younger brother and bring him to play the game of ‘Angry Bird’ when he grew up. The aunts in the yard repeatedly praised Duoduo for being understanding and ignored the last half of the sentence. The unscrupulous father whose soft flesh around his waist was pinched and twisted 360 degree by several hands at the same time.

After the full moon, Doudou looked more pink and cute. Sometimes he would make some sounds unconsciously. Occasionally, words like ‘mommy’ or ‘daddy’ could make the yard burst into laughter, which also made the haze in Chen Rui’s mind diluted a lot.

“Athena, Kia.”

“Chen Rui, what’s wrong with Doudou recently? He kept crying and didn’t sleep all night last night.” Athena held the child. Her tired red eyes were full of anxiety. Little Doudou seemed to be in a bad state these days. The frequency of crying increased significantly. The first nanny Kia on the side also looked worried. Although only Catherine and Athena became mommy among the crystal harem ladies, everyone loved Doudou and Duoduo equally.

“I don’t know.” Chen Rui carefully sensed Doudou’s physical condition, but he found that there was no abnormal symptom.

“If only Python was still here…” Kia whispered.

Python left when the ‘door’ appeared last time, and she had been missing since. Not only Chen Rui, but everyone else felt like something was missing.

Train together in the Ghastly Floating Land, guide and promote the growth of everyone, join hands to deal with Sariel, and go to the Holy Light Mountain together…

In the minds of everyone, perhaps they had long agreed with the change of her position from the former ‘enemy’ to the current ‘friend’.

Nobody knew if she herself knew that.

Finally, Athena and Kia coaxed Doudou to sleep.

“Gerant’s army should have reached the Golden Estate by now…” Chen Rui sighed.

This battle had long been known to the Demon Realm. All the people and the media were paying attention to the battlefield. Even a battlefield reporter was broadcasting it live.

In order to prepare for this battle, the army of demons had been practicing tactics with the help of magic items these days. At the same time, they were adapting to the combat power in the light element environment.

In the 3 empires’ alliance, many empire elders proposed to let the ‘ancient guardian’ army that appeared last time in the Fallen Angel Empire military parade take part in the battle.

Unfortunately, ‘Aguile’ who was in charge of this huge force ‘disappeared’ at this critical moment.

In fact, Chen Rui knew very well that if the ancient alchemy civilization army of the ‘City of Stars’ was really dispatched, together with the undead army of Guradam and the military strength of the Demon Realm itself, this battle could easily crush the Human Coalition Army.

With his current strength, he could join any side and change the entire battle situation. He could even form a ‘faction’ of his own, standing on par with the strength of the 2 worlds. However, as an insider of the truth of the war between the 2 worlds and the ‘human’ of the Demon Realm, Chen Rui could only choose to stay out of it.

“Yes.” Hearing him mentioning it with initiative, Athena answered.

In fact, everyone understood Chen Rui’s mood, so they had deliberately avoided this topic recently.

“Even without the inside story of the sacrifice, war with a selfish nature is still unavoidable.” Isabella’s voice sounded faintly from behind, “Even if you can let peace come briefly by yourself, you cannot fundamentally eliminate war.”

“I’m not that noble.” Chen Rui shook his head, “It’s just…”

Before he finished speaking, he suddenly sensed the faint light of the Tree of Nature in the Super System as a special spirit power spread.

Chen Rui originally wanted to activate the power to suppress it, but he hesitated for a while when he thought of the uneasy feeling in his mind recently. He just channeled the Star Power to protect his soul and let that spirit power wrap him.

In an instant, he only felt that the shadows of Athena and others became blurred. The space changed, and a blood-red scene appeared in front of him.

The lava flowing around, the crimson sky, and the blood-colored lightning. Even an audience with only vision and hearing could feel the oppressive suffocation and scorching heat of this scene.

It’s not an illusion, but some kind of real image transmitted by the Tree of Nature!

This familiar scene…

Chen Rui looked in amazement at the eye-like diamond shape in the bloody cloud in the sky. When he looked downward, his gaze was fixed on the 2 figures in the center of the blood-red world.

That precarious figure wearing a cloak and holding a wooden crutch and with half a human face and half a monster, was the disappearing legendary prophet of the elf tribe, Alucier.

Alucier left the Psychedelic Forest, where he was unable to leave, and his whereabouts are unknown. Unexpectedly, he appeared in this place. Where… is this place?

That female figure in flames opposite Alucier…

Chen Rui’s pupils suddenly constricted.

That face!

Blue and red pupils!

It is actually her!

She is not dead!

How could she be with Alucier? Why does she look like that?

Is it another space or… it’s in this world?

“‘Awakening’? That’s right.” Alucier’s cloak revealed terrifying scars on his skin, but he was smiling. “To be more precise, it should be called ‘hasten birth’…”

“Stupid servant of fate, you know that it is inevitable, but you still desperately want to change.” The woman’s eyes repeatedly looked at Alucier’s bloody face like a blade, and she said contemptuously, “Do you think that by using the residual power of curse to unlock the authority enchantment of the main plane and letting the destruction descend in an incomplete form in advance, you can change the trajectory of fate?”

Chen Rui could clearly hear the conversation between the 2. The woman’s words shocked him like thunder, even surpassing the shock of the woman’s ‘resurrection’.

The ‘sacrifice’ that occurs every 500 years suddenly appeared more than 100 years earlier than usual. This caused panic in both worlds, and it also caused this war that required the death of countless lives. It was actually directed by Alucier!

What frightened Chen Rui the most was the sentence ‘unlock the enchantment, let the destruction descend in advance’!

The enchantment that resisted the Abyss and protected the main plane for an unknown number of years is actually unlocked by the elf prophet Alucier!

This means…

The Abyss has come to the main plane!

Chen Rui couldn’t believe it. The terrifying event that he thought would be tens of thousands, or even a long time later, was actually happening now!

His first reaction was: Alucier is crazy!

“It’s a pity, even if I don’t descend in a complete form, the result will not change in any way. What you risked your life to change is only the time and the method.” The woman showed a cold and cruel smile. Alucier’s trembling became stronger while the ground under his feet was completely cracked under the intangible terrifying pressure, “The world you live in, everything you love, will lose the last chance to survive because of your stupidity. They will be completely destroyed and devoured in advance”

Alucier’s smile had returned to indifference, “Perhaps.”

“Perhaps? Do you think that these weak ants on the main plane are capable of stopping the footsteps of fate?” As the woman said this, she slowly raised her right hand. Numerous blood-red lightning wrapped on the tips of the sharp nails. During the flickering, cracks appeared in the space. When the edge of the momentum swept past Alucier’s cloak, a large area of cut suddenly appeared. It was not only the cloak that was cut, but also flesh and bones.

“Fate can’t be changed; it’s just the time difference between being late or coming early. They may be weak, but they have infinite possibilities.” Alucier smiled faintly, not paying attention to the injuries on his body and the imminent death.

Golden Estate.

From time to time, red lightning flashed across the sky, but no one paid attention to them. No matter if it was the goose formation or the arrow formation, the pupils full of murderous and fighting intent only saw the enemies in front.

At the bottom of the wild goose formation, Lex the Great was standing on the commander platform. He saw Gerant in the center of the opponent’s arrow formation instantly, and he happened to meet Gerant’s gaze. Both of them were people of extraordinary strength. Their perception and vision were far beyond human comparison. At this moment, the 2 top commanders both ‘saw’ each other’s burning fighting spirit.

There was no need for unnecessary scolding or provocation. They ordered the attack almost unanimously.

chapters.title: Chapter 1217: Stalemate
chapters.body:
Chapter 1217: Stalemate

Good News! It has been about 5 years and the novel is finally coming to an end in about 60 chapters, so we are lowering the price of the highest tier and release all the chapters until the end! Feel free to check it out in our Patreon! We would like to express our gratitude to our patrons! Without them, the novel can’t come this far until the end! Also our readers just for reading and leaving comments! It has been fun translating this novel, the author really brings shock, joy, smiles, laughter, and tears to me. Although there are some critical mistakes made in terms of translation quality, chapters missing, and terms missing, hopefully we can minimize that and improve our quality in our existing and new novels. See you all in other novels perhaps🥰!

Gerant dispatched the front of the arrow formation. The strange light cavalries that wore black light armor without the knight spear gun were faster than expected.

The first move was cavalry charging, showing the strong self-confidence of the demons.

Lex the Great wanted to dispatch the orc soldiers, but the enemy sent out cavalries. If they sent orcs at this time, the intention of sending them to death was too obvious. The orcs had always been rebellious, doing so might cause trouble.

This was the first contact. If there was a slight mistake, it would directly affect the morale of the entire army, so Lex the Great immediately changed his decision and ordered the left wing’s heavy cavalries to attack.

The cavalry commander was the legion commander of the strongest Dragon Claw Knight Legion in the Dragon Bright Empire, Tristan, Lex’s most trusted general. With him commanding the left wing heavy cavalries, coupled with the restraint of the heavy cavalry on the light cavalry in this terrain, he should be able to severely defeat the black light cavalries of the demons, win an important first victory, and boost the army’s morale.

Tristan’s eyes locked on Francis in the black cavalries early on. When Francis came here as a messenger, although he appeared neither humble nor overbearing, as a veteran soldier, Tristan could feel the provocation and arrogance in the demon’s bones. At that time, Tristan secretly swore that he must deal with this damned demon on the battlefield.

Now that Lex the Great’s order made Tristan’s wish come true, his blood boiled and his fighting spirit raised to the peak in an instant. The front formation of the left wing quickly moved toward the center, meeting the black cavalries.

Tristan was a well-known general who had experienced many battles. He did not let hatred and fighting spirit affect his judgment. The entire heavy cavalries charge maintained an effective interval and a stable speed, and only the front-end formation began to change. The first 5 heavy cavalry squads of thousand-man had formed a triangular charge formation and accelerated forward.

These 5 thousand-man squads were composed of the coalition armies of other countries. The core force, the Dragon Bright Empire’s Dragon Claw Knight Legion, was behind Tristan. Tristan obviously wanted to use these 5 thousand-man squads to test the situation. Once the enemy’s formation was disrupted, the whole army would immediately charge, completely defeat the black cavalries, and cut off that Francis’ head with his own hands!

As soon as the 5,000 heavy cavalries were dispatched, the black cavalries on the opposite side slowed down one after another, forming a strange intersecting formation. Tristan saw the cavalries in the front row each holding a long object. Magic rifle!

This rifle was also black and had a special structure. The firing rate, recoil and range seemed to be tailor-made for light cavalries. Tristan immediately had an ominous feeling. Before he could issue a new order, continuous gunshots had already sounded. Bang bang bang…

The human heavy cavalries in the front row fell to the ground one after another. The bullets were not the most terrifying, but the rows of piercing objects flying out from behind the black cavalries, harvesting the lives of hundreds of cavalry in an instant.

Javelin!

This was a kind of short javelin about 1 meter long. Judging from its weight, it was definitely not a light thing, which also made it more powerful when thrown. The extremely sharp tip could easily penetrate heavy cavalry armor or horse armor.

There is actually such a thing!

These javelins were all hidden in the saddle’s equipment bag, and they hadn’t been discovered before. This surprise attack had killed half of the 5,000 men squads in a short while.

If we retreat now, it will have a great impact on the morale of the Human Coalition Army as a whole. Besides, from the perspective of the distance and room for movement between the 2 sides, as long as we withstand a few rounds of attacks, close the distance with the light cavalries, and the heavy cavalries with the knight spears can easily crush the enemy. Tristan made a decision. He let the troops behind continue to charge. It is impossible to be uninjured on the battlefield of a head-on confrontation. Casualties are inevitable. This is the first confrontation between the 2 armies. For the Human Coalition Army, for the Dragon Bright Empire, for His Majesty Lex, they must be taken down!

As the heavy cavalries approached at all costs, the black cavalries reacted quickly – backing away.

While retreating, they were attacking at the same time. This time, they were not using magic rifles or javelins, but shooting arrows.

This was the most correct way of attack. The power and accuracy of turning using a gun or throwing a javelin would not be as good as that of archery. This riding and archery technique was used as early as many years ago when Raizen’s army attacked the Warlock Fortress. The cavalries of the Fallen Angel Empire had mastered it proficiently. At that time, they didn’t have much room to unleash. Now, on this more important battlefield, they finally showed their fangs.

These specially-made arrows carried a powerful armor-piercing attribute. The heavy cavalry armor, plus the inner cloth armor, couldn’t resist the terrifying piercing force, causing heavy casualties in an instant.

Damn, shooting spears and archery, is this still a cavalry? The most aggrieved thing for Tristan was that the maneuverability of the light cavalries of demons was far better than that of the heavy cavalries. If we rush forward and get close to the main formation of the opponent’s army, I won’t know whether giant crossbows have been erected or perhaps there are medusa shooters in formation behind the huge shields. Rashly going deep alone is simply courting death. But if we continue to fight like this, we won’t even be able to touch the enemy. Our troops will be exhausted.

Tristan finally gave the order to retreat. Even if he was punished, he couldn’t just sit and watch his elites be ruined by this hateful attack.

Then what made Tristan vomit blood was that when the heavy cavalries retreated, the opponent stuck up like a plaster, shooting the magic rifles and throwing javelins continuously, which was simply maddening.

We can’t fight and can’t run, what else can we do?

The ‘founder’ of this disgusting combat method was Chen Rui. In fact, he copied the Mongolian cavalry’s riding and shooting tactics. However, after the advent of firearms, combined with the characteristics of the Polish winged cavalries, there would only be the black cavalries with amazing combat power.

For heavy cavalry, they were a strengthened version of bow cavalry. For infantry, they were a lite version of heavy cavalry; faster and more comprehensive.

Lex the Great at the rear saw Tristan’s plight, and he finally understood why the other party dispatched light cavalries into the battle. This kind of cavalry and tactics were simply unimaginable. He couldn’t think of a solution in a short time. But what was certain was that if the opponent was allowed to continue like this, not only the heavy cavalries would suffer casualties, but the rest of the soldiers on the 2 wings would also suffer heavy losses under this long-range strike.

This 2 types of army battle formations had corresponding defenses against magic crystal cannon or catapult, such as the large magic shield activated by the magician legion or the arge giant shield in the demon formation. Hastily launching large-scale long-range weapons might not achieve the desired killing effect, but the enemy would also use large-scale ordnance to fight back. At that time, the advantage of the ‘home field’ would be reduced instead. This type of attack worked wonders when the enemy’s overall formation collapses.

The battlefield was like a game of chess. Both sides of the game had chess pieces with various functions. The key depended on how to play.

Lex the Great reacted quickly and immediately found the most targeted attack method, “The elf magician legion prepares for [Meteor Rain], and the Holy Cross Magic Legion prepares for [Light Cloud Flying Stars]! Stop the enemy cavalries from pursuing!”

[Meteor Rain] was to summon a huge meteorite with flames to fall from the sky. This kind of magic had great aoe damage.

[Light Cloud Flying Star] was a brewing light element that turned into a cloud of light, dropping countless light element energy balls that contained explosive power. Under normal circumstances, the power of [Light Cloud Flying Star] was inferior to that of [Meteor Rain], but the opponents were demons. In this world where the light element was most active, even if power of the light element decreased due to the door of the 2 worlds and the, [Light Cloud Flying Star] could still cause double the damage.

2 large aoe magics, jointly activated by well-trained magician legions, could gather the power of all magicians and activate a battlefield-level magic that was far more lethal than an individual.

Under the protection of infantry formation, the 2 magician legions walked to the effective casting position and began to prepare the magic.

Elf magicians had element sensing power far superior to ordinary humans. The long spell of [Meteor Rain] had been compressed by nearly half by them. Originally, the release speed was slower than that of [Light Cloud Flying Star], but now it was faster. In a short time, this powerful spell had been completed. Under the command of Princess Philly, black spots of astonishing scale appeared in the sky. These black spots started to magnify at an astonishing speed. They were a group of huge meteorites with huge burning areas plummeting toward the location of the black cavalries.

The Holy Cross Magician Legion on the other side also completed [Light Cloud Flying Star]. Countless white lights fell precisely behind the heavy armor cavalries, [Light Cloud Flying Star] could stop and kill the chasing black cavalry while [Meteor Rain] could completely destroy these nasty demon cavalries.

On the battlefield, it was far more difficult to defend against large aoe magic than to attack, especially the Demon Coalition Army commander did not give orders to the magician just now. At this time, there was not enough time to activate magics like protective shields.

However, the black cavalry didn’t panic too much. The front cavalries slowed down, and those who had been shooting arrows and throwing javelins moved closer to them. They gathered together in a special way. This gathering position avoided most of the [Light Cloud Flying Star], but it was within the scope of [Meteor Rain].

It was like getting together and accepting the baptism of [Meteor Rain].

Court death?

When the black cavalries were about to be engulfed by the flaming meteorite and light balls that fell from the sky, suddenly the meteorite and light balls seemed to hit something special. Their speed suddenly slowed down before they disintegrated and scattered like sand grains.

The Human Coalition Army was all shocked: What’s going on?

Lex the Great’s eyes fell on the group of cavalries approaching from the back of the black cavalries. It was these people who raised their hands together just now. With a special joint force, the 2 large aoe killing magics disappeared out of thin air.

The 2 magician legions clearly felt that the nearby elements were greatly weakened, even the light element was no exception, so they couldn’t help being shocked.

“[Element Weakening]… the Asmodeus Royal Family!” Lex the Great immediately thought of the intel related to the demons, and he immediately came to his senses. The war puppet legion formed by the Asmodeus Royal Family is also a very dazzling existence in the previous war of the 2 worlds, but it is the first time I have heard of such a group using the [Element Weakening] talent to ‘offset’ magic.

Although the heavy cavalries took advantage of this opportunity and fled back to the main formation, the casualties were quite heavy. Fortunately, the black cavalries on the opposite side also retreated to the main formation.

With a squad that can offset magic, black cavalries are almost invincible! If the black cavalries replenish their ammunition and attack again… Lex the Great frowned.

In the first round of confrontation, the demons clearly had the upper hand, but this was only the first encounter. The whole battle situation was currently at a stalemate. It was still hard to say who the final winner would be.

In contrast, the 2 sides on the other battlefield had a clear disparity in victory and defeat.

Nightmare Volcano.

“100 years! Just another 100! I can descend in the most complete and powerful form. At that time, even if those ants can be resurrected and repeat the first battle of the gods, I will have nothing to fear! And you lowly ant actually…” The woman wrapped in flames stared at Alucier who was already like a candle in the wind. Then, she slowly lowered her hands, but the flames mixed with evil spirit became more and more blazing, “How should I deal with you to dispel the anger in my heart?”

TL: Will Chen Rui come to help?

chapters.title: Chapter 1218: The Shocking Truth
chapters.body:
Chapter 1218: The Shocking Truth

“Lowly ant! I will put you in purgatory and ignite the fire of destruction to devour your soul continuously. At that time, you will find that even a swift death is an unattainable luxury…” The woman said coldly. The sound of gnashing teeth contained a special soul power that even a Pseudo-God powerhouse would instinctively fear, but Alucier still remained calm.

To be more precise, this was a kind of indifference. A calm gaze that seemed to transcend fear and also life and death.

“It’s sad…” Alucier sighed, “Existence that doesn’t exist. Once the will truly returns, you who have completed your mission are just a bubble. If you say ‘lowly’, you and I will not be different before disappearing.”

As soon as this sentence came out, the woman’s eyes were full of killing intent, “You don’t understand what true eternity is! I have already decided that your body and soul will suffer endless torment. I will keep your eyes here to let you watch the end of this world! At that time, you will hate your choice; hate this inevitable fate!

“Unfortunately, my body and soul have already come to an end.” Alucier did not look at the woman again as he turned his vision to the cracked withered wood staff in his hand. In the crack that was on the verge of death, there seemed to be a small sprout, signaling hope. “But, I will watch, keep watching, and I will not hate. Quilliana… No, Blanche, you don’t have to hate, because there is more than hatred in your eyes…”

Before Alucier could finish his words, his body trembled and instantly disintegrated into particles before disappearing. The woman’s hand, which was braving lightning, slowly spread out. There were 2 bloody eyes in the palm.

The last sentence seemed to echo in her ears. The woman’s eyes were full of hostility as she firmly squeezed the hand holding the eyeballs. In the flames, the last bit of ashes slowly disappeared in the suffocating air.

The woman looked up at the sky and slowly raised her hands.

In the center of the red cloud, the rhombus-shaped ‘eye’ outline slowly opened. However, what appeared was not pupils, but pure blood color. 2 blood-red light beams projected from the outline and landed on the lava on the ground. 2 ‘fountains’ began to emerge from the lava, and 2 bodies gradually took shape inside.

When the 2 figures formed, more and more light beams were projected from the blood cloud. The whole space began to boil violently. Amidst the deafening laughter of the female, countless terrifying shadows faintly appeared in the blood color, forming an infinite endless sea.

At the moment when the eyeballs were destroyed, Chen Rui’s vision had already begun to blur. The scene that happened later became more and more hazy. Finally, his mind was shaken, and his consciousness returned to the Dark Moon’s residence.

The light of the Tree of Nature in the Super System also dimmed. The originally lush giant tree withered quickly, and the life force quickly dissipated as if its soul had been extracted. Chen Rui instinctively injected life force and faith power of the galaxy into it, and he finally stopped the withering process.

Pieces of the withered trunk split open, revealing the new tree inside, which began to sprout. It returned from a towering tree to a small tree with a height of 2 meters. In any case, it finally regained its vitality.

At the same time, in a distant place, Kilanya stared blankly at the spirit wood wand that was emitting green sprouts in her hand. She slowly knelt down in one direction. Tears were dripping down from her beautiful eyes full of sadness.

On the Golden Estate battlefield, the battle between the Human Coalition Army and the Demon Coalition Army continued.

Lex the Great reacted quickly as he immediately made arrangements for the black cavalry, pushing the elf tribe’s magic archer legion and magic rifle legion to the front. They were surrounded by heavy infantry vertical shields for protection. Although the black cavalries was good at riding and shooting and advance and retreat freely, the bow and marksmanship of the elves could be called the top in the 2 worlds. The range and accuracy of the arrows of the elves were above the black cavalries. What’s more terrifying was that almost every arrow had this kind of power. Not only bow skills, their marksmanship was also extremely sharp. Even if the black cavalries and the elves shoot at each other on the spot, the black cavalries were definitely not opponents, let alone attack on horseback. Moreover, the elves were protected by infantry.

After several rounds of attacks, the black cavalries couldn’t get close and lost a lot of troops. Instead, the elf legion was approaching the core of the battlefield step by step. Of course, Lex the Great would not let the elves go deep alone. The hobbit bear cavalries and orcs followed closely behind.

However, pushing the long-range troops to the front was not a wise move. Besides that, the opponent still had ballistas. This approach was more about creating pressure and boosting one’s own morale.

Gerant made a prompt decision and sent the cavalries back to the formation. Judging from the scene, the 2 sides had a tie.

Seeing that the enemy’s entangling black cavalries were forced to return, the Human Coalition Army burst into cheers, but the cheers quickly turned into tense silence as the rows of huge figures behind the Demon Coalition Army moved.

Assemble puppets!

Thousands of huge war puppets slowly rose into the sky, like a dark cloud, slowly moving toward the Human Coalition Army.

This speed was not fast, but it caused more pressure than ‘fast’. The formation and layering displayed by the battle puppets when they moved in the air were like truly well-trained elites. Every Human Coalition Army’s mind was shrouded in a layer of haze.

The elf shooters and gunmen could only leave some shallow marks on the assemble puppets with their attacks. They retreated urgently under Lex the Great’s order.

Hundreds of huge figures soared from the Human Coalition Army. It was the dragons from the Dragon Valley, and several griffon legions were also ready to attack. On the demon’s side, the wyvern legion and griffin legion were also ready to be dispatched.

Further back, the magic crystal cannons and catapults on both sides had readjusted their attack angles. The most intense battle phase was coming.

It was not Lex the Great’s wish to fight against the strongest trump card so early, but at present he had no other choice. The commanders of both sides issued orders to attack at the same time.

Countless flames that symbolized death burst out from the formations of both sides. The lights of the magic crystal cannons, the flame meteors of the catapults, the bolts of the ballistas, the dragon breaths of the giant dragons, the long-range missiles of the assemble puppets, the magic of the magic legion, the feather arrows, bullets…

At the moment when the flames on both sides were about to intertwine, everything stopped.

The battlefield was noisy and fierce just now, but it became silent in an instant. All the attacks were frozen in the air, which seemed extremely strange.

Everyone could feel this kind of stillness, as if… time stopped suddenly.

At this time, there was 1 person on the battlefield.

Although everyone was stagnated, they felt the arrival of this person.

The man seemed to wave his hand, and then everything returned to normal. All the attacks on the battlefield just now disappeared.

The fiercest attack of nearly 2 million troops was actually easily extinguished by this man with a wave of his hand.

And the charging armies of both sides actually seemed to encounter an intangible wall, unable to advance a step!

It was a simply irresistible force!

Everyone had a feeling that just this person could wipe out all the troops present!

He must be the legendary Demi-God powerhouse! (Ordinary people collectively refer to super-level powers above Demon Overlord as Demi-God)

This person, wearing a mask and a cloak, was full of mysterious breath.

Not to mention the Human Coalition Army, the soldiers on the Demon Realm whispered when they saw this familiar attire.

There was a flash of light on this person, and there were 3 more people beside him: 3 women.

These were 3 extremely gorgeous women. The one on the left was dressed in a white robe, had blond hair and purple eyes, and her beautiful face was covered with majesty like frost and snow, like a cold iceberg. The one in the middle had black hair. Although she was wearing a veil, she gave people a feeling of peerless beauty. The starry night-like deep black eyes were shining with the light of wisdom. The blue-haired woman on the right looked aloof and out of the ordinary. Her eyes were full of murderous aura like sharp blades. When her eyes occasionally turned around, it gave people an amicable feeling. The combination of 2 completely different temperaments was full of alternative charm.

The charm and temperament of the 3 women had their own advantages, but they had 1 special thing in common, that was, they all wore a crown that clearly showed their identity.

Lex the Great’s gaze shrank suddenly, because he had seen the veiled woman in the middle before!

That was a few years ago in Dragon Horn City!

It was not only this woman who appeared at that time, but also another little girl and…

No wonder, at that time, I felt that the temperament of the veiled woman was the same as mine!

It turned out to be 1 of the Demon Realm’s 3 rulers!

Then…

Lex the Great’s hand holding the sword trembled as his eyes fell on the masked man in the cloak.

“Your Majesty! Royal Highness Prince Consort!” The Demon Realm army no longer had any doubts. They simultaneously retrieved their weapon and bowed.

This way, the Human Coalition Army also understood that these 3 women were the empresses of the Demon Realm’s 3 empires!

And the one who easily stopped the time of the entire battlefield static is the only Prince Consort ‘Aguile’, the legendary figure who conquered the 3 empresses in intel!

‘Aguile’ actually has such terrifying strength. If he wants to annihilate the entire Human Coalition Army, it’s just a matter of a gesture…

The Human Coalition Army showed panic expressions. Where did the Demi-God powerhouses on the human side go? It is said that the Demi-God powerhouses will not interfere in the world of ordinary people, and there are also legends that the Demi-God powerhouses also had their own battlefield during the war between the 2 worlds. Now that this enemy appears, have all the Demi-God powerhouses of humans failed?

“This kind of meaningless war should come to an end…” The man in a cloak said something ‘strange’. Then, an even more incredible scene happened. The 3 empresses waved at the Demon Coalition Army. Although the soldiers, including Gerant and the generals of the demons, seemed unbelievable, they still obeyed the orders of the empresses as all the soldiers began to retreat.

Is this for an armistice? Or distancing your people to deal with us? The Human Coalition Army was anxious.

The man in a cloak walked toward the goose formation step by step. The soldiers along the way wanted to stop them, but they were all frozen by a huge force, unable to move. They could only watch helplessly as the man in a cloak walked to the coalition’s army commander, Lex.

The man in the cloak stopped, quietly looking at the ruler of the Dragon Bright Empire on the platform.

“The war must stop, father.”

When these words were uttered, the audience was shocked. There was no sound in an instant.

TL: Does Blanche still exist?

chapters.title: Chapter 1219: Stop The War
chapters.body:
Chapter 1219: Stop The War

For a moment, everyone on the battlefield, whether it was the demons or the humans, they were all stunned.

It was not ‘stop the war’ that shocked people the most, but the title!

Father!

After the man in a cloak removed the disguise, a handsome man with blond hair and golden eyes emerged.

Someone had already exclaimed, “Prince Arthur!”

There was a commotion in the Human Coalition Army— ‘Aguile’ is actually the third prince of the Dragon Bright Empire who is famous in the human world, that is, the former master of this Golden Estate, Arthur. Roland!

The prince was once a man of power, and his various deeds had attracted attention: He reappeared after 7 years of disappearance, made the Golden Estate the most prosperous estate, refused to marry the Blue Glory Empire Princess Pearl Landbis, defected and became a member of the Holy Church’s Holy Child… By the way, didn’t the Holy Church claim that the Holy Child died suddenly at the canonization ceremony? What is actually going on?!

The Demon Coalition Army was also inexplicably shocked. The only husband of the 3 empresses of the Demon Realm, ‘Aguile’, whose identity had always been mysterious, was actually the prince of the human empire!

‘Aguile’ was the real master behind the Demon Realm, who single-handedly contributed to the Demon Realm’s 3 empires alliance, the founder of the world-famous game kingdom, and the founder of the entire Demon Realm’s peaceful and prosperous situation.

No one would have guessed that this man, who was hailed by many as ‘the greatest demon in history’, turned out to be a human!

There were quite a few demons who recognized this human face – The former husband of the Dark Moon Lord Athena, the famous human internal affair officer who was rumored to be dead for a long time!

This human followed Shea back when Shea was the Dark Moon’s Princess Royal. It was known that he has no strength, but he is actually the same person as the mighty ‘Aguile’!

It’s mind blowing! The amount of information revealed by this truth was so large that people couldn’t even digest it!

The 3 empresses still seemed calm, apparently already aware of it.

“After so many years, I can finally say it without any scruples.” Chen Rui looked deeply at Lex the Great, “The truth is actually more than that, but the most important thing now is to stop this meaningless war, my father.”

When Lex the Great heard him calling himself ‘father’ in front of everyone, he had mixed feelings. When he was about to speak, 3 white lights suddenly shone from the sky.

In the light, the 3 figures quickly became clear.

2 men and 1 woman, wearing pure white robes, with 12 wings behind them.

3 archangels of the Holy Light Mountain!

“Richard, you have violated the rules.” Michael didn’t look at the millions of soldiers, but he just stared at Chen Rui closely. The [Armor of Faith] slowly emerged on his body surface.

“Richard is just a pseudonym, you can call me Chen Rui, or Arthur. Roland.” Chen Rui looked at the 3 archangels, thinking that the 3 of them came at the right time, “I have something extremely important to tell …”

“Cut the nonsense!” Raphael clenched the long silver stick in his hand. In fact, when he heard the name ‘Arthur’, he was somehow furious, “Any sophistry is meaningless. Since you violate the rules, you must bear the consequences of the violation! Die!”

Gabriel, who closed her eyes, did not make a sound. Instead, she clenched the Holy Song Sword tightly in her hand, expressing her attitude.

Lex the Great was shocked when he saw that the 3 archangels wanted to join forces to attack. He had witnessed ‘Arthur’ barely escape from Raphael’s hands, but now the 3 archangels…

“3 sirs…” As soon as Lex the Great said a word, he felt the space shake. The 4 people had appeared in mid-air in an instant.

An independent space was created in mid-air. Although the space did not leak any power, everyone on the battlefield felt a kind of creepy intangible coercion, as if they were surrounded by countless explosive bombs. They might be smashed to pieces at any time.

In the space, 3 white figures emitted scorching light, forming a special triangular formation and surrounding the enemy in the center. The triangle where the 3 were located released different kingdom powers. These 3 kingdom powers collided together and did not repel each other, but they resonated instead. They began to merge into a mysterious and endless whole in the resonance.

The resonance sound became more and more ethereal, revealing the sense of ancient and vicissitudes.

When the people below heard that resonant voice, they couldn’t help feeling small and low in their minds as if it was an oracle from a stalwart and supreme existence that they needed to worship.

Chen Rui instinctively sensed the danger. This must be the [Oracle Formation] of fusing the kingdoms of 3 archangels that Raphael threatened me with last time in the light beam space.

The 3 archangels had experienced his strength more than once. They knew that fighting alone was by no means his opponent, so they activated the strongest joint attack instantly. It could also be because they wanted to take the opportunity to kill this strongest enemy in one fell swoop.

Chen Rui launched the [Pole Star Transformation] without thinking, and the purple starlight shone in the core of the triangle formation.

In the eyes of everyone below, although the purple starlight was dazzling, it was quickly suppressed by the power of the triangle formation. The starlight was rapidly receding and decreasing sharply at a speed visible to the naked eye.

The purple starlight flashed and expanded again in an instant. Consequently, the triangular formation was filled with a boundless galaxy.

The particularly dazzling clusters of nebulae in the galaxy gradually converged toward the center. This ‘convergence’ was not due to the weakening like the previous one, but it was actively shrinking.

As the galaxy converged, the pressure on the triangle formation seemed to be increasing. It trembled slightly.

Then, everyone’s vision was blurred. They couldn’t see clearly what happened. They just felt some kind of indescribable shattering force.

The space in the air should have been shattered. The remnant breath emitted was so powerful that everyone felt that they had lost all their strength. They could only stand there in a frozen posture, unable to even think.

Even Saint, who was usually aloof, was no different from an ant in front of this absolute power! This was the real powerhouse!

Any 1 of these 4 people could easily destroy all the armies!

The 4 people who fought fiercely in the air had already returned to the ground. Chen Rui was panting slightly, and the star armor on his body had cracks. The condition of the 3 archangels was not much better than him. Their [Armor of Faith] burst one after another. Michael’s facial expression was completely white; blood overflowed from the corner of Gabriel’s mouth; cracks appeared on Raphael’s face, which were healing rapidly.

The shock in the mind of the 3 archangels couldn’t be overstated. Originally, they thought that the most powerful [Oracle Formation] activated by the 3 of them could subdue or kill the opponent in one fell swoop. Unexpectedly, it was a stalemate!

Chen Rui didn’t relax in the slightest, and he didn’t dare to speak rashly. He just concentrated his mind and quickly adjusted the disordered Star Power in his body— Although the triangular formation was defeated, the fusion kingdom of the 3 was not broken. The next blow of [Oracle Formation] must be even more earth-shattering.

The 3 archangels were also recovering quickly. The confrontation just now caused the strength of the 4 to enter the weakest vacuum period at the same time. They must recover and adjust their strength as soon as possible.

At this moment, the facial expressions of the 3 archangels all changed drastically, because the 3 of them were surrounded by the sudden appearance of 6-color light, which made them feel a strong sense of danger. Once the 6-color light burst out with full force, with the current state of the 3 archangels, they would definitely be severely damaged.

Even if the 3 of them could resist, there was still a strong enemy eyeing them. As long as he looked for the right time to launch a strong attack, they would undoubtedly be defeated!

The source of the power was the purple-haired woman who appeared next to the 3 empresses at some point, that was, the peak stage of the Pseudo-God who was next to ‘Arthur’ last time!

Judging from the power of the colorful lights, this beautiful woman with glasses controlled the 6 element powers. Her combat power was at least similar to Raphael’s. Her move at this timing was almost fatal!

“Stop, Zola.” To the surprise of the 3 archangels, Chen Rui actually stopped this most fatal attack.

Zola hesitated for a while before the power of [Element’s Fury] gradually disappeared. With her current strength, she was already able to cancel this move with ease.

“Michael, Gabriel, Raphael, listen to me first!” Chen Rui took the lead to restrain the strength of [All Star Gods View], “You should be very clear that you can’t defeat me. More importantly, now is definitely not the time for us to fight !”

Michael said coldly, “ Hmph! We really can’t defeat you today, but you, who violated the rules, are sure to face the joint sanctions of all super-level powers?”

When these words fell on everyone’s ears, the Human Coalition Army was shocked again.

Especially Lex the Great, who had personally experienced the canonization ceremony of the Holy Light Mountain’s Holy Child, thought he had heard it wrong. The 3 most powerful archangels of the Holy Church, the existence closest to God, actually claimed that they could not defeat ‘ Arthur’ together!

So, isn’t ‘Arthur’ the real top powerhouse below God!

My son…

“This war is meaningless! The real enemy has descended!” Chen Rui clenched his fists, “Do you still remember our contract at the Holy Light Mountain?”

“The real enemy?” Raphael sneered disdainfully, “It’s simply alarmist. Those cursed ones are just…”

“He’s not alarmist.” Another woman’s voice sounded, and the elves were all spirited. It was Elder Kilanya of the elf tribe.

Raphael frowned and glanced at Kilanya with a slightly surprised expression, because Kilanya’s strength had reached the early stage of the Pseudo-God. Last time at the Silver Moon Celestial Capital’s New Moon Festival, I remembered that she was still only at the intermediate stage of the Demi-God, only 1 step away from the peak stage of the Demi-God. Even if she breaks through, she is only a ‘Demi-God’, how can she possibly make a direct climb to the realm of Pseudo-God?

Between Demi-God and Pseudo-God, there is an almost insurmountable natural barrier!

“Are you the new prophet of the elf tribe now?” Michael asked as his gaze fell on the long wooden staff with green leaves in Kilanya’s hand, “Where’s Alucier?”

Michael’s first sentence made Raphael suddenly realize that Kilanya should have obtained some kind of inheritance, so her strength had directly soared to Pseudo-God. However, due to the passive advance, her current combat power must be inferior to ordinary Pseudo-God.

“Father has fallen.” Kilanya showed a strong expression of sorrow, “It was as Sir Arthur said… ‘the real enemy’ that caused the fall of father. In the consciousness that my father passed on to me in the end, those terrifying existence that will destroy everything has descended to this main plane!”

The 3 archangels were finally moved when they heard the last sentence.

chapters.title: Chapter 1220: Destruction Descend
chapters.body:
Chapter 1220: Destruction Descend

Nightmare Wilderness.

The thick clouds in the sky seemed to be torn apart, projecting bloody light beams. On the huge plain, the original hills and jungles had all turned into scorched earth flowing with lava.

There were countless red crystal flowers floating in the torrent of lava. Countless blood-red clusters stood upright.

If one looked carefully, one could see that there were ‘cocoons’ which were wrapped with something. In the center of the densest sea of ‘cocoons’, 2 hazy figures were surrounded. One could faintly see the hideous figures, but they were temporarily blurred and unclear.

The lava had already covered the entire Nightmare Wilderness, and it was still expanding toward the sea. When submerged in the water, it quickly cooled and solidified, while the lava behind continued to cover and spread endlessly.

Wherever it passed, the sea water boiled and tumbled while the creatures in the sea were either dead or mutated. Those who survived, even a docile little fish, showed their bloodthirsty fangs.

The endless lava quickly extended toward the sea like an infinite bridge.

The Nightmare Wilderness, which had been turned into scorched earth, revealed the sound of expanding and cracking as if something had broken out of the cocoon.

Golden Estate.

The tense state between the 2 coalition armies had completely calmed down. The emergence of the Demon Realm’s 3 empresses and the reveal of the identity of ‘Aguile’ were like shocking news. Before the 2 armies had digested the massive information contained in it, Chen Rui’s battle with the 3 archangels shocked the audience.

Such strength and that special identity were enough to shock everyone in the 2 worlds.

The new prophet from the elf tribe appeared with what seemed to be a very important message, causing the strongest 3 archangels to stop fighting.

“The powerful person who can make Alucier fall may really be that kind of existence.” Although Raphael had stopped, he still expressed doubts about Kilanya’s words, “But, are you really sure that ‘destruction’ has descended to the main plane? You know, now that the ‘door’ has just opened. Those cursed existences can’t break through the enchantment that contains authority power!”

“I don’t know why too.” Kilanya really didn’t know about it, let alone that some kind of ‘advancement’ was actually manipulated by Alucier, “I just conveyed the consciousness passed on by my father. I admit that my ability and experience are very shallow, so you can question me, but you cannot question my father.”

“ Hmph! How do I know if it’s…”

“Okay, Raphael.” Before Raphael finished speaking, he was interrupted by Michael, “Alucier’s ability is unquestionable. More importantly, he has no motive to lie about this. During this time, I believe that you also have a faint feeling of uneasiness in your mind like me. I thought it was the battle with ‘Arthur’ before, but now it seems that it is not because of this battle, but the Abyss!”

Gabriel also nodded. It was only then that Chen Rui realized that he was not the only one who was uneasy.

Michael continued, “The question is, where is the place where the Abyss descended? Is it the Demon Realm, or the human world?”

Kilanya shook her head, “I don’t know. I haven’t fully digested the inheritance power of ‘prophecy’ yet, so I can’t activate the talent of foresight.”

“It’s a place where lava is flowing everywhere, and the ground is trembling.” Chen Rui’s words caught the attention of Michael and others, “By the way, the smoke is very thick. It is probably a volcanic eruption.”

Raphael frowned, “How do you know?”

“Because of the Tree of Nature.” Chen Rui glanced at Raphael lightly, “I still have another identity, the guardian of the Tree of Nature, the Hero King of the elf tribe. You can also call me Your Highness Elf King.”

The corners of Raphael’s eyes twitched: No wonder this guy participated in the New Moon Festival of the elf tribe. It turned out that he is actually the Elf King. I was so ignorant that I thought he mixed in with tricks.

In fact, Chen Rui really cheated his way in, but it was meaningless to explain this. Anyway, it was enough to make Raphael’s mind restless.

“I don’t know what consciousness Kilanya received. It was the Tree of Nature that automatically transmitted that scene to me. Alucier, falling into the hands of Bl…Quilliana. I still remember that there were endless clouds of thick smoke and bloody clouds in the sky. In the center of the bloody clouds is a diamond-shaped thing, which seems to be a closed ‘eye’.”

Hearing the word ‘eye’, the 3 archangels startled at the same time. Michael clenched his fists, “Is that ‘eye’… open?”

“I can’t see it clearly. I just feel like a lot of bloody light beams were projected, then the images disappeared completely.” Chen Rui shook his head, “Anyway, the Abyss has come, so the war between the 2 realms has lost its meaning. The only thing we can do now is to join forces to resist this common enemy and crush them immediately while the power of the Abyss has just descended!”

According to the information left over from the ancient alchemy civilization, the alchemy plane did not pay enough attention to the Abyss at the beginning, so they were still having wars among their people. By the time they noticed the terrifyingness of the Abyss, it was too late. As a result, the entire plane was destroyed.

The 3 archangels quickly exchanged opinions with gaze and secret language. Finally, Michael nodded and gave an affirmative answer, “Actually, we also signed the corresponding terms of the contract last time. In that case, before the Abyss is expelled, we can let go of past grievances and form a temporary alliance!”

Iron Gate Empire.

Although the former Iron Gate Empire was considered a giant, it was now 1 of the most remote vassal states of the Blue Glory Empire.

The Iron Gate Empire used to be the strongest barrier against the orc forces. It had the strongest Thunderwall Fortress. However, with the rapid decline of the orc tribe, the fortress also lost its value. Over the years, the Iron Gate Empire had always been the most peaceful existence since being attached to the Blue Glory Empire.

As a king who didn’t want to make progress, Gregory had long been used to being content and enjoying the current state. Anyway, the more he did nothing, the more assured Her Majesty Empress of the Blue Glory Empire would be, and the more secure his throne would be.

The only unpleasant thing was that when the Holy Church attacked the Nightmare Plains to exterminate the orc tribe a few years ago, the merchant traveling to the Nightmare Wilderness was greatly reduced. This greatly reduced the tax revenue of the Iron Gate Empire. However, even the Blue Glory Empire had to bow its head to a giant institution like the Holy Church, let alone the Iron Gate Empire, so Gregory would not have extra thoughts.

Although the current war of the 2 worlds was eye-catching, and the Iron Gate Empire had also sent its own army, the result of the outcome was not within the grasp of His Highness Gregory. The Royal Highness had always believed in the principle that ‘life is short, so enjoy it to the fullest’, so Gregory was still here as always, enjoying a good life in his castle.

Although it was not as good as the material conditions of those big empires, there was no lack of luxury in the palace of the capital city. Gregory was surrounded by a group of half-naked concubines on a soft couch, tasting the wine while looking at the sexy dancers dancing lightly. Gregory already had hundreds of concubines, but according to his standards, it was far from enough— The girl who leads the dance looks good. Her waist is like a water snake, and her appearance is also good. It is her tonight. Oh, also the girl with big breasts on the far right. With the support of medicine, it should be no problem to have fun together in one night.

Just as Gregory was conceiving the ‘postures’ for the evening, someone rushed to the door of the main hall and shouted, “Your Highness! Emergency!”

Gregory was at the height of his sexual interest. After being startled, he almost became impotent. His desire turned into anger as he shouted, “How dare you! Didn’t I say that no matter what happens, don’t disturb me? Guards! Drag him down! Behead him!”

The imperial guards guarding the gate immediately grabbed the person who came and wanted to take him away. The person shouted, “Your Highness, it’s me, Pancras! There’s something urgent to report!”

“Wait!” Gregory stopped the imperial guards and asked the concubines and the dancing girls to step down. Pancras was his most trusted subordinate. When he was having fun, Pancras solved or suppressed any government affairs. Now even Pancras was here, maybe there was really something urgent.

“Your Highness! War… war is coming!” Pancras was already panting by running in a panic, then just now he narrowly escaped death, so he stammered.

“War is coming?” Gregory frowned, “Who is it? Demons? Impossible, how could it be so fast?”

“Not demons. It seems to be from, from… the Nightmare Wilderness…”

“The orcs of the Nightmare Wilderness have long been razed by the Holy Church. With the Thunderwall Fortress, even the remnants of the orcs should not be able to break through.

“Thunderwall Fortress has fallen!” Pancras said with a sad face. Originally, when Thunderwall Fortress was in emergency, Pancras didn’t take it seriously at all. He just though they made a fuss out of a molehill. Considering the enjoyment of Royal Highness, Pancras didn’t report the matter. Instead, he directly ordered the defending soldiers to stick to defend to the last. Who knew…

“Thunderwall Fortress has been breached?” Gregory was really taken aback. It is the strongest fortress!

“Not only Thunderwall Fortress, but Iron Wheel City and Iron Core City have fallen too!”

“What?” Gregory was furious and kicked Pancras to the ground, “Why didn’t you report it earlier?!”

Pancras wailed, “Your Highness, I just received the news that Thunderwall Fortress was breached, and I’m mobilizing reinforcements, then the intel that of the fall of the 2 cities came.”

Gregory knew that Pancras would not dare to lie about such an important matter, so he took a breath, “So fast! Get Huford to lead the reinforcements immediately!”

“General Huford was dispatched out as reinforcements when the Thunderwall Fortress was captured.” Pancras trembled, “But, according to the intel I just obtained, General Huford and the 20,000 elite infantry have all fallen…”

“How could the orcs be so strong?!” Gregory was astounded. Huford was the strongest general of the Iron Gate Empire, and he was wiped out by the enemy!

“From the intel’s point of view, it’s not the orcs, but another kind of monster that is more terrifying! These monsters will kill all the creatures they encounter. Thunderwall Fortress, Iron Wheel City, and Iron Core City have no survivors! Even none of the scouts who were dispatched didn’t return alive. However, we learned a certain amount of intel from the phone before they were killed by the monsters.”

“Your Highness!” The imperial guard came to report, “General Tutt has an urgent military report.”

“Let him in quickly!” At such a critical time, Gregory naturally didn’t dare to refuse to see him like before.

“Your Highness,” said General Tutt, a burly man, “I just received an emergency military report from the watchtower on the outskirts of the city. There is a large flaming red thing rushing toward the capital!”

Gregory was taken aback, “Red? What kind of magic? Fire?”

Thinking of what was described in intel, Pancras shuddered and hissed, “No, it’s those monsters who destroy everything! Your Highness! The monsters are coming!”

“What to do?!” Gregory was always an incompetent person, so he was at a loss for a while.

General Tutt said, “Your Highness, the gates must be closed immediately! Send out all troops to prepare for defense! Then call for help from the Blue Glory Empire!”

Outside the Iron Gate King’s capital, countless Abyss creatures rushed forward frantically, like a blood tide of death.

In another place far away, a blue-haired woman in a white robe looked at the distant sky. There was endless hatred in her blood-red right eye, “Accept the descend of destruction, everyone in this world…”
