chapters.title: Chapter 1221: Catastrophe Of The Celestial Capital
chapters.body:
Chapter 1221: Catastrophe Of The Celestial Capital

Iron Gate Empire: Destroyed.

The population of the entire empire was wiped out, and no one was spared.

The Blue Glory Empire’s Empress Landbis looked at the intel in her hand in surprise. Beside her was a distress report from the Iron Gate King Gregory.

In today’s era, simple letterheads had been basically replaced by magic phones. With a phone, one could get the fastest communication immediately. However, shortly after receiving a distress call from Gregory, the king of the Iron Gate, Landbis was convening the elders of the parliament and ministers to discuss sending troops to aid, but she soon received a report of the destruction of the Iron Gate Empire.

“This speed… is too fast!” Landbis frowned tightly.

“Yes, Your Majesty.” Altos, the top military commander of the Blue Glory Empire, showed a dignified expression, “According to our intel agents’ investigation and analysis, the evil force that destroyed the Iron Gate Empire should come from the Nightmare Wilderness. However, it is not the orcs, but extremely terrifying monsters, who are vicious and brutal. All lives are destroyed wherever they pass.”

“Is it the tricks of the demons?” It was a newly appointed speaker of the parliament Magnum who spoke up.

Altos shook his head, “Judging from the message sent by General Sandro, the main force of the demons has just entered the human world, and they are concentrating on the Golden Estate to fight our coalition army with all their strength. It is impossible for them to reach there.”

Magnum nodded, “That’s right, the demons are now focusing on the decisive battle in the Golden Estate. They wouldn’t be so stupid to extend the battlefront so early. But since those monsters are not demons, what are they? And why are they so terrifying?”

“These are not the main points! Your Majesty, Sir Speaker, please forgive my impoliteness. We don’t have extra time to explore these!” Altos said firmly, “From the speed of the monster destroying the Iron Gate Empire, we can see that the number and strength of these monsters are extremely amazing. There are definitely Saints or existences beyond Saints among them, and the number is high! After destroying the Iron Gate Empire, these monsters only stayed for a day, then they headed toward the direction of Luo Pool Empire and Red Tassel Empire Now. After these 2 kingdoms are our estate of the Blue Glory Empire! So, it’s only a matter of time before we face these monsters!”

“An astonishing number of Saints or even super-level?” Landbis stood up from the throne with a serious face, “Immediately activate the red war alert to the whole empire and raise the defense level of each city to the highest level. Altos, immediately gather all the troops that can be used and activate the magic defenses and emergency teleportation facilities everywhere. Get ready for a tough battle! Magnum, please call all the councilors urgently and use all the power of the Holy Sanctuary through the resolution! Mel, go to Jaqda immediately and find the Holy Church Cardinal Gralin who is inspecting there. Tell him about the destruction of the Iron Gate Empire and the monsters in detail. Ask him to report to the Holy Light Mountain immediately and dispatch the Glorious Knight for support! I will contact Empress Liv of the Jade Forest Sea in person and ask for the full support of the Magician Tower Group and the elf tribe!”

Everyone left with the orders.

As for the Luo Pool Empire and Red Tassel Empire that were asking for help, even though they were the vassal states of the Blue Glory Empire, at this time, they could only send a small part of the army. The biggest purpose was not to support, but to master more intel related to monsters.

Another location.

Endless forest sea filled the vision, a scene full of vitality amidst the greenery.

In the forest, A pair of white feet stepped slowly on the green ground, leaving a shallow footprint.

The footprints stretched all the way into the depths of the forest.

After a long time, the concave footprints began to burn slowly.

Burn in this damp forest!

The flames were not very high, but the surrounding trees, which were full of vitality, became scorched one by one. The vitality seemed to be drained completely.

The lush expanse of the forest sea began to wither and burn slowly and irresistibly.

There seemed to be some transparent force field blocking the way ahead, but the feet didn’t stop at all. The speed and rhythm remained the same.

The force field was like a huge bubble. As the external force squeezed the force field and formed a deeper and deeper ‘concave’, the force field was also stretched longer and weaker.

Finally, with a ‘bang’ , the entire protective enchantment really turned into a bubble and shattered without a trace.

The feet seemed to have done a trivial thing as they continued to move forward unhurriedly.

Soon after, a city wall appeared in the vision.

The city wall was covered with countless green vines. From a distance, it seemed to be completely composed of plants. One could already see the corners of the exquisite buildings looming behind the city wall.

The city gate had long been closed, and the elf guards on the city wall were fully armed as if they were facing a great enemy.

The moment the protective enchantment was broken, the entire Silver Moon Celestial Capital had already entered a state of high alert.

After seeing the approaching figure clearly, many elves, including guard leader Nana, showed surprised expressions, but Nana still did not hesitate. With an order, all the elves shot the arrows without hesitation.

The rain of arrows scattered all over the sky toward the graceful figure in a white robe. The elf tribe was famous for its excellent archery skills. These arrows were far superior to ordinary arrows in terms of exquisiteness, precision, and power, especially when they were aimed at the same person.

However, the figure still walked forward. All the arrows dissipated into particles when they approached. The woman in a white robe didn’t look at the arrows, nor at the elves on the city wall. She walked straight forward like a dragon in the sky who didn’t even bother to look at the ants on the ground.

After a while, the woman in a white robe had already approached the city wall. The city wall flickered with magic circle and enchantment lights. The flickering frequency of the lights became more and more intense as if they were under tremendous pressure, but after an instant, all the lights disappeared. The woman had passed through the city gate.

Unbelievably, the city wall was not damaged in any way, and the defensive elves were stunned on the city wall, dumbstruck. It was unknown whether they were frightened or caused by some kind of force.

After a while, the green vines on the entire city wall began to wither and finally burned. The elves were still like dull puppets as they were reduced to ashes in the flames.

The woman in a white robe didn’t turn her head. Wherever she passed, the clouds in the sky had already turned blood-colored. Whether it was buildings or elves, all were set ablaze. The most urgent alarm bells had been sounded in the Silver Moon Celestial Capital.

The footsteps of the woman in a white robe finally stopped. She looked forward.

Elf Empress Liv was standing there, surrounded by 10 treants in a circle and hundreds of elves standing in their respective positions. It seemed to be a formation.

Empress Liv had a green bow in her hand. She was pulling the bow with a golden arrow and pointed it at the woman in a white robe. The elf empress looked sad and sighed— This half-elf girl, who is considered my niece, finally became a real demon.

“In the name of Moonlight Goddess!” Empress Liv said this sentence resolutely, and a huge momentum emanated from her whole body. The treants and the elves in the formation also made various gestures. The Silver Moon Celestial Capital’s light dimmed and gathered on the golden arrow.

“The top of the 3 elf bows, the bow of the Moonlight Cloud Sea?” There was a mocking smile on the beautiful face of the woman in a white robe. “This is an artifact that has truly blessed power. It’s a pity that those clowns have long since fallen. You poor thing who has lost their protection cannot even activate 0.0001% of its maximum power. Even if you, as the elf empress, gathered all the faith power of the elf tribe with a secret array, you can’t even hurt a single hair of mine!”

Before the words finished, Empress Liv, who had finished charging, loosened her fingers, and a golden light came out from the strings. Although Empress Liv’s strength was only at the peak stage of the Demon Overlord, she had the power of the entire Silver Moon Celestial Capital condensed on her body. Launched through the Moonlight Cloud Sea, the arrow flew toward the woman in a white robe like lightning with unparalleled, invincible, and unavoidable power.

Even the super powerhouse next to Empress Liv couldn’t see the trajectory of the arrow clearly. They could only vaguely feel the violent blur caused by the high-speed tearing force.

As the woman in white robe said, this arrow gathered all the power of the Silver Moon Celestial Capital, carrying the faith and hope of the elf tribe. It was the strongest blow.

In a flash.

Everything was paused.

A golden arrow was gently clamped between 2 fingers, and all the power was extinguished like a strangled candle.

“The power of ants.” The white-robed woman sneered contemptuously, “Not to mention you, even Moonlight Goddess Saraniet can’t destroy my true will!

With that said, the golden arrow that looked like metal suddenly turned into wood, and the arrow feathers also turned green. The arrow shattered in an instant.

The shattered arrow swept past the face of the woman in a white robe, leaving several blood marks.

The woman in a white robe did not expect that such an arrow actually hurt her. The hostility in her right eye could not help but flourish. She clenched her hand into a claw shape and waved violently.

Empress Liv, who was about to shoot the second arrow, trembled suddenly, and her movements froze. At the same time, the treants and the elves in the array also froze.

The blood marks on the woman in a white robe’s face healed in an instant. She didn’t look at the elves again as she walked in another direction. Empress Liv said a name with the last of her strength, ” Blanche…”

The name of ‘Blanche’ made the woman in a white robe pause for a moment, but she didn’t turn her head. Instead, her left eye became more and more hollow, “My name is…Quilliana!”

When the last word was spoken, Empress Liv, all the elves and treants in the formation had turned into dust.

The Silver Moon Celestial Capital and even the entire Jade Forest Sea were ignited with thick smoke soaring into the sky. Over the Ice Sea Area near the Jade Forest Sea, the 5 light streams that were flying rapidly toward the Nightmare Wilderness also spotted the distant bloody cloud and the thick smoke soaring into the sky. They immediately changed direction and flew toward this side.

Quilliana was still walking slowly as if an envoy from hell. Everything around her was destroyed. The Silver Moon Celestial Capital, which was originally like a fairyland, turned into a sea of flames and purgatory.

The footsteps stopped.

In front of her was a cemetery.

The half-elf’s graveyard.

The half-elves were despised by elves, and they couldn’t be buried in the elf cemetery after death, so they could only be buried in this simple wasteland.

This was where Quilliana was headed.

Standing before the cemetery, she slowly opened her hands and chanted complex syllables as if calling for some special existence.

Puffs of black gas emerged from the cemetery, faintly revealing infinite resentment and hatred which condensed together.

Quilliana’s right eye glowed with intense bloody light. Her white robe turned crimson. The shape of the black smoke quickly began to change, gradually forming a weapon.

chapters.title: Chapter 1222: ‘Super 3’
chapters.body:
Chapter 1222: ‘Super 3’

The black smoke gradually solidified, and a long dark golden whip could be faintly seen.

The blood in Quilliana’s right eye became hotter, and she revealed a cold smile. At this moment, the surrounding black gas suddenly changed, and the wound on the face that had been healed appeared again. It actually turned green, and it was still active like some kind of changing spell.

Quilliana let out a muffled snort, took a few steps back, and covered her right eye. Blood spilled from her fingers; it was green blood.

It turned out that Empress Liv’s previous arrow did not just deal ordinary damage. After being stimulated by a certain breath from this cemetery, it exerted its real killing move.

This blow was too sudden. Even she, who was the leader of the 3 rulers of Abyss, suffered a lot of hidden injuries!

This is definitely not an accidental ‘event’, but a long-standing layout of premeditations!

The one who can have this kind of foresight must be that guy. The guy who made me come in an incomplete form ahead of time!

That guy actually got me again after he died!

The elf empress desperately shot that arrow with the Moonlight Cloud Sea precisely for this purpose!

“Damn it!” The roar resounded through the sky. Quilliana’s right hand had already clenched the dark golden long whip, and the terrifying violent intent instantly filled the entire space. With a flick, the long whip hit the ground.

The entire ground of the Silver Moon Celestial Capital trembled, and there were cracks everywhere. From that bottomless crack, lava actually erupted. Those elves who had no time to escape were annihilated by the terrifying fluctuations.

The bloody clouds in the sky reflected the burning ground. The most exquisite green capital and artistic treasure had become a scorched earth purgatory!

Quilliana gasped slightly as she let go of the hand. The wound on her face had completely disappeared. The power of ‘green’ also evaporated, but there was still a faint crack in the blood red pupil in the right eye.

This hidden injury was only temporarily suppressed. It might be difficult to recover in a short time.

Quilliana was about to completely destroy the remaining elves, then her eyes narrowed suddenly. When she raised her head, she saw several light streams rushing toward her in the distant sky.

In the blink of an eye, there were already 5 more figures in front of him.

These 5 people already represented the peak strengths of this main plane.

Michael, Gabriel, Raphael, Chen Rui, Zola.

When the great enemy of the Abyss came, the 2 originally hostile sides finally reached a covenant. The war between the Demon Realm and the human world came to an end temporarily, but they did not withdraw their troops. Instead, they were on standby at any time in the Golden Estate.

Just when Chen Rui was planning to go back to the Demon Realm to find Satan and others, the 3 archangels received an urgent summons from the church and learned of the eruption of the Nightmare Volcano and the mutation of the Iron Gate Empire’s destruction. It turned out that the place where the Abyss descended was the Nightmare Volcano!

The 5 made a quick decision, heading east together. They were going to the Iron Gate Empire, which had already been destroyed. However, on the way, they found the strange situation in the Jade Forest Sea—— 1/3 of the huge forest sea had been burned down!

This made the 5 of them change their destination and immediately went here. However, they were still a step too late. The entire Silver Moon Celestial Capital and the elf tribe had been annihilated.

“Is that you? Blanche…” Looking at the half-elf’s familiar face, he felt another kind of ‘familiar’ hatred gaze. Chen Rui took a deep breath and said another name, “No, I should call you Quilliana!”

“I told you that we will meet again soon.” Hearing the name ‘Blanche’, Quilliana’s eyes flashed, and the corners of her lips curved slightly. This smile was full of fierce murderous intent.

This person first defeated me in the Tree of Nature, destroyed the gate of the Abyss that took 20,000 years to build. Then, he destroyed my main altar and eliminated my projection.

I told this person that we will meet soon, because in just over 100 years, I will be able to truly break through the authority power enchantment and descend to the main plane in a complete form. Now, Alucier had used tricks to ‘give birth’ in advance, hence, the ‘meeting’ was also advanced.

“At least faster than I thought.” Chen Rui smiled lightly. He was as calm as still water, but he was very focused, preparing to guard the opponent’s attack.

This was no longer a projection, but Quilliana’s real original body!

Race: Half-elf (Cursed Body)

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: SSSS+++

Physique: SSSS+++, Strength: SSSS+++, Spirit: SSSS+++, Speed: SSSS+++.

Analysis: Hate.

Risk level: Extremely high!

Chen Rui only found out today that, unlike the ‘S++’ between the peak stage of the Demon Overlord and the kingdom, the level between the peak stage Pseudo-God and God actually had more ‘SSSS+++’, which meant 1 level higher!

This level of strength comparison was like the Super Saiyan in the comic book ‘Dragon Ball’ that he had read before. The Super Saiyan was also divided into 3 levels: Super Saiyan (referred to as Super 1), Super Super Saiyan (referred to as Super 2) ), Super Super Super Saiyan (referred to as Super 3). The strength of each level was very different.

In the elemental world, he had already experienced the peak stage of the Pseudo-God strength of the Main Elemental Messengers ‘Super 2’. In fact, even though they were in the elemental world which was the home field, due to the seal of some kind of taboo power, the strength displayed by the Main Elemental Messengers was somewhat lower. Of course, the infinite rebirth in the elemental world was an extra cheat code.

Without the assistance of the 7 artifacts, Chen Rui’s strength when he first entered the elemental world was only between Super 1 and Super 2. It was when he desperately comprehended [All Star Gods View] that he entered the Super 2 level.

Michael and Satan were originally only a thin line away from Super 2. Under the stimulation of Chen Rui’s strength, they stepped into the Super 2 level one after another. Gabriel, Python, Raphael, including Zola, who had obtained a part of the elemental goddess power, were infinitely close to Super 2, so they might break through at any time.

Chen Rui was now able to proficiently control the incomplete fusion power of the [All Star Gods View], which was equivalent to proficiently controlling the highest strength of Super 2, surpassing Michael and Satan, faintly becoming the top powerhouse of the 2 worlds.

Nevertheless, the strength of Quilliana in front of him was even higher, SSSS+++. It was equivalent to Super 3, and it was also the most peak existence in Super 3. Perhaps only when Chen Rui could fully integrate [All Star Gods View] could he compete with her.

The strength of the 3 rulers is probably at the Super 3 level. Quilliana is the strongest, Sosbach is second, and Dillosro is the last.

No wonder that in the Dead Sea, Dillosro’s projection, that reached the Super 1 level, was able to compete with Satan. Although Satan had reserved his strength at the time, Dillosro’s strength is at the peak stage of the Pseudo-God without a doubt. The Water Elemental King once said that the 3 rulers of the Abyss are extremely terrifying in strength, but they are not yet gods. Then, SSSS+++ should be the last level leading to God.

In any case, facing Quilliana this time will be the biggest test ever.

Chen Rui was about to keep Zola in the Star Conferring Platform, but the firm voice of Ms. Fairy Dragon already sounded in his mind. Chen Rui hesitated for a moment, and he didn’t take Zola back right away.

Zola’s greatest wish was to fight side by side with him. For this reason, the fairy dragon was willing to take huge risks and accept the inheritance of the elemental world. If Chen Rui kept her in the Star Conferring Platform, from Chen Rui’s point of view, he was worried about his lover getting hurt. However, from Zola’s point of view, it was a kind of denial, negating her efforts and strength to risk her life.

So let’s face the crisis together.

Chen Rui turned his head and happened to meet Zola’s eyes. No soul language was needed. There was already a tacit understanding. Thousands of words were spoken in silence.

Zola’s [6 Element’s Fury] had]s a huge lethality beyond the level, and it is a combat power that could not be ignored. Besides, Quilliana seems to suffer some kind of special power just now. The damage is not light, and her strength is also weakened a lot. With Zola and the 3 archangels, it might be the best chance to defeat Quilliana.

Seeing that the hated enemy dared to be distracted when facing an enemy like her, Quilliana’s eyes became more murderous as she locked on Chen Rui firmly. Meanwhile, Michael’s voice sounded, “Quilliana! Your opponents are us!”

Michael was arrogant by nature, and he once claimed to be the person closest to God. The 3 archangels were also the masters of this human world. Now that the Abyss had come to the human world, it was tantamount to violating his ‘estate’. Now, Quilliana had taken the initiative to attack Chen Rui. It meant that the 3 of them were ignored instead, so he couldn’t help being offended.

As soon as these words came out, Quilliana turned her gaze away from Chen Rui to Michael. Her sharp smile suddenly turned into contempt.

“You’re just a lowly servant of the Light God. If you have the blessing power bestowed by God back then, you can barely compete with me now. It’s a pity that you have already lost the blessing of your master. You are completely vulnerable.” Quilliana’s tone was full of undisguised disdain, “However, when you had God’s blessing, what kind of existence was I? In front of my true will, I don’t even have the interest to look at you ants!”

Chen Rui’s mind moved. The information revealed by these words was unknown to him before, faintly revealing some important secrets.

Quilliana called the 3 of them ‘God Servant’. In the beginning, Python also called Michael a ‘servant’ who fools the Gods. Combined with the God association of the Super System, the 3 archangels are probably the oracle of a certain God. Yes, Light God!

‘Blessing power bestowed by the God’ should be the divine power given to an oracle by Gods, similar to buffs like ‘star conferring’ and [Star-level Enhancement]. Judging from Quilliana’s words, if the 3 archangels still have ‘God’s blessing’, they are able to compete with her, who is equal to the strength of SSSS+++!

In this way, it can be inferred that Michael and the other 2, plus Satan and Python, are all survivors of ‘Twilight of the Gods’. Due to the fall of the Gods they served, they lost the god’s blessing, their strength dropped significantly. They only recovered a little bit after self-training for many years.

Quilliana’s last 2 sentences are even more shocking – In the strongest era when Michael and the other 2 had God’s blessing, her ‘true will’ even dismissed these ‘ants’. Then, Quilliana’s so-called ‘true will’ should be at God level!

So, what kind of existence is she now? What is the relationship between the Abyss and Gods? Why destroy everything? For a moment, doubts abounded in Chen Rui’s mind.

“If I were to choose the first person to kill, it would be him, not you.” Quilliana’s eyes returned to Chen Rui.

Such contempt made Michael’s facial expression turn livid. He gave Chen Rui a hard look before he quickly formed a triangle formation with Gabriel and Raphael, surrounding Quilliana.

chapters.title: Chapter 1223: The Strongest Hatred Lord
chapters.body:
Chapter 1223: The Strongest Hatred Lord

The 3 archangels turned into 3 white figures as their kingdoms merged together in an instant, producing a mysterious resonance like an ancient oracle. The huge force set off a massive wave, rushing toward Quilliana from all directions.

[Oracle Formation]!

Chen Rui had personally experienced this move. Even his [Pole Star Transformation] was completely suppressed when caught off guard.

The monstrous huge wave suddenly paused, and its direction actually began to change. It started to spin, absorbing the surging power instead.

The source was the gently dancing nails. The sharp knife-like nails were gently rotating. It was just a casual movement of the left hand, and the massive power of the [Oracle Formation] was fiddled in her palm. How powerful was this!

There was no trace of rage on Michael’s face, only an unprecedented solemnity. With a loud shout, the vortex of [Oracle Formation] suddenly changed. It actually borrowed Quilliana’s own power and turned into a huge halo. The light, flames, and everything nearby were all gathered by the halo. Before the blow was launched, there was already a hint of the might of the world as if the halo was a small universe: great and irresistible.

“Lost sinners, accept the guidance of the [Light of Cleansing Sin]!”

The power of this [Light of Cleansing Sin] was extremely astonishing. Even Chen Rui was shocked by it. The 3 archangels didn’t activate this move against him in the Golden Estate fight, not because of being merciful, but because this move needed a considerable amount of time to charge. Judging from the current state of the 3 archangels, they themselves had paid a considerable price.

During the Golden Estate battle, the 3 originally thought that [Oracle Formation] would be able to take down Chen Rui, but the opponent’s strength exceeded their expectations. Before they used this biggest ultimate move, both sides were already hurt. Later, Zola launched [Elemental Fury] at a good timing, and Chen Rui’s words resolved the battle, so this ultimate move naturally wasn’t used.

Now that Quilliana brought an unprecedented sense of crisis to Michael and the other 2, how could they reserve their power? They paid a high price to instantly activate this ultimate move.

In the halo, the space around Quilliana began to be rapidly compressed under the terrifying pressure around her. Her body began to distort in the vision. She might collapse at any time.

At this moment, Quilliana’s distorted figure moved. This time, it was the right hand that was holding the whip.

With a wave of the dark golden whip, Chen Rui felt as if a thunderbolt had passed through the nearby space. The aura of [Light of Cleansing Sin], together with the ‘small universe’ within it, was forcibly torn apart by a huge power.

1 whip smashed [Light of Cleansing Sin] and [Oracle Formation]!

The strongest ultimate move of the 3 archangels couldn’t resist Quilliana’s 1 whip!

Looking at Quilliana who recovered from the ‘distortion’ and the mocking smile on her face, Chen Rui was shocked: This is the power of SSSS+++?

The white light on Michael and others had dimmed a lot, and their 7 orifices were bleeding. The injury was obviously serious, but [Oracle Formation] had not completely collapsed. Michael looked at the mocking Quilliana, gritted his teeth, and made up his mind, “I’m going all in!”

The 3 archangels had worked together for many years, so they had a tacit understanding in battle. After sensing Michael’s determination, the formation immediately changed. Instead of enclosing Quilliana, they appeared in front of Quilliana in a trinity combination.

Chen Rui only felt a change in vision. The formation of the 3 of them seemed to become a flower that was white as snow. It was exuding the purest and most origin breath, which was infinitely mysterious and vast. This breath is actually greater than the previous [Light of Cleansing Sin] !

“Creation origin? No, it’s the Book of Creation!” Quilliana’s eyes moved. She was slightly shocked.

Chen Rui’s gaze became dignified. In the space of the door of 2 worlds last time, his momentum overwhelmed all peak stage of the Pseudo-God including the 3 archangels, so he inevitably had a trace of contempt for Michael and others. Now this kind of contempt is gone. If it were me, I might not be able to take the [Light of Cleansing Sin] head-on, let alone the move launches with the Book of Creation.

The Book of Creation placed in the Light Divinity Temple is actually brought out by the 3 archangels this time, and it can still exert such power! If we hadn’t resolved the grievances between the 2 sides at the Golden Estate in time, it would have been me who faced this super big move. Chen Rui was secretly vigilant. Never underestimate any opponent, especially 3 archangels, a powerhouse who had experienced the Twilight of the Gods.

The ‘flower’ bloomed layer by layer, and it didn’t seem to have any special power. However, under the faint brilliance, there was a trace of smoke from Quilliana’s body as if it was rapidly decomposing under some kind of burning. Her momentum suddenly weakened.

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up. Creation and destruction are originally the extremes of mutual generation and mutual restraint. The creation origin is the greatest nemesis of the Abyss’ destruction power, especially an ancient treasure like the Book of Creation!

No wonder Michael seemed confident when he took the initiative to challenge before. It turns out that he has such a powerful move to defeat Quilliana!

Quilliana, who was suppressed step by step, suddenly showed a sneer, then the blood color of her right eye suddenly dimmed and the blue color of her left eye shone with a deep light. Her whole temperament suddenly changed completely. The power of creation could no longer restrain Quilliana as effective as before.

This is… creation origin power!

Chen Rui couldn’t believe it: Quilliana, who will destroy everything, actually possesses the origin power of creation!

The 3 archangels were also shocked. At this time, although the ‘flower’ became more lush and crystal clear, the damage to Quilliana was getting smaller and smaller.

Quilliana sneered while looking at Michael and the other 2 with mockery and contempt, “The extremes of things are born together, and the mysterious change of the universe is within a thought. How can you ants understand it? You use the power of the Book of Creation to impersonate god and steal faith for so many years, yet your power is still so insignificant. How disappointing. A subordinate is a subordinate after all. A dog that loses its master, no matter how glamorous it is, is just a lost dog… …”

While saying that, green marks suddenly appeared on Quilliana’s face as if she was affected by the creation power. A light ‘ click ’ sounded from the right pupil. As she let out a roar, the holy flower had numerous cracks. The cracks shone with a dark golden light.

The ‘flower’ only lasted for a few seconds before it shattered. The 3 figures fell to the ground, and their [Armor of Faith] shattered.

With another whip, the [Oracle Formation] completely collapsed, and the 3 archangels were seriously injured.

The moment Michael and the others were defeated, everything slowed down.

“[Slow As Forest]!”

Chen Rui made a move.

Before the [Oracle Formation] was formed, Michael’s glare at Chen Rui was actually a secret signal. Michael was not a hot-headed fool who would start an internal fight in the face of an enemy like Quilliana. Before coming, the 5 of them had discussed the tactics against the 3 rulers of the Abyss. With 3 archangels to divert Quilliana’s firepower and attention, Chen Rui, who had the strongest single-target attack power, would launch the fatal strike.

Michael’s glance was actually just an ‘insurance’ just in case. In his opinion, with the Book of Creation in hand, he should be able to defeat Quilliana. Who knew that ‘just in case’ still appeared. Quilliana actually converted the creation power and defeated 3 of them.

Although Quilliana succeeded in 1 blow, her old injury was obviously affected by some kind of injury. Now before the exhausted force was recharged, Chen Rui decisively chose to attack.

Chen Rui activated time might. Just now, the 3 archangels had tested Quilliana’s extremely terrifying combat power. Facing such a powerful enemy, the strongest power must be activated.

The fusion of [All Star Gods View] took a certain amount of time. For Quilliana, this time was enough to regenerate power and suppress injuries, so the purpose of [Slow As Forest] was to preempt the opportunity.

Time only slowed down briefly before it returned normal. It was obviously unable to last under Quilliana’s terrifying oppression.

The effect of [Slow As Forest] was much shorter than expected. Chen Rui was taken aback, because [All Star Gods View] hadn’t fully merged, but it had to be launched now.

Quilliana didn’t attack Chen Rui immediately, because there were 6-color lights around her.

The 6-color light merged into 1 place in the blink of an eye, like a rainbow returning to a prism before they became colorless again. The power of this fusion burst out the multiplied damage.

[Element’s Fury]!

Zola’s attack was well-timed.

Quilliana’s dark golden long whip flicked, and her hair turned into a circle to protect her body. In the blink of an eye, her body was already swallowed up by [Element’s Fury]. The terrifying explosion made the entire Jade Forest Sea tremble violently. Everything nearby was turned into nothingness.

The 3 archangels and Chen Rui did not receive too much impact. With such power and control, even the 3 archangels could not help being shocked. Even Raphael had to admit that, in terms of power alone, the power of this blow was on top of his own [Holy Spirit Requiem].

However, everyone could still sense that Quilliana in the center of the explosion remained unmoved. There was not even a single crack on the ground in the area surrounded by the whip shadow.

However, taking advantage of this opportunity, Chen Rui basically completed the fusion of [All Star Gods View]. He turned into a purple shooting star and rushed straight toward Quilliana.

Quilliana endured the power of the Book of Creation and [Element’s Fury] one after another, and more importantly, the injury caused by the Moonlight Cloud Sea Bow earlier broke out. As the long whip’s power was exhausted, she was no longer able to stop the purple shooting star.

When it was unavoidable, Quilliana crossed her arms and took a defensive posture.

In the next second, the whole world shook for a moment, and then became quiet. The remaining momentum of [Element’s Fury] was completely suppressed by this great ‘quietness’.

The eyes of the 4 people were fixed on the 2 people in the center.

A layer of purple starlight was formed on Quilliana’s body. She seemed to be imprisoned in some kind of crystal condensed by stars. After several attempts, she couldn’t break through the power of starlight. Instead, the star power restraint was more and more tight.

This was not a simple fusion power of the [All Star Gods View], but the result of Chen Rui’s continuous training during this period. The profound meaning of the ‘seal’ of the Star Conferring Platform!

Originally, it could only be activated inside the Super System which once imprisoned Python, but now after integrating the power of [All Star Gods View], it could be activated directly. This was Chen Rui’s strongest move.

He successfully sealed Quilliana!

Seeing that the struggle was getting weaker and weaker, Quilliana’s right eye suddenly shot out a strong blood light, and the purple crystal was reflected by the blood light into crimson red. Quilliana’s skin began to turn blood red, showing traces of golden patterns. Her body shape also changed slightly as sharp bone spurs appeared on both shoulders and a tail appeared behind her.

The purple crystal couldn’t withstand such pressure. A crack appeared and spread on the surface, then it completely shattered with a ‘ bang ’.

Chen Rui on the opposite side was blown away. The star armor on his body was cracked, and blood overflowed from his mouth. After the transformation, Quilliana shook off the scattered stardust on the whip, showing a grim smile.

The 3 archangels and Zola were so intimidated by the power that they could hardly move. Their eyes were full of horror. She is too strong!

chapters.title: Chapter 1224: That Arrow
chapters.body:
Chapter 1224: That Arrow

“I remember you, because the first time I met you, you sealed my avatar with a power similar to the Kingdom of God. That kind of vast faith and life is by no means comparable to these ants.” As Quilliana said this, her gaze glanced contemptuously at the 3 archangels.

“Your kingdom is quite special. It actually has a real rudiment of the real authority… No, maybe it’s not just authority. The power you launched just now directly hurt my origin. The strange thing is that you are not a god, and I can’t feel any God’s bloodline. I didn’t expect there to be such a special existence like you in this dead main plane. If your strength grows, you will be my biggest threat. Therefore, you must die!”

Quilliana’s voice became more and more cold. On the blood-colored skin, the dark gold patterns exuded an incomparably frightening brilliance.

At this time, Chen Rui’s image became blurred as if blocked by layers of glasses. The structure of the glass was very mysterious, which could reflect and refract various attacks. These ‘glasses’ quickly extended to the entire world, turning into a huge maze.

“The element’s source power is very exquisite. I can even see a trace of the authority power of the elements, but it is a pity that it is still vulnerable to absolute power. I don’t need to bother to crack this kind of maze. Just a whip…” When Quilliana gently waved the whip in her hand, the ‘glass maze’ shattered instantly. Zola was blown away by the huge recoil. The path along the way was full of blood.

“The only enemy worthy of confrontation, I will bestow on you the most glorious death.” Quilliana’s sharp claws slowly stretched out to Chen Rui who barely got up. With just this mid-air movement, the terrifying breath made everyone feel intense suffocation.

Chen Rui clearly felt that ‘death’ was approaching, and he couldn’t avoid it. He couldn’t even think of running away. During his growth, it was not the first time he felt this feeling of absolute suppression, but it might well be the last time.

The gap in strength was too great. Chen Rui, Zola plus the 3 archangels together couldn’t shake her. In this age where the Gods slumbered. Quilliana was a well-deserved top powerhouse, a truly invincible existence.

There was an item in Chen Rui’s hand. A card, ‘King of Darkness’.

The ‘key’ was composed of 7 artifacts.

This key could summon the ‘eye’ that made the Gods fall. However, Chen Rui also remembered the moment when Alucier fell, a rhombus ‘eye’ opened in the sky. Are the 2 related?

Will something unpredictable happen if I use this card against Quilliana?

Lucifer said it when he entered the King of Darkness. There is only one chance to use the supreme key, and—”not only must you have the awareness of self-destruction, but you must also have the courage to bear the destruction of all things.”

‘Self-destruction’ can be understood as using life as the medium, and ‘destruction of all things’ is the destruction of the entire world?

While Chen Rui was hesitating, Gabriel’s voice sounded, “Don’t use that!”

When Lucifer was annihilated. Gabriel was also present. Others might not understand what this card was, but Gabriel knew everything. Perhaps she understood more than Chen Rui about

this card or the supreme key.

However, Chen Rui already knew about Gabriel’s feelings for Lucifer. Is she stopping me because of her own emotion or the card itself?

Quilliana frowned. Gabriel, who was rushing forward, was sent flying again and fell to the ground.

Quilliana ignored Gabriel. Her eyes glanced at the ‘King of Darkness’ in Chen Rui’s hand. There was some doubt in her bloody eyes, but her claws slowly closed in the distance.

The surrounding space trembled under the terrifying squeeze. The star armor on Chen Rui’s body couldn’t bear such a huge pressure, and his hand holding the cards couldn’t help but tighten.

Golden Estate.

The original battlefield had been cleaned up. The Demon Coalition Army had returned to the Demon Realm, and the captives from the previous battle in the Demon Realm and the corpses of the Human Coalition Army had been returned.

Although these corpses would inevitably cause grief and hatred, this war with the Demon Realm could no longer be continued.

Although the 2 sides in the first battle in the plains were just a ‘test’, the demons had already demonstrated a strong strength, which was still above expectations. Whichever side won was a miserable victory as there would only be more casualties.

The most surprising thing was the strength of the Demon Realm super powerhouse, the Prince Consort ‘Aguile’ of the 3 empresses of the Demon Realm could actually fight against the strongest 3 archangels by himself! And this legendary prince consort also had a staggering identity, the Dragon Bright Empire’s Third Prince ‘Arthur’!

These were not the most important, but the Human Coalition Army had received shocking news.

A large number of monsters had appeared in the Nightmare Wilderness. the Iron Gate Empire had been destroyed. From the king to the civilians, no one was spared.

This was no ordinary occupation, but outrageous total destruction!

It seemed that with this common dangerous enemy emergence, the 3 archangels and ‘Aguile’ turned enemies into friends, ordered to cease the war, and joined hands to the Nightmare Wilderness.

The Human Coalition Army remained on alert at the Golden Estate, and the Demon Coalition Army also didn’t disband. They were on standby at the Blood Claw Estate. Both sides were watching and looking forward to the outcome of the battle in the Nightmare Wilderness.

However, everyone didn’t know that the decisive battle was not at the Nightmare Wilderness, but the Silver Moon Celestial Capital.

Quilliana’s terrifying power suddenly stagnated as if blocked by something. It was an intangible force field. Although the range was only a few meters, it shrouded Chen Rui in it. Quilliana couldn’t break through the force field.

This was Holy Light Robe’s [Absolute Barrier] – Create a protective force field with a diameter of 5 meters, which could protect against attacks of any form or intensity without being able to move. It lasts for 10 seconds and can be used once every 24 hours.

Although unable to move, 10 seconds was especially precious in this case. Chen Rui gained precious time to charge [All Star Gods View].

In the hands of Chen Rui, the ‘King of Darkness’ had disappeared, leaving only the bright starlight. The light of [All Star Gods View] shone again, far more dazzling than before.

The previous blow was only merged to his limit, which was about 80% of the power of [All Star Gods View]. What he wanted to try now was 100%, which was an extremely dangerous attempt.

In the battle of the elemental world, he once surpassed the limit to merge the [All Star Gods View] power and he was almost annihilated. Fortunately, Lucifer’s activated a secret technique in time, absorbed his star power, and ‘confront’ the Elemental Goddess.

Now, the sealed Lucifer would not appear again. Even if he appeared, he might not be able to absorb such a huge force.

10 seconds passed in an instant, and there was a tearing sound from Chen Rui’s body. After the Holy Light Robe fused into the star armor completed its mission, it was torn apart under Quilliana’s power.

1 of the 3 holy relics produced by the Creation Vessel, Holy Light Robe: Destroyed.

Chen Rui couldn’t care about that much anymore. He hadn’t completed the fusion yet, but he didn’t retreat. The fist containing the power of the [All Star Gods View] was launched toward the sharp claw. He did not activate [Star Diversion] nor [Mirror Body]. That kind of short-term dodge or resistance would only reduce the determination in his mind.

His purpose was only one, to use the power of Quilliana to compress the power of the [All Star Gods View]. Either make or break.

He really didn’t have the determination yet to destroy everything and every living being.

However, he had the preparation to destroy himself.

Sacrifice his life to protect what he treasured.

Chen Rui’s fist had already hit that claw. Under the pressure of terrifying, he felt that the bones of his hand, the bones of his whole body, and even his flesh and soul were about to shatter, but the determination in his eyes became stronger and stronger. Just now, Quilliana herself had said, [All Star Gods View] could hurt her origin. This blow, even if there was a 0.0001% chance of winning, he would never back down.

Chen Rui’s golden pupils had already turned into shining purple. He was becoming more and more dazzling like a stellar. Even Quilliana couldn’t help squinting her eyes under the brilliance. This might be the last sparkle of life.

Crack…

Cracks appeared on the ground under Quilliana’s feet. The ground that did not break even when facing [Light of Cleansing Sin] and [Element’s Fury].

Chen Rui clearly felt that his body and soul were starting to burn wildly. His life might be exhausted at any time, but he still only had that faith in his mind, to move forward.

At this moment, Zola, who was about to risk her life to attack Quilliana, suddenly sensed something. A nebula shone from her body, which was the constellation.

The Fairy Dragon looked at Chen Rui who was shining like the sun, flickered her body without thinking, and actually merged into the starlight of [All Star Gods View]. Chen Rui felt that his blurred mind suddenly became clear again, and his strength also increased by almost double. Quilliana finally moved her feet. She took a step back, and immediately left a deep footprint on the ground. Then, the second step…

The 3 archangels watched in surprise as Quilliana slowly retreated step by step under the dazzling light.

“Damn it!” Quilliana couldn’t imagine that this dying guy could burst out with such astonishing power. As she shouted angrily, her right eye burned. Her figure changed again. Sharp bone spurs protruded from her shoulders and arms, and a tail appeared behind her. Her blood-colored robe instantly turned into dark golden armor.

As soon as she transformed, she stopped retreating. The starlight also began to dim rapidly.

However, at this time, the green seal on Quilliana’s face reappeared. The crack in the blood red pupil of her right eye spread more and more.

Quilliana let out a scream as she covered her right eye. Without the slightest hesitation, she turned into a stream of bloody light and fled toward the distance. It was not that she didn’t want to kill this enemy, but because the internal injury caused by the Moonlight Cloud Sea had far exceeded her imagination. If she continued to fight in this form, her right eye would be in danger of collapsing!

This is by no means simply the power of the Moonlight Cloud Sea!

Wait, that arrow!

The arrow that turned into a green branch!

It is exactly the same as the force that induced me to descend early!

It turned out that the ‘advance birth’ was not as simple as she imagined, but it was a special ‘existence’ imprinted on her. Meanwhile, that arrow made the imprint completely explode, causing an unexpected hidden injury!

Damn elf! Damn Alucier!

I must dispel this hidden injury as soon as possible, then I will destroy everything again!

Especially the enemy with star power just now!

chapters.title: Chapter 1225: Argument And Alliance
chapters.body:
Chapter 1225: Argument And Alliance

Watching the bloody light disappear, everyone heaved a sigh of relief. Although they didn’t know the specific circumstances of Quilliana’s injury, in any case, everyone escaped the calamity.

The starlight on Chen Rui’s body gradually dimmed. The moment it went out, the star armor were shattered, revealing terrible wounds all over his body. His injuries were far more serious than it looked on the surface. The bones of his right arm were basically broken, and the ankle of his left leg was also broken. He could barely stand. His soul was unprecedentedly weaker than ever. The fairy dragon in his left arm was already unconscious.

Chen Rui didn’t understand why Zola was able to merge with [All Star Gods View]. He only knew that if the fairy dragon hadn’t done so by risking her life just now, he would have been annihilated before Quilliana escaped.

The injuries of the 3 archangels were also serious, especially Gabriel. After the collapse of [Oracle Formation], she suffered another heavy blow from Quilliana, so it would be difficult to recover for a while.

The Crown of Thorns, 1 of the 3 holy relics, appeared on Chen Rui’s head, and he activated [Divine Healing]. Now the 3 archangels were all allies fighting side by side, so the 3 were not excluded. Both Michael and Raphael had light-element physiques. Although Gabriel had no light attribute, as the oracle of Light God for many years, she could also absorb the power of light element very well. Under the wonderful effect of [Divine Healing], the grave injuries of the 3 archangels soon stabilized.

However, Zola still hadn’t woken up. Fortunately, from the perspective of life breath, there should be no serious problems.

Chen Rui’s body and soul were severely injured this time. [Divine Healing] only healed the surface, and it was far from enough, so he had to rest for a long time to recover.

“Guys.” Chen Rui took back the Crown of Thorns as he spoke up, “Today’s battle can only be described as ‘lucky’. We seriously lacked in the estimation of Quilliana’s strength. If she hadn’t received a certain kind of injury and escaped because of the outbreak of the injury, I’m afraid we will not be spared today.”

“Quilliana’s strength is indeed beyond imagination, and we can’t pin our hopes on her injury.” Michael spoke first. Although he was still quite wary of Chen Rui, he had to admit it. In the previous battle, this person was the most threatening existence to Quilliana. Even Quilliana herself called him ‘the only enemy worth facing’.

“Unexpectedly, even the Book of Creation can’t deal with Quilliana.” Gabriel sighed.

“Why can’t I use ‘that thing’?” Chen Rui asked the biggest question in his mind.

Gabriel was silent for a moment before she asked back, “Are you ready to use it?”

Chen Rui slightly pondered and shook his head.

Michael and Raphael didn’t understand what ‘that thing’ was. When Gabriel said a few words softly, the 2 archangels were startled. Raphael blurted out, “You can’t use it!”

“Why?” Raphael’s attitude made Chen Rui want to figure out the inside story even more.

“Taboo.” Gabriel explained, “Restricted by certain taboos, we cannot describe related things. If we break the taboo, we will pay the price of our lives. Therefore, the secrets can only be explored by yourself. As ‘he’ said, if you’re not prepared accordingly, don’t use that thing. Better never use it.”

Chen Rui witnessed with his own eyes that the Earth Elemental King Moore was annihilated because he uttered the secret of the elemental world, so he understood that Gabriel’s words were not excuses.

Michael thought for a long time, and he spoke up, “I can only answer you in this way. When facing Quilliana, we may still have a glimmer of hope if we don’t use it; once we use it, we don’t even have a glimmer of hope.”

Chen Rui was savoring the meaning of Michael’s words, only to hear Raphael say, “The most important thing now is how to stop the power of the Abyss. Quilliana retreats temporarily. However, those Abyss creatures will not stop.”

Chen Rui frowned and said, “I only saw Quilliana today, but not Sosbach and Dillosro. If these 2 make moves, how can we stop them?”

“Judging from the current intel, they have never appeared. If my guess is correct, Sosbach and Dillosro are probably not fully awakened or they are in a weak state.” Michael said, “So, the Abyss creatures will continue to attack. Their destruction can bring Sosbach and Dillosro back to life step by step.”

“You mean, the Abyss rulers can gain power through the Abyss creatures’ destruction of life?” Chen Rui showed a stunned expression.

Gabriel added, “Yes, the Abyss creatures actually use destruction power to devour faith and life by killing living beings. A considerable part of the power gained by this devour will be automatically fed back to the rulers. Furthermore, the resulting negative emotions such as fear and despair will further replenish and increase the power of the rulers. If the Abyss rulers directly destroy the creatures, there will be no such effect. For example, Quilliana cannot get corresponding supplements for the destruction of the Silver Moon Celestial Capital today. The purpose of her coming here should be to take away the whip.”

“ Hmph ! That whip must be the bane left over from the rebellion of the elf tribe 20,000 years ago. If the elf tribe had been destroyed back then, there wouldn’t be such a situation today! Alucier should be fully responsible!” Raphael said dissatisfied.

Chen Rui once experienced the mirror world set up by Alucier. He always felt that the methods of the elf prophet were definitely not that simple. Especially with Quilliana’s strength, he couldn’t think of anyone who could make her suffer such a hidden injury. It might have something to do with Alucier too.

It was a pity that Alucier was already dead. Perhaps no one would know about the various tricks he set up during his lifetime.

“The best strategy right now is to ambush the Nightmare Wilderness. while Quilliana is injured and Dillosro and Sosbach are not fully awake, we directly defeat the foundation of the Abyss.” Gabriel paused and sighed, “Unfortunately, we are all seriously injured now and we can’t fight. Even if we count Satan, Raguel, and the others, we are definitely not Quilliana’s opponents.”

Chen Rui was also regretful. Now is indeed the time when the Abyss is weakest, but this ‘weakness’ is relative. The Nightmare Wilderness is the base camp of the Abyss. Not only Quilliana is there, but also Dillosro, Sosbach and the endless Abyss creatures. If we go there rashly, we will die in vain.

In the face of absolute power, tricks are basically useless. If we want to truly defeat the Abyss, we must possess the strength to compete with the 3 rulers of Abyss. Unfortunately, as Gabriel said, even if all the Pseudo-Gods in the 2 worlds combined, we are not Quilliana’s opponent.

Chen Rui thought for a while and said, “The first thing we need to consider now is to organize military forces to resist the Abyss creatures and prevent them from destroying the human world. This will cut off the source of power of the 3 rulers of Abyss and delay the recovery of the 3 rulers. I’ll go back to the Demon Realm to recuperate, then I will try… to see if I can make a further breakthrough in strength.”

Hearing ‘further breakthrough in strength’, Michael’s eyes narrowed while Raphael said coldly, “There is an easier way to cut off the source of power of the 3 rulers. That is, before the Abyss makes a move, we first destroy the ‘source of strength’.”

Chen Rui was startled. His eyes filled with chilling threat stared at Raphael, “You want to be the fourth Abyss ruler?”

Raphael sneered without showing any weakness, “Don’t be hypocritical. Yours is not kindness, but cowardice! To deal with an enemy like the Abyss, we must use all means.”

“If this is the case, then I am already prepared to use the supreme key.”

Michael frowned and said, “Okay, stop arguing. This is not a good idea. Quilliana has descended now, and everyone has experienced her strength just now. Even if we really kill all the humans or demons, we still can’t defeat Quilliana. Besides, losing believers is equivalent to ruining our further possibility, then how can we fight against the Abyss?”

Gabriel also said, “We must unite the power of the Demon Realm and the human world, including those with super-level powerhouses, to fight the Abyss together.”

Raphael looked at Gabriel and Michael, but he didn’t say anything more.

Chen Rui ignored Raphael and nodded, “The place where the Abyss descended is in the Nightmare Wilderness, so their goal must be expanding with the Nightmare Wilderness as the center. The destruction of the Iron Gate Empire is just the beginning. The top priority now is to quickly provide reinforcement to the Blue Glory Empire. At the same time, the civilians without combat power should be relocated to a safe place in advance. If the war is really urgent, the Demon Realm can be considered for this relocation place.”

Move humans to the Demon Realm? This proposal made the 3 archangels startled at the same time. Gabriel spoke up, “Hope the situation won’t be so bad…”

The 2 sides basically reached a consensus that the 2 worlds would join forces. The ground troops quickly mobilized to the Blue Glory Empire for reinforcements. Chen Rui took Zola back to the Demon Realm to recuperate. The 3 archangels reconvened the super powerhouses of the 2 worlds to fight against powerful enemies.

The Demon Realm and the human world turned from enemies into friends. The news of the alliance spread to the Golden Estate and even the entire human world. Almost everyone was shocked. A few days ago, they were fighting to the death with the Demon Coalition Army, and today they were about to join forces! The most shocking thing was actually not the alliance itself, but a shocking sign reflected from this alliance—— The 3 archangels could not eliminate those monsters! That’s why we are forced to form an alliance with the Demon Realm!

The elf tribe suffered the most casualties because the elves had already received the bad news that the Silver Moon Celestial Capital was destroyed. Even Empress Liv and all the remaining elves died!

All the elves were inexplicably sad. Little Princess Michelle even fainted from crying. The new elf prophet Kilanya understood why her father Alucier insisted on entrusting the Tree of Nature to Chen Rui, an outsider, and not allowing him to return it as scheduled. He also left a letter to the empress, suggesting sending all elites to the Human Coalition Army. It turned out that he had foreseen the destruction of the Silver Moon Celestial Capital a long time ago!

At this time, in the magic game between the human world and the Demon Realm, an important announcement was released at the same time. This announcement also automatically appeared in the text messages of each magic phone — This time the monster attacking the human world came from another world. They are the common enemies of all races. Their prototypes and habits were similar to monsters in dungeons or siege events in the magic games. The army could consider targeted strategies and tactics. The monsters were not only powerful and their numbers were astonishing, wherever they pass by, no one was spared. There was no chance of surrender. If one wanted to survive, he could only resist with all his strength!

chapters.title: Chapter 1226: I Have A Dream
chapters.body:
Chapter 1226: I Have A Dream

The Human Coalition Army stationed in the Golden Estate began emergency dispatch, moving eastward in batches to the Blue Glory Empire for reinforcements. Many neighboring empires near the Blue Glory Empire were in chaos as citizens migrated westward.

The people’s nerves were already tense because of the battle with the Demon Realm. After seeing the announcements in the magic game and magic phone, the nerves almost erupted because an enemy more terrifying than the Demon Realm appeared. This enemy was so powerful that it destroyed the Iron Gate Empire and the Silver Moon Celestial Capital of the elf tribe. Even the strongest Holy Church, the 3 archangels, could not win. In this critical situation, humans were forced to join forces with demons who were enemies before.

However, the Human Coalition Army quickly mobilized, but the ‘temporary’ reinforcements from the demons never showed up, which made many people suspicious. Are the demons trying to take the opportunity to attack with the monster from both sides and completely exterminate humans?

In fact, this was nothing more than an unfounded delusion. The real reason was that the Demon Realm was currently in a violent commotion.

The cause of this commotion was not only because of the ‘monsters’ that appeared in the human world, but also because of the mindblowing news from the Demon Coalition Army, which was the identity of the 3 empires’ Prince Consort ‘Aguile’.

Aguile, is a human.

The only husband of the 3 empresses of the Demon Realm, the uncrowned king of the Demon Realm, is actually a human!

This turmoil quickly spread to all parts of the Demon Realm, and protests erupted everywhere. Many soldiers even refused to join the army supporting the human world. If it weren’t for the thorough rule of the 3 empresses, there were already riots.

No matter what contribution ‘Aguile’ has made to the Demon Realm, no matter whether he is manipulating the Demon Realm or not, he is a human after all!

The empress of the 3 empires received the joint advice of the ministers, requesting Her Majesty Empress to ‘divorce’ the prince consort and announce it to the world. However, the 3 Royal Majesty Empresses had remained silent. They had not issued any statement to explain this. Until one day, the magic television played a movie.

This movie was screened simultaneously on all channels of the Demon Realm, and there was also a live broadcast in the magic game.

To be precise, this was a documentary filmed from a third-person perspective.

The content of the documentary could be said to be a personal biography.

The first scene was a desolate and barren estate. If one didn’t see the stele of the estate, it was almost unimaginable that it was the most prosperous and largest estate in the Demon Realm, Dark Moon Estate. The protagonist of the documentary was not the well-known Empress Shea, but a blond-haired and golden-eyed human, the famous human financial officer, Chen Rui.

The blond-haired human slowly put on a mask.

Next, many representative characters were fleeting in front of the camera, the former the Fallen Angel Empire top genius potioneer Sandro, the former financial officer Joseph of the Dark Moon, the top swordswoman Athena, the Dark Moon Princess Royal Shea, Little Princess Alice…

There was no redundant narration, only light music, which made people immerse themselves in the story involuntarily.

The increase of characters and buildings in Dark Moon Estate reflected the change of the entire Dark Moon Estate from dilapidated to gradually prosperous.

The indifferent music gradually became passionate. Then, a magician hidden in the darkness appeared and bowed to the masked human. The scene of war appeared immediately. The coalition army of Lord Josh of Red Spirit Estate, the former Regent Obsidian of the Fallen Angel Empire…

The war scene was only a dozen seconds long, but the scene was quite grand. The shooting angles were constantly changing: The duel in the battle formation, close-up combats… The most eye-catching was the undead legion of the Dark Moon. The commander of the legion was the magician.

The dynamic image gradually froze. Subsequently, there was a scene where Shea held up the Sword of Fallen Angel and all the troops surrendered. Beside Shea was the bloody man in a cloak with a head in his hand, the head of Regent Obsidian.

This was the process of the Fallen Angel Empire Empress Shea ‘counterattacking’ Regent Obsidian and pacifying the Fallen Angel Empire. The man in a cloak who had always been with the empress was ‘Aguile’, that was, the rumored dead Chen Rui!

As everyone knew, the human Chen Rui, who was known as the first famous minister of internal affairs, was the most critical figure in the prosperity of the Dark Moon Estate and even the entire Fallen Angel Empire. However, from the current point of view, not only internal affairs, this inconspicuous human also dominated the entire war.

The music slowly transitioned from passionate to simple and solemn. In the picture, the masked man put a crown on Shea, and Shea sat on the throne, declaring that this Princess Royal had truly ascended the throne as an empress. At the same time, the image switched to the Fallen Angel Capital, the development and prosperity of various estates, and the alliance with the Dark Shadow Empire.

The captivating music then became heavy as a large map appeared on the image. In the map, countless densely packed troops gathered toward a base. The label of the place name was the Warlock Fortress.

The base was magnified. There was a fierce fortress defense battle scene. Then, the former Bloody Empire Emperor Raizen appeared. The masked man fought to the death to protect Shea. Fortunately, the Dark Shadow Empire Catherine came and finally repelled Raizen.

Afterward, the 3 parties began to negotiate. The masked man pointed to the map of the 3 empires and made a joint gesture, but Raizen shook his head resolutely, raised his fist, and pointed to the Iron Fist Estate of the Bloody Empire.

The audience all understood that after the battle of the Warlock Fortress, Chen Rui proposed the idea of 3 empires’ alliance, but he was rejected by Raizen. Raizen’s proposal was to hold the Demon Realm’s first martial battle competition in the Iron Fist Estate after 2 years.

Amidst the gentle and elegant music, the wedding scene of the Fallen Angel Empire empress appeared. The slender hands with the white gloves were put into the palm protruding from the cloak, and the whole empire was celebrating. The picture showed a close-up of Shea. In Her Majesty Empress’ purple eyes that were as indifferent as ice, showing rare tenderness. The beauty displayed at this moment almost made everyone fall for her.

During the period, various scenes were interspersed. People read newspapers, enjoy magic television, drink aromatic millet wine, watch battle ball matches, wear the magic game helmet, and so forth. These things that had become so popular today were all ‘invented’ by Chen Rui.

The picture and music changed again, from festive to panic as people crowded at the entrance of the magic bank. Their facial expressions seemed anxious. The goods in the store were looted, and the streets were full of patrolling soldiers. This scene was still fresh in the memory of many people. It was the sudden outbreak of the economic crisis at that time.

The picture of the economic crisis faded away, and it switched to the Fallen Angel Empire, where the military parade ceremony was being held.

At the military parade ceremony, people not only saw new weapons such as magic guns, but they also saw powerful ancient guardians that had never been heard of before. Behind these guardians was the figure wearing a cloak and a mask.

The image changed again. The scene was the first martial battle competition of the Bloody Empire.

In front of the man in a cloak, the opponents were knocked down one by one. The most intense battle was in the semi-finals with the ‘little girl’ Lalaria who easily defeated Raizen the Great. In the end, the man in a cloak won.

The opponent in the final was the Dark Shadow Empire Empress Catherine. The 2 confronted each other, and the soundtrack became sad. The man in a cloak seemed to be talking, but Catherine just looked at him quietly and said 3 words.

Although there was no sound, it could be distinguished from Catherine’s mouth shape: It’s worth it.

The people of the Dark Shadow Empire still remembered these 3 words.

The man in a cloak slowly took off the mask, and it was another strange face. Now everyone understood that this face was not the real face, so it was the answer that ‘Aguile’ gave to Catherine.

Then Catherine and Chen Rui held hands, and between them was a cute little girl. The brisk and soft music made the audience feel warm and blissful.

Following the warmth and bliss was peace and tranquility. The 3 empires signed a formal alliance contract, but it was not over as there was an unexpected scene. In a sunny place, a woman was imprisoned. Beside her were 2 angels: 1 with 8 wings and the other with 12 wings. The man in a cloak distracted the 12-winged angel, defeated the 8-winged angel, and rescued the woman. As the camera zoomed in, the people of the Bloody Empire immediately recognized the woman, the current Bloody Empire ruler, Tiffany!

When the man stretched out his hand, Tiffany hesitated for a moment, and she finally put her hand in his palm slowly. This was a featured story. Not only Tiffany, the 2 empresses just now also had similar feature stories.

Although this scene was short, the story between Empress Tiffany and Chen Rui could be seen. Meanwhile, defeating the legendary angel also showed Chen Rui’s incomparable strength.

It was said that the Demon Coalition Army who returned from the Golden Estate battlefield described that what they saw with their own eyes was that ‘Aguile’ fought against 3 12-winged angels with his own strength. Rumor had it that those 3 12-winged angels were the 3 archangels who were the strongest in the human world and the closest to God!

So, Chen Rui is the real top powerhouse of the two worlds!

Finally came the ending, the marriage of the 2 empresses and Chen Rui brought the Demon Realm into a truly prosperous and peaceful era.

In the last scene of the film, Chen Rui stood on a high platform, staring into the distance. Below was an endless army of ancient guardians. Then, this scene gradually faded away. In the end, the deep eyes stagnated, and all the images disappeared. The entire documentary ended.

The scene at the end, including the faded body and the deep gaze, gave countless people a strong sense of familiarity. This was the opening title of the magic game the ‘Infinite Warrior OL’. It contained an advertisement that people didn’t know.

——True courage is not conquering, but protecting.

There was not a single narration in the whole documentary, but the subtext of the final scene ‘protecting’ had explained many things.

After the documentary was broadcast, the dissenting voices of the Demon Realm suddenly subsided. People had personally experienced this journey from turmoil to peace. The documentary was playing real facts without overstating.

No one could deny that Chen Rui, the human named ‘Aguile’, had played an irreplaceable key role for the Demon Realm was where it was today. He single-handedly created an unprecedented peaceful and prosperous world. All the people were the beneficiaries.

Most of the emotional stories between him and the 3 empresses were just briefly played, but it was obvious that the 3 empresses and him were not only a relationship of interests, but also partners who helped each other in times of trouble.

More importantly, strength.

Chen Rui himself was the strongest powerhouse in the 2 realms. He also had countless powerful ancient guards at hand, and almost no force or individual could match him

“He has strength and wisdom beyond imagination. If he wants to, he can easily destroy the entire Demon Realm without force. There is no doubt about it. Everyone should remember the bank currency crisis back then.” This was quoted from Empress Shea in an interview with the Empire Channel.

Catherine the Great said, “Although he contributed to the confederation, he never really ‘manipulated’ the confederation. He eliminated the war of the Demon Realm, brought peace and development, and this prosperity will continue forever. This is his promise to me, and he has interpreted this promise with actions. The past, present, and future will still remain unchanged.”

“The Demon Realm is his home.” Emperor Tiffany’s words were the most concise.

Chen Rui’s 3 sentences were published in all the newspapers the next day.

I have a dream, which is to let the people of this land stay far from barrenness and war.

I have a dream, which is to protect this home forever, to protect the people I love forever.

I have a dream, which we don’t have to hate each other, we don’t have to conquer each other, because what we have and what we protect, is beyond what can be obtained by conquest…
