chapters.title: Chapter 1227: Burning Fortress
chapters.body:
Chapter 1227: Burning Fortress

‘I Have A Dream’ was actually just a dream. It might touch some people, but in this real world where power was paramount, a dream was a dream. Although it was magnificent and moving, it was a bubble that would burst at the touch. However, some things were real, and not bubbles.

The entire documentary, including the empresses’ speech later, was actually implicitly emphasizing a fact.

The Demon Realm was under the control of this human.

No matter how touching the documentary, no matter how touching the text of ‘I Have A Dream’, it was actually just a step for the Demon Realm to accept and agree.

It was just a step.

At the same time ‘I Have A Dream’ was released, a huge fortress appeared above the Blood Claw Estate of the Bloody Empire, and an army of ‘ancient guardians’ came out of the fortress continuously. The destination of these armies was the ‘door’. There was no doubt that it was the reinforcements sent to the human world.

The ferocious crystal beast, the graceful lamp spirits, the well-coordinated assembled puppets, the behemoth giant crystal beast and the titans…

Not to mention anything else, the number of the assemble puppet legion alone reached about 20,000. When the Demon Coalition Army fought against the Human Coalition Army, they dispatched thousands of assemble puppets, which shocked everyone, but the amount of assemble puppets in front of them was 20 times that of the Demon Coalition Army at that time!

If such ‘reinforcement’ was compared with the Demon Coalition Army, many people realized sadly that the Demon Coalition Army was not an opponent!

These troops are probably just the tip of the iceberg of what Chen Rui has at hand!

At the end of the ‘documentary’, those ancient legions stretching as far as the eye can see are by no means fabricated, but real existence!

It is not difficult for Chen Rui to conquer or exterminate the Demon Realm.

This is the real cruel reality.

From the beginning of the Dark Moon to the current alliance of the 3 empires, the entire Demon Realm has been firmly marked with Chen Rui’s imprint, which is indelible. This human has incomparably powerful influence and personal strength. Resistance is futile.

Those who go along with him will prosper while those who go against him perish.

That’s all.

Under the emotional influence and strength of deterrence, the commotion of the Demon Realm gradually subsided. The empires followed the requirements to carry out a series of defensive work with all their strength. The coalition army began to re-deploy, ready to support the human world, and actively follow with the order of the 3 empresses and… Royal Highness Prince Consort Chen Rui.

People in the human world didn’t know about the commotion that happened in the Demon Realm. What they were concerned about was another commotion.

Blue Glory Empire, Thorn Fortress.

On the city wall of the fortress, rows of soldiers held magic rifles and bows in their hands. More than a dozen magic crystal cannons were ready on the cannon tower, and the catapults behind had also been erected.

The soldiers were all focused on the front, showing nervous expressions.

A soldier looked down and felt that the rifle he was holding was trembling slightly. It was not trembling because of nervousness, but the whole ground around the fortress began to tremble slightly. Many people clenched their weapons tightly, feeling their own hearts tremble a little.

Even before the battle started, their gallbladders were already cold.

No wonder the soldiers behaved like this. Those monsters were so fierce and unstoppable. After the Iron Gate Empire fell, the Blue Glory Empire’s other 2 vassal states, Luo Pool Empire and Red Tassel Empire, were also quickly destroyed.

The footsteps of the monsters did not stop and advanced to the Blue Glory Empire. The 3 cities in front of the Thorn Fortress were razed to the ground almost overnight, turning into dead ruins.

Now, the Thorn Fortress would face these terrifying enemies. Could they hold on? Could they survive?

Everyone’s heart was tightly clenched.

The voice of the commander at the back sounded, “Brothers and soldiers, the Thorn Fortress is the last barrier for the Capital Fansidian. Faced with such danger, Her Majesty Landbis did not flee like many noble families did. Instead, she stood firm in the capital. Our Royal Majesty Empress, our parents, wives and children, and our friends are behind us, we must hold on till death!”

After saying these few words, the soldiers regained some morale.

Behind the soldiers, there was a row of men and women wearing various armors and holding weapons. They all looked dignified. These were the Holy Sanctuary powerhouses of the Blue Glory Empire. The lowest strength was at least Pseudo-Saint (Demon Emperor). There were 3 others who had reached the Kingdom level.

After the last ‘door’, the Holy Light Mountain summoned the super powerhouses again. The targets were main the super powerhouses of the human world, but in terms of the number, the responders were far less than the last ‘door’.

For the contract at the time of ‘door’, everyone just needed to stand by and watch. Originally, super powerhouses didn’t want to participate in the war between ordinary people, so they just took the advantage to stay out of it.

The summoning this time was obviously to fight against the sudden appearance of monsters. They heard that even the 3 archangels could not solve the problem by themselves. The war between the Demon Realm and the human world even stopped because of this. Human nature was selfish in this situation. Who wanted to be cannon fodder?

——The danger of the world destruction is nothing more than scaremongering. Doesn’t the Holy Church usually look down on the common people and control everything? You Holy Light Mountain has 3 Pseudo-God archangels, so how is it our’s turn, Kingdom or Demi-God, to save the world? We can just watch it unfold.

They thought this crisis didn’t matter to them. From this point of view, there was nothing wrong with it, but these people had underestimated the seriousness of this crisis… or the catastrophe. Without the foundation to live, even if they could survive with their strength, they couldn’t escape forever.

The shaking of the city wall became more and more intense. The whole earth trembled as if thousands of horses were galloping ahead.

Soon, a scarlet red river emerged in the distant sky. From a distance, it looked like a torrent. It was approaching quickly.

Endless monsters!

The suffocating pressure rushed to the face. The roaring sounds gathered together like an intangible sledgehammer hitting the heart. The mechanic sounds of the catapults behind had been sounded one after another. The ignited boulders were quickly ejected to the monster torrent, blooming in the dense group of monsters.

At the same time, the magic crystal cannons emitted the blazing whiteness of death. Circles of bursting light spread in the monster group. All the monsters within the affected range turned into nothingness.

If it were an ordinary army, no matter how brave they were, such casualties would definitely arouse some fear or shock in the minds of the soldiers. However, the monsters didn’t know what fear was at all, and their speed did not slow down at all. They still maintained the original terrifying rhythm while rushing forward.

Due to the need to cool down, the magic crystal cannons stopped after launching for a while. Only the catapults were still attacking. However, the power of the catapults was much lower. It could only attack a fixed range.

“Rifle team, open fire!” The commander gave an order, and the riflemen who had already aimed at the monsters fired one after another. In the front was a kind of thin little monster with pointed claws and an exaggerated mouth occupying half of the face. The 2 rows of protruding fangs looked particularly hideous.

In the hail of bullets, the little monsters fell to the ground one after another, but the soldiers found that the bodies of the seemingly small monsters were much tougher than expected. The magic guns did less damage to them than expected. Many little monsters only fell to the ground after being shot several times in a row. This kind of strength was at least peak stage of Warrior (Higher Demon) and even Master (Demon King)!

With such strength, even in an ordinary empire, they could become a small leader or commander of the army, but among these monsters, they were just the lowest level cannon fodders.

“Hold! Hold! Shoot their heads!” Shouted the commander, “Archers, fire! Magician team, get ready!”

In the magic game, this kind of monster was also the lowest level soldier in the dungeon. The latest version had revealed the name and special attribute of the dungeon monster.

This kind of little monster was called a gap demon. Sometimes it could become a mutated body with a huge body and a fireball; the weakest spot was the head.

Although the firepower of rifles and arrows was very fierce, killing many gap demons, the monsters were not just blindly charging. Rows of sharp things started to fly out of the torrent. They were so powerful that they directly penetrated the enchanted city wall. These were bone spurs.

“Be careful, it’s a berserk demon! Make sure to take cover!”

The berserk demons were more powerful than the gap demons, and they could shoot bone spurs from a long distance. Many archers and gunmen on the city wall were shot by the bone spurs and died on the spot; some even fell off the city wall.

The bone spur attacks became more and more intensive. The long-range soldiers at the top of the city couldn’t counterattack. As the firepower was greatly weakened, the torrent of monsters below was quickly approaching the fortress.

At this time, the magician team was finally ready. The moment the spell ended, countless flaming meteors fell from the sky. Whether it was gap demon or berserk demon, they were all annihilated under this [Meteor Rain]. Their offense was greatly weakened.

Just as the defending soldiers took a breath, dozens of figures appeared in the [Meteor Rain]. The flaming meteors all over the sky suddenly changed direction and flew toward the fortress instead.

The defending soldiers were all shocked, but these flaming meteors quickly disappeared. Rows of heavily armed people appeared on the city wall, exuding powerful breath. The Saint powerhouses of the Holy Sanctuary were dispatched!

In front were women wearing light golden armor, floating in the air, and holding a burning whip in her hand. It was this kind of whip that deflected the [Meteor Rain] back to the magician team.

Blazing flame witches!

Without the slightest hesitation, the Holy Sanctuary powerhouses all flew up and rushed toward the blazing flame witches in the air. Flames and lights crisscrossed. From time to time, someone fell from the air in a scream.

The monsters below were already close to the city wall. Without the need for siege or climbing equipment, the overlapping monsters spread directly toward the city wall one after another. Some jumped directly onto the city wall when they reached a certain height. Many defending soldiers were forced to switch from long-range attacks to melee combat. The number of Holy Sanctuary warriors fighting the blazing flame witches was also rapidly plummeting; the situation was becoming more and more precarious.

The blazing flame witches in the air suddenly stopped, and they all turned into ashes. A huge gap appeared in the torrent in front of the city wall. The gap spread rapidly, and the attacking monsters rolled back one after another— The Kingdom Level powerhouses finally made their moves.

The power of the super powerhouse no doubt was extraordinary. With a few attacks, the spreading kingdom power stopped the torrent of monsters and deleted them. The soldiers cheered one after another.

However, the 3 Kingdom powerhouses did not feel relaxed, because they could feel the stronger impact of the entire monster group. If there were only hundreds or thousands of monsters, they were confident to eliminate the monsters. However, these monsters were not hundreds, thousands, tens of thousands nor hundreds of thousands. It could only be described in a word, endless!

The 3 Kingdom powerhouses suddenly shook. They felt that the kingdom they had activated together was torn apart by some extremely sharp force, then they saw 2 figures appear at the forefront of the monster torrent.

Incomparably strong bodies with ferocious appearances. The pumped muscles seemed to have the texture of natural armor. There was a pair of bone wings on the back. It was holding greatswords in their hands.

The cheers on this side of the city wall fell silent. Rather than saying it was quiet, it was like they were choked by the suffocating atmosphere.

The source of all this was those 2 monsters with greatswords!

Abyss lords!

The monster torrent was surging again.

The 3 major kingdom powerhouses could no longer be distracted from attacking those ordinary monsters, because they had been firmly locked by the 2 Abyss lords. The 3 of them sensed the threat of death at the same time, and they looked at each other, “Fight!”

The 3 figures rushed toward the Abyss lords like lightning. 3 huge gaps were torn among the monster torrent as they passed. At the same time, the sword light lit up, waving a death trajectory.

The 3 gaps were quickly filled, then there was no more movement.

The bloody clouds in the sky reflected the burning fortress below.

chapters.title: Chapter 1228: Determination
chapters.body:
Chapter 1228: Determination

Demon Realm’s Dark Moon Estate.

Zola slowly opened her eyes, gradully regaining her vision.

“Yini?” The fairy dragon blinked her beautiful eyes vigorously, took the glasses from Isabella, and sat up from the bed, “How long have I been asleep?”

“More than 10 days.” Isabella poured a glass of water and handed it to Zola.

“Is he okay?” Zola still remembered desperately fighting Quilliana before losing consciousness.

“The bones in his right hand are all broken, and his left foot is also fractured…” Isabella looked at Zola’s tense look and smiled slightly, “But you know, that guy is an unbeatable cockroach. Now, most of his injuries have recovered. Besides, he will come to see you every day.”

“ Oh .” Zola replied casually, feeling a sweet buzz in her heart. In fact, she was relieved to hear that Chen Rui was fine.

“That guy has been in the limelight recently, and a documentary was broadcast on the television…” Isabella was talking to Zola about what happened recently, then the door of the room opened. A small head poked out; it was Duoduo.

“Aunt Zola is awake!” The little girl jumped over joyfully and got into the arms of the fairy dragon.

Zola hugged Duoduo, looked at the child’s father who walked in behind, and smiled.

“Aunt Zola, why have you slept for so long?” Duoduo swayed around Zola’s neck, “Duoduo is so worried about you.”

“My Darling Duoduo is so caring.” Zola kissed the little girl affectionately.

“Aunt Zola last time you promised to do that experiment with me…”

Isabella said, “Duoduo, Aunt Zola’s body hasn’t fully recovered yet. Let’s leave the experiment next time. Aunt Yini will take you to weave a wreath first. Didn’t you say you want to make a hat for Little Doudou?”

“OK.”

Isabella led Duoduo out. When passing someone, she didn’t forget to twist his waist. Chen Rui knew that Yini gave him a chance to be alone with Zola, so he could only show the expression ‘I like being abused by Madam Aunt very much’ as a token of thanks.

“Are you okay?”

“I’m fine.”

2 voices and 2 sentences sounded at the same time. They were exactly the same. They looked at each other and smiled with a tacit understanding.

“Your hand hasn’t fully healed yet?”

Chen Rui stroked the fairy dragon’s purple hair and said with a smile, “It’s almost healed, but I can’t really fight at the moment. Do you remember… when we fought Quilliana?”

“I don’t remember exactly.” Zola shook her head, “Quilliana is too powerful. How did you defeat her?”

“I didn’t defeat her. She ran away because of some problems of her own.” Chen Rui recounted the situation at that time, “However, we can’t rely on this accidental appearance. Quilliana will definitely recover and suppress that kind of injury as soon as possible. The next time we meet, I’m afraid there will be no such luck. You know, what we have encountered is only a Hatred Lord, and the Fear Lord and Despair Lord have not yet appeared. Even if their strength is inferior to Quilliana, they must be far stronger than us, so we must enhance our own strength as soon as possible.”

Zola sighed, “My current strength has hit a bottleneck. Even with the training ground of time law, it is quite difficult to improve. If Python is still here, maybe she will have a way…”

It was not the first time Chen Rui heard someone mention Python. He was silent for a moment, and he changed the subject, “Actually, what I want to ask is, when I activated ‘[All Star Gods View]’ at the end, how did you integrate into my power? At that time, you seemed to disappear, but I felt that my strength had nearly doubled.”

“Double?” Zola’s eyes lit up, then she showed a thoughtful expression, “I only had one thought at that moment. That was to sneak attack Quilliana to distract her, but when you were desperately integrating with ‘[All Star Gods View]’, I suddenly had a special feeling, like a summoning or a resonance caused by some kind of soul traction. Therefore, instead of using stronger element kingdom power, I activated the kingdom power of ‘Rainbow Constellation’. As a result, the resonance felt stronger, so I just… Actually, I don’t know what the consequences of doing that will be. I just want to do that involuntarily, like some kind of… instinct?”

“Instinct?” Chen Rui fell into deep thought. Because of the link and the Star Conferring Platform, when the linkers fight together, they could strengthen each other’s strength. However, in Zola’s case, she directly integrated into the ultimate move of [All Star Gods View]. Plus, it was the first time.

Zola had already expressed the guess in Chen Rui’s mind, “If Yini, Athena, Kia and the others… that is, all the people who are ‘conferred God’ in that ‘world’ are integrated, then the power of your move will…”

Chen Rui nodded, “There should be this possibility, but the danger is also certain. Let alone you have been in a coma for more than 10 days, if I lose the battle, everyone will be buried with me.”

“This may be the only hope. No matter what, we have to try. Later, I’ll tell Athena and the others that we can try to practice together during normal training.”

Chen Rui frowned and said, “Don’t worry. Let me think about it again.”

“I know what you’re worried about. Didn’t we have a vow to live and die together?” Zola took a deep look at Chen Rui, “Yini, Athena, Kia, Catherine, and everyone is the same. Even those guys like Paglio and Roman regard you as a partner to whom they entrusted their lives. No one will be back off due to fear, and no one will let you fight alone. If one day, you are really gone. I will also not exist in this world …”

Chen Rui didn’t wait for Zola to finish speaking, and he held her hand tightly.

“Let’s fight together.” The fairy dragon’s gaze was extremely firm, “This time, everyone too.”

Sensing Zola’s determination, Chen Rui took a deep breath and nodded solemnly.

Blue Glory Empire’s Capital Fansidian.

Royal palace.

“The Thorn Fortress has been breached?” Blue Glory Empress Landbis took a deep breath after listening to the report of the highest commander Altos, “The speed of these Abyss monsters is much faster than imagined.”

The ‘Abyss’, a frightening term, was newly announced in the magic game, including the names and information of monsters such as berserk demon, gap demon, and blazing flame witch.

“It’s more about power than speed.” Altos sighed, “All the soldiers of the Thorn Fortress survived, including 42 Holy Sanctuary powerhouses and 3 kingdomized super powerhouses. In the beginning, the war was still in a stalemate. The Holy Sanctuary and the kingdomized powerhouses were able to withstand the attack of the Abyss. However, 2 of the Abyss lords appeared in the Abyss army and killed the 3 Kingdom level powerhouses. Then, the Abyss was unstoppable. The entire Thorn Fortress was all razed to the ground. This time the battle… lasted only 2 hours.”

“2 hours?” Landbis smiled bitterly. “Originally, the fall of the previous cities was still attributed to the internal strife of the Black Death Followers. There is no excuse for the fiasco of the Thorn Fortress this time. I thought our preparations are sufficient, but I don’t know that it is still vulnerable…”

“According to intel, after destroying the Thorn Fortress, the Abyss monsters just took a short rest and started moving in the direction of the capital. They will reach the eastern suburb in 6 hours at the latest.”

“6 hours at the latest? How soon will our reinforcements arrive?”

Altos sighed, “General Sandro has led the coalition army’s former army day and night. However, due to the limited number of teleportation portals, it is impossible to go through this kind of exhaustion. According to normal inferences, it may take 2 days to arrive. The Holy Light Mountain also sent a Divinity Temple Knight Legion, but since the church didn’t set up a teleportation portal in Fansidian, they could only be sent in batches from Jaqda. They can’t assemble until the transmission is complete. I’m afraid they won’t be in time…”

“It seems that it is not a good idea to prohibit the church of the capital from setting up the White Cliff teleportation portal.” Landbis smiled awkwardly. In fact, for many years, the capital of the 2 Holy Empires had not allowed the church to set up a teleportation portal. This was the 2 empires’ gesture and strategy to weaken the control of the Holy Church. They didn’t expect it to be self-defeating now.

Altos nodded, “The current situation is very urgent. Although all the defense forces have been activated and all the troops are in place, all I can do is try to delay the evacuation of Your Majesty as much as possible.”

“Evacuate?” Landbis shook her head slowly, “I can’t go.”

Altos said in a deep voice, “These days, countless noble families and people have evacuated the capital, fled to Jaqda or westward from Jaqda by ship. Even Speaker Magnum and House of Representatives have withdrawn. Your Majesty, I know you have the courage and faith to protect this empire, but staying here is a sacrifice in vain. Please leave the capital as soon as possible. I will stay and lead all the soldiers to live and die with the capital!”

“I won’t leave.” Landbis stood up from the throne, and her gaze was extremely determined, “If the entire empire is destroyed, what is the meaning of my existence as a ruler? From the moment I put on the crown, I already have the awareness of living and dying with the empire.”

“You’re wrong, Your Majesty.” Altos looked directly at Landbis, “You’re the hope of the Blue Glory Empire and the spiritual pillar of all subjects! I believe that as long as Your Majesty is still alive, the Blue Glory Empire will never be destroyed!”

Landbis glanced at Altos lightly, “‘Believe’? This word doesn’t apply to you and me, right? As a loyal old courtier of the former ruler, didn’t you always suspect that I sent someone to assassinate Klongter the Great, and you are still investigating secretly?”

Klongter was the former Blue Glory ruler, the father of Landbis. Because of being assassinated, he fell into a coma and finally died, so Landbis successfully took over the throne.

“The investigation has long been suspended…” Altos sighed, “I’m indeed ‘old’, and because I’m old, I have a different understanding of many things than when I was young. Since Your Majesty took the throne, although there are many exclusion means of centralizing power, but you are even more diligent and careful in governing the empire. Under the command of Your Majesty, the Blue Glory Empire has shown a heyday that was unprecedented in 300 years. I believe that as long as Your Majesty is given enough time, the Blue Glory Empire will definitely surpass the Dragon Bright Empire and become the human’s top empire. As for other things, it is not important before this. Your Majesty has always been clear-headed and should understand the current critical situation. Although most of the Blue Glory Empire has already been destroyed, Your Majesty is still alive, and the elites of the empires led by Sandro are still there. The friendship between Your Majesty and the elf tribe Princess Royal Philly is also still there, and the people’s trust and support for Your Majesty is still there. Hence, the Blue Glory Empire did not perish, and will not perish.”

“Thank you, Altos.” Landbis stared deeply at Altos as if meeting this gray old man for the first time. Her eyes tried to control the tears welling up, “It is my honor to have you standing by my side .”

Altos bowed deeply, “It’s my honor too, Your Majesty.”

At this moment, a guard hurried to the entrance of the main hall, “Your Majesty! Urgent report!”

Landbis was startled, “The Abyss army has appeared? So soon?”

“No, it’s our reinforcements! General Sandro arrived the western suburbs of the capital with 300,000 troops of the coalition army!”

Landbis was overjoyed by this unexpected good news. She exchanged glances with Altos and ordered, “Open the west gate immediately. Let the reinforcements enter the city as soon as possible!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1229: Battle Of Fansidian
chapters.body:
Chapter 1229: Battle Of Fansidian

The arrival of the Human Coalition Army was a timely help for the Blue Glory Capital.

These 300,000 people were the former coalition army, led by Sandro, the first general of the Blue Glory Empire. After Sandro heard that the Blue Glory Capital was in danger, he sped up the march and finally arrived at Fansidian at the most critical moment.

The main force of the former army was of course humans. Due to the rapid march, most of them were lightly armed. Among the reinforcements, Landbis met his most familiar ally, Princess Royal Philly of the elf tribe.

Philly brought 2 elf legions, magic rifle and magic archer. As for the elf magician legion, they were assigned in the follow-up reinforcements. The destruction of the Silver Moon Celestial Capital, the elf empress, and the fall of the elf prophet brought great grief to the elves, so this time they also had the determination for revenge.

However, not all elves participated in this dangerous battle. The elf sword guard legion stayed in the Golden Estate to protect the elf’s Little Princess Michelle. This was also to leave a bloodline for the elf just in case.

The new prophet Kilanya was by Michelle’s side. It was not that Kilanya was cowardice, but that she had received the inheritance of the elf prophet, which needed to be further comprehended and digested. At the same time, as the guider of the new generation of the elf tribe, she was related to the safety of the entire elf tribe and must not be easily involved in danger. The orcs also stayed in the Golden Estate. The strange thing was that the orcs had a kind of awe for the new elf prophet Kilanya. They obeyed her without prejudice.

This time, a team of elf magicians from the magician city Jaqda also joined the defense army at the Blue Glory Capital. The Magician Tower Group also dispatched 2 elite human magician legions. As far as the magician was concerned, their combat power was considered to be second to none.

A magician legion was not a certain number of magicians, but well-trained battlefield magicians. These magicians could use a special magic array or other methods to link all the magic power and spirit power together to release the same magic. The power of the magic far exceeded the superposition of ordinary people.

In addition to the elf tribe, the army of the hobbit tribe also came together.

In the early years, after the merge of the 3 major groups of the hobbit, forests, hills, and caves, the Thick Soil Castle in the Black Rock Mountain in the Yang Shao Empire became the new base of the hobbit. Therefore, the hobbits who had relocated were not implicated when the Silver Moon Celestial Capital was destroyed this time. The army frontline was the large shield warriors legion led by the Hobbit King Ovge himself this time.

The dragons did not send any reinforcements this time. After the brief ‘decisive battle’ in the Golden Estate, the dragons who participated in the battle seemed to have received an order from Dragon Emperor Pagris. They immediately left the Golden Estate to return to the Dragon Valley.

The latest intel showed that after destroying the Thorn Fortress, the Abyss army had begun to move toward the capital. It was expected to reach Fansidian’s eastern suburb within 5 hours.

Landbis made a firm decision to let the reinforcements, that rushed here, rest and eat to recover their physical strength. She provided a large number of high-quality equipment from the arsenal to the reinforcements. At the same time, she quickly held a strategic meeting of high level generals. The participants included Sandro, Altos, Philly and others.

On the tall city wall, all the soldiers were waiting in battle. All kinds of magic protection inside and outside the city were also fully activated because the most severe test was about to come.

The air was full of strange silence. Especially after learning that those kingdoms and cities had been exterminated, the atmosphere became even more depressing.

At this time, the sound of galloping from afar could be faintly heard as the ground trembled slightly. Obviously, the army of the Abyss monsters was approaching.

The soldiers clenched their weapons tightly. There was resoluteness, determination, tension, and fear in their gaze— No matter how well-trained they were, they were real people after all.

People would be afraid, but at some point, they also had emotions and powers beyond fear.

The commander of the East Gate was Sandro, a representative of the Blue Glory Empire’s young army, known as the number 1 general.

When Sandro felt the tension of the soldiers, he did not use long speeches to boost morale. Instead, he just took the spear from his confidant beside him and tapped it on the ground.

Unhurriedly.

This tap was particularly clear. Gradually, more and more sounds joined this rhythm. Even those elves who had always been proud and calm were infected by the atmosphere and started tapping along with the beat.

The sound of the percussion became more and more orderly and vigorous, while the momentum became greater and greater. The original depression was swept away and turned into excitement. Everyone was gathering into a torrent as if they were invincible.

“Fight! Fight! Fight!” The soldiers roared loudly.

Elf Princess Royal Philly and the Hobbit King Ovge couldn’t help but give Sandro an admiring look: He is worthy of being a famous human general. With this simple method, the originally depressed morale is boosted into a state of excitement.

“All army, get ready to fight!” Sandro put down his spear and raised his long sword, and the sound of weapon tapping stopped suddenly.

At this time, the tremors on the ground became more and more clear, but at this moment the fighting spirit of the soldiers had already been burned. The previous tension and fear had long since disappeared.

In the palace, Landbis sat alone on the throne in the main hall, holding a glass of wine in her hand.

The soldiers shouted in the distance. She said to herself as she watched the slight tremor of the wine, “It has started.”

In the east of the city, a red sea appeared in the vision of the defending soldiers. Even the clouds in the sky seemed to be dyed blood red.

The Abyss army was finally here!

Following Sandro’s order, the catapults and magic crystal cannons were launched simultaneously, both of which were long-range conventional weapons. Due to cooling problems, the magic crystal cannons turned off after just 1 round of launch. Only the flame meteors thrown by the catapults were still flying. Due to the unusually open terrain to the east of the Blue Glory Capital, the distribution of the Abyss monsters was relatively scattered. The catapult’s lethality was not as ideal as the Thorn Fortress.

Sandro didn’t order the magic rifle legion to fire, because from the previous intel analysis, the defenses of the Abyss monsters were quite strong. If the distance was too far, the lethality of the magic rifle would be greatly reduced, wasting ammunition in vain.

Seeing the bloody wave approaching quickly, Sandro suddenly issued an unexpected order, “First Coalition Legion Magician! Ready!”

The First Coalition Legion Magician was the elf legion of the magician city. The elves stood on the top of the city and quickly chanted the joint magic. It was not an AOE magic like [Meteor Rain], but [Earth Wall], a relatively low level earth elemental magic.

The elves had a very strong sense of the elements, especially in this kind of joint spellcasting, so the power was far greater than that of ordinary single spells. Hills emerged one by one, and they became higher and higher, forming a whole piece of rolling hills. The terrain of the entire plain turned into hills.

This hill terrain was quite particular. Not all the terrain had become steep, but a few exits had been deliberately left. Due to the little resistance before, the momentum of the Abyss army’s forward charge was extremely fast. In this sudden change, even if they wanted to respond, it was too late, so they couldn’t help but rush toward those exits.

The spread formation was gathered together.

At this moment, Sandro decisively ordered, “First Magician Coalition Legion back off. Magic rifle, fire!”

All the magic rifles burst into flames almost at the same time. Due to the sudden change in the terrain, the Abyss monsters gushing out from the exit were quite dense, which was convenient for the magic rifles to focus their fire. The gap demons in front fell down without any suspense. There was still a difference in the shooting here. The accuracy of the elf gunmen was extremely high. They often hit the gap demons’ foreheads with one blow, severely injuring the gap demons or even killing them directly. However, ordinary human gunmen were obviously inferior. Nonetheless, due to the terrain, a large number of the Abyss monsters had been wiped out in the blink of an eye.

Sandro’s commanding ability made Elf Princess Philly secretly admire. She was a top student of Starlight College. Naturally, she could recognize that this tactic had been used quite successfully. The time and distance of the hills made by the magician legion were well-coordinated. They not only interrupted the charge formation of the Abyss monsters, but it also let the opponent enter the effective range of their own magic rifles. It was as if the Abyss monsters actively cooperated to complete it.

The Abyss army was still advancing one after another like crazy as if the casualties ahead had nothing to do with them. More and more monsters were pouring out of the exit. The magic rifles’ strikes were also beginning to disperse. The lethality was significantly reduced. The berserk demons behind were also starting to appear. They fired bone spurs in the direction of the city wall. Due to the long distance, it did not cause much damage.

However, this distance was also rapidly closing.

“Second Coalition Legion Magician, get ready!” Sandro’s voice sounded again, and another row of magicians walked up the city wall neatly. The shield appeared in time to block the bone spurs.

These were the large shield warriors of the hobbit tribe who were best at defense. They were placed at the head of the city by Sandro to protect magicians and shooters full-time.

Not long after, the Second Coalition Legion Magician had prepared the magic, which was also earth element magic. Compared with the previous [Earth Wall], this magic was of a lower level: greasy spell!

The function of the greasy spell was to make the land in an area extremely slippery and difficult to stand on. With so many magicians jointly activated, the entire area under the city suddenly became a greasy pit.

In ordinary battles, the greasy spell had no lethality at all, far inferior to the quagmire spell that could trap the enemy, but in this environment, the greasy technique had played a miraculous effect. The speed of the Abyss monsters was already very fast, thus when they were affected by the greasy technique, they couldn’t control their balance. After being squeezed by the companions behind, they staggered and fell together. Even the berserk demons couldn’t shoot bone spurs normally.

The magic gunmen and archers saw the opportunity and fired repeatedly. The Abyss monsters at the front were all annihilated under the fierce firepower. The morale of the soldiers was even stronger. At this time, many of the hills cast by the elves had cracks.

Female figures with flames all over appeared in the air.

While the flaming whip was waving, the hills collapsed one after another, revealing the Abyss sea behind.

Although they used ingenious tactics to wipe out a large number of monsters just now, to the entire Abyss army, it was just a drop in the bucket.

The real test had just begun.

chapters.title: Chapter 1230: The Last Moment
chapters.body:
Chapter 1230: The Last Moment

Night fell.

The Blue Glory Empire’s Capital Fansidian did not have the tranquility of nightfall at all. The sky above was brightly lit. Various dazzling lights shone from time to time amidst the explosions.

The battle to the west of the capital had reached a climax. They were fighting desperately in the sky and the ground.

The ground in front of the city wall was filled with holes, and high-temperature blood red permeated many places. These lava-like blood reds were all formed by the corpses of the Abyss monsters being dissolved.

There were still many corpses that had not dissolved. The arrows and bullets from the top of the city were pouring down like rain, constantly stopping the approaching gap demons and berserk demons. Even so, the torrent of the Abyss was still advancing. Many monsters close to the city wall had already begun to climb.

The defending soldiers gradually suffered casualties. Most of which were injured by the bone spurs fired by the berserk demon during the attack. Each berserk demon had 6 bone spurs. Although one unit could only be fired 6 times at most, due to the amazing number of units and the intensive attack, even the large shield warriors of the hobbits couldn’t cover everything.

There were more and more Abyss monsters near the city wall. From a distance, the blood-red sea was constantly beating against the city wall, and the ‘waves’ were layer upon layer, quickly approaching the top of the city wall.

Sandro didn’t panic as he gave orders to the First Coalition Legion Magician. The elf magicians walked up to the top of the city neatly, ignoring the monsters who were close at hand. They didn’t dodge the bone spurs flying all over the sky, and they quickly activated the magic that had been charging for a long time.

The hobbit warrior’s shield next to an elf magician was half a beat slower, and the elf’s thin body was pierced through by the bone spur and fell to the ground, dead. 2 other elves were attacked and fell down the city wall, then they were instantly swarmed by the monster crowd. Nevertheless, the rest of the elves fearlessly cast the magic under the command of Sandro.

[Gravity]!

For a while, all the monsters under and in front of the city slowed down, and the monsters that were climbing the city wall with high overlapping fell down, but this was not the real purpose of [Gravity].

The catapults at the rear fire simultaneously. They had already adjusted their angles and distances. At the same time, the magic crystal cannons, which had been cooling down for a long time, were launched.

The boulders launched by the catapults were not ignited as before, but they were bundled with special magic bombs. These bombs were produced by the Magician City, and some of the bombs were also crafted by the elves. There was no lead wire or complicated magic trigger switch, but it was activated by some kind of firing pin, which could cause a powerful explosion under severe impact. When Chen Rui was traveling in Jaqda, he was amazed when he saw this bomb. It was very similar to the aerial bomb he knew in his previous life.

Attracted by gravity, the explosive bomb thrown by the catapult accurately landed on the Abyss army in front. Boom Boom Boom Boom… The entire ground of the capital shook violently.

The stacked successive explosions of the bombs were far greater than that of a single one. There were large blanks in the monsters that were originally dense like a tide. The magic crystal cannons aimed at the monsters at close range under the city wall. The white light shone, illuminating the night sky like the sun. The blood-red torrent of the Abyss was turned into nothingness.

At this time, the bows and the magic rifles would also be affected by the double gravity. The defending soldiers on the city wall stopped attacking and hid in bunkers. The hobbit warriors formed a shield formation to protect the shooters from the explosions.

The effect of this tactic was quite obvious. The original endless blood red sea in front of the city wall turned into a large vacuum. The Abyss monsters suffered a huge loss this time, but Sandro wasn’t relieved at all.

The capital defending soldiers had been holding to the city wall. With the cooperation of various tactics, they had brought huge casualties to the Abyss at a very small price. If it was an ordinary battle, it would undoubtedly be a brilliant victory. However, this was no ordinary battle. What they were facing now was not ordinary enemies, but almost endless monsters without fear.

Although they were in the advantageous situation, the overall number of the Abyss army had not decreased significantly. In contrast, after such a fierce battle, the physical strength and energy of their own side were declining rapidly, especially the magic power of the magicians. Even if Sandro deliberately arranged the rotation to rest, they couldn’t keep up with the speed of consumption.

If we continue to fight like this, I’m afraid…

The effect of [Gravity] was ending soon. Sandro took a deep breath. He didn’t think about it any more as he raised his long sword and commanded, “Catapults, readjust the angle. The second magician legion, prepare the magic! Holy Sanctuary warriors, clear the enemies in the air that is close to the capital!”

In the sky, the number of people participating in the battle was much smaller than that on the ground, but the momentum was far above the ground.

The most conspicuous thing was the crisscrossing flames. These flames were like ropes lingering in the air. These ‘ropes’ were left by the mutated elite blazing flame witch. It had killed many griffon riders.

The strength of ordinary blazing flame witches was generally at the Demon Emperor level, and a small number of mutated ones could reach the Demon Overlord level. This blazing flame witch was elite among mutated ones. It had already kingdomized and had a special flame talent. While casting the talent, it could leave a fire trail wherever it passed. Many griffons had no time to change direction and directly hit the fire trail, turning into a firebird. The knights behind them fell from the air.

The griffon rider legion was lost by more than half, but they managed to draw most of the enemy’s power in the sky, keeping them away from the friendly forces on the ground.

The mutated elite blazing flame witch who was killing the griffon riders suddenly turned around and whipped behind, entangling a rapier stabbed from behind. The rapier was held in the hand of a male elf, who was the elf tribe’s super powerhouse Pulos.

The blazing flame witch yelled, and the flames of the long whip exploded. The rapier in Pulos’ hand turned red under the high temperature. His strength was originally on par with the blazing flame witch, but since he was good at fire element power, his damage to ward the blazing flame witch was greatly reduced, putting him in a disadvantageous situation. If it weren’t for the griffon riders constantly interfering the blazing flame witch with javelins, Pulos would have been seriously injured if not dead.

Looking at Pulos who was struggling, the blazing flame witch showed a sinister smile. Suddenly, the smile froze on her face. She was frozen into an ice cube instantly and fell from the air.

Pulos had quite a lot of fighting experience. He flickered and intercepted the falling ice cube, then he channeled all kingdom power in his fist and launched it. The blazing flame witch, which was frozen into ice, was instantly shattered apart.

“Kelsa, thank you. If you came later, my soul would have gone to see the Moonlight Goddess.” Pulos looked at the old friend who appeared in front of him and said with emotion, Kelsa’s strength was at the peak stage of the Kingdom level, which was 2 small realms higher than him, but judging from Kelsa’s wounds all over her body, the battle she experienced was even more dangerous.

“Take care of the Holy Sanctuary warriors and the griffon riders.” Kelsa gasped, “I’ll go to Madam Dursa and see if I can help.”

Dursa was the only remaining Demi-God elder of the elf tribe, and 1 of the controllers of the Magician Tower Group. This time, she came to Fansidian to protect Princess Royal Philly. Empress Liv was Dursa’s niece and her apprentice. The destruction of the Silver Moon Celestial Capital made Dursa inexplicably angry. If it wasn’t for Sandro and Philly’s dissuasion, she would have barged into the Abyss army alone.

The power of the Demi-God powerhouse was unquestionable. Sandro kept Dursa just in case. He didn’t want her to waste power prematurely. In fact, this consideration was correct.

After eliminating the vanguard of the Abyss army, 2 terrifying elite Abyss lords appeared, both of which had reached the Demi-God level. If Dursa hadn’t stopped them, the city wall would have been breached.

Dursa’s original intention was to pull the battlefield of the Demi-God level contest into the Abyss army so that she could use the aftermath of the battle to destroy the army. Unlike ordinary trainers, the Abyss lords did not have a kingdom or territory, but their power was purer. The combat power of these 2 elite Abyss lords was far superior to that of an ordinary Demi-God. Under their joint attacks, Dursa was actually at a disadvantage. Moreover, even Dursa was secretly frightened by the pressure from the Abyss army. If she rushed into the Abyss army rashly, she might be swallowed by endless waves. Similarly, this battlefield could not be drawn to the capital side, so Dursa gave full play to the magician’s kite-flying tactic, leading the 2 Abyss lords into the air, launching the kingdom, and trapping the 2 enemies in the guerilla. Once Kelsa finally joined in, the pressure on Dursa finally eased a little. The stalemate could basically be maintained.

The intense fighting continued until dawn.

Many cracks had appeared on the blood-stained city wall, and the ground below the city was covered with steaming lava.

The fighting that night was mostly maintained at the highest intensity. No one knew how many Abyss creatures were killed and how many times the enemy’s attacks were defeated.

Even with the geographical advantage and the combination of various tactics, 1/3 of the defending soldiers were still killed. It could be seen that the battle was brutal. The surviving people were already in a state of extreme fatigue physically and mentally. They just executed the commands mechanically and held on with the last breath of courage.

They were like a tense bow that would break at any time.

The battle in the sky was also continuing, but the number of people on the side of the Blue Glory Empire was getting smaller and smaller.

What was terrifying was that the Abyss army was still not at all tired. The number still seemed to be endless, which made the defending soldiers feel desperate.

“Your Majesty Landbis is here!”

The full-armor Empress Landbis appeared in front of everyone with the imperial guards.

“I will fight side by side with you. Live and die together!”

A simple sentence from Landbis boosted the already low morale again. Her Majesty Empress did not run away like those noble families, but she stays and fights to the death!

“Fight to the death! Fight to the death!” The soldiers raised their weapons one after another.

Sandro and other generals knew that this was just drinking poison to quench their thirst. Their own strength had almost bottomed out, and the Abyss army was still unfathomable.

What’s even more terrifying was that a considerable part of the Abyss’ troops had bypassed the west gate of the capital, turned over the mountains and rivers that were originally natural barriers, and began to attack the remaining 3 gates with weak forces. It could be seen that the Abyss creatures not only possess powerful combat power and fierceness without fear of death, but they also possess considerable wisdom.

Landbis took a look at Princess Philly. The elf royal princess’ charming face was covered in blood. Some of the blood was from her companions and some was her own, but compared with the previous arrogance, she was a little more mature and stable. Princess Philly knew what Landbis wanted to say. She looked at her injured companions and shook her head slightly. Landbis took a deep breath and nodded.

A large number of blazing flame witches flew from the sky, and the torrent of monsters on the ground swept over again. A new wave of attack began, with a momentum even stronger than before.

“It is likely to be the final battle.” Many people said in their minds, clenching their weapons.

chapters.title: Chapter 1231: Unexpected Reinforcements
chapters.body:
Chapter 1231: Unexpected Reinforcements

“ Boom! ” It wasn’t the city wall that collapsed first, but the kingdom of Dursa.

The 2 strongest Abyss lords had already made it difficult for Dursa to hold on. Even with the help of Kelsa, they were barely in a stalemate.

Kelsa’s strength could not withstand a blow from the Abyss lord, and she would be annihilated by just a rub of the greatsword. She could only use Dursa’s kingdom and try her best to use various magic skills to fight. It was already her limit to be able to hold on until now.

In many cases, quantity could not replace quality. If there were no 2 elite Abyss lords, even if the large number of blazing flame witches doubled, Dursa would not be afraid. However, now she was exhausted and close to collapse. The attack frenzy of the Abyss army set off again as a large number of blazing flame witches flooded into the sky. The crazy charge of the blazing flame witches, regardless of casualties, became the last straw that broke the camel’s back.

When the 2 sharp sword lights flickered, Dursa’s kingdom was finally torn apart. What she could do was to condense a high-intensity wind blade with all her strength and slashed off the arm of the Abyss lord who was rushing toward Kelsa.

However, the Abyss lord was extremely powerful. Although its arm was chopped off, the attack still did not stop. With a slash, Kelsa, who had lost the protection of the kingdom, was divided in half. The Kingdom Level peak stage Kelsa couldn’t resist the sharp sword at all. The 2 halves of the body were instantly annihilated by the strong wind.

Dursa was filled with grievance, but her kingdom had collapsed. Even her last trace of strength was exhausted, so she was unable to rescue at all.

What made her even more desperate was that the dangerous breath of the Demi-God level appeared in the distant sky and the ground once again. It should be that a new elite, the Abyss lord, appeared again!

This round of attack by the blazing flame witches not only crushed Dursa’s kingdom, but it also crushed all the resistance forces on the Blue Glory Capital side. The griffon riders and the Holy Sanctuary warriors were almost wiped out.

The situation on the ground was equally critical. The firepower of nearly half of the magic shooters and archers had been significantly weakened, unable to contain the crazy surge of the Abyss army. The magicians had already exhausted their magic power. In the face of such an absolute strength gap, even with Sandro’s command talent.

The Abyss monsters who came forward quickly approached the city wall and began to climb. The enchantment of the city wall had been completely destroyed. Many powerful Abyss monsters stepped on the bodies of their companions and jumped directly onto the city wall, killing a large number of archers and gunmen.

The large shield warriors of the hobbit showed strong melee combat ability. The monsters who rushed up the city wall were either beaten down or chopped into several pieces by an axe. The bravest one was Hobbit King Ovge. Like a meat grinder, the approaching Abyss monsters were turned into pieces one after another. Landbis and Philly also went into battle under the protection of elite guards to boost morale.

However, as more and more monsters climbed to the top of the city wall, the casualties of the defending soldiers increased in the tragic hand-to-hand combat. The situation quickly became one-sided, and the entire city wall seemed crumbling.

The golden sword in Landbis’ hand glowed with blue fluctuations. When she swung it, the Abyss creatures were wiped out in a fan-shaped range. As a busy ruler, she had not fought such a high-intensity battle for a long time. This slash alone consumed a lot of strength. Just when she was exhausted, she suddenly had a sense of danger.

The last female elite guard beside Landbis rushed up and blocked in front of her. 2 bone spurs flew through the young girl’s chest and abdomen, then the gap demon rushed from behind and threw her to the ground.

Tears flashed in Landbis’s eyes. She gritted her teeth as she wielded the long sword again. The storm-like power shot out. The female elite guard and the gap demon behind them were torn apart by the sword. She was already on the verge of collapse, unable to wave the sword anymore.

She didn’t retreat, because everyone else was fighting desperately. Besides, in the current situation, even if she retreated, the result would be the same.

It had been less than half an hour since Landbis came to the city, and she couldn’t hold on anymore. She couldn’t imagine that the soldiers had fought this monster all night. Now that a loss was almost guaranteed, the only choice was to fight to the end.

At least, as a ruler, she did not choose to escape cowardly.

The choice in life cannot be turned back, just like when I had chosen a deal with that man at the beginning.

If I had chosen another one, would he appear today regardless of everything? Just like in the Holy Light Mountain, he fought the archangel to rescue the woman imprisoned by the church?

Deep down in her mind, she had indeed envied that woman, but life would not start again, and neither would choices. Since I have chosen, don’t regret it.

If I had chosen him in the first place, whether it was the Demon Realm, rebellion, or nothing, I would follow him without hesitation.

The truth is, when I chose the throne, I would keep going even if I was alone, even if I faced death.

This is me, Landbis. Sherbert.

Looking at the sky covered with blood clouds and flames, Landbis calmed down even though she felt that death was approaching like never before.

All of a sudden, Landbis felt the light in the sky darken. Is this the feeling of death?

No! It’s a ‘dark cloud’!

Giant dragons!

Landbis finally reacted, and she cheered up. The reinforcements from the dragons!

The Dragon Valley has finally sent reinforcements!

Hundreds of giant dragons appeared in the sky. They shot dragon breath toward the blazing flame witches one after another, restraining the blazing flame witch’s ferocious charge.

In front of Elf Elder Dursa, a figure appeared like lightning. He actually grabbed the greatsword with bare hand, allowing Dursa to escape the end of being cut in half.

This was a young man who wore silver light armor. He had a stern face and deep facial features.

“Gueroas!” Dursa had recognized this man. He was the elder of the Dragon Valley, and his strength had reached the intermediate stage of the Demi-God. Just now Gueroas had no choice but to grab the blade in a hurry and didn’t release his power in time. His palm bled immediately. If he hadn’t been the holy dragon with an extremely strong body, this palm might have been broken.

Gueroas’s reaction was extremely fast. Before the Abyss lord could exert power again, his fist quickly hit the opponent’s chest. This punch contained the power of the intermediate stage of the Demi-God. A hole appeared in the Abyss lord’s chest, then its body was shattered immediately.

After eliminating the Abyss lord, Gueroas moved again. His hands turned into countless overlapping images. Under his swift attack, another Abyss lord with a severed arm followed the footsteps of its companion.

“Be careful!” Dursa’s voice sounded. Gueroas sensed a warning in his mind at the same time. He flickered and disappeared. When he reappeared, the silver armor on his chest had cracked. Blood was flowing out from it.

3 more elite Abyss lords appeared ahead: 1 at the intermediate stage of the Demi-God, and 2 at the early stage of the Demi-God. These 3 were the new reinforcements, so their power was by no means comparable to the previous 2 Abyss lords who fought overnight.

Gueroas’s mind moved, and he flew toward the battlefield below. The 3 Abyss lords pursued him closely.

There were more and more blazing flame witches coming from the sky. The dragon breaths gradually couldn’t suppress them anymore.

At this moment, Dursa suddenly heard a strange booming sound, like some kind of machine. As she turned her head, she saw a mass of black things behind her. They were huge with a metallic luster. They flew neatly in the air, forming a formation that looked like a huge mobile castle.

“Assemble puppets?” Dursa, who was secretly protecting Princess Elf, had seen this kind of huge war machine in the Golden Estate, but she didn’t expect to see it here – Right, these are the troops of the Demon Realm!

I remember when the demons dispatched thousands of war puppets, it had already caused panic in the Human Coalition Army. The number of these puppets is… at least tens of thousands!

Is this the true strength of the Demon Realm?

If these assemble puppets were dispatched at the Golden Estate…

Just thinking of this, those dragons had already retreated as the assemble puppets immediately launched an attack on the blazing flame witch.

Their attack methods were similar to those in the magic game. First of all, they launched long-range missiles. The power of the missiles was quite amazing. After hitting a blazing flame witch, a violent explosion occurred. The other witches beside were also blown to pieces in an instant.

The formation of the assemble puppets was very particular. They were divided into 3 groups to launch in turn. The whole sky was trembling as the flames and bloody light quickly faded away amidst the violent shockwave and gunpowder smoke.

The power of this kind of aoe attack made Dursa secretly stunned. Even a powerhouse at the Kingdom level, under such a round of violent explosions, will probably be blasted to pieces… Her attention then shifted to the battle of Gueroas and the 3 Abyss lords below.

Gueroas did not fight head-on. Instead, he kept evading to avoid frontal combat.

When the 3 Abyss lords were chasing after him, 1 of them was suddenly shocked and hit by a bolt of lightning that appeared all of sudden. The power of this lightning was so great that even Dursa, who was proficient in wind element magic, couldn’t help but sigh. The Abyss lord who was struck by the lightning was scorched and fell straight from the sky. Before it touched the ground, it was struck by successive lightnings and fell hard into the Abyss army.

Immediately after that, a dark cloud condensed by energy appeared in the sky. Countless lightning poured out from the dark cloud. All the Abyss creatures within the range turned into coke, the land was melted and solidified, and the Abyss lord was turned into ashes.

Dursa was surprised to see the huge figures who killed an early stage of the Demi-God Abyss lord with super lightning power. She blurted out, “Titan!”

And it’s Demi-God titan!

Based on her experience, she naturally knew that such giants existed in Storm Island, but she had never heard of a Demi-God titan, let alone imagined that the titans, who were always aloof, would come to support the Blue Glory Empire.

Is it because of the dragons or because of… the Demon Realm?

The next moment, countless lightnings shone with raging storms. The source of which was the neatly arranged titans, at least thousands of them.

The lightning and storm talents of the titans were astonishing, just like thousands of magic crystal cannons firing at the same time. A large portion of the Abyss army was wiped out instantly.

The blood red that had already rushed to the top of the city was also replaced by pieces of crystals. When one looked closely, it was a demonic beast the size of a buffalo. The whole body was crystal clear as if it was made of crystal.

The fierceness of these demonic beasts was no less than that of the Abyss monsters. The monsters that invaded the city were wiped out instantly.

Landbis was also stunned by this scene; more of it was shocking. When she subconsciously turned her head, she saw a vast expanse of crystal behind her. There were many huge figures and women floating in the air — It turns out that the real reinforcements are not dragons, but these powerful armies that have never been seen before!

chapters.title: Chapter 1232: Evacuate
chapters.body:
Chapter 1232: Evacuate

Night fell again.

Blue Glory capital, Fansidian.

The sky that was reflected blood-red during the day had gradually recovered, and the shocking siege that lasted for 2 days and 1 night had also returned to tranquility.

All the corpses had been cleaned up, but the pungent smell of blood was still in the air.

The city wall to the west had become ruins, the land outside the city wall was devastated, and the overall height seemed to have dropped several meters lower, which showed how fierce the previous battle was.

On the ground, there were solidified dark red rocks as if they were cooled lava. There were also many strange transparent objects that looked like some kind of crystals.

Landbis stood on the dilapidated city wall while staring at the dotted lights of the capital, like stars illuminating the darkness.

Almost. I almost could not see these lights; almost, these lights almost disappeared from this world completely.

Fortunately.

The army of the Abyss has been wiped out.

It was total annihilation.

During the battle, in addition to the dragons and the strange army, reinforcements from the Holy Church also came.

2 legions were dispatched this time: 1 was the Divinity Temple Knight Legion of the Heavenly Thunder Hall, led by Parsali who was once known as the Gale Swordmaster. Now Parsali was already a super powerhouse; the other was the pastor legion with light element magicians, led by Miranda, the apprentice of the Holy Lady Eudora.

However, what really changed the situation of the battle was the large number of strange troops of unknown origin.

The Abyss monsters were not like ordinary soldiers. When the general situation was gone or the leader died, their morale would drop or they would even collapse without a fight. Even if there was only the last monster left, they would still rush up without fear of death. This was the most daunting.

One could only know that kind of terrifying thing if he had experienced it himself.

After the reinforcements arrived, the Abyss army launched a more terrifying charge. In the end, they were still defeated by those strange troops. Of course, that army also paid a considerable price.

At this time, Altos walked up to Landbis and whispered a few words.

There was a surprised expression in Landbis’ eyes, and she nodded, “Let him through.”

Soon, a man came to Landbis. He bowed and said, “Greetings, Your Majesty.”

“If I remember correctly, I met you once at the Holy Sanctuary. Your name is Lucio, the peripheral steward of the Holy Sanctuary. You seemed to be recommended by Bonnet.”

Lucio was a little surprised, “It’s my honor. I never thought that a little character like me could be remembered by Your Majesty.”

“Little character?” Landbis shook her head and said with a bitter smile, “Sir Lucio is joking. I should be ashamed that there is such an undercover agent from another world under my nose, and yet I don’t know anything about it. Just now when Altos told me that the army that saved the capital actually came from demons, I only had the word ‘shock’ in my mind.”

Lucio really made a great contribution this time. If it wasn’t for his guidance, the alchemy army would not have arrived at the Blue Glory Empire so quickly. On the way, they happened to meet the reinforcements from the Dragon Valley. Gueroas met Chen Rui on Storm Island, and the titan leader Oceanus could be regarded as old acquaintances, so they just joined forces.

“Your Majesty thinks highly of me. I’m indeed a little character who is just following the order of my master to guide this ancient army to reinforce.”

“Your master? Which Royal Majesty Empress of the Demon Realm?” Landbis frowned. Only a huge empire could have such a powerful army. It could be seen from this that the combat power of the Demon Realm far exceeded our estimation. Fortunately, the battle at the Golden Estate did not go on.

Speaking of the topic, Lucio had a look of pride in his eyes as he said, “My master is not the empress of the Demon Realm… Well, let’s put it this way, the 3 empresses are all his wives.”

“Is that Royal Highness ‘Aguile’?” Landbis was taken aback. She was no stranger to some basic information about the Demon Realm, but this time the news was delayed.

After the Golden Estate’s war, the intel department of the Blue Glory Empire got the relevant information immediately, but due to the consistent request of Landbis, the intel department did not report it hastily. Instead, they did repeated verification and finally confirmed ‘Aguile’ was the Prince Arthur who had ‘died’ in the Holy Child canonization hall. (At that time, the witnesses were all heads of state, who were given a gag order by the church)

By the time the confirmed intel appeared on Landbis’ desk, all of Landbis’ energies had been put on the newly-appeared Abyss monsters. With the urgency of the war, Landbis had no time to deal with other affairs at all. After all, it was related to a major event of the survival of the entire Blue Glory Empire.

“Actually, ‘Aguile’ is just a pseudonym. My master is also an old friend of Your Majesty…”

“Old friend?” Landbis suddenly thought of a certain scene at the New Moon Festival as well as the ‘demon’ that Raphael saw through, and a premonition arose in her mind.

“Your Majesty should remember the Holy Grail.”

Lucio’s words confirmed the hypothesis in Landbis’ mind, and she couldn’t help being shocked, “You mean, ‘Aguile’ is… he?”

The only husband of the 3 major empresses of the Demon Realm, the real controller behind the Demon Realm, was actually the man who almost became his husband! The third prince of the Dragon Bright Empire whom she resolutely gave up for power and position!

Landbis felt an inexplicable bitterness. With that man’s strength and character, his marriage with the 3 empresses of the Demon Realm should be more than just a relationship of interest.

Why are those women able to have love while having power?

At the moment when she thought she was going to face death, she was still determined like never before. Now that she had ‘lived’ again, some things that she thought she would let go came back to her heart.

She was an empress. After all, she was a woman too.

But now, those thoughts were meaningless.

Landbis withdrew her thoughts and sighed, “This is a secret, but since you can tell it to me, I believe many people already know it.”

“Master revealed his identity in front of His Majesty Lex of the Dragon Bright Empire in the Golden Estate, preventing the war between the 2 sides.”

When Landbis thought that in the Silver Moon Celestial Capital, Gabriel and Raphael would have to join forces to fight against ‘Arthur’, she couldn’t help but nod, “No wonder. Now that he has the strength… he doesn’t need to be afraid of anyone. Sir Lucio, please convey my sincerest thanks to His Highness for his helping hand.”

Everyone knew about the turmoil in the marriage between ‘Arthur’ and Princess Pearl back then. Lucio knew it, but he didn’t know whether his master and the empress had any unknown entanglements.

Sandro came over, and beside him was a man and a woman, who were the representatives of the Holy Light Mountain’s reinforcements this time, Parsali and Miranda.

Landbis bowed slightly to the 2, “Sir Parsali, Ms. Miranda, thanks for coming.”

Parsali shook his head and let out a long sigh, “Your Majesty’s words made us ashamed. We seriously lacked the estimation of the power of the Abyss, and we really didn’t help much. As long as this sir doesn’t find us hindering, that will be enough.”

The Divinity Temple Knight Legion had a certain restraint attribute on the Abyss, but that number was not enough in comparison to the entire Abyss army. Nonetheless, the pastor legion had played a miraculous effect in healing the wounded soldiers.

Lucio used to be a mercenary with a hard life. He never thought that one day he would talk to sirs like Parsali and Landbis like this, but now he represented Chen Rui instead of himself, so his waist was obviously much stiffer. He just treated Parsali with neither a humble nor arrogant attitude. He smiled, “Sir has overpraised, I was just following orders.”

Landbis nodded, “No matter which side you want to report to, I will remember the favors of the 3 of you. I will definitely repay you in the future.”

“Your Majesty is welcome,” Parsali sighed, “Here is the bad news. While we are fighting the Abyss, 2 other armies of the Abyss have destroyed Kans City and Semit City. Now they have invaded Lubo Empire. According to the intel analysis, the number of the 2 groups of the Abyss army is no less than what we faced just now.”

“What?” Landbis was startled The Abyss army was divided into 3 groups! I thought I had defeated the main force of the Abyss, how ridiculous am I!

Kans City and Semit City were the cities in the northwest of the Blue Glory Empire, and most of the entire Blue Glory Empire had been destroyed.

Miranda said, “In the battle just now, we have seen Your Majesty’s bravery, but now is really not the time to be brave. The Abyss army is far beyond imagination. I suggest that Your Majesty should quickly prepare to evacuate from Fansidian. Not only for yourself but also for the people of the capital.”

Landbis fell silent. She understood that what Parsali said was actually very euphemistic. The battle just now almost destroyed all the fortifications and strength of Fansidian. If there was another attack like that, even with the help of the Demon Realm army, it would be impossible to hold on. However, with her retreat, the entire Blue Glory Empire was basically destroyed.

“The Abyss monsters are too powerful to be countered by a single empire.” Parsali said, “The only solution is to organize the people to retreat to the west of the mainland as soon as possible, then unite all forces to fight the Abyss to the death. As far as I know, the White Cliff is also actively trying to destroy the lair of the Abyss army to fundamentally solve these monsters, but we can no longer wait like this.”

Surprised by Parsali’s choice of words, Landbis asked, “We?”

“This time, the mission of Miranda and I is to protect Your Majesty before completely defeating the Abyss, and we cannot return until the mission is completed.” Parsali smiled awkwardly, “To put it bluntly, we are just the excluded cannon ashes sent to die.”

Landbis had also heard about the open and secret struggles of the Holy Light Mountain’s 3 giant leaders, and she did not ask further. The phrase ‘the empire exists when Your Majesty exists’ that Aldos once said in the hall seemed to appear in her mind. She finally made up her mind, ” Then, let’s evacuate.”

Nightmare Volcano.

In the sky where the ‘rhombus’ was located, several blood-colored lights were projected, illuminating the torrent of flames surging on the earth.

Quilliana sat on a blood-red throne, wearing a white robe, with her eyes slightly closed.

In the lava at the bottom of this hillside, there were endless blood cocoons. Many Abyss breeding nests that had been formed, constantly creating new blood cocoons.

Among them, the 2 huge blood cocoons were the most conspicuous. There were countless crystal-clear Flowers of Abyss condensed near the 2 huge blood cocoons, and many flowers float around along the lava.

Quilliana’s eyes slowly opened, and there was still a crack in the blood red pupils of her right eye.

The huge blood cocoon on the left began to shake, and the outer layer began to peel off layer by layer.
