chapters.title: Chapter 1233: Clouds Over The White Cliff
chapters.body:
Chapter 1233: Clouds Over The White Cliff

The Demon Realm, the residence of the Dark Moon.

In the Super System.

“Lost 2/3 of the army?” Chen Rui frowned slightly when he immediately received the loss report of the ancient alchemy civilization army from the City of Stars’ Crystal Phoenix.

The ancient army sent this time was about 10% of the troops of the City of Stars who could fight (excluding gremlins). The combat power was already quite strong. Especially the titan legion led by Oceanus, it was already a quarter of the total number of the titans in Demon Realm and Storm Island. This time 300 titans were also lost, which showed the intensity of the battle.

The rescue this time was also a test.

The soldiers of the ancient alchemy civilization were much stronger than ordinary demons or humans, and there was Crystal Phoenix, an inviolable control center. Although the soldiers had corresponding wisdom and consciousness, they would not flee like ordinary troops. The same was true for the Abyss, but most of the monsters in the Abyss had only fighting instincts and no separate consciousness. In contrast, the creatures of the ancient alchemy civilization had a humanity that was closer to a real human, and their combat power fluctuated greatly.

As far as the combat strength of the Abyss army and ancient alchemy civilization army were compared, there was not much difference, but don’t forget, the ancient alchemy civilization was destroyed by the Abyss.

Judging from the last words left by the mad scientist of the ‘Sky Wheel’, the 4 ancient alchemy empires at that time did not pay enough attention to the Abyss. They were still engaged in civil war when the Abyss invaded. It was too late to regret it when they realized it.

But this was only from the perspective of the ancient alchemy civilization itself. With Chen Rui’s personal experience of Quilliana’s terrifying strength and the contact battle of alchemy creatures in the Blue Glory Capital, it could be analyzed that even when the ancient alchemy civilization went all out, they were not a match for the Abyss either.

Not only high-end combat power like the 3 rulers of Abyss but also the Abyss creatures below. In terms of ‘quality’, the alchemy civilization capital’s level 5 and level 6 combat power of the ancient alchemy creatures was not far from that of the Abyss creatures, but the biggest gap was the quantity.

Due to Guradam’s successful research on the rule energy, the performance of the City of Stars had been further improved. Although it had not yet reached the real level 6 civilization capital, Chen Rui’s total alchemy army had surpassed the general level 5 metropolitan civilization. There were 6 million gremlin servants, 3 million crystal beasts, 1.5 million lamp spirits, 300,000 assemble puppets, 30,000 giant crystal beasts, and 5,000 titans.

Under the premise of sufficient rule energy, the success rate of super-evolution was also increasing. There were more and more super-level creatures. It could be said that the troops Chen Rui had in hand were already extremely terrifying. Just by force, he could unify the Demon Realm and the human world. However, it was still not enough to face the Abyss.

Even if it became the ancient alchemy civilization capital, there was still a strict upper limit on the creatures that could be produced and controlled. Back then, in the ancient alchemy civilization empire, there were 4 major civilization capitals. In the end, they were still destroyed by the Abyss.

The number of the Abyss could only be summed up in a word: Endless.

This point had been confirmed by the demise of countless planes. The troops attacking the Blue Glory Empire were only a drop in the bucket. Even if Chen Rui took action himself, eliminating those little soldiers was just wasting energy and time in vain.

To completely destroy the power of the Abyss, there was only 1 way: To destroy the root.

Namely, get rid of the 3 rulers… or, that eye!

At present, this was still a very distant goal. In the last battle of the Silver Moon Celestial Capital, the 3 archangels, Zola, and Chen Rui almost got team wiped. With this gap in strength, it would be useless even if Satan and others joined the battle.

But ‘impossible’ can never become ‘possible’ without trying.

Fortunately, Quilliana is injured, and the other 2 Abyss rulers are also missing. This precious time must be used to recover and increase strength as soon as possible. Perhaps this is the last chance.

To defend against the Abyss, the forces of humans, demons, and the ancient alchemy civilization must unite.

What puzzled Chen Rui was that Elemental King, Satan, and Python once called the Abyss the ‘cursed one’. What is this curse?

From the old peak stage of the Kingdom Level powerhouse and the dialogue with Quilliana, it can be seen that the combat power of the main plane should be the most powerful initially. For instance, the 3 archangels all have SSSS+++ combat power while the rest of the trainers’ strength of the same generally far exceeds the current levels. And now, the 3 archangels are easily defeated by Quilliana. There should be only one reason for such a huge gap, the Gods.

Quilliana called the 3 archangels ‘subordinates who have lost their master’s blessing’ and ‘bereaved dogs’, so the strength weakening of Michael and the people of the entire main plane is due to the loss of ‘God blessing’, which is the buff of God power.

The reason for the fall of the Gods should be that Lucifer used the supreme key to open the ‘eye’ in the void. And in my dream, that blood-red eye was transformed by some kind of existence besieged by the ‘galaxy’.

The galaxy is likely to be the Gods, so what is the existence of the ‘eye’? What is its relationship with the Abyss?

Chen Rui felt that he couldn’t wrap his mind around, but under the current situation, the most important thing was how to resist the Abyss’ attack and reduce the loss of life, which was also equivalent to reducing the recovery speed of the Abyss.

Chen Rui came back to his senses and looked at the people in the Galaxy Divinity Temple with their eyes closed and the star power lingering all over them, then he didn’t think about it anymore. He closed his eyes and merged into that vast galaxy.

Holy Light Mountain.

An emergency meeting was also held.

The 3 leaders of Pope Vantis, Holy Lady Eudora and Archbishop Pusmeer presided over the meeting. The 3 cardinals, Chief Judge Seus and Zamindar, the current master of the Heavenly Thunder Hall, all attended the meeting.

It could be said that this was the highest leaders’ summit below the Holy Light Mountain super-level.

“Just received the intel from the Blue Glory Capital, Landbis has finally eliminated the invasion of the Abyss army. She is currently organizing the military and civilians to evacuate westward. The Lubo Empire is in danger.” Vantis glanced at Eudora, “What do you think, Your Holiness Eudora?”

Vantis was old, and the position of the pope would not last long. Eudora of Raphael Faction had now become the most powerful in the Holy Light Mountain. She was almost certain to be the next pope.

According to the agreement between Michael and the other 2, if one could become the pope, the person would get more faith accordingly. As for the open and secret power struggles below, it was simply a contest between ants in the ‘earthly world’, which was of no importance. What’s more, the current focus of the 3 archangels was on the Abyss. After returning to the White Cliff, they immediately began to heal their injuries and prepare to deal with Quilliana. Regarding the trivial matter of the pope’s position, they only said ‘make up your own mind’.

As soon as Vantis came up, he asked Eudora for her opinion, which was self-evident. Eudora looked at the crowd, showing a confident expression, and spoke up, “2 matters are imperative. The first is the westward withdrawal of church personnel. The churches in the Blue Glory Empire, the Iron Gate Empire and other places have been destroyed. The clergies and believers have suffered heavy losses. The power of the church must be transferred to a safe area as soon as possible. The second thing is to unite. The shocking Demon Realm Royal Highness Prince Consort… I believe you all know his identity. Currently, he is already the equivalent existence as Sir Michael and Sir Raphael. He has formed an alliance with the 3 archangels in the Golden Estate. As far as I know, this time the Blue Glory Capital was able to resist the attack of the Abyss due to the special troops from the Demon Realm. Although he is from the Demon Realm, in the face of a common enemy, unity is the general trend. We should promote the process of this unity. For the church, the more free cannon ashes, the better.”

Eudora’s words almost spoke what Vantis wanted to say, and her tone was unceremonious, which seemed to upstage the leader. Vantis smiled without being bothered by it, “Her Holiness Holy Lady is right, now the 3 archangels are in closed-door training in Light Divinity Temple. We should deal with these matters as soon as possible. Your Holiness Eudora will be in charge.”

Everyone nodded. Zamindar, the master of the Heavenly Thunder Hall, spoke up, “Now the Blue Glory Empire is dead. In the battle of Fansidian, the Divinity Temple Knight Legion and pastor legion suffered heavy losses. Should we transfer Sir Parsali and Ms. Miranda back to the White Empire Cliff?”

Eudora glanced at Zamindar lightly, “Empress Landbis has a very high prestige in the Blue Glory Empire. This time she has shown extraordinary courage in sticking to the capital. Although the Blue Glory Empire was temporarily destroyed, many subjects still escaped. In the future, the use of Landbis will still be very high, so her safety must be protected. I reported to Sir Raphael before, requesting to dispatch Parsali to support and escort. It is also because of the church safeguard of the Holy Empire. I even sent my only personal apprentice Miranda out, do you think I have any selfish motives?”

Zamindar shook his head and didn’t say anything else. In fact, everyone here knew that Parsali had been targeted and squeezed out by Eudora. This time was obviously a public revenge. She wanted to use the Abyss to eliminate dissidents, but Eudora sent Miranda out as well, which left him speechless.

A sneer expression flashed across Eudora’s face. Parsali knew too many secrets about her, some of which could directly affect her ascension to the pope’s throne. Although according to Parsali’s personality, he would not reveal under normal circumstances, only dead people couldn’t speak. Hence, in the name of righteousness, she sought Raphael’s order to dispatch Parsali to reinforce Fansidian urgently, and she also sent her own apprentice Miranda to monitor, in order to completely eradicate Parsali. As for Miranda, she had already forced her to sign a contract. Compared with the position of the pope, sacrificing an apprentice was nothing.

“Okay, it’s decided!” Eudora made a firm conclusion, and Zamindar clenched his fists.

At this moment, the Divinity Temple Knight outside rushed to report, “Everyone…”

In the distant sky of the White Cliff, the pure white clouds gradually turned blood-colored, and the color slowly spread toward the Holy Light City. Everywhere they passed was coated with a layer of eerie blood-red.

chapters.title: Chapter 1234: Fear
chapters.body:
Chapter 1234: Fear

The top of the Holy Light Mountain, Light Divinity Temple.

“Michael, the Great Bright Sword Formation consumes too much power. My current kingdom power is almost exhausted, so I need more faith power to replenish it, otherwise I can’t hold it anymore.” It was none other than the human world’s peak stage of the Pseudo-God, Raguel, who had bickered with Chen Rui when the door between the 2 worlds appeared previously.

“Raguel, don’t be too greedy! 1/3 of the faith power accumulated by the Holy Light Mountain has been given to you, isn’t that enough?” Michael raised his brows, almost on the verge of a fit.

After the defeat to Quilliana last time, the 3 archangels returned to the Holy Light Mountain with injuries. In order to deal with the powerful Quilliana, Michael found the Great Bright Sword Formation left by Light God.

The power of the Great Bright Sword Formation was extremely powerful. It was frightening in the battle of the Gods back then. The problem was that the core of this sword formation was God power. Due to the fall of the Gods, it was no longer possible to obtain the blessing of God power. Even the main plane enchantment activated by the Gods was weakening year by year, and they could only use life sacrifices to sustain it.

Michael’s plan was to use the faith power and life force condensed in the Book of Creation to forcefully replace it. Although the power was greatly reduced, it was somewhat worthwhile.

Raguel was originally 1 of the oracles, with the talent of absorbing, transferring, and instilling faith. This time, the 3 archangels came to borrow Raguel’s talents to finish the Great Bright Sword Formation to fight against Quilliana.

Raguel wanted to join the Holy Light Mountain back then and take a share of the profitable Light God’s faith. However, because of his greedy temperament, he was disliked by the 3 archangels, so he was severely rejected.

Although Raguel did not dare to turn hostile because of his inferior strength, he always held a grudge. Now the 3 archangels wanted him, he of course took advantage of the opportunity to raise the price to make many excessive demands, including 1/3 of the faith power accumulated by the Holy Light Mountain. Now he was asking for more faith, causing the outrage of the 3 archangels.

Michael’s eyes were full of murderous intent. Normally, he would have turned hostile already, but for the sake of the Great Bright Sword Formation, he could only hold back his rage for the time being.

Gabriel sneered, “Raguel, don’t be too greedy! We made a promise first, and we even signed the contract long ago!”

“At our level, we naturally understand that there are loopholes in the contract. Now I’m the one who contributed the most, and it has exceeded expectations. Naturally, I need the compensation.” Raguel glanced at Gabriel mockingly.

“Are you on the same level as us?” Raphael was indeed an expert in pulling hatred. Raguel lushed with just one sentence.

“Why don’t you find someone else to finish it? I’m a lonely man anyway, not as big as your Holy Church family.” Raguel knew that the Great Bright Sword Formation couldn’t do without him.

“If you talk more nonsense, we will go on separate ways.” Gabriel said coldly, “The destruction of the Abyss is indiscriminate. The worst case is that when Quilliana comes, everyone will be annihilated together.”

Raguel narrowed his eyes, looked at Michael, and provoked, “Can Gabriel represent you?”

“Of course!” Raphael said first, “The 3 of us have always advanced and retreated together.”

Michael couldn’t take it anymore. He looked at Raphael, then at Gabriel before he nodded, “Since you are so persistent, then void the contract.”

Raguel’s eyes twitched. He just wanted to take the opportunity to bargain. If he really voided the contract, the ‘safety regulations’ on the contract would also be invalid. Judging by their demeanor, they might kill him immediately. This was the opponent’s lair. He didn’t have the confidence to escape from 3 archangels.

“The Great Bright Sword Formation is almost done, and you let me give up now?” Raguel said with an unusually thick skin, “The most urgent task now is to fight the Abyss together. Let’s put everything else aside. “

The 3 archangels were very disdainful of Raguel, but now was not the time to care about it. The Great Bright Sword Formation must be finished as soon as possible. Just now, Gabriel deliberately threatened Raguel just to agitate him, not really to give up.

At this moment, Michael suddenly sensed something. He flickered and disappeared. Not only Michael, but the other 3 also sensed something strange. They hurriedly left the Light Divinity Temple.

Looking forward from the Holy Light Mountain, a large piece of blood red in the sky was rapidly spreading toward the Holy Light City.

“The Abyss!” Raphael’s facial expression changed. The Abyss, which should have been wreaking havoc in the eastern part of the continent, actually invades the Holy Light Mountain! Quilliana’s injury heals so quickly?

The last battle at the Silver Moon Celestial Capital made the 3 archangels realize the gap between themselves and Quilliana. If the Great Bright Sword Formation had been finished, they might still be able to fight against it. However, the Great Bright Sword Formation had not yet ready now!

The White Cliff was the base camp of the Holy Church. It had stood in the world for an unknown number of years. No one could shake it. Not only because of faith and deterrence but also because of strength. Perhaps thanks to Chen Rui and Python, after breaking into the Holy Light Mountain several times, the defense had been strengthened several times more than before. Now when encountering a situation, their reaction speed was extremely fast.

Especially after Michael announced the highest alert status, all defenses were turned on.

Fortress-like iron gates appeared on the originally spacious avenue. The seemingly decorative pillars on both sides turned into magic circle towers, which could attack all approaching enemies. The Holy Light City had also become a well-armed fortified city. All the Glorious Knights, judges, including the Holy Light Guardian Knight under the jurisdiction of the 3 summits, and other forces were rapidly gathering.

The speed of the blood cloud gradually slowed down, but the iron gates began to collapse at a speed visible to the naked eye. The constantly activated magic circle towers also collapsed rapidly. All this was caused by an endless tide of blood-red creatures.

Those blocked along the way, whether it was the Glorious Knight or the buildings, were all swarmed in the bloody torrent.

At the last iron gate, countless meteors shining with white light descended from the sky. The torrent at the forefront was gasified and disappeared under the envelope of meteors.

Several flames and sword lights flew out from behind the bloody army in an attempt to fight back, but the flames were instantly extinguished among the stars. Only the sword lights could barely hold on, but they were still unable to stop the falling meteors. This was no ordinary light element magic [Light Cloud Flying Star]. Instead, it contained the kingdom ultimate move [Star Judgment] of the peak stage of the Demi-God.

The source of the stars was a silver-white spear engraved with quaint patterns, held in the hands of an 8-winged angel in the sky, the strongest Demi-God Camael.

The radiance of the Spear of Judgment shone brighter. Even the elite Abyss lords were turned into ashes the falling flying stars.

The power of [Star Judgment] was astonishing. All the nearby Abyss creatures were annihilated, but the power consumed was not trivial. After activating it for a while, Camael already felt a little strenuous, but the momentum of the torrent didn’t change at all. They were still advancing one after another as if they didn’t know that death was ahead, including the Abyss lord who caused the most pressure. The entire Abyss army seemed endless without any reduction.

In the torrent of the Abyss monsters, there were some more crystal objects. At a closer look, they were red crystal flowers with a bewitching blood color, Flower of Abyss!

These flowers burst together and turned into blood mist.

In the blood mist, the monsters mutated one after another. The thin gap demon became extremely strong, and the bone spurs of the berserk demon doubled… These changes were not only superficial, it also brought a leap in power.

The originally weak sword lights in the dazzling stars became stronger. Several sword qi crisscrossed and actually tore apart [Star Judgment] before passing through the iron gate toward the direction of the Holy Light City.

Camael was surrounded by flying sword lights before he could stop them. The elite Abyss lord, blessed by the Flower of Abyss, gave Camael a sense of danger. He forcibly suppressed the recoil of the collapse of his ultimate move just now and shook the Spear of Judgement to deflect the sword qi. Then, he pierced through the chest of the Abyss lord in front.

If it was before, even the elite Abyss lord would have been annihilated by this blow, but now the Abyss lord just howled angrily, ignoring the huge hole in its chest and rushing forward without fear of death. Camael didn’t dare to take risks. He appeared on the side of the Abyss lord. The Spear of Judgement made a precise sweep and hit the opponent’s wound from the side. The Abyss lord was finally torn apart.

Camael looked at the large wave of Abyss lords and blazing flame witches that was crazily surging. He waved his hand, and a group of angels appeared in the air behind him and charged to the enemy. There were 6-winged, 4-winged, and 2-winged wings.

Losing the resistance from the air, the army of the Abyss on the ground had quickly approached the Holy Light City. At this moment, a cold snort sounded in everyone’s mind. Immediately afterward, a sunlike brilliance illuminated the entire White Cliff.

Wherever the brilliance went, all the blood red dissipated into particles. In the blink of an eye, the blood color disappeared as quickly as the ebb tide.

When the ‘sunlight’ gradually subsided, all the blood color in the vision and the terrifying feeling of suffocation disappeared. Even the opponents of Camael and others in the air were turned into flying ash.

Glorious Knight and the believers of the Holy Light City knew that the 3 archangels must have made the move. They all cheered and their morale was greatly boosted.

However, the blood red had not completely disappeared. They surged again with the endless momentum.

Raphael on the Holy Light Mountain pointed his long silver stick to the front, and he was about to strike again, but he was stopped by Michael, “You can’t kill all these little pawns. Don’t waste your power in vain, the real enemy…”

“Has already appeared.” Gabriel answered, and the silver-red pupils that had been closed before had been opened.

In the bloody cloud above the rear of the Abyss army, a pair of eyes faintly appeared.

These eyes carried a strange power. Just looking at them, one’s soul would feel an irresistible trembling as if all the strength or courage had disappeared, leaving only fear.

The bloody cloud became thinner and thinner as if it was absorbed by something on the ground. Fiery lava flowed on the ground, countless crystal blood flashed in the lava, and countless Flowers of Abyss spread.

In the center of the crystal light, a figure gradually became clear.

This was a man’s body with a handsome appearance, long purple hair, a slender figure, pointed ears, and the pupils of both eyes were shining with a strange blood color.

“Sosbach, Fear Lord!” Michael said in a deep voice, and he clenched the Holy Cross Sword in his hand.

chapters.title: Chapter 1235: Great Bright Sword Formation, Red Flame Bow
chapters.body:
Chapter 1235: Great Bright Sword Formation, Red Flame Bow

As soon as Sosbach appeared, the original cheers of the Holy Light Mountain stopped abruptly. Everyone felt a heavy oppression inexplicably as their throats seemed to be choked by something. It was extremely difficult to even make a simple sound.

Under this intangible coercion, an inexplicable fear grew in everyone’s mind. The handsome man showed a strange smile and walked up to the sky step by step as if there were invisible steps under his feet.

The Abyss army also stopped, and the monsters who were charging violently before suddenly became extremely quiet. However, in the minds of everyone in the church, the feeling of oppression was overwhelming like the serenity before the storm.

Michael, Gabriel and Raphael appeared in the air at the same time. Raguel did not follow. He just watched the battle from a distance.

“Sosbach!” Michael’s eyes locked tightly on this enemy who gave him a strong sense of oppression, “You alone? Where’s Quilliana?”

“Only you guys, do I still need Quilliana?” Sosbach smiled a little more contemptuously, “Hand over the Book of Creation, maybe I can grant you to be the slaves of the Abyss.”

“The Book of Creation?” Raphael said coldly, “You will have a chance to see it at the end of your life.”

Sosbach shook his head, “Ignorant and fearless weaklings, haven’t you realized your own weakness?”

“Cut the nonsense. Since you’re here, either one of us will die.” Gabriel said in a deep voice as the Holy Song Sword exuded a powerful sharp qi.

The 3 archangels were connected with each other. The kingdom power that had been charging for a long time burst out at the same time. In the blink of an eye, the kingdom had merged together, and the resonance it emitted was like the dream words of Ancient Gods.

Among the 3 rulers of Abyss, Hatred Lord Quilliana was the strongest. Although Fear Lord Sosbach was not as good as Quilliana, he was ranked second, stronger than Despair Lord Dillosro. With the strength of the 3 archangels, they already sensed the terrifying breath from Sosbach, so they immediately activated the strongest combo technique [Oracle Formation].

Sosbach, who was trapped by [Oracle Formation], didn’t panic. His body steamed with a bloody mist. This mist surged as if it was going to explode the kingdom power of [Oracle Formation]. All of a sudden, Sosbach’s sneer froze a bit because the mist stopped expanding very quickly. In fact, it was shrinking rapidly as waves of huge pressure came.

Sosbach couldn’t help being a little surprised that the opponent’s kingdom was not defeated. Instead, he was slightly surprised. It seems that the strength of the 3 archangels is not as vulnerable as imagined.

This was the home ground of the Holy Light Mountain. [Oracle Formation] not only integrated the kingdom of the 3 peak stages Pseudo-God, but it also gathered the enormous faith power of the entire Holy Church.

The 3 archangels had gone all out to hide the truth and steal faith under the guise of Light God in order to become God. Gabriel even found another way, going to the Black Prison Desert to set up a desert goddess in the name of Tezaneer. It was a pity that they still couldn’t really absorb and utilize faith power.

Even if the utilization rate was extremely low, this accumulated faith energy was extremely astonishing. Therefore, this time the [Oracle Formation] activated by the 3 archangels at home was far more powerful than the last time they faced Quilliana.

“Lost sinner, accept the guidance of the [Light of Cleansing Sin]!” The voices of the 3 archangels sounded through the Holy Light Mountain at the same time. They immediately launched [Oracle Formation]’s killing move [Light of Cleansing Sin].

A huge halo appeared around Sosbach, containing the highest profound meaning similar to universe stars. In an instant, the power of the entire Holy Light Mountain was concentrated in this halo. All the bloody mist lingering around Sosbach was absorbed by this halo, unable to function.

The halo shrunk little by little. Sosbach clearly sensed the danger, and the contempt on his face disappeared. His fists turned into countless overlapping images and struck toward the halo.

The halo oscillated slightly, but it wasn’t affected. It still continued to shrink. Cracks began to appear on Sosbach’s face and body, and blood red color appeared in the cracks.

Raguel’s eyes lit up in the distance. The combat power of the 3 archangels is amazing. They have actually reached this level. As long as Sosbach dies, the Abyss army attacking the White Cliff will disappear— Fortunately, I didn’t really break the relationship with them just now.

At this moment, Sosbach shouted loudly as his body changed. The pupils in his blood-red eyes turned dark green, sharp horns appeared on his head, his muscles quickly pumped, his thin body became extremely strong, sharp bone spurs appeared on his back, and the ferocious exoskeleton covering the whole body was like natural armor.

The fist continued to wave.

This punch landed on the white halo. The halo didn’t tremble as before, but everyone’s mind trembled violently.

1 punch, 2 punches, 3 punches…

The speed was not fast, but it was like a heavy hammer hitting everyone’s mind.

Not to mention those with ordinary strength, even Camael and other super-level angels showed painful expressions and covered their chests. Raguel and the 3 archangels were even more uncomfortable. Raguel’s facial expression was pale, and the most severely injured was 3 archangels who had activated [Light of Cleansing Sin]. Their whole body was dimmed, and their facial features were bleeding from the impacts.

Sosbach stopped his punches and walked out of the halo of [Light of Cleansing Sin] in a leisurely manner. Every time he took a step, the trembling of the halo behind him became more and more intense.

“ Bang! ” The halos finally collapsed together with the entire [Oracle Formation]. The 3 archangels were launched back flew upside down as if struck by lightning, and they were sent away and fell from the sky.

“This kind of lowly little trick actually took me 10 punches. It’s a pity that those faiths were wasted.” Sosbach shook his head as if he had just completed a trivial thing.

Raguel, who was in the air opposite him, felt a chill and fear arose. If it was me, I won’t be able to take a single blow of the combined kingdom power of the 3 archangels just now. Yet, it completely collapsed under Sosbach’s 10 punches!

The defeat of the 3 archangels caused the shock and fear of the light believers in the city of Holy Light below. The 3 archangels, who had always been high and second only to Light God, were actually defeated by the leader of the Abyss army!

Sosbach took a deep breath, and he seemed to enjoy the emotion of fear very much. His dark green pupils looked even deeper, “What a wonderful taste. As a reward, I will give you a deeper fear.”

With that said, the Abyss army, which had been quiet all this time, started to surge frantically, causing panic in the Holy Light City.

3 rays of light rose slowly into the air again. It was the 3 archangels. Their [Armor of Faith] were all cracked. A lot of blood overflowed from their mouths and noses. Activating the [Light of Cleansing Sin] already cost them a huge price. Now that [Oracle Formation] had collapsed, the 3 of them suffered even serious injuries.

“We can only use that move.” Michael exchanged glances with Gabriel and Raphael, then his eyes set on Raguel. “Raguel, if you still want to live, you can only fight with all your strength.”

Raguel understood what Michael meant. As he gritted his teeth, bursts of cold air radiated from his body, and ripples of breath rippled out. Michael, Gabriel, and Raphael appeared beside Raguel. The Holy Cross Sword, the silver long stick, and the Holy Song Sword were stacked together, flashing white light one by one. A powerful breath of the purest and most origin radiated out. It merged with the cold air and condensed into a huge ‘crystal’.

“The Book of Creation?” Sosbach immediately sensed the creation origin breath, “Use your own life force to merge with the Creation Vessel, how foolish!”

The crystal was shining brighter and brighter. The surrounding light quickly began to dim as if all the power in the world had been gathered.

Sosbach didn’t take the 4 of them seriously and raised his claw. He said disdainfully, “Don’t you understand? The truest origins mutually restrain and mutually enable each other. If you want to use the Book of Creation to restrain me, it’s useless.”

With that said, thousands of rays of light with unparalleled sharp qi whistled toward Sosbach at an incomparable speed. Sosbach stretched out his right palm and greeted forward. With that palm as the center, a faint blood-colored barrier appeared.

When those rays of light hit the blood-colored barrier, they were gradually corroded like snowflakes falling on the flames.

However, the blood-colored barrier did not completely wipe out the lights. A ray of light penetrated the barrier like lightning and swept past Sosbach’s face, leaving a scratch by the sword. A drop of dark green ‘blood’ flowed out from the wound.

Sosbach’s dark green pupils contracted slightly. This was the first time since the battle that he was actually injured. Although it was a minor injury, it was still an injury after all!

Immediately afterward, more rays of light penetrated the blood-colored barrier. The speed and sharpness of these rays of light were extremely astonishing. For a moment, many scars appeared on Sosbach’s body.

Sosbach didn’t expect the opponent’s power to break through his own defense. In fright and anger, he waved his claws violently. A bloody cloud containing terrifying power was launched at the crystal formation composed of the 4 people.

The lights from the crystal riddled the bloody cloud with holes. The light instantly merged into a huge sword shape. When the bloody cloud was hit by this sword, it was torn apart without resistance.

After the huge sword pierced through the blood cloud, it flew toward Sosbach with undiminished momentum. Sosbach was caught off guard and got torn apart. The huge sword also gradually disappeared.

Michael and the others were spirited, but they soon looked solemn again, because what was torn just now was just a phantom. The real Sosbach had already appeared in another direction.

“This is not a pure creation power attack, but… the Great Bright Sword Formation!” Sosbach finally understood.

“Now you notice it? At least you know how you die!” Michael sneered as the crystal formation began to glow again.

“Shameless boasting!” Sosbach shook his head disapprovingly, “It’s just the incomplete Great Bright Sword Formation, strong in offense and weak in defense… Even if it’s in a complete state, it can unleash its true might without God power.”

Sosbach really had amazing eyesight. He could see the weakness of the Great Bright Sword Formation at a glance, but Michael and others were not distracted because of this. The faith power formed by the Book of Creation quickly began to condense.

Although the killing blow from the sword formation missed just now, it could be seen from Sosbach’s dodge that he was quite afraid of this sword. He was even slightly injured by the previous sword light.

The next blow had to kill Sosbach completely.

“Despair is Dillosro’s favorite trick, but it’s a pity that he’s not here, so let me kill your hopes… completely!” With that said, Sosbach already had a red bow in his hand, and he slowly pulled it. There was no arrow on the bow, but the intangible power that was constantly charging was getting more and more terrifying. It had faintly condensed into an energy arrow, emitting a tyrannical light.

Seeing this bow, Raphael couldn’t help blurting out, “1 of the elf’s 3 bows, Red Flame Bow!”

TL: Elf bow? Are the Abyss Rulers elves before?

chapters.title: Chapter 1236: Eagerness
chapters.body:
Chapter 1236: Eagerness

Michael and the others were well-informed people, so they couldn’t help being slightly surprised when they heard Raphael say the Red Flame Bow.

The 3 elf bows were the treasures of the elf tribe. They were all artifact-level. They were said to be weapons used by the Moonlight Goddess back then. The Moonlight Cloud Sea Bow was the best, and the other 2 bows were the Mysterious Moon Bow and the Red Flame Bow.

The Mysterious Moon Bow was severely damaged in the battle of the Gods, and its power was greatly reduced. During the rebellion of the elf tribe 20,000 years ago, Elf King Span used his own life as a medium to overdraw the power of the Mysterious Moon Bow in order to temporarily seal the power of the Abyss. The Mysterious Moon Bow also lost almost all of its power. It was kept more as a symbol.

The Mysterious Moon Bow could gather the power of moonlight to attack, the Red Flame Bow shot flame power, and the Moonlight Cloud Sea Bow was the strongest, able to convert and launch the arrow of faith. The Mysterious Moon Bow existed in name only, the Moonlight Cloud Sea Bow had been passed down as a token of the elf empress through the ages, and the Red Flame Bow disappeared decades ago. Unexpectedly, it appeared in the hands of the Fear Lord.

The 3 archangels and Raguel understood another thing at the same time. The 3 elf bows must have the bloodline power of the elf tribe to activate them. The appearance of Sosbach before his transformation is clearly the half-elf. This may be 1 of the reasons he deliberately chose the half-elf shell.

“It’s just the former Red Flame Bow. It has been baptized by countless lives and destruction. Now it may be called… the Abyss Bow.” Sosbach’s smile became more and more evil. All his wounds had recovered. Although his tone was casual, his gaze was dignified. Obviously, this arrow was no small matter.

The destructive power gathered on the Red Flame Bow was getting stronger and stronger. Even before it was released, the surrounding space had turned into a vacuum under the charging of that terrifying power.

Michael and the rest also had no choice but to launch their attack. Under the channeling of the Book of Creation, the power of the Great Bright Sword Formation had been raised to the peak. Its power was even stronger than before. Once again, thousands of fierce sword lights converged into 1, forming an unparalleled giant sword, stabbing toward Sosbach. Contrary to the power of the Red Flame Bow, the surrounding space not only had no special distortion. Instead, the space was solidified by the sword qi. Everything in the world became this sword.

Sosbach didn’t dodge. The murderous intent in his dark green pupils soared as he suddenly let go of the tensed bowstring. A blood-colored light stream went straight through, shattering the space along the way.

Both sides’ attacks were like lightning. From a distance, a snow-white giant sword collided with a blood-color light stream. The opposing force of solidify and shatter intertwined.

At the moment of final contact, the onlookers felt that the vision suddenly slowed down.

Then, the whole world trembled violently. The earth and the mountains shook. The space was shattered. Many consciousnesses were directly annihilated in this shaking. It took a long time before the shaking stopped.

The Abyss army surging from behind had evaporated into flying ash in the terrifying impact wave just now, and the mountains had been razed to the ground. The Holy Light City, which was full of defensive enchantments, had almost completely collapsed. If the faint enchantment power of the 3 main peaks wasn’t connected with the Holy Light City, the entire Holy Light City would have been turned into dust.

A rumbling sound came from behind the Holy Light City. The highest symbol of the Holy Church, the Holy Light Mountain, actually collapsed by half!

The torrent of the Abyss was endless. Soon, they soon began to spread again. On the contrary, on the Holy Light City side, they not only suffered heavy casualties, but even the most important barrier was destroyed. The situation was dire.

In the air, the 2 sides were still facing each other from a distance.

Sosbach slowly put down the Red Flame Bow. Affected by this action, the exoskeleton armor wrapped on Sosbach’s body showed several cracks, and there were countless small wounds on his face and body with dark green blood oozing out.

The corner of Sosbach’s mouth twitched slightly. The crystal of the Great Bright Sword Formation on the opposite side trembled, and they turned into countless crystal powders and disappeared without a trace.

The Great Bright Sword Formation was crushed!

Michael, Gabriel, and Raphael plummeted from the air. Their breath had dropped to the lowest point, losing all combat power. The expressions and gazes of the 3 of them all looked despair —The Great Bright Sword Formation, which combined the power of the 4 of them, was defeated by Sosbach with 1 arrow!

Unlike the fall of the 3 archangels, after the collapse of the Great Bright Sword Formation, Raguel was sent flying away. It seemed that he was recoiled by the huge force of the Red Flame Bow, but in fact, he was flying away using the recoil, attempting to escape from this dangerous battlefield.

Sosbach looked at the 3 archangels on the ground, and he didn’t kill them immediately. Instead, he flickered and chased after Raguel – The slash from the Great Bright Sword Formation just now was extraordinary. Even though it was offset by my arrow, it gave me a threatening feeling. There is another key factor in it, that is, the Great Bright Sword Formation is not complete. If it is an optimal stage sword formation, even if I have Red Flame Bow, it is hard to say who will win the battle.

Now that the 3 archangels are seriously injured and lose their combat power, there is nothing to fear. Instead, this Raguel is obviously the core of the Great Bright Sword Formation and must be eradicated first to avoid future troubles.

While Raguel was escaping, a blue light appeared beside him. He had already entered the space door. Originally, the Holy Light Mountain enchantment was extremely powerful, so ordinary space doors could not be opened at all, but the power of the enchantment was greatly weakened by the earth-shattering blow just now. The direction of Raguel’s escape was the weakest position of the enchantment.

Suddenly, Raguel felt the space around him solidify, and his whole body was pulled backward by a strong power. He actually returned to the Holy Light Mountain from the space door.

Raguel was so shocked that he was out of his wits as he heard the most frightening voice behind him, “You can’t escape.”

Raguel turned back in fear, only to see Sosbach behind him. His face had returned normal and the cracks in his armor had also healed automatically. Obviously, he did not suffer any real damage.

“As the core of the Great Bright Sword Formation, you actually still have so much power left. Turns out you have planned to escape long ago. If you go all out, maybe you can let me spend a little more energy.”

“I’m just…” Sosbach’s evil smile made Raguel break out in cold sweat. He thought quickly and hastily spoke up, “I’m willing to surrender to sir and become the subordinate of the Abyss!”

At this time, Raguel couldn’t care less about anything in order to save his life.

“ Oh? ” Sosbach looked at Raguel playfully and nodded, “Right, I seem to have said something like this at first. Okay, I accept your surrender…”

Raguel breathed a sigh of relief. Just as he was about to speak, there was a sudden warning. Before he had time to dodge, he felt his neck tightening. His neck was already tightly grasped by Sosbach’s claw.

“Sir, forgive me, I sincerely surrender!” Raguel was taken aback, and he quickly explained.

“So what?” Sosbach’s claw tightened slowly.

Raguel was terrified as he clearly felt the threat of death. He struggled to speak up, “Sir, didn’t you say…”

“That was before the battle. Now, the preferential treatment time is over.” Sosbach’s smile became more and more cruel. As he exerted force, Raguel’s protective kingdom power was crushed in an instant. Before he could beg for mercy, his body burst into pieces.

On the ground, just as Sosbach was chasing Raguel, Gabriel stood up slowly with the Holy Song Sword supporting her body. Half of her silver wings had been broken, and she was drenched in blood. She took a deep breath, as if she had made up her mind. A faint white light appeared in her hand – The breath of creation origin.

“Michael, Raphael. Combine your Creation Vessel with the Book of Creation.”

Michael also stood up. When he heard Gabriel’s words, he suddenly understood, “Do you want to…”

“It’s better for 1 person to die than 3.” Gabriel’s silver and red pupils showed a firm light as she said calmly.

This kind of indifference carried a calm determination.

Raphael was panting violently, but when he heard this sentence, he was shocked.

“The 3 of us survived the 2 battles of the gods. I didn’t expect this day will come.” Michael said with a miserable smile. The same white light appeared in his hand, but it didn’t reach out to Gabriel. “If someone must do it, it should be me, the top archangel.”

“You don’t have to argue with me because this is my choice.” When Gabriel said the word ‘choice’, another shadow seemed to overlap in her mind. Her blood-stained face became more and more peaceful, “Besides, you’re different from me. You still have attachments, but I…”

“Tezaneer…” Raphael clenched his fists, and the nails that had sunk into the flesh were already pinching blood.

“Call me ‘Gabriel’.” Gabriel glanced at Raphael, “Live on.”

Raphael’s body trembled violently. He wanted to say something, but he couldn’t say it. He walked to Gabriel’s side step by step, and a ball of white light appeared in his hand. It was 1/3 of the Creation Vessel and a page of the Book of Creation. The 2 clusters of white light of the same origin quickly merged together.

At this moment, Raphael’s hand moved. His knife-like palm struck heavily on the back of Gabriel’s neck.

Gabriel never thought that Raphael would attack her at this time. She was seriously injured and her defense was the weakest, so she fainted immediately.

Raphael embraced Gabriel’s limp body, and he controlled the fused Book of Creation with his other hand, shouting, “Michael!”

The change just now was completely beyond Michael’s expectations. It was too late to stop him. He exclaimed, “Raphael! You…”

Raphael shook his head, “We’re running out of time. If we hesitate any longer, we won’t even have anyone to take revenge.”

Michael took the fainted Gabriel, then he took a deep look at Raphael as if he came to know this companion for the first time. Subsequently, he merged his Creation Vessel and the Book of Creation into Raphael’s hand.

Raphael looked at Gabriel in Michael’s arms as an unknown light flashed in his gaze, “Go!”

Michael didn’t hesitate. The golden wings on his back ignited, and he turned into a white light while holding Gabriel. He flew back with all his power.

At such a rapid speed, some kind of distortion occurred in space. Michael’s figure also began to distort and blur.

Sosbach, who had just killed Raguel, immediately sensed the change in space. He was not surprised by the escape of the 3 archangels. He sneered, “Under my watchful eyes, you still wish to escape?”

——With the strength of Michael and the rest, even if he was not injured, he was still sure to catch up, let alone the current situation. Raguel was the best example.

Just as Sosbach was about to catch up, he suddenly sensed an extremely dangerous feeling in his mind as if he was locked by a terrifying power. As long as he acted rashly, this power that even he was afraid of would explode completely.

The source of this feeling was the figure glowing with white light on the ground.

It was Raphael!

“You combine the Book of Creation and the entire Holy Light Mountain with your life force…” After sensing Raphael’s intention, Sosbach turned into a bloody light without thinking and rushed toward Raphael.

“I used to laugh at Python for being fettered by meaningless feelings.” Raphael whispered to himself without looking at Sosbach, “Actually, that’s what I really long for…”

Before he finished speaking, he completely turned into the origin white light, which filled the entire White Cliff instantly.

TL: Raphael really annihilated everything before the Abyss does?

chapters.title: Chapter 1237: Unite
chapters.body:
Chapter 1237: Unite

The light didn’t have too strong an oscillation or destruction. Everything within the covered area became quiet, including the torrent of the Abyss monsters that swarmed in after and the panicked Holy Light City.

Everything began to distort.

The blood-red lava actually turned into streams of clear springs while the Abyss monsters solidified into clay sculptures, which were washed by the clear spring and softened into earth and rocks one after another. The collapsed Holy Light City turned into a jungle as trees appeared one after another. The ground was full of flowers and weeds, full of vitality.

However, the lives here no longer existed, revealing a dead silence.

‘Dead silence’ and ‘vitality’ combined to form a weird atmosphere.

This was a new creation. From another perspective, it was actually another kind of destruction.

The white light in the center of the light suddenly dimmed a little. It was already caught in the palm of a claw.

The skin of this claw was ripped open, and dark green blood dripped continuously. Not only the claw, but the entire hideous figure was mutilated. Many wounds were so deep that bones could be seen.

“You damn ant! You actually severely injured my soul origin!” Sosbach roared angrily. Under the fluctuating mood, the white light in his claw couldn’t be controlled. The bone spurs on his shoulders and elbows trembled and grew out green leaves.

Sosbach’s face twitched. His claw flew out with streams of dark green blood, covering the Book of Creation in his hand layer by layer. His whole body and the ‘blood cells’ in his hand gradually dimmed, and he disappeared in the blink of an eye.

For a world where communication was already fairly advanced, news traveled extremely quickly, especially… bad news.

Over the next few days, a sensational news shocked the whole world.

The Holy Church’s base camp, the White Cliff, was completely destroyed by the Abyss. It had become a dead land!

The White Cliff is a sacred place in the hearts of countless the Holy Church believers, with the blessing of Light God. It is guarded by powerful angels headed by the 3 archangels, and countless Glorious Knights, which is the core of the sacred and supreme faith; unexpectedly, it was actually completely destroyed by the Abyss monsters!

What about the Glorious Knights? What about the Angels?

What about… God?

Not only the believers of the Holy Church, but all humans fell into panic — Even a colossus like the Holy Church is trampled by the Abyss, so who else can stop these monsters?

For a time, more and more people fled to the west of the mainland. Many empires were still far away from the eastern continent where the Blue Glory Empire was located. The emperors and noble families had already fled; the people had also fled one after another. The law and order were chaotic. The Black Death Followers or criminals took the opportunity to make trouble. The entire human world was in an unprecedented turmoil.

But if even the Blue Glory Empire and the Holy Light Mountain were destroyed by the Abyss monsters, where would it be safe to flee?

Chen Rui received the news the day after the Holy Light Mountain was destroyed, and he was also shocked. He immediately activated the [Star Gate], and he came to the star point of Light Divinity Temple.

No doubt, the original White Cliff had changed beyond recognition. The Holy Light City as well as the Holy Light Mountain had become a jungle ruin. Chen Rui sensed a familiar power from it— Creation origin power!

It must be caused by the 3 archangels using the Book of Creation, but the coverage and power of the origin power of creation are extremely astonishing. Even Chen Rui couldn’t help being horrified.

What kind of battle actually took place?

Is the enemy Quilliana, Sosbach or Dillosro?

Where is the Book of Creation now? Have the 3 archangels all fallen?

Are there any other survivors?

Anyway, the destruction of the White Cliff had become a fact. Chen Rui did not stay on the ruined White Cliff. He went straight back to the Demon Realm and arranged some related affairs before he enter the closed-door training state again.

The White Cliff today may well be elsewhere tomorrow, even the Demon Realm…

My homeland and my most cherished people are likely to be destroyed.

Therefore, it is more and more urgent to improve my strength.

The progress of merging the constellations was not as smooth as imagined. Even Zola couldn’t find the feeling she had when facing Quilliana. On the contrary, in the Super System, Chen Rui deduced more mysteries of [All Star Gods View] based on the planet faith and life aroused by the power of the constellation activated by everyone, which enhanced the power by a lot.

However, Chen Rui, who had fought against Quilliana, knew very well that this was not enough, far from enough.

Faced with more and more refugees, the empires in the west were under tremendous pressure. The biggest Dragon Bright Empire was the most impacted. Not to mention that the Abyss was far away in the east, the swarming refugees itself was a disaster. Food, clothing and other supplies were having inflation, the currency depreciated rapidly. There were riots and looting incidents from time to time. The order was in chaos.

Lex the Great hastily called a meeting of leaders of kingdoms in the nearby western continent to discuss how to deal with the current situation. The first problem was the resettlement of refugees. Due to the large number of people and a series of chain negative effects, even an empire like the Dragon Bright Empire could not accommodate so many refugees. What’s more, this was only the beginning. As time went on and the Abyss spread, the situation would get worse.

After some discussions, the empires had reached a certain consensus on refugee resettlement, commodity prices, economy and other issues. However, everyone was very clear about the fact that what was currently discussed was just a stopgap measure, just like treating a disease. It could only cure the symptoms but not the root cause. The real ‘root’ was the Abyss.

Therefore, the meeting finally discussed 1 of the most important core topics: How to deal with the Abyss.

At present, the Abyss had destroyed most of the empires in the eastern part of the human world, and the central and eastern parts were just lingering with one last breath. If this continued, the bloody frenzy would spread all the way. Sooner or later it would cover the entire world. At that time, humans would be completely extinct.

Even if the power of the Abyss could not be destroyed, the monsters must be stopped. Otherwise, the humans would be defeated before the Abyss came.

The combat power of the Abyss was unquestionable. Judging from the countries that were destroyed before, the most terrifying thing about monsters was their endless numbers and their fearless special attribute. The battle at the Blue Glory Capital was the only battle won between humans and the Abyss. In the end, Landbis evacuated from the Blue Glory Empire with the army and the people.

From the perspective of the number and strength of the army, even the Human Coalition Army could not compete with the Abyss head-on, so other factors must be relied on, such as geographical advantages.

The Thorn Fortress, which was as strong as the Blue Glory Empire, only persisted for 2 hours. However, this geographical advantage was man-made. The geographical factor proposed by Lex the Great was the largest natural barrier – The White Sea.

The sea area of the White Sea was extremely large, dividing the human world into 2 parts, east and west. This was also 1 of the reasons why there was a holy empire in the east and the west, but it was only cold wars for a long time. If the distance was too close, under the conflict of interests, perhaps there would be frequent wars. Originally, there was also the Cloud Rider Empire in the middle, and they were called the 3 Holy Empires.

It was precisely because of the White Sea that it took a lot of time to go from the east to the west of the human world by the normal route.

Starlight Empire, Loya Empire and other empires spend a lot of effort to build the teleportation portal to cross the White Sea. With the teleportation portal, the time of traveling between the east and west continents could be greatly saved. That was why Raizen the Great only gave Chen Rui a month plus to welcome the bride at the Blue Glory Empire.

If the teleportation portal was destroyed, they could only cross the White Sea by ship, which would take at least a few months, if everything went well.

Therefore, the White Sea was the best barrier for humans to resist the Abyss. The Abyss monsters usually had the power of flames. With the sea, the monsters would be restrained accordingly.

The most urgent task was to quickly establish a strong unified defense line in the empires along the White Sea, then form a large number of fleets and aerial legions to prepare for naval battles with the Abyss army.

The teleportation portal must be destroyed. As for the empires east of the White Sea… it could only depend on their own escape speed.

Geographical conditions alone were not enough. At most, it could only stop the Abyss for a while. More and stronger forces were needed.

Dragons, elves, hobbits, orcs…

These added up to nothing compared to the weight of 1 party—— Demons.

In the battle of the Blue Glory Capital, the demons’ reinforcements played a vital role. The unprecedentedly powerful army was actually not shown in the Golden Estate war. If it weren’t for these strange troops, even with the reinforcements from Sandro and various races, Landbis and the Blue Glory Capital could not hold back the Abyss army.

Only by uniting with the demons would it be possible to contend with or even defeat the Abyss. Now the ‘door’ still existed in the Golden Estate. Once the humans were destroyed by the Abyss, the demons would definitely not be spared. They basically shared a common fate. I believe that the 3 empresses of the Demon Realm… including my son who actually controls the Demon Realm, will understand this truth.

Previously, on the Golden Estate battlefield, didn’t ‘Arthur’ stop fighting with the 3 archangels for this reason?

All empires had agreed to unite with the demons, but they were all quite cautious. When humans were at their most critical and weakest, would the demons really cooperate instead of entertaining with evil intentions, secretly planning to take this opportunity to conquer the human world directly? After all, the feud between the 2 sides would not be resolved in a short while. No one could guarantee whether it would lead the wolf into the house. However, everyone was very clear that judging from the current situation, relying on human’s own strength to fight alone was basically a dead end.

Cooperation was imperative.

Somewhat unexpectedly, shortly after Lex the Great sent an envoy to the Demon Realm, he immediately got an accurate answer from the Demon Realm’s 3 empires confederation, agreeing to cooperate and deal with the Abyss together.

The Demon Realm would dispatch troops to the human world and join hands with humans to attack the Abyss army in the White Sea.

From the point of view of the human world, this was the second batch of troops sent by the Demon Realm after the last battle of the Blue Glory Capital; and from the point of view of the Demon Realm, this time it was really joining forces with the human world, because this time it was not just Chen Rui’s ancient legion that was dispatched last time, but a real army of demons.

This meant the first real cooperation between humans and demons.

chapters.title: Chapter 1238: Sparkle
chapters.body:
Chapter 1238: Sparkle

In a clear sky, squads of knights were leading their horses on the rugged mountain road. These knights were wearing uniform white light armor, and there was the unique mark of the Holy Church on the breastplate. Obviously, they were Glorious Knights.

Glorious Knights used to be the most admirable knights in the human world. They had countless glory and halos, but now they were decadent.

Since the Holy Church was established, it had encountered numerous setbacks and disasters, but it had always been able to stand firm. However, in the battle of the White Cliff this time, from the angels to the pope and the church, all were martyred, which was equivalent to the destruction of the core of the entire church. It was like a person whose soul had been destroyed, but the flesh and blood were still there; they were just like walking dead.

After losing this ‘soul’, Glorious Knight’s ‘glory’ no longer existed.

The knight leader wiped the sweat off his face and shouted loudly, “Hurry up! After the mountain, we can see the port! There is a ship prepared for us by Royal Majesty Palgres!”

“Royal Majesty Palgres has spent a lot of money to reserve the time slot for the teleportation portal, but we don’t have any extra time, because within 3 days, all the teleportation portals in the east will lose function. If you want to survive, follow along!”

These words made the knights speed up a little bit – The teleportation portal could directly reach the western continent. Once it was turned off, they could only go by sea. With the current situation, the White Sea had been sealed layer by layer by the Human Coalition Army of the western continent. Let alone whether the ship could be obtained, even if they could obtain, it was impossible to cross the White Sea alive. Just those magic floating minefields and defensive formations were enough to kill them all.

This Glorious Knight legion named ‘Dawn’ was originally the resident legion of the Toure Empire which was a kingdom in the east, adjacent to the Starlight Empire. They had been trying to appease the Holy Church for many years. Although the territory was only medium in size, it ranked among the top 5 in the entire human kingdom in the contribution list of the Holy Church. The number of Glorious Knights stationed in the empire was several times that of ordinary kingdoms.

In fact, the ‘Royal Majesty Palgres’ mentioned by the commander was the king of the Toure Empire. After the Blue Glory Empire and other empires were wiped out by the Abyss, many countries including the Toure Empire were facing great dangers of life and death. Palgres paid a huge cost to Roger, 1 of the 3 cardinals, and obtained the blessing of the knight legion to evacuate the kingdom.

However, during the evacuation, the Glorious Knight Legion suddenly got the astounding news that the White Cliff was completely destroyed. The Glorious Knights were lost.

Palgres was also a cunning character. He immediately seized this opportunity and recruited the Legion Commander Duncan of the Dawn Legion, wanting to take the opportunity to seize the armed force into his own hands.

The Abyss army had invaded the Toure Empire. It was only a matter of time before the empire would be destroyed. He, the king, would lose everything. However, as long as there was strength in hand, a comeback was not a delusion. Moreover, in this chaotic situation, no matter where he fled, strength was the foundation of standing. For this reason, Palgres did not hesitate to pay a huge price and utilized the relationship to obtain the time period for using the Starlight Empire’s teleportation portal for himself and these Glorious Knights. Of course, the premise was the allegiance of the Glorious Knight.

There were not many Glorious Knights who had shown their allegiance, but Palgres believed that as long as they reached the teleportation portal of the Starlight Empire, no one would make the wrong choice facing life and death.

The road ahead was becoming more and more steep and rugged. Even Palgres, who was being carried by the elite guards on their backs, broke out into a cold sweat at several corners. It was not because he didn’t want to take the flat road. The latest intel showed that the speed of the Abyss army was astonishing. It bypassed the expected 2 cities in front of the Zoya Empire and Toure Empire and came directly to the capital. This forced Palgres to escape in advance again. The civilians who got the news also flocked to flee. The main road was congested with fleeing refugees. If he took the main road, he would be slower.

This small road led to a secret military port, where enough ships had been prepared long ago. They could reach Starlight City within 2 days. Even if the monsters invaded the capital faster than expected, the civilians on the road could also become a ‘natural barrier’ to stop monsters.

A young Glorious Knight accidentally slipped and fell to the ground. He cried loudly, and the knights couldn’t help being stunned.

The team leader at the side whipped his whip and said angrily, “Johan! Stand up! How can a Glorious Knight have such a weakling like you!”

The young knight cried, “Leader, what I’m crying not because of this, but… my sister is still in the capital city! She’s only 11 years old!”

The team leader was shocked, and he couldn’t whip anymore.

The sadness of the young knight quickly became contagious. Someone said, “My mother is also in the city…”

“My wife and son haven’t escaped yet.”

“My…”

For a moment, an atmosphere of sadness and helplessness spread in the entire legion. Everyone’s mind seemed to be covered with haze. Their steps slowed down involuntarily.

Palgres, who was in the middle of the team, immediately noticed the anomaly. He shouted, “Hurry up, everyone! The Abyss monsters are not far behind. We won’t be able to leave if we delay any longer. The most important thing is to stay alive!”

Palgres’ voice didn’t play a big role. At this time, the Legion Commander Duncan at the front of the team got the news. He tapped his feet, flew into the air, and shouted loudly, “What’s wrong? Go!”

“Sir Duncan!” The former young knight Johan cried. “Please allow me to go back and protect my family!”

Duncan looked down at the knight with a flash of hostility in his eyes as he said sternly, “When you joined the knight legion on the first day, I said that there is only 1 duty of a soldier, to obey! No matter what reason you have, I have only 1 order, go forward!”

John gritted his teeth and raised his head, “Sir, we are Glorious Knight. When we became knights on the first day, our manifesto…”

Before he finished speaking, his chest was already pierced by a white light with potent power, and he died instantly. Duncan slowly withdrew his hand, looking down at the crowd coldly with murderous intent in his eyes, “Those who disobey the order, die!”

Duncan had been a legion commander for many years. His prestige was so high that many people lowered their heads and not dared to look at him. Duncan knew that this was the moment when people’s minds were most easy to change, so he had to suppress them immediately. He shouted, “Eldera!”

“Yes!”

A man flew out from the front line and floated beside Duncan. It was his most powerful deputy, Eldera, who was usually fair and ruthless. His prestige in the army was extremely high.

“You will supervise the entire army. Anyone who stops, behead him!”

“Yes!”

Duncan was about to fly back when he suddenly felt a warning. Before he could react, his heart turned cold as he had already been pierced by a sword. The hilt was held in Eldera’s hand.

Duncan looked at the bloody sword piercing out from his chest in disbelief, then he gritted his teeth and said, “Eldera, you…”

His most trusted and most powerful subordinate actually stabbed his heart with a sword from behind at this moment!

This turn of events shocked everyone, even Palgres. The squad stopped for a moment.

The icy breath lingered on Eldera’s sword. Before Duncan could finish his sentence, his body was frozen quickly. After a while, he turned into an ice sculpture. The sword shook and shattered the ice sculpture.

Palgres was the quickest to react. He said in a hoarse voice, “Legion Commander Eldera, please move on.”

This sentence was tantamount to acknowledging Eldera’s new position. As a king, Palgres was no stranger to the intrigue for power. This Eldera had obviously planned to replace Duncan long ago. Now, he finally succeeded in taking the position by getting Duncan off guard.

It seems that it is time to win over this new legion commander as soon as possible.

Eldera ignored Palgres as he just looked down at all the knights coldly and spoke up, “Can anyone tell me, what is the knight’s manifesto?”

The squad was silent for a moment before someone answered, “I swear to treat the weak kindly.”

Someone continued, “I swear to stand up against brutality.”

“I swear to go against all mistakes.”

“I swear to fight for the defenseless.”

“I swore to help anyone who asked me for help.”

“I swear no harm will be done to any innocent.”

“I swear to help my brother knight.”

“I swear to be true to my friends.”

“I swear to die for the one I love…”

“It seems that we haven’t forgotten yet.” Eldera clenched the sword in his hand and shouted loudly, “So, what have we done? In order to live in humiliation, we discarded the faith in our hearts, the oath we kept, and our true glory!”

“I don’t know what life and dignity will be in this catastrophe. I only know that our relatives and those unarmed civilians are facing the cruel monsters from behind, and we, the knight holding the sword, are just escaping first!”

The knights all bowed their heads in shame; many even started to cry.

“Our faith center has been destroyed, but we still have faith in our minds!”

“Even if it’s just for our loved ones, for those who need our help to buy a moment to evacuate!”

Eldera swung his sword and pointed at the sky behind that was turning red, “Glorious Knight!”

“Eternal glory!” The knights below raised their swords one after another and turned around.

Palgres stared dumbfounded at the Glorious Knights returning together, showing an incomprehensible look, “Stupid lunatics…”

Perhaps, his highness would never understand this truth.

In this world, there were always some stupid people.

The world always needed these stupid people.

Toure Empire Capital.

Before the torrent of the Abyss that crushed everything, squads of silver cavalries appeared.

They charged without hesitation.

They were so insignificant compared to the torrent.

However, under the sun, it was so dazzling.

This was the sparkle of life.

The true holiness and glory had always existed in people’s minds, not the so-called temple.
