chapters.title: Chapter 1239: The Assembly Of The Strong Ones
chapters.body:
Chapter 1239: The Assembly Of The Strong Ones

Groups of people rushed toward the teleportation portal like a flood. There were initially many guards around the teleportation portal, but now it was empty because the soldiers who maintained order had withdrawn themselves.

The crowd of people pushed each other, shouting, calling, and crying intertwined. Everyone wanted to rush into the teleportation portal as soon as possible and leave this dangerous eastern continent.

Today was the last day before the teleportation portal would be closed.

Seeing that the light portal was gradually dimming, almost everyone’s eyes were red. They rushed forward desperately. Under the enormous impact, they trampled on each other. There was howling all over the field as blood flowed on the ground.

At this moment, what was crushed was not only life but also humanity.

In the end, the light of the teleportation portal was completely extinguished. Everyone’s hope was also extinguished.

On the other side of the continent, the Dragon Bright Empire general who commanded the soldiers to create despair, the Legion Commander Raymosad of the Human Coalition Army ‘Sea Soul’ Legion looked at the destroyed teleportation portal and remained silent. He knew the consequence of his order very well.

The Human Coalition Army’s highest commander, Lex the Great, understood the feelings of this old subordinate. He patted Raymosad on the shoulder and sighed, “It’s not you or us who are wrong, but this world and this era.”

Landbis and Sandro on the side also nodded. Although the Blue Glory Empire had been destroyed, Landbis still had loyal and famous generals like Sandro and Altos beside her, and she also had a large number of troops at hand. It was rare to have valuable experience fighting the Abyss. Landbis did not give up on the people at the last moment and fought a bloody battle with the Abyss. In the end, she successfully evacuated with most of the people, which made her prestige rise instead of drop. After withdrawing to the western continent, she still received considerable attention and became the first military advisor of the Human Coalition Army. Sandro served as the Human Coalition Army’s most important first commander of the White Sea defense line.

“Don’t blame everything on the era, because we are the ones who created this era.” A voice sounded behind him. Landbis looked at that person with a complicated look in her eyes.

If not for those changes, she had long been this man’s wife, but there was no ‘if’ in the world.

“Arthur…” Lex the Great’s gaze was also somewhat complicated. According to his strength, although he was the Holy Empire’s ruler, the Human Coalition Army Commander, he was not qualified to speak in front of this person because of his strength. He had far surpassed the level of ordinary creature. He needed to be looked up to. Only the few people at the peak stage could stand side by side with him.

Nonetheless, this man was his son.

“Call me ‘Chen Rui’, father.” Chen Rui smiled lightly, and he did not look at Landbis or Lex, but instead looked at the person beside him, “Maybe, what we can do is to create more hope with our own hands? Michael.”

It turned out that the one next to Chen Rui was none other than Michael, the leader of the 3 archangels who was rumored to have died following the White Cliff destruction some time ago!

Next to Michael was Gabriel. However, there was no Raphael anymore.

In the battle of the White Cliff, Raphael paid with his life to use the faith power accumulated on the White Cliff in order to trigger the outbreak of the Book of Creation. In the end, his soul and body were annihilated.

Of the 3 archangels, there were only 2 left.

Michael shook his head and said in a deep voice, “We can’t see anything other than hatred.”

This ‘we’ included Gabriel, who closed his eyes, always maintaining a kind of indifference as if she didn’t hear the conversation between the 2 parties at all. Chen Rui could vaguely sense that this indifference contains 2 completely different and complex breaths. On the one hand, it seemed to be a flame that might burn at any time. On the other hand, it seemed to be ashes that had already been burned out.

“Whether it’s hatred or hope, if the 3 rulers of Abyss really have the strength as you said, these are just bubbles.” The person who said this was another giant-level figure, Satan.

On the other side there were Zola, Catherine, Auglas, Paglio, Isabella… Apart from the missing Python, almost all the super powerhouses of the Demon Realm were gathered here. The same was true for the human world. With the lessons of the previous mass destruction of the eastern part, the super powerhouses in the human world all understood that this was a real critical moment of life and death. No one could stay out of it. Those who ignorantly think that these had nothing to do with their own wisdom and safety would only face a dead end.

With the lessons learned from the White Cliff, the dragons did not dare to neglect. They quickly evacuated from the Dragon Valley, came to Storm Island through the teleportation portal, and temporarily lived in the alchemy civilization ‘human world base’ originally built by Chen Rui. A large number of combat power, led by Pagris himself, came to the west bank of the White Sea.

The elf tribe and the hobbit tribe were severely damaged in the battle of the Blue Glory Capital. They reorganized their forces and dispatched 3 legions. The orcs tribe also sent the strongest Beamon Legion to join the army of the elf tribe.

As for the Demon Realm, the alliance of the 3 empires sent a real elite legion, with Catherine as the first commander and Gerant as the deputy commander, to the human world. The legion dispatched by the City of Stars far exceeded the previous one. The troops lost last time were also quickly remanufactured with various resources.

The destruction of the eastern continent of the human world was already unstoppable, and the Abyss monsters would definitely attack the western continent. The best barrier against the Abyss army was the natural barrier of the White Sea.

It was conceivable that there would be the most intense decisive battle at that time. Not only the Abyss monsters, but also the 3 rulers were likely to appear.

Michael did not refute Satan as usual, but he showed a sad expression as he said, “In terms of individual strength, we are indeed no match for the 3 rulers. In the battle of the White Cliff, Gabriel, Raphael, Raguel and I, with the help of the Holy Light Mountain’s faith power and the Book of Creation, went all out to activate the Great Bright Sword Formation against Sosbach, but we still failed in the end…”

“Even the Great Bright Sword Formation can’t suppress Sosbach?” Satan frowned, obviously knowing the power of the Great Bright Sword Formation.

“To be precise, it is the Great Bright Sword Formation in its incomplete form,” Michael said with a rhombus-shaped golden crystal full of cracks in Michael’s hand, “I asked Raguel to help me finish this sword formation at the cost of 1/3 of the power of faith I have accumulated in the Holy Mountain of Light. Unfortunately, it was not in its complete state at the time. It couldn’t even exert even half of its power, so it was finally defeated by Sosbach with the Red Flame Bow.”

“Wait a minute.” Satan narrowed his eyes, “If we can repair and complete this sword formation, maybe we still have a chance.”

Michael shook his head, “Even if it can be repaired, the Book of Creation that drives it has already fallen into the hands of the Abyss…”

“The Great Bright Sword Formation doesn’t have to be powered only by the power of creation,” Satan’s eyes shone brightly, “Don’t forget, there is also ‘destruction’.”

Michael’s eyes lit up, but Satan set his eyes on Chen Rui. Chen Rui understood Satan’s meaning and nodded, “I can give you that page of the Book of Destruction.”

What was needed most now was to strengthen their forces. Everything else could be ignored.

There was a gleam in Satan’s eyes, and he nodded.

The current elf prophet Kilanya frowned and asked Michael, “Sir Michael, I would like to ask a question. Is the Red Flame Bow you mentioned just now 1 of the 3 elf bows? In the elf tribe, the Red Flame Bow has been missing for a while, and only elf bloodline can activate it. Why can Sosbach use it?”

“It is indeed the Red Flame Bow. But it should have been corroded by the power of the Abyss. As for Sosbach… he appeared in front of us in the half-elf body.” With that said, a golden light flashed out from Michael’s finger, showing the appearance of Sosbach when he came to the White Cliff.

Seeing the half-elf, Kilanya blurted out, “Saul!”

“Who is Saul?” This time it was Chen Rui who asked the question.

Kilanya glanced at Chen Rui, “He is the husband of Empress Liv’s cousin, Princess Nancy, and the father of… Blanche.”

“Blanche’s father!” Chen Rui was taken aback. He remembered Blanche had said that her father went to the Nightmare Wilderness to search for the springwater of the Fountain of Vitality in an attempt to save the Tree of Nature. Unfortunately, he fell into the Nightmare Volcano, leaving no corpse left.

Unexpectedly, this dead ‘missing person’ had turned into Fear Lord and destroyed the Holy Light Mountain!

Blanche became Hatred Lord and her father became Fear Lord. Is there any connection or mystery here?

“By the way, the Red Flame Bow was also lost during that time…” Kilanya recalled for a while, showing a sudden expression, “Could it be that Saul stole the Red Flame Bow!”

“Ms. Kilanya.” Chen Rui thought for a while and said, “I also have a question, the Abyss… seems to be closely related to the elf tribe? When Michael and I fought against Quilliana, she happened to be in the area around the half elf’s cemetery. She also seems to have suffered strange injuries? Moreover, 20,000 years ago, Quilliana deliberately tried to open a portal in the elf tribe. She even consumed a lot of power to infect the Tree of Nature, creating a fallen chaos in the elf tribe?”

“The Abyss and the elf tribe are not directly related.” Surprisingly, it was not Kilanya who answered this question, but Satan, “It’s just because the Silver Moon Celestial Capital is located in a special location. This place… was a certain ‘battlefield’ back then. The Silver Moon Celestial Capital is located there by no accident.”

Chen Rui understood a little bit in his mind, and said, “So, the reason why the Silver Moon Celestial Capital is located in the Jade Forest Sea is that the Moonlight Goddess deliberately set it up for some kind of residual power left over from the battlefield? So, the elf tribe has therefore become the focus of the Abyss?”

“If there is Goddess’ blessing, this kind of problem will not exist. Unfortunately…” Kilanya sighed and did not stay on this topic. She changed her tone, “If it is confirmed that Fear Lord has fused Saul’s soul, then even if the Red Flame Bow is eroded by the power of the Abyss, it is fundamentally still the elf artifact, so it can be restrained in a targeted manner because we have 1 of the strongest 3 bows in our hands, the Moonlight Cloud Sea Bow. Although the celestial capital is destroyed, the artifact has its own power and has not been destroyed. When Princess Philly evacuated from the Blue Glory Capital last time, she went to the ruins of the celestial capital and found this bow.”

Michael nodded, then he shook his head again as he said, “That’s true, but Princess Philly’s strength is too weak to compete with Sosbach.”

“That’s right. The Moonlight Cloud Sea Bow is an inherited treasure of the elf empress. Generally speaking, it must be used by a real elf. Even the half-elf cannot exert its power. However, there is another kind of person who can use it.” Kilanya showed a confident look, and her eyes turned to Chen Rui, “That is, the person recognized by the Tree of Nature.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1240: Battle Of The White Sea
chapters.body:
Chapter 1240: Battle Of The White Sea

Human world.

It had been 3 months since the teleportation portal in the eastern continent was fully closed.

Even though the teleportation portal was closed and unable to pass through, and the White Sea had also established a unified line of defense, a large number of humans still came across the sea, wanting to escape to the western continent by sea.

The defending soldiers on the west coast of the White Sea did not completely cut off the way out for these refugees. They set up a special navigation ship team to guide the escaped ships through the defense area in the front sea area. However, the sea area of the White Sea was too large, and the deep sea area environment was very harsh, so the proportion of escape ships that could reach the navigation ship area was quite small. It was unknown how many people died in the violent waves, but no matter what, there was a glimmer of life in the end.

A few days ago, many ships safely reached the west bank of the White Sea under the guidance of the navigation team, but as time passed, the navigation team encountered fewer and fewer ships, which indicated that the situation in the eastern continent had further deteriorated.

In the past 3 months, the Human and the Demon Coalition Army had made a lot of scheduling and preparations, built a unified fortification along the coastline, and formed a joint navy in the shortest possible time through screening and training.

The eastern coast of the White Sea.

The dazzling blood covered the land on the shore. Even the clouds in the sky and the nearby waters were reflected red.

The endless army of monsters was crowded, and the roars and howls filled the entire space.

These Abyss monsters occupied the coast, the last lifeline, which meant that all the humans in the eastern continent were basically doomed.

Although the Abyss monsters were extremely powerful, they were still unable to forcefully cross the vast White Sea.

The White Sea was extremely vast. It was not comparable to a small sea area like the Nightmare Wilderness. It took several months for an ordinary ship to pass through the sea area. Even the blazing flame witch and the Abyss lord with the ability to fly could not fly directly to the west without keeping their feet on the ground except for monsters that had reached super-level. However, this was not a simple flight, but war. Now the Human Coalition Army was waiting for the enemies to wear themselves out. They had set up countless lines of defense and traps in the sea area. Going rashly like this was tantamount to going deep alone and losing the biggest advantage in numbers. Furthermore, if they consumed a lot of power on the way, they would be easily killed by the human powerhouses.

If Quilliana used the power that lava cooled and turned the sea into land, let alone whether it could be successful on this vast White Sea, the cost alone would be too high.

It seemed that the White Sea was posing a big problem for the Abyss. Unfortunately, things were not that simple.

There were special squirmings in the monster army. Strange objects were pushed into the sea on by one.

Bloody ‘ships’.

The strange and terrifying ‘ships’ had skin-like blood-red texture wriggling on its surface, contracting slightly. It looked as if it was breathing. The skeleton of the main body was a real bone. Spines, leg bones, skulls… all kinds of bones were blended together. It was obvious that the source of these bones was the corpses of humans. Each ship represented the destruction of countless lives.

After the bloody ships entered the water, the Abyss monsters jumped on the ships one after another. The ship was just like some kind of living creature, it drove forward automatically without a pilot.

More and more blood ships appeared, carrying batches of the Abyss monsters, densely packed, into the White Sea.

In the eastern sea area of the White Sea, the magic eyes on the lighthouses immediately discovered these monsters who entered the range, and they immediately reported back to the coalition army intel department of the western continent. Correspondingly, the west bank of the White Sea and the navies who had been waiting at the sea base had also started to act.

The sea was different from the land. The mobilization of the army could not be completed overnight. After getting the intel that the Abyss army crossed the sea, the blockades and magic protections of the sea area had all been opened.

After sailing for 7 days, the bloody ship fleet of the Abyss finally encountered the first line of defense laid down by the coalition army.

Boom!

There was an explosion on the surface of the water, setting off a water pillar that soared into the sky.

A bloody ship was torn apart by the terrifying explosive force. Most of the monsters on the ship died while many fell into the icy sea water. Monsters that didn’t manage to climb up to the neighboring ships gradually sank into the sea.

The explosion was so powerful that even the bodies of the 2 nearby blood ships were torn apart, exposing the gruesome bones. However, the bloody ships seemed to have a certain degree of regeneration ability.

Boom Boom Boom…

Continuous explosions sounded, and the bloody ships sank in explosions again.

This was the most commonly used defensive weapon in naval warfare, floating mines.

Floating mines floated on the water surface and exploded after being triggered. The power of the explosion was quite astonishing. Even if the bloody ships had a certain special regeneration attribute, after triggering the mines, the ships had been blown up a lot.

Just like the war on land, the Abyss fleet didn’t stop and continued to move forward.

The continuous explosions triggered some kind of magic circle trap. There was a strange fluctuation on the water surface, and rays of light flew out. After shooting 1 bloody ship, it seemed to be refracted and went to another ship, and so on. Countless rays of light were intertwined into a huge pattern.

These lights did not have any lethality; they were used for positioning. After about 10 seconds, the real magic circle was triggered.

The sea water began to spin rapidly, and a huge vortex appeared. It had a diameter of over 1,000 meters. All the bloody ships within the positioned range were sucked into the vortex and quickly swallowed up.

Many powerful Abyss monsters, such as the blazing flame witch and the Abyss lord, rose into the sky one after another. Some even activated powerful attacks on the vortex, but most of the fleet was still swallowed by the vortex.

In fact, this was not the power of the magic circle itself, but the sea.

The real function of the magic circle was not to attack, but to trigger the sea’s natural power accumulated for a long time, creating such a vortex with astonishing power and scope.

In the sea, the soft water had great power, so they didn’t need to attack directly. Sea, which was a war environment, could eliminate the enemy by itself.

That’s what naval warfare was all about.

However, the line of defense after being triggered was equivalent to losing its effect. It could no longer produce subsequent damage or threats.

Although the vanguard forces were swallowed up by half, the bloody ship fleet still advanced with the same speed. They were affected by the destruction of their companions in the slightest.

At the same time, at the headquarters on an island.

The intel officer reported, “General, the enemy has appeared in the 27th East Sea Area area. The vortex defense line and the water dragon defense line have been triggered!”

Commander Sandro revealed a pondering expression, “Report the time between the 2 lines of defense being triggered.”

“1 hour.”

Sandro thought for a while and said, “It seems that the enemy’s speed is faster than we expected. They should reach the ice-solid defense line in about 50 minutes. Order the first fleet to set off immediately. After the Abyss passes the ice-solid defense line, launch a head-on attack! The second and third fleets will set off in 30 minutes. Cut off the Abyss army in batches! Pay attention to the layer and formation of the whole army!”

“Yes!”

Next to Sandro was the second commander Gerant of the Demon Coalition Army, nodding secretly. This human general no doubt is extraordinary. He immediately estimated the sailing speed of the Abyss fleet from the time difference between the 2 lines of defense being triggered. He is also very particular with the time to dispatch his own fleet. The ‘’cut off’ of the second and third fleets is a stroke of genius, which can break up the formation of the enemy and offset the endless attribute of the Abyss army.

“ Hey , let me tell you, it doesn’t need to be so troublesome.” Paglio next to him took a sip of wine and scratched his head, “Send a Pseudo-God powerhouse to wipe them out directly. For example, a crazy lady who is proficient in elements. If she launches a few magic big moves, even the screen will be cleared.”

Isabella shook her head and said, “The Abyss monsters are endless. Even if Zola keeps killing them, she can’t kill them all. It just slows down the speed of the Abyss army, which is of little significance. The real root is the 3 rulers. If you can defeat the 3 rulers, the Abyss army will naturally collapse without a fight. In terms of high-level strength, we are at a disadvantage. Now we can only use static braking and maximize tactics to counter the opponent. The Pseudo-God powerhouses, including Chen Rui, Zola, Michael, and the others can’t waste any power, and they can’t easily expose themselves. They must wait patiently and lure the rulers of the Abyss to appear on their own initiative. Only by that, we have a chance of winning.”

“Madam Aunt doesn’t need to explain. Someone’s IQ has always been negative, so don’t waste your effort.” It was Roman who made the trouble, “No wonder sometimes he can’t even beat Duoduo in magic chess.”

Paglio’s face became gloomy as he looked at Roman with contempt, and he retorted, “Your IQ will only be positive when you see widows or wives.”

“Shut up, you 2 bastards. This is the headquarters, not the bazaar!” Delia couldn’t bear it anymore and dragged the 2 guys out.

27 East Sea Area.

The surface of the sea had already frozen into ice. This kind of freezing appeared suddenly, and the area was still spreading rapidly. Large areas of bloody ships were frozen and unable to sail normally. Many of the Abyss lords jumped down and used greatswords to break the ice.

Before they finished breaking the ice, the light in the sky suddenly dimmed, and a dark cloud quickly spread in the distant sky. At a closer look, one could see huge metallic puppet shapes. Assemble puppets!

The assemble puppets did not dive down to launch an attack, but they maintained their altitude while throwing bombs downward.

The bloody ships had not fully recovered from the frozen state, so they had no way to dodge. A large-scale explosion occurred in the dense bomb rain. In addition to the damage caused by the explosion itself, the huge waves caused by the aftermath also overturned many bloody ships outside the frozen sea area.

The Abyss army was naturally unwilling to be beaten passively like this. The nearby Abyss lords and blazing flame witches rose into the air one after another and faced the assemble puppets. However, the assemble puppets did not intend to fight. After dropping this round of bombs, they immediately retreated.

The Abyss lord and the blazing flame witches pursued closely, and some of them launched attacks and even shot down some assemble puppets. The puppets still didn’t look back as they kept fleeing.

After the Abyss lords and the blazing flame witches were lured away, the bloody ships that had been frozen by the ice-solid defense line had not completely thawed, but the coalition army fleet appeared in the distance. The magic crystal cannons aimed at these targets that could not move normally. Airships loaded with bombs were slowly rising from the rear of the fleet. For this part of the bloody ship fleet that had lost its air dominance capability, these relatively slow-moving airships were no different than the most terrifying reaper.

The Abyss lords and blazing flame witches who were chasing the assemble puppet seemed to sense something amiss. When they were about to return for reinforcement, a group of giant dragons suddenly appeared from behind and blocked their way.

In the distance, on a gigantic ‘mothership’, more assemble puppets rose into the sky, and the battle of the White Sea, which was related to the fate of the entire world, officially started.

chapters.title: Chapter 1241: Mothership
chapters.body:
Chapter 1241: Mothership

In the air, the assemble puppets lined up in a battle formation and opened fire in unison. Countless missiles whistled toward the Abyss lords and the blazing flame witches in the encirclement. Under the intensive firepower, the Abyss lords and the blazing flame witches were blasted into pieces beyond they could react.

A small number of super-level elites were also killed in this powerful concentrated fire. An elite Abyss Lord at the intermediate stage of the Demi-God appeared in front of the assemble puppets in a flash. When the greatsword in its hand was about to launch a fatal attack, it suddenly sensed a danger. A holy dragon appeared on the opposite side, spurting white flames.

The Abyss lord didn’t have time to dodge. It shouted and waved its greatsword down. Under the terrifying sharp qi, the dragon’s breath was cut in half. The holy dragon had expected this result, so it had already charged up when exhaling the dragon breath. The tail was thrown out like a huge whip. When the Abyss lord had just exhausted its power to slash the dragon breath, it was violently launched away by the whip.

The holy dragon turned into a human form and caught up with the Abyss lord who lost balance in mid-air. He was wearing sharp-edged brass knuckles. In the midst of the cold qi, the tough Abyss lord was actually divided into 2 parts. With quick waves of both hands, the Abyss lord was torn apart and fell straight down.

The holy dragon who easily killed the Abyss lord was none other than Gueroas. Surprise flashed in his eyes as he looked at the new weapon ‘ice battle-axe’ in his hand. What surprised Gueroas was not only the weapon, but also his own strength. If he was facing the Abyss lord of the same level on the battlefield of the Blue Glory Capital a few months ago, even if he had this powerful weapon, it was also impossible to kill the Abyss lord of the same level so quickly.

This was due to Meria’s amazing son-in-law, Chen Rui. After accepting the power of [Star-level Enhancement], although there was a frightening situation where his strength regressed for a month, after that, the foundation was unprecedentedly consolidated and refined. His strength had also increased by a leapfold. He initially had just advanced to the intermediate stage of the Demi-God, so it would take at least a hundred years or longer to advance again. Now he already faintly felt the edge of advancement.

However, Meria and Span were faster than him and had already reached the peak stage of the Demi-God.

This was still a 1-star enhancement. If he could reach 2 stars, his strength would take another leap. It was said that breaking through to Pseudo-God was not a dream. Meria’s 2 daughters, Zola and Isabella, were the best example. Zola’s strength was already on par with Michael’s. Meanwhile, when Isabella was in the Dragon Valley, her strength was not even that of a Demi-God. Now she was only 1 step away from Pseudo-God.

Gueroas’ thoughts were only fleeting, and he quickly went into battle again. This time, the dragons he led were not those Demon Overlord and Demon Emperor-level rookies in the Golden Estate battle. It was the real super-level elites of Dragon Valley. Soon, this batch of ‘aerial legion’ of the Abyss was erased.

The assemble puppets who completed the task returned to the huge ‘ship’, quickly replenishing energy and repairing damaged parts. Throughout the battle, the ‘ship’ itself did not launch an attack, but only served as a ‘base’ for loading combat weapons. Nonetheless, it played an irreplaceable and important role.

If there were fellow crossovers from the earth who come to this world, they would definitely exclaim 4 words.

The battle on the sea was also coming to an end. The high-altitude airship, with the cooperation of the fleet’s magic crystal cannons, had launched a fatal blow to the bloody ships with the magic air bombs. The bloody ships on the sea became fewer and fewer. Eventually, they were all destroyed.

The time victory maintained in this contact war could be described as a complete victory. The human battle against the Abyss basically ended in complete defeat. Even the battle against the Blue Glory Capital was considered a miserable victory. It was the first time they earned such a victory, so their morale was boosted.

The key to victory in this battle was not actually this battlefield, but the battlefield of the second and third fleets.

These 2 fleets were composed of demons, humans and an alchemy legion. The commander was the same person, the Dark Shadow Empire’s General Neo. Neo was not 1 of the 3 generals of the Dark Shadow Empire, but a young man newly promoted by Catherine the Great.

As the Demon Realm’s top sage and the highest commander of the Demon Coalition Army, Catherine brought this rookie general to the human world and entrusted him with such an important task, which really made people nervous. However, it was this ‘rookie’ Neo who showed surprising commanding skills in this crucial battle against the Abyss army.

The command and deployment of various long-range and melee combat units, as well as the grasp of the timing of the battlefield, seemed extremely proficient as if he was a famous general who had commanded countless battles. He did not look like a rookie at all. In particular, the ‘kite’ tactic of fighting while running was eye-opening. The Abyss fleet wanted to go all out, but it could deal substantial damage. It could only be constantly exhausted in the pursuit. The fleet formation had also been scattered into several clusters, which offset the ‘endless’ attribute.

It was precisely because of this that the first fleet was able to easily destroy a large number of the Abyss bloody ships.

Also in command of the ship was Altos, the old mentor of the Blue Glory Empire. He was simply amazed at Neo’s ability as well as the execution and flexible performance of the demon soldiers on the battlefield. They were like experienced veterans that had been fighting the Abyss countless times. They could always cause the greatest casualties on the enemies at the smallest price.

In fact, this Neo also had a title in the Demon Realm, the Dungeon King.

Neo was the well-deserved No. 1 commander in ‘Abyss dungeon’. He also held the records of clearing multiple Abyss dungeons including ‘sea dungeon’. At the same time, he was also recognized as the best commander in monster siege battles.

The development history of the Demon Realm was only a few years earlier than that of humans. The biggest difference was that the demons’ enthusiasm for games and the emphasis that the Demon Realm’s empires attached to this aspect were far from comparable to the human world.

Both of them were facing the Abyss, yet whether it was individual ability or tactics, the demons were much better than humans.

After the vanguard forces suffered unexpected destructive damage, the Abyss fleet that came later changed.

More and more bloody ships moved closer together and began to distort and change rapidly. Those bones and bloody ‘skin’ all merged into one, resembling a huge monster ship.

Merging not only required the number of bloody ships, but also a large number of the Abyss monsters turned into a lava coat around the monster ship. As more and more blood ships were merged, the size of the monster ship further increased. When it finally took shape, it was actually as big as 4 battle ball fields, making it look strange and hideous.

In addition to the increase in size and capacity, the bones of the structural ship body had also become harder. The first to discover this huge ship was the battleship of the third fleet. Surprisingly, even if a powerful magic crystal cannon exploded on this huge ship, it would only cause a small hole or crack. For a giant ship with a huge body, this level of attack couldn’t pose a threat at all, and the crack would automatically recover.

The giant ships not only had strong defenses. Moreover, it could also eject fire bombs with a range similar to that of a magic crystal cannon. What’s even more terrifying was that, in addition to the original monster, there was a new giant creature on the giant ship. It was maroon, looked a bit like a sunflower, and was surrounded by a circle of long tentacles——Abyss’ breeding nest!

The terror of the giant ship with the Abyss’ breeding nest went far beyond that. Wherever it passed, the fish and living creatures in the sea area turned into dry bones one after another, seemingly constantly devouring the surrounding life.

At the same time, around the Abyss’ breeding nest were crystal red flowers, and the ‘mouth’ of the breeding nest would spit out bloody cocoons covered with mucus, which would soon hatch into new Abyss monsters.

With the Flower of Abyss, albeit with a time limit, the combat power of the Abyss monsters had been greatly improved. For a while, the number of casualties of the third fleet increased suddenly.

What troubled Neo the most was that no matter what tactics he used, he couldn’t launch a decisive blow to this giant ship loaded with breeding nests. A giant ship with decisive power was simply unstoppable.

Moreover, the bloody ships at the rear seemed to be still merging with new giant ships, which was definitely bad news.

What Neo could do was to dispatch some battleships to attract the attention of the Abyss giant ship, and try to slow down the pace of advancement.

Just when Neo commanded the third fleet to do its best to conduct an encirclement, he suddenly received a new order – Retreat.

Seeing the coalition army fleet evacuate, the Abyss blood ships surrounded the giant ship and chased after it. At this moment, a huge ship no less than the Abyss giant ship appeared in front of it. It was the first fleet mothership that loaded the assemble puppets earlier.

When the third fleet passed by the mothership, they disappeared one after another.

Then, the waves around the mothership began to rise and fall. Even the giant ship of the Abyss was pushed back by the huge waves.

A huge black figure gradually rose up, and the ‘mothership’ of the coalition army revealed its real face. What just came out of the water was only a small part of it!

The body as huge as a giant fortress was even bigger than the Abyss giant ship, and the whole body was shining with metallic silver light. The rise of this giant mothership had not stopped. It was actually suspended in mid-air.

The Abyss giant ship continuously shot fire bombs at the giant mothership, and the mothership disappeared in an instant before the fire bombs hit the target.

In the next second, a huge figure appeared in the sky, like a proud giant dragon, looking down at the beasts on the ground.

At this distance, even if the Abyss giant ship had twice the range, it still could not hit it.

However, it did not mean that the giant mothership could not attack.

A golden light beam drew a straight golden line and accurately hit the Abyss giant ship.

Originally, even the magic crystal cannon could only hurt the surface of the giant ship, but it was easily pierced through by the golden light. Whether it was the skeleton of the ship or the Abyss monsters, they were turned into particles and dissipated. The entire giant ship was torn apart in the blink of an eye. The broken parts quickly disintegrated. The damage couldn’t be restored at all.

No matter the range or power of this attack, it could be regarded as terrifying.

Commander Sandro and others were shocked by this scene: The Demon Realm actually has such terrifying weapons!

If the demons used this thing in the battle of the Golden Estate, even a talented general like Sandro would not be able to imagine how humans could defend against it.

Paglio and Roman noticed the horrified expression, and the 2 guys who were choking each other just now showed smug smiles.

The ‘mothership’ was precisely the Star Ship transformed from the ancient metropolitan civilization the City of Stars!

The cannon just now was 1 of the 3 main cannons of the Star Ship, capable of destroying defenses and enchantments to the greatest extent—’Break’!

chapters.title: Chapter 1242: Despair
chapters.body:
Chapter 1242: Despair

The Star Ship suspended in the sky looked down at the enemy on the sea. Finally, the golden light stopped. The huge breeding nest giant ship had already been disintegrated, and the originally dense bloody fleet formation appeared fragmented.

There were already quite a few flying Abyss monsters flying toward the Star Ship, but the Star Ship was unmoved. Another pale light that had been charging for a long time spurted out. The target was not the flying blazing flame witch or the Abyss lord, it was still the Abyss bloody ships densely packed on the sea.

This pale light was not as dazzling as the golden light, but when the light hit a bloody ship, all of a sudden, a huge black hole appeared and devoured everything around it, including the massive volume of sea water and countless bloody ships. 1 of the 3 main canons of the Star Ship, a large-aoe attack black hole similar to the enhanced version of [Star Devouring] – ‘Annihilation’!

As the black hole continued, the bloody ships of the Abyss were devoured continuously, and a large number of gaps suddenly appeared.

After Guradam solved the source of rule energy, the Star Ship had a steady stream of rule energy. The current reserve was quite amazing. The attack consumption of this main cannon was simply a drop in the bucket, and the power could be activated to the maximum with confidence.

At this time, the blazing flame witches and the Abyss lords in the sky had already flown over quickly, and the silver armor of the Star Ship had already rotated open, revealing the densely packed cannon muzzles.

These defense cannons were all controlled by gremlin servants who were the best at manipulating. There were millions of gremlin servants. Although their own combat power was low, they were indispensable multi-functional arms for the entire City of Stars. Not only could they repair and manufacture various machines as well as control various weapons in the City of Stars, but the mutated excellent gremlins could also drive the assemble puppets to unleash a combat power multiple times higher than itself.

Thousands of rays of light shone. Although the power of these rays was not comparable to that of ‘Annihilation’ and ‘Break’, it was still above the magic crystal cannon. Besides, it did not have the cooling weakness of the magic crystal cannon. The firing frequency was quite fast, and the efficiency was even more astonishing. The Abyss monsters were riddled with holes before they got close.

Groups of the titans appeared on the Star Ship in the form of a ‘deck’. Countless lightning bolts crisscrossed in the space, wiping out all the remaining monsters that slipped through the cannons.

After the black hole of ‘Annihilation’ disappeared, almost no blood red was seen in that sea area.

After a short time, the bloody ships from the rear arrived one after another. Although the bloody ships still seemed endless, when facing a powerful existence like the Star Ship with the ultimate weapon, it obviously no longer had the previous momentum.

No matter how many ants there were, they could kill an elephant, but they could not kill an unreachable goshawk.

Of course, although the Star Ship was close to the highest level of level 6 civilization capital, it was not the level 6 capital after all. Even if there were more than 1 level 6 capital in the ancient alchemy civilization plane back then, it was still destroyed by the Abyss.

The combination of geographical factors and tactics was the most important condition for the current situation of absolute suppression.

At this time, the first fleet and the second fleet appeared again. Using the previous tactics, they scattered the Abyss bloody ships in clusters. On the sea, the Abyss monsters could not exert their speed on land, and the giant breeding nest ships they created with much difficulty were destroyed by the main cannons of the Star Ship one after another, so they could only be beaten passively. The coalition army once again gained the upper hand.

Just after the new round of bloody ships fleet was swept, the following bloody ships did not advance immediately as a strange atmosphere suddenly appeared in the air.

The soldiers on the coalition army fleet felt oppressed and heavy in their minds. The morale and hope that had been high due to the victory suddenly plummeted, and a kind of despair arose inexplicably in their minds.

Immediately afterward, a huge vortex appeared out of thin air in the sea area of the coalition army fleet.

The appearance of this vortex was very sudden, and its power was super strong. The coalition army fleet was devoured by the vortex.

From the position of the Star Ship, the surface of the sea was a huge human face, and the vortex was a huge gaping mouth.

Seeing that the first and third fleets were about to be devoured, the Star Ship ejected a dazzling purple light beam into the vortex.

1 of the 3 main cannons, capable of inflicting powerful damage on soul-like or ‘intangible’ enemies–‘Mind’!

The vortex trembled, and the devouring force suddenly became weak. Many ships that had just been swallowed were ‘spat’ out. The ‘human face’ was distorted as it gradually sank into the water.

The officers and soldiers of the fleet felt that the ‘despair’ emotion suddenly weakened a lot. After receiving the order to retreat immediately, they followed the retreating water and retreated to the rear with full power.

The strange movement of the sea water did not really calm down. After a while, a huge water curtain rose from the sea surface. A human face slowly rose from the center of the water curtain. The huge eyes glowed with a faint blue light. A looming blood-red could be seen in the blue light.

Those eyes were very terrifying. Some soldiers accidentally looked into those eyes, and the despair in their minds suddenly became 10 times stronger. They couldn’t bear it anymore and jumped into the sea to commit suicide.

In order to cover the escape of the warship, the Star Ship immediately attacked the human face. The 3 main cannons ‘Annihilation’, ‘Break’ and ‘Mind’ were launched one after another.

Previously, the power of the 3 main cannons could still cause a certain amount of damage, but the attack effect became weaker later on. To be more precise, the power of the ‘human face’ became stronger and stronger.

The black hole of ‘Annihilation’ could not even devour a drop of water in front of the water curtain as if it was just a decoration; ‘Break’ pierced through the water curtain, but it had no effect; only ‘Mind’ had a certain effect, but it could only make the water curtain slightly blurred and reduce the ‘despair’ breath to a certain extent.

The human face ignored the fleeing warships and set its cold gaze on the Star Ship in the sky. The space around the Star Ship began to distort slowly. The control center of the Star Ship received an alarm of attack.

A transparent dome appeared on the periphery of the Star Ship, which was the strongest rule energy shield. However, the pressure of the surrounding space became stronger and stronger while the energy of the rule energy shield began to decline rapidly. The recharge could not keep up with the consumption speed at all.

Seeing that the defensive shield could not be maintained, at the last moment when the shield collapsed, the Star Ship sprayed out a purple ‘Mind’ with all its remaining might.

A contemptuous expression appeared on the human face. It let the purple light hit its face, but the look of disdain immediately froze. The whole face was suddenly torn apart, and the water curtain disappeared.

On the sea, 6 people appeared.

They were Chen Rui, Michael, Gabriel, Satan, and Zola; a man who was surrounded by them.

The man had a burly figure and short black hair. The part that should be the white of the eyes was blood red, the pupil was blue, the facial features were deep, and the whole body was covered with exoskeleton-like armor.

The man looked at the armor with cracks on his body, and his eyes were still full of contempt, “Sly ants, do you think you can sneak attack me like this?”

“Dillosro, today will be your death!” Michael said coldly. At the same time, a crystal light shone from his body.

This man was 1 of the 3 rulers of Abyss, Despair Lord Dillosro!

The last blow of the Star Ship just now was not for attacking, but for teleporting.

Among the 3 main cannons, ‘Mind’ not only damaged the soul, but it also had the magical function of teleporting. Through the main cannon, the allies could be teleported to the shooting position unscathed.

The lethality of the Star Ship obviously attracted the attention of the big fish Dillosro. After confirming the appearance of Dillosro, the Star Ship launched the long-prepared Chen Rui and the other 4 together for a single blow. Although Dillosro was not killed, it also made him suffer a small loss.

Michael, Gabriel and Zola formed a triangle formation, emitting a scorching crystal light. It looked like a huge crystal. A dark red light appeared in the hands of Satan in the crystal, and he gradually blurred into nothingness. Combined with the crystal, it looked like a huge clock-like disc.

A purple starlight shone from Chen Rui’s body. It was particularly obtrusive in the disc, but it was not superfluous. He gave people the feeling that they were one, like a bridge, perfectly combining the power of the crystal and the disk.

If this formation was a huge clock, then Chen Rui was the pointer on the clock, holding the pulse of the universe.

Feeling the power of this formation, Dillosro’s facial expression changed suddenly. He shouted and activated his best soul shock.

The intangible soul shock was extremely powerful. It was almost about to materialize. The sea water on the entire sea surface was turned upside down. The fishes and sea beasts hiding in the deep sea were turned into dust one after another under the churning of the waves.

However, the huge clock activated by the 6 people only trembled without taking any damage.

In the next second, Dillosro felt its mind swayed as if the hands on the huge clock had ticked for a moment. At the same time, a sense of danger came from his mind. He wanted to avoid it, but the opponent’s attack was as untraceable like the passage of time. Under the mysterious power, it was simply unavoidable, so he folded his hands together, shrunk his body into a ball, and made a defensive posture.

The crystal light shone, revealing countless extremely sharp qi. It encircled Dillosro in it, then it spun up. The seawater below became inconceivably intricate in an instant like an entity slashed by countless sharp blades. It was a spectacular scene.

Soon, the sea water returned to normal. Dillosro slowly let go of his hands. At this time, the shape of Despair Lord had changed. His body size had doubled. The exoskeleton armor and the horny substance turned into sharp horns and bone spurs all over his body armor, head, and shoulders. A tail also emerged from behind.

The Abyss rulers all had the transformation power. They could change into a stronger form of the Abyss, which could make a big leap in strength; the difference was that Quilliana, the strongest, could transform twice while Dillosro and Sosbach could only transform once.

Dillosro looked at his body with shock. Under the huge threat just now, he activated the transformation of the Abyss form without thinking, but even so, his body was still inflicted with countless wounds. Some wounds were actually solid.

“The Great Bright Sword Formation? The Book of Destruction? You’re actually able to use the Great Bright Sword Formation to such an extent without the power of God’s blessing!” Dillosro narrowed his eyes, and the wound on his body healed automatically up.

This kind of self-healing body was somewhat similar to Raphael and Sariel’s physique, which was troublesome, but the premise was the support of power. As long as Dillosro’s power was completely exhausted, he could be killed.

“As expected of the weakest Abyss rulers.” Michael seemed to deliberately imitate Raphael’s vicious mouth, “It was just a tentative attack just now. The next blow will completely shatter you.”

Dillosro smiled, showing his white teeth, “Making people feel hope, then completely despair, this is my favorite. Let’s not talk about whether this sword formation can really kill me, but let me remind you kindly — I didn’t come alone this time.”

TL: 2 Abyss Rulers?

chapters.title: Chapter 1243: Fighting The Rulers With Sword Formation
chapters.body:
Chapter 1243: Fighting The Rulers With Sword Formation

As soon as Dillosro finished speaking, a blood-red light shot straight from the sky, containing powerful destruction power. The spaces along the way shattered.

“Red Flame Bow!” Michael growled with enmity. This kind of power was no longer familiar to him; it was simply unforgettable. In the Holy Light Mountain, it was just such an arrow that destroyed the Great Bright Sword Formation that he had jointly activated with Gabriel and Raphael. In the end, Raphael died, and the Holy Light Mountain, which had been painstakingly managed for many years, was completely destroyed.

Now, when the same Great Bright Sword Formation faced such a blow from the Red Flame Bow again, what would be the result?

The speed of the light was extremely fast. Before Michael could make a sound, it had already torn through the sky like lightning.

However, when Michael blurted out the 3 words, the light had not yet reached the Great Bright Sword Formation.

On the ‘clock’ of the Great Bright Sword Formation, the ‘hand’ moved again, going backward by one frame.

This action obviously happened after the attack was launched, but everyone had a feeling that the action occurred first.

It was as if the order of time had been reversed.

That’s right, ‘time’.

Time was slowing down.

Just like the change of the ‘pointer’, it went backward.

Under the mystery of this ‘regression’, that arrow had not yet reached.

The hand of the clock moved again, moving forward by one frame.

In the next second, the blood-red light suddenly disappeared.

Judging from the shattered and recovered state of the space, it flew back backward.

Everything had returned to its original state. The few changes that happened just now were almost in a split second. A touch of blood red was fleeting in the distant sky.

In the space, a figure gradually became clear. This was a half-elf male with long purple-green hair. The ears were slightly reduced. There was a faint green light in the blood-colored pupils.

Strangely, there were some green leaves growing on the half-elf’s shoulder and arm.

“Fear Lord, Sosbach!” Gabriel’s closed eyes slowly opened with a sharp light. Her body burst into a flame light.

Dillosro was not an alarmist. He really did not come alone. Now, the Fear Lord had appeared. Then, what about the strongest Quilliana?

Sosbach touched the left rib with his hand. There was a shocking wound that was bleeding dark green blood. It was caused by the reflected arrow of the Red Flame Bow.

If it wasn’t for his innate special might power that forcibly broke through the power of time acceleration, which allowed him to dodge at the nick of time, it would definitely not be this simple scratch.

“The power of time? And… reflection attack?” Sosbach didn’t look at Michael and Gabriel who were full of hatred. Instead, he just cast his scorching eyes on Chen Rui and said lightly. “It’s interesting. Although you borrowed the power of the Great Bright Sword Formation, your strength is obviously stronger than the rest of you.”

What Chen Rui used just now was not only the time slowing power of [Slow As Forest], but also the time accelerating power of Satan. The key was the [Mirror Body] he used between slowing down and speeding up to reflect this arrow back! It did not even give Sosbach a chance to react. Unfortunately, he was still the Fear Lord after all. Although blinded by the power of time, he still exerted his powerful instinct and avoided the vital point.

This kind of result was almost irreproducible because the 10-second time limit of [Mirror Body] had been used up. He could only wait an hour later to use it again, and Sosbach would definitely be prepared.

Although the blow just now severely defeated Sosbach, it didn’t hurt his core. However, the figure of Dillosro surrounded by the Great Bright Sword Formation suddenly twisted and appeared beside Sosbach.

It turned out that just at the moment when Sosbach shot the arrow and everyone was distracted, Dillosro had seized the opportunity to escape from the suppression of the Great Bright Sword Formation with incredible ability. Therefore, he also happened to avoid the power of ‘time’.

Among the 3 Rulers of Abyss, even the weakest Despair Lord, was an extremely dangerous opponent. He must not be underestimated.

The crystal light of the ‘clock’ shined again, and the Great Bright Sword Formation shot out an incomparably sharp aura, surrounding the 2 Rulers from all directions. Chen Rui had been charging this move when he used the time might and [Mirror Body]. It was stronger than when they besieged Dillosrow before.

The figures of the 2 Rulers swayed as if they merged into 1 in an instant. The sword qi all over the sky suddenly stopped at the moment they approached. They all stacked together, but they were unable to move forward by an inch.

The Ruler’s hands started to move, making a strange trajectory, which made people involuntarily attracted to it. Not only their vision, but also all lives in the space were also attracted toward this place. Under the power of this gesture, the sword qi gradually solidified into physical entities.

Once they had become real entities, they lost the mysterious power of ‘impermanence’ of sword qi. They were shaken by 2 fists into dust.

The Ruler’s body that seemed to be integrated into 1 was divided into 2 again as if it was just an illusion just now.

The cooperation of the 2 Abyss Rulers was amazing. The powerful blow of the Great Bright Sword Formation was disintegrated in the blink of an eye.

Sosbach had already transformed into the Abyss Form, showing hideous bone armor and bone spurs all over his body. Although the ‘green leaves’ growing on his left shoulder and arm looked a bit ridiculous, the doubled amount of momentum did not give people a relaxed feeling at all. The air was full of suffocating depression.

Fear Lord slowly pulled the string of the Red Flame Bow, and the blood-colored power quickly gathered, aiming at the Great Bright Sword Formation from afar.

“Be careful!” Michael reminded. In the battle of the Holy Light Mountain, it was Sosbach who used the Red Flame Bow to destroy the Great Bright Sword Formation at that time. The arrow that was reflected just now mainly relied on Chen Rui’s ‘talent’. Both Michael and Satan were Chen Rui’s old rivals, so they understood that the ‘talent’ couldn’t be used repeatedly in a short period of time. On the other hand, Sosbach’s arrow was shot in the Abyss Form, which was far more powerful than before. He was obviously prepared in this shot. It was unknown whether the Great Bright Sword Formation could withstand it. Besides, Dillosro was also waiting for an opportunity too.

Surprisingly, before Sosbach’s arrow was fired, Dillosro, who was supposed to be waiting for an opportunity on the side, actually took the initiative to charge toward the Great Bright Sword Formation.

As a matter of fact, just now Despair Lord tried his best to escape from the Great Bright Sword Formation, why did he rush in instead? Is it to buy time for Fear Lord to charge the power of the Red Flame Bow? Or is it because of something else…

No matter what the reason is, Dillosro escaped by chance before. Now that he comes voluntarily, I can also allocate part of my strength to trap him in the formation and defeat him, then we can concentrate on dealing with Sosbach.

At this time, Chen Rui suddenly shouted in shock, “Split!”

This word represented a change of the Great Bright Sword Formation, which surprised the other 4 people. Zola reacted the fastest and chose to trust without hesitation. The rest of the people also launched the change of the sword formation under the guidance of Zola’s power. A special space appeared in the center of the ‘clock’, enclosing the separated Chen Rui and the oncoming Dillosro.

From a distance, a transparent sphere representing an independent space appeared at the center of the huge ‘clock’. It gradually rose into the air.

In the sphere were Chen Rui and Dillosro. It meant that Chen Rui gave up the greatest advantage of the team, left the sword formation, and faced the Despair Lord alone.

In the Great Bright Sword Formation. Michael, Zola, and Gabriel were the 3 strongest attack release points, and Satan was the central control hub. He used the power of the Book of Destruction to control the sword formation and as a source of power while Chen Rui’s role was fusion, manipulation, amplification of life force and faith power. It didn’t seem to be very important, but now that he left, the entire sword formation couldn’t operate freely as before. The other 4 equally felt strenuous. Under such circumstances, how could they resist Sosbach who was stronger?

This was clearly a major mistake in attacking the enemy’s strengths with their own shortcomings. Satan and Michael frowned at the same time. Then, in the space of the sphere, ‘Dillosro’ suddenly turned into Sosbach who was holding the Red Flame Bow!

Everyone suddenly understood. It turned out that the one who rushed over just now was the real Sosbach and the one who was charged the Red Flame Bow in the distance was faked by Dillosro!

This is obviously a scheme. If Sosbach was enclosed in the sword formation just now, the Great Bright Sword Formation would probably be defeated by the Red Flame Bow from the inside out.

“How do you know it’s me?” Sosbach couldn’t help showing a surprised expression when he was about to succeed in his strategy, but he was seen through.

Of course, Chen Rui would not answer that it was because of the power of the [Analytical Eyes]. The Star Power all over his body soared rapidly. The star armor became more and more brilliant. Sosbach was the second Ruler after Quilliana, and his strength was far superior to Dillosro’s. Dillosro escaped from the Great Bright Sword Formation, which was activated by 5 people just now. Now facing the stronger Sosbach alone, could Chen Rui resist him?

“Even unwilling to answer the last question in your life?” Sosbach smiled grimly as he pointed the Red Flame Bow in his hand at Chen Rui. The energy that had been charging before suddenly soared to the highest point. A blood-red terrifying light shot toward Chen Rui instantly

The moment Dillosro shot the arrow, there was a green bow in Chen Rui’s hand. On the drawn string was an arrow with golden feathers.

The arrow flew out with a hint of golden light and collided with the bloody light.

The entire ‘sphere’ space trembled, and the power of the 2 rays of light actually eliminated each other at the same time.

“The Moonlight Cloud Sea Bow!” Sosbach said in a slightly shocked tone, “You are an elf?”

This bow was the top of the elf’s 3 bows, the real artifact, Moonlight Cloud Sea Bow!

“I’m not an elf.” Chen Rui replied indifferently. Another arrow had already been loaded on the bowstring swiftly. His pupils were shining brightly as if there was a bright solar system spinning inside, “Besides, it was too hasty just now, let me show you its true power now.”

During this period of time, his archery skills had improved by leaps and bounds under the special training of the elf tribe. Coupled with the training in the training ground, he was more and more handy in using the Moonlight Cloud Sea Bow.

“Stupid ant, it’s just some tricks of the bloodline. Are you still deceiving yourself into thinking that you can exert the true power of the artifact? Soon you will be completely in despair!” Sosbach sneered. His momentum soared as the Red Flame Bow turned red and burned like a flame.

The bloody line and the golden line shot at each other. There was no trick, just real absolute power.

In no time, the 2 powerful forces had already collided. After only a moment of stalemate, the result was clear. The bloody line was split in half, the golden line flew straight to Sosbach with unabated speed. Sosbach eagerly swiped the Red Flame Bow to shake the golden line away, but a wound was left on his face. Cracks also faintly emerged on the Red Flame Bow.

“Who are you?!” Sosbach was utterly shocked because the arrow shot by the Moonlight Cloud Sea Bow just now contained incomparably quintessential life force and faith power, as well as the breath of nature power. It was pretty close to real authority power!

chapters.title: Chapter 1244: Hatred Emerged
chapters.body:
Chapter 1244: Hatred Emerged

Chen Rui let go of the tight bowstring, and a golden line was launched again.

This time, Sosbach didn’t dare to underestimate him. The Red Flame Bow moved continuously, and several bloody lines hit and canceled the golden lines when they were 5 meters in front of him.

Chen Rui just shot one arrow, whereas Sosbach had already shot 7 arrows. It was obvious who had the upper hand.

Although Chen Rui’s archery had advanced by leaps and bounds under the guidance of the elf tribe, and he has worked hard on the training ground, it could not compare with those real elves or the half-elves who integrated bows and arrows into their lives.

The half-elf body of Sosbach was not simply a possession, but a kind of fusion. The half-elf named ‘Saul’ was actually a remnant bloodline descendant of the fallen elves who caused chaos in the Silver Moon Celestial Capital 20,000 years ago.

The Silver Moon Celestial Capital was the ruins of the ‘war’, and there was some residual power breath left. After losing the Moonlight Goddess’ divine power, this breath, which was already almost exhausted, began to slowly recover. The elves’ own bloodline had also been affected to a certain extent. Of course, under the power of the Tree of Nature, this effect was not obvious.

In the rebellion of fallen elves 20,000 years ago, the apparent purpose of the Abyss’ will was to use the Tree of Nature as a medium to open the entrance of the Abyss. In fact, there was a more secret backup plan, which was when the power of the Tree of Nature weakened, used the elf bloodline to create the ‘carrier’ of the Supreme Ruler.

This ‘Supreme Ruler’ referred to Hatred Lord Quilliana. The choice of ‘carrier’ was Blanche who was the half-elf, and Blanche’s father, Saul, was also chosen by ‘Fear’.

Although Sosbach was obviously superior in archery, he felt depressed because he had to shoot 7 arrows to block the opponent’s arrow. That person is obviously not an elf, nor has he integrated an elf bloodline like me, but he was able to exert such power of the Moonlight Cloud Sea Bow that only the descendants of the elf royal family can use. The most terrifying thing is the arrows contain incomparably pure life and faith power. It is even subtly close to the God’s authority power!

Although Sosbach didn’t know how the opponent did this, he knew very well that the Red Flame Bow had already suffered severe damage when parrying the previous arrow. Then, he successively launched several intensive shots, so it was on the brink of collapse. Even if the Red Flame Bow was fine, with the Moonlight Cloud Sea Bow in the opponent’s hands, he would lose sooner or later.

Since this opponent left the Great Bright Sword Formation, the power of the sword formation had obviously declined, yet it was still more powerful than when it was in the Holy Light Mountain. Dillosro was at a disadvantage. If it went on like this, the Abyss Rulers would lose.

We can’t fight like this anymore! Sosbach’s eyes were fixed on the Moonlight Cloud Sea Bow, then he flickered and pulled back the distance. The Red Flame Bow in his hand instantly shot out dozens of unprecedented bloody lights that grabbed toward Chen Rui like a huge claw.

The shooting speed of the artifact was very swift, so Chen Rui had limited time to react. Chen Rui frowned, seeming to be astounded. He didn’t immediately counterattack with the Moonlight Cloud Sea Bow. He only shot an arrow when the bloody lights approached.

The seemingly hasty golden light shot at the bloody light on the far right. At the moment when the two touched, the bloody light showed the outline of a figure. At the same time, all the bloody lights disappeared.

Sosbach looked at the arrow piercing through his right chest with disbelief— This enemy actually once again sees through my illusion that I’m best at!

Even Quilliana can’t see through this illusion so quickly!

If the first time was luck, what about the second time?

“ Bang! ” The arrow in his chest exploded. Even in the Abyss Form, he was also seriously injured. Although Sosbach was much stronger than Dillosro, this half-elf body did not have the super self-healing ability like Dillosro. Even though Sosbach was seen through and was injured, he still rushed forward. He only used illusion for one purpose, melee combat!

After being injured, Sosbach charged toward Chen Rui with unabated momentum. He could no longer make another shoot. In a hurry, a light blue transparent shield appeared around him, and the star wings behind him wrapped around his body in a defensive posture.

Sosbach sneered in his mind. This kind of defense is just a dying struggle. He punched without thinking.

The power of this punch was astonishing. A large crack appeared in the transparent shield immediately. There seemed to be some kind of bright light flickering rapidly inside, trying to maintain the shield, but it didn’t have any effect. The second punch collapsed the shield completely. The remaining momentum hit the armor-like wings, shattering quite a number of feathers.

Sosbach launched the third punch. He was absolutely confident that this punch would not only completely destroy the opponent’s defense, but also shatter his body and soul.

As long as this man is killed, I can join forces with Dillosro to completely defeat the Great Bright Sword Formation and win the fight.

All of a sudden, the wings spread out and the purple starlight flourishing, Sosbach’s movements froze because the punch had been blocked with 1 hand.

The opponent actually took his punch with one hand!

While Sosbach was in shock, a fist shining with starlight was already magnifying in his eyes. He was sent flying a strong force.

The light man caught up with the unbalanced Sosbach in mid-air and launched a series of high-speed attacks. Sosbach shouted loudly, and the surging blood mist erupted, shaking off the pursuing Chen Rui. He flickered and began to counterattack.

The 2 started a fierce fight in the air. Cracks appeared one after another in space, and the ‘ball’ wrapped by the Great Bright Sword Formation seemed precarious.

“ Boom! “

The ‘ball’ finally couldn’t withstand the pressure and collapsed. The 2 figures separated, facing each other in the distance.

The others and Dillosro below all looked up in surprise. Except for Zola, everyone including Dillosro showed shocked expressions. Sosbach was also shocked. Looking at the wounds on his body, his dark green pupils were full of disbelief — This enemy’s strength has actually reached such a level!

“Your name.” Sosbach’s gaze became a little more dignified. He really began to look squarely at this opponent wrapped in starlight.

“Chen Rui.” Chen Rui said his name. His facial features could no longer be seen clearly now. He was bright and dazzling as if he completely turned into light.

After the last battle with Quilliana, Zola sacrificed her life to integrate into [All Star Gods View], which brought new inspiration to Chen Rui. Afterward, he and the others spent a lot of time in the Galaxy Divinity Temple and training ground for training. Although he still could not integrate all of them into [All Star Gods View], he also further comprehended its mysteries. This ‘light man’ was exactly the result of comprehension.

In the state of ‘light man’, his strength had reached the level of SSSS+++, but this state had a fatal flaw, that was, it could not last for a long time. At present, he could persist for 10 minutes at most, otherwise his life would be in danger.

It could be felt from the battle just now that although he was still at the ‘super 3’ level, his current strength was still slightly inferior to Sosbach. If it wasn’t for the hidden danger of ‘tree’ in Sosbach’s body, and he was injured by the Moonlight Cloud Sea Bow before, Chen Rui might still fall behind.

The time for the transformation was limited. With a thought, Chen Rui slowly landed in front of the Great Light Formation and shouted, “Seal!”

This word was the same as the previous ‘split’, which was undoubtedly a code word. This time Michael and others did not hesitate. The Great Bright Sword Formation changed again, and the shining Chen Rui became the ‘arrow’ of the entire formation.

A special kind of breath began to fill in the entire space. The whole sky became dark. The sky, the sea… everything was integrated with the Great Bright Sword Formation as a whole.

There seemed to be countless murmuring prayers sounded all around, revealing a vast life and faith breath.

It was as if what was in front of him was a real universe, and he was so tiny.

The Great Bright Sword Formation had not launched an attack yet, but the momentum alone was so terrifying. The following blow must be earth-shattering.

The 2 Rulers simultaneously had an extremely bad omen. After descending to the main plane, this was the first time they felt this way: I can’t take this blow!

Facing the growing momentum of the Great Bright Sword Formation, Sosbach and Dillosro activated various attacks. However, they were unable to shake the momentum of the ‘universe’. On the contrary, their own movements became more and more stagnant, and their strength was rapidly weakened.

At this time, in the space behind, a blood-red pupil slowly opened. There was also a blue pupil on the right, but it gave the impression that the blood red pupils were the real eyes, and the blue pupil was just a decoration.

The moment the pupil appeared, Sosbach and Dillosro felt the pressure drop greatly. The Great Bright Sword Formation trembled slightly. The breath did not weaken, but it was still increasing step by step. The power had already locked onto the eyes in the space as if the arrival of the eyes was expected.

The gradually disappeared, and a girl in a white robe appeared in the vision.

Quilliana!

The strongest Hatred Lord finally appeared!

“Using the Book of Destruction as a medium to gather all the power of faith in the human world?” Quilliana saw through the mystery of this power at a glance, and she smiled indifferently, “Behind you, there must be a huge inscription formation supporting you. “

What Quilliana said was right, a super-large ancient inscription formation was set up far behind. The islands, seas, and land were all part of the formation.

All the Pseudo-Gods and most of the Demi-Gods, such as Auglas, Pagris, and Catherine, were presiding over the most critical formation eyes. This large formation could gather the faith of all life in the human world. It would use the Book of Destruction as the core and launch the mightiest blow through the Great Bright Sword Formation in order to destroy the 3 Rulers of Abyss.

The ‘seal’ that Chen Rui said just now was an order to activate the formation.

This was the strongest attack in the human world, including the Demon Realm, and it was also the last hope.

“It’s just a futile struggle.” Quilliana said contemptuously, falling into the sea and coming step by step.

With every step, the nearby sea water was undergoing strange changes. The islands were actually born out of thin air while the sea had turned into land!

Feeling some familiar breath, Chen Rui, Michael, and Gabriel blurted out at the same time, “Book of Creation!”

TL: Could Quilianna combine creation + destruction?
