chapters.title: Chapter 1245: The Last Card
chapters.body:
Chapter 1245: The Last Card

A large area of sea had turned into land, and various plants were still growing. It was not an illusion, but a real existence.

The vicissitudes of life were just a flash.

This was no longer a miracle, but a God work.

It was just that this kind of God work that came from the hand of Quilliana who destroyed everything was undoubtedly strange. This was also a kind of impermanence in the world.

The half-elf girl burning with ‘creation’ breath all over her body walked on the sea step by step.

That kind of momentum seemed vast and unfathomable. It didn’t blend into the vast sea and sky, but it undisguisedly surpassed them as if a true ruler looking down on all things in the universe.

Chen Rui felt a huge pressure. Behind this pressure was an extremely dangerous feeling. With each step Quilliana took, the feeling grew stronger.

The power of the Great Bright Sword Formation, which merged with the super large inscription array and the huge mind power, was also rapidly increasing. The ‘hand’ of the ‘clock’ was slowly moving, and the feeling of ‘universe’ was getting stronger and stronger. Sosbach and Dillosro had retreated behind Quilliana. The outcome of the previous battle was not significant. This blow was the key that decided everything.

At this time, the ‘hand’ on the huge ‘clock’ had turned a circle, and countless prayers gradually merged together. The moment the ‘hand’ returned to the original point, the light in the entire world dimmed.

The power of the entire Great Bright Sword Formation reached its maximum capacity. It had to be launched now.

“I’m sorry, Blanche.” Chen Rui whispered the name that had been buried in his mind for a long time, and the surging power suddenly burst out. The power of the whole world gathered into a faint sword light that flew toward Quilliana without haste.

After the sword light was launched, the starlight on Chen Rui’s body immediately dimmed. The power of the rest of the people, including the Great Bright Sword Formation, seemed to be drained.

This was the strongest sword that gathered the strength of all people. It didn’t have amazing speed nor the imagined power that would shock the space. It looked plain and dull, but Sosbach and Dillosro on the opposite side squinted their eyes at the same time. Blood overflowed from their eyes. The 2 Abyss Rulers just took a look at the sword light, and their eyes were ‘stabbed’! How powerful was that!

The 2 Rulers knew exactly even if they joined forces, they couldn’t resist this ‘sword’.

Then what about Quilliana who owned the Book of Creation?

“This sword no doubt has a bit of the true meaning of ‘destruction’. It destroys the world without any fancy. Interesting.” As Quilliana watched the sword light flying toward her, the expression of contempt disappeared from her cold eyes, showing a rare appreciation, “Unfortunately, I don’t exist in the world you know. Even if the world is destroyed, I’m fine.”

Quilliana didn’t evade, because the power contained in this sword was unavoidable at all. So, she extended her hand.

A finger shot a pure white light at the incoming crystal sword light.

Everyone was taken aback. Quilliana, without activating any transformation, actually tries to take this world-destruction sword with 1 finger!

The moment her finger touched the sword light, Quilliana’s pupils shrank slightly, and her long hair fluttered backward as if blown by a strong wind. There seemed to be a ‘ click ’ sound from the blood red pupils in the left eye, then an incredible change took place— The sword light containing incomparable power suddenly became ‘soft’. Its shape was also rapidly distorted and solidified. In the end, it actually turned into a pure white flower!

“What a beautiful flower.” Quilliana gently took off the flower, and the flower became more and more translucent in her hand before it finally became a blood-colored crystal flower.

Holding this Flower of Abyss that had completely lost its threat, the pupil of the half-elf’s left eye became more and more blood-red. A wicked smile evoke on her mouth, looking beautiful and bewitching.

The people on Chen Rui’s side were stunned. They could hardly believe what they saw: We used the location advantage to set up a large formation just to fight the 3 Abyss Rulers to the death, but our desperate final sword was so easily resolved by Quilliana!

Isn’t this a complete declaration of the failure of the human side?

“The Book of Creation!” Michael stared blankly at the white light on Quilliana’s fingertip as his body trembled slightly.

Yes! It must be the power of the Book of Creation to make such an incredible change in the peerless sword just now!

As I know, we have the power of the Book of Destruction. When it comes into contact with the creation power, both power will multiply into astounding destruction that is several times higher. However, such an unimaginable change occurred instead!

Michael and Gabriel looked at each other with the same thought: There is still such a way to use the Book of Creation!

The 3 archangels had held the Book of Creation for so many years, but they couldn’t comprehend its power by all means. They could only use it to steal and convert part of the faith, but once the Book of Creation fell into Quilliana’s hands, it actually had such magical use!

Chen Rui reacted the fastest. He quickly charged the power of the Great Bright Sword Formation once again —— The Book of Creation’s power is incomparably miraculous, but Quilliana has not reached the level of God yet. She must have consumed a huge amount of power to resist that sword. It is by no means as at ease as she looks. We have to continue to attack before she fully recovers, only then we will have a chance of survival!

Quilliana sneered. The berserk blood mist rose from her body. Her snowy white crystal skin instantly turned blood red with vague dark golden textures. Soon, sharp bone spurs stretched out from her shoulders and arm. The long robe that had just turned blood-colored changed into a dark golden armor. A tail appeared behind her.

In the blink of an eye, she had already activated 2 transformations. Under the terrifying momentum, the sky and sea water were dyed blood red while trembling. A long whip in her hand drew blood-colored fierce energy that tore through the space as it whipped toward Chen Rui.

“Solid!”

Chen Rui immediately yelled, and the 4 people behind him also reacted at this time. With a change in gesture, the sword qi became a barrier-like protective force. When the bloody whip whipped the barrier, the Great Bright Sword Formation trembled violently. After a while, the huge clock faintly showed a crack, but the attack was resisted fortunately.

Chen Rui guessed it right. Quilliana really couldn’t continuously use the Book of Creation in a short period of time, but the Great Bright Sword Formation didn’t have much power left now. This whip was launched by Quilliana who was in her strongest state. If it wasn’t for the mystery of the sword formation, he would have died under this blow.

Quilliana sneered. She whipped again with overlapping whip shadows, not giving Chen Rui and others time to breathe.

“Turn!” Chen Rui’s voice sounded, and his light figure emitted circles of soft ripples. The whip that hit the formation was actually rippling away. Finally, all the whip shadows merged into 1 and flew back to Quilliana herself.

This was not [Mirror Body], but [Star Diversion] launched with the Great Bright Sword Formation as a medium!

Quilliana was slightly surprised. She whipped toward the reflected whip power. With a muffled sound, the 2 canceled off each other. At this moment, a sharp sword light passed through the gap between the whips at lightning speed.

Quilliana could not retract the long whip in time. Her body swayed suddenly, and she actually grabbed the sword qi with her left claw, but there was already a bloodstain on her cheek that was brushed past by the sword qi.

Without waiting for Quilliana’s next reaction, sharp sword qi came one after another like an endless river. Everyone used their remaining power without reservation – This is the last glimmer of hope, if we can’t take advantage of this opportunity to eliminate Quilliana in one fell swoop, then everyone present including people from the whole world will face complete destruction.

The sword qi all over the sky stopped suddenly. The sword qi was instantly dyed blood-red by some kind of power. In the next second, a circle of bloody light rippled. All the sword qi were shattered, revealing that dreadful figure.

There were many sword marks on Quilliana’s face and body. As her left eye emitted a wave of bloody murderous intent, the cracks in the pupil that were only looming initially became clearer. The long whip in her hand suddenly turned into a shining white light stream.

Everyone in the Great Bright Sword Formation felt a creepy sense of danger. Creation power!

Quilliana used the Book of Creation again so quickly!

This whip was integrated with the Book of Creation. It was a pure and direct attack unlike the previous ‘conversion’ that turned the sword light into a flower.

The most terrifying thing was that the resonance caused by the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction would cause multiple times of destruction!

Can’t dodge now. We can only go all out.

At the moment when the 2 forces collided, time seemed to pause, then everything in the space was covered by the shining light.

The sea, islands, and creatures covered by the white light instantly disappeared. The entire White Sea trembled violently. A large area of the coastline, including many military buildings, collapsed instantly.

This kind of tremble had spread to the western continent. People were all feeling the great tremble of the world in horror.

It took a long time before the terrifying shock stopped slowly.

The originally surging sea had inconceivably solidified into a strange crystalline solid.

Quilliana stood on the solidified ‘ground’. There was a long drag mark in front of her, and a radial circular arc mark, which was obviously caused by activating a certain protective power. The whip in her hand was left with the handle only. Her dark golden armor showed faint cracks. Sosbach and Dillosro behind her looked even more battered. They were still astounded by the explosion.

The Abyss had destroyed countless planes, but this was the first time they had encountered such terrifying power.

On the opposite side of the 3 Abyss Rulers, the Great Bright Sword Formation had completely collapsed. Except for Chen Rui who could barely stand, the other 4 fell to the ground in serious injuries. Michael’s right arm had disappeared, and the Holy Cross Sword was missing; Gabriel’s wings were all broken, and the Holy Song Sword in her hand was broken in half; Satan seemed alright on the surface, but his injury was the most severe. Without the protection of the Book of Destruction, his soul would have been annihilated under this extremely violent shock. Zola was at the end of the formation and suffered relatively minor injuries, but she also almost lost all combat power.

In this battle, the winner was the Abyss.

If there was no Book of Creation, maybe this result would be reversed, but since it had become a ‘result’, ‘if’ had no meaning.

Chen Rui, who was at the front, received the most violent impact. If he hadn’t gathered [All Star Gods View]’s power to defend, he would have been erased from this world. Even so, his soul and body had also been severely traumatized, and he had not much power left.

“Your strength has already surpassed that of Dillosro.” Quilliana looked indifferently at Chen Rui, who was covered in dim starlight, “I give you a chance to offer your soul and accept the will of ‘despair’, and you will become the new Despair Lord. “

Chen Rui was a little surprised as he looked at the Despair Lord behind Quilliana. He found that Dillosro had no special reaction. Instead, he showed a strange smile.

Chen Rui frowned thoughtfully, then he asked, “If I accept the will of the Abyss, will I lose myself completely? If it is that kind of walking dead, I would rather choose complete annihilation.”

“You won’t completely lose yourself. It’s just a kind of integration. For example, in my will, there are still memories of your past, which belong to ‘her’.” Quilliana’s blue eyes on the right became more condensed. The ‘emptiness’ had weakened a lot.

Chen Rui took a deep look at Quilliana. Even though she looked hideous, she gave him the feeling that she was the half-elf who secretly liked him back then.

“As long as you accept the will of the Abyss, you can feel the vastness and greatness, just like the highest existence of the universe…” Quilliana showed a blood-red mist in her hand, “This is your last way of life.”

Chen Rui was silent for a moment, then he withdrew all his power before walking toward Quilliana.

Walking to the front of Quiliana, Chen Rui didn’t attack abruptly, but he stretched out his hand to the mist. The people behind looked at each other. Did he really choose to submit to survive?

Only Zola’s eyes showed no suspicion, just worry.

Both Sosbach and Dillosro’s visions landed on Chen Rui’s hand stretched toward the mist, but they didn’t notice that a circle of golden light flickered on the ground under Chen Rui’s feet.

Chen Rui’s hand suddenly stopped in the air, then Quilliana snorted. Chen Rui was sent flying back and fell to the ground far away.

“Space artifact? Where do you want to take us?” Quilliana looked at the surrounding ground, showing a trace of sarcasm. She squeezed the palm holding the mist, and a layer of transparent glass-like object shattered in the surrounding space.

Chen Rui spurted blood with a pale face as if he had suffered a recoil. His original intention was to use the Tower of Glory and the [Star Gate] to bring Quilliana and the other 2 to the Ghastly Floating Land by surprise, then he would eliminate Quilliana in the same way he killed Sariel. However, he didn’t expect the plan to be seen through the moment he activated the Tower of Glory.

“You ignorant guy, the will of the Abyss has descended to the main plane. Even if you have the power to take me to a taboo place like the cemetery of the Gods, I can still return freely.” Quilliana seemed to see through Chen Rui’s plan and said to the point.

Chen Rui’s heart suddenly sank. With Quilliana’s current strength and absolute victory, there is no need to boast. Even if I succeeded just now, I could not truly defeat her.

Well, now there is only one thing left.

To use this thing, not only must I have the awareness of self-destruction, but I must also have the courage to bear the destruction of all things.

Lucifer’s card!

chapters.title: Chapter 1246: Life And Death
chapters.body:
Chapter 1246: Life And Death

“Since you have chosen death, then I will grant you death.” Quilliana didn’t look at Chen Rui any more. When she was about to make a move, she suddenly looked at Satan who stood up slowly behind her, and she frowned.

At this time, a faint red mist lingered on Satan’s body, and dangerous energy began to gather at a high speed.

“You want to use the blood of God’s descendants to activate the Book of Destruction? It’s a pity that your blood of God’s descendants is too thin. Even if you burn it out, it won’t help.” Quilliana saw through Satan’s intention at a glance, showing a disdainful expression, “In the face of the power I possess, it is just an ignorant delusion to perish together.”

With that said, a white light cluster appeared in Quilliana’s hand. It was the Book of Creation. She beckoned to Satan.

Satan felt his mind tremble. The power of his blood that was burning crazily froze suddenly. At the same time, the Book of Destruction, which was fused with his soul, seemed to be pulled out of his body by a huge attraction.

All of a sudden, that attraction was gone, or rather, the flow of time had sped up. The accelerated time shielded Quilliana’s power, which meant that the power just now disappeared before reaching the target, and the outbreak of the Book of Destruction was also accelerating further. This was what Satan was best at, time might.

“In the vast universe, time is just 1 of the elements, not to mention your insignificant trick.” Quilliana shook her head contemptuously. The claw holding the light cluster twirled casually. Everyone felt that their minds were shaken, and everything flowed backward. This was not the might of time, but a pure supreme power, which made the time acceleration just now completely invalid.

The power of ‘time’ mastered by Satan was even more ingenious than Chen Rui, but in the face of such absolute power, even the most exquisite skills were powerless.

“ Boom boom boom …” Dull explosions sounded from Satan’s body as his blood vessels burst open. A dark light had already left his body and flew toward Quilliana slowly.

The Book of Destruction was pulled out without any suspense.

At this moment, the power of the Book of Destruction and the Book of Creation suddenly paused. They actually broke away from Quilliana’s control, slowly ascended, and faced each other in mid-air. There were bursts of strange fluctuations.

The 2 fluctuations intertwined and created a violent resonance.

Under this resonance, everyone including Quilliana felt that the movements of their bodies seemed to be bound by some kind of powerful force, becoming sluggish.

The center point of resonance was Chen Rui!

Quilliana was startled. Her eyes fell on a thing in Chen Rui’s hand. At a closer look, it was a card. From her angle, she could see the pattern on the back of the card, which was a special object, like a key.

“This kind of resonance…” Quilliana’s pupils shrank suddenly, and her voice trembled strangely as she blurted out, “That is it! It must be!”

Quilliana’s shocked expression was completely different from the original indifference. She had a strange light burning in her eyes, “I never expect that you own the Book of Life and Death! No, it is the key to unlock the seal of life and death!”

At this moment, Chen Rui suddenly understood. Book of Life and Death!

The seventh silver box!

Legend had it that the Originator created the world in 7 days.

He took 3 days to destroy everything that was not suitable for life, and then he took another 3 days to create this universe centered on this main plane.

Among the 6 silver boxes, there were 3 pages of the Book of Creation and 3 pages of the Book of Destruction.

But it only added up to 6 days.

Having no name, it is the Originator of heaven and earth; having a name, it is the Mother of all things.

Between ‘nothing’ and ‘having’, there was the most powerful and mysterious day, which produced the seventh silver box beyond creation and destruction. It was also called the most forbidden power by Python.

Life and death, or birth and death, creation and death, existence and non-existence.

Neither creation nor destruction alone could constitute a complete universe. The cycle of life and death was the core essence of the universe.

The supreme key composed of the 7 artifacts is the key to opening the seal of this silver box!

The ‘eyes’ that destroyed all Gods is the Book of Life and Death?

Something is wrong, in the dream caused by Lucifer and the power of the Tree of Nature, the ‘eyes’ is the existence surrounded by the Gods, and the seal that Quilliana just mentioned…

“No!” Gabriel’s voice sounded, “Don’t use it!”

“What are you hesitating about?” Quilliana smiled strangely, and her voice was full of temptation, “As long as you activate the supreme key, you can activate the power of the Book of Life and Death. Even if I hold the Book of Creation… no, even if I hold the Book of Destruction, I will be unable to resist. You can completely eliminate the Abyss.”

Chen Rui felt shortness of breath. He subconsciously squeezed the ‘King of Darkness’ in his hands. Lucifer’s words sounded in his ears again. There is only one chance to use the supreme key. You must not only have the awareness of self-destruction, but you must also have the courage to bear the destruction of all things.

However, in the current situation, if it was not used, the Abyss would also destroy everything.

Just when Chen Rui made up his mind to use the supreme key, several light beams shot from afar like lightning. It turned out to be the main cannon of the Star Ship: ‘Mind’!

In the previous battle, just in case, Chen Rui had already given Crystal Phoenix an order to keep the fleet and army of humans and demons in the Star Ship. In that big explosion, the Star Ship received a strong impact. If it wasn’t for the long distance and the protection of the rule energy cover, it would have collapsed long ago.

However, these attacks were not launched under the orders of Chen Rui. To do this, one must have a high enough authority. Only his closest women and friends had it.

Although the lights of ‘Mind’ was extremely fast, they also slowed down due to the power of resonance when they entered this area.

The targets of these lights were Chen Rui, Gabriel, Satan, Michael and Zola.

Chen Rui had already understood the purpose of lights, because ‘Mind’ had the special function of ‘teleportation’. This ‘teleportation’ could not only be used to send out but also to retrieve!

However, even if he fled back to the Star Ship, he couldn’t escape the pursuit of a powerhouse like Quilliana.

While hesitating, a long-lost familiar voice sounded in Chen Rui’s mind. The hand holding the card trembled. He involuntarily listened to the voice and put away the cards. Everyone felt that the restraining force disappeared immediately.

At the same time, the lights of ‘Mind’ also hit 5 people.

It was just that this time there were not only 5 lights but 6.

The target of the sixth light was the Book of Destruction and the Book of Creation in mid-air.

Quilliana’s reaction was extremely fast. After realizing the light’s attempt, she rushed to the sky.

Although Quiliana she was a bit slower than that light because of the restraint, had the absolute confidence to instantly annihilate this person who dared to play tricks in front of her and catch up to the others.

Unsurprisingly, Quilliana’s hand pinched the person’s neck accurately. That beautiful face did not have any pain, but only indifference.

Quilliana was astounded because the Book of Destruction and the Book of Creation were shining brightly at the same time. An extremely dangerous feeling came to her mind.

This woman!

At the moment she touched the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction, she had triggered the intertwined force of the creation origin and the destruction origin with the power she brew long ago! There was no clever use of the intertwined force of the 2 ‘books’, but pure mixing. This mix would create massive explosive power! It far surpassed the whip she had dealt with the Great Bright Sword Formation before!

The power of this woman also has the creation origin and destruction origin. Although it is not very strong, it seems to be the fuse that triggers the most terrifying explosive!

Quilliana let go of the woman without thinking and immediately grabbed the Book of Destruction and the Book of Creation. Nonetheless, it was too late as the terrifying power erupted instantly.

The speed of light was extremely fast. This series of changes was actually just in the nick of time.

The Star Ship was set to warp at full speed in advance. In this explosion, it still suffered from terrifying effects. Although the damage was huge, this effect also boosted the Star Ship to a certain extent, making the Star Ship escape to safety before destruction.

1 second before the explosion, Chen Rui was sent back into the Star Ship by the light. He felt his chest was blocked by something, then his 5 sense organs seemed to lose their function. He couldn’t even feel the violent shake of the Star Ship due to the explosion. Only the white light that rushed toward the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction was left in the mind.

People in the western continent experienced a strong shock again. This time the intensity was 10 times stronger than last time. The land split open and buildings collapsed one after another like there was an earthquake. The cities along the coast were even directly destroyed.

In the Star Ship, the tremble caused by the explosion gradually stopped. Judging from the current situation of space, the damage caused this time was definitely not light. The gremlin team had begun to disperse, quickly counting the damage and repairing equipment.

“Chen Rui!” The voices of Catherine and others finally woke Chen Rui up.

Under the power of Quilliana’s whip, many weaker people in the inscription formation behind were annihilated on the spot. Catherine, Isabella and others were also severely injured. It was the woman who ‘disappeared’ for a long time who used the Star Ship to rescue the survivors one by one.

Where is she now?

Chen Rui clenched his fists. He ignored the damage of the Star Ship and ordered Crystal Phoenix to immediately return to the coordinates of the previous jump with all power.

Shortly after.

The heavily damaged Star Ship had finally returned to the White Sea battlefield.

Chen Rui flew off the Star Ship first, followed by Michael and others.

If the first explosion completely changed the sea, then the second explosion completely destroyed the entire White Sea.

The 3 Abyss Rulers, the Book of Creation, and the Book of Destruction were all gone.

On the distorted ground at the center of the explosion, only 1 figure stood alone.

Looking closely, the figure gave off an ethereal feeling. A faint colorful smoke exuded around the body as if it might dissipate at any time.

Chen Rui hurriedly walked toward the figure.

The moment Chen Rui touched the smoke, Chen Rui was shocked as if he felt some kind of soul memory. A scene appeared in his mind.

In the vision was the back of a tall and thin man. His face could not be seen clearly, only the wings as white as snow.

“Have you really decided? This path…” she asked.

“I will not succumb to the so-called fate.” The man said without turning his head. “Whether it’s a mistake or a misunderstanding, it doesn’t matter. The key is to walk on the path I believe in. Similarly, I will bear the consequences by myself. Because, it’s my choice.”

With that said, the man gradually walked into the darkness, and part of the wings seemed to be dyed black.

Watching the man go away, she looked at the wings on her back and said in a low voice, “This is my choice…”

Then, she followed the figure that stepped into the darkness.

TL: Python can still survive in soul form right? Why is Quiliana baiting him to use the supreme key though? Is the true Abyss creature sealed by the Book of Life and Death?

chapters.title: Chapter 1247: Please Exist
chapters.body:
Chapter 1247: Please Exist

As Chen Rui continued to walk forward, more and more scenes appeared, all from a third-person perspective. These were the scattered memories of the consciousness that was on the verge of collapse. He could clearly feel her true state of mind at that time.

In the scene, the 2 opposing forces were facing each other.

On the opposite side was a group of angels, emitting a shining light, forming a strong contrast with the dark camp she was in.

Appearing in the front was a 12-winged male angel with a mocking expression on his face, “Lucifer, you despicable fallen one! You betrayed the light, betrayed and hurt Tezaneer! I, Uriel, will behead you myself, bring your head back as a gift to Tezaneer, and then she will be my woman!”

She glanced at the man who hid his sadness and anger in the deep gaze, then she rushed toward Uriel like a bolt of lightning.

Uriel was 1 of the chief archangels who was stronger than her. He didn’t take her seriously, but he underestimated her madness. She had suffered dozens of fatal attacks. Then, under the disbelief gazes of all the angels, she cut off Uriel’s head with a sword.

Before she fainted, those deep eyes still appeared in her mind, and a sentence echoed in her soul, “Why I exist…”

The scene faded away and another scene appeared.

In the sky, there was a bloody cloud that was gradually fading.

A tall and thin man with 12 wings on his back, half white and half black. His facial features were somewhat blurred, and his figure was dissipating little by little.

“No…” She frantically rushed toward the man, but she suddenly stopped because the man glanced at her. There was a hint of warmth in his eyes, but that was all. Then, he looked at the sky again. The existence in the sky that could only be looked up to had disappeared. In the depths of the man’s eyes, many figures deep in his memory could be seen. A faint longing appeared on his face.

Then, the man’s body and the supreme key in the sky split apart. At this moment, she fell limply to the ground as if all the power had been lost. Her soul vanished along as well.

Seeing this, Chen Rui had already understood many things, and the subsequent scenes seemed very familiar. The male lead was him. It was the scene where Python kept her promise and ‘surrendered’.

“I think you may have misunderstood something?” Chen Rui frowned and said.

At this moment, she seemed to have returned to the past, and some things overlapped, “Whether it’s a mistake or a misunderstanding, it doesn’t matter. What matters is to walk on the path I believe in. Similarly, I will bear the consequences myself.”

What she said afterward was like talking to herself.

“Who you are is probably more important to me than to yourself.”

“Do you believe in fate?”

“I think I can try the value of existence that I found.”

“Those are not important anymore. What is important to me is that I have returned to the path I want to go.”

Veronica appeared and asked, “I just want to ask you, what if you are wrong?”

“Then…” She was silent for a moment before she answered 2 words, “No regrets.”

Many familiar scenes appeared one after another. Most of which were scenes of him having a happy gathering with his relatives and friends while she just watched quietly from a distance. This kind of loneliness was just like back then.

Perhaps, this is all that I need.

“Everyone is an irreplaceable existence.” This was a sentence Chen Rui said, which made her fall into deep thought.

This was followed by a scene where Chen Rui explained the truth. She understood that he didn’t want to lie.

“I am not ‘him’.”

“Sorry.”

In fact, she should have had a hunch long ago. She just couldn’t let go because of a certain desire in her mind.

Unfortunately, the truth was still so cruel.

She seemed to be indifferent, but in fact, she was devastated, feeling that she had lost the value of existence again.

It wasn’t until the moment she flew toward the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction that she seemed to have found her own value again, just like she sacrificed her life to rush to Uriel back then.

Although she felt extra tranquil in her mind, she felt empty and lost as if watching from afar and quietly following, again.

This was reincarnation and fate.

But since she had chosen, she would not regret it.

The scenes of consciousness stopped because Chen Rui had already arrived in front of her. Although the distance traveled was not far, he seemed to have been through endless vicissitudes and countless mood changes through her thoughts.

“Who you are is more important to me than to yourself.” Chen Rui tried hard to correct his blurred vision, staring at Python.

This familiar sentence made Python’s almost dead gaze move. She exhausted her last strength and turned her gaze slowly to him, just in time to meet Chen Rui’s red eyes.

Different from the depth, this man’s eyes were just simple.

Simple and pure.

A guy, with no big ambitions, who simply wanted to protect the people who were important to him.

For some reason, this simple feeling was somewhat warm.

Chen Rui looked at Python and said while feeling what she felt, “No matter what is our relationship; friends, enemies or others. Please continue to exist.”

Every word in this sentence embodied the truth from the soul.

Python’s pupils shrank. She was still watching quietly, but her gaze was no longer empty.

It was not reincarnation, and it was not fate anymore.

But existing for real.

However, she didn’t even have the strength to say a word.

A drop of tear slowly slipped from her eye, and cracks appeared on the cheek.

Chen Rui felt horrified that the Galaxy Divinity Statue of the ‘Doom Calamity’ of the Super System’s Star Conferring Platform also began to crack. He tried his best to keep Python into the Star Conferring Platform, but he was still unable to succeed as if she was just a non-existent air.

The colorful smoke slowly faded, and Chen Rui felt the fluctuations of soul.

This kind of fluctuations would undoubtedly speed up the process of soul collapse. These weren’t ordinary fluctuations. Chen Rui could hear that it was singing. A farewell song. She no longer left without saying goodbye.

Song of Darkness.

For the first time, she really sang for him, not for her own loneliness.

The crack in the Galaxy Divinity Statue spread from the face to the whole body. At the same time, the maroon heart lamp that was originally immortal in the storage warehouse was also cracked.

It had reached the final brink of collapse.

“Wait!” Chen Rui could no longer hold his tears.

“It feels very familiar.” A voice sounded beside Chen Rui; it was Gabriel.

At this time, Catherine, Zola, including Satan, Michael and others were watching from afar without bothering him or Python. Only Gabriel came over.

“It’s like when I watched that person disappear in the Psychedelic Forest.”

Chen Rui didn’t wipe away the tears from his eyes, and he didn’t look at Gabriel. He just clenched his fists, “What do you want to say?”

“I’m not as good as her.” Gabriel suddenly sighed, “At the beginning, that man chose to fall, I just felt despair, anger and pain, but she chose to fall with him. Due to lack of courage, I missed so much, and it has troubled my whole life. She has more courage than me. It’s a pity that she contributed more than me, but she got far less than me.”

Chen Rui was silent. Indeed, as Gabriel said, Python was always by Lucifer’s side. However, when Lucifer finally disappeared, he didn’t even mention Python.

If it was really like the entanglement reflected in the mirror world, Lucifer only regarded Python as a friend or sister. Therefore, since he didn’t mention Python, it means he had a different hope. A hope that she will let go of everything in the past and move toward a new hope.

He did the same thing a long time ago, and there was nothing wrong with that. Nonetheless, he could choose not to love Python, but he couldn’t stop Python from loving him.

There was no right or wrong in love.

Gabriel looked at Python’s fading body while showing a faint smile, “But in the end, at least she has it. She is no longer empty in this world.”

This kind of possession was perhaps not love, or not all, or it was other emotions. But in any case, there was hope at last.

“Those who have hope can have more.” Gabriel’s hand reached out to the blurred Python. Just as Chen Rui wanted to stop it, threads of golden blood flew out from Gabriel’s fingertips and landed on Python’s body.

As soon as the blood touched Python, it immediately turned into gas and merged with the smoke around Python.

“You!” Chen Rui felt that this was the power of Gabriel’s ‘Saint Fighting Heart’. More precisely, it was the Saint Fighting Heart that combined all life forces. Under this power, Python’s body which almost vanished quickly became solid. The slowly dissipating smoke also submerged back into her body bit by bit. On the contrary, the light in Gabriel’s eyes began to dim rapidly.

“Gabriel!” Michael exclaimed.

“If you are still the partner I have always regarded as my brother, don’t stop me.” Gabriel glanced at Michael, “Because this is my choice. I have already made this choice in the White Cliff.”

“Why?! All of you.” Michael covered his head with the remaining hand in agony.

“I’m just tired.” Gabriel sighed and didn’t look at Michael again. Instead, she looked at the sky, “Is there really another world?”

This sentence seemed to be talking to herself, but she also seemed to be asking Chen Rui.

Chen Rui had already seen Gabriel’s gaze clearly. It was a complex emotion mixed with exhaustion, boredom, and longing. He was full of emotion in his mind, so he just answered, “Yes.”

Mirror world, crossover world, or something else.

Gabriel smiled. Just like the lively and lovely girl in the mirror world, at this moment, she seemed to overlap with the past.

“In that world, I can still see him, and maybe him.”

After saying this sentence, the breeze blew, and Gabriel’s body scattered into countless silver wings, flying away piece by piece.

Chen Rui didn’t know who the other ‘him’ that Gabriel was referring to. Looking at the revived Python and feeling the cracks of the Galaxy Divinity Statue in the Star Conferring Platform stopped, this scene made him sad, but he felt more grateful from the bottom of his heart.

Michael stretched out his hand trembling slightly, and a piece of feather landed on his palm. It stayed for a moment before gradually dissipating.

TL: RIP…

chapters.title: Chapter 1248: A Glimmer Of Hope
chapters.body:
Chapter 1248: A Glimmer Of Hope

The sky was densely covered with red clouds. Thunders rumbled, and soon there was torrential rain.

Staring at the torrential rain outside the window, Chen Rui fell into silence.

In the Battle of the White Sea, although Python caused an explosion with the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction at the cost of her life, it did not really eliminate Quilliana.

Quilliana’s strength was extremely terrifying. At the last moment, she forcibly withstood the terrifying explosion and took away the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction. Of course, she and the other 2 Rulers were also severely injured like never before.

However, as long as the will of the Abyss existed, the 3 of them would not die, and recovery was only a matter of time. This had been confirmed by Satan and Michael.

Under the fusion of ‘Saint Fighting Heart’ given by Gabriel with life force, Python had gained a new life, but her body and strength had been greatly depleted. She was currently being fused in the Star Conferring Platform to recuperate her injuries, so she would not be able to fight in the short term.

Except for Python, Chen Rui was the one who was injured the most and recovered the fastest. The situation of the rest was not so optimistic. Michael broke his arm. Now he had even lost the faith power support of the Holy Light Mountain, and the destruction power of Python was no small matter, it would be difficult to heal in a short time. The Book of Destruction, which Satan merged with his soul, was abruptly stripped by Quilliana, so he was more severely injured than Michael. Zola’s injury was relatively better, while Catherine, Auglas, Pagris and others in the big formation all suffered varying degrees of damage from the explosion of creation and destruction power triggered by Quilliana’s blow. Their strength was greatly reduced while some weaker ones were directly annihilated.

It could be said that the high-end powerhouses on the side of humans and demons were temporarily unable to fight anymore. From the perspective of ordinary combat power levels, the White Sea, which was regarded as a natural moat, had been incredibly turned into land under the power of destruction and creation. As such, it could no longer exert its original geographical advantages. If the Abyss army launched an attack again, even the coalition armies of the 2 worlds would not be able to resist it if they only relied on regular troops.

Chen Rui was silent for a moment, then he turned around and told everyone about his plan.

“No!” Zola and Isabella reacted the fastest. Before Chen Rui finished speaking, they had already spoken at the same time.

It turned out that Chen Rui’s plan was to strike when the 3 Rulers were injured. He wanted to raid Nightmare Volcano by surprise, annihilating the injured 3 rulers in one fell swoop. As for the best person to do this, it was naturally none other than Chen Rui himself who was the strongest.

“If you want to go, I’ll go with you!” Zola added.

“It’s not that I’m afraid of dying, but this plan won’t work.” Satan shook his head. He was also a ruthless person. At that time, he did not hesitate to use his own bloodline power to trigger the eruption of the Book of Destruction, wanting to die with Quilliana. Unfortunately, it failed.

Michael, who had been sitting at the table thinking, also said, “It really doesn’t work. If it’s an ordinary battle, raiding with a squad at this time can play an unexpected role. However, Nightmare Volcano is by no means an ordinary place. It is the place where the will of the Abyss descends. In that environment, your strength will be greatly weakened by the will. Even if the opponent is Dillosro, you may not be able to fight him, let alone Sosbach and Quilliana. In the face of the gap in absolute strength, no matter how strong the strategy is, it is useless. If you go rashly, you will surely die, and the sacrifice will be in vain.”

Chen Rui frowned and asked, “What if I use the supreme key?”

As soon as the words came out, Michael and Satan expressed their opposition in unison.

Michael sighed, “You don’t understand what kind of existence it is. Judging from the current situation, if you don’t use it, there may still be a glimmer of hope in this world; if you use it, then there is no hope at all, unless …”

“Unless what?” Chen Rui asked. He still can’t figure out what the supreme key is. He thought it was the strongest artifact caused by sacrificing himself, but he learned from Quilliana that it was the key to opening the seal of the Book of Life and Death. However, now it seems that this key is not as simple as imagined. It seems to have terrifying consequences of destruction after opening the seal of life and death. That was why Lucifer said so.

So, what is the role of the supreme key? Just to die with the enemy?

Faced with Chen Rui’s question, Michael and Satan, the 2 old rivals, looked at each other, and fell silent. Chen Rui knew that there must be some kind of taboo involved in it. He had witnessed the annihilation of Earth Elemental King Moore with his own eyes, so he knew it was not intentional, but they were restricted by powerful rules or forbidden forces.

“I can only tell you that if you use this thing, it will bring unpredictable consequences unless you can transcend everything,” Satan pondered and said, emphasizing another sentence, “Yes, it is ‘transcend’.”

“Transcend?” Chen Rui savored the deep meaning of this word carefully, but he was still puzzled.

“It’s not that I want to affect morale on purpose,” Auglas interjected, “It’s just that I feel that the hope of survival is very slim now. Now that we have lost the geographical advantage of the White Sea, it will be difficult for us to recover in a short time. If we just wait, the destruction of this world is imminent.”

Many people fell silent. What Auglas said was indeed the truth.

Catherine, who had been thinking about it all the time, said, “Sir Michael, what do you mean by the ‘glimmer of hope’?”

“As expected of the most intelligent empress in the Demon Realm. You have very keen observation skills,” Michael nodded, “We do have a glimmer of hope.”

As soon as these words were uttered, everyone’s attention was focused. Michael looked at Chen Rui, “The last hope is him.”

“Me?” Chen Rui was taken aback. If he hadn’t been on the same side as Michael now, he would have thought that Michael was deliberately flattering him.

“It’s you.” Michael sighed, “I already know that you are not that person, but your potential is unfathomable, far beyond my knowledge. During our first fight at the Holy Light Mountain, you were still a tool of Python at that time, and your strength was only Demi-God. The second meeting was a few years later, still at the Holy Light Mountain, but at that time, Python became your subordinate. Plus, your strength has already reached the peak stage of Pseudo-God. If it is a 1-on-1 battle, I’m not even sure that I can beat you. When we meet for the third time… you alone can already fight Gabriel, Raphael, and I together. Although you can’t defeat Quilliana now, you have already surpassed Dillosro! This is the first time I have seen such terrifying progress. I believe that you will be able to surpass Quilliana. Maybe you can go further, stepping into the door that we can’t cross…”

“I’m just…” Chen Rui smiled wryly. He never had any ambition to become a God. His greatest wish was to embrace the women he loved every day, watch his precious children grow up, and enjoy life, family, and friendship.

Power was only for protection.

Regarding Michael’s words, Satan nodded empathetically. He said, “It’s just that Quilliana won’t give him this opportunity to grow. We don’t have enough time.”

“Opportunities have to be seized.” Michael stood up slowly, “And so is time.”

Satan frowned. He suddenly thought of something and understood, “You mean… to go to that place?”

“It’s rare that we think the same.” Michael showed a faint smile, “It reminds me of Angels City back then…”

Michael didn’t go on while Satan snorted. He didn’t linger on the topic as he said, “Well, there’s one thing that needs to happen first.”

Watching the 2 of them playing riddles, Zola couldn’t help asking, “What?”

“Migration.” Satan had already answered.

“Migration?” Isabella immediately responded, “Could it be that migrating the remaining humans and ground races to… the Demon Realm?”

“That’s right.” Michael looked at the torrential rain outside the window and sighed, “Now the human world can no longer be defended. If the Abyss attacks again, it will definitely be unable to resist. We can only abandon the human world and evacuate to the Demon Realm as soon as possible. Although demons and humans have had feuds for many years, facing the common enemy of the Abyss, they must let go of their hatred and fight side by side. The fact that you are here today is already a pretty definite answer.”

Everyone had personally experienced the Abyss war, and they nodded in unison. Michael spoke up, “If everyone has no objections, Your Majesty Catherine, please contact the other 2 empresses and make preparations for placement as soon as possible.”

Catherine smiled slightly, “Don’t worry. In fact, when the Demon Realm sent troops to support for the first time, just in case, Chen Rui had already asked us to make corresponding arrangements.”

“We forgot that the most powerful son-in-law of the Demon Realm is here.” Pagris smiled to ease the tense atmosphere, “It’s a pity that I don’t have a daughter, oh , no… my only daughter has been abducted by him.”

Pagris was referring to Avril who entered the Galaxy Divinity Temple and became an ‘oracle’, but Auglas sneered, “So what? I have already married my 2 daughters to him. Your daughter can only be a maid at best.”

Pagris was the holy dragon, and a black dragon like Auglas was a natural rival. Although the 2 were in the same trench, they never showed friendly faces to each other. Pagris was about to turn his face, but he was suddenly taken aback, showing a strange expression, “Wait a minute, are you sure your daughters are married to him?”

Of course, Auglas knew that the 2 daughters were a miser and a lily. They were just getting free food and drink from Chen Rui, but no matter what, Olypheus had the title of fiancee and had an engagement ceremony, so he immediately said confidently, “Of course!”

Pagris, “You have a daughter named Lalaria, right?”

Auglas, “How do you know?”

Pagris, “Last time she seduced many dragons girls in the Dragon Valley, saying that she wanted to take them back as concubines…”

Auglas, “…”

As the number one strength among dragons, Zola ignored the boring fight between the 2 Dragon Emperors, but she raised a crucial question, “Even if we evacuate to the Demon Realm, the Abyss will still come in through the Golden Estate between the 2 worlds. We won’t be able to buy much time.”

Michael nodded and said, “So, the few of us have to go to a place. To enter that place, we need your power.”

“What?” Zola didn’t understand for a while.

“The elemental world!”

TL: Elemental world? Is it to borrow an artifact?

chapters.title: Chapter 1249: Great Migration
chapters.body:
Chapter 1249: Great Migration

It rained cats and dogs for several days.

Compared with the gloomy weather, people in the western continent had a more depressed mood.

Because they had to leave their hometown, leave this sunny world, and go to the Demon Realm where the sun never shone.

When exactly the grievances between the Demon Realm and the human world started was unknown, but as far as the hatred between the 2 sides was concerned, it could be traced back to countless 500 years. Every 500 years, there would be a desperate war between the 2 sides.

In the history of the human world, demons were synonymous with ferocity and viciousness, and they tried to invade the rich human world more than once, but in the end, they returned in vain under the heroic resistance of humans. Thus, it created many human heroes who would go down in history.

In all ages, more than 1 person imagined that the Human Coalition Army would defeat the Demon Realm Army, then enter the Demon Realm, conquer it in one fell swoop, and eliminate future troubles forever. However, no one ever thought that one day, humans would enter the Demon Realm in this way.

Migration.

And it was full migration. To put it bluntly, it was seeking refuge.

All because of that catastrophe.

The White Sea turned into land in the terrifying powerhouse war, so humans could no longer take advantage of the geographical advantage to resist the Abyss. The Abyss army was also eliminated by half in the battle of the White Sea, but the Abyss monsters were endless. As long as time was given, they would continue to breed. In the next invasion, the humans would have no choice but to go extinct. The destruction of the eastern continent was the best example.

After all, it was another unknown terrifying world. There were still many humans who were unwilling to leave because they still wanted to bet on their luck or other psychological reasons.

The Dragon Bright Empire’s Lex the Great was now the backbone of the western continent. After he issued a public mobilization for migration, Michael, 1 of the last remaining 3 archangels, also descended on the scene. This made many people finally change their minds.

In order to survive, they had to leave.

The Demon Realm was the only way to survive.

Therefore, people were divided into groups and began to enter the Demon Realm one after another. Under the supervision of the army, it was no longer as chaotic as the escape from the eastern continent before. The first people to enter were not those wealthy noble families, but civilians.

The 2 rulers, Lex and Landbis, led by example, and the noble families dared not speak too much. Besides, the guards at the gate of the 2 worlds were fierce demon soldiers. They didn’t care what kind of prince you were, there was only 1 consequence for those who dared to disobey the order: Die!

With trepidation, the first migration team entered the Demon Realm. The first impression of the Demon Realm was that it was cold. Just like the legend, there were 2 ‘suns’ here, and the cold light emitted made humans who were accustomed to the sun hardly feel the slightest warmth. It was more of a fear of the unknown environment.

Out of the gate of the 2 worlds were rows of fully armed demon soldiers. Except for some human-like appearances, most of them look strange and hideous. It was said that those who had human appearances were also great demons in disguise, and their real bodies looked much more terrifying than the current one.

There were 3 2-way teleportation portals in front, which were red, blue, and purple. They were all engraved with profound magic inscriptions and bigger than the teleportation portal like Starlight Empire. More people could be teleported too.

These 3 doors lead to the Demon Realm 3 empires respectively. Families or individuals had received random ID cards in advance. They entered the corresponding teleportation portal according to the color of the ID card, and this ID card would also become the basis for their temporary stay in the Demon Realm.

Facing these terrifying demon soldiers, none of the civilians dared to resist or object. They just walked into the corresponding teleportation portal silently. No one knew what was behind these 3 doors and what was their fate – Slavery? Food? Or…

Little Roy, male. 14 years old, a commoner of the Golden Estate. This time, he and his family became the first group of humans to migrate. He and his parents each received a purple ID card with nationality, name, and gender engraved on it.

Those with purple identity cards entered the Fallen Angel Empire. After entering the teleportation portal, a city appeared in front of Little Roy. This city was completely different from what he had imagined. It was not as desolate and dilapidated as the legendary city of the Demon Realm. There were many buildings, extraordinary craftsmanship, wide roads, well-planned planning, and many unheard of wonderful things.

The boy was attracted by the huge screen hanging on 1 of the tall buildings at first sight. The big screen had clear moving pictures and loud sounds.

On the screen was a dignified demon, using common language to explain the situation of the city and some regulations that people should pay attention to when relocating.

It turned out that this was a small town in the southernmost part of the Fallen Angel Empire’s Dark Moon Estate, called Town Soto.

Everyone showed a surprising expression. If a city of this size was placed in an ordinary kingdom in the human world, it would be 1 of the best metropolises. In the Demon Realm, it is actually just a small town on the edge of an estate!

Is this still the barren and dilapidated Demon Realm?

It is clearly a rich and prosperous place even more prosperous than the human world!

According to the explanation, this magical screen is called magic television, and it can be seen almost everywhere in the Demon Realm. There is also a magic newspaper that is currently distributed for free, which states various matters that ‘migrant’ humans need to pay attention to.

According to the magic television and magic newspaper, the migrant humans would not become slaves, but they were equal to ordinary demons. If someone provoked or committed crimes on the grounds of race, whether it was a human or a demon, all would be severely punished by the law enforcement team.

A unified residential area was divided here for humans. Food would be provided free of charge for the first week, but only for 1 week. Humans must exchange their labor for food and money. Town Soto was an agricultural-based town. It would recruit a large number of farmers and processing factory workers, as well as construction, handicraft, forging, and others. In addition, those with skills could apply for additional employment opportunities.

In recent years, the entire Demon Realm had developed extremely rapidly. Under such circumstances, some gaps were also increasing day by day. 1 of the most prominent problems was the proportion of the labor force in commerce and agriculture.

As the profits of doing business were higher, more and more people were engaged in business, which greatly promoted the development of the economy to a certain extent. However, from another perspective, after the soil improvement through magic dust, a large area of barren land had become fertile soil. The arable land was increasing day by day, but the proportion of people engaged in farming was decreasing year by year. Although the 3 empires were vigorously promoting agriculture, they still could not fundamentally solve the problem in a short period of time. Especially in some relatively remote estates and towns, this phenomenon was particularly serious. This large-scale migration of humans could fill this gap to a certain extent. In terms of resettlement, such places were naturally given priority.

The houses assigned to humans were made of steel, and the main material was a special light board, which could be disassembled and moved freely. The houses appeared clean and spacious.

For the migrating humans, both the living environment and the resettlement results were much better than expected. Many people’s tense minds were relieved.

“Sir Samuel!” Little Roy saw a familiar figure in the army of demons maintaining law and order, and shouted out in disbelief. When Samuel was in the Golden Estate, Samuel served as sheriff and legion commander. Once, he even saved the young Little Roy in front of a startled horse, so Little Roy had a deep impression on him.

“Don’t be so loud!” Little Roy’s mommy was startled, and she quickly covered her son’s mouth.

Samuel had already heard the voice. He looked at the familiar boy and nodded in the distance. Little Roy showed an excited expression. Someone mustered up his courage to ask the demon soldier beside him, “That sir… is a human?”

The answer of the demon soldier surprised the people, “General Samuel is the First Legion Commander of our Dark Moon Estate!”

A human is actually the highest military officer of this town… no, the entire huge estate of demons! This news was quickly spread among humans. For some reason, everyone’s minds became much more stable.

Town Soto was just a microcosm of the huge migration team. With the joint efforts of humans and demons, the migration and resettlement work was proceeding in an orderly manner.

This great migration would change many things, perhaps including the whole world.

On the side of the Abyss, there was no movement for the time being, but both the human world and the Demon Realm were also racing against time to build various fortifications, trying to slow down and disrupt the pace of the Abyss. The Abyss would definitely not give the people on the main plane too much breathing time. As long as the army was replenished again, it would be the end of the human world.

The City of Stars suffered heavy damage in the big explosion of the battle of the White Sea. The ‘annihilation’ of the 3 main cannons, and 1/3 of the buildings of the alchemy units were destroyed. Currently, the gremlins were speeding up their repairs.

The fusion of the Star Conferring Platform was quite effective. Python’s injury had basically recovered, and the lamp spirit body had also been reshaped under Gabriel’s life force, but her soul had not yet fully integrated with the power of Saint Fighting Heart. After being resurrected, she directly chose closed-door training. Since she mastered the destruction origin and the creation origin at the same time, as long as she mastered the power of Saint Fighting Heart, her strength would be improved to a higher level.

Satan’s injury was still recovering slowly. He and Michael had never accepted Chen Rui’s star conferring or enhancement. For a powerhouse of peak stage Pseudo-God, the buff of star conferring was not obvious. More importantly, they both had their own attachments, if they rashly resort to external forces or ‘attach’ to others, it would be extremely detrimental to their mentality. Their strength might regress instead.

Python’s situation was different at the beginning. She was obsessed with her feelings for Lucifer all her life. At that time, she misunderstood that Chen Rui was Lucifer, so that kind of surrender did not affect the state of mind, but became stronger.

The intertwined power of creation and destructive power was by no means comparable to ordinary attacks. The recovery speed of the rest of the people’s injuries was slower than normal.

Chen Rui had been resting. When about 2/3 of the human world’s migration progress was completed, he finally went to the elemental world, accompanied by Michael and Zola.

chapters.title: Chapter 1250: Seal The World! Michael’S Plan
chapters.body:
Chapter 1250: Seal The World! Michael’S Plan

The elemental world excluded all outsiders, and it was impossible for ordinary trainers to directly enter the elemental world. Even Pseudo-God peak stage powerhouses like Michael and Satan were no exception. The last time Chen Rui entered the elemental world was by using the Fertile Yuan Soil given by Moore before his annihilation. This time, under Michael’s guidance, Zola projected the power of the [6 Elements Kingdom] into the elemental world in a way of ‘intervention’, thus opening the door to the elemental world.

In terms of strength, Zola was not inferior to Michael, but in terms of knowledge and experience, even with the power of the fairy dragon bloodline inheritance, Zola was far behind the old peak stage powerhouse Michael, let alone Chen Rui, an outsider.

The elemental world was similar to the last time Chen Rui entered. The sky was full of shining clouds of various colors. There was no ground under his feet. Islands made of various elements were floating in the air, hurricanes and lightning could be seen from time to time, and the atmosphere was full of incomparably rich powerful elemental energy.

The moment they entered the elemental world, Chen Rui and Michael felt as if they were in an oven. Their body and strength were quickly decomposed and burned by the elemental power around them. It was the elemental world’s strange force. This plane rejected all matter and force other than elements.

Michael had been prepared for a long time. White light flashed on his body, and the 12 wings on his back turned into a light membrane around his body. This light membrane contained the power of space might, temporarily blocking the repulsive force. When he saw that there was no special fluctuation on Chen Rui, and he seemed fine, he couldn’t help being secretly surprised.

Chen Rui encountered this kind of repelling force when he was in the elemental world last time, so he immediately activated the [Aura Protection] of the Super System, which consumed 100,000 Aura Value and 1,000 faith crystals every minute. In this state, the elemental world’s strange force power could not corrode his body, but the usual power consumption would inevitably double. Michael was no exception.

Compared with Michael and Chen Rui, Zola didn’t need any protection at all. In fact, she was comfortable in this environment of elements. In addition, some comprehension obtained in the previous battle with Quilliana became clearer than ever before. The breath all over her body seemed to be further refined.

“Comparing with other people is really annoying.” When Chen Rui sensed Zola’s change, he flew to her side and sighed, but he was happy for her in his mind.

“It’s comparing with the dragon.” Ms. Fairy Dragon blinked her eyes and corrected a word.

Michael had already flown in front of the 2 of them. At this time, a group of flying firebirds condensed in the air, spraying flames toward him. Michael waved his hand, and the firebirds turned into powder, but the scattered powder turned into a cold ice snake, surrounding them in the air. Destruction was just another form of existence for the creatures of the elemental world. They were immortal in a sense. Even if Michael’s strength could easily destroy these creatures, he could not dealt with them endlessly.

The ice snake paused suddenly, then it quickly changed into cute little dogs with fur like clouds. After leaving Michael, it came to Zola’s side, turned around gently, and turned into a gentle breeze and drifted away.

After being recognized by the Elemental Goddess Armament, Zola became the Seventh Main Elemental Messenger, but the real reason was to revive Elemental Goddess Rafferty. Later Chen Rui broke into the elemental world, and then Lucifer appeared. He used incredible power to make the resurrection of the Elemental Goddess fail. Subsequently, Zola regained self-awareness. She also got part of the power of the Elemental Goddess Godhood, so her strength quickly soared to the Pseudo-God peak stage.

At this time, when she returned to the elemental world in a fully awake state, she was inspired by some insights and automatically mastered part of the power of the elemental world. It could be said that the current her was the real Main Elemental Messenger. The elemental creatures had a kind of instinctive obedience and closeness to her, and they couldn’t cause her harm.

6 luminous spots of different colors appeared in the far sky and enlarged in an instant. It was the 6 Main Elemental Messengers.

Michael went forward, put his left hand on his chest, and lowered his head slightly, “6 Elemental Messengers, it has been a long time.”

The 6 Main Elemental Messengers were obviously acquaintances with Michael. They all bowed their heads in return. The Light Main Elemental Messenger spoke to Zola, “Zola Main Elemental Messenger, welcome back.”

“ Oh .” Ms. Fairy Dragon replied casually. Remembering that last time Chen Rui broke his arm in a hard fight with the 6 Main Elemental Messengers and almost died to save her, she felt a little grudge.

Chen Rui didn’t take it seriously. He smiled and nodded to the 6 Main Elemental Messengers.

Michael showed a shocked expression. He only knew that Zola owned the [6 Elements Kingdom] and had a deep relationship with the elemental world, but he never thought that the fairy dragon was the Seventh Main Elemental Messenger with the same status as the 6 Main Elemental Messengers.

However, since Zola has the status of Main Elemental Messenger, it will be easier… Michael spoke up, “To tell you the truth, we are here today to ask for something. The Abyss has descended to the main plane.”

The Abyss descended on the main plane? The 6 Main Elemental Messengers were all taken aback. The Water Main Elemental Messenger pondered, “Isn’t the main plane protected by the seal of authority power? It stands to reason that the Abyss cannot descend so soon!”

“I don’t know either.” Michael sighed, “The Holy Light Mountain was destroyed by the Abyss, the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction both fell into the hands of the Hatred Lord. Most of the human world has been destroyed by the Abyss to the brink of extinction. The world is facing its greatest catastrophe.”

The Earth Main Elemental Messenger asked, “Have you ever fought the Abyss rulers?”

“The 3 rulers are too strong. Even if we team up with the Demon Realm, we are no match.” Michael looked at Chen Rui, “Only he can barely fight, but at most, it is only Dillosro. If we join forces, we will also be able to resist Sosbach. As for Quilliana… we are no match at all.”

“He can fight against Dillosro?” the Fire Main Elemental Messenger looked at Chen Rui in disbelief. Last time, the strength Chen Rui showed here was only on par with a single Main Elemental Messenger. I didn’t expect that he can compete against Dillosro now .

“He does have unimaginable potential. Obviously, his strength has surpassed ours now.” The Earth Main Elemental Messenger knew Chen Rui’s growth experience best. He changed the subject, “However, since even your combined strength can fight with the Abyss Rulers, then the Abyss’ descend this time is probably a bit strange.”

“What’s wrong with our strength?” Zola heard the meaning of the Earth Main Elemental Messenger’s words, and she asked unhappily.

The Water Main Elemental Messenger interjected, “Although you all were defeated by the Abyss Rulers, you have proved that you can at least fight against them, so there is still a glimmer of hope. If the Abyss really comes in its strongest and most complete form, then with your current strength, you don’t even have a glimmer of hope.”

“Is that so?” Chen Rui glanced at Michael in surprise. Michael remained silent, obviously admitting it.

Chen Rui was secretly shocked. I had just stepped into the state level not long ago, and now my strength has surpassed Dillosro, faintly approaching Sosbach. Although far inferior to Quilliana, I am already at the level closest to God. However, according to the Water Main Elemental Messenger, there is no hope of this kind of strength against the strongest Abyss. In that case, the level of power represented by the so-called ‘strongest’ and ‘most complete’ Abyss is…

“I’m thinking, this time the Abyss’ coming to the main plane ahead of time is probably something the Abyss will never think of.” The Dark Main Elemental Messenger answered.

This sentence gave Chen Rui inspiration as if he had thought of some key point, but he couldn’t grasp it for a while.

“There is no time to study this issue now.” Michael sighed, “We came to the elemental world today to get 2 things, the first is ‘Cosmos Annihilation’, the strongest ultimate source power. The second is a trace of authority power left by Elemental Goddess Madam Rafferty.”

The 6 Main Elemental Messengers glanced at each other and shook their heads together. The Water Main Elemental Messengers spoke up, “The strongest ultimate source power of ‘Cosmos Annihilation’ is easy to handle, but the authority power of Madam Rafferty…”

Seeing the hesitation of the 6 Main Elemental Messengers, Michael frowned and said, “Others may not know, but we ‘survivors’ should be very clear. Once the main plane is completely eroded by the power of the Abyss, then the elemental world… I don’t need all of the authority power, just a little.”

Michael didn’t continue. The Water Main Elemental Messenger shook his head, “Of course we know, but what you don’t know is that the Elemental War has stopped.”

“The Elemental War has stopped?” Michael was taken aback, “So isn’t Madam Rafferty…”

“The Madam Goddess is not resurrected, but completely annihilated.” The Wind Main Elemental Messenger, who had been silent all this time, said while looking at Chen Rui, “He knows this matter better than us.”

Michael looked at Chen Rui in shock, and Chen Rui smiled wryly, “I was indeed the one who broke into the elemental world before, but at that moment, Lucifer dominated my body. I didn’t know that such a thing would happen. “

“Lucifer?” Michael was even more surprised.

“However, if it happens again, I will still enter here.” Chen Rui added lightly. Zola glanced at him, feeling warm.

The Water Main Elemental Messenger changed the subject and asked, “Michael, what do you need ‘Cosmos Annihilation’ and Goddess authority power for? Even if you really have these 2 things, it is impossible to eliminate Quilliana. Besides, she has the Book of Destruction and the Book of Creation.”

Michael looked at Chen Rui and Zola, and said his real purpose, “My purpose is not to eliminate Quilliana, but to eliminate the door. If we have the authority power of Goddess, plus the strongest ‘Cosmos Annihilation’, not only we can break the door, but also activate the residual authority power of the enchantment, sealing the entire Demon Realm. Even after 100 years when the authority power enchantment expires, and the door opens again, we will have the most precious breathing time.”

The Water Main Elemental Messenger reacted quickly. He immediately understood Michael’s plan, “Do you want to use this 100 years so that he, who has unlimited potential, has the hope to fight or defeat Quilliana?”

“That’s right! Even if Quilliana never dies, as long as Chen Rui has the ability to defeat Quilliana, then after more than 100 years, we will have great confidence in repelling the invasion of the Abyss. Then, we continue to use the Demon Realm as our foundation to develop until it surpasses the Abyss and enters the final level!”

Chen Rui had already fully understood. It turns out that Michael’s plan is to close the gate of the 2 worlds and then completely seal the Demon Realm, cut off the invasion of the Abyss, and then use the precious time to develop and grow. This is indeed a feasible plan.

“”Cosmos Annihilation’, I can give it to you now. This contains the source power of the Main Elemental Messengers’ ultimate power, which is far more powerful than ordinary ‘Cosmos Annihilation’.” The Water Main Elemental Messenger smiled, “As for the Elemental Goddess authority power…

Having said that, the 6 Main Elemental Messengers all looked at Zola who was a little dazed.

“In fact, although Madam Rafferty has fallen, some of the power of Godhood fragments has been transferred to her. In other words, she is the inheritor of the Elemental Goddess. As long as her strength can go further here, plus Chen Rui’s universe star kingdom power, to launch a blow that destroys the ‘door’ and seals the world is not impossible.”
