chapters.title: Chapter 1251: Impending Destruction
chapters.body:
Chapter 1251: Impending Destruction

“ Bang …” Amidst the sparks, Chen Rui was sent flying back. The figure wrapped in flames on the opposite side didn’t stop attacking because of the punch and launched a powerful flame. Although Chen Rui lost his balance, he didn’t lose his composure. With a wave of his hand, the flame was diverted by an intangible force into the incoming lightning from the side.

The lightning turned instantly, evading the flame at super speed, and rushed toward him from the other side. Chen Rui had no time to react, so he crossed his arms to defend.

In the next second, a strong impact hit him. Under the accelerated force, his floating body was sent flying again. The intense lightning power had spread throughout his body, paralyzing his body and soul. Without thinking, he shook his hands outward, shaking the figure in the lightning, then he found that the surrounding temperature suddenly became extremely cold. The body that hadn’t completely shaken off the numbness was affected by another cold numbness, so his movement couldn’t help but slow down.

With this slowness, the 6 figures surrounded around him again. They could no longer be dealt with guerilla tactics. The 6 figures released powerful energy in unison. Various colors quickly merged into one. The entire space became solidified. The pressure was getting greater and greater, like a shrinking box, trying to crush Chen Rui into dust.

Chen Rui clearly sensed the terrifying danger. His body suddenly emitted a dazzling light, and constellations of various shapes appeared around him, resisting the ultimate source power of 6 elements around him.

These constellations had not merged into his body. The starlight was no longer dazzling as before but crystal clear and soft. The 2 huge forces were resisting each other. Under the intense power, the nearby islands and creatures were reduced to particles, then the particles gathered again to form another form repeatedly. This process repeated itself again and again.

The light of 1 of the constellations became more and more flickering, shooting out a colorful rainbow light, and quickly gathered in the sky to form a female figure, which was Zola.

With 1 move, Zola actually pulled all the power of the 6 elements attacking Chen Rui. Chen Rui was taken aback. Before he could react, the ultimate source power of 6 elements had already surrounded Zola. In an instant, Zola’s body became transparent, faintly flowing with colorful light. The power of 6 elements went through her in an instant.

The Water Main Elemental Messenger seemed to be in an oven. A large number of water droplets suddenly emerged from the ice-like body, which was quickly evaporated by the high temperature; the Fire Main Elemental Messenger’s body began to solidify rapidly under the terrifying low temperature.

The body of the Wind Main Elemental Messenger suddenly became hundreds of times heavier as he fell straight down; the Earth Main Elemental Messenger was wrapped in a blade-like gust of wind. His solid body was continuously shredded off layer by layer.

The Light Main Elemental Messenger and the Dark Main Elemental Messenger seemed to have changed their persona. The light one became dark; the dark one became dazzling.

This change not only reflected all 6 element powers back. Moreover, the reflected powers also restrained the target, causing the 6 Main Elemental Messengers to suffer a big loss. The confinement power of the surrounding elements collapsed.

Zola didn’t make another attack. Her body gradually returned to normal, but there was a pair of butterfly-like wings on the back, shining dazzlingly. She was suspended in the air while comprehending the use of the blow just now. The damaged bodies of the 6 Main Elemental Messengers quickly recovered, but they didn’t launch another attack. They just looked at her quietly.

After a while, the colorful butterfly wings behind Zola disappeared. Only then the Main Elemental Messengers flew forward and smiled at each other. Judging from the awesome [Star Shifting] just now, Zola’s comprehension of element source power and kingdom faith power already had a great improvement. As long as this comprehension was integrated with the [6 Elements Kingdom], her strength would be able to leap further.

“How is he?” Zola showed a nervous expression as she looked at Chen Rui who was breathing disorderly and gasping for breath. Just now, Chen Rui didn’t activate the [Pole Star Transformation]. He didn’t even use the normal [Aura Protection]. He fought with the 6 Main Elemental Messengers in the normal state. Although the 6 Main Elemental Messengers would not really kill, the power consumed in the battle here was several times that of the normal environment. Besides, the elemental world’s repulsion force against outsiders was enough to cause fatal damage to his soul and body.

“He’s fine.” Light Main Elemental Messenger shook his head. Although Chen Rui was fighting in the most difficult and dangerous environment, this was an effective way to stimulate his potential. Especially with his current strength, it was quite difficult to improve. This elemental world was a good environment to train.

Michael had already left the elemental world and returned to the Demon Realm while Chen Rui and Zola stayed here.

The real reason why Chen Rui stayed was to help Zola realize the power of Godhood as soon as possible, at least to the extent of destroying the gate of the 2 worlds with ‘Cosmos Annihilation’.

Chen Rui once used the element source power given by the 6 Elemental Kings to construct the ‘bomb’ of ‘Cosmos Annihilation’, destroying Quilliana’s avatar and main altar, but that kind of element source power was created by the Elemental Kings, which was a world of difference from the source power of the 6 Main Elemental Messengers. In the last battle between Chen Rui and the 6 Main Elemental Messengers, he activated [All Star Gods View] at the cost of burning his life, yet it only results in mutual destruction with the 6 Main Elemental Messengers who activated ‘Cosmos Annihilation’.

In fact, because they could be reborn infinitely, the 6 Main Elemental Messengers were only launching tentative attacks at the beginning. They did not use the ultimate power.

Because of Lucifer, Elemental Goddess Rafferty fell. Zola, who originally served as the Goddess body, absorbed some Godhood fragments. For Zola, this plane was equivalent to the home field, so when she first entered a few days ago, she manifested the [6 Elements Kingdom] without much effort. There was abundant element power everywhere here as well as the guidance of the 6 Main Elemental Messengers, so it was the best place for the fairy dragon to absorb and comprehend the power of the Elemental Goddess Godhood fragments in her body. The 6 Main Elemental Messengers fought with Chen Rui before, and they were deeply impressed by the huge faith and life in his kingdom similar to the Kingdom of God. These 2 were the basis of the real Godhood, and they were also important references for Zola’s further comprehension of Elemental Godhood fragments.

“Chen Rui is fine, but we suffered a big injury just now.” The Fire Main Elemental Messenger looked at the bumps on his body, “Zola, your blow just now was really cruel. You didn’t hold back at all. Could it be that you deliberately revenged on the previous incident?”

“What?” The Fairy Dragon, who deliberately launched the heavy blow just now, was clearly faking daze.

“Now you are not our opponent yet. If you really want to take revenge, you should become stronger.” The Water Main Elemental Messenger smiled, “As long as you can integrate 6 kinds of ultimate source power by yourself and activate the perfect ‘Cosmos Annihilation’, then you can beat us all you want.”

The 5 Main Elemental Messengers nodded in unison. In fact, the Water Main Elemental Messenger still had one thing to say, that was, if Zola could really activate this attack perfectly, then even without the power of Godhood fragments, she was already close to comprehending authority power, which was equivalent to stepping into that realm with one foot.

“Before that, I’ll help you beat them up first.” It was Chen Rui who spoke. The previously chaotic breath calmed down again, and his eyes glowed with burning fighting intent.

“Are you sure about that?” The Fire Main Elemental Messenger thumped his fist, splashing sparks.

“I don’t have much time left.” Chen Rui knew the meaning of the Fire Main Elemental Messenger. He shook his head, took a deep breath, and the starlight of [All Star Gods View] appeared around him again, spreading out toward the 6 Main Elemental Messengers.

Infected by this fighting spirit, colorful butterfly wings faintly appeared on Zola’s back, and her figure instantly appeared in the distance. She closed her eyes and began to comprehend quietly.

It was not only Chen Rui and Zola from the elemental world who were racing against time but also the human world and the Demon Realm.

The migration of the human world had reached the final stage. About 80% of the people and the army had successfully entered the Demon Realm for resettlement, and the rest of the population and material transfers were being hurried within 24 hours.

Python, Isabella, Paglio and others had already recovered under the action of the Star Conferring Platform, and the rest such as Pagris, Auglas and others had recovered more than half of their injuries. Everyone was using the training ground left by Chen Rui to train and prepare for the upcoming battle.

Satan went straight back to his lair, the Mountain Seckred. Under the influence of the secondary kingdom power, his body and soul finally began to fully recover. After Michael returned from the elemental world, his broken right arm miraculously recovered. In fact, this was not the real regeneration, but the Light Main Elemental Messenger and the Fire Main Elemental Messenger gave him part of the element source power, combined with his own light element and fire element physique to form an elemental arm. In terms of power, it was even higher than the original arm, but it consumed a lot of life force when used.

The 3 empresses, Catherine, Shea, and Tiffany, put more emphasis on the resettlement and preparation of the migrating humans. The Dark Shadow Empire and the Fallen Angel Empire sent a large number of reinforcements to the Bloody Empire, and the remaining human troops were also incorporated. The army of demons and the army of alchemists, based on the Star Ship, established a military defense line at the Blood Claw Estate at the gate of the 2 worlds.

It was a pity that the reality was cruel. When the coalition army was desperately racing against time, the Abyss, who had been silent before, began to act. The endless army of monsters spread across the White Sea area that had turned into land, and the bloody destructive hand began to quickly cover the eastern continent.

Wherever the torrent passed, there was destruction and death. Those very few diehards who were unwilling to leave and hid with a fluke mentality turned into bones one after another.

The news of the approaching army of the Abyss caused great panic among the last evacuated people in the Golden Estate, and the scene went out of control for a while, but the chaos in the Starlight Empire did not repeat itself. Order was restored, and they continued to retreat in groups, but the speed was undoubtedly much faster.

Not only the soldiers of the Demon Realm, but also the Human Coalition Army who stayed on the last line of defense. At the last moment when the bloody torrent appeared in front of them, these respectable soldiers still did not give up their posts and fought desperately until they were completely swallowed by the torrent.

The blood-red army destroyed all resistance, and they finally stopped at the gate of the 2 worlds at the Golden Estate as they quickly assembled.

Then, as if they got some orders, they surged to the ‘door’.

chapters.title: Chapter 1252: Heavenly Slaughter
chapters.body:
Chapter 1252: Heavenly Slaughter

The Demon Realm, Blood Claw Estate.

In the light beam of the gate of the 2 worlds, countless crimson monsters gushed out in an instant.

However, the moment the monster rushed out of the gate of the 2 worlds, countless dazzling lights that had been prepared for a long time came from all directions, such as the flame meteor launched by the catapult, the magic bomb thrown from high in the sky, the light ball and light beam of the magic crystal cannon, the lightning of the magic defense tower…

Under the intensive fire attack, the blood red was cleared almost instantly.

However, the blood red did not stop because of this. Instead, it surged more and more crazily. With the continuous impact, the range expanded, and the coalition army could no longer maintain the firepower. A lot of powerful Abyss lords and blazing flame witches flew into the sky under the fierce attacks. In the air, there was a mixed coalition army of demons, humans, giant dragons, alchemy civilization, assemble puppets, griffon legion, and giant dragon legion and wyvern. They were the most elite troops.

The assemble puppets launched countless missiles from the shoulder cannons. The missiles whistled and blasted the Abyss monsters that rose into the air. These missiles were different from the battles in the human world. They could actually track the enemy as if alive. It was the latest improved missile of the City of Stars.

When the dense missiles hit, the monsters were torn apart, or directly turned into dust, or scattered into pieces.

Some of the monsters that rushed out of the explosion area were not spared, because they were going to face the rain of projectiles from dragon breath, venom, and magic guns.

The giant dragons, wyverns, and griffons were not carrying ordinary soldiers, but sharpshooters with bows and arrows or javelins, and holding magic guns. Many of them were elves from the human world, as well as dark elves from the Demon Realm and elite demons.

This kind of shooting in high-altitude flight was much more difficult than on the ground, but in the magic game the ‘Infinite Warrior OL’, this was a necessary skill to complete a certain main mission. Almost every experienced player had mastered this technique. The human world elves and dark elves were the experts. They just didn’t expect that one day, the vicious monsters in the dungeon were real, and they would use the skills and tactics they mastered in the game to face these enemies.

The difference from the game was that they only had 1 life.

“ Bang bang bang …”

The 3 blazing flame witches in the distance were shot in their foreheads almost at the same time. Their heads burst open, and the headless corpses fell straight down.

The male elf behind the red dragon frowned. These bullets were different from ordinary magic guns. They could reduce the penetration force and increase the more terrifying diffusion damage. Compared with ordinary firearms, the wounds caused were larger and the lethality was stronger.

This was called Dum Bullet, which was a newly developed potent bullet by the Demon Realm. With the new type of magic gun, it could also inject one’s own power to further enhance the shooting power. With this kind of weapon, there was no need to get close at all. It could most effectively deal with enemies of the same level with the least casualty.

The elf’s name was Sivling, Demon Overlord, deputy commander of the Silver Moon Celestial Capital’s magic archer legion. He was 1 of the most outstanding sharpshooters in the human world after the magic gun came out. Just now he aimed at 3 elite blazing flame witches at once, but before he could shoot, they had already been dealt with. He could feel that the 3 shots were all fired by the same person, and the speed and accuracy were not inferior to him.

Sivling looked back and saw a mutated double-headed manticore in that direction. Behind the manticore was a young woman with purple short hair and purple lips. Her heroic posture revealed beauty and sexiness. Sivling remembered that this woman was the commander of the Flying Cloud Legion of the Fallen Angel Empire, Lucifer Royal Family, Rometty. I didn’t expect her to have such superb marksmanship!

Sensing Sivling’s gaze, Rometty showed a calm smile on the corner of her mouth, then she launched another 3 lethal shots again. Sivling clearly felt contempt from that smile, which made his mind fill with anger. Suddenly, he sensed a danger. He saw a huge black figure passing by above his head, and 2 green wind blades flew out, splitting the 2 Abyss lords who teleported here in half.

“Be careful!” the voice of the Elf Elder Dursa sounded from the back of the Holy Dragon Gueroas. Sivling was secretly ashamed. The idea of competing with the demon female gunman in his mind became stronger. He went all out to fight.

Although the aerial legion of the Abyss suffered a fatal blow, the aerial power of the coalition army was also dispersed. The pressure exerted on the Abyss on the ground was weakened. In addition, the magic crystal cannons and other weapons needed to be cooled off. The blood-red army on land began to spread rapidly. Many super-level elite monsters had broken through the blockade of firepower.

The coalition army did not fight to the death, but they fought and retreated as planned to maintain a distance. More and more of the Abyss army poured into the Demon Realm.

At this moment, the sky suddenly darkened, and a huge figure appeared in the sky in front of the coalition army. A black dragon whose body size was far larger than that of ordinary giant dragons. His eyes glowed with divine light. It was Dragon Emperor Auglas.

“Roar!” Auglas let out a roar to the swarming army of the Abyss. The coalition army at the rear only felt their vision blurred in an instant. Within a huge fan-shaped range in front, all the Abyss creatures including those elites were torn apart and turned into ashes under the impact of this sound wave.

The fan-shaped power was not fleeting, but it stayed for a long time. The Abyss creatures rushing from behind were annihilated one after another. From the other direction, Pagris also appeared, but instead of using the dragon form, he was in the human form. He closed his hands together, casting a white light barrier fill with holy breath around the area. The Abyss monsters in the light fell silent and dissipated into particles.

As soon as the 2 Pseudo-God Dragon Emperors made a move, they immediately contained the momentum of the monsters, but this containment was only temporary. The monsters had no shortage of mutated elites and leaders at the Demi-God level. Although the impact was quite astonishing and the range was huge, it consumed a huge amount of power. Unless Auglas and Pagris had endless power, otherwise they would be exhausted sooner or later.

In the blood-red army, 2 crimson lights flew out, attacking the 2 Dragon Emperors like lightning. Whether it was the white light of Pagris or the roaring power of Auglas, they were easily pierced by the 2 crimson lights.

The Red Flame Bow!

Sosbach!

Fear Lord finally made a move!

With the strength of the 2 Dragon Emperor’s intermediate stage of the Pseudo-God, they absolutely could not defend against this blow.

A woman’s figure appeared in front of Auglas in time. She clasped her hands together and actually held this powerful energy arrow between her palms. This simple action was not simple. In Pagris’ eyes, the woman seemed to be doing thousands of movements: Punching, kicking, clapping… All the complicated movements finally merged into these clasped palms. The red light struggled for a while before it finally gradually disappeared.

Michael appeared in front of Pagris. He held the Holy Cross Sword in both hands and blocked the arrow. His body flew back for a while involuntarily. His right arm glowed with a faint color light. He swung his arm and shattered the energy of the arrow.

“ Hmph , Sosbach, you’ve become weaker.” Michael sneered, “How dare you come here before you fully recover?”

Sosbach appeared in the air ahead, holding the Red Flame Bow in his hand. He looked at Michael contemptuously, “Do you think you are worthy of my full power?”

“Where’s Quilliana?” Satan appeared beside Michael, holding a black sword with a pentagram pattern.

“We don’t need Quilliana to deal with small characters like you.” Dillosro also appeared, “After losing the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction, you are like a lost dog without fangs, not worth mentioning. The 2 of us are enough to destroy everything.”

“Quilliana’s injury last time was indeed serious, but the most important thing is that the injury caused some kind of hidden injury before. Even with the will of the Abyss, she can’t heal for a while. She must be in the Nightmare Volcano now. She wants to use the power of the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction to heal.” It was Python in front of Auglas who spoke. Although her appearance was the same as before, her hair had turned silver, and her pupils had also changed to 1 silver and 1 red. It was the result of the fusion of Gabriel’s Saint Fighting Heart.

“You’re not dead?” Sosbach recognized Python and frowned, “So what if you guessed right? Call Chen Rui here, only he is barely worth my shot.”

“Unfortunately, you are not worth his shot.” Python said lightly, flickered, and rushed toward Sosbach.

“Ignorant.” Sosbach sneered disdainfully. He was about to draw the bow, then his pupils constricted. Because Python’s armor shone with a strong starlight. A constellation could faintly be seen. Her speed suddenly increased 10 times, actually instantly appearing in front of him.

Python was already close, so Sosbach couldn’t use the Red Flame Bow. However, he didn’t treat Python seriously and grabbed with one hand. Nonetheless, before he hit Python, he was pulled away by a special force. At the same time, Python’s fist already struck him in the face.

This blow did not cause too much damage, but in Sosbach’s eyes, it was a great shame. He put away the Red Flame Bow and punched with both fists. Python stretched out her palms to parry him, but her body was soft like she was boneless. Sosbach’s punches were not able to exert the maximum force. She borrowed the inertia and turned around with a heavy whip on Sosbach’s ribs. This was the first time for Sosbach to face this kind of strange attack method of borrowing force, so he couldn’t evade in time.

“No! There is a problem with this space. Our strength has been weakened, whereas your strength has become stronger…” Dillosro finally noticed the abnormality. The surrounding scene suddenly changed, turning into a mountainous area. In the distance, there was a tallest mountain surrounded by clouds and mist.

This was no ordinary mountainous area. In Dillosro’s eyes, it was actually a huge pentagram formation. At the top of the 5 stars, there were many trainers distributed according to special rules, and 2 Pseudo-God powerhouses like Dragon Emperor and Catherine were also among them, forming a dotted formation.

Dillosro waved his hands, and countless troops of the Abyss rushed in all directions with him as the center. However, these troops seemed to have fallen into the sea without any response. The surroundings were still deadly silent.

“You can devour my guards for your own use?” Dillosro immediately sensed the key point and frowned.

“Let me introduce, my sub-kingdom, Mountain Seckred.” Satan’s sword glowed with a touch of black gas, “You should feel honored because the resources I have planned for the Dark Divinity Temple for so many years are used to arrange this Heavenly Slaughter Formation.”

TL: Can they hold the Rulers before Chen Rui and Zola back?

chapters.title: Chapter 1253: Hatred Avenger
chapters.body:
Chapter 1253: Hatred Avenger

Unlike the Great Bright Sword Formation, which was extremely aggressive, the Heavenly Slaughter Formation was a large formation that integrated offense and defense, which was extremely profound.

Sosbach and Dillosro sensed the suppression of power at the same time, but in fact, with the power of the 2 Rulers, even if they had not fully recovered, they were far better than everyone in the Mountain Seckred formation. It would be very challenging to really suppress the opponent or buff themselves to reach the same level. The real mystery of Heavenly Slaughter Formation was not ‘suppression’ or ‘enhancement’, but ‘balance’.

Through the special kingdom power formed by the pentagram, the strength of Sosbach and Dillosro was transferred to Satan, Michael and Python, forming a delicate balance.

After all, the strength of the 2 Rulers was at the level of SSSS+++. This equilibrium would definitely not last for a long time, but with the power of ‘balance’, even if Chen Rui and Zola were not here, Satan and the other 2 could still have the same level of power to rival the 2 rulers during this period of time

The battlefield was everchanging. Maybe there was a hope of victory.

Sosbach was currently completely suppressed by Python. The half-elf body he originally chose was best at archery. With the Red Flame Bow in hand, he was even more powerful, but his melee combat ability was also not weak. He once used his fists to break the [Oracle Formation] that the 3 archangels teamed up with bare hands directly. However, now Sosbach felt very depressed. He had put away the Red Flame Bow, and he wanted to use his fists to deal with Python directly. However, the seemingly soft and peculiar attack patterns of by Python made him helpless. His powerful attack was as if hitting the cotton, there was nowhere to exert the force. Sometimes, the opponent would even retaliate with his power.

Python originally possessed the melee combat proficiency of Lamp Spirit Manlace, but the Saint Fighting Heart given by Gabriel saved her from dying. Her body and soul were also reshaped. After mastering the Saint Fighting Heart, she gained Gabriel’s special attribute of “full martial arts proficiency”. She could be called the first person in melee combat.

Her offensive was continuous like waves of water, which made Sosbach almost breathless.

“ Pa! ” Python whipped Sosbach’s neck again with a flick of her hand. This blow combined with the power of Sosbach himself, leaving several eye-catching wounds. His collar was dyed green as if he was whipped by a powerful whip.

If Chen Rui was here, he would be surprised. The attack pattern of Python was his [Water Profound Mystery].

No, it was more refined and practical than [Water Profound Mystery], and perhaps closer to the ‘Tai Chi’ of another world. It was not the kind of self-cultivation or performance, but the real art of fighting and killing.

“Damn it!” Sosbach didn’t expect to be forced to such an extent by a mere Python. With a roar, he had already changed into the form of the Abyss. His power soared rapidly. An overwhelming fist force wrapped Python in it. Python suddenly felt the pressure increase, but the silver and red pupils remained calm as she fought with Sosbach with all her power.

Dillosro’s opponent was Michael. The Holy Cross Sword slashed at Hatred Lord with a dazzling light. Dillosro had already activated the Abyss form. He extended his hands and grabbed the Holy Cross Sword with his bare hands.

The sharp Holy Cross Sword couldn’t cut through Dillosro’s claws. When Dillosro’s claws tightened, the sword was held tight dilemma. Michael’s eyes were burning with golden light, and his sword was full of sharpness might, but he still couldn’t break free from Dillosro’s control.

Dillosro sneered, “This sword is the glorious artifact of Angels City back then. I’m surprised that it was not broken by Quilliana last time. Unfortunately, in this dark element environment, it can’t even activate half of its power…”

Before the words were finished, the golden light in Michael’s eyes suddenly turned colorful. When the Holy Cross Sword turned, Dillosro immediately felt the power in his hand was different, but it was too late to let go. There was a sharp pain. All his fingers that grabbed the sword were cut off.

“This is…” Dillosro was startled while looking at the longsword flowing with colorful light. He was about to attack again, and he suddenly sensed a blur. When his senses became clear, a section of the sword tip protruded from his chest again, a pitch-black sword tip.

Satan’s sword.

Satan, who had been on the side, seized the moment when Dillosro was distracted and launched a fatal strike.

Under the power of accelerated time, the ‘process’ was skipped and the ‘result’ appeared directly. Dillosro’s feeling was blocked by the acceleration of time. When the time returned normal, he wanted to instinctively defend or dodge, but he had already been stabbed in the vital point.

Satan had the power of speeding up and slowing down time at the same time. In terms of proficiency, he was even better than Chen Rui.

Dillosro quickly escaped from their pincer attack and appeared in the distance. He looked at the severed fingers and the bloody hole in his chest, and he sneered. The 2 serious injuries recovered quickly at a speed visible to the naked eye.

Dillosro had an ‘immortal body’ similar to Raphael and Sariel. As long as he had enough strength, any injury could be healed infinitely and quickly.

“Go help Python, leave him to me.” Michael said. The original plan was to hold back the strongest Sosbach, work together to eliminate the weakest Dillosro, then they would deal with Fear Lord again.

However, judging from the battle just now, the power of the Heavenly Slaughter Formation couldn’t contain Dillosro’s immortality. If this continued, they might not be able to really kill Dillosro when the 2 rulers break free from the balancing power of the Heavenly Slaughter Formation. Therefore, Michael made a decisive decision and changed his strategy. He would hold back Dillosro himself, then Satan and Python would join forces to kill Sosbach before the Heavenly Slaughter Formation expired.

Without hesitation, Satan went to join Python. At this time, Python was fighting with Sosbach. Sosbach also had countless years of wisdom and experience. After adapting to Python’s attack patterns of borrowing on strength, Sosbach had quickly turned the tide of the previous passive situation and suppressed Python.

The arrival of Satan alerted Sosbach. Although Python’s attacks continued, Satan did not find the best opportunity to intervene for a while. Instead, he just stood on the sidelines, but it already made Sosbach feel the pressure.

“Are you sure you want to face me alone?” Dillosro showed a strange smile as he looked at Michael who was facing himself alone, “It’s a pity, my favorite is to fight less with more.”

Michael didn’t talk nonsense. The Holy Cross Sword drew countless colorful rainbows as it slashed toward Dillosro. Dillosro didn’t catch the sword this time. The figure continuously moved at high speed, dodging the flying rainbow, but the power of the flying rainbow was quite astonishing. Even if it just brushed past, it could cause a lot of damage.

“This damn formation!” Although Dillosro avoided the vital points, dozens of wounds appeared on his face and body. A hint of murderous intent spread as he waved his hands. Blood mist surged out, and countless Abyss monsters once again appeared.

These monsters were all leaders or elites. Their strength was stronger than ordinary levels. A considerable part of them were at the Demi-God level. They were Dillosro’s elite troops. They spread up, trying to find the breakthrough to destroy the formation.

The Heavenly Slaughter Formation was all controlled by Satan’s mind. The monsters were like outsiders in the pentagram formation. They had not been ‘balanced’, but they were constantly being devoured by the power of the formation.

When Dillosro saw that it was not going to work, he immediately changed his strategy. Those elite troops all rushed toward Michael while he waited for the opportunity to launch an attack.

Michael snorted and landed on the ground. The Holy Cross Sword plunged toward the ground, and piercing rays of light spread out. The Abyss monsters who approached solidified one after another, and their bodies quickly disintegrated and disappeared. During this process, Michael’s perception locked on Dillosro firmly. He didn’t give him a slight opportunity to sneak attack.

Suddenly, an abrupt change occurred.

1 of the many Abyss lords rushing toward Michael suddenly broke through the Holy Cross Sword’s attack, turned into a stream of bloody light, and rushed toward Michael’s back.

There was a strong warning in Michael’s mind. Years of fighting instincts made him react immediately. His left hand turned into a knife, and he slashed backward at the enemy.

“ Bang! “

The blow was unexpectedly withstood by the opponent, and Michael immediately felt that the strength displayed by the ‘Abyss lord’ was weaker than Dillosro’s, but it was not much different from him.

It’s not Dillosro! But someone else!

Due to the level of will, the Abyss had been unable to create Pseudo-God monsters except for the 3 Rulers, but now there was such an enemy!

At the same time, Dillosro also moved. He turned into a bloody light and rushed toward Michael. When Michael was attacked from the front and back, he shouted. The Holy Cross Sword in his hand was shining brightly as he hit Dillosro, forcing him to retreat, but he was no longer able to resist the subsequent move of the enemy. His back was pierced through by a sharp weapon. Waves of the Abyss power infiltrated and spread throughout his body.

As soon as Michael gritted his teeth, the elemental arm flashed again. A violet tremor erupted from his body, sending the monster behind him flying away. He finally understood that Dillosro released the elite troops not for the purpose of destroying Heavenly Slaughter Formation, but to release this enemy to sneak attack.

The change just now was instantaneous. Even Satan in the distance had no time to rescue him. In the blink of an eye, Michael had already been hit. Although Satan had activated the time might, when he shifted to Michael’s side, he couldn’t change the result.

Satan’s eyes were fixed on the Abyss creature who sneak attacked Michael. He said a name word by word, “A, bad, don!”

The hideous looking creature of the Abyss was actually the Demon Realm peak stage Pseudo-God Abaddon who besieged Python with Satan in the Dark Furnace and was defeated by Chen Rui!

“You have the breath of hatred on your body!” Satan gripped the black longsword tightly, “You actually turned to Quilliana!”

“Actually, I took the initiative to find Quilliana.” Abaddon’s bloodthirsty eyes glowed, and he looked at Satan, “I have only 1 condition to subdue her, and that is to destroy you and everything about you! After sensing the hatred in my mind, she gave me the true power of hatred!”

Abaddon was defeated by Chen Rui in the Dark Furnace. Later, out of interest, Satan planned to get rid of Abaddon. Abaddon was forced to blow up his Pseudo-Godhood. Finally, a trace of his soul escaped by chance. Compared with Chen Rui and Python, Abaddon hated his former ally Satan even more, so this time he appeared in the form of the Abyss monster for revenge.

If it was in a normal state, Satan would not be afraid of Abaddon. However, at this critical moment, the ‘reborn’ Abaddon stood on the side of the Abyss. The balance that was barely maintained was suddenly broken. If it was 3 vs 3, the coalition army was almost certain to lose.

The appearance of Abaddon was nothing less than a fatal variable, which was likely to affect the entire battle situation.

“I only said that Quilliana didn’t come, but I didn’t say that there isn’t anyone else.” Dillosro spread his claws, “Abaddon, although I really want to settle the old score with Satan for the main altar, I will leave him to you for the sake of hatred.”

Abaddon nodded, showing a grin, “Satan, with me here, your big formation can no longer completely suppress the power of the Abyss. A large number of the Abyss creatures have already poured out of the door between the 2 worlds. I’m looking forward to seeing you and the world you want to control to be destroyed all at once.”

TL: What a bad timing…

chapters.title: Chapter 1254: [Time Trap]
chapters.body:
Chapter 1254: [Time Trap]

Abaddon did not exaggerate the fact. Originally, the Abyss army at the door between the 2 worlds had been suppressed by the Mountain Seckred’s kingdom’s external forces. New troops couldn’t enter the Demon Realm, and all those who entered before had been eliminated. Now that the variable Abaddon appeared, the Heavenly Slaughter Formation was forced to restrain its breath to focus on dealing with the 3 strongest enemies. After losing the suppression of the large formation, more and more of the Abyss army poured out from the door between the 2 worlds and spread around.

All the Pseudo-God powerhouses and a considerable part of the Demi-God powerhouses in the Demon Realm and the human world were concentrated in the pentagram formation controlled by the Heavenly Slaughter Formation. Facing the surging army of the Abyss, it was no longer possible to rely on high-end combat power to contain it.

While various magic crystal cannons, catapults, and ordnances were firing wildly, a vast expanse of white creatures appeared in front of the torrent of the Abyss army, colliding without fear of death. It turned out that these were undead legions. Endless armed skeleton soldiers surged toward the Abyss monsters. Rows of necromancers in black robes appeared in the distance. The leader was the most famous necromancer, Guradam.

In the human world, necromancer was one of the most evil pronouns. Under the sun, this kind of evil was absolutely not allowed to exist. However, there was no such concept in the Demon Realm. Shea the Great of the Fallen Angel Empire had defeated Red Spirit Lord and the regent. During the usurp, the undead army had made great achievements, so all countries were secretly cultivating this kind of necromancer, but there was a hidden rule that must be followed, that was, the experimental objects could only be places like ancient battlefields or cemeteries. They could not be living humans.

When the Human Coalition Army first entered the Demon Realm, the undead army had played a role. Now, all the necromancers had been summoned together under the unified command of Guradam to fight against the most terrifying enemy.

At this moment, the living needed the power of death to save them.

The white sea of skulls and the torrent of the Abyss merge together, consuming each other constantly. In this super-large collision, unless there was a single force that could decide the outcome of the battle, individual strength was just a drop in the ocean. The border between the 2 sides was fiercely moving from time to time during the attrition of war. The skeletons had no fear, no distinction between high and low morale, and they were also not afraid of death, but their strength was much inferior after all. Under the swarm of the Abyss, the bones were shattered away. The bloody torrent began to push forward step by step.

After the skeleton soldiers in front were crushed one after another, carts were pushed out from behind with skeleton magicians on board. Countless intertwined rays of light flew toward the Abyss army, clearing a huge wave of monsters. Many more demonic beast skeletons appeared in the sea of skeletons. Many of them were even flying in the air, while many translucent phantoms rushed toward the Abyss.

Because this kind of battle was easy to be accidentally injured by one’s own side, the soldiers of the coalition army did not charge on the ground together. The goblin warriors precisely controlled the war ordnances behind them, blasting the flame meteors one by one into the bloody torrent. The magic crystal cannons were also firing intensively. The flying assemble puppets and giant dragons were throwing bombs alternately toward flying blazing flame witches and the Abyss lords. The snipers hidden in the distance were aiming at those leader-level monsters.

Under such relentless firepower, the Abyss’ swarm was contained, and the morale of the coalition army was boosted instantaneously.

However, the undead army, which seemed to be as vast as the sea, could not be truly endless. It would eventually be exhausted one day; as for the soldiers of the coalition army, it was impossible to maintain the high morale state forever. Even if it was like this for one day, then how about 2-3 days or more?

These 2 kinds of ‘impossibility’ were ‘possible’ on the side of the Abyss army. No matter how much their companions lost, no matter what kind of blow they suffered, they would never stop and continue to attack frantically.

This kind of madness was also equivalent to a kind of numbness. If it was a truly conscious life entity, it was pitiful indeed.

Now, it was not the Blood Claw Estate that was facing the most serious crisis, but the Heavenly Slaughter Formation.

In the Heavenly Slaughter Formation, Satan and the other 2 were in a difficult battle.

Python suffered the most pressure. Although there was a balance of pentagram power, Sosbach’s strength was the strongest one, and he was also the one whose gap could not be narrowed. In the beginning, although [Water Profound Mystery] had the upper hand for a while, Fear Lord was Fear Lord after all. After adapting to this fighting style, he quickly calmed down from his anger and used his own absolute power to firmly suppress Python.

Compared with Python’s battle situation, Michael’s situation was the most dangerous. He was ambushed by Abaddon before, and the impact of that blow was heavier than expected. It was not ordinary injury, but with the extremely corrosive Abyss power, constantly eating his flesh and soul. Michael’s opponent was Dillosro, so he had no time to heal the injury and dispel the Abyss power. He could only use the elemental arm power to suppress the wound, so his combat power would inevitably be discounted. Facing Despair Lord, who was stronger than him, he had already suffered several deep wounds in just a few rounds.

Satan’s pressure against Abaddon was definitely not comparable to that of Michael and Python, but his battle was the most intense. Neither of them delayed the fight. Instead, they fight head-to-head as soon right away. Nonetheless, it was impossible to kill each other in a short time.

Abaddon had been fully transformed into the Abyss, and his strength had increased compared to before. Satan’s strength had also improved, but in the battle of the White Sea, he lost the Book of Destruction and caused great damage to his vitality. Although he had basic recovery with the use of potion and sub-kingdom, his combat power would inevitably decline. It was quite difficult to defeat Abaddon.

“ Boom boom boom …” Amid the continuous sound of explosions, Python was knocked backward. For this kind of pure energy shock, [Water Profound Mystery] could barely resolve it; it was impossible to use it to fight. After Sosbach succeeded, he continued to emit the energy shock. Finally, Python could no longer maintain the state of close combat and was knocked away. Sosbach was injured profusely just now, so of course he wouldn’t give her another chance to approach him. The Red Flame Bow had already appeared in his hand, ready to shoot her from a distance.

Michael was covered in blood, and he was also in a dangerous state. Dillosro’s strength was already above him, and he also possessed that terrifying soul shock, which even the elemental arms couldn’t resist.

Satan had already sensed the predicament of Python and Michael. After a series of fierce attacks, he forced Abaddon away. The black long sword pointed toward the sky, and a huge ancient snake appeared faintly in the sky. The ancient snake slowly coiled into a huge hourglass. Satan’s voice sounded in the entire formation, “Among the sacred mountain, I walk among gems that glow like fire. Those who know me will be amazed and terrified by me. Under everyone’s gaze, I am reduced to ashes in the divine fire. The arrogance in my mind is still there. I am omnipotent. Things in the world are detained by time, and time is trapped…”

In the short time since these words were recited, Abaddon had launched dozens of fierce attacks on Satan, but his attacks were paused by an unknown force, then disappeared.

When Satan recited ‘time is trapped’, the black long sword in his hand turned into smoke and dissipated into the air. There seemed to be more sand in the hourglass. It turned over to start counting.

The hourglass time was extremely slow. At the same time, everyone in the kingdom had a strange feeling that everything was slowing down.

Ordinary time might only last for a short time, but this ‘slowness’ actually lasts forever as if this was normal.

“You changed the time law of the entire kingdom?” Dillosro showed a thoughtful expression, and his voice became extremely slow.

This meant that everything in this kingdom would become sluggish before the rule became effective.

The 6 people present were all extremely powerful people. In this slow environment, although the movements could not be accelerated, the time for conscious thinking and reaction was equivalent to being greatly extended, and it would become easier to avoid the opponent’s attack. For Satan and the other 2, it would greatly prolong the duration of the fight.

After Satan issued this blow, his black hair suddenly turned pale, as did the 12 black wings behind him. Although there was no other change in appearance, it could be clearly felt that most of his strength had declined in an instant.

“What a [Time Trap], even I can’t avoid it.” Sosbach’s dark green eyes narrowed, “But what a desperate move. Or do you want to delay time and wait for that Chen Rui’s reinforcements? Where is he?”

“Even if this [Time Trap] is interesting, it’s time-limited after all.” Abaddon sneered, “Besides, it’s only the kingdom that’s slowed down. The Abyss army outside is not affected. Even if you get away with it in the end, the outside world has also been destroyed.”

Satan ignored Sosbach and Abaddon while controlling his slow body to avoid Abaddon’s slowed blow. His fists with [Collapse Extermination]’s breath hit Abaddon from a distance.

The battle outside the Mountain Seckred kingdom was still extremely fierce. Before one realized it, a day had passed.

The continuous fierce battle left few white skeletons and a sea of phantoms at the front. At this time, rows of long black lines appeared on the hillside behind. They were the nightmare knights holding spears and riding undead horses.

This was also the last undead army.

Taking advantage of the slope and distance, the nightmare knights formed a black arrow formation and sprinted toward the blood-red army. There were several skeleton dragons in the air. This kind of terrain had certain advantages for the knights. Under the powerful impact, the formation of the Abyss army was breached with several openings. However, these openings were quickly filled by monsters rushing in from behind, and the black arrows became smaller and smaller before they finally disappeared without a trace.

The undead army had been exhausted so far whereas the army of the Abyss was still pouring out from the gate of the 2 worlds endlessly.

Next was the real test of life and death. The coalition army could only rely on its own force.

chapters.title: Chapter 1255: Father
chapters.body:
Chapter 1255: Father

The solidified and nearly solidified lava turned the entire dark black land into red. Not only the solidified lava, but also dried blood, corpses that were not melted by high temperature, and metal fragments…

These revealed days of fierce fighting that had been raging across the land.

The coalition army’s defense line was shrinking step by step. They had evacuated from the Blood Claw Estate.

There were many kingdoms in the human world. The disputes were far more frequent than in the Demon Realm, and they were no strangers to war; while demons, whose average life expectancy was much higher than that of humans, were more aggressive by nature. The war in the Demon Realm had never stopped too. These were just ordinary people. The strength of powerhouses was directly proportional to their lifespan, and the battlefields they could experience were even older.

However, no matter whether it was demons or the ground races, no matter whether it was civilians or powerhouses, they had never experienced such a cruel and tragic war before them.

There was no interest, no conquest, no occupation… only 1 purpose, destruction.

Although the coalition army shrunk its line of defense, it did not collapse. It continued to fight tenaciously with the Abyss army. The demons, in particular, had shown formidable strength and rich combat experience. Many targeted strategies and tactics could always eliminate a large number of the Abyss monsters at a very small cost. However, no matter how ingenious the tactics, no matter how rich the experience was, facing the endless monsters, they could not change the situation of the battle.

The ground in front of the Star Fortress had been severely deformed, and there were huge potholes caused by destruction all over the place. The ground was full of lava formed from the death of the Abyss monsters. Behind the Star Fortress, one would reach the Bloody Empire across 2 mountains. There were a large number of demons and a considerable number of migrant humans. After the Abyss army emerged from the door between 2 worlds, it spread over a wide area. Not only the Star Fortress, but the main attack point of the monsters was also the Black Iron Mountain leading to the Dark Shadow Empire.

Catherine was currently protecting the pentagram formation eye of the Heavenly Slaughter Formation. Shea long ago led the army from Dark Moon Estate’s Town Leia to the Dark Shadow Empire to protect the formation eye on behalf of her. After learning about the Abyss’s movements, she personally led the coalition army of the Fallen Angel Empire and the Dark Shadow Empire to cross the Black Iron Mountain Range from the Bloody Vine Flower Estate. She heavily fortified the Morro Fortress in front of the Black Iron Mountain Range, preparing to meet the invasion of the Abyss army.

The areas where these 2 fortresses were located were under tremendous pressure. Before that, a large number of demons and migrant human refugees fled to the Bloody Empire. Once the Star Fortress was breached, the people of the Bloody Empire would definitely not have time to evacuate, and there was no geographical advantage for them to defend, so the soldiers were desperately defending.

The Star Fortress was a huge fortress temporarily built on the basis of the City of Stars. It should also be the most powerful fortress in the entire Demon Realm. It gathered all the new weapons of the Demon Realm and a huge alchemy civilization army.

However, up to now, the Star Fortress was about to fall.

In the White Sea, the Star Ship displayed immense destructive power, decimating the Abyss army, but it was at the White Sea. Due to the geographical advantage, the Star Ship could easily eliminate the Abyss creatures restricted by terrain. In contrast, this was land, where the continuous special attributes of the Abyss army could be brought into full play. Furthermore, the Star Ship was severely damaged in the big explosion last time, and it had not been fully repaired until now. Although its firepower was still strong, it also seemed powerless when facing the endless Abyss monsters.

2/3 of the troop of the Alchemy Civilization were gone. Apart from the long-range the titans and the support lamp spirits, the assemble puppets, giant crystal beasts, and crystal beasts had suffered serious injuries. Although the City of Stars could temporarily create some soldiers, this production speed was far behind the consumption. The fastest to produce was the assemble puppets that had prepared a large number of ‘parts’, but even if they were produced, they must be controlled by a skilled pilot. The talent of the gremlins in the alchemy civilization was repairing. After all, only a few of them were skilled at this. For this reason, all trainee pilots of the Bloody Empire were summoned to join the battle.

The soldiers of the coalition army were covered with coagulated blood and sweat, and their gaze seemed mechanical and numb. Although there was a short break in rotation, and everyone distributed potions and food, they maintained such a super-intensive life-and-death battle for several consecutive days and nights. Even the machine could barely hold on. Many soldiers who rested in rotation even fell asleep standing up, but once they heard the sound of charging, they instinctively clenched their weapons and woke up.

Even the alchemy creatures were exhausted. The current situation of defending soldiers was very bad. The battalion was full of wounded soldiers. Even the soldiers who still had the strength to fight were almost at their limit. The remaining combat power of the alchemy army was also not much. The Star Ship’s firepower had also been greatly weakened due to cooling or overuse. This tense bowstring was on the verge of breaking.

The ones who were truly tireless were the Abyss monsters. They didn’t give the defending soldiers much time to rest. After the previous wave of attack was destroyed, a new wave of attack began again soon.

On the horizon in the distance, a blood color that made others feel despair appeared again.

“If we can survive this battle, may I have the honor to invite you to have a candlelight dinner?” The one who spoke was a handsome elf, Sivling of the Silver Moon Celestial Capital’s magic archer legion, a well-known sharpshooter of the coalition army. His object of the conversation was a heroic purple-haired beauty, who was the legion commander of the Fallen Angel Empire’s Flying Cloud Legion, Rometty of the Fallen Angel Empire royal family.

Some elves and humans who were familiar with Sivling showed expressions of surprise. Sivling was the dream lover of many female elves in the Silver Moon Celestial Capital, but because of his quiet and aloof nature, he rejected many female elves’ love proposals, and he was still single. Unexpectedly, he would take the initiative to say such a thing to a woman, and even to a female demon!

In fact, in these days of fighting side by side, Sivling had gradually fallen in love with this heroic female warrior whose marksmanship and archery skills were not inferior to his own. Now, before what might be the last battle of his life, the introverted elf finally expressed his love.

In that gaze, all barriers such as race and camp disappeared, leaving only the purest emotions.

If it was in the past, the proud elves would definitely not admit this kind of love with foreign tribes. Even Elf King Span and Fairy Dragon Meria were only recognized after the fallen elf calamity. But at this moment, the soldiers including elves all cheered, “Promise him! Promise him!”

Rometty looked at Sivling. Her eyes flashed with excitement, but she pouted angrily in the direction of the Abyss army, “If you can beat me this time.”

Sivling was spirited, “Okay!”

The nearby soldiers laughed wildly, and their morale was boosted a bit. At this time, the order horn sounded. Sivling and Rometty looked solemn. They shouted in unison, “The first shooter legion, get ready!”

Due to the heavy casualties of each legion in the previous battle, the first shooter legion was a reorganized long-range legion that included elves, humans, and demons. Sivling and Rometty were deputy commanders.

The shooters immediately stood by the wall neatly, and the rest of the soldiers also quickly prepared for battle. At this moment, there was no distinction between demons, humans, or other races. They could only entrust their backs to their comrades and face the raging torrent of destruction together.

In front of the Star Fortress, all kinds of lights shone again. No one could be sure if this was the last shine of hope.

As the battle situation progressed, urgent reports were sent to the headquarters of the fortress.

“The frontline can’t hold any longer! The enemy has already broken through the city wall!” Kozena, the commander of the imperial guards, hurried into the command station.

The highest commander sitting in the headquarters was Empress Tiffany of the Bloody Empire, followed by Lex the Great and Sandro.

The 3 of them were originally commanding the battle in front of the city, but because Lex and Tiffany were injured successively in the battle a few days ago, especially Tiffany, who was seriously injured, they stayed at the headquarters. Both of them were simultaneously surprised when they heard that the city wall was breached. Tiffany quickly asked, “Kozena, how much reserve troops do we have?”

“Those who can fight have already gone up, including the last batch of students from the capital college…” The lead of the imperial guards smiled bitterly, “Even the reserve troops of the ancient legion have run out. Currently, only the titans and the lamp spirit legion were still fighting, but it won’t last long. Your Majesty, please evacuate immediately!”

Tiffany shook her head, “Catherine is still fighting with the Abyss Rulers in the Mountain Seckred, Shea faced another army of the Abyss in the Black Iron Mountain Range, and the capital is behind me. There is no way to retreat anymore. Especially since the capital still has countless people who have no time to evacuate, the Star Fortress is the greatest hope of the Empire and the Demon Realm. How can I retreat? We can only fight or die.”

“ Hmph , foolish.” A voice sounded from the command station.

Tiffany frowned, “Look who it is.”

This person was the former ruler of the Bloody Empire, Raizen.

Also her father.

“You should have a special way to contact that guy. At this point, what are you waiting for?” The ‘that guy’ Raizen referred to was Chen Rui. Indeed, as a member of Galaxy Divinity Temple, Tiffany could separate the soul power to communicate the emergency here to Chen Rui, just like when Python was in an emergency in [Doom Calamity Kingdom] back then.

Tiffany’s tone was unusually indifferent, “He has more important things to do now, so he can’t be distracted.”

Chen Rui was assisting Zola’s training in the elemental world to seal the world. He must be aware of the current situation. The Abyss would definitely invade the door between 2 worlds, and it would definitely not waste time. The reason why he had not returned now only proved that Zola hadn’t fully comprehended her new power. Although many people could summon him through the Galaxy Divinity Temple, no one had done so at this time.

Raizen sneered, “Is it more important than your life?”

“I trust him.” Tiffany replied coldly, “This word is exactly what you lack.”

There were many succession candidates for the Bloody Empire back then, including the 3 remarkable princes, but in the end, they were dead due to struggles and suspicions. From this point of view, Raizen really did not trust anyone except himself, including his own son.

Raizen showed a disdainful expression, “As a ruler, you shouldn’t trust a person absolutely.”

“I don’t have time to argue with you about this kind of boring question. This is the highest command of the coalition army. You’re just an abdicate who has lost power and has no right to dictate! You’re not even qualified to enter this fortress! Guards! Get this intruder out of the fortress!”

Hearing ‘get him out of the fortress’, Raizen’s eyes flashed an unknown light. With a wave of his hand, Tiffany’s body shook, seeming to be imprisoned by some kind of force. She was actually unable to move and speak.

Normally, even with a sneak attack, Tiffany would not be restrained so easily, but now that she was seriously injured, so she was unable to resist.

“I’m indeed an abdicated ruler, but I have not lost my authority.” Raizen smiled lightly, and he spoke up to Kozena, “Do you know what to do?”

“Yes, Your Majesty.” Kozena bowed deeply to Raizen, carried Tiffany, and walked out. She understood what Raizen meant. The ruler of the Bloody Empire needed to be in charge here, but it didn’t have to be Tiffany.

As long as Tiffany was around, the Bloody Empire would be around.

“You should have said just now that you are not only an abdicated ruler, but also a father.” Lex the Great, who had been silent all this time, spoke.

“Who are you?” Raizen frowned.

“Lex. Roland, a ruler who lost his empire, the father of ‘that guy’ as you mentioned,” Lex laughed. “It seems that none of us are popular fathers.”

Raizen stared at Lex for a moment, but he said nothing.

“They will go farther than us.” Lex’s eyes became distant as if he saw the distant sky through the wall.

Raizen frowned at this sentence, and he gave Lex a deep look.

“Raizen. Mammon. I didn’t expect to get to know a human like you in the end.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1256: Burning Power
chapters.body:
Chapter 1256: Burning Power

Kozena carried Tiffany and walked quickly toward the rear. None of the soldiers of the Bloody Empire along the way stopped them. Instead, they bowed their heads. Apparently, they had received Raizen’s order.

Raizen was right, he was indeed an abdicated ruler, but he had not lost his authority. In the eyes of many people in the Bloody Empire, especially the soldiers, he was still the supreme commander. Lex was right, Raizen shouldn’t have said that, but Raizen said it that way because he was Raizen.

Unable to move, Tiffany stared fixedly in the direction of the headquarters as tears slowly streamed down from her eyes.

Even if some words were not spoken, it was still understandable.

At one point, she thought that she only had her mother left, and she wanted to leave the Demon Realm at all costs to return to her mother. However, in the face of the cruel facts, she realized that she had nothing.

Only when Tiffany met Chen Rui did she realize that she still had love and hope.

And until now she finally discovered that the things she thought she had lost at the earliest were always there.

Although the way of existing was not recognized, it existed.

She was not alone now, the only one who was lonely was the man.

That… father.

She had never called that man with this title since she was sensible, and now she had no chance even if she wanted to.

Compared with the precarious fortress, the people maintaining the Heavenly Slaughter Formation were also about to collapse. More than half of them had fallen. Only the 2 Dragon Emperors, Catherine, Paglio, and Isabella were still barely holding on.

Satan and the other 2 fought hard with all their might. Although under the power of [Time Trap] and pentagram formation, they could barely resist the 2 Rulers and Abaddon, but in the empty hourglass, only the last few ‘time sand’ remained. Once it was all drained, not only the effect of [Time Trap] would disappear, but even the ‘equilibrium’ of pentagram formation would disappear. With the strength and state of Satan and the rest, they were not even last a second.

The last grain of sand in the hourglass fell, and the entire image of the Mountain Seckred gradually blurred. Everyone immediately felt that their power had returned to the peak stage state, and the flow of time had returned to normal.

Python knew that Sosbach alone could destroy them in a normal state, so she made a resolute decision on the spot. The creation power and destruction power rose at the same time, rushing toward Sosbach. She wanted to use the impact of the power of creation and destruction to produce great power like the White Sea did last time to die with this strongest enemy.

Sosbach had learned the lesson from the last time, so he naturally dared not underestimate Python. There was no Book of Creation and Book of Destruction now, so it was impossible to produce a big explosion of the same level as last time. However, if he was approached by this suicide move, it was very likely that he would be severely injured, so he retreated without hesitation. At the same time, the Red Flame Bow emitted a dazzling red light and shot across the distance.

After losing the restraints of [Time Trap] and [Balance]. No matter the power or speed of this arrow, it far exceeded the previous level. Python had no time to dodge in a hurry, and she couldn’t get close to Sosbach to exert the strongest detonation force, so she could only tilt her body with all her strength.

“ Swoosh !”

The arrow brushed past her shoulder, and the nearby armor immediately turned into powder. The entire shoulder burst open, and blood mist splattered. Python let out a muffled sound as she was knocked flying away under the terrifying impact. After flying not far away, a strong warning arose in her mind again. It turned out that in this short period of time, Sosbach had already been aiming her with the second arrow.

On the Red Flame Bow, another red arrow light was launched again. This arrow was unavoidable.

At the same time, Michael was in a life and death crisis. Dillosro’s claws had already knocked the Holy Cross Sword flying, and he stabbed straight into Michael’s heart. Michael crossed his right hand and blocked with the elemental arm. At this time, due to serious injuries and exhaustion, the elemental arm also lost its previous power. When Dillosro’s claws touched the colorful arm, it cracked and shattered immediately.

Satan was overwhelmed by Abaddon’s berserk attacks. After he activated the [Time Trap], he was close to exhaustion, and his sub-kingdom was about to be annihilated. Not to mention defeating Abaddon, it was extremely difficult to even defend against his attack.

At this time, it happened to be the time when Tiffany’s tears fell.

In the crystal tears, colors suddenly appeared, the colors of the rainbow.

A rainbow light was rushing forward rapidly from the distant sky, and there was also a looming brilliance that seemed to shroud the outside of the rainbow.

In front of the Star Fortress, the rainbow light in the sky was fleeting. The surging blood-red trembled and stopped moving, then they were disintegrated into particles.

Wherever the rainbow light passed, all the blood-colored torrent turned into nothingness. From a distance, it seemed that the blood-red wave was receding rapidly. The Abyss monsters were instantly wiped out.

In the extremely thin Mountain Seckred kingdom, a deadly arrow approached Python. At the critical moment, Python suddenly disappeared. Sosbach was taken aback. He had clearly targeted Python with soul power. With her strength, even shifting, teleportation or other means could not avoid this blow. Now she actually disappeared without warning. Even the tracing soul power couldn’t sense her whereabouts, as if she never existed.

Almost in the next second, Sosbach sensed the approaching danger. A faint figure approached him silently, and a dazzling starlight was emitted from the figure instantly.

Just as Sosbach was about to make a move, he felt a pain in his face as he had already been punched. The force of this punch was extraordinary. Under the force, he slid backward involuntarily, leaving 2 drag marks on the ground with his feet.

On the other side, after Dillosro’s claw smashed Michael’s elemental arm, it had already pierced into Michael’s heart, but Michael’s body suddenly twisted strangely. Then, he burst into countless drops of water while his real body appeared tens of meters away. Beside him was a purple-haired beauty wearing glasses.

“Mimicry, teleportation, water element source power…” Dillosro immediately recognized the power that caused his illusion just now. The strength of this female dragon is much higher than the last time I met her in the White Sea.

Dillosro frowned suddenly, and he looked to the other side. In that direction, there were 2 drag marks tens of meters long on the ground. At the end of the drag marks, the scene was blurry. Even Dillosro couldn’t see the trajectory of that movement clearly. He could only feel bloody light and starlight intertwining at high speed.

Bang Bang Bang…

A figure staggered out. It was Sosbach, and the exoskeleton armor on his body had many cracks. With unbelievable eyes, he uttered a name hatefully, “Chen Rui!”

Dillosro was secretly startled. Chen Rui finally shows up!

During the Battle of the White Sea, Chen Rui’s strength was highly appraised by Quilliana, and he was still above me, the Despair Lord. It’s only been a while now, and he has actually reached the same level as Sosbach!

Abaddon also stopped attacking. Looking at the transparent figure with starlight in front of him, his gaze revealed endless hatred, but there was a trace of fear in the depths of his eyes – I thought that I would be able to take revenge if I got the power of the Abyss. Now it seems that the strength of this enemy has far exceeded expectations. I am not his opponent at all!

Sosbach pulled the Red Flame Bow, and his pupils were filled with destruction breath. The flame of the Red Flame Bow was blazing like never before.

Dillosro was surprised again. Sosbach actually wants to use the strongest fear origin power. Chen Rui brought him so much pressure?

Chen Rui didn’t look at Sosbach, but he just looked around. The figure of Python reappeared beside Zola. At the critical moment just now, Chen Rui kept her in the Star Conferring Platform, dodging a deadly arrow, but a trace of her soul in the Star Conferring Platform soon asked to return to the battlefield in the Galaxy Divinity Temple. Chen Rui understood her mood, so she was released again.

Python’s right shoulder was almost completely useless, and she was kept in the Star Conferring Platform too short to have a healing effect, but as long as time permitted, it should be able to heal; Satan’s hair and wings had turned gray-white, apparently due to power exhaustion. This kind of exhaustion was not compared to exhaustion, but a real decline. Even if the injuries were cured, it was quite difficult to recover; Michael was the most seriously injured. His right arm was shattered again, and there were 5 bloody holes in his chest. Although Zola helped in time just now, he was still wounded to the core. The wound all over his body w nothing compared to this critical wound.

He could sense Catherine, Paglio, Isabella and others through the link, but their presence was all weak. It was obvious that they suffered severe injuries. One could imagine the fierceness of this war.

It seemed that although he and Zola rushed back immediately, they were still late. Fortunately, it was still not too late.

Chen Rui took a deep breath and turned his gaze back to Sosbach. Facing the mighty power displayed by the Red Flame Bow, Chen Rui did not bring out the stronger artifact, the Moonlight Cloud Sea Bow, but he just watched quietly. The stars around him appeared more transparent.

The power that Sosbach was brewing had burned to the peak instantly. The blood-colored red light of the Red Flame Bow whistled out, and it had pierced through Chen Rui’s chest in the blink of an eye.

This arrow was not a simple piercing, but it stayed in Chen Rui’s body. The terrifying fear origin continuously spread in all directions.

Python and the other 2 didn’t expect Chen Rui to be hit by the arrow so easily, but in the next second, the 3 of them were even more shocked – the transparent body shining with starlight just looked down at the long bloody arrow in his chest. The light of the arrow actually began to weaken rapidly before it disappeared.

He withstood it with his body! Sosbach could hardly believe his eyes. How did his strength reach such a level? What happened in such a short period of time?

Dillosro was equally astonished. This kind of power has already surpassed Sosbach, even Quilliana…

“Creation origin and destruction origin?” Sosbach stared at Chen Rui with dark green pupils, and he suddenly seemed to realize something, “No, you activated this special power by burning life!”

Python was taken aback. She was more familiar with Chen Rui’s power than Sosbach. To be precise, it should be burning the creation origin and destruction origin that fused with his own life force. It was fully integrated into [All Star Gods View], exerting a great power close to universe origin.

This kind of life force was not the life in ‘Kingdom of God’, but his own, and it was not simply burning, but a hastened burning. The stronger the power exerted, the faster the burning speed. Even if Chen Rui had the life shared by Paglio, plus the lifespan obtained from the increase in strength, it was not unlimited. He could not withstand this level of burning.

Sosbach sneered, “I don’t know how you comprehend this kind of power, and I admit that this kind of power is beyond imagination, but so what even if you can barely match Quilliana with this suicide method? Our life and will are endless. How many lives can you burn?”

“It doesn’t need to burn it all. It will be enough as long as it can annihilate you.” Chen Rui shook his head, “What I need more is time.”

“We won’t give you time, and neither will Quilliana.” Sosbach’s bow shone with a blood-red light again. In any case, this Chen Rui’s potential was too terrifying, and he couldn’t be given time to grow. While talking, Dillosro and Abaddon had already charged toward Chen Rui, thinking that combining the power of the 3 of them would at least consume Chen Rui’s life force to a greater extent.

“Time is created by oneself.” Chen Rui said calmly. Dillosro and Abaddon felt a chill at the same time. This terrifying sense of threat to the soul was not from Chen Rui, but from Zola!

TL: Is Zola half a step into God Level?
