chapters.title: Chapter 1257: Decisive Battle
chapters.body:
Chapter 1257: Decisive Battle

A pair of huge wings emerged from Zola’s back. They were not angel wings, but butterfly wings, which were transparent and radiated colorful light. As soon as the butterfly wings appeared, everyone felt the incredible breath of power.

This kind of power far exceeded the strength Chen Rui showed in the fight with Sosbach!

The butterfly wings trembled. Looking carefully, it was actually vibrating at a high speed. This kind of vibration made the powerful breath rise again, and it reached an extremely terrifying level in an instant. The whole body of the fairy dragon shone with strong colorful light. A cluster of nebula became more and more crystal clear behind her. The main star was faintly in the shape of a rainbow. When the light was shining, a rainbow light flew out.

“Elemental power? It is actually so formidable!” Sosbach was taken aback. Chen Rui’s current strength is already quite amazing. Why did even this woman named Zola become so powerful?

Abaddon and Dillosro were the most horrified because the rainbow was flying straight toward them. Under the breath of that amazing force, the 2 seemed to be bound by some intangible force, unable to move. They could only stand helplessly in place.

“No! The trace of power here is… authority power!” Sosbach looked at the color light with emotion, and he suddenly realized that the real target of this blow was the door between the 2 worlds!

After all, Dillosro was 1 of the 3 rulers. The moment the rainbow was about to approach, his body suddenly exploded and turned into several phantasms, leaving the range of the rainbow. Abaddon didn’t have this kind of ability. Hence, he was swept by the rainbow. He suspended in the air blankly, like a sculpture.

After the colorful light went past Abaddon, it flew toward the light beam where the blood-red army kept gushing out in the distance. The Abyss army also stopped for a moment.

In the blink of an eye, the rainbow touched the light beam.

There was no earth-shattering explosion, it just slowly submerged into the light beam.

For a moment, the light beam trembled. At this moment, the entire Demon Realm was trembling as if there was some kind of resonance, then the space around the door between 2 worlds were violently deformed and distorted. Whether it was Sosbach, Chen Rui or anyone else, no one could exert any power at this moment.

The light beam of the door gradually became dimmer, and it finally disappeared without a trace. All the distortions or tremors returned to normal.

Sosbach clearly sensed that the power of space had completely changed. Not only was the door between 2 worlds closed, but also the entire space of the Demon Realm was sealed. In the past, whether it was the Demon Realm or the human world, they could use the space ability plus some special ritual to open the space and enter the world. Although there was considerable danger, it was a feasible path after all, but now the space was completely sealed, which meant that this method was no longer feasible.

Before the door between 2 worlds was reopened, neither the Abyss army nor the 3 rulers could enter the Demon Realm anymore — Even if Quilliana came here now, it would be useless. Meanwhile, Sosbach and the other 2 would stay here and could not return.

To be precise, it was 2 of them.

Because at the moment the door between 2 worlds disappeared, the Abyss army and Abaddon who had been swept by the colorful light just now were all reduced to ashes and drifted away.

Not only the Abyss army and Abaddon, but part of Dillosro’s body was also disintegrated. Although he used the secret technique to escape, he was still caught by the colorful light. Despair Lord was shocked to find that the wound began to spread continuously. His body was rapidly decomposed. With his immortal special attribute, he actually could not heal such an injury.

“Elemental authority power! ‘Cosmos Annihilation’!” Dillosro gritted his teeth and said two terms. The torturing pain had given him a clear answer, “You actually obtained a trace of the authority power of the Elemental Goddess?

After Zola delivered this blow, the butterfly wings on her back gradually dimmed, and the incredible breath lingering around her body began to fade rapidly, making her physically and mentally exhausted.

“Just now she used the ‘Cosmos Annihilation’ to invoke that trace of authority power, triggering the power of authority power enhancement to close the door between 2 worlds… So you 2 have been in the elemental world before!” Sosbach narrowed his eyes, “In this way, Rafferty who was originally sealed there with Godhood…”

The 2 Abyss Rulers guessed it right. This was what Zola gained in the elemental world. That extremely powerful blow was not the strength she could control now, but the power of the Godhood fragments left by Elemental Goddess Rafferty. Although her current strength had advanced by leaps and bounds, this blow was actually the accumulated strength of these days. It could not be replicated in a short period of time.

Now, this power had finally succeeded in destroying the door between 2 worlds and sealing off the Demon Realm.

In a short while, Dillosro’s body had already disintegrated in half. He roared and rushed toward Zola in a blood-colored light. When Chen Rui was about to kill Dillosro, Sosbach seized this opening and burst out the strongest power that he had been charging. The Red Flame Bow full of vigorous destruction breath shot 7 arrows at Chen Rui. Sosbach used all his power in this attack.

Python’s reaction was also very fast. She was already in front of Zola, but it was Zola who made the decisive move.

The fairy dragon’s spectacles flashed, then she made a gesture with both hands. Dillosro sensed that his movements suddenly slowed down, and 6 color halos appeared around him. The colors of this halo had been mixed together in the blink of an eye as if they had become transparent. The halo actually submerged into Dillosro’s body.

In the next second, Dillosro’s body was completely frozen in the air. With a muffled sound, he turned into countless particles and dissipated in the air.

Zola’s strongest killing move, [Element’s Fury].

The power of this move was more than 10 times stronger than before going to the elemental world, and the range of power was controlled extremely small, showing the subtle manipulation that was unattainable before. The most important thing was that it also incorporated that trace of the remaining elemental authority power. Dillosro had been severely injured by the rainbow light containing authority power before. After suffering this blow, the restorative power of his body was completely destroyed. He was finally annihilated.

This move also consumed Zola’s last power. Her butterfly wings disappeared, and her overdrawn body fell straight down. Python caught hold of her quickly.

On the other side, Sosbach was also knocked back, followed closely by the transparent star figure. Zola’s finishing blow also made Chen Rui relieved. He could concentrate on dealing with Sosbach now.

The fusion state of Chen Rui did consume a lot of life force, but at the same time, this form was also a new comprehension for self and power in the environment of the elemental world. In the past, Chen Rui had always been speechless about nouns like ‘small universe’, but when he stood at this height now, he found that the imaginary nouns in the animation were actually quite meaningful.

Human beings were a part of the universe. Conversely, as long as one reaches a certain height, his soul, body, and spirit can also reflect the mysteries of the entire universe.

It couldn’t be described in specific words as it was a mysterious thing. Although Chen Rui could only bring himself closer to this state by burning his life, he had really touched the edge.

As he fought against Sosbach, that blurry edge became a little clearer.

Sosbach’s ‘destruction’ and ‘fear’ powers were contained. Just like the explosion of a supernova, which could produce extremely destructive power, but in the entire universe, it was just a fleeting touch of brilliance.

In a split second, all 7 arrows were broken, dissolved, and absorbed, while Chen Rui’s counterattack became stronger and stronger. Sosbach could hardly breathe. It became more and more unbearable for him. The armor formed by the exoskeleton on his body was torn apart with dark green blood flowing out. The bone spurs also broke one after another.

Chen Rui had already caught up with the flying Sosbach. A dazzling light appeared on his fist, then he punched through Sosbach’s chest.

Sosbach let out a loud cry as his body was torn apart. There seemed to be the shadows of Sosbach in the dazzling light, but Chen Rui was unmoved. As he shook his fist, countless stardust burst out. At the spot where Sosbach was torn apart, a faint silhouette appeared. It was actually the real body of Fear Lord.

It turned out that Sosbach seemed to be fleeing by splitting apart, but it was an illusion. His real body was still hidden in place. Unfortunately, Chen Rui saw through it at a glance.

“Why? Every time you know…” Sosbach’s face overflowed with dark green blood.

Chen Rui said lightly, “Because you are right there.”

“It’s indeed the enemy that ‘she’ values.” Sosbach smiled as his face brightened, “But you also miscalculated. I didn’t pin my hopes on your misjudgment.”

With that said, Sosbach’s body disintegrated into pieces.

At the same time, Michael, who was closest to him, suddenly spat out a mouthful of blood, which actually contained a hint of green color.

Sosbach’s fading figure sneered, “Abaddon owns the Hatred Heart, and his claws are the claws of fear that I bestowed on him. Since the first heavy blow of that claw hit Michael, he has been seeded by the origin of fear. I have now already integrated my soul into his body, being one with him. If you want to annihilate me… More precisely, to annihilate my current soul, the price is to kill Michael.”

“Damn it!” Michael roared. His whole body glowed with divine light, and the golden wings behind him burned, but he couldn’t disperse the fear origin infiltrating his soul. Instead, his left pupil turned green.

Among the 3 rulers of Abyss, what Michael hated most was Sosbach who destroyed the Holy Light Mountain, forcing Raphael to self-destruct. The second was Quilliana, who indirectly caused Gabriel’s annihilation. Now, he himself was possessed by the most hated power.

“Very good hatred, but unfortunately there is no fear.” Sosbach’s figure disappeared, and the voice came from Michael’s left eye, “Chen Rui, destroy me quickly. End your partner who fought side by side with your own hands.”

Sosbach had countless combat experiences, so he knew Chen Rui very well.

This kind of person had attachments that he couldn’t understand. Sometimes he would rather die by himself than attack his companions.

If he kills Michael, there would be an indelible flaw in his mind; if he doesn’t kill, then I will completely integrate Michael’s body step by step, turning Michael into the second Fear Lord.

Chen Rui clenched his fists. I really miscalculated. I didn’t expect Sosbach to have such a method!

Michael was his enemy and rival from the beginning. He had a fierce battle with the 3 archangels.

However, the most annoying Raphael actually used self-destruct in exchange for the survival of his companions; Gabriel gave her life and strength to Python and died for her; Michael and him had been fighting side by side until now. Even after the war, they would still not be friends, but now, Michael was his companion! So was Satan!

In order to buy time for Chen Rui, he had fought all the way until now!

Although his power was charged to the peak, and Michael could be wiped out with a wave of his hand, Chen Rui still couldn’t do it.

Michael noticed this kind of struggle, and the once aloof chief archangel fell silent. If the person possessed is Chen Rui, would I hesitate so much?

Michael raised his head, looking straight into the distant sky as if it had seen through time. He suddenly smiled and asked an unexpected question.

“Chen Rui, in your understanding, what exactly is ‘the Abyss’?”

Chen Rui was taken aback. Why is Michael asking such a question now?

Python and Satan were shocked.

Michael had already said the answer himself, “They are the existence of being cursed, and they were also once the supreme existence.”

When he said this sentence, Michael’s body trembled, and a lot of blood flowed out from his eyes and ears.

TL: Finally the secret about the Abyss? Will he explain about the supreme key too?

chapters.title: Chapter 1258: Another World
chapters.body:
Chapter 1258: Another World

The Abyss was the ‘cursed’ existence.

Chen Rui had heard of this sentence, but the latter sentence was unheard of – the supreme existence!

“God?” Chen Rui finally asked.

“Where there is creation, there is destruction; where there is light, there is darkness.” Michael didn’t care about the sudden damage inflicted to his body, “Gods can possess and represent the great power of faith, but it is not truly perfect.”

“You mean… From another perspective, they are just ‘people’ with the power of God?” Chen Rui asked again.

Michael smiled lightly, “This metaphor is very appropriate. Those who look down on the common people are not without desires. On the contrary, their desires are directly proportional to their strength. Perhaps it is because of this that they end up with the later disastrous results… As for the Abyss, to be precise, they are not Gods, but Godhood, the Godhood of Darkness.”

Godhood of Darkness? Chen Rui’s brain could keep up with the sudden overwhelming information .

As soon as Michael said the last 3 words, more blood spilled out from his facial features at the same time. The blood was mixed with the greenery of destruction breath. All the blood mist quickly decomposed and annihilated in the air.

“Wait a minute!” Sosbach’s voice came from the left green eye, revealing a deep profound.

Sosbach’s calculation was not wrong. He did calculate Chen Rui correctly, but he didn’t put Michael into consideration.

“Eroding my soul requires a sufficient price! Now, it’s impossible for you to escape.” Michael’s right eye showed a proud expression. At this moment, he was still the proud archangel.

“Because of the curse, the darkness side of the soul took away a part of Godhood. This is the will of the Abyss: Destruction, hatred, fear, despair…” Before Chen Rui could ask, Michael had already continued on his own. When he said this sentence, there was a sound of explosion from his limbs. He couldn’t stand up immediately as he slowly sat down on the ground.

“Curse?” Chen Rui was still wondering. Who cursed Gods? Who could curse Gods?

“Everything started with the battle of the Gods.” Michael sighed lightly as if he was reminiscing something. After telling so many secrets, his body and soul had been severely injured, but he didn’t care about it, just reminiscing.

“Battle of the Gods?” Chen Rui thought of a very familiar term: Twilight of the Gods.

As far as he knew, there were similar stories in the Earth myths of his previous life. It seemed to be a war between the gods headed by Odin and the giants in the Norse myth. The gods were almost wiped out. Finally, the universe was destroyed and order was re-established.

When Chen Rui first came to the Demon Realm, he also used this version fused with the Havoc in Heaven to fool Aldas, Alice and others. With the improvement of his strength and knowledge, he knew that there was really a Twilight of the Gods in this world. It should be an unimaginable catastrophe – Those huge ‘corpses’ of Mysterious Land, the Gods who have been silent for countless years…

“There are 2 battles of the Gods.”

Chen Rui was a little surprised by Michael’s answer. 2?

Just as Michael said this, his silhouette suddenly blurred a bit. His power breath rapidly weakened. Chen Rui suddenly came to his senses, “Enough, stop right here.”

As previously expected, these secrets were taboos imposed by special rules. They could not be expressed in any way, otherwise the person would be subject to terrible recoil or punishment.

His soul would be severely injured, losing his power and even… life.

Seeing Michael’s appearance, Chen Rui felt a surge of sadness, not only for Michael but also for 1 of his former friends.

Michael shook his head. Python, who was looking at him, said, “Let me tell.”

Satan next to Python was taken aback and gave Python a look of surprise.

Michael looked directly at Python’s familiar silver and red pupils, and he slowly shook his head, “No need.”

You don’t need to pay anything back. You don’t owe me, you owe Tezaneer.”

“What you need is to live with her hope.”

Python and Michael looked at each other for a moment. She finally stopped insisting and fell silent.

“Wait a minute! Maybe we can…” Sosbach’s voice became much weaker with obvious fear. He had become 1 with Michael, and he was also suffering from the injuries Michael suffered. Facing the threat of death getting closer and closer, Sosbach was finally terrified.

“Don’t you represent the highest will that dominates fear? It’s ridiculous that you are even in fear now… In the end, you are just a remnant of selfishness and cowardice. You shouldn’t exist in this world!”

Michael smiled contemptuously before he turned his eyes back to Chen Rui and said, “The first battle of the Gods was the battle between the Gods and the Supreme. In that battle, the Gods paid a huge price to finally eliminate the Supreme Will that surpassed and enslaved them. However, they were also cursed by the Supreme Will, deprived of part of their Godhoods, and merged with the darkness of the soul, becoming the will of the Abyss. Meanwhile, the Supreme Being was sealed.”

Chen Rui finally understood. It turned out that the bloody body that was besieged by the ‘giants’ in the ‘dream’ was actually the Supreme Being above the Gods, or it could even be called the Supreme God. The giants are the Gods.

The bloody body was finally eliminated by the Gods and turned into the ‘eye’.

This made Chen Rui think of the alternation of God’s authority in Greek mythology. The titans overthrew the rule of their father, the Sky Goddess Uranus. However, the titans were later defeated by their descendants, the Olympian gods led by Zeus.

“The first battle of the Gods did not end. In the following battle with the Abyss Will, the Gods were horrified to find that their power was also fading along with the annihilation of the Abyss Will. The Godhood of Darkness was like the twins of fate that tightly bound with them. Destroying themselves in the mirror would also destroy them.”

Michael’s words made Chen Rui think of his last experience in the strange mirror world. That was the choice Alucier gave him at the beginning. If he killed the people in the mirror world, the original body of this world would also disappear.

Since Gods would kill themselves if they eliminated the Abyss Will, then what they finally chose…

“Exile.” Michael had already spoken the answer Chen Rui guessed in his mind, “They exiled the Abyss to a space outside the main plane, sealed it, and then sealed the entire main plane with authority power. It’s like a box that wraps oneself in it. In fact, although this box protects itself, it also confines itself.”

Chen Rui nodded involuntarily, only to hear Michael go on to say, “Since the scourge of the Abyss has been completely solved, the Gods have begun to enjoy that kind of aloof and free life. However, desires are endless. After losing the common enemy, under the conflict of interests, the conflicts among the Gods began to intensify. They finally split into 2 camps, and the war started again. If the purpose of the first battle of the Gods was ‘freedom’, then the second battle of the Gods is ‘desire’, which is a terrifying catastrophe affecting all living beings. Everything below Gods is cannon fodder. Countless Pseudo-God powerhouses died in the midst of the war… Later, the Gods also began to fall. The irony is that a small pawn in their eyes ended all of this…”

“Lucifer!” Chen Rui blurted out. In the vision he saw, Lucifer used the supreme key composed of the 7 artifacts to summon the ‘eye’ and destroy the Gods. This is the truth of the Twilight of the Gods?

What role did Lucifer play in the 2 battles of the gods? Why can the ‘eyes’ be summoned?

What is his relationship to Elemental Goddess Rafferty?

What do the Book of Creation, the Book of Destruction, and Book of Life and Death represent?

After Twilight of the Gods, the Gods fell, but why can the Abyss continue to exist? What is the secret here?

Although Michael uncovered the shocking truth, many new questions arose.

“That’s right, he’s actually just a sad pawn with a sad fate. He destroyed the Gods, not only because of his own reason but also because of Supreme…”

Michael’s words stopped abruptly. Chen Rui turned around and saw that the dark green in the pupil of the left eye had dissipated. Sosbach’s soul was annihilated while Michael’s figure became thinner.

This chief archangel persevered until the last moment.

His strength was indeed far inferior to that formidable Sosbach, but he did not lose.

“I used to think you were him, but you’re not.” Michael’s voice became ethereal. These words were not within the taboo range, so he could barely hold on for a moment, “You have to transcend him, transcend everything…”

Chen Rui said solemnly, “No matter how far I can go, I will always remember you, Gabriel and Raphael. You all are respectable rivals.”

He didn’t say ‘friends’ or ‘companions’, but ‘rivals’, which was more suitable for the 3 archangels.

There would always be things in life that would be missed, and there would always be some people who would be forgotten, but there would always be some people who would not be forgotten, whether they were lovers, friends or… rivals.

Chen Rui’s words made Michael’s gradually dim gaze flash a gleam of light. He nodded, then he took a deep look at Satan.

“It’s been so many years… We have been fighting for so many years.”

Satan looked at Michael quietly as his lips moved, but he didn’t say anything. He turned around suddenly and left.

Michael didn’t look at Satan anymore. He raised his head and looked at the sky.

“Is there really another world?”

Chen Rui was slightly shocked: Michael asked the same question as Gabriel at the last moment of his life.

“Yes!”

Chen Rui spoke out the answer loudly.

With that said, Michael’s body turned into countless golden luminous spots and dissipated.

On the mountain peak in the distance, Satan raised his head and also looked at the sky.

In the wind, the golden feather drifted away slowly.

TL: Why did Lucifer give him the supreme key? Is he asking Chen Rui to summon the supreme god and end this curse? Hmmm , also, will Super System be ever explained? Arh , more ???…

chapters.title: Chapter 1259: Transcend, The Only Hope
chapters.body:
Chapter 1259: Transcend, The Only Hope

In the evening, the Dark Moon residence.

Chen Rui looked up at the 2 moons, which started to turn purple. He seemed to be pondering.

Michael gave away many secrets at the cost of his life, unraveling the fog that had been hanging over his mind – at least part of it.

There were still many questions in his mind. The biggest one was: The Abyss Will is the Darkness of Godhood produced by the curse of the Supreme God on the Gods, which is equal to a part of the life and power of the Gods, so the gods dare not completely exterminate them. Instead, they exiled and sealed them away. In the second battle of the Gods, the Gods should have fallen under the power of the Supreme God summoned by Lucifer, so the Abyss Will connected with the fate of the Gods should also dissipate. Why does it still exist today?

“Sosbach and Dillosro have been annihilated, but fear and despair have not been destroyed.” Python’s words interrupted Chen Rui’s thoughts.

“As long as they find a suitable body, they will create a new Fear Lord and Despair Lord?” Chen Rui understood, “The Rulers are actually just the manifestation of the Will…or are they just slaves? ‘Will’ is the real Abyss? Then, even if the 3 Rulers are all defeated, it will not help. Unless… destroy the true Abyss Will?”

“Not ‘destroy’.” Python shook her head when she heard the last sentence, “You can only transcend.”

Chen Rui thought of the sentence Michael said before he died: You have to transcend him, transcend everything…

Transcend Lucifer, then transcend higher?

“Okay, you don’t need to explain the rest, I will find the answer myself.” Chen Rui stopped Python’s next words, “At this point, the answer is not important. What matters is the result. If we can’t change the result, all is in vain.”

Python knew what Chen Rui was worried about, and she fell silent.

Footsteps came from behind, Chen Rui turned around and saw Satan. His original black hair had turned gray, and his whole body was full of tiredness.

“Satan, your strength…” Chen Rui frowned, he could feel Satan’s weakness, not just on the outside, but the simultaneous decline of soul, life and strength.

In fact, since that battle, Satan’s strength had been weakening every day, which was the result of extreme overdrawing of power.

“Perhaps, Chen Rui can help you.” Python suddenly spoke up.

“If you believe in me, I will do my best.” Chen Rui nodded. Although Satan’s situation was very bad and could not be recovered with potion or magic, the Star Conferring Platform and star conferring might play a certain role.

If Satan hadn’t used the [Time Trap] to hold back Sosbach and the other 2, even if he and Zola could come, it was very likely that the Demon Realm would have been almost destroyed.

“You’re not ‘him’, and I’m not her.” Satan looked at Python indifferently, “I have my own path. Even if this path is the most difficult, I will still go on.”

There was more respect in Chen Rui’s eyes. He did not force Satan and just said, “Our 10-year agreement is still valid. I’m looking forward to it.”

“It’s a very difficult goal.” Satan’s eyes lit up and he nodded, “It’s as difficult as your goal. I plan to return to the Mountain Seckred. Uh , it’s not that I deliberately listen to your conversation… but , she was right when she said that ‘transcend’ is the only way for you.”

“Understood.” Chen Rui let out a long breath, “It is indeed difficult, but there is hope after all.”

“The only hope.” Satan looked up at the sky as his figure gradually faded away.

“At least hope is still there.” Python withdrew her gaze and turned around.

“Python, wait a minute, where are you going…”

Python stopped without turning back, “Just going back to the room.”

Chen Rui scratched his head as if he had misunderstood something, and the atmosphere was a little awkward for a while.

At this time Alice ran over with Adeline, “Brother!”

Chen Rui was taken aback, “Is there anything?”

Alice said excitedly, “Helen is back! Let’s pick her up!”

“You should go.” Python said.

“ Oh .” Chen Rui just responded, and he was dragged away by Alice. Adeline bowed toward Python’s back and hurriedly followed.

Python still didn’t look back, but the green and red eyes showed a glimpse of softness and her lips slightly curved. She bathed in the quiet purple moonlight while walking to her room.

For the Demon Realm, the door between 2 worlds at the Blood Claw Estate disappeared, and the terrifying war finally ended, but all those who lived through it would never forget this catastrophe in their lifetime.

In fact, this battle had not really ended, it had just come to a break. The door between the 2 worlds would open again in 130 years at the latest. This opening would determine the fate of the entire world and all lives.

130 years, ordinary humans didn’t have such a long lifespan, but people still had offspring. For humans with certain strength, a lifespan of more than 100 years was just the beginning, let alone demons.

The only way to survive was to keep getting stronger.

The ‘Infinite Warrior OL’ version was updated again. It removed the previous cover and entertainment, and it turned into a pure training and strategic deduction game. The enemy in it was the complete version of the Abyss. Based on this battle with the Abyss, the data made corresponding adjustments to the monster’s strength and attributes. The dungeon was divided into normal, difficult, and epic grades. The monster siege activity had become a daily challenge. Those who reached a certain level and achievement could participate in the hell trial challenge and enjoy the real endless monster army. There was no time limit until death.

The Demon Realm set off a frenzy of fighting and training. The 3 empires also held various rewards and competitions accordingly. Whether it was demons, humans or other races, they had shown unprecedented enthusiasm.

Everything was for survival.

Although there were still unavoidable conflicts and disputes, when faced with the common final enemy of ‘destruction’, most of the originally opposing races, whether it was within demons or humans, or between demons, humans or other races, they both put aside their conflicts for many years and fought hand in hand.

The development of the Demon Realm had far exceeded the imagination of the human world races. The soaring economy and construction, including all kinds of novelty, had deeply attracted the human world races.

In particular, the only prince consort of the 3 empresses of the Demon Realm was Arthur. Roland (currently named Chen Rui), who had been missing for many years from the Dragon Bright Empire and who once became a news figure in the human world. In this war with the Abyss, the strength he showed far surpassed the 3 archangels who were the strongest in the human world, and he also surpassed Satan who was the strongest in the Demon Realm. He was also the key figure who repelled the Abyss monsters.

The biographical video of ‘I Have a Dream’ he posted on the Demon Realm had already spread throughout the Demon Realm.

I have a dream that we don’t have to hate each other, we don’t have to conquer each other, because what we have, what we protect, is beyond what can be obtained by conquest.

Until now, this sentence was familiar and deeply rooted in the hearts of the people.

Maybe it was more about succumbing to that person’s power, but it was precisely because of him that the Demon Realm avoided the doom of destruction in this catastrophe. He was the most important link connecting the entire humans and demons. He was also the strongest guardian of all living creatures in his world.

In the battle of the Star Fortress in the Bloody Empire, the elites of the demons and humans coalition army were almost wiped out. On the other side, the army led by Shea also encountered fierce battles in Black Iron Mountain Range. Although with the help of Meria, Span, Philly and others, it was still extremely precarious. Fortunately, there were no Ruler-level enemies. After the door between 2 worlds closed, all the Abyss troops were finally eliminated.

After this battle, a huge monument was built in Blood Claw Estate, engraved with the names of all the soldiers who died in this bloody battle. There was no race or gender distinction here, only the heroes who died in battle.

A month later, a wedding attracted the attention and reports of all parties.

The 2 sides of the wedding were a male elf and a demon female, Sivling and Rometty.

Sivling used to be the single elf with a promising future in the Silver Moon Celestial Capital, and he was now the legion commander of the elf magic archer; Rometty was the legion commander of the Fallen Angel Empire’s Flying Cloud Legion. Both of them were Demon Overlord-level powerhouses and also famous archers and sharpshooters.

Love was a complicated and wonderful thing. Some people might not be able to spark when they get along every day, while some people could fall in love at first sight, or they only need a trigger point. In the fierce battle against the Abyss side by side, the elf fell in love with the heroic female demon. At the critical moment of facing the Abyss charge, Sivling, who had always been arrogant and introverted, took the initiative to express his love to Rometty. Fortunately, both of them survived the war.

After a romantic candlelight dinner, the relationship between the 2 developed rapidly. Everything seemed to happen too quickly, yet it was so natural.

The biggest focus of this wedding was not the union of the 2 sharpshooters and legion commanders, but the race. The union between demons and humans would have been considered taboo in the past, but at this time and place, it had been widely recognized and blessed.

The Fallen Angel Empire’s Empress Shea and the elf tribe’s new empress Philly attended the wedding and sent blessings to both parties. This was an epoch-making wedding. Although it was hyped as a political event for many reasons, for Sivling And Rometty, the lovers, this was a perfect wedding. For many races in the Demon Realm, this was just the beginning of common survival and common development.

In fact, Sivling and Rometty were not the first interracial couple to marry after the war. Half a month ago, Gueroas from the Dragon Valley secretly got together with Dursa from the elf tribe. They also sparked love in the life-and-death war with the Abyss.

Gueroas had a crush on Zola’s mother Meria for tens of thousands of years, but Meria got together with Elf King Span in the end. Now Gueroas himself had found an elf partner. Everything seemed to be decided by fate.

The wedding of Gueroas and Dursa only invited friends from the small circle. Since they could no longer return to the Dragon Valley, Span could not use the Scale of Wealth of the dragons to avenge the loss of their family property. They could only use the newly produced top quality white wine to get Gueroas drunk and recouped a bit of interest.

Amidst the joyful songs and laughter, the haze of death before was finally dispelled bit by bit.

Life was so precious.

Those who survived on the verge of death would only cherish it more.

chapters.title: Chapter 1260: Noisy And Peaceful Day
chapters.body:
Chapter 1260: Noisy And Peaceful Day

On the outskirts of Dark Moon City, Blue Lake.

“Looking at the moons of the Demon Realm like this, I have an incredible feeling.” Sitting on the grass, Pagris looked up at the 2 silver-white moons in the sky, “I think of Novak’s famous moon poem… The soft wind blowing across your face, I, outside the window, bathed in the moonlight, listening to your tranquility.”

Lex on the side nodded. Although the age gap between the 2 was huge, they were friends in the human world. Pagris admired Lex’s political ability very much, and under his suggestion, he carried out a series of centralization of power in the Dragon Valley. The reform made the position of Dragon Emperor more consolidated.

“How elegant. It’s a pity that you are not a money-swindling poet. Being a Dragon Emperor, that has no future, is really not suitable for you.” The discordant voice came from Auglas not far away. Although the 2 Dragon Emperors were spared no effort to fight side by side when dealing with the Abyss, once they were not fighting, they were born rivals.

Pagris sneered, “It’s better than a guy who is just waiting to die. He has been the Dragon Emperor for thousands of years, but the Dragon Island is still a small force in the wild.”

“This is called detachment, alright?” Auglas retorted, “Is the Dragon Valley very strong? Aren’t you just bootlicking the human forces? That dragon knight legion too. It’s simply selling the dignity of the giant dragon race to compromise! To put it bluntly, it is asking people to sit on your face!”

“Want to fight? Auglas!” Pagris said sternly, “Group fight or one-on-one. Say it. Whoever reneges will be chicken!”

“This is the Demon Realm with strong dark elements. It would be bullying you if we one-on-one. Do you dare to group fight?”

Pagris was full of fighting spirit. He stood up, “Group fight it is! The loser will kowtow and go around when he sees the winner! Dare you?”

“That’s it.” Auglas also stood up. He looked at the people nearby and said confidently, “Zola is Chen Rui’s wife, and she is the dragon of the Demon Realm. There are also Lalaria, Olypheus, Paglio and Krobelus on my side. Pick whoever you want!”

“Can your old fool be more shameless?” Paglio took a sip of wine and looked at Lalaria speechlessly. The dragons who came to Blue Lake for an outing today, except for the ones mentioned by Auglas, were only Queen Sophia.

Pagris and Auglas were comparable in strength. As for Sophia, she was a non-combat type. Even if Zola did not participate in the battle, there was no suspense in this battle.

Lala Loli shrugged her shoulders with a look of ‘we don’t know that old guy’, then she laughed with Helen, and ‘habitually’ wrapped her arms around the waist of the little mermaid princess.

The little mermaid princess blinked her eyes. When she glanced at a poor man who made his child cry while carrying, she slapped Lalaria’s perverted hand away, stepped forward to take Doudou, and gently hummed a nursery rhyme.

That naughty child really didn’t give face to his poor dad. When he heard this touching singing voice, he stopped crying immediately, which made him feel embarrassed.

Pagris didn’t dispute Zola’s camp affiliation. He just glanced at Lex, “It’s really ‘fair’. Since you start making fun of the dragon knight, then I’ll ask a dragon knight to help. Old friend, I look forward to your combat power.”

“Me?” The emperor of the Dragon Bright Empire was a little surprised, then he spread his hands, expressing that he didn’t mind.

Damn! Auglas secretly scolded Pagris for being more shameless than himself – Although Lex is only Demon Overlord in strength, he is Chen Rui’s father. If he joins, Zola will be the first to turn against me.

“I don’t mean to look down on dragon knights.” Auglas rolled his eyes, pouted his lips toward Chen Rui, and changed the topic, “The real dragon knight I know… Well, should be conquering the dragons’ body and mind… Are you sure you and him… are in such a relationship?”

At last, Auglas gave his in-laws some face (he thought) by not saying Lex’s name. Pagris’ face turned green. When he was about to speak, Chen Rui, who had already been involved in the conflict, finally couldn’t help it, “Stop!”

Dragon knight? If this kind of mouth cannon continues to fight, it will only lower the lower limit of morality indefinitely. During these days, Chen Rui had been working hard on training. He didn’t even had time to take care of Duoduo and Doudou. Under the strong request of Isabella, Kia, Alice and others, he managed to spare a day to organize this outing. Isn’t the purpose to relax for a while? Do you think I’m free?

“Today is an outing, not a day of war.” Chen Rui shook his head. At this time Duoduo’s exhilarated shouts could be heard in the distance.

“Daddy!”

Duoduo carried a small basket, followed by Alice, Adeline, Michelle and another petite figure.

“Look, I picked a lot of Jade Dragonfruits!” Duoduo threw herself into daddy’s arms, showing off the harvest in the small basket.

“ Wow , my Darling Duoduo is the best.” Chen Rui kissed Duoduo. This baby girl is closest to me after all. As for Doudou brat… forget about it, he cries everytime I hug him.

“Brother, I picked a lot too!” Alice also came to announce the good news. Chen Rui stroked Alice’s hair. Looking at Michelle who looked expectant, he brushed the little elf princess’ nose. The little elf princess giggled and pulled Adeline over. Before anything happened, the naga girl’s face turned red.

Chen Rui smiled at another petite loli who looked to be only 5 years old with silver hair and blonde eyes. She had a more shy personality. She seemed to have a kind of natural awe toward Chen Rui. She gave him a timid look and hid in Sophia’s arms.

This loli was the soul on the ambergris that Chen Rui saved in the Dragon Valley. She was also the second oracle of the Galaxy Divinity Temple after Veronica. She was Avril.

Avril had accepted the power of the Super System, and her soul power had grown much stronger than before. In addition, Chen Rui’s current strength was much stronger than before, so she could appear outside in a projected form for a long time. Even so, it was enough to make Avril’s mother Sophia ecstatic.

“Auntie, eat this Jade Dragonfruit. Duoduo picked it.” Duoduo started to distribute it with a small basket. Freya was singing and coaxing Doudou with Helen. When she saw Duoduo coming over, she touched the little girl’s face lovingly. The apprehension she felt when she fled to the Demon Realm with her father had long since dissipated. Now this big family made her feel at ease and happy like never before.

“Aunt Helen, Aunt Athena, Aunt Kia…” Duoduo distributed all the way, then she walked up to Lex, “Grandpa, the biggest one is for you.”

Lex took it. When he saw the little girl for the first time, the scene of the little girl waving her hands reappeared in front of her eyes, and a certain emotion slowly gathered in his mind. The missing feeling filled his chest, and his sight became a little blurred. He solemnly took the fruit over, but he didn’t eat it. He just held it tightly in his hand.

At this moment, he was not the ruler who showed his majesty everywhere and was guarded by everyone, but the ‘grandpa’ who was peaceful and happy with his family.

The little girl noticed this scene. She thought it wasn’t enough, so she secretly took another one for Lex, “Grandpa, you must eat it. It’s delicious.”

“Sure!” Lex smiled. Freya gave her father a surprised look. In her memory, it seemed that she had only seen Lex’s smile like this when she was very young.

Sophia hugged Avril and pointed in the direction of Pagris. Pagris ignored Auglas at this time, but he stretched out his hands to his daughter with a rare softness on his face.

Avril hesitated for a moment before she ran toward Pagris, then the 2 figures overlapped.

Now was obviously not the time to argue. Auglas looked enviously at the affectionate Pagris father and daughter, then he looked at his 2 daughters.

“ Hmph Hmph, don’t even think about it.” Lalaria looked away and showed the back of her head to her father.

“Give me money! Give me money!” Olypheus was playing mahjong with Roman, Krobelus, and Delia in the distance, so she didn’t see his father’s expectations at all.

Well, this time I lost to the damned holy dragon . Auglas couldn’t help but burst into tears. Fortunately, the little girl’s ‘Grandpa Auglas’ let him find a little comfort. He picked up the little girl to distribute the Jade Dragonfruits to everyone.

“I have won!” Ms. Black Dragon excitedly showed the tiles in her hand, “Self-drawn! Big 3 dragons! Give me the money!”

“Wait, this tile doesn’t seem right.” The sharp-eyed Roman grabbed the ‘Green Dragon’ tile that Ms. Black Dragon just grabbed, and he suddenly smiled, “Where is Dodo, I want to invite him to the Princess Retail Store for a deluxe meal.”

The mahjong tiles in Roman’s hand suddenly swelled up, turning into a translucent onion. He was drooling, “Deluxe meal! That’s what you said!”

“Olypheus!” Krobelus and Delia called out Ms. Black Dragon’s name in unison.

The cheating Ms. Black Dragon was acting dumb, “What?”

The Ms. Fairy Dragon of the real original ‘What’ was beside Doudou, teasing the little guy with a smile, “Doudou, where is mommy?”

This identification game was the little guy’s favorite. He pointed to Athena.

“Where is Aunt Zola?” The little guy pointed to the fairy dragon accurately.

“Where’s daddy?”

Doudou looked at Chen Rui, and his mouth suddenly flattened as if he was about to cry.

No way! Chen Rui was speechless. I was just a little anxious when hugging you last time that I poked you with my beard. How can you hold this grudge for so long? I’m your father!

Chen Rui was muttering here, but Sir Doudou was already crying over there. For a moment, all the women’s unkind eyes focused on Chen Rui, making him shudder.

Doudou cried for a while, then he simply turned around. Without even looking at his father, he stretched out his hand to Python who was outside the circle of girls, “Hug…”

This was a very strange thing. Duoduo had always been a little afraid of Python. Perhaps due to being a midwife, Doudou was unusually close to Python.

Python hesitated for a moment, looked at Athena who was encouraging, and finally stepped forward to hug Doudou. Her movements were cautious and clumsy, lest she might not hug him well. Doudou appeared to be in a good mood and smiled happily.

This naughty child always loved the new and disliked the old. Python quickly returned the child to Athena, but she still stood aside. Although they were far away, it felt like… she was no longer the outsider who only watched from afar.

“It’s really a wonderful moonlight.” Chen Rui smiled at Pagris as he lay comfortably on the grass in the noisy and peaceful atmosphere.

chapters.title: Chapter 1261: Gloomy Clouds
chapters.body:
Chapter 1261: Gloomy Clouds

In the arena, the cheering sound was loud.

There were 2 battle ball teams fighting fiercely. What was different from the past was that one was the human team and the other was the demon team. While gradually integrating into the life of the Demon Realm, humans gradually fell in love with battle ball, a ‘new sport’ that combined individual confrontation and teamwork.

It was not only interesting and confrontational, but the most important thing was the tacit understanding, which was also very important for fighting.

Humans had not long been exposed to the battle ball, yet they had shown amazing comprehension ability in this aspect. Nonetheless, compared with the experienced demon team, there was still a big gap. In addition to humans, the human alliance on the field also comprised elf, orcs, and ground dragons. It was a veritable ‘multinational force’. Despite their best efforts, the alliance fell behind by a score of 1-6. Their opponent was just the Red Blood Team, 1 of the 2 league teams in Dark Moon Estate.

Although the score gap was large and the scene was controlled by the Red Blood Team most of the time, the human team did not give up and was still actively fighting. The human world races cheerleaders on the grandstand showed the greatest enthusiasm and encouragement for their team as if they were the leading party.

In the end, the Red Blood Team easily won 11-3. The audience did not leave the field because there was a second more exciting game. The 2 sides were Tulip Team from the Fallen Angel Capital and Essidor Team from the Bloody Empire.

These 2 battle ball matches were just the preliminaries for the battle ball in the Grand Sports Competition. The Grand Sports Competition was divided into 2 major events, team events and individual events. Team events include battle ball and virtual Abyss battle. The latter was carried out in the magic game ‘Infinite Warrior OL the Abyss Edition’, which would be broadcast live to the audience on magic television. The previous bloody battle with the Abyss had shown that unless the strength level of the peak stage was reached, the role of personal force in this kind of war was very limited. They must rely on the cooperation of the team.

The concept of ‘eSports’ had been prevalent in the Demon Realm as early as the 3 empires city alliance. This was also related to the features of the ‘Infinite Warrior OL’ itself. If any game lovers crossover here, they would surely exclaim ‘this is my ideal hometown’ because ‘playing games’ well in the Demon Realm was definitely not a waste of time, but an enviable star. Furthermore, they would be valued by the empire, be recruited into college or higher combat legions.

Neo, the new third general of the Dark Shadow Empire, was a good example of a magic game winner. In the battle of the White Sea in the human world, Neo showed a commanding ability that attracted everyone’s attention. Even George, Gerant and other famous generals as well as seniors praised his commanding ability.

As everyone knew, the catastrophe of the Abyss had not really ended. People must learn to overcome fear, bravely face these terrifying enemies, and fight to the end. This was the biggest theme of this virtual competition, which was supported by all races.

Individual events include 3 categories: Archery, assemble puppets, and unrestricted martial fighting. There were also eSports. Taking archery as an example, it was not simply shooting or archery at the target. Within the specified time, kill or snipe the specified Abyss monsters while escaping safely.

In addition to virtual battles, assemble puppets also had real battle puppets to control; as for martial fighting, it was always the most attractive event. Different from the past, this time it was divided into 2 groups: Super-level and normal strength. The 2 Dragon Emperors would oversee the super-level group and accept the challenge of the final winner.

This was the first ‘Grand Sports Competition’ held by the Demon Realm, with no limit to races and no limit on the number of people (There were corresponding elimination matches in the magic game. Everyone could sign up. As long as they met the standards, they were eligible to participate in the main game). This triggered the upsurge of the entire Demon Realm. The inherent meaning was equally extraordinary – All races unite and become stronger in the process of training to fight against the common enemy.

In fact, many people, especially the high-level powerhouses, were very clear that strengthening the commoners was only the foundation to enhance survivability when fighting the Abyss army. What really determined the outcome of the entire war was the fight between the super-level.

In the previous battle with the Abyss, the coalition army’s Pseudo-God peak stage suffered heavy losses. The 3 archangels, the strongest in the human world, all fell. Raguel died in the hands of Sosbach, and Satan’s strength was greatly damaged.

Although 2 of the 3 rulers of Abyss had been annihilated, the will of ‘fear’ and ‘despair’ had not really disappeared. As long as time passed, a new ruler would reappear. Taking a step back, even if there was only Quilliana left, the Demon Realm couldn’t resist her. If Quilliana wasn’t still healing from the inner injury due to the battle of the Star Fortress, perhaps it would be another ending.

Currently, Chen Rui, Zola, and Python were the only ones who could resist the Abyss Rulers head-on.

Python was a veteran powerhouse of the same era as the 3 archangels and Satan. She had experienced 2 battles of the gods, so her strength was beyond doubt; Zola inherited the Godhood fragments of the Elemental Goddess and was the Main Elemental Messenger of the elemental world. She had a bright future. However, everyone knew that Chen Rui was the greatest hope.

The vast galaxy shone brightly.

Chen Rui was quietly looking at the galaxy in front of him, and images appeared in his pupils. These images included his real experience of fighting the 3 Abyss rulers before as well as deduction of the hypothetical battle in his consciousness.

In the hypothetical battle in his consciousness, his opponent was the strongest Quilliana. During this time, he was in the closed training ground almost day and night, and his strength had improved a lot compared to the Abyss battle. He was going all out by using the strongest method (‘Burning Galaxy’ for short) to fully fuse with [All Star Gods View] at the cost of burning his life, but at most, he could only narrowly beat Quilliana’s first transformation. Once she used the second transformation, he would surely be the one who was defeated in the end.

Chen Rui felt that the current strength had reached the bottleneck, and the fusion of [All Star Gods View] by burning his life was already the strongest state. Even a small step forward was extremely difficult. What’s more, he didn’t know whether Quilliana had other trump cards.

Is it really necessary to use the supreme key?

He now understood that the purpose of the supreme key was to summon the power of the sealed ‘Supreme Being’. The appearance of this power could destroy the Gods, and it was very likely to destroy everything and even bring unpredictable terrifying consequences. That was why Lucifer said so. Michael also said that if the supreme key was not used, there was still a glimmer of hope. If it was used, even hope was gone.

That being the case, what was the point of Lucifer giving him the supreme key? Wouldn’t it be more effective to disassemble it into the 7 artifacts to increase the actual combat power?

However, Chen Rui also understood that no matter how strong the 7 artifacts were, they were just external objects. When he just lost the 7 artifacts, he really felt very uncomfortable, but at the same time he was aware in his mind – He used to rely too much on these equipment. Once lost, not only his strength, but also his self-confidence in the battle was somewhat lacking.

Only the power that belongs to me is the most real and reliable existence.

It was precisely because of overcoming this discomfort that he was able to take another leap in strength in such a short period of time, from being no match for the 3 Abyss Ruler to now being able to contend head-on with Quilliana.

But it was just barely able to compete, unable to truly ‘transcend’.

Michael, Python, and Satan all said that only ‘transcend’ was the only way to defeat the Abyss. Chen Rui wasn’t sure what this ‘transcend’ really meant, but he couldn’t do even a simple ‘defeat’ right now.

Seeing that ‘he’ was about to be completely destroyed by ‘Quilliana’, Chen Rui stopped the deduction of this consciousness war. Because he had to fight against Quilliana with all his strength, he activated the power of ‘Burning Galaxy’. Even if it was a deduction, it still consumed a considerable amount of vitality.

Chen Rui’s current vitality was less than 1/5 left. With his level of strength and the life shared by Paglio back then, under normal circumstances, it would be close to infinity. One could imagine the intensity of training and deduction.

The life burning was not simply for the improvement of power, but for infinitely approaching the ultimate level. If he could touch the edge of that power, he might be able to truly ‘transcend’.

Chen Rui took a short rest, left the training ground, and returned to the Galaxy Divinity Temple, just in time to see Veronica talking with Avril. Seeing him coming, Avril, who was still talking initially, immediately became shy and bowed to him from afar.

Knowing the character of the little girl, Chen Rui didn’t mind it. He patted her head. Avril didn’t dodge, but she seemed a little nervous. After saying she wanted to check the temple, she disappeared in front of the Tower of Faith.

“You won’t let go of even such a small girl?” Veronica said with a smile.

“You overestimate me.” Chen Rui shrugged and stepped forward to hold Veronica’s hand, “As a victim who was coveted by a female teacher since young in college, I strongly protest that you put your hobby on me. “

Veronica gave him a glare, “In the end, the female teacher was kidnapped by the boy.”

“This is 1 of the few achievements I’m proud of.” Chen Rui smiled and kissed her face, “It is also 1 of the most thankful things.”

“Me too.” Veronica showed a gentle expression, and she suddenly asked, “Python, what are you going to do with her?”

“Her?” Chen Rui was taken aback, “What can I do?”

“She followed you through life and death, and even fought for you at the cost of her life. Although she didn’t come here many times before, I could feel her loneliness. I heard Yini say a while ago that Python got Gabriel’s power, and now her physique has changed. Although it is not a complete light element body, it is not a dark element physique or the lamp spirits body. At that time, I was thinking, maybe, Python can make Duoduo and Doudou have more brothers or sisters .”

Chen Rui smiled wryly, “I really haven’t thought about this.”

“Then your feeling toward Python…” Before Veronica finished speaking, she was taken aback for a moment. When she turned around, she saw Python’s figure appearing behind her.

“I’m sorry, I didn’t intend to listen to you…” Python’s face remained calm, but her eyes were a little dodging, but she quickly regained her solemnity and said to Chen Rui, “Something big happened! Go outside and have a look!”

Chen Rui seldom saw such a dignified Python, and he knew that it must be a big deal, so he quickly exited the Galaxy Divinity Temple, returned to the residence of the Dark Moon consciously, walked out of the house, and saw Zola, Python, Pagris, Auglas and others gathered in the yard. Everyone had only 1 movement, looking up at the sky.

Seeing that the sky was covered with gloomy clouds, Chen Rui instinctively felt that the gloomy clouds were not simple, exuding the most origin powerbreath. Just looking at it, it was like a heavy mountain, depressing everyone’s mind. The cloud stretched as far as the eyes could see, almost covering the entire sky of the Demon Realm.

“Daddy, where are the moons?” Duoduo looked at the cloud curiously and asked.

“I don’t know.” Chen Rui shook his head, but he had a premonition in his mind that the 2 moons shrouded in clouds might never appear.

TL: So soon? Did Python find a way to breach the seal?

chapters.title: Chapter 1262: The World In My Mind
chapters.body:
Chapter 1262: The World In My Mind

7 days passed, and the dark clouds covering the entire Demon Realm sky never dissipated.

Perhaps it was a psychological effect, but everyone felt a depression that was difficult to dispel.

Chen Rui’s hunch was correct, since that day, 2 moons had not appeared again. For the Demon Realm, the 2 moons were equivalent to the sun and the moon. Without the 2 moons, it was equivalent to losing day and night. No matter what time, the sky was dark.

This kind of effect was not only related to living habits, but it also brought various terrifying consequences. Just the fact that the food stopped growing was a fatal blow.

In the past few days, Chen Rui and others had tried various methods, Zola’s magic, Chen Rui’s attack, the Star Ship’s cannon attacks…

However, even if the clouds could be temporarily pierced through, the clouds would soon recover. It would not be completely dispelled as if the haze that filled the sky was an inseparable part of this world. Unless, the entire world was destroyed.

This anomaly was by no means accidental, and it was probably related to the Abyss that occupied the human world. The door between 2 worlds was closed, so the Abyss creatures including Quilliana could not breach the space seal and descend to the Demon Realm, but everyone still underestimated the means of the Abyss Ruler.

As the Godhood of Darkness, the Abyss possessed vast wisdom and countless secret techniques. She definitely wanted to use this method to completely wipe out the entire Demon Realm.

This form of ‘destruction’ was more thorough and terrifying than the previous large army invasion.

Even though the door between 2 worlds was only a little over 100 years away from reopening, it didn’t look like Quilliana intended to give Chen Rui and the Demon Realm a break.

This could also be regarded as a recognition of Chen Rui’s potential from another angle. However, for Chen Rui and the entire Demon Realm, the shadow of death that had just faded surged again, swallowing hope.

Chen Rui didn’t give up because of this. He immediately called all alchemy grand masters and masters of all races, and researchers of the elf tribe magic civilization to hold an urgent seminar in the capital.

“Artificial moon?” When Chen Rui on the podium proposed this idea, almost everyone was shocked.

“Aguile… No, Sir Chen Rui, please forgive me.” Anderson, the president of the Mechanic Association of the Dark Shadow Empire, was the first to stand up, “Even if you are the most powerful alchemy grand master in this world, I must say that this is an impossible idea. We can create the most exquisite item or equipment, but we cannot create the sun, moon and stars. Only God can do this.”

As soon as this sentence came out, almost everyone present agreed.

Chen Rui looked at Anderson, then at the crowd, and he smiled slightly, “Master Anderson… No, you should have stepped into the realm of quasi-grand master now. First of all, I would like to congratulate you, but, let me just say a word. If you want to advance to grand master based on your current cognition or state, the possibility is almost zero.”

As the world’s number one mechanic grand master, although Chen Rui was fully qualified to say this, he was too harsh, especially in front of so many elites in the alchemy world. However, Anderson was not annoyed. It was not the first time he had dealt with Chen Rui, and he knew very well that Chen Rui was not an arrogant person. Instead, he showed a surprised expression and bowed, “Please advise.”

“For example, before the first legendary grade equipment was created, did our cognition stay at an excellent grade? At that time, would we know that there are legendary grades and even God grade? If we didn’t even think about it, how would legendary grade equipment appear in this world?”

Chen Rui’s question made Anderson shake his head, while Tetenis, Finoia, Chique and a few others showed thoughtful expressions.

“I once said a word at the last Demon Realm exchange meeting. Once the thinking is fixed by a certain framework, it is tantamount to killing the real imagination. Since we made the first piece of equipment, our life has been integrated into the world of ‘creation’. Regardless of whether the sun, moon, and stars are created by God, the essence of creation remains unchanged.” With that said, a faint light appeared beside Chen Rui, slowly evolving into some forms, such as magic lamp, television, mobile phone, magic airship, magic gun, battle ball and other new things in the past 10,000 years.

Not only that, but there were also many things that no one present had seen before. The alchemists suddenly whispered.

“What’s that thing on 4 wheels running so fast down the road?”

“Is that kind of high-rise building with hundreds of floors possible?”

“There is also that huge thing flying in the starry sky. Is it a ship?”

“…”

“Those things just now may appear in our world in the future, or they may not, but other newer things instead… because the pace of creation is endless.” Chen Rui’s back turned into a bright universe starry sky, “If we want to do this, we must have the courage to break the conventional thought and the shackles that imprison imagination. Creation is an infinite possibility. If we lose the ‘possibility’, our world and our power will stagnate… First, we must ‘think’ before we can ‘transcend’.”

When talking about ‘transcend’, a light suddenly flashed in Chen Rui’s mind. Everyone present felt that the ‘illusion’ of the universe’s starry sky was suddenly filled with life force as if it really existed.

At this moment, many people seemed to be touched by some kind of mysterious breath, and inspiration poured out of their minds.

Chen Rui came back to his senses. When he wanted to touch the strange light in his mind, he could no longer do it He paused for a while before he said, “Simply put, there is nothing impossible as long as we can think about it. Sir Anderson, I hope you, me, and everyone can create new possibilities.”

Anderson felt as if he had seen a new door. As long as he touched this door, he could truly break through the shackles and reach a new height. He was overjoyed. He bowed to Chen Rui respectfully with the etiquette of a student before he sat down.

It was not only Anderson who felt this way but also many alchemy masters with extraordinary potential. After breaking some kind of thinking confinement, many ideas came out in a short time. Some people began to boldly take the stage and explain their ideas.

“As for the material, I think it needs a carrier of fire and light element power, which can imitate the principle of our human world magic lamp, with tungsten crystal as the main body.” Now the human mechanic grand master was on stage, Falaqini, who was as famous as Chique. This idea was approved by many people.

But soon someone raised an objection, “The light range of the heat generated is too small, and the energy consumption is too huge. If you want to cover the residential area of the Demon Realm, you must have tens of thousands of them.”

“In terms of heat and light, you can use the magic array circuit to buff, and this circuit can also greatly reduce energy consumption.” Falaqini drew a complex magic array on the problem board, which was his most proficient area. Some original circuits were even the painstaking effort of many years of research. At this critical moment of life and death, there was no need to hide it.

Many magic array research masters present couldn’t help being amazed when they saw these circuit diagrams.

“Sir Falaqini’s magic array attainment is amazing, but the Demon Realm is no better than the human world. Too much heat and light will be counterproductive. The material must be changed. And the manufacturing cost is still high. Even if we modify it with sir’s circuit, only considering the degree of population density, at least thousands of moons need to be launched at the same time.” Tetenis’s suggestion made Falaqini himself fall into deep thought.

“Actually, we can just use 1…” A timid voice sounded.

For a while, the audience was silent, and all eyes were on the pretty girl with glasses. This girl was Beluan, the daughter of the Bloody Empire’s Mechanic Association President Turia, and her mother was also a member of the meeting, the mechanic master, Mavinna.

“You just said, just 1?” Falaqini didn’t put on the grand master pride, but asked seriously instead.

Feeling everyone’s gaze, Beluan blushed, but she still nodded.

“Please come to the stage.” The alchemy world prioritizes those who progressed first, so Chen Rui used the word ‘please’ to Beluan without hesitation.

Beluan looked at Chen Rui, and she mustered her courage. She stepped onto the stage under the gaze encouraged by her parents and Finoia not far away.

“My idea is to make a light source, and then use many reflection points throughout the Demon Realm. In this way, the cost will be greatly reduced, and the durability will be…”

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up, and he secretly marveled, showing an expression of approval.

“Mirror?” Falaqini in the audience had already reacted, showing an ecstatic expression, “It’s wonderful!”

Everyone also understood that Beluan’s idea was really ingenious. They only needed to create a light and heat source, and then suspend objects made of reflective materials in the air to realize the effect of lighting on a large scale. The change of night could even produce hot light and cold light to adapt to more crops.

“Also, the magic array circuit of Sir Falaqini just now… In the third and fifth pictures, I think the circuit part can be improved in this way, then the buff performance may be better. If there is something wrong, please forgive me Sir Falaqini.” Beluan mustered up her courage to draw 2 small sketches beside Falaqini’s magic array circuit diagram.

Falaqini’s eyes were fixed on the 2 sketches, and suddenly he yelled, which startled Beluan.

“Genius!” Falaqini clenched his fists excitedly, “You’re the most outstanding genius I have ever seen in the magic array territory! Are you interested in being my apprentice? I will teach you everything! By the way, who is your original teacher? Even if it is a duel, I will…”

Falaqini’s excitement and enthusiasm made Beluan stunned for a while. The Elf Grand Master Finoia’s lazy voice sounded from the audience, “Wait a minute, Falaqini, are you sure you want to duel with me?”

“Sir Finoia, it turns out…” Falaqini was dumbfounded. Finoia was an elf grand master, and he once taught him alchemy back then, so he was 1 of the most important instructors on his way to success. I didn’t expect tat this genius demon girl is actually an elf grand master’s apprentice!

Finoia smiled and said, “Although Beluan is my student, I’m not very competent as a teacher, and her attainments in magic array… I don’t have much to teach her. If you insist on dueling, I will admit defeat. and just take it as another colleague who is snatching jobs.”

Falaqini understood what Finoia meant, and he couldn’t help but be overjoyed. Under Finoia’s signal, Beluan performed the teacher’s etiquette to Falaqini, and all the alchemists present applauded.

Beluan’s idea solved the most difficult core problem of the artificial moon. Then came the main heat source and the material of the mirror image. There was a heated discussion at the venue again. For a while, various schools of thought contended, and all kinds of whimsical ideas appeared.

Looking at this scene, Chen Rui showed a knowing smile. The wisdom of the masses exceeds that of the wisest individual. No doubt brainstorming is the best way to solve the problem. If it is me alone, even if with superior intelligence, it is impossible to have this effect.

Suddenly, he sensed a certain kind of attention. He turned his head and saw that it was Beluan, the most dazzling contributor to this meeting.

She still looked like the girl next door. Her glasses eyes revealed tranquility. Seeing Chen Rui aware of her gaze, Beluan blushed again, but she didn’t turn away from her vision, still looking at him boldly.

Chen Rui clearly sensed the tenderness of emotion in that gaze, just like back then, and he couldn’t help being surprised. He suddenly understood that she must have known the truth back then!

Back then, Chen Rui went to the Bloody Empire in order to find the Mountain Seckred and Fertile Yuan Soil, and he became Turia’s mechanic apprentice. Later, he deliberately betrayed his teacher for the secret of the 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall. At the same time, under the name of Fonsaq’s apprentice, he exposed the true face of the top mechanic master Nate at the time. In the end, he succeeded in feigning death to escape, and his distance between Beluan became farther and farther.

Now, Beluan actually found out that the dead ‘Richard’ was me, so those who revealed the truth could only be a few insiders…

Not far away, Master Fonsaq, who saw this scene, turned his head guiltily, pretending not to see Chen Rui.

Beluan didn’t come over to scold Chen Rui or call him another ‘name’. Instead, she just showed a gentle smile from afar.

Then, she slowly turned away.

She still remembered the words he said before he left. We… are not from the same world.

She now knew that he was afraid of involving her and her parents. He was also the ‘Aguile’ who later went to the Mechanic Association to save her father.

However, he never knew that as a member of the Bloody Empire, she also participated in the battle of the Star Fortress at that time. She was a mechanic, responsible for the maintenance of the fortress magic crystal cannon and ordnance, and Fonsaq was also present.

Just when she was pierced by a bone spur in her chest and was about to give up, Fonsaq told the truth back then in order to motivate her. The obsession in her mind made her finally struggle from the death line and come back to life.

The great grand master of mechanics, the prince consort of the 3 empresses, the most powerful figure of the Demon Realm, the human prince…

No doubt is a man of 2 worlds.

However, all I need to do is smile at him from a distance, and the world is in my mind.
