chapters.title: Chapter 1263: Shadow Of Death
chapters.body:
Chapter 1263: Shadow Of Death

In this magical world, it was not difficult to make the artificial moon that floated in the air. The most difficult thing was the material problem. How could they really create the most suitable light source for the creatures of the Demon Realm, and what kind of reflector could perfectly reflect the light and hear?

After many experiments, everyone finally overcame this difficulty and determined the final selection of materials.

After Elf Grand Master Finoia put forward the idea that ‘the entire moon group should be a complete magic circle’, Chen Rui incorporated some magical functions of ancient runes, which made the quality of the moon leap again and the number was greatly reduced. In the end, in less than 2 months, the first generation of artificial moon was basically successfully developed.

Everyone cheered when hundreds of ‘moons’ rose into the sky at the same time, illuminating the Demon Realm again.

For the life of the Demon Realm, this was not only a miracle, but a God’s work.

This was attributed to the calculation of Crystal Phoenix, the intellectual core of the City of Stars, and the efforts of all experimenters participating in the research and discussion. This was the result of collective wisdom.

Although the haze in the sky remained, the hopes in people’s minds had been lit up by the ‘moon’ lifted into the sky, and the original panic and confusion finally subsided. After going through so many things, the chaotic situation had become more and more stable.

The forces of all races in the human world had joined the Demon Realm confederation. In this way, in addition to the original the 3 empires, humans, dragons, elves, hobbits, and orcs had all become members of the alliance.

The base camp of the dark dragons was far away on Dragon Island, and the original members of the Dragon Valley also chose the archipelago of the Dead Sea as their base. Although the 2 Dragon Emperors were usually rivals, they still held the same views on matters concerning the survival of the dragons. That was, dragons join the alliance and help each other.

The residence of the elf tribe is in the Blue Lake Mountain Range of the Dark Moon Estate, which was originally the location of the City of Stars. It was specially approved by Shea to the elf tribe as a separate small estate, subject to the protection of the Fallen Angel Empire.

Chen Rui fulfilled the promise back then. Using the method of ‘transplanting faith creatures’, he ‘planted’ the Tree of Nature in the elf’s residence, and returned the holy tree that the elves had always cared about. The elves also finally understood why the Legendary Prophet Alucier insisted on handing over the Tree of Nature to this human for protection that day and did not take any action even though it was not returned past the deadline. Instead, he shouldered all the disputes in the tribe.

If it wasn’t for this decision, when Quillian destroyed the Silver Moon Celestial Capital, the Tree of Nature would have been destroyed together, which would be tantamount to completely destroying the elf tribe.

Accustomed to the harsh environment of the Nightmare Wilderness, the orcs, who were naturally brave and aggressive, were obviously very adaptable to the life of the Demon Realm. Their hard-working qualities made them popular hired workers and mercenaries. The leader of the orcs was Fugger who owned the Golden Beamon bloodline. He successfully broke through to the kingdomized level in the battle with the Abyss, but for some reasons, including Fugger, the orcs had a special respect for the elf tribe, especially the current. Particularly Elf Prophet Kilanya was simply regarded as the most awe-inspiring shaman.

The hobbit tribe integrated into the Demon Realm faster. The reason was very simple: The beautiful wine of the Demon Realm. Following the aromatic millet wine, the popularity of white wine set off an upsurge in the Demon Realm again. Especially the ground race, the demand for this kind of wine had far exceeded expectations. White wine and aromatic millet wine actually had their own advantages and disadvantages, but in the eyes of the hobbits who liked strong wine, this was the real good wine. Even the aromatic millet wine they used to like was not worth mentioning.

Compared with these ‘rare races’, humans were the race that merged with the demons most. After the wedding of Elf Sivling and the Fallen Angel Empire royal family’s Rometty, many humans began to intermarry with demons. Some for survival, some for finding support or other reasons. There was no shortage of ‘migrant’ humans all over the Demon Realm’s various estates, but due to the largest number, it was also the most conflict that occurred. Humans established a temporary alliance, mainly with the original 2 Holy Empires as the core. The Dragon Bright Empire’s existing military force was the strongest. Lex the Great and Chen Rui had the most special relationship of father and son, so they were the highest representatives, while Landbis was the deputy. After the human alliance joined the confederation, their relationship with the Demon Realm became closer. Of course, this was against the background of having a common enemy. In another era, even if the humans and demons had no feud, it would be impossible to unite in this way.

In terms of someone’s harem, Helen’s return to the house did not cause too much shock in the harem. The long hair that turned silver was a sign of losing the Siren’s Heart. If she hadn’t sacrificed the Siren’s Heart, Chen Rui’s soul would have been annihilated during the battle of Despair Main Altar.

She had a good relationship with all the girls before, but it was all based on the ‘vicious mouth attack’ on Chen Rui. Now she had changed from being a bystander to an insider, and it was she herself who was even more uncomfortable. If she hadn’t known about the catastrophe of life and death from magic television and wanted to be by his side in the ‘last moment’, she might have stayed in the Soul Song Sea Area forever.

Alice, who had been begging to have fun in bed, naturally was not willing to fall behind others. Hence, she launched a fierce counterattack strategy against Chen Rui according to the reverse plot of the heroine in the recently popular doomsday novels.

No one knew the exact plot. Anyway, every time Alice walked out triumphantly with hohohohoho all the way. She looked like a villain who had successfully seized a good woman.

However, according to people familiar with the matter, Royal Highness Little Princess was actually just satisfying her vanity by faking. She did not succeed in the true sense.

As the first girl Chen Rui met in the Demon Realm and also the girl who ‘took’ his first kiss, after going through such a thing until now, the 2 of them had no emotional obstacles. It was just because of the loli’s appearance. Under the restriction of a certain moral concept, he still really couldn’t do that to her.

Although the situation was becoming more and more stable, and his personal life seemed to be full and happy, the pressure on Chen Rui’s mind had not decreased but increased. In the following days, he did not slack at all, but he devoted himself to training.

The disappearance of 2 moons has sounded the alarm. If I think that the disappearance of the door between 2 worlds will allow me to train and live with peace of mind for more than 100 years, then I am completely wrong. The dark clouds that are still covering the sky of the Demon Realm are the best warning.

He had a vague premonition that the disappearance of 2 moons might just be the beginning.

On this day, the half-elf subordinate, Taylos, brought a message that Elf Prophet Kilanya invited Chen Rui to the elf residence to discuss important matters.

Chen Rui set up a star point in the Blue Lake Mountain Range, and he arrived at the destination in an instant. Seeing Chen Rui suddenly appeared, the guards of the elves bowed respectfully, because this human was not only the strongest powerhouse in the whole world, he was also recognized as the holy tree guardian of the elf tribe, 1 of the few Hero Kings in the elf tribe.

Upon hearing the news of Chen Rui’s arrival, the current Elf Empress Philly and Elf Prophet Kilanya came out together. Michelle was the fastest. She threw herself into Chen Rui’s arms, “Brother!”

Chen Rui fondled the sister elf’s hair, then he hugged the unicorn White Wind who rushed over affectionately. He said to Michelle, “Why haven’t you been to the Dark Moon for a while? Alice and the others miss you very much.”

“I have a lot to learn, and I don’t have time until Saturday and Sunday…” The little elf princess was much more sensible now. She then raised the phone with a smile, “However, we still talk every day.”

“Keep it up.” Chen Rui and Michelle hooked their fingers together, and the little elf princess sensibly led White Wind away.

“Your Highness.” Philly and Kilanya stepped forward to bow. This title covered both the prince consort and the Elf King, which was quite appropriate.

Chen Rui nodded, “We are all old friends, you don’t have to be so polite. Why does Madam Kilanya ask to see me?”

“Let’s go to the Holy Tree and talk.”

Chen Rui, Kilanya, and Philly walked toward the location of the Tree of Nature. Along the way, Chen Rui saw many elves… Not only the original elf of the Silver Moon Celestial Capital, but also the half-elf, and even the Demon Realm’s dark elf.

Although dark elves could breed offspring without relying on the Tree of Nature, the Tree of Nature could quickly enhance and condense the power of dark elves. Perhaps it was the ‘last’ 100 plus years, in order for the elf tribe to survive and prosper in the Demon Realm better, the originally proud elves finally accepted these ‘heterogeneous’.

“I never thought that there would be a day like this. The half-elf, dark elf would bathe with us in the light of the holy tree.” Philly looked at the ‘moon’ in the sky, “It’s like God’s work.”

“What I saw was a ‘miracle’, not a ‘God’s work’, because miracles are created by people.” Chen Rui also looked at those artificial moons, “Not only that, but I also saw a strong faith of hope and desire to survive. Maybe we will create an even more incredible tomorrow.”

Princess Philly nodded, but Kilanya, who was also looking up at the sky, sighed, “What I see is not only light and hope but the haze behind it.”

“What did you see?” Although Kilanya’s strength was only at the early stage of the Pseudo-God, and her real combat power was not at the level of the real Pseudo-God, Chen Rui did not underestimate her at all, because the weight of the ‘elf prophet’ could not be measured by combat power.

“Your Highness, see for yourself.” Kilanya walked in front of the Tree of Nature, and a faint mist appeared on the green leaf staff, echoing the power of the Tree of Nature, “My foresight power is still quite limited. I must rely on the power of the holy tree. Your Highness, please relax and touch the power of my consciousness with your soul.”

Chen Rui nodded. He slowly approached the mist of the green leaf staff with his soul power. All of a sudden, he felt a boom in his head. A scene had already appeared.

There were still endless dark clouds in the sky, covering the Demon Realm.

The dark clouds slowly began to change, and they had become exactly the same as the scene below. From a distance, it looked like a mirror image.

The mirror image pressed down gradually, quickly engulfing the artificial moon in the sky. The Demon Realm plunged into darkness again. The mirror image was still pressing. The tallest TV tower had come into contact with the identical ‘tower’ ‘reflected’ in the sky, and the 2 towers collapsed and annihilated at the same time.

Soon, as the mirror image collided, everything else was the same. Buildings, terrain, and life were all destroyed. The whole world was reduced to ashes.

Chen Rui looked at this scene in horror as the image soon began to distort and blur before it then disappeared. His vision returned to the Tree of Nature.

Kilanya’s body shook. Her facial expression became extremely pale, and she spat out a mouthful of blood.

“Teacher, what happened to you?” Empress Philly supported Kilanya in surprise.

Kilanya smiled wryly, “Any foresight has a price to pay. Now I understand why my father opposed me inheriting the prophet in the early years.”

“So what I saw just now… is the real future?” Chen Rui was still in shock. No wonder he always had a premonition of uneasiness in his mind.

“If it is not changed.” Kilanya sighed.

When he didn’t see the foresight vision, Chen Rui didn’t feel anything, but now when he looked at the dark clouds in the sky, he felt that the shape was no doubt a bit weird. It seems that a kind of mirror image rudiment had been formed!

This must be a secret technique similar to the power of the mirror world! And the power of this secret technique… will cover and destroy the entire Demon Realm!

Chen Rui was suddenly very grateful to Alucier for giving him the experience in the mirror world, which made him understand more clearly the terrifyingness of this secret technique. At the same time, he knew that a huge crisis was coming to the Demon Realm at the moment.

It turns out that it wasn’t the clouds that engulfed 2 moons, but the shadow that directly brings destruction and death!

This is the real purpose of Quilliana!

Just when everyone thought they could breathe a sigh of relief, they were already at the brink of despair!

chapters.title: Chapter 1264: The Final Decision
chapters.body:
Chapter 1264: The Final Decision

The Dark Moon Residence.

“Have you decided?” Catherine asked Chen Rui. After learning of his decision over the phone, the Dark Shadow Empire Her Majesty Empress, who was usually busy with government affairs, rushed to the Dark Moon immediately without thinking.

Not only Catherine, but also Shea, Tiffany, all friends, and relatives came.

“I have decided.” Chen Rui nodded. Catherine looked at the girls and said nothing, but he just hugged Duoduo tightly.

“How confident are you?” This time it was Python who asked the question.

“Maybe… 10%.” Chen Rui replied honestly.

“That means less than 10%?” Isabella sighed, “You want to go to the human world to defeat Quilliana with less than 10% chance?”

“It’s not that I want to take such a risk, it’s because Quilliana doesn’t give me or this world a chance at all.” Chen Rui looked up at the gloomy clouds all over the sky. The clouds had undergone tremendous changes. They looked more and more similar to everything on the ground. Looking from the distance, it looked like a blurred reflection.

In the scene predicted by Kilanya, the “reflection” would become more and more clear. Once it was fully formed, it would overlap with the real world. Just like creation and destruction were in contact, everything would be completely annihilated.

It was not that Chen Rui and Kilanya didn’t attempt to prevent such fate, including everyone who tried before when the clouds first appeared, but they couldn’t dispel the clouds or change the formation of the ‘mirror image’. Therefore, Chen Rui decided to leave the Demon Realm and go to the human world occupied by the Abyss to eliminate the behind-the-scenes controller, Quilliana.

As he answered Isabella, facing the strongest the Abyss rulers, and being in the ‘main field’ of the Abyss, 10% chance was actually an overestimation.

Even so, Chen Rui must go, because if he didn’t do anything, he could only sit and wait for the end of the world. Even if he could barely escape this catastrophe with the power of the Super System, what’s the purpose? The people he loved, the people he wanted to protect, including this world that survived after sacrificing countless lives, and all creatures, would be annihilated in this catastrophe.

It would be meaningless to live alone.

“Daddy, where are you going?” Duoduo, who was in mommy’s arms, stretched out her hand to Chen Rui again.

Chen Rui took her daughter and hugged her tightly, “Daddy is going to a faraway place, but I will be back soon.”

“Isn’t the space between the 2 realms sealed? Even Quilliana can’t get through, how do you get there?” Shea asked a technical question.

“I’ve tried it. The [Star Gate] can teleport me there.” Chen Rui looked at ‘Your Majesty’ Princess Royal who was showing a rare nervous expression, and he smiled slightly, “This is the only advantage. If I can’t defeat the Abyss, I can still run away.”

“You won’t run away.” Shea didn’t speak, but Tiffany did. She knew this man very well. In the Holy Light Mountain back then, in order to save her, he did not hesitate to directly face Raphael who was totally unmatched to him at that time.

“Tiffany is right.” It was Athena who spoke. She had been through life and death with Chen Rui several times, so she knew him better than Tiffany. Now that everyone in the Demon Realm was facing life and death, he would never run away.

Looking at Doudou in her arms, Athena’s eyes showed maternal tenderness, “Son, this is your daddy.”

Doudou understood the word ‘daddy’. He immediately pointed to Chen Rui with his small hand. Although this naughty child often cried in Chen Rui’s hug, when he heard the word “daddy”, he would always immediately look at the one connected to his bloodline. At the same time, he was also the unique “bad guy” in his life.

Chen Rui looked at Doudou, then he caressed Duoduo’s face in his arms and glanced at everyone present. The faith in his heart became stronger and stronger.

“Brother, I’m going too…” Alice clenched her fists.

Kia secretly tugged on Alice’s clothes and shook her head. Alice also knew that going would be a burden, so her eyes turned red.

Adeline and Helen held each other hands without speaking, but they both felt each other’s tension, Paglio, Roman and others also fell silent. Python smiled lightly, “Anyway, let me see your strongest power now. I need to judge something.”

Chen Rui knew that Python would not say this without purpose. He nodded, handed Duoduo to Catherine, and stood in the middle of the yard.

Unlike before where he activated [Pole Star Transformation] and then merged with [All Star Gods View] bit by bit. Now, only his golden pupils reflected the infinite galaxy. His body gradually became transparent with countless bright lights flowing in his body. He looked like a ‘star man’.

The ‘star man’ was filled with a serene presence that was as calm as the starry sky, but in the eyes of everyone, this inner momentum was more dangerous than that kind of explosive power.

“It turns out that your strength has reached this level.” Python exclaimed, but she shook her head again, “Perhaps, you are able to confront Quilliana head-on, but you have not reached the level of defeating her, let alone ‘transcending’.”

“I really didn’t think about being able to so-called ‘transcend’ right now. I just want to…” Chen Rui didn’t go on, but Python understood it very well, and everyone present understood it, except for Duoduo who half understood and Doudou who really didn’t understand.

Although he couldn’t ‘transcend’, he just wanted to keep everyone alive.

“To be honest, your strength… should be much inferior to Quilliana’s. It’s impossible for you to defeat her quickly. Moreover, in your state, the life force burns too fast, even if you want to find opportunities in a protracted battle, it can’t be done… because you will be the first to fall, not to mention that you will still be suppressed by the Abyss Will in the Abyss Kingdom.”

“I know……”

Before Chen Rui finished speaking, he was interrupted by Python, “Alright, don’t move yet!”

With that said, Python gave an eye signal to Zola, who had been silent all this time. The fairy dragon understood. The light of Rainbow Constellation instantly appeared on her body. The power of the constellation merged into her body, actually burning on the surface of her body, then she turned into a rainbow and flew toward Chen Rui.

Chen Rui clearly felt the power contained in the rainbow light, which resonated the burning life force in his body. The rainbow light submerged into his body and actually merged with him. He felt the power of his soul and body soar at the same time. It was like when he faced Quilliana for the first time, a part of the transparent body became more and more bright.

“This is…” Chen Rui was surprised to feel the changes in his body. Since that time, he and his family and friends had been trying to comprehend this kind of “fusion” power, but unfortunately, they all failed. When Python returned, she solved the biggest problem.

“Burn.” Python said lightly. A touch of golden light appeared on her fingertip, like a seed wrapped in golden flames. Chen Rui could vaguely feel that this was the special breath of Saint Fighting Heart.

“When you are burning, she is also burning. Just like you, she must have the awareness to give up everything and integrate her life into the constellation kingdom power to burn. This is the basis of fusion.”

Chen Rui was startled. He already clearly sensed the rapid fading of Zola’s life force. This fade was integrated with his main body. That meant, when he burnt out, even if Zola still had more life force, she would extinct together. He quickly canceled his power. With a flash of light, Zola figure reappeared. Her face was slightly pale.

It turns out that Chen Rui finally understands the reason why Zola has been staying with Python these days, and it turns out that he has been studying the power of this integration.

“The experiment just now is considered a success. The efforts of these days have not been in vain. Then, all those, who have been conferred the 2-star enhancement, only need to accept this ‘seed’ containing the power of the Saint Fighting Heart, then they will be able to trigger the ‘burning’ power, which will merge into your power. Your strength will also be multiplied.” Python looked at everyone with bright eyes, and she smiled lightly, “It seems that I don’t need to explain anymore.”

“This will put you all in danger. The loss of life force alone is…”

Before Chen Rui could finish speaking, Roman had already snorted, “Sir Uncle is being arrogant again. You were always the hero, now it’s finally my turn to shine!”

“For the first time, I fully agree with the bastard’s narcissism, leader.” Delia smiled.

“I also agree,” Paglio grinned and glanced at someone who was being proud, “Since this is the case, I will not expose the fact that a certain widow lover flirted the elf widow at the Blackberry Tavern the day before yesterday.”

“You have already said it. If I were you, I would just say that someone molested a human young woman at the west city gate yesterday.” Ms. Emerald Dragon added. Roman’s face suddenly became bitter, because Delia and Medilu had already surrounded him from left to right.

“Your Highness, please give me a chance to fulfill the oath I made back then.” Samuel stepped forward with a firm gaze. The oath back then was to follow to the death.

“Master… master, follow master, truly handsome!” The slime was brave for a while, but the next sentence revealed his true nature, “Master just has to give me 10 coupons for the Princess Retail Store, 15 sparkling gems, uh , no, 20 plus 30…”

The greedy slime created more and more hands. Due to his negative math IQ, he could only count from 0 with his fingers. His brain was getting fuzzy, and his head was full of sweat.

“According to this increased rate… No, the calculation is wrong. Let me do the math. Now there are 500 coupons and 730 shining gems.” Ms Black Dragon with super financial management skills got the result in an instant. She came to the front of Chen Rui and said with a smile, “Boss, I’m very honest. You only need to pay me half of the price and 1000 years of settlement expenses, then I will do it with you.”

Before Chen Rui could answer, Lalaria also jumped out, “We owe you a few lives! Take this as 1 life! Duoduo is getting more and more pretty. If I can survive, you will be my…”

The first two sentences seemed to be fair, but for the third sentence… even the Old Dragon Emperor Father-in-law Auglas couldn’t stand it anymore. He covered the mouth of his daughter who had lost all integrity.

Alice and Adeline looked at each other, pulled Helen together, and made a fighting gesture.

The rest of the people, especially Catherine, Shea, Kia and others, just looked at Chen Rui quietly. Many things could be understood without saying.

Athena spoke to Meria and the others, “Aunt Meria, Uncle Span, Sir Auglas, and you guys, please take care of Duoduo and Doudou.”

Auglas did not accept [Star-level Enhancement] and star conferring. Both Meria and Span accepted 2-star enhancement, but they had not yet comprehended this power. The same was true for the rest such as Joanna, Ina, half-elf, etc.

Chen Rui felt sour in his eyes. His vision blurred involuntarily. He felt that he could only nod his head.

Duoduo, who was in Catherine’s arms, asked, “Daddy, when are you, mommy, and aunties coming back?”

“Daddy doesn’t know either,” Chen Rui wiped his red eyes, walked in front of Duoduo, kissed his daughter, then he went to hug Doudou who was staring at him with big eyes.

“However, daddy promised you and Doudou that we will definitely come back!”

TL: Finally the final battle? Will this life burning power be enough?

chapters.title: Chapter 1265: The Shocking Change In Human World
chapters.body:
Chapter 1265: The Shocking Change In Human World

The [Star Gate] was open, and the star point destination was Storm Island.

Chen Rui didn’t think too much. What should be thought and said had been done.

Moreover, he was not alone. Athena, Zola, Catherine and others had all accepted Python’s Saint Fighting Heart power. They directly merged with the Star Conferring Platform in a burning state.

It was worth mentioning that Corpse Necromancer Guradam had also joined the ranks of fusion. Guradam did not have a strong sense of belonging like others. Although he had considerable awe of the boss who provided him with all the research conditions, it had not reached the level of life and death. However, after learning the truth about the dark clouds in the Demon Realm, the corpse necromancer knew very well that if he joined in to strengthen Chen Rui’s power, there would still be a glimmer of hope; if he gave up, once the dark clouds’ power reached its ultimate state, then even an undead creature like him would be completely annihilated together with the world without exception.

To survive and continue on the road of research, this was Guradam’s obsession at the moment. Therefore, he made this choice.

Everyone’s power was temporarily sealed. As long as Chen Rui launched the battle state and released the power of the stars of the Star Conferring Platform, he could truly integrate the ‘burning’ life of all 2-star enhancers and constellation power to unleash the strongest combat power ever.

For the first time, everyone was with him, fighting side by side in a real sense. Perhaps it would be the last time.

As soon as Chen Rui came out of the [Star Gate], he felt something was wrong. The land under his feet was not the original land, but the sea. Looking at the dark top of his head, the original huge island had risen from the ground and was suspended in the air!

What’s wrong was not only the Storm Island, but also the surrounding environment. He felt his body was light and the gravity was greatly weakened. The sky was the same as the Demon Realm, covered with endless dark clouds without the slightest sunlight.

The surrounding light was dim, filled with a cold breath. This ‘coldness’ was not a drop in temperature on the surface, but a strange chill that penetrated deep into the soul.

Chen Rui suddenly felt that this environment was a bit familiar, but he couldn’t remember where he had seen it. He was certain that it was not because Quilliana noticed the star point that she deliberately turned the Storm Island into this state, but some kind of unimaginable changes had taken place in the entire world.

Chen Rui didn’t stay in the Storm Sea Area. Instead, his body flickered and disappeared in place.

His current strength, even without the [Pole Star Transformation], was far beyond the ordinary peak stage of the Pseudo-God. With a shifting without full strength, he left the Storm Sea Area and appeared in the original boundary of Yang Shao Empire.

When seeing the scene in front of him, Chen Rui frowned tightly.

The former Yang Shao Empire had turned into ruins, which was expected, but in the ruins, there were countless huge potholes with blood-red lava faintly appearing. There were several large islands in the sky just like the Storm Island he saw before.

The difference was that these islands were made of mud mixed with bones, which looked eerie and weird. Each of the bone islands represented the process of countless lives being cruelly destroyed.

This was not the first time Chen Rui had seen this kind of bone island. In Despair Main Altar, he destroyed one with his own hands, but this was the first time he had seen this kind of bone island. The bone islands floating in front of him were more eerie than what he saw at Despair Main Altar. There were still clouds of smoke looming in the tower group.

Chen Rui could tell that these smokes were not ordinary mist, but something like a soul entity, giving him a chilling feeling. The most incredible thing was that the [Analytical Eyes] actually didn’t have any data of these soul entities as if they didn’t exist in this world!

After the soul entities found Chen Rui, they rushed toward him one after another. Chen Rui did not avoid it, allowing the souls to attack, but the soul did not seem to exist in the world as they just passed through Chen Rui.

At the moment of passing through, Chen Rui felt a familiar chill in his soul. He finally remembered – This is the wandering spirit!

The wandering spirits of the Ghastly Floating Land!

This discovery made the familiar feeling in Chen Rui’s mind clearer, and he finally realized that the entire human world had been transformed into an existence similar to the Ghastly Floating Land!

“The wandering spirits are a bit strange…” Chen Rui frowned even tighter. He felt that the wandering spirits were like phantoms, not real existence, so the [Analytical Eyes] did not display any data. Nonetheless, that chill was real. It was just much less powerful than the wandering spirits of the Ghastly Floating Land.

“Right, this is not a simple transformation, but an overlap! The space overlaps!” Chen Rui blurted out. He was no longer a rookie who just came into contact with this magical world. He suddenly understood the situation. At the same time, he was inexplicably horrified: Quiliana actually wants to merge the main plane and the Ghastly Floating Land… no, it is very likely that the entire Mysterious Land will be integrated into one!

What on earth is she going to do?

While Chen Rui was thinking, the blood-colored lavas flowing in the huge pits below had quickly become hot as the cold breath in the air was replaced by fiery heat. Groups of squirming bodies in the lavas quickly took shape and surged toward Chen Rui.

Chen Rui didn’t look at the Abyss lords and the blazing flame witches rushing toward him, nor did he look at the bone spurs all over the sky. The moment the nearest bone spur approached him, it suddenly froze in the air. Not only the bone spurs, but all the monsters were frozen. Subsequently, when a gust of wind blew, the frozen figures were instantly scattered into powder.

However, the Abyss monsters was endless. The huge potholes in the blood-colored lavas began to boil again, and more monsters emerged. Chen Rui raised his brows, punched down, and a bigger hole appeared near the potholes directly below. The huge fist print carried a trace of special cold air. The blood color in the potholes quickly dimmed, frozen, collapsed, and disappeared.

This kind of defeat was actually a temporary solution without solving the root cause. If he was entangled in this corner of the Yang Shao Empire, it would be a waste of energy. Chen Rui did not clear all the huge potholes. He flickered and left this area.

Only by getting rid of the root power is the only way to completely eliminate these monsters.

If I guess correctly, the Nightmare Plain will be the last root and the final battlefield.

Chen Rui didn’t stop. He shifted with all his strength in the direction of the Nightmare Wilderness.

Along the way, he crossed many regions; from the eastern continent to the White Sea Area, then to the western continent.

As expected, the entire continent had been transformed into a scene similar to the Ghastly Floating Land without any breath of life other than the Abyss power.

However, it seemed that the transformation was not yet complete. There were still many traces of the previous war. The ruined cities, the deformed landforms in front of the fortress, and the White Sea that had turned into a land. These devastated scenes were all proof of the struggle with the Abyss. It was also a picture scroll with the theme of life and survival.

In the future, distant or near, this war might be depicted as a tragic and magnificent historical poem that would be passed down through the ages.

Perhaps, all the lives remaining in the Demon Realm would lose their future, and the original wisdom and civilization would come to an end.

The current location was the Blue Glory Empire, and it wouldn’t take long to cross the Ice Sea to reach the final destination. After several high-speed visual changes, the scene in front of him changed from the floating bone islands to the entire blood red.

The Ice Sea should be called the blood sea now because the sea was not cold ice water, but boiling lava. The air was filled with suffocating scorching heat, and there was crystal red flowers floating on the sea surface.

The clouds in the sky were no longer the gloomy dark clouds before, but blood red, presenting a radiating shape as if caused by some great power in the distance.

The space here was filled with the powerful Abyss power. His power was obviously suppressed. Here, the Abyss creatures could exert their strongest power while the power of outsiders would be greatly reduced.

Chen Rui didn’t use shifting anymore, but he changed to flying.

The blood sea sensed the intruder and began to boil violently. Flowers of Abyss burst into blood mist one after another. Dozens of huge tentacles stretched out. The tentacles were full of erupting lava and terrifying mouthparts. The momentum under the buff was even more amazing. It should be some kind of sea creature similar to Octopus King that accepted the mutation power of the Abyss.

At the same time, large crowds of Abyss monsters appeared in the sky, swarming like clouds, almost covering the blood-colored sky.

Chen Rui punched out. This punch seemed ordinary and had no special power. However, the blood sea in front of him rolled back one after another, revealing a trench that could not be closed. Those huge tentacles were instantly torn into pieces.

While punching, he still maintained his unhurried flying speed, then he punched the distant sky again. A gap appeared in the monster cloud in the sky, extending far away. Countless cracks were formed along the way. The monsters within the range of the cracks were turned into ashes.

Chen Rui punched while flying. He was not wasting his strength, but he used this punch to adjust his state, further adapting to the oppressive power of Abyss, in order to prepare for the real battle.

The monsters that were surging at him retreated, and the raging blood sea stopped boiling. The environment that was roaring fiercely just now suddenly became silent.

The central part of the still blood sea began to solidify into red crystals, turning into a crystal clear bridge that extended forward.

Chen Rui looked at the crystal bridge. It should be the way to the final battlefield.

At this moment, his mind was tense, dignified, determined, and calm.

From the moment he was reborn in this world to now, although the time was not very long, he had experienced several lifetimes more than ordinary people, and he had owned many unique things.

Not power, power, glory, but people.

Lovers who would never change until death, friends whom he could entrust his back, children whose blood was thicker than water.

He had all these most precious things.

Lovers and partners were burning their lives and fought side by side with him today. With the care and attention from relatives and friends behind him, all he could do was fight with all his strength. Even if he was annihilated, he would have no regrets in this life.

Taking a deep breath, he landed on the bridge.

No doubt, there was no trap on the crystal bridge, but following his footsteps, the crystal bridge behind him began to collapse, indicating that this was a path of no return.

Chen Rui smiled and continued on without fear.

TL: Does he have the power to face Quiliana?

chapters.title: Chapter 1266: The Strongest Battle
chapters.body:
Chapter 1266: The Strongest Battle

Chen Rui stepped on the crystal bridge and walked through the Ice Sea step by step.

The crystal bridge didn’t stop extending at the shore. It just stretched into the depths of the Nightmare Wilderness.

The Abyss breath in the Nightmare Wilderness was 10 times stronger than the Ice Sea. If it were an ordinary kingdomized person, he would suffocate to death within a few seconds under the suppressive force in this terrifying environment.

There were flowing lavas everywhere. The original mountains and jungles had long been turned into scorched earth where not a single blade of grass grew. There were a lot of Flowers of Abyss floating in the lava. Huge Abyss breeding nests stood upright one by one.

The breeding nests were surrounded by countless blood cocoons that had been bred. From a distance, these blood cocoons were almost endless like the sea. Under the soaking of lava and the breath of Flower of Abyss, the blood cocoons soon hatched into various Abyss monsters. Then, the breeding nests continued to breed batches of new blood cocoons. This was the reason for the infinite Abyss army.

The Abyss monsters didn’t attack Chen Rui, as if this enemy didn’t exist at all. This was due to the control of the Abyss will, and it was also the real source of the entire Abyss power.

Unless the Abyss Will was destroyed, it would be meaningless for Chen Rui to eliminate all the breeding nests now.

The crystal bridge had finally come to an end, Nightmare Volcano.

This position was also the end point of the radiating blood clouds in the sky. There was a diamond-shaped opening in the void, which emitted a crimson light like a closed eye. Blood-colored light beams were projected from the nearby space to the ground below.

The hills in front of the volcano had all been turned into a huge open space, where countless red crystals were spawned. There was a huge building in the center.

There were 3 large sculptures standing in the center of the building. The sculptures were not ordinary human figures. They looked a little abstract and had special powers. Just looking at them, there was a chilling feeling. At the same time, various negative emotions involuntarily rose in his mind.

Below the tallest sculpture in the center was an exaggerated and ferocious throne. On the throne is a woman reclining casually with long blue hair and beautiful features. She was wearing a simple white robe with bare feet and fair snow-like thighs resting on the armrest of the throne without any cover. In this environment, she showed a kind of bewitching beauty.

The woman slowly opened her eyes. The pupils of both eyes were blood-red, but her right eye was slightly hollow. The moment she opened her eyes, the crystal bridge under Chen Rui’s feet disappeared, and his body fell straight down.

Chen Rui didn’t resist, and he fell to the ground. Immediately, he sensed an unprecedented suppressive force, because here was the real core of the Abyss power.

“Quilliana!” Chen Rui looked directly at the last and strongest enemy from a distance.

“I really didn’t expect that after the door between the 2 worlds closed, you can still come to this place. What an amazing ability.” Quilliana’s voice sounded fresh and moving at first, but to Chen Rui’s ears, it was like ice. Even the surrounding space was about to freeze.

“The Abyss Will?” Chen Rui looked at the 3 sculptures, feeling the throbbing of the incomparably powerful will and soul as he asked.

“Yes.” Quilliana slowly sat upright, “You did a great job. Not only did you close the door and prevent the invasion of the Abyss army, but you even eliminated Sosbach and Dillosro. However, that’s all you can do. The Abyss Will can never be destroyed, and new Rulers can be infinitely created if necessary.”

“So, you are just a puppet that can be replaced at any time? In fact, the so-called ‘forever’ is just a bubble. There is no eternity in the universe in a complete sense, including the universe itself. Just like the Supreme Existence and the Gods, where are they now? The former immortality has turned into decay. Even if they survive in the incomplete form, they have long lost their former glory.”

Chen Rui faced the formidable coercion of the Abyss Will without dodging. His eyes revealed an insight that saw through the truth. Although the 2 hadn’t really done anything yet, they were already battling with words.

Quilliana shook her head, “You still don’t understand… As you can see, destruction is about to come, but destruction is not the ultimate goal. After destruction, a new creation begins. A new world is about to be created. Birth and death are endless, this is also the truth of the universe. If you are willing to accept the greatest will, you can become the new ruler, and even go one step further to become the Supreme ruler of the new world. And I, the woman who once loved you, will also kneel down to you.”

“You’re are not her, and you will never be her.” Chen Rui frowned, “Before I make the final decision, I want to know a truth that I have been curious about. Since the Gods have completely fallen, then, why does the Abyss Will, which is the Godhood of Darkness still exists?”

Quilliana looked at the ‘eye’ closed in the sky and smiled implicatively, “Who told you that the Gods have completely fallen?”

Chen Rui was startled. Could it be that those huge ‘corpses’ are not dead? I remembered clearly that in Lucifer’s consciousness, I clearly saw the Gods fell under the power of the ‘eye’ summoned by the supreme key. Could it be…

At the moment of distraction, Quilliana’s figure on the throne suddenly disappeared. At the same time, Chen Rui had a strong warning sign. An extremely terrifying power was coming.

Quilliana had already seen through Chen Rui’s mind. She persuaded him to surrender, but she had already launched an assault without hesitation.

“ Bang! “

Chen Rui’s body was blown away by the powerful shock. He was wrapped in flames when flying back. His body actually showed faint signs of collapsing. What kind of flame power is this?!

In the first 2 fights against Quilliana, Quilliana did not actually activate the strongest state. Only when Python triggered the origin explosion of the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction with life, Quilliana really showed her true power. Not only did she retreat without danger, but she also brought back the 2 Rulers and the 2 books of origin.

Now, in the Abyss Kingdom, Quilliana’s power was naturally at its peak while Chen Rui was suppressed. Just a punch from in the half-elf state could put him in real danger.

As expected of the strongest Abyss ruler. She is also at the level of SSSS+++, but her strength far exceeds that of Sosbach or Dillosro.

Quilliana caught up with Chen Rui in mid-air, and she launched another punch, intending to give him another fatal blow. Suddenly, she raised her brows. The body wrapped in flames suddenly became transparent, faintly revealing a radiant starlight. The flames outside seemed to have switched to another state and ’burned’ out of control.

In the muffled sound, her fist was actually caught. Not only that, but the grip on the fist was so strong that even Quilliana couldn’t stand it.

She let out a grunt. Her blue hair and robe turned crimson at the same time. Her snow-white skin also began to turn red, revealing patches of cobweb-like textures with glowing golden colors looming in the gaps of the textures. The first Abyss transformation was activated.

After this transformation, her strength increased dramatically. Quilliana’s arm shook, breaking away from the opponent’s grasp. Her sharp nails slashed toward Chen Rui’s throat. However, ‘Chen Rui’ didn’t react in the slightest as if the claw had hit a phantom. It turned out that Chen Rui had dodged at a high speed. Almost at the same time, there was a sharp pain in her abdomen. She had already been hit by a punch.

The punch was so powerful that a bulge suddenly appeared on the bloody robe behind Quilliana. The part of the robe condensed with the Abyss power was torn apart under the surging force.

Quilliana held her stomach. When the next threatening punch was approaching, she had already escaped from the battle in an instant and appeared in the distance. Her blood-red eyes fixed on the enemy shining with starlight.

Excluding the avatar, the first time she really fought this person was at the Silver Moon Celestial Capital. At that time, his strength could only be described as ‘weak’. Even joining hands with Michael and the others, he was easily defeated by her. If it weren’t for Alucier’s plot that caused a hidden injury in her left eye, which forced her to leave, she would have killed him already.

The second battle was in the White Sea. Compared with the first time, this person’s strength had increased significantly, surpassing Dillosro, but the Great Bright Sword Formation with the power of the Book of Destruction was still defeated by her.

But now, he was alone. Yet, he actually made her who had activated her first transformation suffer such damage!

The potential and growth speed of this Chen Rui is absolutely terrifying!

Quilliana finally showed a dignified expression as she tore off the bloody robe on her body, revealing her naked body, but she didn’t care about it. Her right eye burned, and the flame spread all over her body in an instant. In the flames, her body mutated again. Sharp bone spurs began to protrude from the shoulders and elbows. A tail appeared on the back. A pair of wings appeared on the back. The head also grew out 3 horns which looked like a crown. The flames gradually subsided, turning into a dark golden armor, covering the vital spots.

Although the Quilliana at this moment exuded a destruction breath that was dozens of times better than before, her temperament and appearance were strangely glamorous. She faintly revealed an indescribable charm as if a witch from hell, using an out-of-the-world beauty to control the magic box that would destroy everything.

Chen Rui’s pupils shrank slightly. The second Abyss transformation of Quilliana that I had seen before was not like this! And there was no such powerful breath!

“Surprised?” Quilliana’s voice actually sounded from behind. After saying the word, Chen Rui sensed a warning sign in his mind, and he couldn’t help being shocked.

This feeling is very close to the power of Godhood fragments inspired by Zola in the elemental world. It is no longer an ordinary might, but an existence close to authority power!

When Chen Rui was about to dodge, his body trembled suddenly. 5 blade-like nails had already come out from his chest. Quilliana leaned close to his ear and whispered, “The first 2 times, I had to divide my attention to suppress Alucier’s scheme, so I didn’t activate the strongest form. Now, you are looking at the real me.”

The state of whispering seemed to be the intimacy between lovers, but her hand had pierced through his chest, which looked spooky and cruel.

But soon, a hint of startle flashed in Quilliana’s blood-red pupils. She suddenly turned around and defended a cluster of dazzling light with sharp claw. Her body was pushed back by the huge force of the light. Her feet dragged 2 long marks on the sturdy crystal ground.

Looking at the intact Chen Rui behind her, Quilliana narrowed her eyes. She squeezed the ball of light into nothingness with her claw, then she looked at the extra bright constellation flowing in the transparent body. She was slightly surprised, ” Death might? No… not simply might, but also close to authority power. Unfortunately, it is barely close. The power to evade death will definitely not be able to be used again in a short time.”

Chen Rui didn’t make a sound. What he activated just now was Guradam’s Death Constellation. At the very moment, he avoided death with a special rule power. But Quilliana was right, that power could no longer be used a second time.

“It seems that this battle is much more interesting than I imagined. I’ll let you, who possesses such extraordinary power, become the best sacrifice!” Quilliana’s claw pointed to the sky, and the 3 statues on the huge building emitted several light beams, which condensed into 1 thick light beam, penetrating into the rhombus in the air.

2 balls of light appeared in the rhombus, 1 black and 1 white, slowly rotating. They looked like the ‘pupil’ in the eye.

Chen Rui clearly sensed the familiar breath of the light, and he blurted out, “The Book of Creation! The Book of Destruction!” RS

TL: Last 9 chapters remaining, who has the stronger authority power? Will Book of Life and Death make its debut in the next chapter?

chapters.title: Chapter 1267: The Battle Closest To Authority Power
chapters.body:
Chapter 1267: The Battle Closest To Authority Power

When the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction appeared in the ‘eye’ above the sky, the ‘eye’ that was closed seemed to be open.

Chen Rui clearly sensed a special breath filling the space between heaven and the earth, which seemed to extend to the whole world, causing a certain change in the whole world. An ominous omen surged in his mind.

However, he had no time to concentrate on feeling it carefully, because facing a terrifying opponent like Quilliana, any distraction was fatal enough.

From the moment Quilliana’s claws penetrated Chen Rui’s chest, he had already activated the strongest ‘burning’. In this state, his power not only got the maximum buff of all the ‘Gods’ of the Super System, but he could also invoke the special power of any one of the constellations.

However, this highest-intensity ‘burning’ was at the cost of several times the life force. It was not only his own life, but also the lives of all his partners. Once their life force was burnt up, he and everyone whose constellation had been integrated would be annihilated.

过去，但也在陈睿的心头敲响了警钟，下一次，他可能就没这么侥幸了。Although he avoided That death claw that was enough to penetrate the heart with the special power of Guradam ‘Death Constellation’, it also sounded the alarm in Chen Rui’s mind. Next time, he might not be so lucky.

Quilliana in full state—especially in this environment blessed by the Abyss W ill, her combat power far exceeded expectations. A little carelessness would result in annihilation.

In fact, Chen Rui and the whole world needed to be thankful. As Quilliana herself said, if it wasn’t for some kind of plot planned by Legendary Prophet Alucier in advance, facing Quilliana’s terrifying combat power in a complete state from the very beginning, the main plane would not be able to persist till today. Now some unforeseen changes had taken place in the eye above the sky, so he could only do his best to defeat Quilliana as soon as possible.

The figures flickered and crossed at high speed. The sounds of impact were heard everywhere, and the landform and space showed traces of distortion and collapse.

Numerous rifts appeared on the ground of the red crystal as if torn apart by huge sharp claw. However, the center of the rifts was not Chen Rui, but Quilliana.

The sharp wind pressure had stopped, but Quilliana’s impeccable figure began to flicker rapidly as if the current ‘calm sea’ was the most dangerous time.

After a while, the vague shadow that flickered at high speed finally returned to Quilliana’s figure, but there were several obvious wounds from the neck to the face. The wounds were not simply bleeding, but they showed shocking green spots and pus blisters.

Quilliana’s blood-red pupils flashed, and the wounds quickly recovered as if nothing had happened. The red crystal ground that was destroyed by the fierce battle also quickly recovered.

“Although the power of this ‘plague’ is tyrannical, it is a pity that to me it is just like a sneeze, which is useless.”

Chen Rui frowned. It wasn’t the first time he hit Quilliana. He also imbued Paglio’s ‘Plague Constellation’ just now, but unfortunately, he still couldn’t affect her. Not only that, there was a sharp pain under his ribs as several horrific wounds had already been ruptured in the star armor. The wounds were bleeding continuously, and the destruction force that contained the entire Abyss Kingdom’s faith in the wound continued to spread.

Quilliana’s claw power was strange and unpredictable. Although [Water Profound Mystery] reflected most of it, it still missed a few hidden blows.

From the outside, Chen Rui was still the transparent star figure, but Quilliana had sensed the spread of the power of the Abyss. She sniffed the blood in the air, and she showed a grim smile, “If the previous ‘Doom’ power is still there, I can’t hit you like this. Unfortunately, although these powers are wonderful, you can’t reuse them in a short time. Next blow, I will take off your head as a sacrifice for the new era !”

Chen Rui took a deep breath, and the Star Power in his body started to channel quickly again. A constellation in his transparent body lit up, and black flames ignited all over his body immediately.

The flame was full of vitality, and a pair of light wings vaguely appeared behind it as if a phoenix was flying high. His wounds immediately fully recovered. The Abyss Kingdom’s strange power that attempted to invade his body also quickly dispelled under the special burning force.

Quilliana’s blood-red pupils flashed fiercely. Before Chen Rui could fully recover, her figure turned into several bloody shadows, whistling over. The phoenix wings on Chen Rui’s back folded together, turning into a crystal ball and protecting him.

Quilliana’s bloody shadow dashed left and right. The crystal ball sphere kept cracking, but it never broke.

Chen Rui in the crystal ball didn’t relax in the slightest, but he became more dignified. Because where the bloody shadow dashed past, a special power breath seeped in from the crack. His body suddenly suffered from weakness, slowness, aging, paralysis, and other debuffing.

These debuff states were actually caused by the power of the Abyss Will such as fear, despair, and hatred. The debuffs were not purely applied to his physical body, but they went deep into the soul. Even the Nirvana power of the Phoenix Constellation could not completely eliminate them immediately.

The cracks on the crystal ball of the Phoenix Constellation were getting bigger and bigger…

“ Boom! “

It completely shattered.

The bloody shadow rushed toward Chen Rui from all directions, merging into a blood mist that instantly surrounded him and covered the starlight.

A few seconds later, a ray of light lit up in the blood mist. This ray did not seem to be particularly shining, but it revealed an invigorating power like the dawn breaking through the darkness.

The blood mist dissipated under the light. After a muffled sound came, the dissipated blood mist re-condensed into Quilliana’s figure, looking badly mutilated. She looked cautiously at the gradually dissipating light in Chen Rui’s raised hand.

This was Tiffany’s constellation power— Dawn!

In this dark kingdom full of hatred, fear, and despair… even a glimmer of light represented the existence of hope.

Although this power of Dawn could not dispel the power of the Abyss power in the entire kingdom, it was more than enough to dispel the debuffs in Chen Rui’s soul.

“Amazing ability.” Quilliana’s mutilated body recovered again. Her deep eyes seemed to see through Chen Rui, “The kind of authority power you showed… let’s call it ‘pseudo-authority power’, there are actually so many! Even at the level of God, generally speaking, one can only possess 1 or 2 authority powers at most. If we are both God, then I… am not your opponent.”

“Unfortunately, I’m not.” Chen Rui quickly adjusted the strength in his body. After fighting with such intensity for so long, his life force and strength were consumed extremely fast, so he couldn’t last long. He must defeat Quilliana as soon as possible!

“If you don’t become a God, you will end up as an ant.” Quilliana shook her head, “If it was another place, maybe you still have a chance to defeat me, but unfortunately, in this world that has been completely covered by the Abyss Will, I’m truly immortal, just like God! You have no hope at all… By the way, I almost forgot, you still have the supreme key, but I won’t give you a chance to activate it.”

Chen Rui frowned. He let out a grunt as he exuded a sharp qi all over his body. He tapped his feet and accelerated. Wherever he dashed, the red crystal ground turned into dust one after another.

This ‘sword mark’ slashed straight at Quilliana. The power was several times stronger than before as if it was not oppressed and weakened by the Abyss Will. It was Athena’s War Constellation.

Quilliana felt the force of that compelling fighting spirit. In her vision, Chen Rui was like an invincible sword. She couldn’t help but reveal a serious expression.

She didn’t take the sword strike head-on. Instead, she moved several times in a row to pull the distance. When the sharp claw grabbed the empty air, the blood-red crystals on the ground below were quickly sucked into the claws, turning into a huge ‘whip’ about 200 meters long and 10 meters in diameter. The most handy whip had been destroyed in the battle of the White Sea. The power of this whip, especially the attack range, was even more appalling.

The huge blood-red whip was like a huge snake-like beast. It rushed toward Chen Rui with a whistle. Even in this extremely solid space, faint cracks appeared under this power.

Chen Rui went straight without dodging. The profound meaning contained in Athena’s constellation power was the dauntless fighting spirit. The moment the 2 came into contact, the giant snake that seemed to have swallowed Chen Rui jerked and stopped. Then, countless cracks quickly spread up as the sword light broke out and shattered the giant snake.

However, Quilliana at the other end of the ‘whip’ disappeared, replaced by a huge bloody cloud in the sky. Countless ‘raindrops’ like sharp blades rained down, and the solid crystal ground developed dense potholes. The sword light shot toward the sky without stopping. The bloody cloud was originally an intangible thing, but it gradually turned into nothingness under the sharp sword light.

Quilliana’s real body finally appeared behind the sword light. Although the sword light was unmatched, it was very easy to break. Especially at this time, when it had been declining again and again, and its sharpness had blunted. It was the best time to make a move, and Quiliana had absolute confidence to destroy it.

Just when the sharp claws successfully tore apart the figure in the sword light, Quilliana was suddenly taken aback. She felt her heart tense inexplicably, and her body was actually unable to move.

Quilliana couldn’t believe it, because the restraint power didn’t come from the outside world but from her own mind! The other party not only misled her judgment but also unbelievably induced her mind… That weird feeling as if she had deceived herself!

Yes, ‘Deceive’!

Isabella’s constellation power!

The ‘burning’ constellation power that Chen Rui had integrated now did not only directly increase his power, but it also had many unimaginable magical effects, especially when he fully burned his life force to fight. He had great unprecedented feelings and perceptions of these magical effects and even the entire ‘Star Gods’ power — This is the real supreme controller, not only controlling the life, faith, and power of the ‘universe’ in the Super System, but also controlling ‘Gods’!

After ‘deceiving’ Quilliana, Chen Rui didn’t kill her directly, because even if he killed Quilliana in this kingdom full of the Abyss Will, she could revive infinitely.

Therefore, Chen Rui’s goal was not Quilliana, but — the 3 statues that symbolized the Abyss Will!

He was unable to determine what power the ‘eye’ would trigger and what terrifying changes would occur, but his instinct gave him an ominous feeling.

Only by completely destroying the Abyss Will could all this be stopped, then Quilliana and the shadow covering the entire main plane could be truly defeated.

The moment he flew toward the statues, his body, soul, and the constellations in his body burned at the same time. This blow had already exploded at all its power with the determination and momentum to go forward and even perish together. He was like a meteor, burning the most dazzling light of life force and rushing toward those huge statues.

In the sky, the light of creation and destruction in the ‘eye’ gradually merged into one like a real pupil. Shining with indifferent light, it looked condescendingly at everything below and the incoming dazzling light stream.

TL: 8 more chapters to go! What would be the end of burning all his life force?

chapters.title: Chapter 1268: The Subverted Truth
chapters.body:
Chapter 1268: The Subverted Truth

Quilliana finally broke free from the restraint of ‘Deceive’, but it was too late to stop Chen Rui who rushed toward the 3 statues. Strangely, she didn’t look panicked at all, but she revealed an intriguing smile.

Chen Rui, who was burning his strongest power, charged toward the statues that were still projecting light beams. However, the moment he rushed into the 3 statues, he was surprised to find that his speed slowed down as if he had fallen into a swampy sea.

Everything, including the burning soul and life, had ‘slowed down’. This was not a simple change in time, but an irresistible power that combined various rules such as time, space, destruction, and creation.

After the vision distorted for a while, the scene in front of him changed. The statues and buildings disappeared; it was an endless space.

A huge rhombus could be faintly seen above him. The edges were boundless blood-colored stars, extending and dispersing infinitely. In the center of the rhombus were 2 huge clusters of flames, emitting the breath of destruction and creation. They were the source of all the shining. The stars condensed into 3 constellation-like images, faintly resembling human faces. There was quite a distance between each of the 3 faces.

These 3 ‘human faces’ seemed to be far away, but they also seemed to be close at hand, exuding a strange breath. Chen Rui’s mind was shaken. The feeling of ‘falling’ in his mind became more and more intense. Meanwhile, the path d ahead seemed endless with no destination. His soul, body, and power were constantly disintegrating and dissipating. His consciousness began to gradually blur too.

Chen Rui woke up suddenly. His hands were shining brightly, and countless whirlwind-like purple stardust fluttered around him. Bursts of violent storms radiated in all directions. This was the [Pole Star Storm] that combined the power of Lalaria’s ‘Sky’, a powerful aoe attack.

But the overwhelming stardust storm still ‘sank’ in. It seemed to be just a gust of wind blowing in this vast space, which dissipated without a trace in a moment.

This scene shook Chen Rui’s mind. With a loud shout, 3 scorching dragons imbued with rainbow light were launched toward the 3 huge human face constellations. However, the rainbow scorching dragons still seemed sluggish. The rainbow scorching dragons flew further and further away, but they were still unable to hit the target. They gradually dissipated along the way.

In the constellation directly in front, Quilliana appeared. She smiled, and the huge ‘faces’ of the 3 constellations also showed a corresponding ‘smile’.

“Finally can’t help it?” Quilliana licked a trace of blood on her long nails, and she smiled even more wickedly, “I thought you would wait a while before attacking the throne. For you, being completely reduced to flying ash in this universe transformed by the Abyss Will is quite an ideal destination.”

“This is a universe? It’s just a small galaxy at most.” Chen Rui sneered, sensing a bad omen. In this space that was originally a vast starry sky, the constellations could not exert their power. His soul and power were dying at an accelerated rate. If he did not try to change anything, even if Quilliana did not act, he would eventually burn up and be completely annihilated sooner or later.

Quilliana didn’t give him too much time to adapt. The bloody light of the 3 constellations flourished, and the speed of power loss suddenly accelerated 10 times. Chen Rui looked up at the Book of Destruction and the Book of Creation, which were like the sun and the moon. He secretly clenched his fists and charged the last bit of power. Bright flames burned all over his body. The rule power in the nearby space seemed to have been rearranged from uncontrollable weirdness to ‘orderly’. The pressure immediately lightened, and his spirit was greatly lifted.

This was the power of Delia’s ‘Order’. Unfortunately, this power of order was limited after all. It could not spread in this powerful galaxy to change the rules of the entire power, nor could it last for too long. Chen Rui’s purpose was not to use the rule power to change the entire space but to protect himself and complete the final and biggest blow. The target was the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction above him!

Destruction and creation were originally 2 completely opposite origin forces. Currently, the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction were the core forces of the entire world’s changes because the power of the Abyss Will maintained an ingenious balance. What he wanted to do was to use his own creation origin and destruction origin as a traction to break that ‘balance’. This would induce the collision of the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction as Python did last time to produce extremely powerful destructive power, completely the destroying Abyss Will.

Quilliana snorted when she discovered Chen Rui’s intention. The oppressive power of the nearby space doubled, but she still couldn’t break through the protection of ‘Order’. She frowned and pointed her finger again. Countless blood-red meteors whistled toward Chen Rui and caught up with Chen Rui at a faster speed.

As Chen Rui was about to be hit by the blood-red meteor shower, his figure flickered. A wave of purple starlight spread out, turning into a huge phantasm and ‘attacking’ the meteor shower frantically… more precisely, ‘bitting’ it. This meteor shower was swallowed up in the blink of an eye. Under Quilliana’s strange gaze, the phantasm rushed straight into the huge ‘rhombus’.

At this moment, both the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction disappeared. He only felt that the power of origin of creation and destruction was filled everywhere. The 2 origin powers in his body not only did not break the balance, but they were sucked out of his body and got assimilated. At the same time, Chen Rui felt an ancient and mammoth breath blowing toward his face. Various thoughts such as eternity, eternal life, immortality, etc emerged in his mind involuntarily.

This feeling… is somewhat familiar.

Chen Rui’s mind moved. I remember where I sensed this breath— The end of Mysterious Land, which is also the Chaos Realm that Python and others call the ‘forbidden land’!

There is actually the breath of the Chaos Realm here? The next second, Chen Rui’s pupils contracted suddenly, because a huge ‘corpse’ appeared in front of him!

The ‘corpse’ exuded an indescribable breath, but after taking a closer look, it was a dim and huge solar system. Chen Rui was shocked. It is really…

There were more ‘corpses’ in the distance.

Chen Rui clearly sensed that the ‘corpses’ seemed to be absorbing the power of creation and destruction origin in the surroundings, then he suddenly remembered the changes he saw in the human world. All of a sudden, it dawned on him. Previously, it was the overlapped space of the Ghastly Floating Land, then now it is the Chaos Realm!

The first battle of the Gods, the Supreme curse, the Godhood of Darkness.

The second battle of the Gods, Twilight of the Gods, the Gods fell.

So, the ultimate purpose of the Abyss Will…

Chen Rui was shocked. The gloomy and dead solar system began to shine with dots of light. A terrifying coercion spread out. This momentum was thousands of times stronger than Quilliana’s power. Chen Rui just felt that his soul had been oppressed like never before. All his strength was restrained, almost completely collapsed.

At this moment, his vision distorted again, and he returned to the blood-colored star space. The sky above was still the huge rhombus, whereas the ‘pupils’ Book of Creation and Destruction that disappeared just now were within.

Chen Rui knew very well that it was definitely not an illusion just now. His current body still retained that terrifying force of coercion. His soul and body were in an extremely weak state, and he couldn’t channel his power for a while. Even with many ‘pseudo-authority power’ skills, facing this absolute strength, he still couldn’t resist. This was the ‘quality’ gap.

Quilliana’s figure appeared in the blood-red constellation in front. Her body began to merge into the constellation behind her a little bit while the other 2 constellations were also undergoing some changes. The stars on the edge gradually merged together, forming a huge circle.

“Your judgment and choice are very accurate, your strategy is equally successful, and your courage is sufficient, but you lack a most important factor, which is strength. There is indeed the core of the entire world. If you can defeat it, you can completely defeat me and the entire Abyss Will to save your world. But there is a prerequisite, and that is having the strength surpassing it!”

“You… want to resurrect ‘them’?” Chen Rui recalled what happened just now, and he seemed to understand now, “No, this is not resurrection. You cursed Godhoods of Darkness are trying to use the power of Book of Destruction and Book of Creation to possess the bodies of the Gods and gain new life!”

“Possess? You have gotten 1 most important point wrong,” Quilliana laughed as if hearing the funniest thing. Her laughter was full of undisguised sarcasm, “‘They’ are just going back to their bodies!”

“You mean…” Chen Rui understood what Quilliana meant, and he showed an expression of disbelief.

Quilliana sneered, “Pitiful guy, let me tell you the biggest truth. The so-called ‘Godhood of Darkness’ and the so-called ‘Abyss Will’ that you are talking about are actually ‘they’ themselves!”

Chen Rui was shocked. Michael risked his life to tell about the battle of the Gods, and his life and soul were thus annihilated under the taboo. Now Quilliana actually told the completely opposite truth!

He didn’t make a sound, but he was waiting for Quilliana to further unravel this horrific truth. At the same time, he was waiting for more time to break free from this terrifying coercion force.

“After Lucifer activated the supreme key to cause the Twilight of the Gods, ‘they’ should have fallen. It stands to reason that the Godhood of Darkness should also be annihilated. However, relying on some kind of supreme power of the supreme curse, ‘their’ will had been revived again, but… in a different way of existence.”

“The Abyss!” Chen Rui finally came to his senses. It turned out that after the fall of the Gods, they survived in the form of the Abyss Will by relying on the curse power of the Supreme God!

In other words, the will of the Abyss is the will of the Gods!

The real culprit who wants to destroy all life is actually the Gods who are worshiped and revered by the life in this world!

This was an astonishing truth that completely subverted his cognition.

TL: Who is telling the truth? Why Quilliana isn’t subjected to the taboo for telling it?
