chapters.title: Chapter 1269: Induce
chapters.body:
Chapter 1269: Induce

Demon Realm.

Kilanya stood with a long staff of green leaves and looked at the sky.

Not only her, almost everyone in the Demon Realm raised their heads.

The dark clouds that had been suppressed for several months above the head had undergone obvious changes, becoming exactly the same as the ground. Unlike the vagueness before, it had become extremely clear. Even the moving characters were the same, just like another self in the mirror.

Most people didn’t understand what this change meant, but the increasing pressure made everyone feel ominous. Some people had made various attempts to change or destroy these reflections, but their efforts were futile.

In the space of Nightmare Volcano, Quilliana stared at Chen Rui with great interest as she said, “Strange, I can’t see the slightest subverted or collapsed faith in your eyes, only shock. This kind of truly ‘Godless’ will, I’ve only seen it through the eyes of one person, the avatar of the Supreme Key, the blasphemer who caused the Twilight of the Gods.”

Lucifer is the avatar of the Supreme Key? Quilliana’s words contained too much information. Chen Rui couldn’t help asking, “What about you? If the Abyss Will is the will of the gods, what are you?”

“I’m the executor of all ‘will’, that is, the highest oracle. I have used the life sacrifice power of many planes, and after countless attempts, I finally penetrated a trace of ‘will’ into the authority power enchantment of the main plane. This trace of ‘will’ produced the faith of the Abyss in the main plane, and it continuously absorbed the power of various darkness and negativity, making the ‘will’ even greater and stronger. Originally, the Abyss Will only needs another 100 years to be able to completely control the authority power enchantment and directly devour all lives of the main plane! However, that abominable destiny servant actually opened the door of the main plane in advance and triggered the change of the authority power enchantment, wiping out the ‘Will’ in the authority power enchantment. Hence, I had no choice but to fuse with this descended body. The ‘Will’ and my power were also greatly weakened. Otherwise, how would you get so many opportunities?”

As soon as Quilliana talked about a certain prophet who had plotted against her after his death, she showed a hateful looked. Then, she changed her tone and said, “However, I can’t understand Alucier’s approach. Does he think that the destruction more than 100 years later is irreversible and opening the enchantment now can change the ending? In the end, it was just a waste of effort. It ruined the last 100 years that this world could survive!”

Chen Rui finally understood. It turned out that the ‘culprit’ who opened the enchantment ahead of time and caused the Abyss to invade was actually the Legendary Prophet Alucier!

And the real purpose of him opening the enchantment is to destroy the hidden conspiracy of the Abyss to use the authority power enchantment to directly devour all life on the main plane more than 100 years later!

The faith of the Abyss includes the mysterious cult, the Black Death Follower, the main altars, and so on. It turns out that it was not accidental that they appeared on the main plane, but the result of the authority power enchantment being infiltrated by the Abyss Will. Meanwhile, Blanche’s ‘body’ was obviously a backup plan. Even if the Abyss did not descend, in the next 100 years, Blanche would awake, further spreading the faith and power of the Abyss.

Because of Alucier’s actions, although the Abyss Will and Quilliana descended earlier, their power was greatly weakened, otherwise it would be impossible for us to fight until this day.

Same as in the mirror world. Alucier was gambling, and the bet was bigger – not only his own life, but also the life of the whole world. The person who could affect the final result was probably me, the target who had been ‘plotted’.

Before Chen Rui could think about it, he sensed a danger. Threads of blood-colored starlight surrounded him and intertwined into a huge spider web. The source of starlight was the 3 constellations where Quiliana was located.

“Blood Spider Mandala. The highest level formation for offering sacrifices to Gods.” Quilliana appeared less than 2 meters away from Chen Rui. Her whole body seemed to be integrated into the blood-colored starlight, and her figure became illusory, but the sneer that contained sarcasm could be seen.

Blood-colored starlights closed up toward him swiftly. During this process, Chen Rui had thought about dodging and defending, but that kind of ‘spider silk’ had an incomparably strange rule power. Countless thoughts of resistance in his mind were extinguished by themselves. In no time, his body had been shone through by the intertwining starlights.

Chen Rui’s first feeling was not pain, but a strange fusion as if his own soul had merged with this huge blood-colored spider web. But in the next second, something was amiss. He felt like he had been dismembered into countless pieces, which were scattered in all directions along these ‘spider threads’, and his life began to weaken rapidly.

“The only disadvantage of this formation is that it takes a long time to prepare, that was why I talked nonsense with you for so long. I know you are also delaying time, trying to get rid of the coercion of the Chaos Realm. Unfortunately, that is not an ordinary force but the real God’s deterrence. You are impossible to dispel it by yourself.” Quilliana’s blood-red pupils flashed a frightening light, “Actually, in the depths of my consciousness, I don’t seem to resist talking nonsense with you. It’s hard to believe that ‘she’ who has been assimilated by me still has such a feeling. As a complete settlement of the past, I will deprive you of everything with my own hands.”

With that said, Quilliana turned into a brilliant bloody light and flew toward Chen Rui.

Chen Rui blocked, but he passed through the bloody light. At the moment of ‘passing through’, a part of his soul seemed to be torn off, separating from his body – In the transparent body merged with the power of Star Gods, the light of a constellation suddenly dimmed.

Chen Rui clearly sensed that the constellation power of the ‘Plague’ was detached from his body uncontrollably. The brilliance of Paglio’s Galaxy Divinity Statue in the Star Conferring Platform quickly became dull, and that Galaxy Divinity Statue began to show signs of collapse.

“Python’s ‘deprivation’ is more of a cancel, and what I have activated now is the real ‘deprivation’, or you may call, ‘seizure’!” Quilliana, who recovered from the bloody light, smiled grimly, ” I admit that your strength is beyond imagination. I can’t even kill you directly, but in this large formation, even the kind of pseudo-authority powers that avoids death can’t exert their magical effects. All your pseudo-authority power will be absorbed by the new Gods. At that time, they can be promoted to real authority power, making them even stronger.”

The Blood Spider Mandala is actually able to take away other people’s abilities! Chen Rui felt the signs of the life of the Paglio Galaxy Divinity Statue being in danger. He gritted his teeth and forcibly suppressed the power of God’s deterrence raging in his body. At the same time, a tide-like brilliance surged out from his body.

This was the [Winter Territory] activated by ‘Sea Constellation’. Where the light passes, countless icy crystals appeared on the ‘spider silks’ and froze them. However, there was a faint red light in the ‘spider silks’, and the frozen power instantly evaporated.

The starlight on Chen Rui changed several forms, but he still couldn’t break free from the spider web. Instead, the God deterrence that he forcibly suppressed erupted more violently. His body made an explosion sound. He suffered heavy injuries and almost completely lost the ability to resist.

“It’s useless. All the attacks you activated on me before have been seen through by the ‘Will’. They will not play any role in this Blood Spider Mandala. They will only be seized one by one.” Quilliana’s voice approached instantly, passing through his body again. Shea’s Galaxy Divinity Statue in the Star Conferring Platform dimmed as quickly as Paglio just now.

Chen Rui’s mind was full of anger and pain, but the oppression of God’s deterrence in his body was too strong, especially since the previous recoil destroyed all his remaining strength. Coupled with the strange power of Blood Spider Mandala, even if he wanted to perish together with Quilliana, he couldn’t do it.

“I said it. You are a sacrifice.”

“The best sacrifice dedicated to the great ‘will’.”

“Hate! Fear! Despair!”

“…”

Quilliana’s voice reverberated around. The starlight on Chen Rui’s body was rapidly weakened by the continuous piercing of blood light. All Gods’ constellation power was seized one after another. His body had changed from transparent to translucent, revealing the bloody body caused by severe injuries. The light was still getting dimmer.

In contrast, the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction were shining more and more dazzling in the sky as if they had obtained the faith, life and constellation power extracted from Chen Rui. The eye began to change. It gradually turned into the Chaos Realm. The seemingly blurred ‘corpses’ were slowly entering this space, becoming clearer and clearer. At the same time, the revived starlight in the solar system was also clear.

2 spaces started to overlap.

At this time, the ‘mirror image’ in the sky of the Demon Realm also moved downward little by little.

The people on the ground instinctively sensed the approaching danger. They all stopped and looked at the falling ‘reflection’ in surprise.

The artificial moon in the sky was devoured by the ‘mirror image’. The whole world fell into darkness and chaos.

“Mommy, what should we do?” A human little girl looked at the approaching dark clouds above her head and hugged her mother tightly in horror.

“I don’t know, maybe the only thing we can do is pray to the Light God…”

More and more prayers sounded. Faced with irresistible despair, people could only turn to the Gods they believed in, even though they had been silent for many years.

Despite that, they turned a deaf ear to the prayers.

“Have you heard these prayers? The last elegy of this world,” Quilliana looked at Chen Rui, whose starlight was dim, then he laughed, “It will end soon.”

“Last question.” Chen Rui seemed to have given up all resistance, “Why destruction?”

“Destruction is to reproduce the supreme power and glory of the past, and to create a new order. Destruction and creation are originally the unchanging principles of this universe cycle.”

“To put it bluntly, destroying all lives is just to restore your own power. These are the so-called Gods.” Chen Rui explained the cruel nature behind the high-sounding reason while shaking his head, “How many lives and civilizations are annihilated for this?”

“The meaning of life is elimination, natural selection, and survival of the fittest. Lowly ants can survive in the world because of the kindness of the superiors. The law of the jungle is their unchangeable fate.” Quilliana sneered, “Weakness is the most unforgivable original sin! You don’t even have this kind of awareness. Even if you are given hundreds of millions of years, it will be difficult for you to transcend yourself and reach that state.”

“Is this the so-called ‘transcend’?” Chen Rui looked at the huge ‘corpses’ in the distance and closed his eyes, “Hundreds of millions of years… No, you are wrong. If it is this kind of ‘transcend’, I will never be able to reach that level.”

“Completely annihilate together with this world! You don’t have any more luck.” Quilliana’s body blurred again, wanting to launch the biggest blow.

All of a sudden, her movements and her gaze froze. The pair of blood-red pupils stared closely at Chen Rui’s hand.

There was a card: The magic card of the King of Darkness.

The pattern behind it was the supreme key.

The supreme key was the key to open the seventh silver box and also the strongest Book of Life and Death. Lucifer said that using it would destroy everything.

The atmosphere froze for a moment.

However, the supreme key suddenly disappeared again. Chen Rui slowly opened his eyes, “You have been inducing me.”

At the last moment of life and death, this strange sentence shocked Quilliana.

TL: She is lying? The [Analytical Eyes] again?

chapters.title: Chapter 1270: Real Purpose
chapters.body:
Chapter 1270: Real Purpose

“You’re afraid of the supreme key. No, it is the ‘Will’ that is afraid of it.” Chen Rui suddenly lost his anger or despair. Instead, he was unprecedentedly calm, “From the very beginning of the battle, when you confirmed that you couldn’t kill me directly, you are inducing me to use this trump card. Do you want me to use it ‘in advance’? Or… Is there a special way to curb it here?”

Quilliana’s blood red pupils constricted whereas Chen Rui’s voice became more and more calm, “If I’m guessing right, those ‘corpses’ have actually ‘awakened’ before I came here, not when the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction ascended to the sky! However, their power has not recovered. As you said before, sacrificing all lives on the main plane and creating the so-called ‘new order’ is the price for recovery. The Book of Creation and The Book of Destruction should also be a very important link, so in the battle of the White Sea, you would rather take them with you despite suffering serious injuries.”

Looking at Quilliana, whose eyes were full of anger, Chen Rui knew that even if he didn’t fully guess it right, he was close, “During the battle where the Demon Realm closed the gate of 2 worlds, the reason why you didn’t show up was not because of your injuries were not healed, but it was related to the restoration of the ‘Will’. Therefore, the human world is transformed into the current space. Of course, in your opinion, we had lost the Book of Destruction and the Book of Creation, so just Sosbach and Dillosro were enough to destroy everything. You released the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction just now, lured me into ‘the Chaos Realm’, then gave me time to catch my breath and even explained the secrets. All these are just to create an illusion for me to bait me into using the supreme key… But, ‘they’ are too afraid of the power of the supreme key that they don’t even dare to kill me directly, for fear of triggering the Book of Life and Death. As a result, they just use God’s deterrence to crush my power, send me back here, and let you finish me off. Even if things go wrong, they will not be the ones who will be annihilated. To put it bluntly, you are just a pathetic puppet. Right, maybe they even want to borrow your hand to snatch my supreme key…”

“It’s too late to realize it now…” Quilliana’s blood-red pupils flickered with traces of flames, “This was a covert scheme, but also an overt scheme. Now your soul has been severely injured by God’s deterrence, and you are deeply trapped in the Blood Spider Mandala, you have almost lost all your power. I don’t know if you really have the ability to use the supreme key. Whether you use it or not, I will give you the final blow now and take everything from you!”

The 3 constellations shone at the same time, and all the power of this space was integrated into Quilliana’s body. Quilliana in full form was burning with the flames of destruction. Terrifying bone spurs spread out one after another. She seemed like a huge spider queen that was preparing to hunt the prey in the spider web.

In the next second, the red light rushed toward Chen Rui again with unprecedented momentum.

Quilliana’s words were not boasting. It was a covert scheme before, but now it was an overt scheme. He had lost most of his power. Even if he saw through the intention of the ‘Will’, he was helpless in the face of absolute strength.

The supreme key may be the last hope. Faced with this fatal blow, should I use it? Or not?

Demon Realm.

After the ‘mirror image’ swallowed the light of the sky, it continued to fall.

The first peak of the Demon Realm, Solorum Mountain at an altitude of 20,000 meters, was the first to touch the reflection after the artificial moon. At the moment of touching the ‘self’ in the mirror, Solorum Mountain and the reflection collapsed at the same time.

Countless people saw this scene on the magic television, and they were all terrified. People were finally sure what the ‘reflection’ would bring – Everyone and the whole world would follow in the footsteps of Solorum Mountain and be annihilated by their own ‘reflection’. There was no way to run.

“Grandpa, when will daddy and mommy come back?” Duoduo bit her finger. She asked Lex, who put up a dignified look, on the side.

As soon as Doudou heard the 2 most familiar names of ‘daddy’ and ‘mommy’, he also probed his out of Freya’s arms, trying to find the 2 closest people, but unfortunately, he didn’t find them.

Watching the shadow of death falling bit by bit, Lex stroked the little girl’s hair and forced a smile, “Soon soon.”

“Yeah.” Auglas sighed, “He’ll bring Olypheus and Lalaria back with him.”

“And Zola.” Meria snuggled into Span’s arms while Pagris and Sophia held each other tightly.

In the Bloody Empire in the distance, Raizen stood quietly at the gate of the palace hall, not looking at the sky, but only at the empty throne.

Farther away on the Mountain Seckred, the white-haired Satan looked up at the sky with a desolate gaze, just like that time.

…

The shining red light pierced Chen Rui’s body like lightning. There was no world-ending momentum; even no resistance.

Quilliana’s figure appeared behind Chen Rui. She looked at Chen Rui whose starlight had completely disappeared, and sneered, “So it’s just a bluff, you just…”

Chen Rui’s calm voice sounded, “From the beginning, I didn’t plan to use it.”

“Then, only death awaits you…” Quilliana looked astounded before she finished speaking, “What did you do?”

“It’s just a gamble to give you my last power,” Chen Rui said lightly, “The difference is that it’s not ‘seized’ by you, but ‘return’.”

“This power… is God’s deterrence!” Quilliana covered her head, and the 3 huge constellations in the distance also began to distort.

“This is not my power, but the Abyss Will, that is, those so-called ‘Gods’.” Chen Rui glanced at the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction in the sky and said indifferently, “With the Will’s protection, you are immortal. Even my ability cannot completely eliminate you. There is only one way to defeat you, and that is the power of the ‘Will’ itself”

“How could you…” Quilliana’s body trembled, and the ‘spider silk’ surrounding Chen Rui began to weaken rapidly.

“One thing you got wrong, I didn’t actually ‘get rid of’ that kind of God’s deterrence before, but I chose the riskiest ‘devour’. Although I only devour a part of it… As you can see, I even almost got annihilated by the explosion due to the recoil, but I won the bet in the end.”

What Chen Rui activated was none other than the [Mirror Body]. However, it was by no means a simple [Mirror Body].

In the previous battle, he had activated [Star Conversion], and he also had that kind of damage reflection, but none of them could pose a real threat to Quilliana. This [Mirror Body] was fused with the power of God’s deterrence plus the power of all the remaining constellations.

Chen Rui’s ancient runes and magic circle attainments had reached the level of a grand master. After experiencing several ‘seizures’, he had faintly seen through the mystery of ‘Blood Spider Mandala’.

This large formation was powerful and ingenious, but its secret was not to directly seize abilities. Instead, it used powerful willpower to ‘suppress’ consciousness and ‘strangle’ the soul. Since the soul of the trapped person was severely injured, he could not activate the relative ability in the subjective consciousness. Coupled with the devoured life and soul power, it had become ‘seizure’.

Under this power limit, if he really activated the supreme key. His consciousness would also be stifled. Not only would he be unable to activate, but the key would also be seized.

Then, the real goal of the God’s deterrence plus Blood Spider Mandala is the supreme key!

Obtaining the supreme key that controls the Book of Life and Death is the biggest purpose of the Abyss.

Although Chen Rui had seen through the Blood Spider Mandala’s mystery, and he would not be tricked into using the supreme key, he was still unable to get rid of its power. The various constellation powers activated in the previous battles were indeed suppressed and could not be used, but he still had other non-combat constellations.

Such as Adeline’s ‘Music’, Samuel’s ‘Loyalty’, Kia’s ‘Love’, Alice’s ‘Life’, and so on.

All these constellation powers were fused into that part of devoured God’s deterrence and reflected to Quilliana with [Mirror Body], which was also his last power.

Quilliana, who had acted nonchalantly even when her body was torn apart, let out a howl of pain and tightly covered her head as if she was suffering from unbearable pain. The ‘human faces’ of the 3 major constellations in the distance also showed distorted expressions. The facial features began to blur. The stars within began to explode and extinguish.

The Blood Spider Mandala around Chen Rui had completely collapsed, and the ‘seized’ constellation power gradually returned to him. Under the pressure of God’s deterrence and formation, those Galaxy Divinity Statues that showed signs of cracks began to slowly restore.

He wasn’t relieved though — Quilliana isn’t down yet. At least she has the power for the final blow. The biggest enemy is also up there.

In Chen Rui’s hand, he secretly held the supreme key.

However, the overlapping space above seemed to give him a strange feeling that it was ‘empty’.

Pure emptiness.

Quilliana’s agonizing scream suddenly stopped, and the hands covering her head slowly loosened. Chen Rui sensed something and didn’t look above anymore.

On that vaguely delicate face, the blood red in the right eye quickly dissipated, and the original faint blue was restored. Unlike the previous few times, the blue was no longer empty, but it was serene like a lake in the forest. On the other hand, the blood-red left eye appeared weak and dull.

Her body was trembling, and the pain she was suffering could be seen from the violent distortion of the 3 constellations behind her, but her trembling was not because of pain.

Now she would not tremble because of ‘loyalty’, ‘love’, ‘life’, and so on; she would only be more sober.

Chen Rui stared into those eyes and finally smiled.

“Welcome back.”

These 2 words stopped the trembling of Quilliana’s body. There was something in Chen Rui’s hand as he handed it over.

Not a weapon, but a pair of glasses.

With his mechanic level, this pair of ordinary glasses was not a brilliant work, but for ‘Quilliana’, it was the most precious thing in the world.

Once, she thought she had lost it, but now it was back in front of her eyes.

Before sinking into the nightmare, she left behind this precious thing and memory.

It was he who found it in a volcanic cave and took it with him, and it had been preserved to this day.

At this moment, she felt as if time had stopped; only the hand slowly reaching for the glasses.

With terrifying monster claw.

This was her own ‘hand’.

Tears welled up in the blue right eye.

TL: Blanche is back?

chapters.title: Chapter 1271: Looking At The Warmth From Afar
chapters.body:
Chapter 1271: Looking At The Warmth From Afar

The sharp claw hesitated for a moment before reaching for the glasses again.

At this moment, the extinguished blood-red in the left eye boiled again. The 3 huge constellations faintly revealed their roaring faces as a strong voice in her mind shouted, “Kill him!”

‘Quilliana’ screamed, and the claw that stretched to the glasses pierced toward Chen Rui’s throat.

Lightning speed.

But in the soul, the flow of time seemed extremely slow. Countless consciousnesses, countless scenes… flashed by.

Kill him!

An irresistible will had been integrated into her life since she was born.

This was fate.

She had fought more than once, but in the end, she was unable to reverse her fate and sank completely into destruction and hatred.

She didn’t have many conversations with him. Since she met him plus the sentence just now, he said a total of 36 sentences. Every word and every warmth in her memory was in her mind.

“This is a pair of magic glasses I made temporarily…”

“You will come back, right?”

“Definitely.”

“I’m waiting for you.”

…

Hate and destruction quickly overwrote these.

Inescapable, endless fate.

This trace of soul had survived until now, and it was not living for the sake of existence.

She just wanted to see him again.

“Kill him! Kill him!” The voice sounded again.

Irresistible fate.

You don’t need to hate, because there is more than hatred in your eyes…

The claw swung out with all its might.

Just to touch the warmth from afar.

…

Chen Rui’s vision froze.

The moment Blanche’s claw approached his throat, there was a sudden pause. Then, the claw stabbed back into her own blood-red left eye.

The left eye seemed to be shattered, and countless flaming blood spurted out. The 3 constellations that showed roaring expressions made a shrill explosion and completely collapsed.

Chen Rui flew over with all his might and desperately caught the falling figure.

That vaguely delicate face was full of boiling blood. She couldn’t even open her eyes, but her expression was extraordinarily calm. It was the first time in her life that she was so calm.

“Blanche! Blanche!”

… Is it over?

His voice was calling her name.

It was a pity that she couldn’t speak. She didn’t even have the strength to look at him again.

Her was getting lighter and lighter.

I would love to see him…

What is that warm feeling?

His tears?

I finally touched the warmth of the dream.

I thought I have lost him, but he has never left me.

And that inescapable fate is getting farther and farther away.

In my eyes…

…

Chen Rui embraced that slowly fading body as tears blurred his vision.

Neither potion, item nor ability was omnipotent. Blanche’s consciousness and soul had long been integrated with the Abyss Will and they were inseparable. From the moment she destroyed her soul, the most basic origin collapsed, just like the annihilation of Michael and Gabriel.

“I will take you home, our home.” Chen Rui kissed the face that almost vanished.

Home… She seemed to feel it and hear it. She smiled slightly before completely vanishing.

There was only a dot of red light left in the air. It was a broken red crystal ball.

There was still dried blood on it. This was the last thing she left for him.

Chen Rui carefully held the crystal ball in his hands. He closed his eyes as if he could still feel the pain at that moment. Not only physically, but also deep down in the soul.

Yet there was something that surpassed all pain.

Love.

When he opened his eyes again, the blood-colored solar system completely dissipated, and the scene returned to Nightmare Volcano.

Unlike previously, the huge eye in the sky, the Book of Creation, and the Book of Destruction all disappeared, leaving only the huge altar. The 3 statues on the altar collapsed like the 3 constellations in the blood-colored solar system, and the Abyss monsters also disappeared one after another.

However, the Abyss monsters were not the most worrying factor now— In the sky, the original bloody cloud had disappeared, replaced by a ‘reflection’ like the Demon Realm. It was rapidly approaching the ground at a faster rate than before.

This was the most terrifying crisis.

The entire main plane was facing the greatest catastrophe.

Although Blanche was annihilated and couldn’t even speak even when she was dying, the trace of consciousness she deliberately left behind in the crystal ball told him the biggest secret.

The Abyss Will indeed began to recover long ago. The reason was that it used the power of the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction to absorb countless destroyed life forces in the human world. However, this recovery was only preliminary. It was still far away from a complete recovery. Not only that, it would continuously consume power to wake the silent bodies, which were the huge ‘corpses’ that Chen Rui saw.

Because of this, they were eager to devour the life and origin of the entire main plane. Similarly, to maintain the current state of the bodies, they couldn’t exert too much power.

Because they had been annihilated once, they almost completely lost the power of eternity and immortality. The fear and dread of the ‘Will’ toward the supreme key was far beyond imagination. After sensing Chen Rui’s presence in the human world, out of caution, the Abyss would not face him in themselves. Instead, they immediately left the Nightmare Volcano for the Chaos Realm.

Before leaving, the Abyss Will left the God’s deterrence projection and Blood Spider Mandala. The purpose was to let Quilliana seize the supreme key. Therefore, Quilliana had been trying to induce Chen Rui to activate the supreme key.

Chen Rui guessed it right. If he really activated the supreme key at that time, then there was only one result, being seized.

He still guessed wrongly that the Abyss Will left early. The Chaos Realm that was about to overlap was actually just a projection, and the purpose was naturally to lure him to use the last trump card. Therefore, there was that ‘empty’ feeling later on, because the God’s deterrence supporting the space was exhausted during the attack.

After sensing that Quilliana’s power collapsed, the ‘Will’ made a decisive decision. They did not hesitate to overdraw their power that had not yet fully recovered to further stimulate the power of the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction, wanting to destroy the entire main plane in advance. This included Chen Rui who held the supreme key.

Even if they couldn’t kill Chen Rui, as long as they destroyed all the lives on the main plane and recovered their real strength, it would be easy to kill Chen Rui instantly.

Just in case, before accelerating the destruction of the world, they did another more decisive move, sealing off the Mysterious Land.

However, these Wills who thought that everything was under their control were still unable to control everything after all.

For example, human nature.

Another example, the [Star Gate].

At the Ghastly Floating Land.

A door shining with faint starlight opened.

When Chen Rui entered the Ghastly Floating Land, he felt a strange vibration in his soul, as if he sensed some kind of strong fluctuation of consciousness. Countless images that he didn’t have before quickly flashed through his mind.

Fierce battle.

The sky was full of countless interlacing lights. There were many familiar figures: Angels, fallen angels, dragons, elves…

They were not controlled mass-produced monsters like the Abyss, but real lives with autonomous consciousness. Just for their fanatical faith, they risked their lives and fought desperately.

In a flash of light, hundreds of super powerhouses were instantly annihilated, including Pseudo-God powerhouses. The scale, level and intensity of this kind of battle would be unimaginable if one hadn’t witnessed it personally.

Chen Rui suddenly understood. The Battle of Gods!

Although I didn’t see God, even in any era in the later generations, it is impossible to have such a large number of powerhouses!

At the same time, he also vaguely understood why Michael, Satan and those who had experienced the battle of Gods wanted to become gods at all costs. Even the peak stage Pseudo-God is an existence that may fall at any time in this kind of battle, let alone ordinary powerful people. Everyone is just cannon ashes and pawns in the game of the gods, unless… one becomes a player.

The images of the fierce battle flashed across Chen Rui’s mind. The next moment, the wandering spirits appeared in front of him like a tide. The white figures almost filled his entire vision.

Some kind of change seemed to have taken place in Mysterious Land. The rule that restricted the strength above Demi-God was gone. There were many more powerful existences in the wandering spirits.

Chen Rui knew that these wandering spirits were transformed by the souls of the original battle of Gods. Now they must be attacking under the will of Gods. He didn’t want to fight these souls, and he didn’t have time to spend here. The world outside was facing the life and death moment.

He took out the cracked red crystal ball and crushed it.

The surrounding space suddenly twisted strangely, and an upright vortex door appeared in front of him.

This was the only privileged object obtained by ‘Quilliana’ as the highest oracle. It could directly enter the last Chaos Realm in Mysterious Land, and it was also the real intention of Blanche to leave him the crystal ball.

She didn’t know that he could go straight to the Ghastly Floating Land, but she left her last hope and wish to him.

Take her home.

This was Chen Rui’s promise to her, and also to Duoduo as well as all relatives and friends.

Without the slightest hesitation, he flew into the vortex.

The moment Chen Rui entered the next space, before he could clearly see the situation in front of him, countless overwhelming powers came from all directions. The level of these powers was far beyond what he could bear. They were definitely not something that the constellation power could resist. Even if he could be resurrected 10,000 times, he would be annihilated in an instant.

The source of power was those huge ‘corpses’!

Chen Rui couldn’t resist. However, his hand was shining.

Magic card, ‘King of Darkness’.

At this time, he had already used the supreme key without hesitation.

At this moment, time and space seemed to pause, including all the surging power.

When the blood-red light shone throughout the Chaos Realm, Chen Rui didn’t see any light. He seemed to have entered another world.

It was chaos.

Drowsy, lifeless and lightless, filled with a sense of stagnation and dead silence.

It seemed that everything was destroyed.

This scene made Chen Rui feel inexplicably familiar.

This is what it looks like after the world is destroyed? Could it be that the supreme key just now made the whole world…

Wait a minute, no!

This familiar feeling… is the Super System! To be more precise, at the very beginning of the Super System, it was the ‘chaotic’ state before the creation of universe!

Why am I in this place? Where’s the Chaos Realm? The will of the gods?

Just when Chen Rui was surprised, an indescribably powerful origin power appeared in the chaos. It seemed to be brewing.

Then, violent vibrations and explosions occurred. Light appeared in the space, and the feeling of stagnation disappeared because of ‘time’.

‘Life’ also appeared, because there was ‘death’. This was life and death.

Similarly, this was also a cycle of destruction and creation.

There was a process of creation of the space with lives one by one. Unlike the Super System, the spaces where life lived were not all planets, but some were intersected parallel ‘domains’.

This series of evolutions had passed quickly. In the eyes of Chen Rui, a bystander, it was the ‘fast forward’ process of the creation of this universe and life.

The scene changed again, and he came to a sunny space. Chen Rui, who had witnessed the evolution of the universe before, clearly felt that this was the ‘domain’ formed by the most origin essence in the evolution of the universe, or the so-called… main plane.

The main plane retained the 3 most powerful origin forces that created the world. The strongest of these 3 origins was not creation or destruction, but the origin that gave birth to ‘existence’ after destruction and creation. That was ‘life and death’.

This was the Book of Life and Death, the Book of Creation, and the Book of Destruction.

TL: Secret unravel?

chapters.title: Chapter 1272: The Era Of Gods
chapters.body:
Chapter 1272: The Era Of Gods

As a bystander, Chen Rui witnessed the birth of universe and life.

The original intelligent life evolved from the Book of Life and Death. Its name was ‘Extreme’.

‘Extreme’ had the most powerful power. It used the changes in creation origin and destruction origin to deduce and create the second generation of intelligent life forms. It led the second generation of intelligent life forms to continuously absorb and comprehend the origin power. At the same time, more life forms were also evolving one by one.

Various life forms appeared on the main plane and some other planes.

To be precise, the universe origin was the foundation of the creation of all things. ‘Extreme’ and the second-generation intelligent life form was no exception. At most, they used the origin power to speed up and guide the evolution of life forms. Even without them, creation would also evolve.

‘Extreme’ was the only life that evolved from the Book of Life and Death, possessing supreme power. At the same time, it also realized that the Book of Life and Death was the only existence that could restrain it.

For this reason, ‘Extreme’ thought about destroying the Book of Life and Death more than once, but the Book of Life and Death was the most original power left by the universe. It could not be destroyed at all, so it could only try to control or seal it. Just like that, the Book of Life and Death created a second life – the key.

The key was not an ordinary tool, but a life entity with independent consciousness, compatible with destruction and creation power. His name was ‘Lucifer’, which originally meant ‘the supreme key’.

Chen Rui finally figured out Lucifer’s identity. No wonder Quilliana called it ‘the avatar of the supreme key’. It turns out that Lucifer himself is the supreme key!

Then, what I’m seeing is the life creation of this universe. The oldest age of Gods!

Lucifer was compatible with the power of creation and destruction origin, and he could seal the power of the Book of Life and Death. It was a very powerful life form, not inferior to the second generation intelligent life forms.

When Lucifer was born, ‘Extreme’ used the highest law to limit his growth space in order to cancel some kind of potential threat. This ensured his strength remained at a certain level. It would not decline or rise.

After completing all this, ‘Extreme’ regarded the origin that brewed the entire universe creation as ‘Originator’. It claimed to be the highest God of all life forms from all planes without, that was the Supreme God.

The second generation intelligent life forms became the Gods under the Supreme God. They honored ‘Extreme’ as ‘Father’.

The Gods absorbed the faith power of various living beings and grew stronger. The lives were blessed by the Gods and grew rapidly. The life force of the entire universe was booming like never before.

The scene switched to another one.

A woman was walking in the garden, holding Lucifer’s arm intimately. The woman’s face couldn’t be seen clearly, but the aura on her body made Chen Rui feel familiar.

At this moment, an incongruent voice came from behind, “Rafferty, we are Gods now. If we walk with him again, it will damage not only your might but also the face of all Gods.”

It turned out that this woman was the Elemental Goddess Rafferty that Chen Rui had seen in the elemental world. This sentence made Lucifer clenched his fists. Rafferty still did not let go of her hand, but she said coldly to the back, “Heinks, have you forgotten the scene of fighting side by side with him back then? You forgot the help he gave you back then?”

“That was the past. The present is different.” The dazzling human figure said lightly, “Now is not the original era of chaos, but the era of Father and all Gods. The only rule of this world is power. If his strength can stand side by side with me like before, then he and I are still friends, but he is just an ant now. He is not worthy to stand beside you and me.”

“It’s ‘you’. Not ‘you and me,’” Rafferty sneered, “Don’t confuse me with you.”

Heinks snorted while glancing at Lucifer, “You can only deceive her for a while. She is a God after all. One day, she will wake up, and you, will have nothing!”

“If you don’t want to fight, get out!” Rafferty was furious. Her whole body was burning with colorful light.

Heinks was quite afraid of Rafferty, so he didn’t say any more. He turned into a ray of light and disappeared,

Lucifer gently broke away from Rafferty’s hand, “You don’t have to do this. In fact, he is right.”

In the beginning, he and the Gods were originally partners. Then, the Gods gradually became stronger under the power of faith, but his strength was always lower than that of the Gods due to restrictions. His identity and relationship fell apart step by step following the gap in power. The former friends became Gods whom he could only look up to; only Rafferty remained the same to him.

“You don’t have to worry about what that guy says. Anyway, he’s not my opponent at all. Since power is the only rule, I’ll beat him until he can’t speak.” Rafferty took Lucifer’s hand again, “Do you not have confidence in my strength? Or do you not have confidence in my love?”

“Although ‘Light’ Heinks and ‘Dark’ Sorenyat were called the 2 leaders of the Gods, everyone in God Mountain knows that ‘elements’ Rafferty is the strongest existence below Father. No matter what it is, I am confident in you.” Lucifer nodded with an awkward smile as he looked at the elemental goddess, who was more of a sister than a lover.

…

Time flew by.

In the same garden, Rafferty looked at the stars in the night sky with a gloomy face, “Father destroyed the Red Star Plane today, just because someone accidentally knocked over the sacrifice in the Supreme God Temple. Such a trivial matter, all beings on the plane are…”

“Why didn’t you stop him?”

“The one who came out to dissuade him first was Paliusu, the God of Animal Husbandry. As a result…” Rafferty lowered his head, “Paliusu was annihilated, and Heinks, who was closely related to Paliusu, was also banished to the Lava Plane.”

Hearing that the most hated Heinks was exiled, Lucifer was not happy. Rafferty sighed, “Father has become more and more arbitrary over the years. He does not tolerate any disobedience or even questioning. Even if we accidentally break the taboo, we will also be executed.”

“Taboo?” Lucifer glanced at him disdainfully, “The Red Star Plane and Paliusu are just having bad luck. The real reason is that our Supreme God is still brooding over the God of War’s rebellion.”

Not long ago, Crowe, the God of War, united several Gods to steal the Book of Destruction and the Book of Creation, and he used the power of these 2 ‘books’ to attempt to assassinate the Supreme God. It was a pity that the Supreme God was too powerful. He only suffered a slight injury. This carefully planned assassination failed in the end.

Rafferty frowned and said, “Isn’t the rebellion quelled? I killed Crowe with my own hands and took back the stolen Book of Creation and Book of Destruction. Father was very happy for this and specially rewarded me.”

“He was not genuinely happy, but angry and frightened instead. Today is the Crowe’s rebellion, and tomorrow it may be someone else.” Lucifer sneered, “He can squander power and God’s deterrence as he pleases, but he can’t tolerate others’ slightest disobedience. He even kills people arbitrarily just out of doubt, but he never doubted himself! If he hadn’t acted against the law, how could the loyal Crowe…”

Before he finished speaking, Rafferty covered his mouth, showing a panicked expression, “Stop talking! The elemental world may not be able to shield from Father’s perception. If…”

Lucifer slowly removed Rafferty’s hand and shook his head, “Don’t worry, I sealed the Book of Life and Death, which is of irreplaceable value to him. At least I won’t die. What I’m worried about now is you. You have shown amazing talent in quelling the rebellion this time, and you can actually integrate the origins of the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction… You seem to be his most beloved and best daughter, but now he doesn’t trust anyone. You are also the most dangerous potential enemy of his absolute control. Paliusu and the Red Star Plane are no longer the first victims, nor will they be the last… No matter what, you must be careful.”

“I understand.” Rafferty nodded.

Lucifer sighed, “Originally, I always wanted to break through the restrictions and become a God who is superior and worshiped by all people. But now I’m thinking——God, what is it? Does this world… need a God?”

Rafferty also fell silent. The 2 of them were silent for a long time.

…

The scene changed again, turning into a gloomy prison cell. The walls were covered with suppression enchantments of the supreme authority power, which couldn’t be broken through with Lucifer’s strength.

Outside the prison window, one could see that the sky was full of dark clouds and resounding thunder.

There seemed to be fierce battle sounds outside. In the next moment, countless rays of light lit up from the prison cell. The enchantment of the supreme authority power gradually disappeared under the strong light. A familiar voice sounded, “Lucifer! “

Lucifer was a little surprised, because it was not Rafferty who broke into the God Mountain’s prison to save him, but Heinks who should be exiled.

Not only Heinks came, but also Sorenyat and almost all other gods. They joined forces to break the suppression enchantment, but among this group of people, Rafferty was the only one missing.

“Father is completely out of control!” Heinks looked utterly rage, “I received reliable news from a god servant that Father wants to fully devour the power of the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction, then follow the example of the Originator to destroy and recreate an absolute brand new world. In that world, he will have no weaknesses. All current life forms, including us, will be extinct!”

Lucifer was shocked as he didn’t expect the Supreme God to be so crazy, so he hurriedly asked, “Where’s Rafferty?”

“She was imprisoned in an altar on top of God Mountain as a sacrifice for the fusion of the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction. The ritual is about to begin!”

Lucifer’s facial expression changed drastically. He finally figured out why Supreme God imprisoned him. Not only because of Rafferty but also because of the Book of Life and Death, which could threaten the supreme existence.

He looked at the Gods and understood, “You guys want to…”

“No one wants to be erased from existence. If we want to live freely, we have to fight.” Dark God Sorenyat spoke up, “Lucifer, we need your strength.”

Lucifer frowned. It has been a long time since I heard this sentence.

As before, Lucifer nodded without hesitation, but this time it was not for them, but for Rafferty, and also for all the lives on the planes.

TL: Was wondering how Lucifer fell in love with a Goddess, so that’s how… Did he save Rafferty? 3 MORE CHAPTERS TILL THE END!!

chapters.title: Chapter 1273: The Real Twilight Of Gods
chapters.body:
Chapter 1273: The Real Twilight Of Gods

After Lucifer and the Gods left the prison cell, the scene in Chen Rui’s eyes changed again and turned into a fierce battle scene.

The sky was shattered while the entire world was constantly twisting, breaking, and trembling.

The terrifying energy aftermath dissipated in all directions. Although to Chen Rui these were just illusions, he could still feel the terror of that energy level. Even in his power peak, once he was involved in the energy aftermath, he would also be annihilated without a doubt.

Not long ago, Chen Rui witnessed a large-scale fierce battle in the Ghastly Floating Land. The number of people fighting in front of him was far less than in that war, but the power and intensity were 1000 times greater.

This was the Battle of Gods, more precisely, the first Battle of Gods.

The Gods each turned into a galaxy that contained unfathomable power, surrounding the Supreme God in the center. Each blow could bring a terrifying power. Even if it was the Supreme God, it was also impossible to be unscathed under this kind of attack. The injured Supreme God let out a furious roar. Wherever his will extended, the galaxies were annihilated.

The immortal bodies of the Gods were turned into ashes by the terrifying power. Many Gods fell one after another.

In order to survive, the Gods had no choice but to suppress the fear in their minds and continue to besiege. However, the power of the Supreme God was too strong. The surging power was like a small universe. All the galaxies and the brilliance of the stars seemed small and dim in front of him.

For the Gods, the situation was already extremely dangerous.

At this moment, the Supreme God suddenly showed a panic expression, because the power he feared most appeared, the Book of Life and Death.

—— These damned guys actually released the supreme key that I secretly held in the prison, and they even unsealed the suppressing power I set on Lucifer. Now the most dreaded Book of Life and Death has been released!

As soon as the breath of ‘life and death’ appeared, the power of the Supreme God was indeed greatly suppressed. Taking advantage of this opportunity, the remaining Gods, led by Heinks and Sorenyat, launched the craziest attack while risking their lives.

The Supreme God was finally exhausted. The damaged body exuded blood red breath, and his body began to be annihilated bit by bit.

Realizing that he was in a desperate situation, the Supreme God made a resolute decision. He desperately rushed toward the Book of Life and Death at the risk of complete annihilation. He forcibly integrated with the Book of Life and Death, bursting out with a power that made everyone tremble.

Even if the Supreme God were to die, everyone would be buried with him!

This was no longer just the power of the Book of Life and Death. Lucifer borrowed the power of the Gods to forcefully break through the suppression of the Supreme God and undo the seal of the Book of Life and Death. His vitality had already been severely injured. Even if he suppressed it with all his strength, he would not be able to seal the Book of Life and Death where the Supreme God was located.

Just when Lucifer was on the verge of annihilation, something happened that he would never forget. Rafferty stood in front of him and used her talents to activate the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction. Fusing the sealing power in Lucifer’s body, she sealed the Book of Life and Death that was about to explode together with the Supreme God’s remnant soul into her own elemental world. The price was, her life.

At the last moment of being sealed, the Supreme God cast a curse with his soul and the Book of Life and Death. He cursed Lucifer would forever be suffering in a living hell, cursed the gods would lose Godhood, and their souls would sink forever in darkness.

As far as the moment was concerned, Lucifer got rid of the fate of ‘key’, but he lost his beloved. This kind of pain needed no curse.

The scene in Chen Rui’s eyes gradually became blurred. He finally figured out the whole story of the first Battle of Gods, and he also understood the existence sealed in the elemental world. The Elemental War must be the ritual to maintain the seal when the Elemental Goddess was not around. Only when Rafferty’s Godhood fragments were collected, the Elemental War might end.

This was the first Battle of the Gods and the alternation of God’s authority. In the end, the Supreme God was defeated by the Gods and sealed in the elemental world.

The screen began to change again. There was a battle between the Gods and the Abyss Will transformed by the Godhood of Darkness. After several Gods fell unexpectedly, the Gods finally discovered that the Godhood of Darkness was equivalent to their own destiny twins.

Annihilating the Godhood of Darkness was tantamount to committing suicide, so the Gods gave up their original intention and sealed the Abyss Will in the Lava Plane. Just in case, they set the authority power enchantment on the main plane.

The Gods who thought they could solve the scourge completely began to replace the Supreme God to control the world, enjoy a free and unconstrained wonderful life, accept the worship of all life, and bestow various powers on believers. They selected a large number of God servants, and spread their faith and teachings.

Devout believers built Angels City at the foot of God Mountain. Through the reports of God’s servants and listening to God’s teachings, Gods would also perform miracles from time to time. In Chen Rui’s view, this Angels City was very similar to the Holy Church’s Holy Light City. It was probably planned by Michael and others based on the original Angels City.

In addition to the Gods, the top administrator of Angels City was the leader of the 7 angels. Among the 7 chief archangels, Lucifer ranked first.

Although Lucifer could not break through to God Level due to limitation by the Supreme’s authority power, Lucifer was well-deserved as the number one person below God regardless of strength, combat experience. and seniority.

Lucifer, who experienced the fall of the Elemental Goddess, gradually healed the wounds in his heart under the comfort of time. He now had a warm home. His main wife was the former God’s servant of the Elemental Goddess, Phoenix, and he had many concubines. As the most powerful archangel, he also had the most admirers, including such excellent women as Gabriel and Python.

Back then, the god servant who revealed the Supreme God’s conspiracy was Elf Alucier, who possessed a certain power of foresight. He was appointed as the Servant of Destiny by the Gods. He became friends with Lucifer. Michael, Satan, and others also admired Lucifer’s power and followed his order in everything.

Having family, relatives, and friends made Lucifer regain the meaning of existence.

However, the good times didn’t last long. While the Gods were enjoying freedom and supreme control, their desires were also rapidly expanding. Due to the loss of that common enemy, the original contradictions began to emerge. The disputes of faith intensified more and more. They finally split into 2 camps of light and darkness.

Due to the old feud with Light God Heinks, Lucifer accepted the Dark Oracle Satan’s invitation without hesitation. He chose the dark camp led by Dark God Sorenyat, and lived in seclusion in the Demon Realm.

Michael was originally 1 of the top 3 Light God Oracles, so it was impossible for him to betray Heinks. The same went for Gabriel and Raphael. The former partners became enemies. The oracles of the dark camp were denounced as the fallen ones by the angels of the human world. Only Python silently followed Lucifer into the darkness.

Light denounced darkness as evil, and darkness refuted light as hypocrisy. Under the conflict between faith and belief, the war between the 2 sides inevitably happened.

This was a protracted war, and it was also a catastrophe. The faithful fought frantically for God’s will, and countless oracles, god’s servants, and believers died in the war, which was tragic. Chen Rui had already witnessed it in the Ghastly Floating Land before. He still had lingering fears to this moment.

The accumulation of hatred and the fanaticism of faith further escalated the war. The disaster of war spread to more and more innocent people.

As the strongest warrior, Lucifer once indulged in the pleasant feeling of beheading the enemy and controlling the battlefield. Until one day when he returned home, he found that his warm home had been turned into a piece of scorched earth. The loved ones whose voices and smiles were still in memory turned into cold corpses. Only the soul of the little daughter with the Phoenix girl had not dissipated. With the help of Python, his little daughter’s soul was temporarily sealed.

Afterward, Lucifer, who was angry and sad, broke into the human world alone, and slaughtered the angel legion who attacked the Demon Realm and even the city where it was located. Amidst the blood and flames, he suddenly woke up in horror. He realized that he himself became a murderer who destroyed countless families and took away countless relatives.

It had been so from the beginning.

At this moment, Lucifer felt the pain of a living hell.

The Supreme’s curse had been fulfilled again.

Alucier appeared and brought a secret that shocked Lucifer even more. This was a secret that Alucier only learned not long ago, that was, the agreement of the Gods.

The agreement between the light and the dark camps was that the Gods themselves would not participate in the war. Within 100 years, based on the number of deaths of believers on both sides, the loser would respect the winner. 10,000 years later, the two sides would fight again, and the rules of the game would remain the same.

So many dead lives with so many shattered families. It was not a conflict of faith or belief. It was just a game of interests and power played by the Gods.

The life of the Gods was eternal. This game would go on until they got tired of it and change to a fresher one.

Chen Rui also understood why more than 1 Elemental King said such words: All creatures are just playthings of the gods.

Alucier sighed and implicitly said to Lucifer, “At the beginning, they tried their best to defeat ‘that person’ who wanted to destroy the world and enslave them; now, they have become ‘that person’.”

Lucifer looked at the sky, then at the blood on his hands. He said with all his strength, “This world doesn’t need Gods.”

Chen Rui suddenly recalled. The feeling of this sentence… That’s right, it was the sentence that Lucifer said before destroying Rafferty’s soul when he was in the elemental world!

This sentence contained a lot of meanings, especially for the former lover Rafferty… The Elemental Goddess who was also one of the targets of the Supreme’s curse.

One could imagine his state of mind when he personally annihilated his lover. Rafferty also did not resist.

Some things had surpassed life and death.

The scene changed again. Lucifer also looked at the Gods in the sky and said the same sentence.

Then, he summoned the Book of Life and Death, which was sealed in the elemental world and fused with the soul of the Supreme God. All the Gods fell under the power of life and death emitted by the Supreme God’s ‘eye’. There was no God in the world anymore. That was the ‘Twilight of Gods’.

After eliminating the Gods, Lucifer did not let the soul of the Supreme God escape from the Book of Life and Death. He sealed the Book of Life and Death again. Like Rafferty back then, he paid the price of his life.

The supreme key transformed by the body was scattered into the 7 artifacts. By virtue of the origin power of the Book of Life and Death, a trace of his remnant soul was retained among the 7 artifacts.

Chen Rui personally experienced the later events. It was he who analyzed the 7 artifacts, fused Lucifer’s soul, and obtained premature and weakest rebirth.

The 7 artifacts merged together, showing the shadow of Lucifer. He watched Chen Rui quietly.

Lucifer’s eyes were still as strange as they were when they first met, seemingly indifferent, but they contained deep emotions, which were unforgettable at first sight.

If there was a third person, he would find that although they looked completely different, they had similar temperaments. This might be why many people misunderstood that Chen Rui was Lucifer.

Chen Rui was also staring at Lucifer. The scenes in his consciousness just now were all transmitted to him by Lucifer with the last soul power. It was not only to tell him the truth but also for something else.

Lucifer’s current remnant soul could only summon the Book of Life and Death once, then the supreme key would completely collapse.

It could only be summoned and could not be sealed again.

Chen Rui suddenly remembered the betting agreement between Lucifer and Alucier in the mirror world. All of a sudden, he seemed to understand something.

The past events can no longer be reproduced, and they are meaningless now. If I want to really end or change everything, I can only ‘transcend’.

Lucifer couldn’t ‘transcend’ the past, so Alucier chose the more likely Chen Rui.

Transcend.

Not only to transcend Lucifer and other existences but also to transcend himself: the ‘Supreme God’… of the Super System’s universe in another sense.

Up to now, Chen Rui was still not sure whether Alucier really knew the identity of him as the crossover and about the Super System. He could only be sure that – the elf prophet’s bet was really big.

Seeing that Chen Rui seemed to have realized something, Lucifer smiled as his face gradually faded.

Chen Rui’s vision returned to the original Chaos Realm.

Although his consciousness just now had experienced many things, it was actually just a split second.

In the Chaos Realm, countless indescribably powerful forces flooded Chen Rui’s entire senses. Those huge ‘corpses’ open their eyes one after another, rushing toward him with boundless power.

In the sky, there were 2 rays of light emitting an intent origin power, Creation and Destruction.

Under such terrifying power, Chen Rui couldn’t escape, move, or even think, but his gaze was calm, and the light of the card in his hand became brighter and brighter.

The blood-red light illuminated the entire Chaos Realm. Under this light, the brilliance of the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction seemed eclipsed. The terrifying power from the huge ‘corpses’ was torn apart one after another. Even the strongest space, the Chaos Realm, was damaged. Burning blood flames spewed out from the cracks in the space.

As the holder of the supreme key, Chen Rui did not feel the damage from the blood flames, but the awakened giants screamed. Their bodies scorched quickly under the burning of the red flames, and the stars in the galaxies system burst and collapsed.

The collapsed stars seemed to be attracted by something as they surged frantically toward the card. They were instantly devoured.

At the peak stage, the Gods were no match for the Supreme God, let alone the current state.

The screams soon weakened, and the bodies of the giants began to disintegrate rapidly, eventually turning into nothingness.

These former Gods, transformed to the Abyss will at all costs, tried their best to destroy the whole world and resurrect themselves, but in the end, it came to naught.

It was the ‘Twilight of Gods’ once again; the real end too.

The ‘reflection’ of the Demon Realm and the human world was about to get close to the ground, but it suddenly stopped moving. The clear mirror image gradually faded.

After the Gods disappeared, the entire Chaos Realm suddenly became empty, but Chen Rui did not leave, because he knew that there was one final and most terrifying enemy.

TL: One last fight!? Can he transcend? And what would the transcended power be?

chapters.title: Chapter 1274: Supreme
chapters.body:
Chapter 1274: Supreme

The magic card in Chen Rui’s hand slowly dissipated into glowing particles.

In the opposite space, a vague shadow began to appear faintly, showing a blood-red color.

In the blood-red shadow, the first part that became clear was the eye. It had a blood-red pupil. It exuded the primal and ultimate breath, which was eternal.

This kind of gaze, if it were Chen Rui who had just gone to the Nightmare Volcano, he would be annihilated at a glance. Even if he just stepped into the state of Chaos Realm, under this kind of gaze, his soul and will would be disintegrated.

However, the current Chen Rui didn’t lose his mind. He just looked directly into that eye.

The silhouette around the eye gradually became clear, turning into a human body. It gave him a feeling of being unreachable even though he was right in front of him. On the surface, there was no majestic and astounding

power, but those ‘giants’ with shocking momentum before were all easily annihilated under the power of this person.

This person’s appearance was partly visible, seemingly flawless. The clearest thing was the eyes – The blood-red pupil of the left eye, and the hollow black of the right eye. Chen Rui suddenly had a flash of inspiration in his mind: The Abyss!

It turns out that the will that manipulates everything behind the scenes, that is, the real Abyss Will, is not the Gods, but the Supreme God!

Why did the Gods reborn with the Godhood of Darkness after their fall?

From that moment on, the Gods have fallen into the chessboard of the Supreme God. Then, even if the Gods really destroy the world and fully recover, the Abyss Will will use some kind of power in the curse to break free from the seal and resurrect, becoming the final victor.

In the grand scheme of the Supreme God, those Gods are nothing but manipulated pawns.

The surrounding space had become another location. This place was no stranger to Chen Rui.

The elemental world which sealed the Supreme God. He could no longer feel the breath of elements in this plane now. What he felt was another kind of breath that was thousands of times greater and vast.

The life forces of the elemental world, including the supposedly immortal Main Elemental Messengers, disappeared without a trace.

The rule of the universe was where there was life, there was death. There was no truly immortal existence unless it exceeded the entire universe’s rule.

Chen Rui didn’t investigate what happened in the elemental world, but he just looked at the person in front of him.

There were 3 rays of light in this person’s hand, emitting the most origin breath: Creation, Destruction, Life and Death.

Legend had it that the Originator destroyed the original universe in 3 days, then he created the universe in 3 days. There was another day between destruction and creation, a total of 7 days.

After Chen Rui witnessed the process of universe creation in his previous consciousness, combined with the process of the Super System, he had a further comprehension. The first 3 days were the brewing of ‘being’ in ‘nothing’, the fourth day was the most mysterious ‘creating something out of nothing’, and the third day was the creation of ‘being’.

As stated in the Tao Te Ching. The nameless is the beginning of all things, the named is the mother of all things… These 2 spring from the same source but differ in name. They are the doors to all mystery.

The Supreme God. Under the summon of the supreme key, he had broken away from the seal. Moreover, he also controlled the strongest origin representing the 3 mysteries of ‘being’, ‘nothing’ and ‘being-nothing’.

“Who are you?” The voice as deep as the sky was full of doubts as if it was strange that this ant had not been annihilated. Although it was no stranger to Chen Rui with the dominant will of Quilliana, in the eyes of the Supreme God, this kind of ant was not worth remembering at all.

Chen Rui didn’t make a sound. Instead, he quietly felt and comprehended the power of these words oscillating in his soul.

“Answer!”

The surrounding space trembled, and countless tearing forces appeared on Chen Rui’s body, but they were blocked by some kind of power. It turned out to be the light spots dissipated by the magic card previously. Instead of disappearing, they covered and protected him.

Under the attack of this force, the light spots revealed their final forms: Sword, ring, mask, shield, armor, cloak, and boot.

The complete set of the 7 artifacts that had disappeared had covered on Chen Rui’s body again, and they were connected as 1, exuding a pure power that was not there before. It contained some kind of ultimate truth between life and death. These were the real 7 artifacts, which were also the last gift Lucifer left him.

The 7 artifacts once contained the power of Lucifer’s soul power, which was part of the origin of the Book of Life and Death. After the second Twilight of Gods, Lucifer’s soul split into 7 parts along with the supreme key and fell into the Demon Realm. Influenced by the origin power of the Book of Life and Death, the Demon Realm gave birth to the 7 royal families.

This was why the 7 artifacts could only be activated by the 7 royal families. Of course, except for the bug Chen Rui.

Today’s 7 pieces of equipment were no longer the supreme key, but the 7 artifacts.

“It’s just garbage that has lost its soul.” There was a hint of disdain in the voice of the Supreme God on the opposite side. There was also a touch of anger in the disdain. It was not for the ‘ant’ Chen Rui, but for the past supreme key.

With that said, a large number of cracks suddenly appeared on the 7 artifacts. Even the so-called strongest Illusive Demon Shield couldn’t withstand the pressure. Even though it contained a trace of the mystery of the Book of Life and Death, it was still vulnerable to the Supreme God’s absolute power. The power of just 1 sentence had made them crack.

The terrifying power went through the 7 artifacts and enveloped Chen Rui. His suddenly became blurred, and the 7 artifacts were also rapidly decomposing.

The Supreme God didn’t look at the ‘ant’ that was easily destroyed, and he said to himself, “It’s been so many years… I finally gradually comprehend the mystery of the Book of Life and Death. Even if the Book of Life and Death is not activated, even if those stupid chess pieces fail, it will only be a matter of time before I break the seal. Now ‘Creation’, ‘Destruction’, and ‘Life and Death’ are all under my control. No one can stop me from destroying and creating the whole world again.”

Chen Rui’s voice sounded, “The Gods have fallen. Besides, the Book of Life and Death, the Book of Creation, and the Book of Destruction are all in your hands. Why do you still want to destroy the world?”

“You haven’t been annihilated?” The Supreme God was slightly surprised. Chen Rui’s body, which was thin like smoke, gradually became clear again. The Supreme God clearly felt that there seemed to be a bright starlight faintly shining in the pupils of this ‘ant’. Even he couldn’t ignore that kind of brilliance.

The 7 artifacts were gone, and it was not known whether they were completely disintegrated or put away. At least, they were not necessary for Chen Rui now.

“A new God?” The Supreme God finally looked at him seriously.

At this moment, some earth-shaking changes were taking place in Chen Rui’s consciousness. This change had already begun to sprout from the battle with Quilliana.

The fusion of constellations, blazing life, and the battle that burned everything was not only an impact on the Abyss Will but also an impact to ‘transcend’.

After devouring God’s deterrence, although he suffered heavy injuries, the originally blurry feeling became more and more clear.

More ‘clarity’ occurred after entering the Chaos Realm and going through Lucifer’s soul experience.

In the process of watching the evolution of the universe, his entire consciousness and perception unknowingly broke through a critical point. When the Supreme God annihilated him with supreme power, it was equivalent to completely opening a door for him.

There was no forceful breakthrough in the battle, no last power burst before dying, and no burning everything as when fighting Quilliana, it was just ‘natural’.

It was completely different from the feeling when he was eager to break through, but he still had no result during the Abyss invasion. At the last moment of annihilation, in the calmness of completely letting go of everything, he naturally touched something that had been out of reach.

In the ‘status’ light screen of the Super System’s Galaxy Divinity Temple, a light ball slowly glowed on the head of the 3D human body. Together with the 6 below it, they lined up in a straight line, running vertically through the center of the ‘human body’.

The seventh and the last light ball. The word in the light ball was: “Dubhe”!

So far, all the light balls were lit. Alkaid, Mizar, Alioth, Megrez, Phecda, Merak, Dubhe.

There were 7 realms in total.

Oddly enough, when he evolved to the 7-star, there was no new skill nor new ability. On the contrary, all the original abilities and data gradually faded away, replaced by another brand new feeling – Dubhe(Simple)?

Chen Rui was in the midst of comprehension, only to hear the Supreme God say in a deep voice, “Unexpectedly, after me and those minions, this main plane which faith has declined rapidly can give birth to a new god. You… are completely different from those minions just now. You give me a different feeling like you are out of control. Because of a threat like you, I must destroy this world and recreate a more perfect world. In this process, I will also touch the perception of the Originator, truly become the Supreme God with no flaws and absolute control, and dominate the entire universe.”

Chen Rui shook his head, “Just for the so-called absolute control, the Abyss you controlled induced those stupid gods to destroy almost all planes, and now you want to kill the remaining creatures on this main plane?”

“You actually are wondering about such a matter? I really don’t know how you possess the power you have now.” The Supreme God’s voice was a bit more astonished, “In my impression, ‘hatred’ should have said a word to you, right? Being weak is the most unforgivable original sin.”

“Weakness does not mean that they lose the meaning of existence because of this, and it does not mean that you can deprive them of the meaning of existence at will.” Chen Rui shook his head, “In my understanding, the ants in your eyes that constitute the foundation of the thousands of lives, which are the backbone of the entire world.”

“Idiot!” Supreme God shook his head disdainfully and said, “You simply don’t have the awareness that a God should have, let alone the gut to look directly into your mind. I will give you this kind of awareness now…”

With that said, the left eye of the Supreme God flickered, and an identical person gradually separated from Chen Rui’s body.

“Look directly at the darkness in your mind.” The Supreme God’s laughter was full of arrogance. At first, he was a little afraid of this new God, but now it seemed that this guy’s weakness was too obvious. As long as he reflected the darkness in this person’s mind, he could win without fighting.

“This is the power of the supreme curse? The Gods succumbed to the Godhood of Darkness because of their desires to survive, and thus, they fell into your control. It can be guessed that most of the power generated by their destruction was absorbed by this kind of Godhood and transmitted to you who was sealed in the elemental world. No wonder your strength can be restored to this level. Those pathetic guys even wished to take my supreme key and continue to seal you after they recover. As long as they are fully recovered, you will also undo the seal and descend directly. Am I right?”

The Supreme God said proudly, “My will is not something that those idiotic minions can shake. Since they dared to rebel back then, they must have the awareness to pay the corresponding price. By the way, you should worry more about yourself now.”

With piercing light in his eyes, Chen Rui looked at the person who had the same appearance and strength as himself. Suddenly, he smiled, “I have fought against him more than once. He has a name called Shura.”

It turned out that this ‘Godhood of Darkness’ was actually Shura who had disappeared.

“He once disappeared in my mind, but I understand that he always exists, just like myself.” Chen Rui walked slowly toward Shura, “In the course of my life, I have been looking directly at him, and he has been looking directly at me.”

Shura watched Chen Rui walk closer, and he didn’t make a move. Instead, he showed the same smile like a mirror. The 2 figures merged into 1 as if nothing had happened.

The Supreme God was finally moved, the ‘self’ that even the Gods succumbed to was so easily conquered by this person.

Maybe it wasn’t ‘conquer’. From the very beginning, ‘darkness’ didn’t pose any threat to him. Just as he himself said – He has been looking directly at him.

In fact, nothing happened. The moment Chen Rui walked into Shura, the strange feeling in the Super System became more and more intense. Suddenly, all the data and abilities including the Galaxy Divinity Temple disappeared completely.

Only the universe was as vast and bright as ever.

Those disappearing things might have never really existed in this universe. Nevertheless, in Chen Rui’s mind, it was the most real existence. The power that he vaguely touched before had been slowly grasped in his hands.

The Super System was a real universe.

The data shown before was just 1 type of universe change. Darkness, light, destruction, creation, life, death… the same was true for these.

All changes would return to the original. Eventually, everything would return to nothing.

No light, no image, intangible, nameless.

This was Dubhe.

During the comprehension, the bright starlight in Chen Rui’s pupils disappeared. His entire aura seemed more and more boundless.

The Supreme God finally started to look at Chen Rui seriously. This person’s persistence and breath are very peculiar. He is by no means what the ordinary Gods can compare to. A certain sense of danger is becoming clearer and clearer. For the first time in my life, I actually have this feeling against an enemy.

“If that’s the case, why are you still hesitating?” The Supreme God asked with a sneer. The power of this plane was integrated into this sentence. It turned into a sharp force that rushed toward Chen Rui.

The Supreme God had taken the initiative to attack. At their level, the confrontation between words was no longer a simple psychological tactic or it wasn’t as simple as exerting law power with words, but it was a kind of powerful rule that directly faced the soul.

Once there was a flaw in the mind, one would be completely suppressed. His subsequent attacks would also be at an absolute disadvantage. Therefore, this was not only a contest of strength, but also a contest of minds.

One could not escape the mind.

TL: Finally the last evolution?
