chapters.title: Chapter 1275: The Final
chapters.body:
Chapter 1275: The Final

“I was just thinking…” Chen Rui replied. The power of the plane was distorted suddenly. The oppression in the words of the Supreme God just now was like flowing water was splitting like meeting a rock in the middle, “Does this world actually need a God?”

“Are you denying the meaning of your own existence?” The Supreme God sneered. The plane became icy cold. If an ordinary Pseudo-God stayed here for a second, his soul would instantly be frozen to death.

“I’m not a God.” Chen Rui smiled lightly, but his tone was unprecedentedly firm. After saying this sentence, his breath became even more unfathomable as if he was a vast universe that could accommodate any changes in the power of the plane.

The strength and persistence of the soul revealed by these simple words made the Supreme God feel awe-inspiring. He suddenly remembered something, showing a shocked expression, “Originator!”

“Originator?” Chen Rui was surprised. How is that possible? Before the crossover, I am a young loser. If I were really an Originator, I would have become the master of the Earth.

The Supreme God immediately vetoed his guess, “No! If it is the true power of the Originator, my will will be completely annihilated with just a look…”

Chen Rui frowned, “The Originator is so powerful?”

“Of course, that is the ultimate being who created the universe. Although I haven’t seen ‘him’, as the first life created in the Book of Life and Death, I know very well the existence of ‘him’. ‘His’ state of being is also the goal I pursue most in my life.”

The Supreme God’s left eye shone with a bloody light as if he wanted to see through everything about Chen Rui. His voice became deeper and deeper, “Although your strength is not even 0.000001% of ‘his’, that kind of breath is indeed similar. Maybe you have obtained a power seed left by the Originator or some other secret treasure to reach your current level. It must be like this! Otherwise, at your actual age, how can you grow to the level that is on par with me!”

The words of the Supreme God made Chen Rui wake up immediately. He recalled the situation before the crossover— Right! That damn phone! And the Super System!

At Chen Rui’s current state, it was already clear— Just like the skills and data in the previous state of the Super System, whether it is the phone or the Super System, it is just a form of universe change. Regardless of the form, the development to the final result is consistent.

Originator, let’s call it that for now, should be the most origin existence. It might have left traces left in many universes and planes. I’m just one of the lucky ones who is able to walk to the end…

Or, not the end, but another new beginning.

Evolving the universe and comprehending the mysteries of life are just the first step.

After mastering the realm of ‘Dubhe’, Chen Rui seemed to see a new starting point, which was more unsolved and unknown.

The answer was right in the vast universe.

However, these are all things in the future. To step into the ‘future’, I must protect ‘now’.

The most important thing now is to defeat the Supreme God to save my relatives, friends, and the life of the entire plane that is about to be destroyed.

“ Hahaha ! I never expected to meet an existence like you! This is my best chance!” The Supreme God suddenly laughed with ecstasy in his voice. “As long as I devour your soul and power, and get your comprehension, my realm will have a qualitative leap! It will also be easier to reach the highest level!”

Chen Rui was also smiling, and his smile was full of determination, “I still haven’t figured out whether this world needs a God. But I can be sure, this world doesn’t need you.”

“Obviously, it hasn’t been long since you comprehend this power. I won’t give you time to comprehend it. I will try my best to deliver the biggest blow to kill you in one shot.” The Book of Life and Death, the Book of Destruction, and the Book of Creation in the hands of the Supreme God emitted strong light at the same time, then they slowly merged into his body.

His blood-red eyes flashed, and he suddenly added, “You are still thinking to protect the living beings who are still in the Demon Realm, right? This elemental world will definitely not be able to support the fluctuations caused by our battle. The entire main plane will be affected… The things you want to protect will be destroyed by your own hands!”

The Supreme God did not have the so-called ‘insidious’ concept. In his opinion, the winner takes all, the strongest one is honored. Fighting would go to any lengths. Besides, as the supreme ruler, he was not limited by any rules.

Chen Rui was unmoved, and his answer was even firmer, “Then, I shall completely overwhelm your strength.”

The wills of both parties were so strong that words could no longer break each other’s minds, so the 2 of them attacked directly at the same time.

Endless rays of light appeared around Chen Rui and the Supreme God at the same time. The bright power and the blood-red power confronted each other like 2 vast universes.

In the next moment.

‘Universes’ intertwined and collided together.

…

Looking at the dark sky of the Demon Realm, for some reason, the sense of crisis in everyone’s minds did not really disappear because of the weakening of the previous reflection, but it became even stronger.

The silence before the storm finally ended, and the whole world shook violently.

Everyone’s consciousness and soul trembled as if they were plunged into some kind of strange darkness, which might dissipate at any time.

The tremors lasted for a long time; no one was sure for how long.

Because even time had changed under this indescribable force. It seemed to be in a split second while it seemed to be in the vicissitudes of life.

No one knew what would happen; no one knew whether he could survive.

All fear, despair, helplessness, and other emotions were transferred to the blood-colored universe by a special channel. The blood-colored power in the universe became stronger and stronger, suppressing the brilliant universe and gradually gaining the upper hand.

In the brilliant universe, Chen Rui slowly opened his hands, and the power of the brilliant power flourished, firmly resisting the power of the blood-colored universe.

In the dark vision of everyone in the Demon Realm, light appeared.

That soft light seemed to be hope.

People’s eyes turned to hope, at least they were no longer lost in the dark.

In the battlefield of different space, Chen Rui also felt that emotion or feeling. There was both light and darkness in the human mind. They would be cowardly because of certain things, and they would be courageous because of certain things.

Because they were human.

Instead of God.

The so-called God in front of him was nothing more than a person whose strength had reached a higher level.

So he was just human.

It was like looking straight into the dark self that was always there.

At this moment, Chen Rui finally comprehended some kind of true meaning and found his own way, unlike the person opposite. Although he had almost invincible power, he couldn’t see himself clearly. Despite racking his brain, he could only wander at where he was.

Chen Rui’s mind had been completely ‘calmed’. The power of the entire universe had also calmed down and restrained. Under the ebb and flow, the blood-colored universe surged forward without hesitation, instantly engulfing the resplendent universe’s power.

At the moment when the power of the brilliant universe was overwhelmed, Chen Rui’s eyes still looked serene. It was like the chaos that bred countless lives, without light, without image, intangible, and nameless.

At the main plane.

Perhaps faith and prayer had played their roles. The tremors in the sky and the earth gradually subsided.

In another space, the most violent tremor subsided.

Chen Rui’s body was surrounded by boundless blood-colored stars. On the opposite side, the Supreme God looked at him with disbelief in his gaze.

After a while.

The Supreme God spoke, “Why do you have such power?!”

Chen Rui thought for a while and replied, “Because I have more than just strength.”

With that said, a ‘click’ sounded. A crack appeared in the blood-red pupil of the Supreme God’s left eye. At the same time, all the blood-colored stars were cracked.

Immediately afterward, the body of the Supreme God was smashed to pieces with the entire blood-colored universe, revealing the more brilliant universe behind it. Especially those constellations full of life force were particularly dazzling.

Under the illumination of these starlights, the shattered blood color decomposed into countless particles until it disappeared completely.

…

People in the Demon Realm didn’t know this scene happened on a certain plane. They just saw the long-lost 2 moons reappear in the sky, emitting a soft light just like the hope before.

The haze in their minds finally dissipated. Heartfelt cheers sounded in every corner.

…

At another place.

Blanche’s eyes slowly opened, looking at the 2 people in front of her in surprise.

A stunning woman with blue eyes as deep as the sea, holding a delicate and cute little girl in her hand. These 2 people gave Blanche a very safe and peaceful feeling.

“My name is Veronica and she is Avril. Welcome home, Blanche.” Veronica held out her hand.

“Home…” Blanche was in a trance. While looking at Veronica’s smile, she felt that kind of kindness and friendliness from the bottom of her heart. She held Veronica’s hand involuntarily, then she suddenly found that her hands and body had recovered.

“How do you know me? What is this place?”

“This is the Galaxy Divinity Temple, or it used to be called that. Anyway… it was created by that guy.” Speaking of ‘that guy’, Veronica smiled even more gently, “This will be your home from now on. It will also be ours and his home.”

“His?” Blanche had already understood, and she showed a puzzling expression, “Didn’t I just die? Even my soul is…”

Veronica looked at Avril, “In this hopeful world, everything is possible. Let’s sit over there. You can listen to Avril’s story, and you should be able to get the answer.”

——Compared with Avril’s weakest mind body at the beginning, the residual consciousness on the pair of glasses and the crystal bead was much stronger.

…

At another more distant place, more precisely, a whole new world in a certain universe.

The other pair of eyes also opened. The gaze was very strange. It seemed to be indifferent to everything, but it also contained deep emotions.

He looked at everything around him in surprise. The most surprising thing was that he still existed.

That’s right, he still existed.

This was what he understood. The meaning of life was passed on to another more hopeful person through some kind of test.

Now it seemed that that person… hadn’t let him and Alucier down.

“Is that you?” A woman’s voice sounded from behind. A very familiar voice, which was simply unforgettable.

She was a lover, sister, and partner.

In order to prevent her from being cursed and falling into darkness blasphemy, he did not hesitate to annihilate her last remnant soul with his own hands. From that moment onward, his real soul had been annihilated along with her. The only thing left was the persistence to completely destroy the ‘Will’.

“It’s me.” Without wiping away the sparkling tear from the corners of his eyes, he turned around carefully and slowly. He saw her smiling at a glance.

Just like the first time he saw her.

In the distance, there were still some figures waving to him.

They are all there.

It turns out that no matter whether it is the past, present or tomorrow, they have never left.

He looked at the strange clothes on his body, and he suddenly smiled, “Another world…”

With that said, he took her hand and strode toward those people.

…

The Dark Moon Residence.

Duoduo, who was beside Freya, suddenly sensed something and showed a surprised expression. She suddenly turned into a flame light and flew toward the door of the courtyard, “Daddy! Mommy!”

Hearing this voice, Doudou in Freya’s arms also reacted. This time, the sharp-eyed naughty child accurately found the 2 figures that appeared at the door and happily pointed with his little finger.

After the sky completely returned to normal, Auglas and the others had already realized a possible outcome. They stood up simultaneously and walked to the door.

The door was very lively. None of those who left with Chen Rui were missing; they were all there.

However, powerhouses such as Auglas, Pagris, Meria, and Span keenly noticed some changes in these people. They couldn’t tell what it was, but they just had an incredible feeling.

The most unbelievable thing was Chen Rui who was hugged tightly by Duoduo. He was clearly in front of their eyes, but he seemed as far away as the stars. That temperament could not be described in any words.

“ Hmph ! Whatever he is, he’s my son-in-law.” Auglas comforted himself, glanced at Pagris in a demonstrative way, and happily embraced his 2 daughters who had returned safely.

However, the space ring containing most of his belongings was conveniently taken away by a ‘touched’ daughter, while the other daughter didn’t even bother to be touched, but she touched Joanna’s buttocks aside. The Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor’s smiling face froze.

“ Hmph! I also have a daughter.” The other Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor obviously lacked confidence when he said this, plus he didn’t see Avril’s appearance— But since the human is fine, Avril is naturally fine. It is very likely that she got some sort of unimaginable benefit like those people.

Meria couldn’t help but ask, “Chen Rui, have you reached ‘that’ level?”

As soon as this sentence came out, the ears of Pagris, Auglas, and others perked up.

“What level does brother reach?” Freya on the side asked curiously.

“God?” Lex vaguely guessed a little bit, and he felt inexplicably excited. My son actually becomes a God?

Freya was frightened as she covered her mouth in surprise, “Brother…”

“I’m not a God.” Chen Rui smiled at Freya and touched her head. This sentence was not only an explanation but also a new starting point for him.

“I know, Brother is Brother!” Alice answered first, “Brother is Chen Rui, Chen Rui’s Chen, Chen Rui’s Rui!”

With that said, Princess Loli kissed Chen Rui hard in front of everyone, demonstrating that her ‘brother’ was no different from before, so he was still kissed by her.

This action was exchanged for Duoduo’s counterattack. For a while, Chen Rui’s face was covered with the saliva of the little girl declaring independence.

Chen Rui laughed and poked his daughter’s face with his mustache. The little girl crawled into Catherine’s arms in dissatisfaction, acting like a spoiled child.

“This world, and another world… Do they need God?” After kissing her daughter with a smile, Catherine, who experienced the battle herself and was also the Wisdom Goddess of another ‘universe’, asked 1 of the deepest questions.

“This is a question that needs to be thought about for a long time. I don’t know the answer yet. The only thing I can be sure of is…” Chen Rui shook his head and glanced at all the people present one by one, “I need everyone.”

Knowing smiles appeared on everyone’s faces. Alice jumped on Chen Rui’s back laughingly, Ms. Duoduo occupied her daddy’s neck not to be outdone. Kia mischievously wanted to hang another Doudou koala on him. As a result, the naughty child burst into tears without giving face to his father.

Outside the frolicking crowd, Python stood quietly in the corner, watching the scene with a calm gaze that seemed neither happy nor sad. Nonetheless, she lost the original loneliness, with only 1 sentence in her mind.

Whether I look at you or not, your heart is always in my heart. I will never let go.
